Comment: Average to begin, soon at rear, shared last place 7 to 8Ls away, switched back to rails on circle, in traffic turning in, held up throughout straight and was not properly tested at finish. Pay to forget.

Standard to begin, showed good dash to cross and take lead, kept them going at an even tempo, dictated terms and held narrow advantage to bend, kept there to 200 M but all out and offered nothing, lost touch in run to line.

Fast into stride, pressed on from a wide alley using some fuel to get to sit outside leader, raced at leader's girth throughout, moved up to challenge on bend, headed leader at 200 M but couldn't sustain run and faded last 100 M.

Began with rest, didn't have early dash and drifted back to rearward position on rails 6Ls away, had easy time and saved ground on bend, held up behind traffic turning in, into clear passing 250 M and closed off nicely for 3rd.

Reasonable to leave gates, showed enough to challenge for lead early, took trail and had run of race shortly after, tracked nicely on bend, gap appeared but didn't quicken and simply ground away to make the frame.
Awkward to begin and lost ground, soon positioned at tail, raced on rails 8Ls from leaders, lobbed along to bend, under pressure turning in, did little in run to line and was well beaten.

Fast into stride, pushed on from a wide alley to take up 1 out 1 back trail, had ideal run 2Ls back thereafter, urged along turning in, in traffic and checked early in straight but clear from 250 M, closed evenly without looking likely.

Slow into stride, settled down just worse than midfield 4 to 5Ls away on rails, spent nothing in run, had something to offer turning in, followed rails but run closed at 200 M and didn't really get a clear run thereafter.

Moderate break, ridden along to hold a midfield position, raced 2 wide 5Ls from lead, not asked in middle stages, tracked well 3 wide on bend, switched out and closed nicely down middle to score with a slogging effort last 200 M.

Began well enough, went forward in search of position, caught 3 wide 2Ls back without cover, always working wide to bend, right there 1L back turning in, didn't find when asked and weakened out of it last 200 M.

Bounced with rest, pushed along to settle worse than midfield 2 wide 6Ls off leaders, circled 3 wide on bend, well back turning in, made up many lengths down middle of the track to be closest on line.
Reasonable break, showed some speed to be amongst them just off pace 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, had even run thereafter, under pressure on turning, didn't find and weakened out badly in straight.

Moderate beginning, urged along to take up midfield role, raced 3Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, tracked well on bend, couldn't find extra gear in straight only managing to hold ground to line.

Ordinary jump, hard ridden to make ground when out of position, raced 3 wide 4Ls away with cover, always niggled along, under pressure on turning but responded nicely making run with winner but unable to hold on late.
Travelled just off midfield two wide with cover, weakened inside the 200 M.
Ridden along early to lead. Headed after the 400 M and faded in the run to the post.
Positioned 1 off with cover at the 800 M about 2Ls back, steadied and shifted out after the 700 M. Finished off soundly.
Posted wide and without cover, back in the field, never a factor.
Pressed forward from the outside alley to sit at leader's girth. Hit the lead after the 400 M to win narrowly.
Stalked the leader along the rails, failed to accelerate when asked turning for home.
Settled in last position, struggled in the straight.
Raced about midfield 1 off with cover. Finished off strongly after working into clear running in the straight.
Raced midfield but wide and without cover, closed off strongly.
Just behind midfield, 1 off with cover, made up good ground despite running into traffic problems in the straight.
Sat midfield on the fence, had every chance but failed to run on.
Slow to begin and settled behind midfield along the fence, checked near the 800 M and again at the 200 M. Never likely.
Raced 1 out 1 back never threatened and weakened inside the furlong.
Travelled 2nd last, 1 off with cover. Held up early in the straight. Switched out after the 350 M and ran on well.
Jumped only fairly and was hard ridden early to be in front of midfield. 3Ls off the pace turning for home and quickened 400 M. Kept gaining ground but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Best out but was allowed to drift back to race within 3Ls of the pace. Kept on only fairly and unable to gain much ground in the straight.
Ridden along to take up a forward position. Steadied and lost a bit of ground 900 M. Edged closer making the turn and was a length off the pace on straightening. Unable to find extra thereafter.
Outpaced early and raced in rear section. Tried to rally but got held up for some distance near 300 M. No luck again when unable to find clear run over the final 100 M. (Lame.)
Better than midfield but wide without cover. 4-wide and a length off the leader making the turn. Weakened on straightening after hard run.
Failed to muster early speed and trailed field. Near last on straightening but made a nice rally to be closest at finish.
Ridden along from a wide draw to take the lead. Opened up a 2Ls advantage 300 M out and kept on gamely final stages to hold off challengers.
3-wide at midfield. Quickened on straightening but ran into some traffic at 400 M. Ran on without threatening.

Didn't show early speed despite being pressured and was racing no better than midfield. Made a ground saving trip on turn and took time to quicken in the straight. Made a late run final 200 M and was closest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened on straightening and made up ground steadily to line.
Pushed along and raced in a forward position. Took a sit near 900 M and raced on fence, 2Ls behind the leader rounding the turn. Failed to quicken and stayed on same pace to the line.
Allowed to drift back from wide draw. Last on straightening and made up ground by running past tired runners.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a response when asked making home turn. Gradually faded final stages.
Niggled along from widest draw and settled behind the leader near 800 M. Kept on well in the straight, fought back final stages and regained 2nd place.
Prominent between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace in about 5th or 6th until midway, 3-wide throughout but mostly with cover, 4-wide turning for home and dropped out very tamely late.
Around midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed until straightening for home, one-paced from then on.
About 6Ls back in 12th at the 1000 M, only a little closer turning for home, made some minor late ground without really threatening a place.
Performance deemed unacceptable having been off the bridle about 10Ls throughout, eased a long way out.
Caught 5-wide no cover early on, never managed to get in so pressed on out deep to be 3Ls off speed at 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th at the 400 M, soon beaten after hard run and eased out late.
Prominent as usual, briefly disputed lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th off home turn, would have placed with any ability to quicken.
Lacked any early pace and positioned 7Ls back in 13th at 1000 M, niggled along at 600 M, 5Ls to make up at top of stretch but finished strongly final 200 M and post came a stride too soon.
Keen early, settled 1L back in 3rd at 1000 M, led about 350 M out and again appeared reluctant with head on one side, 1L clear at 200 M and all out to just hang on.
Had the run of the race on fence 4th at 1000 M, 2Ls back in 6th and 2-wide at final bend, looked held from the money when crowded at 100 M out.
Led early on, 1L clear at 800 M, headed by winner 350 M out, soon beaten and eased late.
On fence about 4Ls back in mid-division when steadied at 700 M, disappointed for running off final bend and checked at 100 M when tight for room again when 3Ls behind, not ridden out late.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, edged closer in 3rd at top of stretch had every possible chance to at least run 3rd but missed out on a place in final strides.
Midfield or so about 4Ls off pace at halfway, improved to 2Ls back in 7th taking final bend, given every hope to place but failed to find an extra gear.
3-wide with cover and worse than midfield, raced about 5Ls off speed until home straight when driven along, made some nice late ground to just nick a place.

Slowly away and checked at start, settled further back than usual towards rear about 6Ls behind at halfway, about 4Ls back in 10th turning for home, about 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M but no extra thereafter.
Settled about 5Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, improved on the circle but forced 4-wide about 2Ls off speed, picked up well to hit lead 150 M out and drew clear final 50 M.
Always tended to hang in from the 1000 M, had cover in midfield about 3Ls or so off pace until the 600 M, closer turning for home and had the opportunity to place but weak in the finish.
Had a nice run on fence not much worse than 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until home turn, very flat in the finish.
Always in rear bunch and never closer than 7Ls off speed at any stage, checked on turning in but never really looked likely.
3-back on fence in midfield until the 600 M, short of running room entering straight and shifted out at 300 M, no impression.
Covered ground out 3-wide down the backstretch but had cover in midfield about 3Ls or so off pace, loomed up a neck off pace at top of stretch, found the winner too strong in final 200 M.
Couldn't lead and strung out 3-wide without cover from gate 14, 1L off pace but still wide from 800 M to home turn, weakened out rapidly in the straight.
Slowly away and crowded at start, 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, about 5Ls back in 12th on straightening, finished off well to take 3rd in final strides.
Broke to the left causing trouble out wider, led on fence by a neck from 1200 M to home straight, headed over 300 M out and tired late.
Severely checked exiting gates and carved up again after 100 M, about 6Ls off pace in 10th at halfway and 4Ls back in 10th at home turn, briefly threatened but didn't run on final 200 M.
3-wide with cover early, got in 2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th taking home turn, one-paced and weakened further final 200 M.
Prominent within 1L of the speed until the final 400 M, dropped away very rapidly after that.
Caught 4-wide without cover towards rear early, 6Ls down in 10th at 800 M and same margin behind in rear at final turn, ran on past a few tired ones in final 200 M.
Bumped at start and not settled thereafter, 2 wide never better than midfield, very green and made little impression.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, raced 2Ls off pace 2-3 wide, no turn of foot in straight just holding ground to line.
Always midfield, trapped 3-4 wide not suited by the slow pace, made no progress in final stages.
Slow away as usual, eased 5.5Ls off pace, trapped 3-4 wide and moved up at 800 M, weakened 250 M.
Eased to the rear, raced 8Ls behind leaders trapped 3-4 wide, not suited by the slow pace, showed little dash from 200 M.
Eased back to sit 7.5Ls off pace along the rail, lacked room at top of straight, ran on OK when clear.
At rear, 8Ls behind leaders 2-3 wide not suited by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, dashed well doing best work late as usual.
Settled nicely in box seat, benefited by the slow pace, made a run at the 300 M, kept on strongly to win.
Hard ridden to get across in front and share the lead along the rail, overhauled before entering the straight, flattened at 300 M and was disappointing in run to line.
Eased to sit about midfield 3.5Ls off pace, raced keenly 2 wide throughout, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Midfield, 3.5Ls behind leaders along the rail, lacked room between 400 M and 200 M, dashed strongly to finish a solid 2nd despite the slow pace.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off pace, 2 wide early not suited by the tempo, swept up 4 wide on straightening, dashed well but run ended at 200 M.
Just behind midfield, 5Ls off pace along the rail, harmed by the slow tempo, lacked room early in straight, dashed strongly for 3rd when clear.
Shared lead easily, 2 wide throughout, helped by the slow early tempo, overhauled at 150 M, kept on steadily to the line.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position early. Took closer order coming out of back straight, chased tearaway leader around home bend and into straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Raced in 5th on rails in better than midfield position. Switched off rails from box-seat run early in straight. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M without threatening.
Travelled in last few to straight. Did not find much room early on straightening. Finished race off well inside final 200 M.
Settled down better than midfield. Dropped out tamely in straight.
Slightly slow out. Settled at the back. In last few around home bend and into straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Settled 2-wide around midfield. Commenced move when tight between runners early in straight. Fought on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M to reach 3rd late.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field until running on past beaten horses inside final 300 M.
Settled just off the pace. Moved into 3rd on rails rounding home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening running past tiring leader 150 M out. Won readily.
Ridden along rails to gain rear of midfield position early. Remained similar into straight and produced good impression late but tightened near line.
Took up running about 1300 M out. Went well clear of field rounding home bend. Still holding some 5Ls advantage turning in. Tired badly passing 200 M and swamped 150 M out.

Ordinary to begin, assumed usual position amongst rearward division, raced on rails 8Ls from leaders, not asked in middle stages, kept to rails turning in, didn't make any impression in home stretch turning in below par effort.

Out with them, slotted into midfield position on rails 4 to 5Ls from speed, had quiet time and saved ground on bend, run opened at 400 M but didn't find an extra gear simply holding spot in run home at same speed.

Began with rest, settled in midfield role 2 wide 4 to 5Ls from speed, travelled well throughout, amongst horses turning in, run opened at 300 M, didn't show great dash but still finished off steadily making some ground to post.
Amongst first few to begin, slotted into nice trail 1 out 1 back 3Ls back, tracked nicely on bend, eased 3 wide turning in, kept chasing in straight to be not far away on line. Much improved effort.

Began with rest, hard ridden to take closer order, posted 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls from leader, always working hard with pace on, covered plenty of ground to bend, under pressure at 300 M and couldn't lift when workload took toll.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, settled down towards rear 3 wide 7Ls off pace, made 4 wide run on bend tracking wider into straight, didn't respond in last 300 M and just battled away in finish.

Even jump, couldn't match them early and faded back into midfield, raced 5Ls back with cover, angled 4 wide on bend, didn't let down when making run at 350 M and simply plodded to line. Hasn't come back.

Bounced out well, didn't show enough speed to lead, raced behind leader 2Ls away with nice trail, had to chase leader at good pace on bend, kept to rails in straight but found little when asked and only battled away to line.

Checked soon after start and lost position, travelled further back than usual racing at tail 9 to 10Ls back, still had field to beat on bend, came to outside but offered no sprint in run home just plugging away to line.

Only fair to begin, settled behind midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls back between horses, not much room turning in, into clear passing 350 M, closed race off evenly making some ground late. Looking for longer.

Standard to begin, took up position just off midfield on rails 6 to 7Ls back, not used in mid-section, well back in traffic on bend, held up at 300 M, clear passing 200 M and closed off nicely to be closest at finish.

Quickly away, pressed on from outside draw to be first without cover, had to cart field up to leader with strong sectionals, 2Ls down chasing on bend, got serious last 200 M reeling in leader at 100 M to score strong win.

Moderate break, settled towards rear, raced 2 wide 8Ls from front runners, not set a task to bend, tracked wide with field to beat on turning, didn't finish off as normally would making minimal ground in run home.

First to hit ground, showed customary turn of foot to take up running, kept them going at a solid speed to suit, travelled strongly 2Ls clear on turning, still gave cheek to 100 M just unable to match winner late. Solid for workload.
Jumped fairly. Quickly ridden to prominent position gaining lead leaving back straight. Held 1L advantage early in straight before swamped under pressure inside final 150 M.
Raced 3-wide in close-up position to straight. Soon weakened.
Raced towards rear on rails. Produced moderate impression under pressure down inside of straight.
Never far off. Chased 1L behind leader turning in. Made modest headway under pressure to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort to the line.
Raced wide throughout and in better than midfield position to straight. Gradually weakened passing 300 M.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Baulked for a run early on. Made no impression inside final 200 M.
Ridden for pace after a fair start. Crossed to rails in front passing 1000 M. Headed 800 M out before folded up quickly upon straightening.

Broke well. Settled in front of midfield on rails, tightened and lost position about 900 M, regained position turning in but little room early in straight. Obtained split 250 M and responded well to score comfortably.
Raced mainly in forward of midfield and keenly rounding home bend. Improved to 2Ls 4th upon straightening but unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.

Broke well. Close up before forced to steady and lost position about 900 M out. Shifted off rails from behind tiring runner when close-up in 5th turning in. Found split 200 M out and fought on gamely for 2nd.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress from last into straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slightly sluggish at start. Raced wide in last few. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Raced wide in last few. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced mainly 2-wide in rear of midfield. Shifted wider for a clear run turning in. Ran on quite well in straight only to be swamped for a placing late.

Amongst first few into stride, settled into 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls back, carted along at reasonable speed by first two, close enough turning in, run opened at 200 M but was dour last furlong sticking on at one clip.

Lost some ground on jumping, soon towards rear, raced on rails 8Ls away from pace, not asked in mid-section. Still well back turning in, saved ground and made run between horses (held up) in straight, flew home last 100 M.

Even break, restrained from a wide alley to assume usual role towards rear, raced 10Ls away at tail, still well back on bend, had job to do in straight, steadily made ground in straight to be closest at finish.

A shade awkward to begin, slotted into 3 wide line just off midfield 6Ls back, wide throughout with cover on circle, tracked eventual winner on bend, stuck to task continually making ground from well back to be right there on line.

Began nicely, over-raced and pressed on to challenge for lead, took over and kept speed on with pressure from outside horse, shaded on bend, gave in when workload took toll at 300 M and dropped out late.

Tardy to begin, positioned behind midfield on rails 6Ls from pace, not set a task in mid-section, saved ground on bend and stuck to rails in straight, no clear run until 150 M, race was run once in clear.

Began with them, didn't have early speed but settled closer closer in midfield 5Ls back 2 wide, enjoyed good run with speed on, angled 3 wide on bend and 4 wide into straight, finished strongly to claim them at 200 M and hold on.

Moderate to begin, soon re-gathered to take up spot in front of midfield 2 wide 4Ls back, eased 3 wide with trail on circle, into clear on turning but run ended at 200 M and just kept same pace to line.

Well enough away, drifted back to settle just behind midfield, raced 6Ls back in 2 wide position, travelled well between horses turning in, into clear at 250 M and finished stoutly despite hanging to share 2nd late.

With rest from break, unable to slot in early, posted 3 wide without cover, 3Ls back always working hard on circle, right there 1L back turning in, threatened to 200 M but just couldn't sprint late after working very hard in run.

Standard beginning, drifted back towards rear, raced 2 wide 8Ls off them in middle stages, angled 3 wide with run on bend, switched wide in straight but didn't find a lot in run home just holding position to finish.

Slow into stride, niggled along to drive up into midfield role, 3 to 4Ls away on rail, angled 2 wide on bend, in traffic for best part of straight but closed steadily all the while to be not far off them in the finish.

First to hit ground, went on to take up running early, handed up but pressured throughout outside leader, continued working hard taking lead on bend, took over but overhauled when run ended at 150 M. Stuck on well.

Began well, bumped rail but still had enough to hold leaders back 3Ls back, made ground to be right there on circle, tracked nicely turning in, amongst horses for most of home stretch but never really going well enough to be a factor.

Average break, drove up into midfield after tardy start, raced 2 wide 4Ls back with nice trail, tracked well on bend, behind runners without much room early in straight, finished off well when in clear to make frame.

Average beginning, soon towards rear and lost 3Ls when checked at 1000 M, raced 3 wide at tail 5Ls back thereafter, made 4 wide run on circle, well back turning in, made a little ground from well back but never really threatened.

Jumped with rest, pressed on to settle not far away, raced 3 wide 1 to 2Ls back without cover, did work to bend, threatened with run at top of straight but couldn't sprint with them late and was one-paced to line.

Began nicely, up challenging and held early lead, eventually took trail and had easy time behind leader, had something to offer when in traffic on turning, closed off only fairly when clear holding same spot to line.

Jumped nicely, pressed on from wide alley, worked hard to take up running, kept pace on with pressure from outside horses, 1L clear on turning, found little when tackled at 250 M and weakened out of it badly late.

Ordinary beginning, checked and lost position early, raced at rear on rails 5Ls from them, had field in front on turning, angled for run between horses and finished race off evenly without ever looking likely.
Evenly away, faded back in midfield, checked at 800 M, raced 2 wide 5Ls away thereafter, well back with job to do turning in, finished race off at same pace just battling to line.

Standard start, ridden along but failed to muster, raced 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had easy time but was pushed along on turning, kept to fence in straight but lacked usual effort in finish and plodded to line. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began well, urged along from a wide alley to take closer order, posted 4 wide 2Ls back without cover, always working to the bend, challenged and took lead at 250 M, no match for winner but fought on solidly.

Moderate to jump, settled down in midfield, raced 3 wide 4Ls back with cover, had good trail to bend, tracked 4 wide turning in, asserted authority passing 150 M and went on to record a comfortable win.

Slow to begin, ridden hard to take up a more forward role, posted 5 wide without cover doing a power of work, right there but made bend awkwardly and began to lose touch, weakened noticeably in straight to be well beaten.

Fastest to break, showed more speed than usual to work across from widest to leaders girth, worked hard with speed on in run, came again when under pressure turning in and stuck on gamely last 200 M to hold 3rd.
Travelled on the speed just behind the leaders in 2 wide spot, shifted out under pressure in the run to the post to go down narrowly.
Last position for the majority of the trip, never passed a runner in the straight.
Parked behind the two leaders on the rail, disappointed for running on straightening, turned in solid effort.
Led early then headed after the 1000 M. Remained on the fence but struggled over the concluding stages.
Raced just in front of midfield 1 off with cover, ran on fairly over the latter stages.
Positioned near last, ran on strongly in the straight after coming to the extreme outside made up many lengths.
Travelled near the rear of the field along the fence, worked to the post soundly.
Took up front running duties after the 1000 M at a solid clip, found the fence after the 800 M, collared inside the 100 M.
Settled in midfield 1 off with cover, held up early in the straight, closed off well when clear.
Raced in a midfield position 3 wide no cover, faded in the final stages.
Raced midfield along the fence, stayed to the inside early in the straight, rolled out over the concluding stages to win in by narrow margin.
Missed the start badly and settled near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover, came wide in the straight and made some late headway.
Sat midfield 3 deep with cover, made reasonable ground in the run home.
Raced at the rear, 1 off with cover. Never a factor.
Soon led. Continued to hold a 2Ls advantage to 200 M, fought hard but was unable to hold off the winner in the final stages.
Hard ridden but lacked early speed and raced towards the rear. Gradually made up ground and was 2-wide in midfield making the turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well from widest draw but was allowed to slide back to midfield. 3-wide making the turn and only kept on same pace in the straight.
Trailed field until straightening. Never found a clear path and remained in last place until final 200 M. Staged a late charge and finished strongly for a minor placing.
Raced in a prominent position behind the leader and never more than 3Ls off the pace. Checked badly shortly after straightening when making a run and lost all chances.
Blundered on jumping, lacked speed and dropped towards the rear. 4-wide and near last on straightening. Never picked up and remained same pace to the line.
2-wide better than midfield. Switched out on straightening, quickened nicely and ran down the early leader inside final 100 M.
Tracked leader. Failed to keep pace after straightening and weakened final 300 M.
3-wide without cover amongst leaders. Lacked the needed response to stay in contention after straightening and faded gradually final stages.
Checked on jumping and was ridden along to keep up behind midfield. Continued to be pressured making home turn but remained towards the rear. Kept on and made up some late ground in the straight.
Raced along the rails in a rearward position. Remained towards the back turning in. Closed the race off strongly despite hanging out and shifting wider on the track.
Raced along the rails in midfield. Unable to quicken and only ran past a tiring runner in the straight.
Took some time to load, soon half a length of pace in 2nd out 2-wide, 1L down in 2nd taking home bend, didn't find much off the bridle and faded late.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home turn, edged out into clear running to lead over 250 M out, always well in command.
Best away and soon clear by about half a length on fence, about 1L to the good off final bend, headed by winner over 250 M out and only plugged on at same pace.
Checked at start and raced 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in midfield early, still 5Ls down in 6th turning for home, stayed on at much the same tempo.
With cover in rear about 8Ls off speed early, similarly placed when without clear running room turning for home, finished off fairly down centre of track.
2-wide in midfield about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, steadied at 700 M and slipped a little further back taking final bend, petered out.
On fence about 6Ls off speed at 800 M, no closer taking home bend but ran on pretty well to grab a place in final 50 M.
On fence about 8Ls off pace towards rear early, not a lot closer taking home turn and one-paced thereafter.
3-wide no cover down the backstretch in mid-division about 5Ls from the front, got in 2-wide with cover in the circle but never looked like making much progress in the finish.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at the 800 M, hung out when under pressure turning for home and 3Ls off pace, dropped away rapidly.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th at 800 M, hung in on straightening and 3Ls down in 4th, continued to hang with awkward head carriage, easy 2nd but had little hope with winner.
Never travelled well, about 6Ls off pace at 800 M and soon became unbalanced and under pressure out 3-wide no cover, 4-wide entering stretch in rear bunch and stayed there.
Fractious in gates and slowest away, soon 10Ls off pace in last position, did not threaten to get much closer.
Bumped at start, always towards rear about 8Ls off speed, left 3-wide no cover on the circle, detached turning for home and soon well beaten.
Caught 4-wide no cover and 1L off pace down the back, 3-wide no cover on circle, had every chance in the straight but carried head awkwardly and laid in, just missed a place.
Clipped heels and pecked at 900 M in last place, improved to 4Ls down in 10th at home turn, edged left into clear and stayed on well to lead 50 M out and just prevail, game win.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield until halfway, 3Ls down in midfield at home turn and all out when 2Ls down at 200 M, tired and hung right final 100 M.
With cover in rear bunch about 6Ls off speed at halfway, rather wide and with 5Ls to make up turning for home but stayed on quite well to nick a place on the line.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 5th at 900 M, still well there turning for home but failed to find an extra gear and held through final 200 M.
Caught wide without cover early so pressed on to flank leader out 2-wide at 900 M, kept on to lead briefly at 300 M but headed at 200 M and weakened late.
Took some time to lead, 5Ls off pace in 9th or so when steadied at 1100 M, further back and wobbled awkwardly turning for home, soon left behind.
Box-run in 3rd early and 3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 7th at 800 M, didn't find much daylight from top of stretch to 100 M out but unclear as to how much he would have found.
Disputed early speed on fence before opting to take a trail in box-seat 2Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight when hard ridden, found nothing off the bit.
Raced 2 and 3-wide with cover until the home straight, 3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M and 2Ls down in 4th at top of stretch, led over 200 M out but no extra when grabbed by winner at 50 M.
Slowly away, raced greenly 5Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, over 3Ls down at home turn and stuck on well in the straight, only just shaded by the winner, promising debut.
About 6Ls off pace in rear early, left 4-wide no cover from the 900 M and shoved out 5-wide (widest of all) when 6Ls back in 12th, made no impression.
Mustered enough speed to finally get to the fence and lead by 1L at 900 M, same margin clear at home straight entrance, faded out once headed at the 300 M.
7Ls last at 1000 M with cover, unbalanced and blundered turning for home when 6Ls off speed, made up some nice late ground, nearest at finish.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot, trapped 3 wide throughout 2Ls behind the leaders, ran on until 200 M but was flat in run home.
From the rail-draw travelled in a more prominent spot about midfield, 3.5Ls off pace along the rail, lacked room in straight, dashed fairly when clear.
Eased at start to get across to the rail towards the rear, 7Ls behind the leaders, shifted out and bumped another runner on straightening, little dash 200 M.
Eased to the rear, raced 7Ls off pace 2 wide throughout, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked for most of straight, dashed well at 100 M when clear.
Always midfield 2 wide throughout, never progressed in final stages.
Eased back early, trapped 3 to 4 wide, progressed steadily at 1000 M to be about 3.5Ls behind the leaders, dashed well from 400 M to win.
At back, raced 2 wide early about 6Ls off pace, was bumped badly 400 M, swept 4 wide on straightening, dashed well 250 M to be not far away in finish.
Eased at start to get across to rails behind the field, settled about 5Ls behind the leaders, making little progress in straight when checked at 100 M.

Eased to the rear as usual, not suited by the racing situation 6Ls behind the leaders trapped 3 wide throughout, was bumped at 400 M, swept up 5 wide on straightening, dashed strongly at 300 M to be nearest on line.
Hard ridden to share the lead, travelled comfortably 2 wide throughout at slow tempo, hung on until 150 M when overhauled, kept on for 3rd.
Settled just behind the leaders along the rail, travelled nicely throughout, however no turn of foot in straight, weakened from 250 M. (Bled.)

Awkwardly away, hard ridden for prominent spot 2Ls off pace early, however trapped 4 to 5 wide throughout, moved up 1000 M but hung out at home bend and lost ground, shifted in 300 M, dashed well 200 M and made ground again to run 2nd.
Hard ridden to get across the rail in front and share the lead at slow pace, weakened from 300 M.
Eased to sit just behind midfield 5Ls off pace 2 wide early, moved up 3 wide at home bend, no turn of foot in straight, disappointing.
Held up just behind pace in the centre of the straight track. Switched off heels of leader to come to challenge passing 300 M and took charge over 150 M out. Won readily.
Made running setting a steady pace. Came under pressure over 200 M out but failed to hold place and swamped shortly afterwards.
Slightly slow out. Travelled in midfield in 5th until weakened out of contention 200 M out.
Never far off. Just kept on steadily at the one pace under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled just worse than midfield in bunched field. Shifted out for a clear run onto course proper. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Settled just half a length off leader early, disputing lead 200 M out before finding no extra under pressure.
Trailed the field most of way. Finished off race well inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd near line.
Settled in rear of bunched field early. Shifted out onto stands rails once onto course proper. Soon tailed off.
Settled in rear of bunched field. Found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M.

Reasonable break, pushed on but ended up in midfield 3 wide from an awkward draw, 3 wide 4Ls back with cover throughout, eased 4 wide on bend, produced a one-paced effort in the straight to finish a distant 4th.

Jumped nicely, pressed on to slot in to 1 out 1 back role 1 to 2Ls back, had ideal run into race, eased out on turning and threatened briefly at 300 M but gave in quickly thereafter and plodded to line.

Began well, hard ridden to take up a position, raced up challenging for lead on inside in a more forward role, shaded throughout but held inside 1L down on bend, early effort told when soon beaten and weakened out badly.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled in midfield but posted 4 wide without cover 5Ls away, always working hard covering ground on circle, struggling turning in and only plodded to line.

Slow to leave boxes, soon towards rear, hard ridden to take a closer position, just behind midfield 2 wide 5Ls back to bend, under pressure on turning, made run between horses but made little impact just battling to line.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, soon at rear, raced detached 8Ls from leaders, struggling on bend and lost further ground, dropped right out of it in the straight to be beaten a long way.

Moderate to begin, settled 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls off pace, tracked wide on bend to get closer, well back under pressure on turning, shifted into clear at 250 M, did best work late to be nearest at the finish.

First to hit ground, pressed on and worked very hard to cross to lead, couldn't get to rails and shaded inside horse throughout, 1L clear on turning and held advantage to 250 M but couldn't fight on when tackled after hard run.

Average beginning, pushed along to hold spot behind midfield, raced 6Ls back on rails, had soft run and saved ground on bend, made run between horses and closed off at same pace making a little ground without looking likely.

Began with rest, bustled along to take up position just behind the speed, had a charmed run 3Ls back in 2 wide line, tracked nicely on bend, into clear at 300 M, went to them quickly and asserted authority winning with ease in finish.

Jumped fairly, ridden up to hold spot close to pace, raced 2 to 3Ls back on rails, had easy time in mid-section, eased 2 wide on turning, gap appeared at 300 M and came with promising run but found winner too good late.

Well enough to begin, didn't have pace to match them early, assumed a midfield role 4 to 5Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, held up in traffic turning in, in clear from 250 M and stuck to task well to take 3rd.

Amongst first few to break, in early battle for lead, forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls back when unable to get in, did plenty of work to bend, couldn't sustain effort turning in and gradually lost touch in run home.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily in straight until finding no extra final few strides.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on to hold every chance inside 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Not far off in 5th on rails. Not much room behind horses early in straight. Kept on steadily without quickening between runners inside final 200 M.
Not far off disputing 5th one off the rails. Made moderate progress early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Badly baulked for a run in straight until late inside 100 M. Finished off race well final few strides.
Well there in 3 wide position to straight. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled in rear. Just kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Kept on well in the run home.
Settled on out one back. Shared 2nd turning in. Soon weakened.
Held up in rear. Waited with. Shaken up upon straightening and ran home stoutly to just get up on line.
Circled field early to take up running rounding stables bend. Led and held a length's advantage until gradually swamped inside final 250 M.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Fought on gamely under pressure to hit front inside final 100 M only to be pipped at post.
Settled on rails towards rear. Badly baulked for a run upon straightening until over 200 M out. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled one back on rails. In box seat briefly upon straightening. Soon faded gradually.

Jumped with rest, faded back to usual place at rear, raced 3 and 4 wide at tail 7Ls off pace, covered ground on circle, still last swinging widest on turning, closed nicely down outside in straight making plenty of ground from well back.

Only fairly, settled down in rear division on rails 7Ls off pace, had quiet time in middle stages, well back on turning and followed rails in straight, didn't get much room on two occasions and finished evenly given circumstances.

Awkwardly away, niggled along to gain a spot in midfield, raced 2 wide 4 to 5Ls away, had even run between horses and tracked nicely on bend, into clear at 350 M and steadily closed (bumping at 200 M) to make frame.

Amongst first to jump, pressured for early lead, raced at leaders girth when unable to cross, kept speed on and applied pressure on bend, challenged to 300 M but had no extra and steadily weakened out in finish.

Quickest into stride, challenged early and took up front running, kept them going at solid clip, pressured by outside horse on bend, held narrow advantage to 250 M but overhauled and couldn't keep on last 200 M after early work.

Standard beginning, didn't have much early pace and ended up worse than midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls back, awkwardly placed behind horses on bend, switched out in straight and made up many lengths to be closest on line.

Jumped with rest, restrained to slot in to running line, raced 3 wide near rear when unable to get in 6 to 7Ls back, hampered at 800 M, well back turning and held up to 250 M, sprinted sharply last 200 M to gather them in late.

Began evenly, pressed forward to take up a prominent role, 3-wide outside the leader without cover 1L away, did share of work to turn, challenged strongly and hit lead at 200 M, fought hard and only nailed last 50 M.

Standard beginning, took up spot off pace in midfield on rails 4Ls back, had easy time in middle stages, kept to rails on turning into straight, made some ground to 200 M but didn't go on with it and kept one pace to finish.

Shade tardy to jump but soon re-gathered to hold leaders back, enjoyed run of race throughout, tracked well on turning, held up behind runners to 200 M and kept on nicely before running out of room again late. Not much luck.

Average beginning, re-gathered to drive into 1 out 1 back position, couldn't have asked for a better run, steadied when in traffic turning in, didn't find when placed under pressure and made no impression in the straight.

Slowly into stride losing 2 to 3Ls, mustered to sit behind midfield on rails 6Ls off speed, had easy time in run, field in front and held up in traffic to 200 M, surged after bumping into clear making good ground to take 3rd.

Began nicely, pressed on but unable to slot in close to rails, steadied and shifted 3 wide with cover 3Ls back on circle, had good trail turning but didn't quicken when in clear and finished off race at same speed last 200 M.

Jumped in line, went back from a wide alley, posted 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back with cover, tracked evenly to be 4Ls down coming 4 wide into straight, run ended at 200 M and only battled to line from that point.

Began fairly. Ridden from widest draw to contest lead far side racing wide throughout. Drew level coming out of back straight but slided back to race 1 out 1 back in 4th into straight. Soon dropped out.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. In 5th within 3Ls of pace turning in. Kept on steadily down inner of straight without quickening.
Settled just behind pace on rails. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Took charge over 150 M out. Won readily.
Travelled in just worse than midfield. Jostled between runners upon straightening. Hampered again 200 M out before making some late impression closing stages.
Always struggling at the back.
Broke well. Held slender lead most of way until headed over 150 M out. Plugged on under pressure for 2nd.
Always well behind. Never seen with a chance. (See Racing Incidents.)
With leaders. Disputed lead into straight. Weakened under pressure 300 M out. (Bled.)
Gradually moved up far side to reach 6th in better than midfield position. Midfield rounding home bend and turning in. One-paced when hampered about 200 M out.
Raced in third last and well detached from main bunch. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Improving well when hampered passing 200 M. Sustained good progress to the line.
Raced 3-wide in rear of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M without threatening.
Handy along the fence early. Suffered a check near the 800 M, never travelled afterwards.
Slow to begin then lost further ground when crowded. Settled in last position, held up near 400 M, worked to the line fairly.
Covered ground for most of the race, in a forward position, no cover, never a factor.
Settled just off midfield, 2-wide with cover. Worked through the field in the straight, lengthened well to score effortlessly.
Raced 4-wide, no cover, just off the speed, struggled in the run home.
Took up front running duties and found the fence after the 800 M. Set reasonable pace but headed after the 100 M.
Wide for most of the trip, no cover. Just behind midfield, battled away in the run home.
Raced outside the leader, 3/4 of a length back, pressured by another runner to its outside, run ended near the 100 M.
Raced along the fence, midfield with cover, stayed on one-paced.
Settled in second last position, 1 off with cover, closed off well.
Caught wide early and after the 800 M, was steadied and shifted into a position behind the leading division, around midfield. Never threatened.
Raced 3-wide with the leaders no cover, weakened in the last 200 M.
Travelled nicely in a 2-wide midfield position. Quickened and commenced to rally on straightening. Gaining ground until rider stopped pushing after 200 M due to problem. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden along and took the lead 1300 M. Ahead by a length turning in but gradually dropped out thereafter.
Slowly away and raced along the rails in a rearward position. Near last to enter home straight. Closed strongly before running into traffic over the final 200 M and was unable to be ridden out.
Dropped back from widest draw. Trailed field into home straight and made up some late ground by running past tired runners.
3-wide behind midfield. Pressured to improve in a wide position making home turn. Continued to make up ground in the straight but unable to find extra to challenge closing stages.
Off slowly and settled 2-wide in rear section. Swung out on straightening and swept past the field to claim victory final 50 M.

Jumped well, led early before settling behind the leader 1300 M. Switched out and overtook early leader on straightening and opened up a clear lead 200 M. Stayed on well but failed to hold off a late charging rival.
Travelled on fence at midfield. 2Ls off the pace making home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight but was unable to gain much ground over closing stages.
Settled 2-wide better than midfield. Lacked a response when asked turning for home and faded in the straight.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Kept on without threatening in the straight.
Raced 2-wide and a length off the pace until home straight. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and faded out of contention final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide without cover at midfield. Made up ground in 3-wide spot rounding home turn but was unable to sustain the run in the home straight after working hard throughout.
Settled in rear about 8Ls off pace and 2-wide early, sent on to go 4-wide and 5Ls off pace turning for home, stayed on fairly down centre of track, nearest finish.
Nice position in 6th out 2-wide with cover, 4Ls back and went for home at the 600 M, upsides with every chance at 250 M but flattened out a bit in the end.
Led on fence before being headed about 1500 M out, box-seat trail 2Ls off pace until the 600 M, lost ground on the circle and always much too one-paced on the run-in.
In rear and 2-wide about 9Ls off pace at halfway, still a fair way back turning for home, made some moderate late ground past beaten horses.
No early speed and settled one from rear about 8Ls behind until the 600 M when ridden to try improve, never really got involved.
Soon disputing the speed and a clear leader by 2Ls at 1200 M headed 500 M and faded out from top of home straight.
On fence and worse than midfield through first half, 6Ls back at 600 M in 8th or so, tried to make some headway in stretch but always held.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 6th passing post 1st time, made an effort at the 500 M and drew closer but always outpaced by principals inside final 200 M.
Always well placed better than midfield, 4th wide and 3Ls off speed before kicking on at the 600 M, stayed on well to lead at the 200 M and driven out.
3-back on fence 4Ls behind in 5th at 1000 M, lost position on the circle for home and very weak in home straight, eased final 200 M.
Game effort having been 3-wide no cover in places in midfield or worse at least 6Ls off pace until the 600 M, 4-wide off final bend but dug in well to take 3rd.
Crossed from wide gate to be 1L off speed in 2nd at 1000 M, pressed on to lead 500 M out, headed by winner at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter and lost a place close home.
3-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, closer turning for home and had every possible chance to at least place but didn't find the acceleration.
2-wide and 3Ls off speed in 3rd at 1000 M, niggled along at 600 M to lie up, tight for room when beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, a good 10Ls off pace in 11th with 900 M to race 6Ls down in rear turning for home, tight for room when improving at 200 M, stayed on strongly but too much to make up on the winner.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 6th at the 1000 M, improved position a little off final bend but stayed on one-paced in the finish.
Slowly away, worse than midfield early and left 3-wide no cover about 700 M and 5Ls from the lead, a little closer on straightening, stayed on fairly, nearest at finish.
Never better than midfield at any stage, 6Ls off pace in 9th at 600 M, pushed out 4-wide (widest of all) entering stretch, plugged on at same pace down the centre.
Held up towards rear and still 6Ls back in 10th on fence with 600 M to race, made some minor late ground, never nearer.
Caught 3-wide no cover until getting in 2-wide 800 M about 5Ls off pace in midfield, a little closer turning for home with place prospects but soon fizzled out.
Slowly away and soon in rear, 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, still well behind taking home turn and made no ground.
Away well and settled into 2nd about 2Ls off pace, 1L down in 2nd and driven along turning for home, tired when caught for 2nd inside final 50 M.
Away well from wide gate and pressed on to lead by 2Ls 1200 M, tended to hang out throughout, travelled well until home turn and kicked clear, always holding his rivals.
Slow to muster speed and never travelled well throwing head up and down, 6Ls off speed in 6th at 800 M, beaten 200 M and faded.
Occupied a more prominent spot than usual, 2-wide throughout 1-1/2Ls behind the fast pace, led 250 M, overhauled 100 M, kept running on strongly for 2nd.

Eased to rear as usual, 1-wide early, about 6Ls behind the leaders benefited by the fast pace, progressed along the rail at Home Bend, lacked room in straight, made ground again 150 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed to hold the rail spot just behind the leaders, 1-1/2Ls off the fast pace, used up the fuel too early, lacked room in straight but didn't show any turn of foot.
Very slowly away, never better than midfield, raced keenly, 2 to 3-wide, no progress and weakened in straight.

Eased at start to get across the rail towards rear, travelled nicely 5-1/2Ls behind the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, swept towards the middle of the straight and progressed steadily 300 M to run 3rd.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field, held ground behind the pace group, 2-wide throughout 3Ls off pace and benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300 M to win.
Pushed to gain early lead along the rail, took sit just behind leader 1200 M, applied pressure outside the leader 600 M, harmed by the fast pace, overhauled 250 M, but stuck on well to the line.
Settled along the rail about midfield, helped by the fast pace, lacked room 300 M, just held ground when clear.

Tried to sit just off the leaders 1-wide early, however raced too keenly and moved up 1200 M to lead along the rail, pressured 600 M, not suited by the fast tempo, flat at 200 M and finished only fairly.
Eased early but still in a more prominent spot than usual, 3-1/2Ls behind the fast pace, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground to bend, weakened in straight.
Made running to 150 M. Weakened.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in midfield. Took off 3-wide going up Rock to be close-up 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on same pace without quickening throughout straight.
Travelled in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled at the back. Made no show in straight.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge passing 400 M gradually drawing level briefly 200 M out. Soon swamped.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Took closer order turning in reaching 3rd into straight. Just kept on at the same pace behind runners most of way in the run home.
Settled towards rear. Did not find much room after straightening. Produced good impression late.

Waited with. Took closer order up Rock. Commenced run 500 M out and widest runner towards rear turning in. Ran on determinedly down centre of straight to gain upper hand close to home, only to be pipped at post.
Never far off, travelling mostly in 3rd to home bend. Close up 5th turning in. Fought on stoutly under pressure to hit front over 100 M out only to be collared final few strides.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to hold every chance in straight and narrowly miss the placegetters.
Settled in rear. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M to snatch victory in the shadows of the post.
Began well, outpaced early, posted wide in midfield 4Ls back without cover, always working and dropped in on bend, 5Ls down on turning, switched out and made up some ground to be nearest on line.
Standard break, soon towards rear, settled in 2-wide spot 3-4Ls away, had good trip with pace on, tracked well on bend, into clear at 150 M, kept on down middle to take 3rd narrowly.
Moderate beginning, not much early toe and ended up 6Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, saved ground on bend, kept on evenly in straight doing best work late.

First to hit ground, showed usual dash to battle for early lead, raced at leaders girth applying pressure, did share of work with speed on, right there on turning, couldn't find when they went up a notch and weakened noticeably late.

Began nicely, held a prominent spot behind leader, had run of race on leaders back with honest speed on, tracked well on bend, gap presented at 200 M and dashed through with good run but found winner better on night.

Sprung with them, urged along and raced more forward than usual 3-wide outside the leader, applied pressure and had a tough run without cover, kept challenging turning in but run ended soon after and dropped right out. (Lame.)

Standard jump, hard ridden to take closer order, pushed on 4-wide without cover, had hard run 2Ls back doing plenty to turn, not far away on straightening but soon weakened when workload took effect and dropped right out.

Jumped with line, took trail behind speed in 1 out 1 back position throughout 2Ls away, had good suck into race, into clear passing 200 M but unable to respond to pressure and was one-paced in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Amongst them leaving gates, showed early dash to take up running, rolled along at good clip when pressured, held a narrow lead on turning, collared at 200 M when run ended and weakened out to line.

Awkward to begin but regathered to sit just off midfield 4Ls back on fence, had easy time in run, in traffic and held up on turning and again at 200 M, did best work late when in clear to be nearest on line.

Jumped with field, pressed on but caught wide from an awkward draw, raced 3-wide 2Ls back with cover, had nice trail to bend, came with strong run to take over at 200 M and asserted authority late for another solid win.

Slow into stride, soon towards tail, raced 2-wide 6Ls off pace, had quiet time before inconvenienced and lost position at 500 M, well back on turning in, came to outside and made up some late ground without ever looking likely.
OK beginning, kept near outside rail, raced behind leader 2Ls back, pushed along at 300 M, responded fairly and stuck to task last 100 M to hold ground without really looking likely.

First to hit ground, showed usual speed to lead them up, raced 2Ls clear on outside rail, kept going at a good clip, still held some advantage to 200 M, weakened last 100 M and was collared right on line.
Reasonable break, took up role in middle of track 2Ls off lead, always in 2nd, moved closer at 300 M and shifted towards outside, stuck to task battling on for a solid third.
Well enough to jump, up towards midfield 3Ls back, hung throughout and raced ungenerously, under pressure passing 400 M, weakened out tamely in run to line.

Well enough to begin, in middle of track from poor inside draw, dropped in for trail to race 5Ls back, under pressure at midpoint, came again last 200 M to make some late ground (lost both front plates).
Well enough to jump, up challenging in middle of track 2Ls back, never really looked comfortable, unbalanced at 400 M, was a spent force thereafter and weakened in run to line.

Began awkwardly, lost ground when checked shortly after the start, raced at rear 6Ls away towards outside, raced greenly and steadied at 400 M, had chance but didn't find much over concluding stages just plodding to line.
Even beginning, positioned towards middle 4Ls back, niggled along at midpoint, struggling at 400 M, found nothing when asked and gradually lost touch last 300 M.
Jumped a little awkwardly, took up position in middle of track from inside draw, had cover behind horses 3Ls back, made ground from 300 M, kept giving to make the frame. Useful debut.
Moderate beginning but recovered to trail leader on outside rail 3Ls back, pushed along to make ground at 400 M, ran out of condition and weakened last 200 M.
Broke with rest, showed enough dash to hold midfield spot 3Ls back, there until 400 M, couldn't find at business end running out of gas and simply plodded to line.
Ordinary break, kicked up to be amongst main group well off rail 3Ls back, there to 400 M but struggled when pressure applied, didn't make any impression in run to line.

Slowly into stride, raced on outside rail behind midfield 4Ls back at midpoint, pushed along and responded at 300 M, gradually improved and found an extra gear last 100 M to close over the top of leader to score.

Began with line, settled behind main bunch 4 to 5Ls away towards outside, green throughout and pushed along at midpoint, didn't really find extra and just kept on at same clip to line. Better for outing.
Settled back along the rails, attempted to shift out on straightening but was unable to do so then suffered traffic problems on a number of occasions. Closed off well.
Led throughout, kicked early in the straight but collared in the shadows of the post.
Travelled behind midfield, 1 off with cover plugged away in the straight.
Around midfield along the fence, got home satisfactorily.
Settled in last position, never passed a runner, disappointing.
Ridden back from an outside gate. Settled near midfield but 3 wide no cover, struggled in the run home.
Sat 2Ls behind the leader on the fence, stuck to task gamely over the concluding stages.
Raced midfield, 2 wide with cover, one paced in the straight.
Pressured early and raced 1 out 1 back. Took the length of the straight to wind up, taking the advantage close to the wire.
Ridden along and was able to go forward, running second, 1 off. Failed to quicken in the straight.
Raced wide near the rear for most of the trip, hard run.
Got its head up at the start and was taken back near the rear, one off with cover. Made a rush early in the straight but faded over the last 200 M.
Settled in second last position, 1 off, looked to come wide near the 500 M, but shifted back to the fence in the straight, closed off nicely.
Raced along the fence in a handy position, held up near the 350 M, ran on well once in the clear.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Checked at 1000 M and shifted 2-wide but remained in midfield. 2 to 3Ls off the leader making the turn but only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Wide and without cover at midfield early. Pulled its way forward and was racing 3-wide outside the leader making the turn. Unable to keep pace after straightening and weakened final stages.
2-wide and a length off the pace. Improved to be alongside the leader making the turn. Continued to duel for the lead before bowing out final 100 M.
Raced in rear section until home straight. Closed the race off with a strong rally but not enough to catch eventual winner.
Jumped well. Raced 3-wide and never worse than midfield. Kept within 2Ls of the pace making the turn but couldn't find anything in the straight.

Settled on fence behind the leader. Took fright at 1000 M and got badly unbalanced but remained behind leader until home straight. Lacked the needed response when asked and remained one-paced to the line.
Missed the jump and trailed field. Last to enter home straight and made up good ground despite hanging in.
3-wide and never better than midfield. Only ran past a few tired runners in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Charged through rivals in the home straight and ran down the early leader final 50 M.
Soon in front. Duelled for the lead after straightening. Shook off co-leader final 100 M but unable to hold off the top pair final stages.
2-wide at midfield early stages. Got squeezed after 1000 M and lost a bit of ground. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Travelled just behind midfield. Failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Travelled on rails around midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled mostly 2-wide in 6th just better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure in straight before no extra closing stages.
Never far off in 5th on rails. Kept on at the same pace in straight without quickening.
Settled towards rear. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in mid-division. Came to challenge upon straightening, gradually shifting out onto stands' rails over 250 M out. Sustained effort to grab lead close to home.
Trailed the field to 200 M. Ran on past beaten horses.
Settled in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Quickened inside 300 M to hold every chance but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Amongst leaders. Took up running coming out of back straight. Led until overhauled over 100 M out.
Well there, shared 2nd into straight. Gradually dropped out.
With leaders far side, settling one off the lead on rails. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Raced on rails in 7th in forward of midfield. Switched out for a run upon straightening. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Held up in rear to straight. Ran on well inside final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled well back. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in the run home.
Well there. Took up running leaving back straight. Drew clear passing 200 M to win readily.
Settled mainly 3-wide towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Tightened at start. Held up on rails behind midfield racing keenly far side. Found no room behind horses early in straight. Only produced moderate impression closing stages.
Travelled in last few. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
Began fairly from widest draw. Soon moved up to share 2nd spot. Weakened noticeably after straightening.
Midfield to straight. Soon faded under pressure.
Settled towards rear. Baulked for a run early in straight. Obtained split over 200 M out. Made moderate headway without threatening. (Blood in trachea.)
Never far off racing 2-wide within 2Ls of pace. Remained similar turning in but could only keep on steadily without quickening.
Never far off on rails within 2Ls of pace. Commenced run upon straightening. Quickened up well inside final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Led early. Taken back to sit on rails just behind leader coming onto home bend. Kept on before no response under pressure inside final 200 M.
Raced mainly 3-wide in rear of midfield to straight. Obtained run over 300 M out and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide without cover in forward of midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Settled on rails in midfield. Switched out for a run over 200 M out. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Began best, eased steadily to sit just behind the pace group, 3 wide throughout, dashed well 400 M to win despite the slow pace.
Trapped 3 wide throughout behind midfield, 6Ls off pace, harmed by the slow tempo, just ran on in straight.
Eased to get across the rail towards the rear, 6Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, blocked most straight, ran on OK.
Settled nicely, 3Ls behind the slow pace, 2 wide throughout, had every chance in straight, however lacked turn of foot, just held ground.

Bumped badly at start, pushed to keep up in midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leader along the rail, not suited by the slow pace, blocked 400 M, swept out to obtain clean running and dashed strongly for 3rd.
Eased to sit 6Ls off pace, 2 wide throughout, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked 400 M, dashed strongly 200 M.
Eased early, trapped 4 to 5 wide about midfield, lost too much ground at the bend and not suited by the slow pace, weakened 300 M.
Eased back as usual, 7.5Ls behind the leader, 3 to 4 wide, lost too much ground at bend and harmed by the slow pace, hung in 400 M, little dash.
Prominent, settled nicely 1.5Ls behind the leader, 2 wide throughout, benefitted by the slow pace, however run finished at 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3 wide throughout, 4.5Ls off pace, not suited by the slow tempo, crowded 250 M, no turn of foot afterwards.
Steeled nicely in box seat, benefitted by the slow pace, blocked 400 M, dashed well when clear to finish 2nd.
Awkwardly away and failed to muster speed, hard ridden for prominent spot, 1L off the slow pace, trapped 3 wide throughout, faded 400 M, checked 300 M.
Led along the rail easily by 1L with slow early sectionals, ran on well until 200 M flattened.
4.5Ls off pace, 2 wide throughout, not suited by the slow tempo, checked severely 300 M, no progress afterwards.
Travelled just behind midfield far side. Shuffled back to rear of field on rails rounding home bend. Obtained dream run on inner 300 M out and responded well to take charge short of line.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much racing room in straight until late over 100 M out.
Settled at the back. Commenced run coming out of back straight improving to widest in midfield around home bend. Fought on steadily down centre of straight until no extra inside 200 M.
Not far off 3-wide early. Moved up to dispute lead around home bend. Kept on before weakened out of it over 300 M out.
Raced very wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. Soon dropped out under pressure after straightening.
Raced wide in rear of midfield of bunched field. Took closer order rounding home bend. Close up 5-wide turning in. Soon found no extra.
Never far off on rails in bunched field. Obtained rails run shortly after straightening and hit front 200 M out but collared close to home.
Prominent. Came under pressure to hold place upon straightening. No extra inside final 200 M.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Held narrow lead until headed into straight. Soon weakened.
Settled at the back. Obtained clear run over 200 M out and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Commenced move turning in obtaining split shortly after straightening. Ran on down centre of straight to hold every chance but failed to sustain effort passing 200 M.

Average to begin, drifted back to take up expected role at rear, lobbed along at tail 9 to 10Ls away, well back with field to beat on bend, switched out in straight but lacked a finish burst and passed only tired horses late.

Slow to begin as usual, ridden along and re-gathered to take up running, kept speed on and gradually got further in front to bend, 5Ls clear on turning, petrol ran out at 250 M and stopped quickly. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bounced with them but restrained from widest gate, took up spot on rails 7 to 8Ls away, appreciated fast pace on in front, improved 2 wide on bend, switched out at 250 M, flew last 200 M making many lengths to claim victory on line.

Began evenly, slotted in for trail off speed 2 wide 5Ls off early leader, had good trip to bend, drove through with run turning in, hit lead at 200 M, kept fighting and had race won everywhere but line.

Standard to begin, settled behind midfield 2 wide 6Ls off pace, enjoyed good run in mid-section with speed on, still well back on turning, steadied when making run at 350 M, came strongly with run but could not match first two.

Amongst first to hit ground, took trail behind early speed battle, first without cover in main bunch behind tearaway leader, niggled along on turning, kept giving and close enough at 300 M but didn't find extra gear and tired late.

Broke with rest, lacked early speed and drifted back to worse than midfield, raced 8Ls back in 2 wide position, came 3 wide tracking nicely on bend, came to middle of track and made up plenty of ground sticking on solidly to make frame.

Standard break, settled behind midfield as usual, raced 6Ls away on rails with quiet run in mid-section, saved ground on bend, kept to rails in straight but lacked usual finishing burst and only battled to line at some speed.

Fast into stride from a wide alley to sit outside early leader, took up spot on rails in mid-section and forced to cart field up on bend, stuck on well to challenge with run at 250 M but couldn't find any extra last furlong.

Standard break, caught 3 wide in midfield from an awkward draw, always working without cover with speed on 5Ls away, made some ground to bend, hard run took toll in straight and condition gave out at 200 M.

Amongst them to jump, took midfield sit to be 3Ls away early, hard ridden to hold spot, had even run with cover in mid-section, kept to rails turning in, didn't respond when gap appeared and only struggled away to line.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out for a run 400 M out. Quickened well between runners to snatch victory near line.
Waited with. Finished off race strongly inside final 300 M down centre of straight to just fail to get up on line.
Never better than midfield. Weakened into straight.
Disputed lead. Obtained slender advantage rounding home bend. Soon headed over 300 M out. Dropped out quickly.
Began well, holding narrow lead before tackled coming out of back straight. Managed to hold 2nd spot on rails despite quickened pace around home bend. Dropped out of contention passing 300 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well down inner of straight. Did best work at finish.
Settled in last few. In rear into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced mainly 2-wide at around midfield. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing under pressure in the run home.
Raced in forward of midfield on rails. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in last few. Ran on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.

Held up in 3rd just behind pace. Stalked leading pair despite quickened pace around home bend taking lead shortly after home turn. Went 3Ls clear to look a winner inside 200 M but swamped when tired noticeably close to home.
Jumped awkwardly. Vied for early lead from widest draw, settling 2-wide in 4th some 2Ls off the lead before pace quickened stretching deficits to 6Ls. Gradually weakened shortly after straightening.

Even beginning, positioned not far off speed 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section, eased 2 wide on bend 2Ls back, into clear and steadily closed to fight out finish but found winner too good last 100 M.

Average break, settled into midfield after going back to get in, 5 to 6Ls back on rails enjoying easy time throughout, tracked well on bend, in traffic and held up to 200 M, closed off nicely when clear to make frame.

Slow into stride, positioned behind midfield 9 to 10Ls from speed in two wide line, travelled well to bend but in traffic, got clear on turning but didn't dash, kept on gamely at same clip to be nearest at finish.

Began well, showed enough dash to take up spot behind leader, didn't settle in middle stages and did share of work with speed on, kept to inside on turning, didn't find when pressured and struggled in run to line.

Tardy early and assumed usual spot in last place more than 12Ls from the lead, lobbed along at tail throughout, came 3 wide on bend, switched to extreme outside in stretch, closed evenly making a little ground late from too far back.

Well enough to jump, pushed on in search of forward role, raced 1L back outside of leader, working with speed on without cover, still 1L down on bend, there to 200 M but ran out of petrol and weakened out late.

Even to begin, took up a midfield role 8Ls back in running line, not asked in mid-section, eased out with 4 wide run but made turn awkwardly, came to middle and stuck on at same pace steadily making ground without looking likely.

Moderate break, mustered speed and assumed role in midfield, forced to race 3 wide before taking up 1 x 1 spot 3 to 4Ls back at 1400 M, had good run and made 3 wide approach on bend, couldn't go with them in straight and battled to line.

Fast into stride, showed speed to take up running easily, dictated terms at good clip in front, kept rolling with 1L advantage on turning, kicked strongly to 200 M before condition gave out and was overhauled late.

Standard break, restrained from a wide alley, finally settled 12Ls back on fence with even pace on, in traffic on turning, into clear at 250 M descended with big run at 100 M to finish over the top for easy win.

Began with rest but restrained to slot in from awkward alley, raced 3 wide 12Ls back amongst last few, on heels at 500 M, well back in traffic on turning, switched out and kept coming in straight without threatening.

Even beginning, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover 8Ls back in midfield, did share of work cutting breeze to bend, under pressure on turning and didn't respond steadily losing touch in straight.

Tardy to begin, settled in rear 10 to 12Ls from speed, not set a task saving ground on rails throughout, well back on turning, switched to middle with run between horses made plenty of ground doing best work late to be closest on line.

Well enough to jump, forced to restrain from a wide alley to slot into running line in midfield, 5 to 6Ls away 2 wide throughout, tracked well on bend, eased out at 250 M with strong run, hung in but stuck to task to hold on to 3rd.
Soon moved up to lead or dispute lead. Dropped a length back in 2nd turning in. Lost further ground in straight.
Raced wide in last few. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Prominent early. Inconvenienced slightly and dropped to 5th within 3Ls of pace rounding home bend. Fought on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led or disputed lead on rails. Went a length clear turning in. Hung on under pressure to the line.
Never better than midfield. Ran home at the one pace in straight.
Raced wide down far side in forward of midfield after beginning from bad draw. Similar turning in. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
Did not jump well. Raced very wide in midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Ridden 4-wide early. Travelled one out one back around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
In last few to straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Jumped early. Taken back to rear of field. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Settled one back on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner the length of straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest of finish.
Enjoyed the run of the race, camped 3L off the speed along the rail early, shifted 1 off after the 600 M, stayed on in the run to the post.
Raced in front of midfield, 2-wide with cover, dour over the last 300 M.
Sat outside the leader 3/4 of a length back, failed to quicken turning for home.
Travelled behind midfield, raced 3-wide without cover after 900 M, did little over the latter stages.
Raced midfield on the fence, never appeared likely after the 200 M.
2nd last position for most of the trip, struggled throughout.
Assumed front running duties after the 800 M. Battled away at the same speed in the straight.
From the outside alley was taken back and settled in last spot. Commenced to improve along the fence after the 500 M, worked to the wire soundly.
Raced around midfield, 1 off with cover, gave ground after the 400 M to weaken noticeably. (Mucopus.)
1 off with cover, midfield, tired quickly after the 250 M.
Camped behind the leader, had even chance but failed to capitalize in the straight.
Taken back from a wide gate and settled just behind midfield on the fence. Commenced to shift out after the 500 M, came to the outside in the straight and finished off strongly.
Dropped back from a wide draw and settled in a rearward position. Made up ground by running past tired runners in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip around home turn and quickened nicely on straightening. Zigzagged through traffic and was closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Jumped well and raced among leaders early stages. Settled 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Unable to quicken after straightening and stayed on same pace to the line.
Tracked leader in a 2-wide position. Never quickened after straightening and weakened in the straight.

Ridden along to a forward position from a wide draw but raced wide and without cover. Kept within 3Ls of the pace back straight and remained without cover making the turn. Weakened and tailed out in the straight.
Took the lead at 1200 M. Held a length's advantage into the home straight and was headed by winner final 200 M. Stayed on fairly over the final stages and held on for a minor placing.

Failed to muster early speed to keep pace with leaders. Squeezed near 1300 M and gradually slip back to behind midfield. Regressed further after the Rock and trailed field into home straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Settled in a prominent position behind the pace. Switched out from behind the leader on straightening and quickened nicely. Ran down the early leader and drew clear final 200 M.
Settled towards the rear. Kept along the rails making home turn and made up ground in the straight.
Caught wide amongst leaders in early stages. Eased back to settle with cover behind midfield from 1200 M onwards. Ran on at same pace in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Continued to race along the rails making home turn and was 2Ls behind the pace on straightening. Kept on fairly to make the frame.
Briefly disputed early lead before sitting 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd from 1100 M to home turn, a neck down with place hopes 200 M out but tired in closing stages.
4Ls back and 2-wide in 6th at 1100 M, 2Ls back in 4th taking home turn, stayed on fairly well but still missed a place.
Steadied on fence when 4Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, back in 7th at final bend same margin from the front, kept on at same pace in the finish.
Pressed on to lead by 1L on fence at 1100 M, a neck clear off final bend, headed by winner about 100 M out and no extra late.
Always nicely placed on the fence, mostly 3-back in 4th or 5th and about 3Ls off speed until home straight, not much room 250 M out but barged through to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Bounded at start, in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace 2-wide with cover until home turn, stayed on fairly out wide to grab a place.
Steadied at 1000 M when 5Ls off speed and 5-back on fence in 7th, niggled along in rear turning for home when 6Ls behind, didn't find much.
Mostly 3-wide no cover, about 5Ls off pace at halfway near the back, never on terms.
