Towards rear about 7Ls off the front at 1000 M, over 4Ls down in 8th or so on home turn, one-paced.
Switched across from wide gate to fence to be 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 8Ls last at the 400 M and made some minor late headway.
Yet another very weak effort, 2-wide and no worse than 2Ls behind a very slow tempo in 2nd or 3rd until the home turn, petered out inside final 200 M.
Awkward break, 3-wide no cover early, 3Ls back in 4th from 800 M to home turn, stayed on fairly well without having the decisive dash to place.
Had a soft run 3-back on fence in midfield throughout, 5Ls off pace at halfway and 3Ls back in 5th entering homestretch, had every chance to figure but was too one-paced.
Slowest away, about 7Ls or 8Ls last until the 600 M, widest turning for home and plugged on at the same pace down centre of the track, never nearer.
4Ls back on fence in 3rd at 1100 M, lost inside position at the 800 M and shuffled back 5Ls off speed in 8th at home bend, no impression from then on.
No speed early on, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, driven along to try and take closer order entering home straight, made only moderate late progress.
Slowly away, left 3-wide no cover from the 1000 M so pressed on to be 1L down in 2nd at the final bend, faded out pretty quickly.
Big effort to win from a most unpromising position, on fence and one from rear about at least 7Ls off pace until homestretch, quickened through gaps on the inside to get up final strides.
4-back on fence throughout, 6Ls off speed at halfway in 9th or so, moved a little closer and travelling well entering straight, crowded at 200 M but ran on strongly for a place.
Led briefly early but handed up to travel 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd until home turn when travelling well, kept on to lead 150 M out but collared in the final bounds.
2 and 3-wide wide but mostly with cover in midfield about 4Ls off the pace, not going anywhere especially quickly when checked about 100 M out and eased late.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1100 M, 1L to the good at home bend, headed 150 M out and one-paced thereafter.
Pushed early to sit midfield along the rails, lacked room at 300 M, dashed well when clear despite the slow pace and the heavy weight.
Occupied a prominent spot behind the leader easily, 2-wide throughout 2-1/2Ls off pace, had every chance in straight however run finished at 200 M.
Hard ridden to get across to the rail and led at slow early sectionals, favoured by the racing situation, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, stuck on for 3rd.
Pushed early along the rail but soon eased to sit 3Ls off pace, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, swept 2 to 3-wide at home bend, little dash 300 M but kept on at same pace.
4Ls behind the leader about midfield, 2-wide early, pushed 3 to 4-wide at the home bend, not suited by the slow pace, flat out 200 M when checked 150 M. Not really likely despite incident.
Settled worse than midfield 2-wide throughout, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 500 M to 300 M, dashed well when clear.
Eased back as usual, 8Ls off pace along the rails, not suited by the slow tempo, swept towards outside in home straight, dashed strongly last 200 M to score.
Eased to get across the rail behind the field, 7-1/2Ls off pace, 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed to get across the rail in front then eased to sit in box seat, helped by the slow pace and the rails run, however just held ground in straight.
Raced behind pace group, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, covered too much ground at the bends, faded 400 M.
Slowly away, eased 8Ls off pace, moved up 800 M, mostly 3-wide swept to 2-wide on straightening, ran on fairly in straight.
Slowly away, eased to sit at the tail, 9Ls behind the leader, 2-wide early, made ground 3 to 4-wide at home bend, dashed strongly 250 M to finish a solid 2nd despite the slow pace.
Not far off in 4th early. Gradually dropped to midfield approaching home bend. Recovered some ground on rails turning in. Kept on steadily to finish.
Raced mainly 2-wide in midfield. Just kept on at the one pace in straight.
Settled at the back and waited with. Made up a lot of ground in straight and ran home strongly to just fail to get up on line.
Travelled towards rear. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts, racing within 2Ls of pace on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening hugging inside rails. Fought on doggedly to just fail to peg back winner.
Soon took up running. Went over a length clear turning in. Soon came under pressure and fought on to just defy challengers close to home.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out. (Lame next morning.)
Settled in rear. Commenced run when effort wide rounding home bend. Sustained steady headway down centre of straight without threatening.
Never on terms.
Travelled behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Travelled in better than midfield position, gaining to 3rd within 3Ls of pace into straight. Ran home steadily without quickening.
Slow to begin, rearward soon after start, raced 3-wide 5 to 6Ls away with cover, always well back covering ground to bend, came to outside in straight, made little impression but set impossible task.

Standard break, positioned 3-wide with cover 3 to 4Ls back in middle stages, always doing some work in mid-section with speed on, under pressure on bend, failed to respond and produced only a one-paced effort in straight.

Fastest into stride, showed plenty of pace but elected to take a trail behind leaders, had run of race in mid-section, 1L back on bend, took inside run and shot through to lead at 150 M, drew away for easy win in finish.

Well enough to begin, took up spot on rails in midfield, had easy time 3-4Ls off lead throughout, tracked nicely on turn, followed winner to inside turning in, kept to task but was no match for the winner late.

Amongst first to leave gates, held lead without trouble, kept them rolling with pressure from outside horse, still under siege on turning and drifted to middle of track, stuck on well just missing 2nd late.

Began with them, didn't have early pace, settled off speed in midfield 4Ls away in 2-wide spot, not asked in mid-section, in pack on turning and made run to inside, kept on evenly to be closest at finish.

Moderate start, taken straight to tail from widest alley, raced at tail 6-7Ls away in 2-wide position, always well back with job to do on bend, made run between horses and finished off nicely last 200 M doing best work late.

Jumped with rest, in midfield early but pressed on when posted wide, caught 3-wide without cover when challenging for closer spot, had hard run to turn, didn't have enough in tank to sprint again and simply battled away in straight.

Out with line, showed enough dash to hold 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls back, raced ungenerously through middle stages, 3Ls back and struggling on turning, only finished at same speed holding ground to finish.

Jumped nicely, didn't have early speed but pressed on to take up spot outside leader, did share of work with speed on and pressured by outside horse to bend, drifted wider but couldn't find in straight and only kept same pace to line.

Slow into stride, regathered and positioned in rearward division 6Ls away, raced greenly in middle stages, still well back on turning, kept to rails and made up plenty of ground in straight to make frame.

Moderate to begin, raced in last few 2 and 3-wide 7Ls back, covered ground and still well back on circle, had field to beat on turning in, came widest but didn't have much chance to get closer and only battled away in finish.

First to hit ground, pressed on from a wide alley to race outside the leader, kept speed on at leaders' girth when refusing to settle, hit lead turning for home, run came to an end at 200 M and dropped out tamely. (Mucopus.)

Began with line, didn't posses early toe, raced behind midfield 6Ls off pace, not pressured in middle stages, eased to middle of track on turning, made up plenty of ground in straight to be nearest on line.

Average to begin, ridden up to take spot in front of midfield, raced 3Ls back on rails having easy time, niggled along to make run between horses turning in, charged into clear at 200 M and drew away late for an easy win.

Began with line but elected to drop out from wide alley, raced next to last 10Ls from pace, not asked in mid-section, pushed along on turning, offered little when asked and simply plugged home last 300 M.

Out with them, showed some early speed to hold a prominent spot, had run of race behind leader (speed on), still there close enough to turn, began to struggle when they sprinted and had only one pace to offer in run to line.

Jumped well, not enough dash to take up usual role in front, raced in coverted 1 out 1 back spot in mid-section, tracked nicely and close enough on bend, threatened with strong run at 300 M but just lacked turn of foot late.

Bounced out from wide alley, restrained to midfield when unable to cross, raced 2 wide 3Ls back, had good trail to bend outside eventual winner, chimed in at 300 M and took over, hung in when run ended at 100 M and couldn't hold on.

Awkwardly away, mustered to hold a midfield spot on fence 4Ls from leaders, had relatively quiet time throughout, saved ground on bend and made run between runners, made some ground but never really threatened.

Away with rest, allowed to relax in a midfield role from a wide gate, raced 2 wide 5Ls back in middle stages, switched out on turning in, produced one paced an effort in straight but kept coming to be closest on line.

Began well, hard ridden to challenge for front, took up running and kept rolling at good speed with pressure from outside horse, niggled along on turning, folded tamely at 200 M and weakened out badly late.

Slowly into stride, chased hard to settle in midfield on rails, 5 to 6Ls off pace having easy time throughout, pushed along when under pressure on turning, responded at 200 M and began to close off nicely doing best work late.

Tardy to begin, niggled along to take close order, raced in rearward division on rails 8Ls away, well back to turn, kept to inside in the straight and kept coming to pass some tired runners late. Still green.

Away with line, didn't possess early speed and took spot near rear, raced 2 wide 8Ls of pace, hung throughout and was pushed along entering straight, switched out and made some impression late but needed the experience.

Slow getaway, pushed along to stay with them from the outset, raced at tail 12Ls from pace, never really travelling and had field to beat on turning, made little in road in home stretch passing some weakening runners.
Travelled 3 back along the fence, stayed on dourly.
Midfield, wide had cover, but weakened over the final section.
Slow to begin, settled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Had difficulty obtaining rear running for a considerable distance after straightening, got home well.
Settled back in the field, 1 off with cover. Experienced traffic problems in the straight, ran on strongly but not fully tested.
Led from outside barrier, fought off all challenges until the 50 M.
Ridden hard early from a wide barrier to race outside the leader, stuck to task gamely.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover, shifted out turning for home and wound up nicely to score going away.
Settled near the rear, on the fence, closed off nicely.
Parked behind the leader, peeled out entering the straight, plugged away one speed in the run home, eased down near the last 30 M.
Raced 1 out, 1 back, dour in the straight.
Covered ground back in the field, had some cover but did little over the latter stages.
Raced in last position, made some late headway.
Raced handy to the leaders but was wide and without cover for most of the journey.
Sat 4Ls back, 2 to 3 wide with cover, struggled over the final stages.
Raced behind midfield. Caught behind traffic at 300 M when making a rally. Made up some ground thereafter but unable to sustain the run final stages.
Off slowly and raced 2-wide behind the pace. Raced 3-wide and 2Ls behind the leader making home turn. Kept on only fairly and unable to find extra to stay in contention final 200 M.

Among leaders before easing back to race along the rails in front of midfield. Gradually made up ground turning for home and was locked in a duel with the eventual winner over final 200 M. Came up just short in a photo finish.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken on straightening and weakened final stages.
Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. Pushed forward after 900 M and travelled alongside leader making home turn. Kept pace before weakening inside final 300 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Switched out on straightening and ran on fairly in the home straight.
Led or disputed lead. A length ahead on straightening and kept on gamely in a duel over the final 200 M. Prevailed in a photo finish.
Dropped to a rearward position from outside draw. Widest turning for home and rallied strongly for a minor placing.
Led or disputed lead before settling behind the pace at 1000 M. Struggled to keep up turning for home and found nothing in the straight.
Crowded to the rear on jumping. Continued to be in a rearward position on straightening. Made up some ground in the early part of the straight but unable to sustain effort final stages.

Slow to begin and raced in midfield. Blundered at 1400 M but continued to be midfield. Quickened on straightening and steadily made up ground. Kept on fairly final stages despite being checked close to the line.
Crowded to a rear position after the start and trailed field into home straight. Never quickened. (Lame morning after.)
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than a neck until home turn, headed by winner 150 M out but did just enough to hang onto quinella spot.
Slowly away, about 10Ls off pace in rear early on, still struggling taking final bend in rear, never got into it.
4Ls back in 5th early on, steadied 500 M out when struggling to lie up with the speed, always held through concluding stages.
Crowded at start, 8Ls off pace in rear bunch early on, marginally closer off home turn but never threatened principals.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until the 600 M, steadied a little turning for home, had every chance to place but one-paced inside final 200 M.
Away well and tracked leader out 2-wide and a neck or so off the pace in 2nd until entering the straight, still right there at the 200 M but weakened thereafter.

4-back the fence about 6Ls off speed in 9th at the 800 M, edging closer when checked turning for home, over 2Ls back in 4th at the 200 M and unlucky not to place, failed in protest against the winner.
About 6Ls back in 8th at the 800 M, 3-wide turning for home when 4Ls down in midfield, every chance when 1L down at 200 M, finished off only fairly but enough for a place.
Always in rear bunch, about 10Ls behind at the 1000 M and still 7Ls behind taking final bend, never dangerous.
Towards rear about 7Ls off pace early on, progress to go 3Ls back in mid-division when turning for home, half a length down with place prospects at the 200 M but failed to sustain the run.
Slow to begin, 3-back on fence about 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, 2Ls down in 5th when produced into the clear at home turn, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out and driven clear.
Best away but caught 3-wide no cover through first half, got in 2-wide with cover on circle and 2Ls down in 4th at final turn, had his chance to place but no extra in closing stages.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off the pace at the 800 M, ridden along to take closer order on straightening but failed to quicken and well held inside final 200 M.
No early speed and settled about 9Ls back in rear at the 1000 M, making some headway when 4-wide off final bend, finished off at the same pace down the centre.
Bumped at start and failed to muster speed, worse than midfield when 2-wide and 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, marginally closer taking home turn but always held.
Raced 3 and 4 wide throughout but mostly with cover, about 5Ls back in 10th or so at halfway, all out when 3Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, weakened late.
Quietly ridden in rear on fence about 7Ls last at 1200 M, 4 wide turning for home about 5Ls last, quickened up well down centre of track to lead with 50 M to go, kept on well.
Awkward break, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 6th from halfway to final bend, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M and ever closer 100 M out, failed to match the winner's late rush, however.
Well positioned 2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, still right there turning for home, given every chance but lacked the acceleration when required.
Led on fence with 1500 M to race, briefly headed about 800 M out but a neck to the good on straightening, kicked for home but headed again inside 200 M and one-paced close home.
Caught wide without cover early on so pressed on to lead briefly at the 800 M, a neck down in 2nd turning for home and all out when 1L back in 3rd at 200 M, faded thereafter.
Midfield early but left 3-wide no cover at halfway when 3Ls off the speed, 4Ls back in midfield when 3-wide taking final bend, very one-paced and eased down final 100 M.

Didn't have much luck in the homestretch when short of room at final bend and again disappointed for a gap 200 M out, had settled in midfield with cover at halfway, eased once chance had gone at the 200 M.
4-back on fence towards rear about 5Ls from the speed at 1000 M, a little closer on straightening and 2Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, kept on finding enough to place.

Unlucky not to at least place, settled 3-wide with cover in rear group about 5Ls from the front at the 1000 M, not much closer on straightening when checked, short of room until 250 M out, finished well, never nearer.
Nice position on fence in 4th about 2Ls off speed at halfway, still well there turning for home and loomed a winning chance on inside at 200 M, no extra in closing stages.
Mostly midfield 3-back on fence about 4Ls from the front until the 600 M, driven along to pick up entering straight, stayed on only fairly and no excuses, lacked the dash of those in front.
Eased 5Ls off pace, raced 2 wide throughout, led 250 M, passed at 100 M but ran on well for 2nd.
Always midfield 2 wide early, 8Ls off pace throughout, swept forward 4 wide on straightening, progressed steadily 300 M.
Worse than midfield more than 10Ls off pace along the fence, fence, ran on OK in straight, lacked room last 50 M.
Eased at start to get across the rail behind the field, then pushed to sit 8.5Ls off pace, made some ground in straight.
Eased to sit 6.5Ls off pace, 2 to 3 wide, no progress in final stages.
Crossed in front steadily and led by 2Ls along the fence, hung on until 300 M, faded out late when run ended.
Eased to sit behind the leader, had no cover early along the rail and raced keenly, ran on well until 200 M, flat out late and maintained same pace to line.
Shortly after the start took the rail in front, then eased to be 4Ls off pace, bumped 400 M, ran on strongly 200 M to win, not fully used up in doing so.
Eased back to sit 2 wide early 9.5Ls off pace, swept up 4 wide on straightening, progressed steadily 300 M to finish 3rd.
Eased early, raced about 5Ls off pace 2 wide, accelerated sharply and moved up from 900 M, weakened 300 M.
Eased back at start, more than 10Ls off pace 2 to 3 wide in mid-section, ran on OK in straight, never threatened.
Eased to sit at the tail, more than 11Ls of pace 2 wide throughout, no progress in straight.
Eased to get across to the rail towards the rear more than 11Ls off pace, ran on only fairly in final stages.
Eased to sit about midfield, 6.5Ls off pace along the rails, made ground 300 M, lacked room last 100 M.
Soon taken to rear and crossed to outside rails. Commenced move coming onto course proper taking closer order to hold good chance over 300 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out over 250 M out.
Began well. Well there to 300 M. Gradually weakened.
Well there until finding no extra under pressure over 250 M out.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Always travelling well prominently. Came to challenge 200 M out and soon took charge. Won readily.
Always well there. Shaken up over 200 M out but unable to quicken to threaten.
Always travelled in last few and never seen with a chance.
Held up in midfield. Came to challenge down centre of track passing 400 M. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite not threatening winner.
Close up. Took up running onto course proper. Led until collared about 100 M out.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled mainly within 2Ls of pace in the centre of the track. Faded from over 250 M out.
Only a standard jump, assumed role in midfield 3Ls from pace, travelled well in middle stages, showed good sprint from 300 M taking ground off winner over closing stages without really threatening.

Began with rest, took up spot just behind pace, raced 2Ls away throughout, close enough at 300 M and did best to mount a challenge, could only hold ground last 200 M lacking an extra gear to make inroads.

Even beginning, raced 3Ls back against outside rail, hung throughout which didn't help progress, urged along passing 400 M, didn't find as usually would and produced a lack lustre finish just battling to line.

Shade tardy to begin, raced near to last 6Ls back in middle of track, always pushed along, gave big start at midpoint, Stuck on at same pace and finished off evenly to be nearest on line. Needs longer.
Fastest into stride, led them in middle of track, kept rest chasing 1L clear at midpoint, held advantage to 300 M, didn't find when tackled and weakened out tamely after workload took toll.
Average break, raced in centre of course 5 to 6Ls from them in rearward role, pushed along throughout, didn't find much when asked but did pass a few tired runners late.

Bounced out, showed enough dash to sit just off leaders on outside rail, always travelling well 1L back, loomed up easily to take over at 300 M, placed under pressure and responded nicely for another strong victory.
Standard to begin, mustered speed to race 3Ls back travelling in centre of course, struggling to go gallop at mid-point, didn't respond when placed under pressure and struggled in run to line.

Average break, ridden along to take closer order, raced on outside rail 3Ls back, urged along from midpoint, lacked a sprint but steadily closed to 250 M before run ended, steadied when tiring passing 200 M.
Well enough to jump, showed plenty of dash to race 1 to 2Ls off leader in middle of track, raced greenly throughout, drifted in when tiring at 400 M, unable to offer much fight and faded last 200 M.
Moderate to begin, soon towards rear, raced 4Ls to 5Ls back with cover, well back towards middle at midpoint, got going from 300 M and finished race off nicely. Looking for longer.
Jumped with them but soon positioned near tail, always 7Ls off them and hard pressed to stay in touch, began to lose ground at midpoint and showed nothing falling further behind to be well beaten.
Well enough to break, took up midfield spot near outside 3Ls off pace, trailed along well at midpoint, shifted at 300 M, kept on well under pressure to hold a place. Better effort.

Awkward to begin and checked soon after, taken straight to outside, raced in rear division 4Ls away with cover, still gave a start at 400 M, crowded at 300 M and again at 200 M, kept on well and did best work late to make frame.
Settled in last few. Made up some late ground. Never nearer.
Jumped slowly. Travelled in last few to straight. Finished off race well inside final 300 M.
Settled on rails just better than midfield. Switched out for a run turning in. Kept on well in the run home.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to reach 3rd inside 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Always struggling at the back.
Raced mainly 3 wide just better than midfield. Made modest headway inside final 400 M without threatening.
Began fairly from iwde draw. Moved up to dispute lead rounding home bend. Dropped out tamely over 200 M out.
Travelled in distant 4th. Went wide home turn. Soon weakened in straight.
Travelled just better than midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening. Ran on well to hit front over 100 M out only to be caught close to home.
Settled at the back. Came under pressure upon straightening. Made up good ground inside final 200 M near stands rails. Did best work at finish.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Began well and crossed to lead from widest barrier. Set fast pace and led until tiring over 350 M out.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well inside final 300 M to snatch victory near finish.
Settled in 3rd from clear leading pair. Took over from tiring leaders over 200 M out, only to be swamped passing 100 M.

Moderate start, soon mustered to push on in search of front, kept pressure on racing outside leader, always working with fast speed, didn't find when asked turning in and weakened right out in straight to be well beaten.

Standard to begin, positioned just behind midfield on rails 8Ls off speed, not asked in middle stages, well back amongst pack on turning, lacked usual finishing burst and simply battled away in run home.

Out with line, drifted back to expected position near to last, raced 2 wide 12Ls of pace, not asked in middle stages, still had job to do coming 5 wide on turning, closed off evenly making plenty of ground from impossible spot.

Began in line, ridden up to take up a forward spot, raced in 1 out 1 back role 4Ls away, helped cart field up to speed and going well enough switching out on bend, threatened to 250 M but didn't go on with it late. (Mucopus.)

Average jump out and didn't have early dash, soon towards tail racing 2 wide 8Ls from pace, still well back on bend, urged along on turning, didn't show usual finish and made little impression in run home.

Even break, took up a midfield position, posted 3 wide from an awkward alley but eventually settled 2 wide 8Ls back, improved with 3 wide cart in on bend, in between horses making run and finished nicely when clear last 200 M.

Out with rest, showed enough to hold a midfield role, raced 6Ls back on rails throughout, had easy time in mid-section, urged along on bend, kept to fence and closed steadily in finish to be not far away without really threatening.

Even start, settled into midfield role 2 wide 5 to 6Ls away, in ideal spot throughout following fast pace, made a 4 wide run on bend, briefly looked likely at 300 M but failed to run on and was one paced in finish.

Began nicely, assumed usual role in front, kept striding at a good speed with pressure from SATURN, drew clear of rest on bend holding 1L break, kicked strongly on turning, fought hard but run ended last 100 M and couldn't hold on.

Awkwardly away, assumed usual role at tail, lobbed along at rear throughout 12Ls from front runners, still well back with field to beat on turning, made up plenty of ground along rails to be nearest on line.

Moderate beginning, raced worse than midfield on rails 10Ls from frontrunners, travelled comfortably appreciating fast speed, well back on circle, saved ground on rails and made some progress but struggled to finish off last 200 M.

Well enough to begin, pressed on to work across and slot in behind leader, carted along by fast pace throughout 3Ls back, saved ground sticking to rail on bend, chased hard in straight and kept on evenly to make frame.

Out fairly but restrained to tail from widest gate, settled 3 wide with cover 10Ls from pace, appreciating speed, steadily made ground on bend with 4 wide trail, switched out and dashed hard and overhauled them easily last 200 M.

Average break, regathered to take up spot in front of midfield 4 to 5Ls back on rails, enjoyed a quiet trip to bend, switched out on turning, closed steadily before run ended at 200 M and just kept same pace to line.
Travelled mainly in 4th within 2Ls of pace one off the rails. Lost position rounding home bend and 6th some 3Ls back turning in. Kept on same pace under pressure in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield to 400 M. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Settled in mid-division. Commenced run rounding home bend. Steady headway early in straight before switched out off heels 150 M out for good late progress.
Always well behind and never seen with a chance.
Settled behind midfield. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Chased one back on rails behind leader. Switched out to challenge upon straightening. Gained upper hand about 100 M out and hung on well to finish.
Travelled one out one back until gradually losing ground from 500 M. Found nothing in straight.
Attempted to make all. Came under pressure to hold place upon straightening but swamped when no extra inside final 100 M.
Settled well back. Made up good ground inside final 200 M down inside to be nearest at finish.
Travelled 5th some 2Ls back on rails. Gained 4th rounding home bend and 3rd into straight. Fought on steadily to claim 2nd late.
Settled in last few on rails. Produced good late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in last few to straight. Never nearer.
Led, but weakened soon after entering the straight.
Midfield position along the fence, had to be checked near the 400 M, struggled to sprint over the final stages.
Settled in last position after being caught wide early without cover. Did little in the run home.
Slowly away and settled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Switched out turning for home, accelerated well to score narrowly.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover, peeled out rounding the final turn, closed off well.

Didn't enjoy the best of runs, checked near the 1400 M and again near the 900 M whilst back in the field along the fence. Had some difficulty obtaining clear running near the 200 M finished off evenly when clear.
Travelled midfield along the fence, worked to the post without threatening.
Ridden along early from a wide gate, settled outside the leader about 3/4 of a length back closer than usual. Overhauled after the 400 M and dropped right out over the latter stages.
1 out 1 back, stayed on dourly.
Taken back from a wide gate, raced near the rear, came to the outside in the run home, finished off soundly.
Had the run of the race behind the leader on the fence, failed to go on with it in the straight.
Settled 2-wide and a length off the pace. A length behind the eventual winner on straightening. Kept chasing in the straight but couldn't find enough to run it down.
Raced ungenerously and was checked at 1200 M. Overraced when wide and without cover at midfield for the majority of the race and had nothing left in the home straight.
Raced 2-wide better than midfield. 3Ls off the pace making home turn but unable to quicken on straightening.
Jumped awkwardly and raced mostly in rear section. Steadily picked up after straightening but was checked near 200 M when running gap closed. Only ran past a pair of beaten runners after that.
Eased back from widest draw and trailed field. Swung out on straightening for a rally and made ground to be closest at finish.
Settled 2-wide in rear section early and middle stages. Improved to midfield at the home turn. Continued well and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Led field at a comfortable pace. Held a length's lead into the home straight. Stayed on well over the final stages and maintained advantage to the finish to score easily.
Tracked leader in a prominent position. Kept pace behind leader early part of the straight but unable to gain ground. Steadily faded final 200 M. (Bled.)
Slowly away and raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on fairly in the home straight.
Slow to begin and soon last about 8Ls behind, still 6Ls last on straightening for home out very wide (6-wide), ran on quite well down the centre of the track for a place.
Nicely placed 2-wide in 4th or so about 2Ls off pace through first half, driven along when 3Ls off pace in 5th taking home bend, soon petered out.
3-back the fence in midfield about 4Ls off the pace until home turn, no great acceleration when 2Ls back in 4th at 200 M, stayed on fairly for the quinella.
Worse than midfield 4-back the fence at least 5Ls behind until home turn, never likely to improve his position too much.
3-wide but with cover in midfield on first bend, always about 4Ls or 5Ls back in 7th or 8th until home turn, plodded on at the one pace.
In 10th with cover about 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, marginally closer when checked turning for home, disappointed for room at 200 M when seemingly outpaced and 6Ls back in rear, no impression.
On a fence a neck back in 2nd at 1200 M, moved to the front 600 M out but headed by winner at the 200 M and weakened out of a place.
Slow start, one from rear about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, some headway but caught 5-wide turning for home, definite place prospects when 2Ls down in 5th but one-paced thereafter.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight, led at 200 M, driven clear.
Left 3 and 4-wide no cover early so pressed on to dispute the lead at 800 M, a neck down in 2nd turning for home and ridden along, found nothing under pressure.
Couldn't get his preferred way in front and under pressure well before turning for home, dropped right out in the straight, performance deemed unacceptable.
2-wide in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn, offered nothing akin to a turn of foot.
Hampered slightly early on and soon 6Ls off pace one from rear, a little further back taking final turn, plugged on out wide late, nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 1L off pace in 3rd early but under pressure and slipping behind taking home turn, faded further.
Always right on the pace in 2nd or 3rd and no worse than 1L from the lead until straightening, pulled a neck clear at the 200 M but no extra when headed by winner about 50 M out.
3-wide with cover early when about 4Ls off pace in 8th, 2-wide and 5Ls down off final bend, never on terms with principals.
4-back on fence early about 5Ls off pace in rear bunch, further back and struggling on straightening for home, well beaten.
Awkward break, had the box-run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, tightened for room by SHINING DRAGON at the 200 M and through closing stages, unlucky not to place.
No early pace and soon in last out 3-wide with cover at least 6Ls off pace, made only minor late headway past tired rivals.
Hampered slightly early on, 5Ls back in 9th early, no closer when hampered again off final bend, average finish out wider.
Knuckled exiting gates, caught widest of all racing keenly early on, in mid-division and 4Ls back in midfield at the final bend, eased through final stages.
3-back the fence in midfield until home straight about 4Ls off the speed, still with 2Ls to make up at the 200 M, ran on well late to lead at 50 M and edged clear.
Best away and led on fence about 900 M out, about 1L clear before being headed at 200 M, hung in a little under pressure but did just enough to place.
Nicely placed 2-wide in midfield or better early, 3Ls back in 4th turning for home, had every hope to at least place but lacked the kick.
Pushed early, 2-1/2Ls off pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, hard ridden 600 M to tackle the leaders, exhausted in straight.
Pushed to take the rail and led at slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M, weakened late.
Hard ridden to keep up with the field, raced 3-1/2Ls off pace along the fence, dashed well in straight to finish 3rd.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls behind the slow pace and overracing in early stages, 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, no turn of foot in straight.
Travelled well about midfield, 4Ls off pace 2-wide throughout, dashed well in straight along to the inside fence however was not good enough to challenge the winner.
Slowly away, pushed to get across in front and park outside the leader, 2-wide throughout, ran on until 200 M but flat out late.
Eased back as usual, 2-wide 8Ls behind the leader throughout, swept up 3-wide on straightening, dashed strongly 200 M to finish 2nd despite the slow pace.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, travelled nicely, favoured by the racing situations, swept to the middle of straight, led 200 M, ran on strongly to win.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 5Ls off the slow pace along the rails, totally blocked in straight and checked at 200 M, just ran on thereafter, never tested.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group, 3Ls behind the leader 2-wide throughout, had every chance on straightening, only little dash last 200 M.
Soon at back, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide throughout, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room in early straight, little dash in run home.
Very slowly away, 6-1/2Ls off pace along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, not much room of most of straight but kept dashing well to the line.
Soon dropped to rear. Remained similar turning in. Never nearer.
Raced wide in midfield. Weakened into straight. (Lame.)
Led or disputed lead, eventually gaining a neck's advantage going up Rock. Remained same into straight but headed inside 200 M. Gradually weakened.
Raced wide behind midfield. Gradually dropped out after straightening.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Caught wide early from poor draw settling one out one back at 800 M. Similar turning in but folded up quickly over 200 M out.
Settled on rails in last few. Saved ground on inside turning in. Did not find much room passing 200 M. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled one back on rails in 3rd. Shaken up upon straightening hitting front 150 M out only to be swamped close to home.
Raced fiercely in midfield far side. Bumped by runner-up over 200 M out. Fought on well to just get up on line.
Led or disputed lead early, settling just off the pace outside leader. Kept on early in straight before overhauled inside final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Barged his way for a run over 200 M out. Ran on to hit front inside final 100 M but pipped at post.
Travelled in forward of midfield within 3Ls of pace. Closer turning in. Made modest headway without threatening.

Ordinary break, towards tail as expected in a 2-wide spot 6Ls off lead, not overtaxed in middle but still well back making wide run on bend, hung in and proved difficult but made good ground down centre to be closest on line.

Awkward to begin, unable to go with them and settled further back than usual in midfield, 5Ls away in 2-wide position throughout, well back on turning, kept to inside but only finished off at same speed holding ground late.

Amongst first few to jump, showed plenty of dash to assume front running role, kept rolling 2Ls clear and reasonable speed throughout, still held advantage on bend and kicked strongly turning, drifted right out when tiring late.

Evenly out, couldn't slot in and forced to settle in rearward division, inconvenienced at 1000 M and forced to travel 3-wide 6Ls off pace, had cover to bend, weakened out in straight after hard run, (Irregular heart beat.)

Slowly into stride, soon in rearward division on rails 7Ls away from leaders, appreciated speed on, kept to fence on circle, switched out turning and closed off well through middle of pack giving too big a start.

Tardy to begin, beaten for speed and positioned at rear, lobbed along at tail some 8Ls from leader, benefited by fast pace, still had job to do on bend, inconvenienced on turning and hung in straight, made little impression last 200 M.

Standard beginning, settled behind midfield on rails 6Ls off speed, not asked in middle stages, saved ground on fence on bend, kept to paint and made some ground in straight without really looking likely.

Away well, pressed on to take closer order, assumed position first without cover 2Ls from leader, did share of ground work carting them up on bend, didn't find when placed under pressure and weakened after run ended at the 200 M.

Bounced out well, prominent early and obtained 1 out 1 back role 4Ls away, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, began to struggle on bend, didn't really quicken in straight and produced only a battling finish.

Began nicely, showed early speed to take up spot behind leader, had even trip 2Ls back with speed on, kept to rails saving ground on bend, stayed inside turning in and knuckled down last 200 M to drive to front and score with ease.

Well enough to begin, pushed onwards to get closer from an outside draw, forced to race 3-wide without cover 3Ls away, had a hard run always working to bend, effort took toll and dropped right out in the straight.
Jumped with rest, niggled along to hold a midfield role, had easy time 4Ls back throughout, tracked well behind eventual winner on the bend, chased hard closing steadily but found winner too good.

Moderate beginning, lacked dash and settled in rearward division on rails 8Ls off speed, not asked to bend, back in traffic turning and closed before being held up when improving late, not fully tested but never really likely.
Fast into stride, pushed on and took up front running, pressured but outside horse throughout, under pressure on turning in, failed to respond and stopped quickly dropping off noticably last 200 M.

Jumped away fairly, ridden into a midfield position, race on rails 5Ls back, switched 2 wide on bend, in traffic turning in and didn't really see clear room until at least 200 M, battled evenly thereafter.

Jumped with line, used plenty to go on in second of front, shaded inside horse applying pressure throughout, didn't fully cross but held a length's margin on turning, run ended at 200 M and weakened tamely thereafter.

Amongst them at jump, didn't have much early dash and drifted hack to midfield, posted 3 and 4 wide without cover into mid-section, did share of work to bend, couldn't respond when put under pressure and faded late.
Ordinary beginning, chased along and improved 4 wide in midfield 5Ls back, always doing plenty of work wide to bend, offered little in straight and dropped out to be well beaten.

Began well enough, drove through to hold leaders back early, had run of race thereafter, switched out for a 2 wide trail on bend, took run on rails and challenged strongly at 200 M, condition gave out and just stuck on in same gear late.

Away with them, pressed on from the outside alley to take up a spot in running line 3 to 4Ls back, tracked 3 wide on circle, 2Ls back on turning and steadily made ground to hit lead passing 200 M and outplug the rest in run to the line.

Evenly away, didn't have much early dash, positioned behind midfield 6Ls from speed, had easy time throughout and saved ground on bend, kept to rails before switching out making moderate headway in the straight.

Standard beginning, settled in a midfield role 2 wide 5Ls off speed, made a 3 wide run on circle, 3 to 4Ls back on turning, came with good run down middle but peaked at 200 M, did well to stick on and make frame.

Began reasonably, restrained to find cover at rear of field, raced 2 wide 7Ls off pace, still well back behind horses on bend, came to outside in straight and made up many lengths to be nearest on line.

Slowly into stride and lost 4Ls, hard ridden to keep touch, raced at rear 8Ls away in a 2 wide spot, still well back to bend, made run between horses but made no real impression and just plodded to line.

Amongst first to hit ground, pressed on to take close order, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls back, came 3 wide to challenge on bend, loomed strongly and took over at 250 M, fought on but couldn't match the winner last furlong.

First to hit ground, pushed on but elected to take trail, raced 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had an easy time throughout, kept to fence and was within striking distance on turning, only plugged on at one speed in the straight.
Raced midfield, 3 wide with cover throughout, looked the winner but overhauled close to the post.
Raced outside the leader until about the 800 M, dropped back to be running third the fence, didn't accelerate early in the straight, dour over the concluding stages.
Tracked the leading division, 3 wide with cover.
Sat, 3 wide, no cover with the two leaders until about the 800 M, shifted over to be one off, struggled over the final 400 M.
Raced 1 out 1 back, stayed on one paced.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Raced midfield along the fence, struggled over the latter stages.
Settled in second last position, 1 off with cover, never looked likely.
Settled behind midfield 2 wide with cover. Peeled to the outside turning for home. Finished off strongly.
Camped behind the leader on the fence, shuffled back after the 800 M to race about 3Ls away, had every chance.
Positioned at the tail of the field, became unbalanced near the 700 M, shifted wide turning for home, closed off powerfully.
From a wide gate settled near the rear along the fence, made little impression in the run home.
Midfield, 1 off with cover, weakened after 200 M.
Well rated in the lead, kicked away early in the straight but tired in the final stages.
Just off midfield along the fence, held on early in the straight, closed off nicely.
3-wide in a forward position early. Stayed within 3Ls of the pace making the turn. Ran on well in the straight but came up short in a duel with the winner over the final stages.
Gradually dropped back to race 3-wide behind midfield. Closed strongly and was nearest at finish.
Raced behind the pace until home turn. Weakened in the straight.
2-wide at midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Soon in front and remained in the lead until final 200 M. Unable to find extra to stay in contention over the final stages.
Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and steadily weakened.

Botched the start and raced behind midfield. Progressed to midfield after 900 M and was 3-wide at midfield making the turn. Quickened nicely on straightening and kept on well over the final stages to edge out rivals.
Missed the jump and trailed field until straightening. Made up ground in the final stages by running past beaten runners.
Raced wide in a forward position early stages. 2-wide and a length off the pace making the turn. Improved steadily to take the lead at 200 M but unable to hold off placegetters final stages.
Jumped fairly and steadily dropped to a rearward position. Remained towards the back on straightening and only ran past a few beaten runners.
Behind midfield. Slipped further back to rear section after 800 M and was near the back on straightening. Rallied and made up some ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back and towards the fence. Improved to behind midfield making the turn but never quickened on straightening. Remained one paced thereafter.
2-wide at midfield until straightening. Caught in traffic near the 300 M but closed the race off well once in the clear.
On the fence and better than midfield. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th although a little unbalanced at 1000 M, same position at home turn, had every chance to at least place but lacked the dash.
Always worse than midfield and no closer than 5Ls from the pace, beaten over 200 M and eased late. (Dynamic phargyneal collapse.)
Tardy start but raced 3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, similarly placed off home turn but could only plug on at the one speed.
Awkward break, switched to fence and towards rear about 7Ls off speed at halfway, 6Ls to make up on straightening, knifed through the field well to lead 50 M out, cosily.
Awkward break but soon recovered to take customary place in front, 1L clear on fence at 1100 M, headed 300 M out but didn't capitulate and only just missed a place.
Never travelled well early and soon 8Ls last and further back when detached turning for home, made some very minor late ground. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
About 8Ls off pace in rear bunch early, switched out into clear running entering straight when about 7Ls off pace in 12th, ran on strongly late and nearest at the finish.
Settled in about 8th place with cover and 5Ls off early pace, ridden to take closer order on straightening, stayed on fairly to be nearest at the finish and just nick a place.
Towards rear about 7Ls off pace early, forced wider (4-wide) turning for home when same margin behind the speed, ran on quite well late down centre of track and never nearer.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in midfield before being held up off home turn, steadied again at 200 M when still over 4Ls behind, may have finished slightly closer.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, still in a challenging position off final bend and all out to get 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M. Weakened late.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, a neck down in 2nd when hanging out entering homestetch, led 300 M out but grabbed by winner at 50 M, hung on for 2nd.
Slowly away, midfield about 5Ls off pace at halfway and same margin behind when ridden along taking the home turn, stayed on dourly and never nearer.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace at 1200 M in 4th, unbalanced at halfway but recovered to hold a prominent position off home turn and all out at 200 M, one-paced and faded inside the final 200 M.
Unacceptable performance, always hung out very badly despite box seat run 2Ls off pace, caused plenty interference at 800 M, lost position on circle and detached turning for home.
Crowded at start, on fence in rear about 8Ls off pace when checked about 800 M out, improved a little on rails to be 6Ls off pace turning for home, ran on fairly well, never nearer.
Settled well off the pace as usual, inconvenienced when 8Ls last at halfway, with 6Ls to make up entering home straight but ran on quite strongly to be nearest at finish.
Towards the rear about 7Ls off pace early, still behind when inconvenienced at the 800 M, about 5Ls behind off final bend but soon outpaced.
Soon 4Ls back in 6th place out 2-wide, 3-wide and 3Ls back in 5th turning for home, a neck down in 3rd and looked the likeliest winner at the 200 M but failed to follow through despite narrow 2nd.
Caught 4-wide no cover down the back straight when about 6Ls behind and worse than midfield, bumped out 5-wide (widest of all) taking final bend, beaten well over 200 M out.

3-wide with cover down back straight in midfield about 5Ls off speed but left without cover on circle, ridden when 3Ls down in midfield at home bend, found nothing further off bridle. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Crowded at start, worse than midfield when severely checked at 800 M, disappointed for running at 500 M but still 4Ls down in midfield off home turn out 3-wide, one-paced in the finish.
Made virtually all, led by a neck 1200 M out, over 1L to the good at halfway, headed briefly by MULTIMIGHTY with 200 M to race but battled back well to just prevail, gamely.
Never any worse than 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide until home turn, led briefly about 200 M out but headed again and only just missed out on the quinella.
Awkward break, caught 3-wide without cover early, 4Ls back in 4th with cover at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd turning for home but made no further headway and tired inside final 200 M.
Slowly away, 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th before being very badly checked at halfway, still over 4Ls back in midfield at home straight entrance, one-paced from then on.
Eased back, checked early, 7Ls off the slow pace, 2 wide, lacked room 400 M, no turn of foot when clear.

Hard ridden early to keep up with the pace group, on rail early but swept to 3 wide making the home turn, 4Ls behind the leader, dashed well to run a very strong 2nd, which cleared off rest of the field.
Hard ridden to get across in front quickly but interferred others, settled 2.5Ls off pace 2 wide, led 300 M and kicked away to win.
Checked badly on jumping, never competitive along the fence afterwards.
Occupied a prominent spot easily, 1L behind the leader along the rails, ran on well in straight to finish 3rd.
Checked badly on jumping, hard ridden to keep up with the field, 8Ls off the slow pace, 2 wide, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased to the rear, proved hard to settle, 8.5Ls off the slow pace, 3 to 4 wide, never accelerated.
Hard ridden early, trapped 4 wide throughout behind the pace group, flattened 300 M.
Crossed steadily in front and led by 1L at slow early sectionals along the rails, hung on until 300 M, flattened.
Hard ridden early to keep up just worst than midfield, 7Ls behind the leader along the fence, progressed steadily 600 M, kept dashing well to the line in straight despite the slow pace.
Eased to sit about midfield, trapped 4 to 5 wide throughout, 5.5Ls off pace, faded 400 M.
Checked twice in the back straight, 5.5Ls off the slow pace, 2 wide, on heels again on straightening, no turn of foot, weakened 200 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 7Ls behind the leader 3 to 4 wide, blocked 400 M, ran on OK when clear.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3 wide throughout, 5.5Ls off pace, just held ground in straight.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Ran home well despite tendency to hang in and hit front over 150 M out. Won readily.
Slightly sluggish at start, settling towards rear. Remained same into straight. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Always well behind. (Heart irregularity.)
Raced mainly 3-wide just better than midfield. Similar turning in. Soon weakened.
Broke well from poor draw. Took up running after first 400 M and led until joined into straight. Fought on to regain advantage briefly 200 M out only to be swamped close to home.
Wide in midfield early. Took off from 1000 M to dispute lead into straight. Dropped out tamely over 200 M out.
Settled 2 back on rails. Shared 6th spot rounding home bend. Failed to obtained a clear passage early in straight. Made modest headway down inner inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled in mid-division. Shifted out for a run turning for home. Ran home quite well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.

Broke well, led and gradually crossed to rails, settling one back behind leader. Came under pressure upon straightening and improved to hold some chance 200 M out only to fold up quickly shortly afterwards.
Never far off, mainly one out one back. Joint 3rd turning in. Moved up to hold some chance inside final 200 M but unable to see it out nearing home.
Travelled just worse than midfield on rails. Only kept on same pace without quickening in the run home.
Raced mainly 2-wide in forward of midfield. Jostled for racing room early in straight. Obtained clear run late over 150 M out and only kept on steadily to the line.
Settled 3-wide in last few. Shaken up upon straightening. Quickened well inside final 250 M to grab 2nd place close to home.
Settled at the back. Shifted out onto centre of track upon straightening and didn't make much ground.

Moderate beginning, urged along to take up spot 3 to 4Ls back in running line, had easy trip in mid-section, back in traffic on bend, didn't sprint when they dashed turning in but got going late to be nearest on line.

Shade tardy to begin, re-gathered to hold a spot in front of midfield 3Ls back on rails, enjoyed a quiet run tracking eventual winner to turn, eased out and chased hard but beaten by a better horse on the day.
Even break, settled down in midfield 5Ls back in running line, improved on bend with a 3 wide run and came 4 wide into straight, lacked a dash but kept coming before run ended at the 200 M.
Out with field, forced to restrain to near rear but unable to get in and raced 3 wide at rear 10Ls back throughout, well back and came 5 wide on bend, didn't make much impression in run to line.

Jumped nicely, rolled on in search of closer spot, posted 3 wide without cover 3 to 4Ls back when unable to get in, always doing share of work, wide to bend, couldn't respond in straight and just battled away from 200 M.

Began with them but soon restrained to take up usual role towards rear, raced in 2 wide spot 8Ls off pace, not asked throughout and made 4 wide run on bend, made up plenty of ground down middle to make frame.

Standard break, settled worse than midfield 6 to 7Ls off the pace in a 2 wide role, relaxed nicely and tracked well making a 3 wide run on turning, cut back to inside and closed off nicely just unable to catch first two.

Jumped reasonably, pressed on to lead early but handed up when pressured after 400 M, trailed leader thereafter and eased outside to challenge on turning, hit lead at 300 M but didn't show usual fight and only had 1 speed in finish.

Jumped nicely, put in prominent spot from the outset, travelled well 2 wide 2Ls behind pace, tracked nicely on bend, let down with a powerful sprint at 300 M to claim them easily, went on to score comfortably in fast time.

Began with rest but immediately restrained to rear from a wide alley, lobbed along at tail 10Ls from them throughout, still well back to bend, made run between horses and finished off evenly giving too great a start.

Ordinary to begin, improved to hold down spot on rails 6 to 7Ls off pace, had an easy time throughout, saved ground on rails to bend, didn't finish off as normally would and plodded to line. (Mucopus.)

Out with field, lacked early initiative and soon in rearward division, raced on rails 8 to 9Ls away throughout, had easy time but had field to beat on bend, found little in straight and just plodded away for a sub par effort.

First to hit ground, engaged in speed battle and took over after 400 M, kept them rolling at a reasonable speed, held a 1/2Ls advantage on turning, couldn't find when pressure was applied and dropped out when early effort took effect.
Settled 3-wide in rear. Went wider turning in. Made moderate headway early in straight but unable to sustain run inside final 200 M.
Prominent in 5th on rails early. Gradually shuffled back to midfield 1200 M out. Shifted off rails to avoid tiring runner approaching home bend. Fought on steadily in straight without quickening.
Wide throughout. Raced in rear of midfield early. Made steady headway down far side and around home bend to be joint 3rd turning in. Weakened under pressure over 300 M out.

Waited with. Did not find much room upon straightening. Obtained split over 200 M out and quickened well engaging in a ding-dong battle with FLYING TAMARI. Denied narrowly but awarded race after Stewards' Enquiry.

Travelled mainly in rear of mid-division. Gradually shifted out for a run rounding home bend. Sustained headway from wide position into straight to hit front momentarily passing 200 M but outstayed nearing home.
Settled in last few. Switched to outside of field and ran on well to duel with eventual winner. Won the battle but relegated to 2nd after Stewards' Enquiry.
Raced mainly 3-wide in forward of midfield. Still wide and dropped to just worse than midfield turning in. Did not find much racing room in straight and baulked for a run inside final 200 M.
Wide in forward of midfield early. Made headway to race outside leader over halfway out. Disputed lead into straight but soon weakened.
Led early. Settled within 2Ls of pace far side. Kept on early in straight before gradually weakened.
Prominent. Took up running 1200 M out. Joined into straight. Swamped when tired inside 200 M.
With leaders on rails early. Taken back to sit behind pace turning into back straight dropping to midfield halfway out. Ran home one-paced from similar position into straight.

Travelled mainly 3-wide in rear of midfield. Took closer order around field rounding home bend. 4-wide in 6th within 2Ls of pace turning in. Ran on to hold good chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort near finish.
Prominent to 400 M. Gradually weakened.

Well enough to begin, crossed but posted 3 wide without cover from an outside alley, always doing share of work 3 to 4Ls back, improved on turning and chimed in with a big run at 300 M, kept finding to go down narrowly in 3 way go.
Standard break, pressed on to be amongst them early, restrained to sit 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide line, had even trip but under pressure on turn, found little in straight and weakened right out late.

Bounced out, had good toe to take up running, dictated terms in front at an even clip, still there with a narrow advantage turning in, didn't respond when pressured and checked when weakening out at 200 M.
Jumped evenly, showed enough dash to hold leaders back, enjoyed run of race 2Ls back on rails throughout, still travelling well on bend, held up until 300 M, kept on well when clear to make frame.
Awkwardly away, settled amongst rearward division 8Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, still well back on rails turning in, didn't finish off with any authority just plugging to line.

Began nicely, went on from a wide alley to assume spot outside of leader, raced at leaders girth throughout with reasonable speed on, challenged turning in and momentarily lead, overhauled last 200 M but stuck on well.

Ordinary to leave gates, gathered up to settle down in midfield, raced 5Ls back in running line, between horses and shuffled back on bend, went back to rails but didn't find another gear and only battled in run to line.

Restrained from a wide alley soon after break, took up residence near rear, raced 2 wide 7Ls away thereafter, still well back to turn, urged along turning in, switched out and made some ground but gave too much a start.

Moderate to begin, re-gathered to sit in midfield, had a charmed run 3 to 4Ls back on rails, eased 2 wide tracking eventual winner on bend, didn't dash immediately and steadied at 300 M but warmed up late to narrowly miss.
Away with them, taken hold of to slot in behind midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls off pace with easy run to bend, improved 3 wide turning but lacked a real dash and only passed tired runners in run to line.

Away with them, pressed on to assume a forward role, settled into coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race 1L back to bend, mounted a strong challenge at 300 M and showed plenty of courage hold off high quality rivals.
Tardy getaway, ridden up to sit behind midfield on rails, had easy time 5Ls off pace throughout, saved ground on bend and kept on inside in straight, finished off evenly to be nearest on line.

Fast to leave gates, didn't have pace to follow through and found 3 wide position 5Ls back in midfield, trailed nicely with cover to bend, eased to middle and finished off steadily doing fairly to hold ground to line.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Led briefly early. Settled behind leader far side by as much as 5Ls at one stage. Regained advantage upon straightening only to be overhauled inside final 200 M.
Not far off in 4th. Dropped out upon straightening.
Travelled wide behind midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Fought on steadily down straight without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Baulked for a run over 200 M out. Kept on steadily to finish.
Raced in forward of midfield on rails. 5th within 2Ls of pace turning in. Ran on well to hit front about 100 M out. Fought on under pressure to resist challenges but pipped at post.
Always struggling at the back.
Travelled in last few. Baulked for a run early in straight. Kept on steadily down centre of track without quickening.
Circled field around stable bend early. Took up running turning into back straight going a few lengths clear. Tired badly when headed home turn.
Settled in midfield on rails. Produced moderate late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order around field home bend. Sustained progress to hit front inside 200 M only to be swamped 100 M out.
Never far off, holding 3rd until weakening over 200 M out.
Waited with. Made significant progress from second last into straight to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gradually weakened from 5th down the straight.
Settled in 2nd last position on the fence, never threatened.
Ridden along to be front runner near the 800 M, raced 1 off, weakened in the closing stages.
Raced midfield, 1 off, suffered a bleeding attack.
Given every chance tracking the two leaders but overhauled inside the 50 M.
Raced handy, 1 off, worked home soundly.
Ridden quietly in the early stages to take up a midfield rails position. Shifted out into the clear in the straight to score over rivals close to home.
Raced handy along the fence, pulled early, struggled over the latter stages.
Never really travelled, remained in last position for the majority of the race, showed little impression in the straight.
Led early then was taken on in front after the 800 M to be running 2nd along the fence. Stuck to task gamely in the run to the post.

Raced wide in a forward position early stages. Settled 2-wide and a length off the pace back straight. Kept on fairly after straightening and contended for the lead near 200 M. Unable to turn up a notch final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Off slowly. Raced in rear section and hung out for the major part of the race. Made some progress after 600 M but was widest turning for home and only ran past a tired runner in the straight.
Soon trailed field. Ridden along from 700 M and picked up pace. Checked making home turn and remained towards the back on straightening. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Off slowly and raced behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and started a rally. Made up good ground but unable to draw any closer to the winner final 50 M.

Jumped well and raced in a forward position. Settled prominently behind leader in back straight. Continued well in the home straight and fought for the lead near 200 M. Kept on fairly final stages for a minor placing.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Steadily made up ground in a wide position at the home turn. Quickened and took the lead near 200 M. Stayed on well final stages.
Led field most of the way. Weakened in the final 200 M.
Failed to keep pace with leaders and raced 2-wide better than midfield. Pressured to keep pace 700 M out and weakened on straightening.
Lacked early speed and raced in rear section. Struggled to keep up 600 M out and finished tailed out.
Slowly away, caught 3-wide no cover while better than midfield over 2Ls off pace down the back, tended to hang out on the circle, faded from top of homestretch. (Bled.)
Disputed early lead out 2-wide, settled 1L back in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, picked up well to lead 200 M out, driven out to always just hold the runner-up by about a neck.
Disputed early pace on fence, tended to over-race in front and a neck down in 2nd at top of home straight, fading 200 M out and lost further ground.
On fence and towards rear early about 5Ls off pace, driven along to get a little closer entering home straight, plugged on at the same pace and never dangerous.
Untidy break, midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace at 800 M, over 2Ls down in 4th entering straight, every chance of at least a place at 200 M but ran out of steam rapidly.
Soon 6Ls last on fence and similarly placed taking final bend, never on terms and could only make minor late ground.
3-wide no cover disputing the lead at 1000 M, 2-wide and a neck to the good from 800 M to home turn, headed by winner 200 M out, tired late for a well-held 3rd.
Caught 4-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls off pace near rear early on, slipped back to last at the home turn, soon well beaten.
Better than midfield on fence between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed until the final bend, very one-paced from then on.
Worse than midfield and ridden along in early stages about 4Ls behind, edged closer on straightening, loomed with a winning chance 150 M out but could not draw level with winner.
Towards rear early 5Ls off pace, hung out on the circle to be 4-wide no cover and widest turning for home 4Ls back in mid-division, briefly held place chances at 200 M but weakened late.
Slowest away, soon 6Ls behind and one from rear and hardly much closer taking final turn, ran on at same pace down the centre of track.
Prominent position in 3rd within 1L of the speed until home straight when driven along, always outpaced by principals.
Slowest away, always hung out, 5Ls off pace early on, 6Ls back in 11th into straight, hung out towards stands' rail but still finished very strongly, might have placed if kept straight.
Always in rear at least 6Ls off the speed, never really got on terms with principals.
Pressed on to lead on fence at 900 M, headed by about a neck turning for home, gone over 300 M out.
Always travelled well within 3Ls of the speed with cover in 4th or so until home straight, lengthened nicely to lead 200 M, pushed clear for comfortable win.
Always caught wide without cover, 3-wide within a neck of pace at 800 M, led by a neck turning for home, headed at the 200 M and one-paced in closing stages.
Nicely placed on fence early about 3Ls off pace in 5th, niggled along on circle to edge a little closer on straightening, stayed on well for 2nd but had little chance with the winner.
In rear about 6Ls off pace early on, without much room when still about 5Ls behind turning for home, ran on strongly late for a place, nearest at finish.
Performance deemed unacceptable, always detached at least 5Ls off pace from the main body of the field, very poor.
Never better than midfield nor closer than 4Ls or so off the pace at any stage, hung out on the circle, 3-wide turning for home and well held.
Crowded at 800 M when 4Ls behind in 7th with cover, marginally closer turning for home, 2Ls down in 4th and with place chances at 200 M but did not follow through.
Knuckled at the start, caught 4-wide no cover early on, 3Ls off pace with cover out 3-wide from 800 M to home turn, failed to quicken up and beaten over 200 M out.
Crossed towards the rails behind the pace group shortly after start, 4-1/2Ls behind the leaders, helped by the fast pace but raced on slower part of the track, ran on okay in final stages.
Pushed to share lead along the rails at fast early sectionals, under pressure throughout the trip and raced on slower part of the track, dropped off quickly 600 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to get across in front, then eased to sit in midfield 3-1/2Ls behind the leaders, raced 4-wide throughout benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M to win.
Eased to the rear, 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast pace however never competitive.
Pushed to sit 2Ls behind the fast pace, 3-wide throughout, ran on only fairly in straight.
Pushed to sit 2Ls behind the leaders along the rail, not suited by the fast tempo and raced on slower part of the track, ran on strongly to the line despite negative racing situations.

Hard ridden early but failed to get across in front, then eased to sit behind the pace group 4-wide, moved up 1200 M and pressed the leaders with fast pace, 2-wide at home bend, led 400 M, overhauled 100 M, ran on for a strong 2nd.
Eased 5Ls off pace, 3 to 4-wide throughout, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground in straight to be closest at the finish.
Slowly away, eased to rear 7Ls behind the leaders, rail-run early and swept 2 to 3-wide at home bend, benefited by the fast pace, no progress in final stages.
Eased back, checked first bend and also 900 M, 6-1/2Ls off the fast pace, 3 to 4-wide throughout, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased back, trapped 4 to 5-wide throughout, never better than midfield.
Pushed to share lead under pressure 1-wide racing on slower part of track, harmed by the fast early sectionals, weakened 350 M.
Bumped at start, pushed forward for a more prominent spot, 3Ls off the fast pace, 2-wide early and swept 3 to 4-wide at home bend, made ground at 450 M, flat out at 100 M and just ran on for 3rd.
Pushed early, worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leaders, 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, weakened 200 M.
Settled wide in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening running on steadily under pressure to hit front over 100 M out.
Not far off on rails early. Gradually dropped back towards rear approaching home bend. Only faded further under pressure in the run home.
Midfield far side. Lost position slightly rounding home bend. Just kept on steadily in straight.
Settled mainly one back on rails in third. Kept on under pressure before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Tailed off to straight. Made up late ground to go past beaten horses closing stages.
Raced one out one back. Held good chance amongst leaders 200 M out, however, found nothing under pressure.
Settled in rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight. Did best work at finish.
Soon took up running and led to about 300 M. Weakened.
Broke well. Settled 3-wide in 5th within 2Ls of pace. Moved closer briefly turning in. Kept on until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled outside leader about half a length off. Hit front over 300 M out only to be swamped passing 150 M.
Raced wide towards rear. Made steady progress down straight to reach 3rd late.
Raced mostly one off the rails in mid-division. Kept on behind runners early in straight. Made modest headway inside final 200 M without threatening.

Awkwardly away, regathered to settle in midfield 2-wide 5Ls back, had easy trip spending little in mid-section, niggled along between horses on bend, didn't find much on turning and only battled to line.

Nicely into stride, prominent early and held down prime 1 out 1 back position 2Ls away, had easy time throughout, close enough on bend, had chance in straight and there until 200 M but couldn't find extra over last furlong.

Out with field, didn't have much pace, ended up behind midfield but forced 3-wide throughout, had cover 6Ls back to bend, had job to do on turning, made a little ground but was one-paced in run to line.

Amongst first few to leave gates, took up running and kept them rolling with pressure applied, held a 1/2L advantage on turning, couldn't really answer when challenged again at 300 M and dropped out last 200 M after early work.
Ordinary break, restrained to tail of field, pushed up to be 7Ls away on rails, had easy time doing little work in the run, well back and urged along on turning in, made no impression in straight.

Slow into stride, soon at rear, raced 10Ls back off rails throughout, appreciated even speed and not harmed tracking wide on bend, came 5-wide into the straight and closed hard last 300 M to claim them and score nicely.

Reasonable beginning, had enough pace to hold the leaders back, sat 2Ls back on rails with run of race throughout, niggled along on turning in, didn't finish off as normally would and weakened last 300 M.

Moderate to begin, didn't display a lot of dash, positioned behind midfield 2-wide 6Ls away throughout, well back in traffic on turning in, didn't get much of a crack at them in straight but closed evenly when clear last 200 M.

Began with field but took hold to race towards rear, raced 10Ls back on the rails, never really handled track and was travelling poorly on the bend. Lost further ground in the straight to be well beaten.
Began with field, unable to slot in and ended up in midfield 3-wide with cover, had good trail 5Ls away throughout, improved amongst horses turning in, finished off evenly when clear.

Fast into stride, pressed on from an awkward alley but posted wide, always working 4-wide without cover in midfield 4-5Ls back, continued to improve on bend, hit lead with strong run at 250 M, run ended late but kept on well.

Away with them, showed customary pace to settle outside of leader, didn't have easy time with pressure from outside horse, still at leaders girth turning in, kept to task and in mix until 200 M but just peaked on run thereafter.

Jumped well enough but elected to take a trail, raced 3-wide with cover 2Ls back, covered ground but not harmed by this and right there on bend, lacked usual finish last 300 M and just battled in run to line.

Amongst first few to begin, pressed on to take closer order, raced 3-wide outside of leader without cover, did share of work to bend, surged to front turning in but just lacked a dash to go with first two late.
Well enough away, sat 2Ls off them in centre of course, steadily improved from midpoint, kept on well last 200 M holding ground in run to line. Found winner too good on day.
Out with rest, showed good dash to be up challenging for lead 1L back, always prominent but lacked an extra gear last 200 M, stuck on well to make frame for what was an improved effort.
Ordinarily away, took up spot behind most of field in middle of track 4Ls back, always urged along from outset, made no impact over concluding stages and was well beaten.
Standard to leave gates, back amongst pack well off the rails 4Ls off pace, always niggled to be there, shifted to centre at 400 M, lacked an extra gear last furlong and only battled to the line.
Only fair to get going, took up a position on the outside rail 2Ls back, close enough passing 400 M and offered a brief sprint but could only manage same speed in run to line (lost plate).
Moderately away, detached towards middle of track 7 to 8Ls off leaders, struggled to go early dash, always pushed to stay in touch, passed only tired runners in run to line.

Slow into stride, settled in midfield towards outside rail, raced 4Ls off them with cover for best part of mid race, improved at 300 M and in traffic before clear at 200 M, did best work late to take place.
Shade tardy to begin, had little early speed and ended up detached 8Ls off pace at tail, couldn't go speed but managed to produce some improvement before being checked at 150 M. Never a real threat.
Bumped jumping, positioned nicely in behind them in midfield 2 to 3Ls back, copped a check at 200 M but never really travelling and struggled in run to finish.
Standard to begin, raced in midfield with cover 3Ls back towards outside, travelled well at 400 M, shifted ground and got going again last 200 M to be doing best work on line.

Jumped with field, showed good dash to be amongst front runners 1L back towards outside, took over at 300 M, accelerated nicely last 200 M to draw away under hands and heels urging to score well (time only moderate).
Jumped nicely, showed abundant early toe to take up running 1L clear, continued to run them along to 400 M when tackled, gave in weakly last 200 M.
Out with them, sat just behind midfield towards middle 4Ls away, raced greenly throughout, hard ridden to keep up at 400 M, stayed on only at same speed last furlong.
Well enough to begin, positioned towards middle 2Ls away, had chance to improve but under pressure from 400 M, couldn't respond and stayed on moderately over the concluding stages.
Parked midfield, 1 off with cover. Peeled to the outside turning for home to gain advantage close to home.
Sat 3 wide with cover, near the rear of the field, didn't run on.
1 off with cover, just off midfield, ran home without threatening.
Positioned 1 off, had cover near the rear of the field, ?? no close off.
Handy position, 2Ls back, 1 off with cover, didn't find much when under pressure.
Settled near the tail of the field on the fence, ran on strongly.
Raced handy, 2Ls back, 3 wide no cover, made a dash early in the straight but peaked on its run well before the line.
Covered ground, midfield, no cover, struggled over the latter stages.
Raced just behind midfield, the fence, made some ground but broke down after the post.
Proved difficult to settle early and took up front running duties. Kicked after the 400 M but caught to close to the post.
