Slow to begin, raced midfield along the fence. Had difficulty obtaining clear running early in the straight, closed off well.
Positioned behind the leader and to its outside, weakened inside the 200 M and was disappointing.
From an outside barrier, settled in last position. Never likely.
Tracked the leader along the rail, outpaced turning for home but stayed on well after being disappointed for running near the 400 M.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Raced 3-wide in midfield with cover. Responded well when asked on straightening. Kept on gamely final stages to edge out rival.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Switched out on straightening and ran on only moderately.
Led or disputed lead until straightening. Shook off co-leader for a length's advantage near 200 M but found no extra threrafter and weakened.
2-wide better than midfield. Never quickened after straightening and weakened final stages.
Led or disputed lead in a 2-wide position. Kept on fairly after straightening but steadily faded in the final 200 M.
Better than midfield but was 3-wide without cover. Only one-paced in the straight.

Ridden out of the gates to be in a forward position. Settled 2-wide behind leaders in 3rd place after 1000 M. Kept on well after straightening. Came up just short in a duel with the winner final stages.
Soon raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Off slowly. Raced along the rails and was never better than midfield. Closed the race off only fairly.

Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Remained in rear section and kept along the rails making home turn. Quickened on straightening but ran into traffic near 200 M. Continued to run on steadily final stages.
Among leaders early before sliding back to midfield. 3-wide turning for home and ran on fairly in the straight.
Good jump from a wide draw but was taken back to rear section. Near last to enter home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Raced amongst leaders early stages. Settled behind the leaders after 1000 M. Had trouble keeping up making the turn and steadily drifted back to midfield. Lacked a response and faded in the straight.
Keen but prominent early on, no worse than 2Ls off pace with cover until final turn, 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, weakened late on.
Tracked leader in 2nd just 1L from the speed until home turn, led over 300 M out but never got much more than a neck clear and all out to hang on from strong finishing 2nd.
Caught very wide (5-wide no cover) down the back straight in midfield, still just 3Ls down turning for home but beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, over-raced in places early on when 4-back on fence in midfield, stayed on at the same pace but still nearest at finish.
In rear bunch at least 6Ls off pace until home straight, short of room at 100 M when finishing off well not fully tested yet.
Led on fence at the 1400 M, always about 1L clear until home turn, headed over 300 M out but didn't fade out and only lost out on 2nd in final strides.
Away well and pressed forward to race within 1L of the speed out but 3-wide no cover, 2Ls down in 5th and tiring off final turn, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover when over 4Ls worse than midfield down the back, not much closer turning for home, dug in well late on to be nearest at the finish.
Dropped out about 6Ls off pace in rear through to final bend, stayed on only fairly down centre of the track while hanging in.
Slowly away, keen early on, 3-back on fence and 3Ls off speed at halfway, driven along to try and improve at the 600 M, always held by those in front.
Never travelled well, slowly away and soon 8Ls last in rear, under pressure trying to improve off final turn, finished off tamely down centre of track.
With cover in mid-division about 4Ls off pace until halfway, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, stayed on dourly in the finish, never nearer.
Had the box seat run at 1000 M about 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th, same turning for home, always held by leading pair and one-paced closing stages.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace with cover at halfway, only marginally closer turning for home, clear over 200 M and ran on strongly late only post came too soon.
Always close-up in 2nd about 1L off pace out 2-wide before hitting the front at top of home straight, shot over 2Ls clear at the 200 M, remained well clear, easily.
Led on fence by 1L at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight by winner, faded inside final 200 M while hanging out.
Towards rear early but left without cover so pressed out 4-wide no cover to race 3-wide no cover 2Ls back in 3rd from 800 M to home turn, every chance to place but no extra final 200 M.
Slowest away and switched to fence from wide gate, soon 8Ls last, 7Ls down in 12th turning for home, left flat-footed and could only run on into midfield.
Had the run of the race on fence in 3rd about 2Ls off speed until home turn, had every chance to place but one-paced final 200 M.
Always nicely placed in 4th or 5th with cover and within 2Ls or so of the pace until home straight, lacked the kick to reach the quinella and all out to run 3rd.
Slow to start, very keen in rear about 8Ls behind a very slow tempo, made no headway down centre of homestretch.
3-wide bust mostly with cover down backstretch about 4Ls off speed in mid-division, struggling to lie up turning into home straight, always outpaced.
Towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until home straight, never looked like getting much closer.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off the pace until home straight, still 4Ls back in 6th at the 200 M, ran on well late to nick 2nd place.
On fence and keen about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace and towards rear through first half, still off the pace when short of room 350 M out and steadied at 200 M, never on terms.
Nicely placed about 4Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M, lost position on the circle and beaten from top of home straight.
Jumped well, eased to sit just behind the pace group, 2.5Ls off pace 2 wide throughout, raced keenly, was bumped 300 M, ran on strongly to the line for 3rd.
Slowly away, pushed forward to occupy a spot just better than midfield, 4Ls off pace along the rails, dashed well in last quarter to finish 2nd.
Pushed to hold the rail and led by 1.5Ls at good pace, received pressure soon after straightening, hung on until 200 M weakened.
Jumped well, eased behind the leader and occupy the box seat, 2Ls off pace on fence, blocked 400 M - 200 M, dashed strongly when clear and kicked away to win.
Eased at start, 9Ls off pace at back, 3 wide throughout, no dash in straight.
Eased worse than midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout, 7Ls off pace, dashed well 300 M to be nearest on line.
Slowly away, hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, never travelled well 2 wide, never better than midfield.
Eased to get across the rail at the rear, more than 10Ls off pace, no progress in straight.
Hard ridden to get across in front, settled 1.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, pressured the leader soon on straightening, ran on until 150 M.
Pushed early but soon eased to sit 5.5Ls off pace about midfield, 2 wide throughout, no significant acceleration until 200 M, dashed well to the line lately.
Eased to sit about midfield, travelled nicely 5.5Ls off pace along the fence, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Slowly away, 8.5Ls off pace at back racing, 2 to 3 wide, no turn of foot in final stages.
Eased back right after the start, raced 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, never competitive.
Never far off running down the centre of the track. Shifted in for a run inside 400 M. Only produced moderate headway without seriously threatening.
Did not jump well. Always struggling at the back.
Close up from low draw racing down the centre of the track. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M and hung on gamely to the line.
Never better than midfield. Gradually faded inside final 400 M.
Jumped fairly. Always thereabouts. Improved under pressure to hold every chance coming onto course proper but unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.
Soon took up running and crossed to stands rails. Led until joined onto course proper. Soon faded under pressure.
Jumped fairly. Travelled in around midfield before weakening inside final 400 M.
Settled just off midfield in 6th always within 3Ls of pace. Fought on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 400 M. Gradually faded.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace to the line.

Slowly into stride and checked, urged along but forced to settle next to last, raced on rails 6 to 7Ls off them, saved ground close to rails on turning, steadily improved from well back in straight to be nearest on line.

Little speed from outset and restrained to trail at rear 6 to 7Ls back, travelled comfortably at rear and improved tracking 3 wide on bend, into clear at 300 M and closed steadily but gave away too much start.

Began evenly, drove through to hold leaders back, had run of race but travelled a little keenly in mid-section, tracked nicely on turning, lacked an extra gear last 200 M and just kept on at same clip in run to line.

Amongst them to leave gates, caught wide early and rolled on to apply pressure, always working 3 wide without cover hitting lead on bend, continued to challenge in straight but run ended at 200 M. Good for workload.

Bounced out, showed plenty to lead them easily, dictated terms from front, challenged throughout by outside horses, shaded on turning in, saved for 1 crack and kicked hard past 250 M, showed good fight to hold off late challenge.
Away well, didn't have speed to cross and forced to travel 3 to 4 wide without cover, did plenty of work to bend and struggling turning in, showed little in run home and just battled last 200 M.

Began with field, unable to slot in from an awkward draw and faded back towards rear, raced 3 to 4 wide without cover and did plenty of work 5 wide on bend, couldn't find in straight and struggled to line.

Slow to begin and crowded, recovered to settle in 2 wide line behind midfield, not asked in mid-section, still 4 to 5Ls back between horses on bend, into clear at top of straight and closed steadily without threatening.

Jumped in line, caught wide early and pressed on 4 wide to challenge, posted 4 wide without cover throughout doing power of work, struggling when turning in and weakened out badly from 200 M when run ended.

Standard jump, lacked early speed and soon positioned behind midfield on rails 4 to 5Ls away, saved ground on bend, still in traffic for most of straight and closed off nicely when clear running presented to be nearest on line.

Standard beginning, positioned in rearward division 6Ls back 3 wide with cover, made a run 4 wide on bend and swung 6 wide into straight, didn't produce usual finish and just plugged away in straight.

Evenly away, took up a prominent spot behind the speed 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls away, appreciated trail and tracked nicely to bend, tracked leaders for 1 sprint and dashed hard when clear at 200 M failing by smallest margin.

Jumped well, had enough speed to roll on and sit outside leader, didn't have easy time with pressure from outside horse, kept challenging on turning and still there to 200 M but condition gave out late.
Well enough to jump, positioned in midfield 3 wide 3 to 4Ls back, had cover throughout, began to struggle on bend and under real pressure on turning, weakened out badly in stretch to be well beaten.
Missed the break. Travelled in last few near rail. Obtained split inside 300 M and ran on to produce good late impression.
Took up running coming onto back straight. Restrained to race on rails within 2Ls of pace from halfway. Remained in box seat the best part of straight before switched out late.
Very wide without cover in prominent position to straight. Weakened.
Raced just worse than midfield on rails. Quickened well inside final 250 M. Finishing off race nicely when tightened between first two close to home.
Mostly 2-wide in prominent position early. Carried wider approaching home bend. Weakened into straight.
Never far off, disputing lead rounding home bend and early in straight. Found no extra under pressure inside final 200 M.
Mainly 2-wide in rear of midfield. Made modest headway early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Reared and lost ground at start. Travelled well back to straight. Ran past a few well-beaten horses.
Settled in midfield. Made steady progress in straight without threatening.
Led early, settling one back on rails far side. Regained advantage halfway out. Unable to sustain effort and swamped over 200 M out.
Settled at the back. Ran home at the one pace.
Held up to race just off the pace. Commenced move after straightening and hit front over 200 M out. Headed shortly afterwards but fought on gamely to only come down by the narrowest of margins.
Raced mostly 3-wide towards rear to straight. Went wider turning in. Ran on down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Ran on well from 5th into straight to hit front about 150 M out. Just held off runner-up's come back to prevail narrowly.
Shade tardy to begin, soon at rear 10Ls from them, improved slightly on bend, came 4 wide turning in, gradually improved in straight to be closest on line. (In soft palate displacement.)

Amongst first few to begin, slotted in behind leader, received run of race with perfect trail to bend, no clear run from turn to 200 M, not knocked around when clear running presented as race was over. (See Racing Incidents.)

Away fairly, trapped 3 to 4 wide without cover in midfield from an awkward alley, 5Ls back always working wide in run, struggling on bend and made no impression in run to line. Beaten a long way. (Mucopus.)
Well enough to jump, took a hold to sit just off speed in midfield, in running line 4Ls back with a nice run, angled out on bend, let down nicely but just didn't go on last bit. Held on well to line.

Ordinary to begin, recovered to sit 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had easy time spending little in mid section, came 2 wide on bend and tracked nicely behind horses before bursting through at 250 M, chased hard failing narrowly.
Awkwardly away, drove up from midfield to work across to leaders girth, kept working to move alongside on circle and challenge on bend, spent force at 300 M and offered little in run to line.
Bounced out, displayed customary speed to cross and take up running, rolled along 1L clear at solid pace, held a narrow advantage turning, gave in easily at 250 M and dropped right out thereafter.

Average break, positioned behind midfield 6Ls away, covered ground throughout 2 to 3 wide with track, urged along on bend, lacked usual finishing burst and found little in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Even jump, caught wide from a difficult gate, faced the breeze 3 wide throughout 2Ls back, under pressure on bend and found little in straight, gave in easily and dropped right out.

Fastest into stride, assumed coveted 1 out 1 back role closer than usual, had nice run throughout and near enough on bend, made 3 wide run turning and challenged to hit lead before tired when run ended at the 300 M.
Moderate to leave gates, faded back to usual spot behind midfield, raced 6Ls back on rails with a quiet run to bend, held up turning in, made up many lengths in straight finishing hard for 3rd.
Lost ground on jumping, settled in rearward division, on rails 8Ls off pace, angled 2 wide on circle and tracked nicely on bend, not clear at 350 M and did best work late to make the frame.

Showed no dash from outset and restrained to rear, raced 2 wide in last place 10 to 12Ls away, lobbed along at tail to bend, still 2Ls off 2nd last horse turning, switched out and made up plenty of ground from impossible spot.

Standard break, took a hold to assume a midfield role, raced on rails 5Ls off speed, had a comfortable trip to turn, angled out and dashed nicely when clear at 350 M, hit front at 150 M and stuck on gamely for solid win.

Travelled mostly 3-wide just better than midfield early. Gradually shifted back to mid-division halfway out. Renewed effort turning in to come within 3Ls of lead early in straight. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Attempted to make all. Weakened out of contention over 200 M out.
Mainly in last few. Only ran past a few well beaten horses closing stages.
Travelled in midfield on rails. Commenced move turning in. Fought on steadily from 4th into straight to reach 2nd inside 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Raced 2-wide in midfield before losing position going up Rock. Towards rear when renewed effort rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure from midfield into straight without threatening.
Raced mainly prominently in 4th one out two back. Gradually weakened rounding home bend.
Waited with. Shaken up rounding home bend on rails. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in 6th just better than midfield. Gradually improved to 3rd to within 3Ls of pace rounding home bend. Sustained effort to take command over 200 M out. Convincingly.
Travelled at the back. Made modest progress past beaten runners inside final 300 M.
Settled mainly one back on rails. Chased leader into straight but soon dropped out.
Soon came to dispute lead from wide draw. Gradually yielded ground from halfway out before folding up quickly around home bend.
Travelled in last few to straight. Kept on same pace under pressure without quickening in straight.
Positioned near the rear of the field, 3-wide with cover, switched widest in the straight, didn't run on. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced 1 off outside the leader, tired considerably in the run home.
For most of the trip, travelled wide without cover, 1L back from the leader. Struggled in the straight.
Settled just behind midfield along the fence, ran into traffic problems in the straight, closed off well. Not fully tested.
Tracked the leader along the fence, stayed to the inside in the straight and out stayed challengers.
Lead them up but hung out the major part of the race, particularly on the turns. Faded inside the 200 M.
Settled early back in the field. Made a forward move mid-race after being caught wide without cover, continued to be trapped off the track but stayed on soundly.
Checked soon after the start and settled in last position. Gradually improved after the 500 M along the fence to close off strongly.
Raced 2L back, 1 off with cover, plugged away one-paced over the final 200 M.
Travelled wide with cover in midfield, kept on soundly.
Hampered and checked near the 1500 M and settled near the rear, 1 off with cover. Never likely.
Caught wide amongst leaders early stages. Better than midfield and remained wide and without cover in back straight. Started to lose steam at home turn and weakened in the straight.
Raced behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and quickened nicely. Stayed on well in the final stages to deny rival.

Settled towards the rear. Raced along the fence making home turn but had to be steered outwards to avoid traffic in the inside part of the track. Closed off strongly once finding daylight inside final 200 M.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Ran on and made up a bit of ground in the straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw. Settled 2-wide in midfield backstraight. Hugged the rails turning for home but never picked up in the straight. Weakened final stages.
Vied for the lead before taking a sit off the leader at 800 M. 2-wide and no more than 2Ls off the leader turning for home. Lacked a response in the straight and weakened.
Disputed lead before gaining a clear advantage in front at 800 M. Continued to hold a slim advantage inside final 200 M but lacked the strength to hold off the top pair final stages.
Slowly away then was crowded and lost further ground. Raced at the rear throughout, hung out badly over final 600 M and made no impression in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Swung out wide turning for home and rallied home strongly.
Ridden along early stages to race behind leaders. Hampered at 800 M and shuffled back to midfield. Ridden along to keep up until home turn and only kept on same pace in the straight.

Vied for the early lead before taking a sit behind leader at 800 M. Remained in a prominent spot behind the pace making home turn. Lacked the needed response to overtake leader after straightening. Kept on only fairly to make the frame.
Caught wide early before pressing on to race 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1300 M, 3Ls down in 3rd entering homestretch, led inside final 50 M.
On fence 4Ls back in 2nd at 1200 M, about 2Ls down and driven along to keep tabs on leader into home straight, every chance when 1L down in 2nd at 200 M but lost quinella final strides.
4-back on fence in midfield about 6Ls or 7Ls off the lead through to home turn, made no real impression in the finish.
Never any better than midfield, about 8Ls off pace towards rear early, 7Ls down in 8th making home turn, plugged on to retrieve some minor late ground.
Always caught 3-wide no cover, about 7Ls off pace around midfield at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 6th entering home straight, run soon fizzled out.
Nicely placed in 5th with cover about 5Ls off pace from 1000 M to until home turn, didn't find too much off the bridle and hung in late.
3-back on fence in 4th from 1000 M to home turn when about 5Ls off the pace, one-paced and did not threaten to place.
In rear bunch on fence until home straight while at least 7Ls or 8Ls from the speed, plodded on at same pace.
Always in rear and at least 8Ls off the speed until straightening for home, moderate late headway but never once a serious contender.
Slowly away and in last throughout, about 12Ls last at 1200 M, 10Ls last and struggling entering stretch, stayed there.
Positively ridden 4Ls clear 1200 M out, still 2Ls ahead and kicking for home before final bend, 1L clear and all out at 200 M, headed inside final 50 M but hung onto quinella berth.
2-wide and worse than midfield about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, only marginally closer and hard ridden when 4-wide (widest of all) swinging for home, kept on dourly, nearest at finish.
8Ls last early on and not much closer turning for home, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
Disputed early pace out 3-wide no cover, took a pull on the circle and 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, tired at the 200 M and faded late. (Lame next day.)
On fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through first half, challenged for the lead at the 200 M, tightened for room on fence inside final 50 M and perhaps unlucky not to place.
Missed the start and soon 5Ls off pace in rear, a little further back on fence turning for home, ran on strongly inside final 200 M, never nearer.
Slowly away, disputed early pace on fence, led by a neck at the 600 M and 1L clear taking home turn, grabbed by principals at the 200 M and weakened late.
Disputed early speed in 2-wide position, a neck down in 2nd at 600 M and 1L back in 2nd at top of home straight, led briefly at 200 M but soon grabbed by winner, hung on for 2nd.
Always travelled well with cover in 5th or so about 3Ls off pace until the home turn, switched out to lead about 100 M out and edged clear for another tidy win.
Towards rear out wide but with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until home straight, made only very minor late progress.
Caught 4-wide no cover down the backstretch when within 2Ls of the speed, 4Ls down in midfield turning for home, faded gradually down centre of the straight.
3-back on fence in midfield no worse than 3Ls off the speed before swinging into home straight, ran on fairly to take 3rd in final strides.
Promising debut, about 4Ls off pace and worse than midfield early on, slipped back further on the circle and staying on when forced to edge inside 200 M out, ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
In midfield with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until home turn, stayed on only fairly without troubling those in the finish.
4Ls behind leader with cover, 2-wide throughout just worse than midfield, harmed by the extremely slow pace and blocked for most straight, little dash when clear, checked 50 M.
Eased to sit 2Ls off pace 2-wide throughout, not suited by the extremely slow tempo, blocked 300 M, dashed strongly when clear and ran 3rd.
Eased to sit worse than midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader, harmed by the extremely slow pace, blocked for most of straight, still able to dash well to the line when clear.
Pushed early to get across to the rails in front, eased and settled in box seat, favoured by the extremely slow pace closely the race off strongly and dominated last 100 M.
Eased towards rear, 2-wide early, 6Ls off pace, bumped 500 M and pushed 3-wide at home bend, not suited by the extremely slow tempo, ran on okay in final stages.
Slowly away, trapped 3-wide throughout about midfield, 3Ls behind leader, covered too much ground at bends and not suited by the extremely slow pace, moved up 600 M, just ran on in straight.
Eased towards rear, raced keenly along the fence, harmed by the extremely slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to sit about midfield and posted 4-wide early, moved up 1000 M 1-1/2Ls off the extremely slow pace, still trapped 3-wide at home bend, covered too much ground, run finished at 100 M.
Eased back to settle 4-1/2Ls behind the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout, dashed impressively 250 M despite the extremely slow pace, finished a remarkable 4th.
Hard ridden early to get across in front towards the rails, then was taken back 3Ls off the leader, raced keenly and not suited by the extremely slow pace, no progress in straight.
Crossed to the rails easily and led at an extremely slow tempo benefited by the racing situations, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, held on well for 2nd.
Travelled outside the leader 2-wide, took advantage from the extremely slow pace, had every chance on straightening, however run finished at 100 M.
Broke well, settling one back on rails in 3rd. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front shortly after 200 M. Headed nearing finish.
Led field until overhauled passing 200 M.
Badly crowded at start losing ground. Raced wide behind midfield around stable bend and down back straight before weakening out of it over 400 M out.
Raced one out one back. Similar turning in. Weakened over 200 M out.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Commenced move rounding home bend. Sustained effort running on down centre of straight to assert authority nearing finish.
Midfield. Baulked for a run inside 200 M. Kept on steadily to the line.
Lacked early speed and had to settle for midfield position on rails. Remained similar until fading out of contention passing 400 M.
Travelled just better than mid-division on rails. Slightly baulked over 200 M out before making moderate headway under pressure closing stages.
Raced mainly 3-wide and not far off the lead to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Travelled mainly 2-wide in 5th within 3Ls of pace. Ran on steadily to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled well behind. Steadied passing 200 M before running on to do best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)

Bounced out, made a challenge for front but had to be content with racing outside leader, travelled well 1L back in mid-section, moved up to apply pressure on bend, couldn't find last furlong and weakened late.

No speed from outset, raced detached at tail 10Ls off them, lobbed along at the rear spending little throughout, saved ground on fence on bend, switched out but held up to 200 M, closed evenly when clear.

Slowly into stride, assumed usual spot next to last, raced on rails 8Ls off frontrunners, given a quiet time in mid-section, still well back on bend, kept to rails on turning and made up many lengths to be nearest on line.

Only standard to begin, settled down in midfield on rails before taking 2-wide spot 4Ls back leaving straight, had nice trip trailing speed throughout, came 3 to 4-wide on bend and dashed strongly to assert authority late.

Tardy to begin, assumed expected spot in rearward division, not asked to work in mid-section and saved for one run, made a 4-wide run on bend and came widest into straight, made little impression from so far back.
Well enough to jump and crossed to be in midfield 5Ls away raced further back than usual again and still behind midfield and under pressure at Rock, gave in easily and just plodded in straight.

Well enough to begin, drove through to hold rails on leaders back, enjoyed run of race settling 2Ls back throughout, right there on turning in, didn't get a lot of clear room in the straight but kept on well when clear to make frame.

Began awkwardly, urged along and regathered to hold down midfield position on rails 5Ls from them, had easy trip thereafter, improved on rails to be 3Ls down on turning, one-paced in run home making a little headway.

Away with them, lacked early toe and shifted back to be behind midfield 2-wide 6Ls back, had an easy trip to Rock before making 4-wide run, switched out in straight but lacked usual finish and made no progress from too far back.

First to hit ground, possessed plenty of speed to take up running from some noted speedsters, kept them rolling at an even clip, dictated terms to turn, fought doggedly in straight and only tired last 100 M to miss frame.
Moderate getaway, ridden along to keep up behind midfield 6Ls back on rails, had a quiet time in middle stages, saved ground on turning in, switched out in straight closing hard to snatch 3rd late.

Jumped fairly, had enough dash to slot into sweet seat 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, always travelled in mid-section, peeled out 3-wide on bend, made run with winner in straight and just lost battle for victory late.

Ordinary getaway, soon towards rear as usual, raced on rails 6Ls away, never really looked comfortable on surface, pushed along on bend, held up turning in but created little impression in straight just plugging away.

Moderate beginning, lacked speed from outset, raced behind midfield in running line 5Ls off pace, had job to do on bend, under pressure on turning and failed to respond just struggling away in straight.

Standard break, settled down next to last on rails 6 to 7Ls away, lobbed along at rear throughout, still had field to beat on turning in, lacked dash in straight and battled to line. (Blood in trachea.)

Awkwardly away and restrained soon after, settled rear tail in running line 6Ls away throughout, not overly taxed to do a lot, gave big start when coming 3 wide on bend, steadily made ground but never really threatened.

Well enough away, pressed on to take closer order, posted 3 wide without cover 2Ls back throughout, travelled comfortably despite covering extra ground, loomed up and hit front at 200 M but run just ended late.

Ordinary getaway, mustered to hold leaders back but proved difficult to settle in mid-section, had run of race to turn, in traffic on turning but couldn't find an extra gear when clear from 250 M, just holding ground to line.

Began nicely, had enough speed to hold a prominent spot before taking a trail 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, had run of race in mid-section, urged along on turning but left flat footed when they sprinted and just battled to the line.

Fastest to leave gates, worked early to cross to leaders girth in back straight, applied pressure to leader throughout setting reasonable speed, still in mix on turning in and showed good fight to stick with them and made frame.

Began with them, didn't have early pace but settled closer than usual in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, always travelling nicely on rails, behind horses on turning and didn't get out to 200 M, flew late to get up on line.

Amongst first few to break and had speed to lead them, dictated terms at a reasonable clip, worried by outside horse on bend but held a 1/2L on turning, fought strongly when headed and only just went down despite hanging.
Raced 3 wide early, outside the two leaders, managed to take up 1 off position near the 600 M. Shot clear after 400 M to hold on.
Raced midfield, 3 wide with cover, held its ground in the run to the post.
Raced handy to the leaders, 3 wide early, managed to take up 1 off position after the 600 M with cover, weakened out in the run home.
Began awkwardly, then despite being ridden along early settled in last position. Ran into traffic problems near the 200 M but once clear ran on strongly.
Sat midfield the fence, never went on in the straight.
Ridden along early but was caught wide behind midfield, never threatened.
Settled on the back of the speed, 2Ls away on the fence, closed off well.
Slow to begin and travelled wide without cover midfield. Stuck on gamely.
Travelled behind the leader along the fence after the 600 M, weakened right out in the final stretch.
Positioned slightly worse than midfield after being checked near the 900 M. Ran on strongly over the concluding stages.
Shifted out abruptly at the start and rider briefly lost the use of his left iron. Settled second last, made considerable ground passing the 300 M.
Led until turning for home, stayed on one paced.
Settled behind midfield. Checked and lost ground after 1000 M. Steadied at 800 M and was in rear section making the turn. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Gradually drifted back from widest draw and trailed field. Checked after 1000 M. Made the turn in a wide position and remained towards the rear on straightening. Made up some late ground.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward position. Checked after 1000 M. Made up a bit of ground rounding the turn but was widest and without cover. Lacked a response in the straight and unable to gain ground.
Took the lead at 1600 M. In front by a narrow margin on straightening and kept advantage until being headed final 200 M.
Raced at midfield. Checked after 1000 M but didn't lose much ground. Improved making the turn and was 2Ls down on straightening. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Raced keenly behind midfield and was checked after 1000 M. Improved to midfield at the turn in a 3-wide position. Continued on same pace in the straight.
Tracked leader before pulling up after the 1000 M. (Broke down.)
Botched the start and trailed field early. Checked after 1000 M and remained towards the rear at 800 M but kept along the rails and made up ground at the turn. Ran on only fairly in the straight.

Raced behind the pace early. Checked after 1000 M but continued to travel close up behind the leader into the turn. Improved to take on the leader 600 M out. Disputed lead final 200 M but unable to keep up last 100 M.
Settled in a rearward position. Checked after 1000 M. Trailed field on straightening and made up some late ground.
No worse than midfield in 5th place. Checked after 1000 M. Hampered and carried wider at 600 M whilst being ridden along to keep pace. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Checked at 1000 M and lost a bit of ground. Towards the rear on straightening and ran on same pace in the straight.
Hard to settle early stages and raced near midfield. Checked after 1000 M and remained near midfield making the turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
On the fence and better than midfield. Improved to within 3Ls of the leader turning for home. Continued well in the straight and took charge final 200 M.
Restrained early but over-raced so strode to the front on fence clear by about 1L from 1000 M to home straight, swamped about 300 M and eased final 100 M.
Dropped out 10Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 13th when checked at 350 M, ran on well down the centre of the track to get closest when race was over.
Caught 3-wide no cover about 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 4-wide and niggled along turning into stretch, all out when 1L down in mid-division at 200 M, tired late.
Crowded at start, 4-back on fence 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, no better than midfield when 4Ls down at home straight entrance and 2Ls down at 200 M, no further improvement.
Never on terms or closer than 8Ls off pace at any stage, very tame display.
Narrow lead very early on, sat less than 1L behind leader in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, disputed the lead until about 150 M out when swallowed up by chasing pack.
Switched from wide gate to race in rear about 8Ls off pace down the back, about 6Ls down off final bend but hampered at 350 M, stayed on fairly down the centre, nearest at finish.
3-wide but with cover about 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, niggled along to try and improve turning for home, always well outpaced.
On fence no worse than 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, given every chance to at least place but beaten 150 M out (later found with irregular heartbeat and tendon injury).
Raced greenly about 7Ls off speed early, fly-leapt 700 M out and ridden along, still 6Ls down in 12th on straightening, ran on well in closing stages but too late to catch winner.
2-wide and 4Ls down in 7th at 1000 M, about 3Ls down in midfield entering the stretch, given every hope to at least place but a bit too one-paced late on.
Over-raced in places, nice position 1 out 1 back in 4th until the 600 M, peeled out 3-wide at home turn, led narrowly 250 M out but faded once grabbed by winner about 100 M later.
Slowest away, recovered to be 9th or 10th about 5Ls or so off pace until the 600 M, pushed out into clear running 350 M out and quickened up nicely to lead 150 M out, driven out.
3-back on fence 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield until 600 M, briefly short of room 350 M out, clear at 300 M and every chance 1L back in 4th at 200 M, no follow through but did just enough for 3rd.
Away well, 2Ls off pace out 2-wide in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd off final turn, led briefly at the 300 M but petered out inside final 150 M.
3Ls off speed in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, similarly placed taking the home turn, moderate headway but never really dangerous.
Driven along to lead by 1L on fence at 1100 M out, set a fraction too strong a pace and capitulated once headed inside the 300 M.
In about 8th place 4-back on fence and no better than about 6Ls off pace until home turn, improved to 2Ls down amid chasing pack at 200 M, kept on well but lacked dash of quinella pair.
Good effort despite a wide trip, 3-wide no cover 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield from 1000 M to home turn, quickened up to be 1L down in 5th at the 200 M, lost a place in final strides.
Slowest away, keen at the 100 M when worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace, 5Ls down off final bend and made some minor late ground in the finish.
Went back to 12th place about 8Ls off early speed, not much closer taking the final turn, staying on only one-paced when 4Ls down at the 200 M but weakened again late.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in 5th or so until home turn, picked up well to lead 200 M, hung left under pressure and just hung on to win.
Mostly caught 4-wide no cover through first half in rear and at least 7Ls from the lead, gained cover on the circle but still 6Ls behind into homestretch, never troubled principals.
Restrained in rear about 10Ls off pace at halfway, about 8Ls behind swinging for home, made some decent late progress down centre of track, nearest at the finish.
Great spot on fence in 3rd through to home straight, 3Ls down at 800 M and within 1L of the speed off final turn, given every possible hope and still faded tamely final 200 M.
3-wide down backstretch towards rear at least 6Ls off pace, caught 4-wide no cover on the circle and slipped back to last on straightening, no impression.
5Ls back in 7th when 2-wide at 1000 M until turning for home, headway when briefly short of room about 250 M out, soon clear and rallied well but post came a few strides too soon.

Worse than midfield, 6Ls off pace along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo and blocked most straight, delivered the best finishing efforts among the field in last 50 M. (See Racing Incidents - Rider questioned.)
Slow away, eased to sit at the tail, 8Ls off pace along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room 400 M, little dash when clear.
Eased to sit about midfield, no cover early and over-raced, trapped 4 wide throughout, lost too much ground at bends, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Eased to the rear, 8Ls behind the leaders 3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly 200 M, improving.
Settled in box seat, travelled nicely throughout, favoured by slow pace and rails-run, picked up 300 M and ran on strongly to win by a narrow margin.
Midfield, 4Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide, covered too much ground on bend, moved up 700 M, soon flattened on straightening.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders and trapped 3 wide, raced keenly, harmed by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly 300 M as usual.
Pushed forward but failed to get across, trapped 3 wide outside the pace group without cover, helped by the slow early tempo, ran on strongly to the line and just beaten by narrow margin in 2nd.
Just managed to keep up worse than midfield, 6Ls off pace 2 wide, blocked most straight and not suited by the slow tempo, showed little dash when run presented.
Crossed to the rail quickly, raced about midfield 4Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the slow pace and blocked most straight, dashed strongly 100 M.
Pushed to take the rail and led at slow early sectionals, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, still kept on well and just beaten by a short head in 3rd.
Eased to sit outside the leader 2 wide, took advantage from the slow pace, however run finished at 300 M.
Crossed the field in front easily and eased to sit 2.5Ls behind the leaders, 2 wide, raced keenly, blocked 400 M, dashed well when clear despite the slow pace.
Slow away, soon back in midfield, 2-3 wide, 4.5Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace and blocked most straight, little dash when clear.
Amongst leaders early. Settled one out one back rounding home bend. Just kept on same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Travelled towards rear. Baulked for a run upon straightening. Quickened well inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Made some late impression inside final 200 M without threatening.
Travelled very wide in rear of midfield. Soon weakened under pressure in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Waited with. Obtained a clear run over 200 M out. Finished off race well.
Began fairly. Settled 3-wide within 2Ls off pace. Disputed 2nd turning in but soon weakened.
Shared pace far side. Gained a length advantage rounding home bend. Moved slightly clearer under pressure early in straight. Just held on to the line.
Travelled on rails mainly in midfield. Kept on steadily at the same pace without quickening.
Travelled on rails with leaders far side. Settled one back on rails rounding home bend. Close up 4th turning in. Fought on steadily to nick 3rd place.
Sluggish at start. Settled on rails in rear. Failed to make any impression at any stage in straight.

Slow into stride, trailed them from the outset 10Ls from front runners on rails, allowed to relax at rear before making 3 wide run on bend, switched 4 to 5 wide on turning, made up many lengths but simply gave too big a start.

Even beginning, settled behind midfield in 2 wide running line 5Ls back, didn't settle but had reasonable trip and tracked the eventual winner on bend, let down nicely and showed good fight to nearly steal 2nd late.

Didn't show any toe from outset, settled in rearward division on rails 7Ls from leaders, had a quiet time and still well back on turning, kept to rails before switching out making up some good ground to be nearest on line.

Well enough away, went on in search of front, allowed to stride forward when racing wide to race outside of leader, faced breeze 1L back to bend, niggled along turning in but failed to respond and weakened tamely last 300 M.

Away with them, kept with speed early to assume 1 out 1 back role after 300 M, had good trip thereafter 3Ls off speed, was more settled and trailled nicely to bend, came with strong run down middle to claim win late. Promising type.

Lacked usual speed from jump out when urged along to cross, finally got up there but forced to race 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, always working to bend, under pressure on turning, steadily faded out to be well beaten.

Ordinary to begin, took up a spot behind midfield on fence 6Ls from pace, not set a task in mid-section, came 2 wide turning in and switched into clear at 350 M, produced only a 1-paced finish holding ground to line.

Took a hold when looking to slot in from a wide alley, raced 3 wide 5 to 6Ls back in midfield with cover, covered ground to bend, eased 4 wide turning in but stopped coming at 300 M. (Heart irregularity.)

Quickest to leave gates, allowed to leisurely stride forward to assume expected role in lead, controlled race 1 to 2Ls clear from outset, held good advantage turning in and kicked hard defying them until last 100 M when run ended.

Standard break, settled in rearward division in running line 7Ls away, not set much to do in mid-section, still well back on turn and in traffic on turning, switched to middle and made some ground but never really likely.
Reasonably away, showed enough to slot into a midfield position on fence 4 to 5Ls from speed, saved ground on bend, kept improving along rails and did best work late to make the frame. Better effort.

Amongst first few to leave gates, always took early trail and ended up racing behind leader, had most desirable trip to turn, eased out in straight but could only manage to conclude at same pace and battled last furlong.

Reasonable beginning, didn't have much pace but managed to push up to be 3Ls back on rails, had a cosy trip through mid-section, close enough on bend but was one paced to the 200 M before dropping out.

Standard break, didn't have speed to match them early and assumed position 3 wide at rear 7Ls back, had cover but lost position approaching turn, into clear passing 250 M and closed off well making good ground to be nearest on line.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Waited with. Shifted wide for a run turning for home. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Made running until headed under pressure over 200 M out.
Settled one out one back in 2nd. Slightly closer turning in and fought on to draw level 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Began slowly losing many lengths. Raced keenly and wide and pulled to rear of midfield 1000 M out. Soon weakened upon straightening.
Mainly in midfield. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled in 5th within 3Ls of speed rounding home bend. Fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
Raced keenly wide in midfield. Similar position turning in. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace. Obtained split from box-seat over 300 M out hitting front over 150 M out. Won readily.
Did not break well. Gradually improved along rails to settle in midfield. Came under pressure shortly after straightening but found nothing home.
Settled well back. Shifted widest when last into straight. Made up good ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield early. Improved to dispute 3rd 3 wide rounding home bend. Weakened under pressure upon straightening.
Travelled in last few. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.

Just even break, didn't have the required pace and settled further back than usual behind midfield on rails 5Ls back, didn't work hard to bend, improved steadily behind them and made some good progress late to be nearest on line.

Fastest to hit ground, rolled on to eventually take up the running, dictated terms at a leisurely tempo, held a narrow advantage on bend, let down well in straight and showed good fight to go under in a 4 way go.

Moderate start, settled down in rearward division 6Ls back, raced 3 wide with cover in mid-section, still had job to do on bend, continued to make ground in straight but run ended at 200 M and just plugged to line.

Shade tardy to begin, drove through to hold the leaders back and eventually was 3Ls back on rails, had a quiet time in mid-section, gradually improved when run presented in straight to get close on line. Much improved.

Began well, slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back position, had an easy time 2Ls back with moderate tempo, in traffic on turning and held up until 200 M, quickened nicely when clear to make frame and should have been closer.

Average to begin and soon restrained to slot in from a wide alley, raced 2 wide in rearward division 6Ls off speed, still well back to bend, switched wide in straight making many lengths from an impossible spot.

Out with rest, caught wide from an awkward draw, posted 4 wide 6Ls back without cover, allowed to stride forward 5 wide on circle, kept finding in straight and there to 100 M but workload took toll and run ended late. Tough run.

Standard getaway, raced fiercely early and pulled way into midfield, raced 2Ls back 3 wide without cover, always working to be 1L down on turning. Struggled to find another gear at 200 M and weakened out. (Checked late.)

Out with line, positioned in midfield 4Ls back in 2 wide running line, back between horses in traffic on bend, didn't ever look likely and only battled when clear for a sub par finish. (See Racing Incidents - Rider advised "flat".)

Began fairly, had enough dash to take early lead but assumed trail soon after, had nice trip on leaders back with slow speed on, run opened on entering straight but only managed 1 pace in straight plugging to line.

Moderate getaway, caught 3 and 4 wide in midfield 4Ls off pace, always working and improved to be 2Ls back on bend, loomed up easily to challenge at 300 M and kept there just tiring last 50 M. Brave effort for workload.

Away fairly, allowed stride forward to race much closer outside leader, at leader's girth appreciating slow speed to bend, under pressure on turning and green when headed 200 M, found again last 100 M to kick back for a gallant win.
Slow to begin, restrained to rear and ended up 6Ls back on rails, not pushed in mid-section and saved ground on bend, angled out on turning and finished off reasonably without ever threatening.
Niggled along on rails in midfield. Briefly baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on under pressure inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Attempted to make all. Broke a length clear early in straight but unable to hold place under pressure final few strides.
Always struggling in last few. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled mainly in 5th just better than midfield. Gained 4th still about 3Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Travelled mainly 3-wide no cover in 3rd to straight. Soon weakened.
Jumped fairly. Settled wide towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Settled at the back. Commenced move rounding home bend. Did not find too much room early in straight and inconvenienced 200 M out. Finished off race well once into the clear final 150 M.
Settled just behind midfield. Yielded ground from 600 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening nearly drew level inside 200 M but unable to match speed of winner close to home.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Dropped away quickly.
In last few to straight. Ran past beaten horses under pressure.
Broke well. Settled in 4th on rails within 2Ls of pace. Gained 3rd turning in. Fought on steadily between runners inside final 200 M to assert authority close to home.
Began well and led early along the fence, on settling raced 3Ls back off the speed, stayed to the inside and finished off nicely to score.
Midfield, 1 off with cover, never likely.
Checked soon after the start and raced back in the field along the fence. Struck interference near 350 M, closed the race strongly.
Slow to begin and raced in last position. Ran to the post well after shifting into clear running after 200 M.
Midfield along the fence, beaten after the 300 M.
Positioned 2-wide with cover just behind midfield, dour in the straight.
Took up front running duties, kicked clear on straightening but handed up inside the 100 M.
Raced 2Ls back from the speed, 1 off no cover, made little impression.
Caught wide without cover around midfield, struggled over the concluding stages after doing plenty of work.
Settled near the rear, 1 off with cover, came widest in the straight, worked home soundly.
Parked behind the leader along the rails, faded inside the 200 M.
Settled on the fence, near the tail of the field. Ran on without threatening.
Lacked early speed and raced in a rearward position. Made up a bit of ground after 600 M but found nothing in the straight.
Ridden along to be in a forward position. Pushed continuously to take the lead near 1000 M. Weakened and dropped out in the home straight.
Ridden along early stages to keep pace behind leaders. Crowded at 1400 M and then raced no better than midfield. Lacked the needed response in home straight and was hampered near 200 M.
Taken back from widest draw. Raced towards the rear until home straight. Responded well and closed the race off with a strong run.
Botched the start and was taken back. Raced in rear section most of the way and trailed field on straightening. Only ran past a few beaten runners.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Kept on well in the straight but unable to find enough to challenge winner in the closing stages.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Quickened nicely 300 M out and kicked away from rivals final 200 M.

2-wide better than midfield. Gradually closed in on the leader in a 2-wide spot making the turn and was in contention for the lead near 200 M. Unable to find extra to keep pace with winner in the closing stages.
Better than midfield. Raced along the rails and 2Ls behind the leader turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Raced on the fence at midfield. Became badly unbalanced when crowded near 1300 M and slipped behind midfield. Gradually shifted out after straightening and made a strong closing run final 200 M.
Awkward jump and raced in rear section. Kept along the rails making home turn and remained towards the rear on straightening. Took some time to pick up and only made up a bit of late ground.
Ridden to take the early lead. Took a sit behind the leader after 1000 M. Kept on well after straightening and regained the lead at 200 M. Unable to find extra to remain in contention closing stages.
Always caught wide without cover, 4-wide early before racing 3-wide out deep and 2Ls back in mid-division at 800 M, struggling to hold this position on the circle, retreated rapidly.
3-back on fence about 3Ls from the front in midfield or better, stayed on quite well in homestretch to take 2nd inside final 30 M but never likely to reel in the winner.
Keen early on and briefly caught out 4-wide no cover, 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield until homestretch, no impression thereafter.
In 2nd out 2-wide and 1L from the speed until 300 M out, given every chance to at least place but too one-paced inside final stages.
Had the box-seat on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until turning for home, always travelled well, led 150 M out and kept on well.
Never travelled well, steadied at 800 M when 4Ls back around midfield, 6Ls down and losing ground under pressure entering homestretch, very weak in closing stages.
Switched from wide gate to travel 8Ls last on fence at 900 M, not any better off entering homestretch, never in the hunt.
Always in rear bunch, about 5Ls off the speed early but 8Ls back and not going well turning for home, tame effort.
Never really got involved, switched from wide gate to race 8Ls off pace in rear out 2-wide, still well back when 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, made no impact.
Reasonable debut, mostly 2-wide in 5th or 6th between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed before straightening for home, clawed back some late ground and only just missed a place.
Lost some ground at start, keen and unbalanced at 800 M when over 4Ls back in 10th, same margin back in midfield taking home turn, always held by principals in the finish.
Best away and led by about 1L on fence from 1000 M to home straight, headed by winner 150 M out and all out to just cling onto 3rd.
On fence 6Ls off speed in 9th at 1000 M, about 5Ls down turning for home, made some fair late ground on the inner but never appeared likely to place.
Very slow away losing about 3Ls, soon about 10Ls last on fence, 6Ls down turning for home, minor headway when short of room at 200 M, closest at finish.
7Ls back when 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, nudged along to make some ground on the circle, 3-wide and 5Ls down on straightening, no further improvement.
Had the run of the race in 4th at 1100 M, mostly within 2Ls of the speed on fence in 4th until final turn, every chance 200 M despite hanging in slightly, did just enough for a place.
Travelled well on fence 3 and 4-back in midfield between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace until home turn, dug in well along fence to lead inside final 50 M.
Always tended to lay out, pressed on early to race 2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1100 M, still close up turning for home but fading at the 200 M and dropped out.
5Ls back in 8th and 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 8th on straightening, one-paced on the run-in.
Caught 3-wide no cover early so pressed on to lead by a neck at 1100 M and led by 1L on fence at 900 M, headed at top of home straight and one-paced final 200 M.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, a little closer in 5th taking home bend, disappointing finish given the soft trip.
Led early on before handing up to race about 1L back in 2nd on fence at 1000 M, led again at top of homestretch out 2-wide, fended off all comers except NOBLE HEART inside final 50 M.
Always 3-wide no cover, about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in midfield until home straight, soon tired and gone by the 200 M.
No early speed and raced 10Ls last out 2-wide until the 600 M, 6Ls last entering stretch, responded to strong handling to run on strongly and only just miss 3rd.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, traveled comfortably and favoured by the slow pace, however just held ground in straight to run 4th.
Hard ridden to park outside the leader, 2-wide throughout and benefited by the slow pace, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Eased back, raced keenly, 2-wide early and swept 4-wide on straightening, never competitive.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field, settled 5-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2 to 3-wide, little dash 200 M despite the slow pace.
Bumped after the start, 3Ls off pace along the fence, helped by the rail-run but not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room 300 M, just ran on when clear.
Eased at start to get across the rails behind the field, 5Ls off pace, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room 300 M, dashed strongly when clear to finish a remarkable 2nd.
Pushed forward, 2Ls behind the slow pace, trapped 3-wide throughout, not suited by the racing situations, faded quickly on straightening.
Crossed to the rail easily and led at slow early sectionals, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Eased back, 2-wide early, 8Ls behind the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, swept 4-wide on straightening, dashed fairly.
Pushed early, trapped 2 to 3-wide about midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leaders, closed the race off strongly 250 M despite the slow pace.
Eased back and soon took the rail 6-1/2Ls behind the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, however kept dashing well to the line, improving.
Hard ridden to occupy a favourable forward spot, raced 2-wide throughout 2Ls behind the slow tempo, ran on strongly last 300 M to win.
Travelled towards rear on rail. Made steady headway down straight to reach 3rd late.
Settled just behind midfield. Made steady headway inside final 200 M without threatening.
Raced one back on rails. Fought on steadily to hold position early in straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Slightly inconvenienced on rails early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well, settling just off the pace. Dropped to 4th one out one back rounding home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front inside 200 M. Won readily.
Checked and lost ground shortly after start dropping to last. Trailed the field into straight. Fought on well late to beat one home.
Always wide in last few. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Raced 3-wide mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on early in straight before fading under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening. Ran home well but unlikely to catch winner.
Raced wide in midfield early. Moved closer to outside of leader going up Rock. Disputed lead into straight but faded gradually inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from poor draw. Soon ridden to the front and crossed to rails at 1200 M bend. Led field until joined into straight. Swamped inside final 200 M.

Out with them but soon took up expected role sharing tail, raced 2-wide 7Ls from them, still well back on bend and forced widest in straight, closed only at one-speed despite giving too great a start.

Began well enough, settled closer than usual 3Ls back on rails in midfield, had an easy time in mid-section but travelled a little keenly, urged along on bend, kept to rail and made good ground but lacked the finish of last time.

Away nicely, showed dash under riding to hold leaders back, had an easy trip with trail throughout appreciating slow tempo, poised to strike and peeled out on bend, took control at 150 M and drew away for an easy win.
Began in line, slotted in off speed in midfield, shuffled back a touch in running line to be 6Ls from them passing Rock, didn't have a response when asked on bend and just plodded away in straight.

Bounced out, lead them easily, dictated terms 1L clear throughout at a moderate tempo, began to increase the speed from Rock and had them chasing on turning, kicked 2Ls clear but no match for winner last 150 M.

Standard break, held a rails position early, raced behind midfield throughout 4-5Ls back, not asked to bend, pace against but gradually improved saving ground on fence and kept coming to be nearest on line.

Well enough to begin, showed early pace to assume role outside leader, had a reasonable trip with the leisurely pace, at leaders girth on bend and niggled when tempo increased, found little turning in and folded tamely 200 M.

Shade tardy to begin, didn't have early speed and ended up next to last in 3-wide line, always covering ground 5-6Ls back but had cover throughout, under pressure on bend, came wide and made some ground but never really threatened.

Standard getaway, drifted back to last with little early pace, raced on rails 7Ls from them throughout, not asked but still had field in front on circle, came very wide and didn't have much room but passed some tired runners late.

Reasonable beginning, went forward but caught 3-wide without cover outside leaders, had a hard run doing plenty of work to bend, under pressure on turning and stopped quickly when effects of hard run took toll.

Moderate to begin, urged along to drive through to end up in 1 out 1 back role, had run of race thereafter with favourable tempo, niggled along on bend, didn't show much turn of foot sticking on only fairly to make frame.

Began evenly and showed some speed but caught 4-wide early from a wide alley, posted wide to mid-point before slotting in 4Ls back, had fair run to bend but found little at business end making only moderate headway in straight.

Tardy to begin, ridden up to settle behind midfield 4Ls away, hung throughout, tracked well and came to middle at 300 M, closed steadily over concluding stages (despite still hanging) to be nearest on line.
Broke well, up there towards outside rail 2Ls back behind leaders, raced a little greenly, didn't have much to offer at 400 M when sprint went on, gave in tamely last 300 M and dropped out.
Away with them, took a sit in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, towards middle, didn't have much to offer and gradually faded out when pressure was applied last 400 M.
Even getaway, prominent 2Ls back on outside rail, began to feel strain passing midway rail, gave in easily and dropped right out late.
Standard break, raced behind them 4Ls back well off rails, niggled passing midpoint, run opened at 400 M but couldn't capitalise and failed to flatter over concluding stages.

Standard getaway, settled in behind them 3 to 4Ls back off midfield, had easy time throughout, into when passing 350 M and gradually improved to be nearest on line despite hanging and not being fully ridden out.
Plain enough to begin, took up a spot well off the rails 1 to 2Ls back behind leader, began to struggle from 400 M when they sprinted and didn't finish off as normal, simply one paced to line.
Bounced out, showed customary speed to lead easily, kept rolling 1 to 2Ls clear well off outside rail, still there at 200 M but run ended late and was again caught in the shadows.
Well enough to begin, raced 3Ls back with cover in middle of track, urged along to improve at midpoint, switched out but found little and just plugged away in run to line.

Bumped on jumping, soon mustered to sit behind leader 1 to 2Ls back off rails, trialled nicely to 300 M, continued to gain ground final 200 M and caught leader close to home. More to offer as is still green.
Began nicely, up amongst them 1L away in middle of course, out cutting breeze and produced a solid chase to threaten at 200 M, kept on well thereafter just holding ground to line.
Out nicely, not far away early 1 to 2Ls back on outside rail, had chance to improve in mid-section but began to struggle from 400 M, only laboured last bit and didn't offer much fight.
Outpaced from outset, detached from main body 5Ls from 2nd last horse, finally passed a tired horse late but never really a factor. Blatantly wrong trip.
Awkwardly away and received a check early, regathered to race on outside rail, followed nicely at 400 M and obtained clear running on rails to steadily improve and closed nicely last 200 M.
Settled just behind the speed, 1 off, lengthened well in the straight to win effortlessly.
Slow to begin and took up last position. Made up good ground over the concluding stages.
Raced 1 off with cover near the rear of the field, came wide turning for home but didn't close off.
Tracked the leader, 1 off, didn't quicken after 400 M and struggled over the final stages.
Enjoyed a comfortable run off the pace along the fence and stuck to task honestly.
Enjoyed the run of the race on the back of a slow speed, 1 off with cover, 3Ls back, weakened after 400 M.
Hampered early and settled just behind midfield 1 off with cover, closed off soundly.
Led but tired inside the 100 M.
Travelled wide and without cover, midfield. Faded over the concluding stages.
Settled just off midfield, 3 deep with cover, dour in the straight.
Slow to begin and settled second last along the fence, came wide in the straight but didn't go on.
Took up rearward position on the fence, never looked a chance.
Raced midfield the fence, commenced to make some ground passing the 300 M but was tightened for room. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced handy to the leaders, 3Ls back but hung out and was caught wide without cover, never likely.
Settled behind the leader most of the way. Unable to be fully tested when racing in restricted room over the final 200 M.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Remained on same pace after straightening and was steadied at 200 M.

Raced 2-wide better than midfield. Remained under a tight hold and edged closer to the lead after straightening. Took the lead at 200 M and remained strong under hands and heels over the final stages.
Disputed lead early stages. 2-wide and a length off the leader after 1200 M. Regained lead briefly at 300 M but found no extra to stay in contention final stages.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Settled in rear section and was near the back on straightening. Rallied for a minor placing.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Soon racing in the lead. Held a slight edge into home straight but weakened thereafter.
Botched the start and raced near the back. Had a bit of trouble getting a run after straightening but closed the race off strongly once finding daylight.
Soon 8Ls last, a little detached and same margin behind entering home straight, made some very minor late headway down centre of track.
Checked at 1200 M, 4Ls back in midfield from halfway to straight when driven along, failed to find clear running until about 100 M when too late to make an impact.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so from 1200 M to home straight, found zero once the tempo quickened, very tame effort.
Caught wide without cover throughout, 4-wide no cover in rear early on, pressed on to go 3-wide no cover 2Ls back from 800 M to home turn, quickly folded.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace early on, caught 4-wide no cover at the 800 M and forced widest off final bend when losing ground, no impression.
3-back on fence in midfield at 1000 M when 4Ls from the front, about 3Ls down entering stretch, 2Ls down in 3rd with every chance to place at 200 M but tired late.
Keen until the 1000 M when 5Ls back in 8th or so with cover, similarly placed turning for home but never looked like reaching the principals.
Awkwardly away, over-raced when 3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until halfway, driven along to get closer turning for home, hung in late but did make a little ground.
Had a nice 'one-out one-back' position behind a slow tempo until the 600 M, niggled along when 2Ls back in 3rd entering stretch, very weak finish.
Slowly away, checked on fence at 1200 M and raced 4-back about 5Ls off pace in 12th at the 800 M, one-paced on the inner without ever threatening leaders in the finish.
Disputed early lead, edged to narrow lead on fence at 1200 M until home turn, headed over 200 M out but battled back and only barely missed the win.
Steadied towards rear through first half about 6Ls off pace and not much closer turning for home, stayed on well late down centre of track for 3rd despite hanging in.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off the speed until turning for home, made some decent late ground through the pack to be closest at the line.
Flanked leader out 2-wide about half a length off speed in 2nd until homestretch, led narrowly at the 200 M, hung left under pressure and all out to just score.
3-back the fence about 4Ls back in 6th at the 1200 M, same position but sorely lacking a change of gear off the home turn, faded out.
Checked at the start, about 7Ls back in 12th at halfway and only marginally closer at top of homestretch, stayed on evenly out widest of all, closest at the line.
Not the best start, 6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1200 M, still worse than midfield when 5Ls back and hanging in taking home turn, always held.
Pressed out 3-wide no cover early to race in 2nd out 2-wide about 1L off pace from 1200 M, still close up but labouring into home straight entrance, emptied out rapidly.
Checked soon after the start, mostly 2-wide in midfield or better within 3Ls of the speed prior to home straight, all out to be a weakening 3rd passing the 200 M, faded thereafter.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M before being pushed out 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, pressed on out deep to go 1L back in 2nd at top of home straight, this run quickly petered out.
Led on fence a mile out, always about 1L clear until the home straight and same 200 M out, only headed inside final 50 M and missed the quinella just a few strides later.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to final bend, found zero under pressure and surrendered very tamely.
7Ls off pace in 10th out 2-wide at 1200 M, about 5Ls behind travelling well on straightening, picked up well to go 2nd in final 30 M but post came too soon to reel in the winner.
No early speed and soon one from rear on fence about 8Ls behind lead, about 6Ls down turning for home, plugged on dourly late along the inner but never dangerous.
Settled about 10Ls last at the 1200 M, about 6Ls last into home straight, made some fair late ground through beaten rivals to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at 1200 M, travelled okay until straightening for home, found very little off the bridle, another meek effort.
7Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, a little closer but 3-wide and niggled along at 800 M, 4Ls down on straightening, could only stay on at the same tempo and never seriously threatened to place.
Always 3-wide and only briefly without cover down the back about 4Ls off speed in mid-division, 2Ls down in 5th off final bend, kept on finding to lead about 40 M out and win.
Eased back, 10Ls off pace along the rails, favoured by the fast pace, swept 3 wide on straightening to make ground, however lacked room until 200 M, made some progress late.
Trapped 3 wide throughout about midfield, 6Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast tempo but no turn of foot in straight, flattened 300 M.
Eased at start, towards the rear more than 11Ls off the leaders, 2 to 4 wide, helped by the fast pace, made ground last 250 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 7.5Ls behind the leaders, 3 to 4 wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to finish a close 2nd.
Eased to sit about midfield, 2 wide, 6Ls off pace, raced keenly, blocked briefly 400 M, ran on only fairly when clear despite being favoured by the fast tempo.
Pushed early to get across in front but soon took a sit behind the leaders, 3Ls off the fast pace 2 wide to bend, led 350 M, hung on strongly to win.
Pushed to share the lead along the fence under huge pressure, raced keenly, burnt out by fast early sectionals, weakened 300 M.
Hard ridden to keep up with the fast pace along the fence, 3Ls behind the leaders, faded quickly 400 M.
Hard ridden to get across one off position and share the lead under hung pressure, harmed by the fast early sectionals, dropped off 350 M.
Slowly away, soon back to midfield, 6Ls off pace along the rails, helped by the fast tempo, lacked room 400 M, weakened quickly last 250 M.

Eased to the rear, more than 11Ls off the leaders, 3 wide early, swept forward 6 wide on straightening, helped by the fast pace but lost too much ground at the bends, progressed steadily 500 M, run ended 100 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield along the fence, 8.5Ls off pace, swept closer up 3 wide on straightening, benefited by the fast tempo, blocked 300 M, progressed steadily when clear.
Settled just behind the pace group, 4.5Ls off pace, 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 400 M and challenged the winner until 200 M, just ran on for 3rd.
Bumped at start, raced 10Ls behind the leaders, 2 to 5 wide, helped by the fast pace, no progress in straight.
Began awkwardly settling just behind midfield in 7th. Similar position turning in. Found nothing.
Began fairly settling in rear on rails. Remained similar turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily under pressure inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Chased along mainly about 4Ls behind pacemaker. Failed to quicken under pressure inside final 200 M and gradually faded.
Virtually trailed the field throughout.
Settled in rear of midfield on rails in 6th. Kept on at the same pace early in straight before making good late progress inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield mostly 2-wide. Came to challenge shortly after straightening and ran on well to assert authority over 100 M out. Won readily.
Set fast pace going some 4Ls clear rounding home bend and early in straight. Gradually came back to the field over 200 M out. Found nothing to resist challenges and soon overhauled.
Travelled in 3rd far side some 5Ls off the pacemaker. Came under pressure when dropped to 4th rounding home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening. (Lame next morning.)
Raced in last few. Ran home one-paced. (Blood in trachea.)
In remote 4th behind fast pace. Gained 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on well under pressure in straight but found winner too good.

Began nicely, slotted into box seat 1 out 1 back, had a dream run with muddling tempo, poised to strike 2Ls back on turning, switched out and went to them easily at 200 M, drew away under hands and heels for another easy win.

Tardy getaway, settled worse than midfield on the rails 6Ls from leaders, not asked in mid-section, pace didn't favour and still well back to bend, kept to rails but offered little and just battled to the line.

Fast into stride, didn't have enough pace to hold the early lead, took a trail and had run of the race behind the leader, right there but didn't have turn of foot in straight, sprinted and just plugged concluding stages.

Moderate beginning, settled behind midfield 7Ls back on rails in a 2 wide spot, always well back and spent little to bend, back between horses on turning, steadily made ground last 300 M without really threatening.
Out with line, took up a midfield role 4Ls back in 2 wide line, had a cosy trip to turn, pushed along to improve into straight, found little when pressured and only managed one speed in run to line.

Moderate jump, lacked pace as usual and drifted back to tail, raced 3 wide with cover 7Ls from leaders, made a 4 wide run on the bend, didn't show much dash but continued to make ground in straight to be nearest on line.

Fastest into stride, rolled on to assume expected role as pacemaker, dictated terms 1L clear at a leisurely tempo, still held advantage at bend and wound up nicely, kicked hard but found out by trip at 200 M. Stuck on well for 3rd.

Even getaway, didn't have early pace and posted 3 wide in midfield 5Ls away, always working without cover gradually improved on bend to be 3Ls down, stuck on gamely and made plenty of ground in straight. Extra distance suits.

Reasonable to begin, caught wide early but able to slot in 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back by mid-point, had easy time thereafter and tracked eventual winner on bend, angled out and chased solidly but run ended at 200 M.

Began with rest, held a position 3 back on rails 4Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section, travelled well on bend but awkwardly placed making a run turning, a little flat footed when they sprinted but kept on evenly last 200 M.

Reasonable break, assumed spot at leader's girth, suited by the slow tempo throughout, moved up to challenge on bend and still there turning in, folded tamely when sprint went on and dropped right out last 200 M.

Lacked speed from outset and restrained to near last, raced 2 wide 8Ls from them in mid-section, still well back tracking 3 wide on bend, angled widest in straight and made many lengths last 200 M to make frame. Solid effort.

Moderate jump, soon sharing tail 8Ls from frontrunners, lobbed along at rear to bend (not suited by tempo), angled wider turning in, lacked a finishing burst in straight and only got past a few tired runners late.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move upon straightening. Made up good ground down centre of track inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and ridden for pace, eventually crossing to rails 900 M out. Led field into straight but quickly worn down by fast-finishing winner inside final 200 M.
