Travelled on rails just worse than midfield. Produced moderate progress inside final 200 M before checked on rails 100 M out.
Did not jump well. Remained well behind until making good progress down centre of track inside final 300 M.
Raced freely in 3L 5th. Steadied coming out of back straight and gradually dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on early in straight before fading inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails with leaders early. Had to be snatched up a bit when leader crossed to rails 900 M out. Remained one back on rails turning in. Tired noticeably passing 200 M.
Raced 3-wide towards rear to straight. Found nothing.
Prominent, travelling one out one back coming out of back straight. Similar turning in. Found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never far off in 4th to straight. Soon weakened.
Broke well gradually settling in midfield before home bend. Made modest progress in straight without threatening.
Slow out. Never seen with a chance travelling well behind.
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M to grab victory 100 M out.

Settled on rails in last few. Forced to steady behind runner coming out of back straight. Still well behind turning for home. Finishing off race well when badly baulked inside final 100 M. Not properly tested.
Ridden to muster pace to be prominent early. Settled 3-wide in midfield coming out of back straight. Remained same turning in. Produced good late impression closing stages.

Ordinary break, took up expected spot sharing tail, on rails throughout 6 to 7Ls from front runners, came 2 wide on bend and switched out turning in, held up for most of straight but lacked an extra gear when clear last 200 M.

Well enough to begin, settled in midfield 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide line, had a cosy trip but copped some mild interference to bend, trailed strongly and briefly threatened when gap emerged at 300 M. Onepaced.

Began nicely, raced outside leader early before restraining for coveted 1 out 1 back trail, had run of race to bend, found little when sprint went on at 400 M and stopped quickly last 200 M to be well beaten.

Restrained from outset, in rearward division 6Ls back on rails, didn't really settle in mid-section, still well back to bend, didn't find much room in straight especially at 200 M, race was over when clear. Not really tested.

First to hit ground, took up front running role and made a steady pace throughout, shaded on bend and held a 1L advantage turning, kicked briefly but headed at 300 M and just fought on at same speed in finish.

Amongst them to leave boxes, settled in midfield but overraced early, still 4 to 5Ls off them with a 3 wide trail on bend, in traffic turning but didn't show usual finish when gap appeared and made little headway late.
Average to begin, assumed role behind midfield on rails 4Ls off pace, not suited by tempo, still on fence and held up on turning, saw little daylight and held up behind them, not tested late.

Fairly away, took a trail behind midfield 3 wide 5Ls back, not helped by pace but improved on bend with 4 wide track into race, steadily improved in straight to be nearest on line. Still looking for further.

Began with them, assumed a more forward role than last start up 3 wide near leaders, had no cover from midpoint but helped by slow pace, challenged from 1L down on bend, went to them easily at 200 M and held a decent break to line.

Bounced out, held leaders back early but tended to overrace 1 to 2Ls back on rails, had an easy time to turn, run opened but didn't quicken, got going again late but in some restricted room. One paced all the same.

Better than usual beginning, up amongst them 3 wide early and went on to sit outside leaders girth and closer than expected applying pressure to bend, 1L down on turning but workload took toll and gave in tamely last 300 M.

Reasonable getaway, posted 4 wide in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, always working but not harmed by slow tempo, closed to be 2Ls down turning, stuck to task well but run ended at 200 M when workload took its toll.

Average break, took up expected position sharing tail, raced 6Ls back in 2 wide line, angled 3 wide with trail on bend and not assisted by slow pace, last turning and made many lengths down outside but gave too much start.
Niggled along behind midfield near centre of track. Quickened well under pressure inside final 300 M to hit front about 100 M out only to be pipped at post.
Not too far off early stages, gradually dropped to 5th about 3Ls off the pace 800 M out. Picked up well inside final 250 M to hold every chance and only denied narrowly.
Led early. Narrowly headed onto course proper. Dropped out under pressure from 2nd inside final 200 M.

Mostly in 5th and about 3Ls off the pace approaching course proper. Made steady headway under pressure inside final 400 M to briefly dispute 2nd passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in the run home.
Soon in rear. Tailed-off from 300 M.
Raced detached from the field near stands' rail early. Gradually shifted in onto the centre of the track on course proper. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M to just get up on line.
Raced close up in 3rd on stands' rail. Dropped out tamely inside final 200 M.
Well there, hitting front onto course proper. Led until headed over 100 M out and soon swamped.
Took up leading the race soon after the start and held on to its advantage in the run in the post.
From the outside gate, settled near the rear of the field, 1 off with cover, came wide turning from home, closed off satisfactorily.
Began well, tracked the leader throughout, chased soundly to the line.
Raced just behind midfield. 1 off with cover, shifted out to the 3 wide no cover after the 800 M, offered little in the straight.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, weakened after the 500 M.
Positioned near the tail of the field. Made some late ground along the fence in the straight.
Settled midfield the fence, held up early in the straight, closed off strongly to fall marginally short.
Raced out the back, along the fence, struggled after turning for home.
Raced 1 off, on the back of the leaders, commenced to weaken after the 450 M.
Raced along the fence, behind midfield, ran on fairly.
Backmaker which made minimal ground in the run to the wire.
Raced near the rear. 1 off with cover dour in the run home.
Settled 2 deep on the back of the speed, didn't close off at the business end.
Settled just off the speed along the rails, kept on one paced in the straight.
Crowded shortly after start and raced mostly behind midfield. Never quickened when asked turning for home and weakened in the straight.

Never worse than midfield. 3 to 4Ls off the pace making the turn and kept gaining ground turning for home. Continued well and was in a 3-way battle for the lead 200 M out. Kept on strongly final stages to draw clear from rivals.
Disputed lead early stages. 2-wide and a length off the leader making the turn. Failed to keep pace in front 300 M out and gradually faded.
Steadily dropped to a rearward position. Trailed field on straightening and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Raced along the rails in midfield before switching out on straightening. Stayed on at same pace in the early part of the straight before picking up speed final 150 M.

Best out, led briefly early stages but was wide and without cover. 3-wide and kept within 2Ls of the leader making the turn. Locked in a 3-way battle for the lead at 200 M but unable to match winner's stride closing stages.
Took the lead after 1000 M. Held a narrow advantage into the home straight and was engaged in a 3-way battle for the lead inside 200 M. Unable to find extra to keep pace with top pair final stages.
Ridden to go forward. Raced in a prominent spot along the fence behind the leader making home turn. Lacked a response on straightening and gradually dropped out.
Slowly away and then was checked to the rear. Trailed field until home straight and only ran on same pace.
Kept pace behind leaders early stages. Better than midfield and was 3 to 4Ls behind the pace making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight and was closest at finish.
Botched the start and lost ground. Raced along the rails behind midfield making the turn and was steadied at 600 M. Switched out on straightening and ran on only fairly.
Jumped awkwardly and caused rider to lose his stirrup. Raced 3-wide at midfield. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Crowded at start, recovered to race close up about 2Ls off pace, under pressure at 400 M on far side to lie up, weakened out and eased late.
Towards rear about 3Ls off pace early on, ridden along to take closer order at 200 M, always just held by principal trio.
In rear bunch about 3Ls off pace on stands' rail until halfway when under pressure, faded out gradually.
Close to stands' rail within 2Ls of the speed in midfield until the 200 M, outpaced by the front quartet in final 200 M.
Away best, led by about a head down centre of track until 300 M out, stayed on at the same pace once headed.
Worse than midfield but travelling well through first 500 M, good headway to lead 150 M out, looked to be doing just enough but evened out final strides and caught on the line. (Bled.)
Travelled well on far side about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until the 400 M, found nothing when asked to quicken up.
No worse than 1L off pace in 6th or so before being checked at 200 M and caught in traffic until the line, not fully tested, should have finished closer.
Slowest away and soon detached in rear about 7Ls off pace, still in rear but just 4Ls behind at 200 M, kept on at same pace closing stages. (Bled.)
Not far away in midfield on far side until the 400 M, petered out thereafter.
Close-up no worse than 2Ls off pace in 5th or so until the 300 M when briefly held up, switched right into clear running at 200 M, rallied strongly late to lead on line.
Away well and vied for the lead until about 400 M out when under pressure, didn't find much off the bridle and weakened.
Away well from gate 1 and edged across to centre of track to lead at halfway, headed about 150 M out and passed by winner soon after, comfortably held 3rd.
Nicely placed in midfield about 2Ls off speed until the 400 M pole when under pressure to lie up, soon beaten and eased close home. (Blood in trachea.)
Always very wide (4-wide) without cover and 3Ls off pace at halfway, lost position on the circle and fell away at top of home straight. (Swollen fetlock next morning.)
Uncharacteristically slow to begin and raced keenly early on, 4Ls off speed in midfield from 800 M to home straight, could not get any closer and weakened tamely late. (Mucus in trachea.)
2Ls back in 2nd on fence behind a strong pace at 1000 M, inched closer at top of home straight and given every hope of at least a place, failed to finish off.
3-back on fence at 800 M when over 3Ls off pace at 800 M, under pressure 500 M out tomaintain position, failed and dropped away quickly, performance deemed unacceptable.
Driven to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1000 M, went a bit too quick in front, headed about 150 M out and faded late.
Settled towards rear 3-wide with cover and 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, all out to get within 3Ls of the lead in midfield at 200 M, retreated late.
Raced close to a strong pace 2-wide in 3rd about 2Ls off speed until home turn, all out to hold this position at the 300 M out, faded rapidly, performance deemed unacceptable.
Always better than midfield with cover, 4Ls off pace at halfway and closer at final turn, every chance at 200 M when 1L back in 2nd, failed to sustain the run but did enough for 3rd.
Tucked 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 9th or so at 800 M, challenge along the inner in homestretch to lead 150 M out, stayed on well.

Ragged start losing many lengths, detached about 12Ls last at 1000 M, still well back on straightening, ran on very strongly towards stands' side in the finish but post came too soon. (See Racing Incidents.)
Over-raced in places early on when worse than midfield about 5Ls from the speed, looked dangerous when disputing 2nd place about 1L off pace at 200 M but effort petered out late.
Never really got competitive, 8Ls back in 12th at 1000 M, closest when 5Ls back in 10th or so at the 200 M but tired again close home.
Sluggish at the start and 10Ls back in 13th at halfway, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, good headway to move 3Ls back in midfield at 200 M but this burst soon ended.
Worse than midfield 3-wide no cover 5Ls off pace at halfway, lost his place on the bend and 8Ls down in 13th at top of homestretch, performance deemed unacceptable.
Pushed forward to occupy the box seat, benefited by the slow pace, however ran on only until 200 M, weakened late.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3 wide, 2.5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the leader, 2 to 3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, checked on straightening, blocked 4-2, just ran on fairly when clear.
Eased to get across to a 2-wide position just behind midfield, 2.5Ls off the slow pace, dashed well 300 M to win comfortably.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at slow early sectionals, helped by the racing situations, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, ran on well to the line for 2nd.
Pushed to gain a prominent spot just behind the leader, 2 wide, favoured by the slow pace, however weakened quickly 400 M.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 to 5 wide and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased to get across the rails towards the rear, 6Ls off pace, progressed steadily to obtain clear running in early part of straight, dashed strongly 200 M to finish 3rd despite the slow tempo.
Rails-run throughout but never better than midfield, didn't produce any impression in straight.
Eased midfield early, however no cover in 3 to 4 wide and over-raced, moved up 1000 M to sit 2Ls off the slow pace, held ground until 200 M run ended. (Bled.)
Easily obtained a prominent spot, 1Ls off the slow pace 3 wide, dropped off quickly 700 M.
Eased worse than midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, little dash in final stages, on heels 200 M.
Pushed to sit about midfield, 2.5Ls behind the leader, trapped 4 to 5 wide and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow tempo, faded out from 500 M.
Eased back, trapped 3-4 wide, 4.5Ls off pace, not suited by the slow tempo, checked on straightening, blocked 4-2, just ran on when clear.
Hard ridden for pace early, eventually reaching the lead approaching 1200 M going 2Ls clear. Still maintained half a length advantage turning in but soon weakened.
Raced keenly in last few near tail-end. Jostled between runners turning in and ran on. Despite hampered over 200 M out, sustained good headway to the line.
Travelled in midfield on rails. Made steady headway along inside early in straight before finding no extra closing stages.

Began well from wide draw. Settled on rails within 2Ls of pace after first 400 M. In similar position in 3rd turning in. Baulked behind runners early in straight then dropped out tamely inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Produced good late run inside final 200 M to reach 4th final stride.
Raced wide in prominent position after beginning from poor draw, improving to 2nd one out one back rounding home bend. Disputed lead briefly 300 M out before folded up quickly.

Raced mostly 2-wide in 4th or joint 4th within 3Ls of pace. Gained 3rd 3-wide turning in hitting front about 300 M out. Fought on well under pressure to defy challengers inside final 200 M despite ducking in close to home.
Jumped fairly from wide draw. Soon settled wide in last few. Remained same turning in. Stopped quickly 200 M out.
Raced mainly 3 wide in rear of midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Settled towards rear on rails. Baulked for a run in straight until obtaining split 200 M out. Ran on well but inconvenienced by winner a few strides from home.
Raced 3-wide just behind midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and ran on steadily to hold good chance inside final 100 M but died on its run close to home.
Raced wide in last few. Kept on in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up good ground down centre of track to produce late impression at the finish.
Began fairly, settling on rails in joint 4th far side within 4Ls of pace. In similar position but 5th turning in. Kept on same pace before dropped out tamely inside final 200 M.
Awkward to jump, urged along from outset, raced 7Ls back on rails sharing rear, still well back to turn, did next to nothing in straight only passing a tired runner late.
Away with line, niggled to take up a midfield position, raced 4Ls back on fence, didn't spend much to bend, lacked a dash on turning and just battled away to line. Looked in need of run.
Tardy getaway, ended up at tail from awkward draw, at rear 8 to 9Ls back, still well back on turning, came to extreme outside and closed hard last furlong to be nearest on line. Gave too much start.
Began nicely, showed good dash to assume spot outside leader 1L away, travelled kindly and poised to strike on turn, challenged to most of straight and fought on well just losing 2nd late.
OK jump but failed to muster, posted 3 wide with cover 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, raced keenly in a different role and was struggling on bend, only managed one speed in straight and plodded late.

Fastest out from outside alley, went on with it but posted 3 and 4 wide without cover 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, gradually improved to be 3Ls back turning, stuck to task but hard run took toll. Solid effort.

Jumped well, held a prominent spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, enjoyed an ideal trip and tracked well on turning, eased out and made presence felt to be 3rd at 200 M, just didn't go on last bit. Even effort.
Began with them, raced more prominently 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, travelled keenly and made the bend awkwardly, urged along on turning in, found little when run presented and dropped out tamely late.
Fair to leave gates, went forward but posted 3 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls back, did share of work to bend, gradually imnproved but struggled to dash last 200 M and just held ground to line.
Slow into stride, ended up further back than expected, 5Ls away on rails, had a quiet time but travelled keenly in mid-section, kept to rails in straight but made only moderate headway. One paced.

Standard away, lacked early dash and settled behind midfield, 2 wide 6Ls away, in traffic between horses on bend, didn't look comfortable and lacked usual finish, just plugging away when clear. (Jockey concerned with action.)

Away with them, pressed on to hold spot behind the leader, had run of race on rails and was close enough on bend, not much room for most of straight but improved when gap appeared last 200 M to snatch 2nd.

Jumped nicely, showed good speed to cross them and take up running, rolled along in lead 1L clear, held an advantage on turning, kicked strongly in straight and continued to defy them scoring with a little in hand.
Standard getaway, faded back to be in rearward division, raced 2 wide 7 to 8Ls back in last few, tracked 3 wide on circle, made run through horses and made up many lengths last 200 M to make frame.
Settled in rear. Effort when wide rounding home bend. Sustained progress down centre of straight to narrowly miss a placing.

Began well gradually crossed to inside to be restrained 2-wide just off the pace before home bend. Disputed lead rounding home bend. Kept on same pace under pressure early in straight before dropped out inside 200 M.

Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order when wide coming out of back straight. Continued to circle field rounding home bend. Responded well under pressure to gain 2Ls break just inside 200 M only to be denied final strides.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Badly baulked for a run in straight until inside 200 M. Finished off race well to snatch victory final strides.
Settled mainly 2 wide behind midfield. Improved to 4-wide midfield rounding home bend. Made moderate progress in straight without threatening.
Began fairly gradually crossing to rail when disputing lead. Gained narrow advantage about 1200 M out and held lead to 300 M when swamped.
Settled at the back. Shifted wide rounding home bend and into straight. Made moderate progress down straight without threatening and ended up on stands' rail 200 M out.
Settled well back. Shifted to the centre of the track upon straightening and ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Raced keenly mainly in 4th or 5th 2 wide within 2Ls of pace. Did not find much room behind runners early in straight. Hampered passing 200 M and dropped out tamely.
Travelled towards rear. Obtained a clear passage only over 250 M out and ran on steadily under pressure to reach 3rd place late.
Broke well. Taken back to race 3-wide no cover in prominent position but raced keenly. Moved up around home bend to share pace 3-wide. Dropped away quickly 300 M out.
Niggled at early. Settled in just better than midfield or around midfield. 3-wide entering straight and baulked early in straight. Forced to check 200 M out and never recover.
Ridden along early to settle on rails just behind leader. A 1L 4th turning in but did not have too much to give in the run home.

Niggled along on rails in forward of midfield before tightened approaching 1400 M. Soon renewed effort and improved to two back in 6th on rails. In similar position turning in. Found nothing under pressure. (Lame next day.)

Bounced out, unable to stay there and faded back to midfield, raced 3 wide with cover before slotting in 5 to 6Ls back, made a 4 wide run on bend and kept chasing to clearly take 2nd but found winner much superior.
Began with rest, faded back to rear, raced 2 wide 8Ls from them, still well back on bend between horses, steadily improved in straight to be closest on line without ever really threatening.
Fastest out, ridden along to cross outside leader, right there on a solid speed throughout, only 1/2 down on turning and hit front briefly at 250 M, couldn't match first two but stayed on gamely.
Steadied soon after jump, positioned 3 to 4 wide in rearward division, always 8 or more lengths down, made a wide run on bend, gave too big a start but made little impression in run to line.
Moderate getaway, shared tail on rails 8 to 9Ls from lead, further back than expected and had a job to do on bend, found little when asked turning in and was soundly beaten.

Awkward jump but had plenty of early dash to lead them with ease, rolled along at a solid clip, kept a narrow advantage at bend, showed some fight to 250 M but gave in quickly when overhauled and struggled last bit.
Away evenly, took up sweet seat 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, trailed speed well and improved on bend, didn't have turn of foot to go with first few but stuck on fairly holding ground to line.
Average jump, took up a midfield role behind speed, 2 wide 4Ls back with an even run, eased 3 wide on bend and improved to 250 M, run ended and just battled away last furlong.
Crowded slightly, regathered to race in ideal spot behind the leader but using some effort with speed on, under pressure on turning in, only plugged in straight and dropped out from 200 M.

Average break, regathered to sit behind midfield 6Ls back on rails, always travelled and was jogging coming 2 wide on bend, improved and hit clear running at 300 M ascended quickly and won with ease. Going places.
Out with them, restrained from an awkward alley, raced at rear 3 wide with cover 8 to 9Ls back, always at tail and had job to do on bend, managed to pass a few tired runners late but never in it.
Amongst them to leave gates, raced 3 to 4Ls back on rails had a quiet run to bend, still something to offer and improved on rails turning in, didn't dash and just kept on at same speed last 200 M.
Began only fairly, didn't have much toe and raced behind midfield 7Ls back in a two wide role, just behind eventual placegetters on bend, took time to balance up but got going to finish nicely late.
Even jump, soon in midfield 3 wide with cover when unable to slot in, 4 to 5Ls down on bend and forced 4 wide, struggling turning in and dropped right out in straight. (Irregular heart beat.)

Moderate to begin, restrained from an awkward draw to rear division, settled on fence 6Ls off frontrunners, kept to rails and saved ground on bend, kept improving after check at 400 M and closed off well last 200 M.

Restrained from a wide alley, took up a spot at the rear 10Ls from speed, lobbed along at rear to bend, trailed 4 wide on bend, came to middle and closed race off well doing best work late despite hanging.

Moderate getaway, didn't have much pace as usual and ended up in midfield 4 to 5Ls back, didn't use much and followed nicely between horses on bend, closed steadily and made up ground when clear last 200 M for nice 3rd.

Awkward to begin but urged along to take a post behind midfield, raced 2/3 wide with cover 6Ls away and inconvenienced at 800 M, shuffled back on bend, followed nicely and finished smartly when clear last 200 M.

Jumped nicely, took up prime position 1 out 1 back, enjoyed great trip throughout, tracked well between horses on bend, produced a strong sprint from 350 M and fought back hard when headed last 200 M to score well earned win.
Tardy to begin, positioned behind midfield 5Ls back, improved on bend to be 4Ls down saving ground on rails, in traffic for best part of straight, closed well when clear last 200 M.
Bounced out, showed good speed to take up front running, dictated terms in front 1L clear, still held an advantage on turning, there until 250 M but gave in when overhauled and weakened out late.

Began with more interest, settled nicely 3 to 4Ls back, 3 wide with cover, had an ideal trail on circle and stalked them on turning, let down quickly to take lead at 300 M but run ended at 150 M and lost advantage late.
Showed customary speed from outset to assume spot outside leader, had an easy time with standard speed in mid-section, right there on bend, kept on until 200 M but couldn't find dash last furlong.
Even break, slotted in nicely in midfield 5Ls away with a 3 wide trail, travelled well to bend, didn't produce expected finish when asked and run ended at 200 M. Rider advised "felt flat".
Out with first few, assumed a prominent role behind lead 2Ls away, had run of race to bend, held up for some distance after straightening, got clear past 600 M but didn't really make much impression.

Lacked gate speed as usual, ended up next to last 8Ls away, didn't use a lot in mid-section but not helped by tempo, still had field to beat on bend, made up some ground in straight without really threatening.

Average to begin as usual, soon in rearward division, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls off pace, had an easy run but not helped by pace, circled 4 wide on bend, switched out and finished hard to be nearest on line.
Even getaway, continued to improve to be up 3 wide 1L back without cover, always working hard to bend, 2Ls down on turning, hard run took toll and found little last 250 M and weakened out.
Slightly slow to begin. Ridden along to gradually recover to prominent position. In 4th some 2Ls back coming into home bend. Gained 3rd into straight but fought on under pressure without quickening.
Ridden to lead early and made all. Went over 1L clear into straight. Fought on under pressure to just hold on to the line.
Travelled mainly just worse than midfield. Fought on steadily without threatening in straight.
In rear to straight. Ran past well beaten horses late.
Travelled mainly in 5th on rails in mid-division. Kept on past tiring runner for 4th early in straight. Never threatening.
In similar position in midfield throughout. Fought on steadily at the one pace in straight.
Settled on rails just behind leader in 2nd or 3rd. Came to challenge when about 2Ls down upon straightening. Closed on tiring winner steadily but post came too soon.
Began fairly and ridden along from poor draw, settling outside leader around Rock. Yielded ground gradually from home bend and dropped out into straight.
Jumped well, settling in last few. Similar turning in. Tight between runners 200 M out. Made some late impression closing stages.
Tailed-off most of way only to run past well beaten horses closing stages.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran past well beaten horses under pressure inside final 200 M.
Raced wide from poor draw in prominent position early. Dropped to midfield approaching home bend. Lost further ground into straight.
Settled around midfield, 1 off with cover, shifted to the outside at the entrance to the straight, but struggled over the final 200 M. (Tendon injury reported following day.)
From an inside gate, was allowed to park behind the pace settling on the fence. Disappointing in the straight.
Raced midfield along the rails, one-paced when under pressure in the latter stages.
Settled behind midfield on the fence, came wider in the straight, closed off soundly.
Caught wide and without cover for most of the trip around midfield. Weakened noticeably in the run to the post.
Ridden along early from a wide alley to take up leading position near the 1000 M. Set easy tempo in front and lengthened away in the straight for comfortable win.
Settled in last position and failed to pass another runner throughout.
Checked soon after the start, but managed to settle on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. Peeled out on straightening and finished off well.
1 out 1 back early, shifted in, onto the force near the 600 M, tracking the leader, had every opportunity.
Caught 3-wide early, went forward and took up a position outside the leader near the 600 M. Kept on one-paced in the run home.
Took up rearward position on the fence, stayed to the inside turning for home. Ran on fairly.
Raced at the tail of the field on the rails, tired over the concluding stages.

Quickest out and was allowed to slide back to race behind the leaders. 2-wide and remained behind the pacesetters making home turn. In contention for the lead 200 M out but unable find an extra gear closing stages.
Raced 3-wide among leaders until home turn. Unable to keep up after 500 M and weakened closing stages.

Ridden out of the gates and kept within 2Ls of the pace early stages. Niggled along at 600 M and was right behind leader turning in. Quickened and opened up a clear lead at 100 M. Stayed on to hold off late charging rivals.

Lacked early speed. Raced along the fence behind midfield. 4Ls back and made a ground saving trip rounding the turn. Crowded when making its run through a narrow gap. Kept on well thereafter but fell just short in catching winner.

Off slowly and raced near the back. Made up ground after 800 M and was 2-wide behind midfield making the turn. Continued to improve but was blocked for a run at 250 M. Kept on well thereafter and was closest at finish.
Wide among leaders early stages. Kept within 2Ls of the pace back straight but was wide and without cover. Widest making home turn and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Caught wide at midfield early stages. 4-wide and behind midfield near the Rock but continued to slide back making the turn. Last on straightening and showed nothing in the straight.
3-wide behind leaders early stages. Steadied at 800 M and regressed to midfield. Hung out and reluctant to hold position making the turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Led or disputed lead until home straight. Still holding a narrow advantage final 200 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and then was checked to the rear. Trailed field until home turn and ran on fairly in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly. Led or disputed lead until home straight. Found no extra to keep pace final 200 M and weakened.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in a rearward spot until home straight. Only ran past tired runners.
Disputed early lead passing the post first time round, settled back 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls back in 4th and struggling to lie up entering homestretch, faded quickly.
Stoked along early to take box-seat spot 2Ls back in 3rd, held this position until home turn, didn't find any great turn of foot and collared for 3rd final 20 M.
Soon in rear, 10Ls last at the 1000 M, 8Ls back in 11th turning into homestretch, cut no ice whatsoever.
No early dash, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace at halfway, in 7th place turning for home, battled on dourly to sneak into a place inside final bounds.
2-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, 3-wide and under pressure turning for home, petered out.
Never going well, detached about 9Ls from pace in 11th at halfway, in deeper trouble at the 600 M and virtually pulled up into home straight. (Irregular heartbeat.)
Soon led on fence, no clearer than 1L in front until home turn, 2Ls to the good at 200 M before being grounded down close home.
At the back of main group about 6Ls off speed at halfway and not any closer straightening for home, plodded on at the one speed.
Left 3-wide no cover in midfield at 1300 M so pressed on to dispute the lead at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at the final turn but folded steadily to end up a moderate 6th.
Caught 5-wide without cover early on, 3-wide no cover 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, lost position from the 600 M and eased down from top of home straight. (Blood in trachea.)
3-wide with cover at 1200 M about 3Ls off pace, lost position on the circle for home and gone a long way from home, poor effort.
Unbalanced bumping rail in 3-back position, 4Ls back in mid-division at 1300 M, switched out to challenge turning for home, kept on despite awkward head carriage to lead final 30 M.
Switched from wide gate to fence, settled about 7Ls last until home straight, didn't trouble many of those in front.
Slowly away, raced 3 and 4-back on the fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Led early on fence, settled into box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, one-paced thereafter. (Bled.)
Caught without cover throughout, 3-wide at 1200 M, 2Ls off pace out deep at halfway, giving ground at home straight entrance and dropped out.
Keen early on, 2-wide and worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace until home turn, one-paced in the finish.
On fence 2Ls back in 3rd early on, 3-back on fence from 1000 M to home turn about 3Ls back in 5th, jockey lost whip 250 M out but still stayed on well to lead inside final 30 M.
Keen early on, raced 2-wide about 3Ls from the front in 4th or 5th until home turn, stayed on at same pace.
Didn't muster much early speed, raced 3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M when hard pressed to lie up, faded out from top of homestretch.
Slowly away, checked at 1400 M, on fence about 6Ls off pace in 10th at halfway, rather one-paced in homestretch. (Mildly lame following day.)
Led 1200 M out but didn't cross to fence until the 900 M, led by 1L until the 200 M, headed 100 M out but did enough to place.
Slowest away, 2-wide one from rear about 6Ls off the speed at 1200 M, same margin behind when widest (4-wide) entering homestretch, no impression.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, went 1L down in 2nd at home turn, led for a stride or two inside final 10 M before being grabbed late by winner.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, dashed well 250 M despite the slow pace and the top weight to finish 2nd.
Eased to the tail, 7-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, swept 2-wide at the Home Bend, dashed strongly 200 M despite the slow pace.
Midfield, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no dash in straight.
Slow away, 2-wide throughout at the back, not suited by the slow tempo, never competitive.
Eased back early, trapped 3-wide throughout and raced keenly, moved up 1200 M 3-1/2Ls off the slow pace, harmed by all negative racing situations, weakened 400 M.
Hard ridden throughout as usual, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3-wide and covered too much ground, dropped off quickly in straight.
Crossed the rails easily and settled in box seat, favoured by the slow pace and the rail-run, led 200 M and drifted away to win.
Pushed to get across in front, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow pace, but no turn of foot in straight, just kept on ok.
Slow away, pushed to keep up just worse than midfield, checked early, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, flattened 250 M.
Took the rail easily and led at slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M when overhauled, plugged on for 3rd.
Slow away, just worst than midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, just held ground in straight.
Eased back as usual, 6-1/2Ls off pace along the rails, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in final stages.
Did not jump well. Travelled at the back. Made moderate progress without threatening in straight.
Never better than midfield. Weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Tracked leader one back on rails in 3rd. Switched out to challenge upon straightening and hit front over 150 M out. Won well.
Soon in rear. Came under pressure upon straightening. Commencing to run on when inconvenienced 200 M out. Sustained headway to the line.
Travelled mainly in 5th just better than midfield. Gained 4th into straight but failed to quicken under pressure to challenge.
Settled in mid-division. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Raced mainly 2-wide behind midfield. Finished off race strongly down centre of straight.
Attempted to make all but worn down by winner over 150 M out.
Settled in 2nd one out one back. Folded up quickening after straightening.
Did not jump well. Travelled in last few to straight. Found nothing in straight.
Hard ridden outside in midfield after beginning from wide draw. Gradually settled in 4th or joint 4th in one out two back position. Kept on in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled well back. Went wide into straight. Produced good late impression down centre of track inside final 200 M.
Settled within 3Ls of pace mostly in 5th. Gained 4th home bend. Every chance closing stages.
Wide in midfield. Closer order far side. Weakened into straight.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails. Ran on well inside 200 M. Just got up.
Ridden to lead. Attempted to make all. Pipped at post.
Never better than midfield. One-paced under pressure.
Well back. Finished off well down centre of straight.
Wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Well back. Produced moderate late impression in straight.
Just worse than midfield. No room passing 200 M. Ran on well late.
Chased leader. Found nothing inside 200 M.
Raced one out one back. No extra inside 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Disputed early lead on fence at 1400 M, 2Ls back in third in box-seat at 800 M, hard ridden to keep in touch at 600 M, dropped right, very limited performance.
Never travelled well, had the box-seat position at 1200 M but driven along to lie up at the 800 M, completely lost position on the bend and faded out.
Failed to muster early speed, carried head awkwardly, left 3-wide no cover in mid-division from 900 M, struggling 5Ls off pace at final turn, faded out.
Keen disputing early tempo out 2-wide, on fence 3Ls back in 5th at halfway but struggling to keep up entering stretch, finished tamely on the inner.
Travelled well 2-wide around midfield about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, edged a little closer out 3-wide turning for home, kicked on to lead 100 M out, stayed on well.
Switched from wide gate to race 2-wide about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, wider about 6Ls off speed making home turn, stayed on okay late, never nearer.
Crowded at start losing ground, shared last out 2-wide about 9Ls off pace until 900 M, under pressure out 6-wide (widest of all) on straightening, kept on one-paced, nearest at finish.
Didn't break well and soon about 9Ls last on fence, 5-wide turning for home with 7Ls to make up, finished off fairly well out wide down centre of track, closest at the line.
2-wide in mid-division about 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, ridden forward 3-wide with cover on the circle, staying on fairly when over 2Ls back in 4th at 200 M, winner always about 1L too good.
Disputed early speed out wide, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, swamped by chasing pack about 200 M out.
With leaders but very wide without cover early, eventually crossed to lead by 2Ls on fence at 900 M, still with a 2Ls break at the 200 M but caught 100 M out and swamped for a place final 50 M.
On fence in rear group about 7Ls off pace, hard pressed to get any closer taking final turn, plugged on home making some minor late ground.
Raced better than midfield early on, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th on the circle, 3Ls down in 3rd turning for home, found nothing off the bridle.
5-back on the fence about 6Ls off pace early in 9th or so, 2-wide but not much closer turning for home, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M but stayed on well late for a place.
Ridden along from wide gate to cross and sit outside the leader. Grew tired inside the 200 M.
Raced 2 wide with cover, midfield, did little under pressure after the 300 M.
Raced near the rear of the field, made some ground in the straight without threatening.
For the major part of the race, travelled wide and without cover whilst in a midfield position.
Raced midfield the fence, stayed to the inside in the straight, picked up well to take the lead and draw a margin.
Positioned just off the pace, two deep with cover, stuck to task gamely over the concluding stages.
Settled about 2Ls back, 1 off with cover hung out making the turns, maintained a reasonable run to the wire.
Took up leading position after the 900 M and set quick pace. Faded passing the 200 M.
Led early before settling behind the speed on the fence after the 900 M, hit the lead passing the 400 M and fought on well.
In the early stages was reluctant to stride out and became detached in last position. Made up some ground in the straight.
Positioned 3 wide with cover, midfield, hard ridden soon after turning for home but didn't go on.
Travelled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Had some difficulty obtaining clear running over the latter stages and was not properly tested.
Behind midfield early and middle stages. Near the back on straightening and rallied home strongly.
Raced behind leaders early stages. 2-wide and 2 to 3Ls off the pace making the turn. Kept on well in the straight but unable to draw closer final stages.

Disputed lead early stages before settling a length off the leader in a 2-wide position. Regained lead shortly after straightening and opened up a clear advantage at 200 M. Stayed on well final stages to hold off late challengers.
Wide and without cover at midfield throughout. Lacked a response in the straight and weakened.
Settled in a rearward position. Had some trouble getting a clear path after 400 M. Staged a late rally and was closest at finish.
Dropped to the back and trailed field until home straight. Made up ground in the straight by running past tired runners.
Disputed lead early stages. Took sole possession of the lead after 1200 M and kept advantage into home straight. Headed 300 M out and was swamped final stages.
jumped awkwardly and raced on fence at midfield. Unable to quicken on straightening and weakened steadily final stages.
Botched the start but soon recovered. Improved along the rails to race behind the leader middle stages. Kept on fairly in the home straight but unable to draw closer final stages.
Hard to settle early stages. Raced 2-wide at midfield and ran on fairly in the straight.
Never better than midfield at any stage, 4Ls off pace out 2-wide at 800 M, hard pressed to keep up at home straight entrance, faded out.
Modest debut, always struggling to lie up, 6Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, 8Ls down in 11th and being eased passing the 200 M.
Mostly 3-wide but with cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, no chance with winner but stayed on well enough in the stretch and just missed 2nd.
Switched from wide gate to fence one from rear 7Ls off pace at 800 M, 5Ls down in 10th at the home turn, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
On fence vying for early lead, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 800 M to home turn, led briefly about 150 M out but soon headed and all out to just hang on for 2nd.
Knuckled at start, raced about 1L off a strong pace out 2-wide until home turn, all out to stay within 1L of the lead in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Fractious in gates and slowest away, recovered to race 3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls from the speed until home turn, lacked the kick to threaten leaders.
Always in rear and outpaced, 8Ls last early on, further back entering home straight, tame effort.
Messy start and soon last on fence, niggled along 5Ls down in 9th at 800 M, stayed on only fairly down centre of homestretch but never likely to place.
Soon setting the usual strong pace on fence, clear by over a length off final bend but headed at 150 M and petered out.
Always caught at least 3-wide no cover, pressed on to race 1L off pace in 3rd at 800 M, struggling to maintain prominent position at home turn, gave ground.
Nicely placed 2-wide in 5th about 3Ls off pace until home straight, pushed out into the clear at the 250 M and hit lead at 100 M, won with plenty in hand.
Checked at start, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in midfield at 800 M, closer turning for home, made some nice late ground to place but never very likely to figure in quinella.
Always in rear, 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, ridden along to get within 5Ls of the speed at final turn, didn't make any further inroads.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, 5Ls back in midfield at 800 M, still in midfield about 4Ls behind out 5-wide (widest of all) taking home turn, stayed on OK, had excuses.
Soon led on fence, 1L clear at 800 M, headed at top of homestretch and faded out steadily.
2-wide about 5Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, 3-wide about 3Ls down making home turn, improved to go 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well to hit lead inside final three strides.
Switched from wide gate to sit 2-wide and 8Ls off speed at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 13th turning for home, one-paced.
Didn't lead as is often the case, over-raced when 1L down in 2nd at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th and under pressure turning for home, battled on at the same pace.
6Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at 1000 M, 4-wide turning for home when 3Ls down in 7th, given every hope to at least place but didn't have the gears.
Mostly 2-wide, 2Ls off pace in 4th at halfway, driven along to improve taking final turn, very weak inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd at 1000 M, kept on to lead at top of home straight, headed again about 150 M out, tired late and missed a place.
Checked on fence at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 5th at halfway, marginally closer turning for home, picked up well to lead 150 M out, grabbed by winner inside final few strides.
Towards rear about 8Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover at 1000 M, over 4Ls down in 11th into homestretch, made only minor late ground despite strong riding.
10Ls last at halfway, detached in rear turning for home, very weak display.
Checked at start, 5-back on fence early about 7Ls off pace, 6Ls down in 13th off final turn, posed no danger whatsoever.

Slow away, hard ridden to keep up with the field along the fence, 7.5Ls behind the leader, swept closer 3 wide on straightening, dashed strongly 300 M despite the slow pace and finished a remarkable 2nd.
Blundered severely on jumping, never joined competition and finished tailed out.
Slowly away, pushed to keep up about midfield, 5Ls behind the leader on the rails, blocked and checked in straight and harmed by the slow pace, little dash when clear and made up some ground.
Hard ridden to get across in front, settled 2 wide outside the leader, helped by the slow tempo but soon weakened from 300 M.
Eased worse than midfield, 5.5Ls off pace racing 2-3 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 400 M, however run ended 150 M.
Eased to sit behind the pace group along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, blocked most straight and harmed by the slow pace, just ran on.
Eased to rear, 7.5Ls behind the leader, 2 wide early and swept 4 wide on straightening, harmed by the slow pace, kept dashing well to the line over final stages.
Eased to sit behind the leader 2 wide, raced keenly, favoured by the slow tempo, dashed well 250 M and drifted away to win, not fully tested.
Pushed to get across the rail and led by 0.5Ls at slow early sectionals, hung on until 300 M weakened.
Box seat in slowly run race, there on turn however blocked in straight and checked, lost ground steadily afterwards.
Eased midfield, 3.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, little dash when clear to finish 3rd.
Tried to ease and sit worse than midfield, however no cover and over-raced, moved up 700 M outside the pace group, ran on until 250 M flattened.
Settled just behind midfield. Ran on under pressure inside final 200 M to just get up on line.
Settled on rails in 6th in rear of midfield. Ran home steadily without quickening.
Settled in 3rd on rails behind leader. Found nothing in straight.
Travelled in midfield. Ran on in straight to hit front over 50 M out only to be pipped at post.
Always at the back and made no show.
Slightly slow out. Travelled in last few. Made steady headway inside final 300 M.
Always struggling at the back.
Tracked leader. Hit front under pressure briefly passing 200 M. Soon outsprinted.
Broke well and gradually crossed to rails to lead from high draw. Headed over 150 M out when no extra.
Settled 2-wide in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Tailed to quicken under pressure in straight and faded close home.
One from rear about 8Ls off speed early on, 5Ls back in 6th at 800 M, 4Ls back turning for home, soon outpaced.
Eased into 2nd place on fence with 1700 M to go, edged out 2-wide at 500 M, led at top of stretch, kicked over 1L clear at 200 M, always doing enough to hang on, suited by tempo.
On fence 5Ls back 4th at 1400 M when a little keen, 3Ls down in 5th turning for home, stayed on strongly to go 2nd at 150 M, kept on finding but post came too soon, unsuited by tempo.
Much closer than usual in 3rd on fence about 3Ls off pace until the 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, stayed on well and briefly held 2nd place, held by quinella pair final 150 M.
2-wide and mostly without cover about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed in 4th until the 1000 M, had every chance to place but lacked the finishing kick of principals.
10Ls last early on, 6Ls back one from rear at 800 M, 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, made some minor late ground without troubling principals.
Soon led on fence by 2Ls, set very steady pace, 1L clear at 800 M, headed at top of homestretch, well positioned to do enough for 4th.
Thoroughly outclassed, about 8Ls off pace in or towards rear until the 800 M, driven along to keep up at top of home straight, soon left behind and well beaten.
Always prominent. Dropped to 2-1/2Ls 5th approaching home bend. Similar turning in but then found nothing.
Raced in 2nd in one out one back position. Quickened to hit front inside 300 M only to be worn down over 100 M out.
Jumped fairly settling at the back. Made steady headway in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early. Dropped to forward of midfield approaching home bend. Lost further ground turning for home. One-paced.
Midfield until dropped out from approaching home straight.
Travelled mainly in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace. Shifted off rails for a run turning in but found nothing under pressure.
Soon took up running and led until overhauled inside final 300 M.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Soon picked up to midfield along rails and remained same to straight. Commenced run upon straightening and responded well to take charge over 100 M out.
Settled towards rear. Did not have too much room behind horses early in straight but kept on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M.
Travelled at the back. Gradually shifted off rails for a clear run early in straight. Ran on down centre of track to produce good late impression.
Raced wide in midfield early. Dropped towards rear coming out of back straight. Just kept on at the one pace in the run home. (Mucus in trachea.)
Began well from wide draw. Raced wide prominently until fading gradually after straightening.
Always in last few. Making moderate headway in the rear when hampered 200 M out.
Raced wide and mainly in midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Crossed from middle gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 900 M, 1L clear from 600 M to the 200 M, driven out well and always looked the winner.
Steadied twice on fence before being checked at 800 M to 4Ls back in midfield, same into final turn, stayed around there.
Always struggling without cover, 4-deep about 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, under pressure in rear 600 M out to stay in touch, faded out from top of homestretch.
Slowest away and switched from wide gate to fence, in rear bunch about 7Ls off pace at halfway, hardly any closer turning in, cut no ice in the finish.
Disputed early speed, settled into box-seat position on fence about 2Ls off pace from 800 M to home straight entrance, finished off at the same pace.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at halfway, in 5th same margin from the lead on straightening, stuck on well fairly in the finish and only just missed a place.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace down the back, headway on the circle to be 3-wide and 4Ls back in 9th or so entering straight, failed to find much more.
In rear about 8Ls off the pace until the 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) taking final bend over 6Ls down, made only minor late ground.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls back in 6th until the 800 M, left 3-deep no cover on the circle, every chance when 1L down in 2nd at 300 M, couldn't follow through, lost 2nd 50 M out and just held 3rd.
Caught 3-wide no cover down backstretch, sent on to race 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, under pressure to keep in touch off final bend, swamped 200 M out.
With cover towards rear at least 5Ls behind the pace from 1000 M to final turn, always easily outpaced.
With cover in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until the home straight when briefly held up, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, kept on for 2nd final final 50 M but never likely to catch winner.
3-wide with cover in 8th or so about 6Ls from the front at 1000 M, improved to within 3Ls of the lead at final bend, one-paced thereafter.
4-back on fence at 800 M when checked 6Ls from the speed in 10th or so, similarly placed turning for home, stayed there.
Raced wide in midfield to halfway then gradually weakened.
Jumped into last few, dropping to tail-end at 1000 M bend. Commenced move coming out of back straight. Making moderate headway in straight when baulked for a run 200 M out.
In last few. Baulked for a run inside 200 M. One-paced in the run home.
With leaders early after beginning from the one draw. Gradually dropped back to just better than midfield approaching Rock. Folded up quickly coming out of back straight.
Slowly away. Gradually improved through field to 5th within 3Ls of pace. Gained 4th going up Rock and 3rd into straight, eventually holding every chance inside 200 M. Overhauled 150 M.
Settled mainly 3-wide behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to claim 2nd in the bobbing of heads.
Settled on rails in midfield. 5th into straight and did not find much room early. Steadied passing 200 M before making good late impression close to home.
Led or disputed lead. Came under pressure to hold place inside 200 M but soon weakened.
Jumped fairly but sluggish. Remained in last few before commenced run rounding home bend. Quickened from some 3Ls 6th into straight to take charge about 150 M out.
Broke well, niggled along for speed when wide. Gradually taken back to midfield before Rock. Came to challenge upon straightening and fought on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters.
With leaders. Gained narrow lead briefly going up Rock. Disputed lead into straight but folded up quickly inside final 200 M.
Showed speed and was amongst leaders and wide early. Settled one back 3-wide around Rock. Dropped out under pressure from a prominent position into straight.
Raced outside the leader but turning for home was out sprinted. Responded well under pressure approaching the 200 M and hit the line well to grab dead heat.
Slow to begin and took up a rearward position, made some late ground in the run home.
Positioned back in the field but was caught wide and without cover.
Raced 1 off, midfield with cover, finished the race off well.
Began quickly and crossed to the fence. Kicked away early in the straight but caught right on the line.
Raced behind midfield, kept on only one-paced over the concluding stages.
1 out 1 back, came wider turning into the straight and closed off strongly. Went down in a 3 way go.
Settled in last position, never looked likely.
Settled near the tail off the field, wide and without cover, hung out badly making the turn at the 600 M, never a factor.
Ridden along early and hampered while racing keenly near the 800 M. Settled behind the leader but faded inside the 200 M.
Settled near last, checked on straightening and worked to the line without threatening.
Settled 3Ls back on the fence, worked home soundly.
Pushed along to be in a forward position. Settled 2-wide behind the leaders back straight. Stayed on well in the home straight but unable to match strides with top pair final stages.
4-wide in a forward position early stages. 2-wide disputed lead from 1200 M until straightening. Remained in contention for the lead inside final 200 M but found no extra and faded final stages.
Dropped to the rear from widest draw. Trailed field into home straight. Made up some late ground by running past beaten runners.
Raced in a prominent spot behind the pace until home straight. Kept on fairly and had the lead briefly inside final 200 M. Unable to find more to keep up with principals final stages.
Settled 2-wide in rear section. Made up ground in a 3-wide spot making home turn. Continued to rally in the home straight and narrowly came up short in catching winner.
On the rails and never worse than midfield. Quickened after straightening and charged through a tight gap near 200 M to take the lead. Kept on well near the line to deny challengers.
Led or disputed lead until home straight. Weakened and dropped out final 200 M.
3-wide with cover at midfield early stages. Lost its cover after 1000 M and remained at midfield in back straight. Ran on only at same pace in the straight.
Jumped well and raced in a forward position early. Crowded after 1400 M and then settled 2-wide at midfield. Lacked a kick on straightening and remained on same pace to the line.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Commenced to lose ground making home turn. Towards the rear on straightening and found nothing in the straight.
Taken back from a wide draw and tailed field in early stages. Remained in rear section and was 4-wide turning for home. Rallied and was closest at finish.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, on fence about 1L down in 2nd at final turn with every chance, failed to quicken up and well held final 100 M.
Raced 3 and 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace around mid-division through first half, slightly closer off home turn, stayed on at same pace.
Crowded start, 4Ls off pace in midfield 3-wide with cover early, left without cover from 900 M to home turn when over 2Ls back in 3rd, led 200 M out but headed 100 M later when one-paced.
Nicely placed 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1300 M, similar position taking final bend, kept on well to lead 100 M out, comfortably.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, struggling 3-wide and same margin behind on straightening for the line, no great impression.
Nicely placed 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, on fence and similar margin back in 5th taking home turn, weakened over 200 M out.
Awkwardly away losing ground, 6Ls last at 1300 M, soon struggling about 10Ls last down the back, poor effort.
Led by 1L on fence from 1300 M until home turn, headed 200 M out and faded rapidly.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 1200 M and sent on to dispute speed at 1000 M out 2-wide, ridden along to stay within 1L of pace turning for home, dropped away.
Near rear about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 9th at home turn, 4Ls back in midfield at 200 M but made no extra ground.
Raced 4 and 5 positions back on fence, 6Ls off pace at halfway but about 4Ls back in midfield turning for home, stayed on fairly well for 2nd but lacked winner's dash.
Two from rear about 8Ls off speed early, driven along to get a little nearer taking home turn, never troubled principals.
Held a lead of no more than 1L until home turn, headed about 150 M out and lost out on a place in final stride.
Caught 3-wide no cover early, 2-wide no worse than 1L off pace in 2nd until home turn, one-paced inside final 200 M to miss out on a place.
Always in rear, 8Ls last until the 600 M on fence, never passed a horse.
About 8Ls last out 2-wide until home turn when switched out to challenge, made some minor late ground.
2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 4th through to home straight, faded out steadily.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace until home turn, stayed on fairly without seriously threatening a place, never nearer.
Unbalanced at 900 M when 2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th, 3-wide off home turn in same position, picked up well to lead 50 M out, did enough.
Slowly away, three from rear about 6Ls from the speed until home turn, no impression.
3-back the fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, over 2Ls off speed in 5th at the 200 M, no extra. (Lame following day.)
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace until home turn, 1L down at 300 M and led 150 M out, headed about 100 M later, held on for 2nd.
Checked at 800 M on fence when 6Ls behind lead in 9th or so, same margin back into home turn, made no great improvement.
Slowly away, soon about 6Ls off pace in 8th, crowded at 600 M but 5Ls off pace turning for home, stayed on strongly late to take 3rd on the line.
Awkwardly away, soon moved forward to pressure outside leader, 2-wide throughout, harmed by the fast early sectionals, weakened 250 M.
Eased back, 4-1/2Ls off pace 2-wide, swept towards 3-wide at home bend, on heels 400 M, benefited by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 200 M to finish 3rd.
Eased back, 7Ls behind the leaders, 2-wide early and gained the rail at home bend, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M in between runners to win readily.
Hard ridden to lead by 0-1/2Ls along the rails under pressure, burnt out by the fast early sectionals and dropped off 350 M.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily in straight.
Settled midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 300 M and briefly took 2nd place until 100 M flattened, beaten in 4th.
3Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3-wide throughout in midfield covered too much ground at bends, flattened 500 M.
Awkwardly away, pushed forward to hold the rail spot about midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast tempo, however just held ground in straight, run ended 150 M.
Pushed to secure the box seat 2Ls off the fast pace, travelled nicely throughout, led 250 M, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, beaten less than a length in 2nd.
Awkward away, pushed forward to get across 2-wide, then eased to sit 2Ls off the fast pace, lost ground 600 M, shifted towards 3 to 4-wide at home bend, ran on fairly in final stages.
Hard ridden to try to get across in front, however trapped 3-wide throughout 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the fast tempo, weakened 400 M.
Eased at start to get across the rail behind the field, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders, raced keenly but helped by the fast pace and the rail-run, however no progress in final stages.
Led field to 150 M. Weakened under pressure.
Travelled in last few. Making good progress along rails before badly baulked inside final 200 M. Not fully tested.
Settled on rails in midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but did not find too much room until late inside final 50 M.
Settled behind midfield. Found nothing after straightening and gradually weakened.
Broke well and settled one out one back in 2nd. Fought on to hold every chance passing 200 M but swamped about 100 M out.

Very slow out. Remained in rear early. Took closer order turning into back straight. Just worse then midfield rounding home bend and into straight. Improved well early but badly baulked throughout final 200 M. Not fully tested.
Travelled mainly 2-wide in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Trailed field most of way to straight. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Travelled one out two back in 4th. Responded well inside final 200 M to assert authority late.
Midfield early but soon dropped back to travel in last few. Failed to quicken under pressure.
Travelled mainly one back on rails in 3rd. Quickened inside 200 M to draw level only to be pipped at post.

First to hit ground, led them easily but had pressure applied from 1200 M, retained rails holding outside horse by 1L to Rock, drove through on circle and regained lead turning, kicked strongly in straight to deny rivals.
Standard jump, raced worse than midfield 6 to 7Ls back on rails, saved ground on circle, under pressure on turning, lacked dash in straight and just plugged away at the same speed to line.

Amongst first to break, pressed on in search of lead and applied pressure to leader, didn't fully cross and raced 3 or 4Ls clear on outside, still there on bend, kept to task in straight but run ended at 200 M after early work.

Away only fairly, pressed on wide out to cross in behind speed on rails, raced behind leaders 1-2Ls back, had an easy time throughout, tried to angle out but kept in on turning, only clear last 100 M and closed nicely when clear.

Began nicely, moved forward again racing 3Ls back on rails, had run of race throughout taking 1 out 1 back spot at mid-point, advantaged by easy pace and switched out 3-wide turning in, one-paced but kept on well for a place.

Well enough to begin, trapped 3-wide without cover in midfield. Always working 3 to 4Ls back, urged along on bend, couldn't find extra in straight and weakened out from 200 M when workload took effect.

Average jump, didn't have much early pace, settled in rear division 2-wide 6Ls off them, dashed around them from 600 M, 3Ls down 4-wide on turning, threatened at 150 M but just couldn't catch them last 100 M. Solid to make frame.

Average getaway, took up a spot at rear 8Ls off front runners, lobbed along at rear throughout, still towards rear making 4-wide run on bend, switched widest in straight and made some late ground without really threatening.

Awkwardly into stride, made a recovery to race on rails 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, had a quiet time and spent nothing to bend, kept to inside but had no run to the 100 M, only clear when race was over.

Even jump, took up a midfield position leaving straight, raced 2-wide 5 to 6Ls back, not asked in mid-section, under pressure when they sprinted on bend, came again in straight and did best work late to be nearest on line.

Slowly away, immediately at tail, raced at rear on rails 7 to 8Ls off speed, had a quiet time throughout, made a 3-wide run on bend, well back 4-wide turning in, closed evenly but gave away too great a start.

Away with line, positioned nicely 3 to 4Ls back in a 2-wide role, steadied at mid-point and lost position passing Rock. Improved in narrow gap in straight and raced tight last 200 M. Didn't dash but produced an even finish.
Never far off. Shaken up coming onto course proper. Hit the front briefly over 150 M out but found winner too good near the post.
Jumped fairly. Held up behind leaders within 2Ls of pace early stages. Gradually faded inside final 400 M.
Not far off early. Came under pressure over 400 M out. Found nothing.
Slightly slow out. Travelled just behind a line of four in small bunched field. Unable to quicken and only kept on at the one pace inside final 400 M.
Broke well and led field onto course proper when narrowly headed. Renewed effort inside final 200 M and asserted final few strides. Won well.
Close up. Hit front coming onto course proper. Narrowly headed inside 200 M. Fought on well but unable to peg back first two.
Positioned behind midfield but covered ground when racing without cover for most of the trip. Never likely.
Settled just off midfield, 3 wide with cover, had to be checked near the 250 M while making some ground.
Parked outside the leader, let down after the 400 M and lengthened nicely to open a winning break.
Began awkwardly, then despite being ridden along failed to muster speed and settled behind midfield, the fence. Remained on the inside in the straight and kept on the same pace.
Led but tired after the 200 M.
Raced about 3Ls back, but had caught wide and without cover throughout. Battled away in the run home.
Raced midfield the fence, stayed to the inside and closed off soundly.
Began awkwardly, then despite being ridden along early tailed out for the remainder of the race.
Settled in 2nd last position, checked near the 450 M, never a factor.
Settled near the tail of the field, 1 off with cover, never likely.
Settled back in the field, two wide with cover, swung wide turning for home and ran on well.
Camped behind the leader on the fence, had every chance.
Positioned midfield, 1 off with cover, weakened after the 200 M.
Overraced while 1 off handy to the leaders. Faded quickly inside the 100 M.
Jumped only fairly and was pushed along to be racing outside the leader. Disputed lead making home turn and remained in front until weakening final 200 M.
Outpaced and raced towards the rear. Kept on fairly along the rails and made up ground in the straight.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the leader. Kept on fairly after straightening. Unable to match pace with top pair and finished with a distant 3rd.
Jumped well but gradually slipped back to be racing behind midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Ran on steadily in the straight to make the frame.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Disputed lead making the home turn and remained in front before fading final 250 M.
Dropped back from a wide draw. Trailed field turning for home and made up late ground in the straight.
Settled at midfield. Waited before being pressured 300 M out. Made a strong closing run and nailed rival at the line.
Stumbled out of the gates and was ridden along. Travelled wide and without cover at midfield. Hung out badly making the turn and rider's saddle shifted. Found nothing in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Ran on without quickening in the home straight.
Showed good early speed. Took a sit behind the leaders in a 2-wide position near 800 M. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and faded final 200 M.
Off slowly. Settled on fence at midfield. Responded well when asked on straightening before running into heavy traffic over the final 200 M.
Lost ground on jumping and raced in a rearward position. Never picked up in the straight.

Among leaders early. Eased back to be racing in front of midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the leader making home turn. Quickened 300 M out and opened up a clear advantage 200 M. Stayed on well but was caught on the line.
Never travelled well, worse than midfield and niggled along over 5Ls behind in backstretch, hard ridden to take closer order at home turn, never likely to get on terms with leaders.
Very awkward break losing ground, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, about 6Ls down in rear entering home straight, without much room at 200 M, made some fair late ground along inner, never nearer.
Always prominent in 3rd place until home straight, about 3Ls down at 800 M but 2Ls down at home bend, had every chance to place but failed to quicken up.
Restrained 10Ls last 1000 M out, keen on the circle and checked at 600 M, 6Ls back in 13th taking home turn, posed no danger.
Led out 2-wide by 1L at 1200 M, headed at 1000 M and settled 2Ls in 2nd before leading again over 300 M out, headed once more about 150 M, one-paced late but still hung on for a place.
Mostly in 10th position with cover between 7Ls and 5Ls off pace until the 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, always well held.
Niggled along in 11th down the backstretch no closer than 7Ls from the front, under pressure about 5Ls down taking home turn, plugged on without troubling principals.
Well placed in 4th or 5th out 2-wide with cover about 4Ls off pace at 800 M, edged closer on straightening and moved 1L down in 2nd with every hope at 200 M, tepid sort of finish.
Midfield about 5Ls from the speed before being left 3-wide no cover at halfway, closer but 4-wide taking final turn, over 1L back and vying for a place at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
3-back on fence in midfield 5Ls off the front at 1000 M, 4Ls down when steadied at home straight entrance, hung a little but led briefly 150 M out, soon headed but did enough for 2nd.
On fence but worse than midfield about 6Ls behind at halfway, still well behind making home turn before bursting through the pack to lead at the 100 M, kept on well.
Caught 4-wide no cover early so pressed to lead by 2Ls on fence at the 800 M, headed over 300 M out and petered out rapidly.
1L back in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, raced 4th or 5th between 2Ls and 4Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight (over-raced on the circle), one-paced when acceleration required.
Poor effort and always rear or one from rear, about 9Ls behind at 1000 M but 7Ls back off final bend, stayed there.
Bumped at start, covered up around midfield about 5Ls off pace early on, headway to be 2Ls down off home turn, 1L down in 3rd and every chance at 200 M, no extra and lost a place final bounds.
Had excuses for not placing, 8Ls behind in 12th at 1000 M, moved a little closer taking home turn, without clear passage at 300 M and 200 M, stayed on well out wide once clear, nearest at finish.
Disputed early pace on fence, eased back to box-seat position on fence from 1000 M to home turn, came off the bridle entering home straight and found zero.
Big effort despite a very tough trip, 4-wide no cover 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, pressed on out wide to be a neck 3rd on straightening, dug in gamely and only held final strides.
Keen early on when worse than midfield and about 6Ls off the pace, 4Ls down in midfield at final turn, had his chance to figure but lacked any run on.
Disputing early speed out 2-wide, settled into 'one out one back position' from 1000 M to home turn, given every possible hope to place but lacked the ability.
Nicely placed on fence about 3Ls off speed in midfield through to straightening for the judge, failed to quicken up sufficiently, no excuses.
Slowly away, with cover about 4Ls back in mid-pack until home turn, stayed on fairly well to snare 3rd in final metres.
Prominent early, briefly left 3-wide no cover at 900 M, sent on 1L off pace in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, led 300 M out, always holding a slight advantage, asserted close home.
Never travelling well, bumped at start, niggled along when 5Ls back in 9th out 2-wide at 1000 M, under strong pressure out 4-wide (widest of all) when over 4Ls back towards rear, laboured.
Slow break, 4-back on fence at 1000 M about 5Ls off pace in 10th until home turn, checked 250 M out, switched inside 150 M out and ran on okay late, nearest at finish.
10Ls last at halfway, about 8Ls last turning for home, never really got going.
Awkward break, 3-wide no cover disputing early tempo, led by 1L on fence at 900 M, headed about 300 M out and soon swamped.
Very weak effort, always in rear about 8Ls back at halfway and marginally closer taking home turn, well beaten over 200 M out.
Failed to keep up with the fast pace, 2 wide throughout, never competitive. (See Racing Incidents.)
Very slowly away, hard ridden to gain a midfield spot 2 wide, checked 1st bend, 4Ls off the fast pace, raced keenly, swept 3 wide at home bends, dropped off 250 M.
Hard ridden to get across the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, broken down shortly after straightening.
Very slow away, trapped 3 wide throughout at the back, 8Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast tempo but lost too much ground on the circle, just held ground in straight.

Eased early but failed to get cover about midfield, then soon moved up to get across and sit 1Ls behind the leader 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, led 350 M and kicked away, hung on until 100 M overhauled, kept on for 2nd.
Hard ridden to get across in front of the main bunch, 2.5Ls off the fast pace 2 wide, progressed steadily last 200 M to win.
Jumped well however eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 5Ls behind the leader, raced keenly, favoured by the fast tempo but kept on very one-paced in straight, just ran on fairly.
Hard ridden to keep up a spot just worse than midfield, 6Ls off the leader 3 wide, covered much ground at the bends but helped by the fast pace, just held ground in straight, on heels 300 M.
Pushed to get across and occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, checked severely 350 M, still ran on well to the line to finish 3rd.
Awkward away, pushed forward to secure a midfield position, 4Ls behind the leader 2 wide, benefitted by the fast pace, checked 350 M, no turn of foot afterwards and run ended 200 M.
Trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout about midfield, 6Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace but covered too much ground at the bends, ran on OK in final stages.
Eased back, tailed out, never competitive.
Eased at start to get across the rail behind the field, 8.5Ls off the leader, helped by the fast tempo, however never progressed at any stages, checked 300 M.
Broke well and travelled in close-up position. Made steady headway 3-wide outside leader rounding home bend. Nearly drew level turning in but soon folded up quickly.
Never far off. Gradually improved around home bend to share pace into straight. Unable to quicken and faded steadily inside final 200 M.
Travelled in 5th in better than midfield position. Closer up when only a length down turning in. Came to challenge under pressure but could only keep on at the one pace.
Never seen with a chance travelling in last few throughout.
Travelled mainly one off the rails just behind midfield. Did not find too much clear running early in straight before running on steadily without threatening.
Travelled mainly 3 wide towards the rear. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Quickened well to take charge over 150 M out gaining a 1L break before eroded by runner-up's late vain challenge.
Midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Jumped well from poor draw. Gradually taken back to travel in rear of field. Slightly hampered by winner turning in and loomed up inside final 300 M down centre of track to only miss by a neck.
Settled at the back. Ran on quite well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up when wide early. Took up running 1000 M out. Joined into straight but fought on well to retain advantage, however, unable to sustain effort about 150 M out.
Raced wide in midfield. Gained closer turning in. Soon dropped out tamely.
Travelled 3-wide in mid-division. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
