Driven to lead early. Soon headed and settled one back on rails passing 1000 M. Similar when joint 3rd in box-seat turning in. Gradually faded inside final 200 M.

Evenly away, slotted into midfield role 2 wide 4Ls off speed, had nice trail behind eventual winner or circle, came 3 wide on turning and threatened at 250 M, fought hard but no match for winner late.
Standard break, ridden up to take closer order behind speed on rails, had run of race 3Ls back trailing first two, pushed along on turning, lacked an extra gear but kept finding to make frame.

Out with rest, caught out and forced to race 3 wide with cover 5 to 6Ls back, had a trail but covered ground on bend, came to middle and steadily made ground in straight doing best work late to be nearest on line.

Began nicely, ridden along to challenge for front, always pressing inside horse and held a 1/2L lead throughout, kept a reasonable speed on to bend, still there at 300 M but just couldn't go with first two last furlong.

Reasonable break, soon drove through to challenge for lead, retained inside and shared lead, kept a solid speed on and was shaded but the outside horse to turn into straight, there to 200 M but weakened out late.

Away with rest, held a position behind midfield 2 wide before slotting to rails 5Ls back, had an easy enough time to bend, made only moderate headway when switched out in straight. Battled on surface.
Average jumpout, lacked early speed, raced in rearward division 2 wide 8Ls off front runners, pushed along and made some ground on turn, struggled in straight and made little impact.
Jumped with them but couldn't find early toe, back with last few on rails 8Ls away, not really travelling throughout, gave a big start on the bend and failed to run on over concluding stages.
Not a sparkling jumpout, did press on but posted 3 to 4 wide throughout without cover, always working 4Ls back on bend, found little when asked in straight just finishing at same speed to line.
Well enough to begin, held spot on rails around midfield 4 to 5Ls back, checked at 700 M and lost ground, under pressure on bend, gave a start but got going again to make some late ground.
Moderate break and failed to muster early, sat last 9 to 10Ls from frontrunners, always uncomfortable and battling at rear, still last turning, made no impact.

Fastest into stride, didn't have pace to match first few, camped off even speed 2 wide 2 to 3Ls back, stalked leaders on bend, made challenge at 300 M, hit lead passing 200 M and kept holding with something extra.
Soon took up running and led to about 900 M when narrowly headed. Still well there turning in and fought on until overhauled inside final 200 M. (Lame next day.)
Ridden for pace early. Had to travel 3-wide around stables bend. Moved closer to dispute lead turning into back straight and hitting front coming out. Unable to sustain effort and swamped 200 M out.
Travelled in last few. Did not find clear running around 200 M. Fought on under pressure to the line.
Began awkwardly losing many lengths. Raced wide in last few far side. Dropped back to tail-end turning for home.
Never far off. Quickened in straight to hit front just inside 200 M only to be collared close to home.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Shaken up upon straightening and ran on steadily under strong pressure but out-sprinted close to home. (Lame next day.)
Travelled in rear of midfield. 3rd last turning in. Came to challenge over 200 M out. Ran on gamely to just get up on line.
Never far off in 5th always within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in but fought hard under pressure to make up some late ground.
Prominent to 450 M then dropped out tamely.
Settled at the back to straight. Made up good ground inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Just ran home at the same pace without quickening.

Began fairly, outpaced and taken back from a wide alley to race on the rails 6Ls away, had a quiet time to bend, still well back turning in, made good ground late to be closest at finish. Unsuitable trip.

Jumped nicely, restrained to find cover in midfield, raced 3 wide 3 to 4Ls back with a nice trail to bend, travelled nicely turning in, made a strong sprint from 350 M to hit lead at 200 M, went on to account for them easily.
Standard beginning, in midfield but went on 4 and 5 wide to take closer order, 2 to 3Ls back widest without cover on bend, had run took toll and lost touch from 300 M.
Bounced out best and rolled on to lead, dictated 1L clear at an even tempo, still held advantage on turning, fought to 200 M but lacked the extra gear to go with the first two. Solid.
Began well, took a sit behind the speed, settled 3 back on fence, had a cosy run to turn and eased 2 wide turning, found little when asked and weakened out of it late.

Standard break, restrained from wide alley to race at tail, lobbed along at rear throughout 8 to 9Ls back, still at back on turning, switched out and closed off fairly passing some tired runners late.
Bounced evenly. Showed dash to be up outside the leader soon after, raced at leaders girth to bend, had chance to challenge with moderate tempo but found little when pressed and struggled last 200 M.

Jumped OK, slotted into coveted 1 out 1 back spot, didn't settle and came 3 wide to avoid pocket on bend, 1 to 2Ls down on turning, had chance but failed to finish off last 200 M and weakened late when run ended.
Out with line, soon settled in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls back between horses, back in traffic to bend, not much of a clear run until 200 M and made some ground when clear though never really likely.
Jumped well, up challenging for front. Took a trail and had run of race on leaders back, close enough on bend, in traffic to 300 M, made some ground when clear but lacked extra gear late.

Began in line, unable to show early toe, raced midfield 4 to 5Ls back on rails, had a quiet run to bend, stuck to rails and made good ground before stopped at 200 M, clear last 100 M and sprinted hard to nearly make 3rd.
Average jump, settled 3 wide behind midfield, tracked 4 wide with cover on circle 5 to 6Ls back, under pressure on turning, found little when asked and only plodded away in straight.
Moderate getaway, behind midfield but pressed on 3 wide without cover with average speed, always working 4 wide to bend, flat out at 300 M and dropped out when condition gave out at 200 M.

Slowly away, mustered speed to keep touch behind midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 5 to 6Ls back, tracked eventual winner on bend, into clear in straight and kept coming making good ground but easily held by winner.

Bumped on jumping, lacked dash as usual, raced 3 wide 6Ls back with trail, improved 4 wide on circle, 4Ls down on turning, briefly threatened at 300 M but set too great a task and unable to finish off when they dashed home.

Fastest out, assumed expected role in front, set a leisurely tempo, held a narrow break on bend, turned it into a sprint home turning in and kept giving to be right there until 100 M when overhauled late.
Standard jump, held a midfield position on rails 4Ls back, had easy time on bend and saved ground on turning in, in traffic but showed little when clear last 200 M.

Reasonable getaway, took a position 1 out 1 back 2 to 3Ls off leader, suited by speed and had an easy time to bend, tracked well into straight, cut back to inside and charged late to go down narrowly.
No dash from gates, shared rear 7Ls back on rails, not suited by average pace, still well back on bend, kept to inside and came between horses last 200 M, did best work late to be nearest on line.

Away fairly, slotted into a 2 wide role behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back, unsuited by tempo, tracked well coming 3 wide on bend, into clear at 350 M and wound up strongly charging hard to clinch victory late.
Began nicely, held position at leaders girth, advantaged by moderate pace, 1L away on bend, challenged and took over at 350 M, kicked hard and just lost out last 50 M in 3 way go.

Average break as usual, settled towards rear on rails, raced 6Ls from them and unsuited by slow tempo, came two wide on bend, switched out in straight, into clear last 200 M and finished hard to make frame.

Reasonably away, kept on and assumed spot 3 wide 2 to 3Ls off leaders, did work without cover but helped by average tempo, right there 1L down turning but run ended at 200 M and just held ground to line.
Bumped on jumping, soon regathered to take a prime spot behind leader, had run of race to bend, lacked a fight when they sprinted and dropped right out late. Disappointing.
Lacked speed from outset, settled towards tail racing 2 wide 7Ls back, not helped by slow speed, still last on bend, made up plenty of ground last 300 M to be closest on line. Lost no admirers.
Average break, posted wide and elected to hold a midfield spot with slow speed, covered ground throughout coming 4 wide on bend, still there to 200 M but weakened tamely. Faded out thereafter.
Mostly in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced. (Mucus in trachea.)
Broke well. Soon settled 3-wide in rear of midfield. Remained similar turning in. Weakened under pressure.
Jumped fairly, settling at the back after beginning from wide draw. Remained in rear until making good late impression inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly. Held rails run just behind leader in 3rd. Soon obtained split after straightening and quickened well to take charge inside 200 M. Readily.
Began well, settling mainly in 4th or 5th within 2Ls of pace. Came to challenge upon straightening but could only keep on without quickening.
Lost a few lengths shortly after start. Trailed the field to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M down centre of straight.
Never better than rear of midfield. Found nothing under pressure.
Soon took up running and held narrow lead until headed just inside 200 M. Just hung on for 2nd.
Did not jump well but soon moved up to race outside leader. Gradually shifted back to one off the lead coming off Rock. Remained same into straight but could only plug on for 3rd.
Raced wide in forward position always within 2Ls of pace to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Raced prominently, struggled after being caught 3-wide without cover. Dropped out in straight.
Took up front running duties, headed after the 200 M, stuck to task well.
Quickly into stride and parked on the back of the leader along the fence. Shifted into clear running early in the straight, quickened up smartly to draw a good margin.
Settled behind midfield, 1 off with cover, never likely.
Raced outside the leader, 1 off, commenced to give ground turning for home.
Tailed the field for most of the trip and failed to accelerate in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Sat midfield, 3-wide with cover, made satisfactory ground over the concluding stages.
Taken back early and settled on the fence in a rearward position. Stayed to the inside in the straight.
Raced midfield on the fence, finished off reasonably. (Lame.)
Raced 1 out 1 back, kept on soundly in the straight.
Raced just behind midfield, 3-wide with cover, made respectable ground in the run home. (Lame left front leg.)
Settled 1 off with cover midfield, ran into traffic problems in the straight whilst closing off strongly.
Raced 2-wide and no worse than midfield. Hampered in early part of the straight and ran on fairly over the closing stages.

Pushed along early stages and raced 2-wide in a prominent position. Kept within 3Ls of the pace back straight. Closed to within a length of leader turning for home but unable to find extra and faded final stages.
Lacked early speed. Settled on fence at midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight but unable to gain much ground.
Behind midfield early stages. Made steady progress in a 3-wide position in back straight and closed to within 2Ls of the leader into home turn. 4-wide turning for home and kept on fairly thereafter.
Better than midfield. Kept within 4Ls of the pace in back straight and reached within 2Ls on straightening. Continued well in the straight but came up a nose short at the line.
Tracked leader until home straight. Switched out on straightening and ran down the early leader final 100 M. Kept on gamely to deny challenger at the line.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off fairly.
Took the lead near 1200 M. Held a length's advantage on straightening but saw its lead diminishing in the straight. Stayed on fairly for a minor placing.
Missed the jump and raced in a rearward position. Lacked a response when asked making home turn and trailed field into home straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Lacked early pace. On fence behind midfield early but slid to rear section middle stages. Near last turning for home and ran on only fairly in the straight.
Dropped to the rear and trailed field. Towards the tail and wide turning for home. Ran on without gaining much ground in the straight.
Taken back at the start and settled 2-wide in rear section. Improved in a 3-wide position after 700 M and was at midfield making home turn. Only kept on same pace in the straight.
Had excuses, 3-wide with cover in rear about 4Ls off pace in 9th until halfway when virtually wiped out by TREASURE PLANET, 4-wide off final turn towards rear, no impression.
Terrible display, hanging out 2-wide when 4Ls back in 8th or so before veering out sharply at 600 M taking out DR POSSI, eased out before home turn, unacceptable performance.
Caught without cover throughout, 4-wide when 3Ls back in mid-division at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 6th turning for home, kept on commendably in home straight despite tough passage.
3-wide with cover in rear about 7Ls back early on, 5Ls down and one from rear off final turn, posed no danger.
Best away, led by 1L on fence early, a neck to the good on straightening, soon headed and one-paced missing a place.
7Ls off pace on fence in rear early on, crept 4Ls back in 9th turning for home, picking up but still with 3Ls to make up at 200 M, nice turn of foot to lead close home, classy.
Awkward start but adopted box-seat run on fence 2Ls back in 4th until home turn, unable to quicken up sufficiently, tight for room close home and missed a place.
Slow to begin, 3-back the fence around midfield and 4Ls off pace through to final turn, stayed on fairly without looming a place chance, reasonable debut nonetheless.
2-wide in rear about 6Ls from the lead at 1000 M, 4Ls back in midfield swinging for home, stayed on well to nick a place close home.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 6th early, snuck a little closer off home turn with every chance, lacked the dash.
Fractious in gates but still broke well and soon half a length back in 2nd out 2-wide, still right there turning for home but faded out very quickly late.
Always 3-wide no cover, 2Ls back in 3rd at 900 M, a neck down in 3rd off final bend and led 200 M out, grabbed by winner in shadows of post.
3-back on fence in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home turn, always held by principals.
Switched from wide gate to fence, about 7Ls last at 1200 M, switched out 5-wide and over 5Ls back in 11th turning for home, stayed on fairly down the centre.
Led by 1L on fence over 1300 M out, set a slow pace, about half a length clear taking home turn, dug in well enough to fend off limited opposition.
Always in rear and of little hope, 7Ls back at 1200 M, niggled along at 600 M, pushed out 6-wide (widest of all) off final bend, plugged on.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls back in 6th taking home turn, briefly threatened to figure about 200 M but no extra late on.
5Ls or 6Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, marginally closer taking home turn, very one-paced again.
Tracked leader 1L off pace out 2-wide until home turn, plugged on at the same speed and edged out of the money final stages.
4Ls back in 8th out 2-wide at 1200 M, much the same taking home turn, failed to fire when it mattered.
2-wide and 2Ls or so back in 5th until home turn, a little bit bunched 300 M out but had opportunity enough to reach quinella at least, lacked acceleration.
Switched from widest gate to race 4-back on fence at 1200 M about 5Ls off the front, same position turning in, unable to pick up and always well held.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th behind a slow pace until home turn, never really threatened to win it but made the best of his position to place 2nd.
Always prominent within 1L or 2Ls of the pace but 3-wide no cover, staying on fairly when 1L down at 200 M, couldn't offer any more and missed a place final 100 M.
Eased to sit just behind the early leader along the fence, however pushed back 1200 M to midfield, 3Ls off the leader, little dash in straight despite the slow pace.

Pushed to get across in front early but soon eased to sit just behind the pace, trapped 3-wide at stable bend, then again pressed forward steadily and led by 1Ls at slow pace, ran on until 250 M flattened.
Hard ridden but failed to muster speed and get across, 3Ls off the slow pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, dropped off 500 M.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield along the fence, 5Ls behind the leader, raced keenly as the pace slowed down at 1200 M, not suited by the slow tempo, showed no turn of foot in straight.
Eased back, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, never better than midfield.
Pushed early to secure a midfield spot, 3Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, no dash, weakened 300 M.
Hard ridden to get across the rail in front, then eased into box seat, benefited by the slow pace and the rails-run, dashed well 200 M and kicked away to win.
Eased to rear and took rail, 9Ls off the leader, swept 2 to 3-wide at home bend, harmed by the slow pace, no progress in final stages.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, raced keenly as usual, not suited by the slow pace, ran on ok in straight.
Awkwardly away and bumped, lost considerable amount of ground, 7Ls off pace at the back along the rail, harmed by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot as usual, 1Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow pace, led briefly 300 M then overhauled, ran on well to the line and finished 2nd.
Eased at start to get across behind the field, 7Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, demonstrated the best finishing efforts in last 250 M and ran 3rd.
Prominent early, gradually dropped back towards rear. Similar turning in and found nothing in straight.
Tailed-off throughout.
Broke well from poor draw gradually crossing to join leaders going up Rock. Hit front momentarily coming out of back straight. Folded up quickly 200 M out.
Well back. Produced good late impression down centre of straight.
Always thereabouts after breaking well settling just under 2Ls behind lead. Fought on steadily from 3rd into straight but never threatening.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Gradually rolled up to 5th just better than midfield. In similar position on rails turning in. Kept on same pace in the run home.
Well behind. Made good progress past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on well in straight.
On rails in midfield before yielding ground from home bend. No further impression.
Quickly ridden to lead, virtually making all despite narrowly headed briefly coming out of back straight. Unchallenged in straight.
Raced mostly 2 to 3-wide in midfield. Similar turning in. Ran on steadily in straight for 3rd.

Moderate break, restrained to race in rear division on rails 6-7Ls back, had an easy time in mid-section, tracked eventual winner on bend, went back to inside and made good ground by easily held by winner.

Reasonable jump out, elected to take a sit behind speed, had run of race 3Ls back on rails, tracked first few on bend, eased into space turning in and lead past 200 M but couldn't dash again and lost 2nd late.

First to hit ground, rolled on to take up 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls off lead, had reasonable trip camped off pace to bend, dream run opened turning and threatened at 200 M but was just one-paced final furlong.

Standard jump out, failed to muster and back with last few racing 2-wide 7Ls away, suited by fast tempo, came 3-wide on circle, swung wide in straight, made some ground but couldn't pair back margin in stretch.
Ordinarily away, shared rear 8Ls back on rails, not disadvantaged by position with speed on, still well back on bend, passed a few tired runners along inside in straight but made little impression.

Out with rest, couldn't go early pace and ended up 4 back on fence 5Ls away in midfield, had good trip with fast speed on, stuck to rail saving ground turning in, hit top gear at 150 M and dashed away to score easily.

Average beginning, pressed on wide but forced to restrain from widest alley, raced 2-wide behind midfield, appreciated fast speed 5-6Ls away, still back on turning, switched out and closed off evenly to make frame.

Amongst first few to leave gates, pushed on to challenge for the lead, couldn't cross and raced outside leader, always working with speed on, under pressure on turning, gave in quickly and faded last 200 M.

Began nicely, rolled on in search of top end, posted 3-wide without cover for most of middle stages, had a hard run with speed on, did plenty to bend, there to 200 M but didn't finish off after hard run. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began in line, pushed on but had to slot in behind them, ended up in midfield 5Ls away, suited by speed on and improved coming 3-wide on bend, switched out in straight and closed steadily without threatening.
Out well, surprised a few when kicking up to hold lead, kept a solid speed on 1/2L clear throughout, kicked 1L clear turning in but folded tamely at 200 M when workload took effect. Dropped out late.

Slow by 3, rearward as usual, lobbed along at tail 2-wide 7-8Ls off pace, helped by tempo, made a 3-wide run from Rock, came very wide on bend but made plenty of ground up in straight from an impossible spot.
Began in line, drifted back from an awkward gate, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls back behind midfield, under hard riding in 9th spot on bend, switched out but showed little last 300 M, just battling to line.

Standard getaway, lacked toe and dropped to rails in rearward few, 8 to 9Ls back in 10th throughout, saved ground on bend, switched out and made some impression, dropped whip at 200 M but only plodded in run home.

Away well, didn't have much early dash and drifted back to midfield, raced on rails 5Ls back, had a cosy run to the bend, eased into clear on straightening, made good ground down middle to narrowly take 2nd.

Amongst first to leave gates, crossed to rails but pressured hard for front, handed up 800 M for an easier trail, eased out on turning and briefly looked likely at 300 M, early burn took toll and didn't have any extra in run home.

Reasonable jump, allowed to roll forward and take up spot outside leader, speed backed off in mid-section and improved to leaders girth on bend, took over passing 400 M, kicked hard in the straight to hold a margin to line.

Fastest out, ridden with desperation to lead, took over at 900 M and backed off after the early burn, dictated to bend and held a 1/2L on turning, found little when tackled and gradually weakened in run to line.
Moderately away, soon restrained to near tail, raced 2 wide 2nd last 8 to 9Ls back, made a 3 wide run off bend, closed nicely down middle to be nearest on line. Gave away too much start.

Just standard to begin, recovered to hold a spot in running line, raced keenly in midfield 4Ls away in 6th, tracked well on bend, had chance at top of straight but run ended 200 M and just held ground to line. Steadied late.
Even break, positioned in midfield but trapped 3 wide without cover, had a tough run 5Ls away, struggling on turning in, was a spent force at 300 M and did little thereafter.
Began awkwardly, soon at rear and struggling to keep up, raced greenly 10Ls back on rails, clearly not up to it on bend and beaten a long way in straight. Unacceptable.

Awkwardly away, settled behind midfield on rails 6Ls off speed, green but had an easy time to bend, still well back turning and continued to improve in pack, switched out at 200 M and did best late to make frame. Useful debut.

Jumped nicely, held a prominent spot 1 out 1 back 3Ls off lead, had ideal trail behind eventual winner on bend, urged along turning for home, couldn't find another gear at 250 M and just plodded to line.
Ordinarily away, restrained from a wide alley to slot in at rear, raced 2 wide 10Ls from lead, still well back turning and urged along to improve, switched out and got passed some tired runners late.

Began nicely, ridden along to hold rails to position in 5th 4Ls off lead, not asked in mid-section, kept rails saving ground to bend, steadily made ground and had unimpeded run through at 200 M, just missed 2nd late.
Overraced early while racing, 1 pair back, 2 wide with cover. Weakened in the run home. (Blood in trachea, to trial.)
Raced on the back of the leader, along the fence, ranged up after the 200 M, but faded on its run.
Was checked near the 1100 M while racing near the rear. Never a factor.
Ridden back from a wide gate and settled just behind midfield, the fence. Worked to the line reasonably and experienced some traffic problems near the post. (See Racing Incidents.)
Went forward early to race outside the two leaders but was caught wide and without cover throughout.
Tailed the field throughout and became detached. (Mucopus, to trial.)
Pressed to race outside the leader and stayed on well.
Proved difficult to settle, early while parked 3 deep with cover, 1L back. Failed to run on and tired quickly after the 200 M.
Began well but was checked near the 1400 M. Settled midfield, 1 off with cover but was shuffled back to last rounding the home turn, came wide in the straight and unleashed good finishing effort.
Vigorously ridden to make the speed, stayed on soundly.
Among leaders early. Slipped to midfield near 800 M. Took some time to gather speed after straightening. Made a strong charge in the final 200 M and gunned down rival a few strides before the line.
Never worse than midfield. Kept pace after straightening but had to be steadied from traffic 300 M out. Continued fairly over the final stages.
Crowded shortly after start. Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Lacked the needed rally in the straight.
Slowly away from widest draw but was ridden along to park alongside the leader 900 M out. Remained racing outside the leader after straightening but gradually faded final 200 M.
Wide and without cover at midfield. Pushed along after 800 M and was 4-wide among leaders turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch final stages.
Raced keenly early stages. 3-wide at midfield until straightening. Lacked the needed response in the straight and unable to gain much ground.
3-wide behind midfield. Among last few on straightening. Made a late rally and was closest at finish.
Slow to jump and raced in rear section until home straight. Unable to quicken and stayed on at same pace.
Among early leaders. 2-wide and settled behind the pace after 1000 M. 3-wide and a length off the pace turning for home. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.

Led early stages. Took a sit behind the pace 900 M out. Caught behind slow traffic from 400 M until 150 M. Burst through to take the lead inside final 100 M but unable to hold off the winner last few strides.
Taken back from a wide draw. Trailed field into home straight and gradually picked up in the early part of the straight. Continued well and closed the race off strongly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Niggled along to take the lead. Held a narrow advantage into the home straight and remained in front until being swamped inside final 100 M.
Trailed field early stages. Ran along the fence behind midfield making the turn. Kept on steadily after straightening and made up some late ground.
Settled towards rear about 7Ls behind at 800 M, 4-wide turning for home over 5Ls back in midfield, loomed a winning chance 150 M out but couldn't follow through.
Broke well and soon 2Ls off the pace in 2nd, under pressure to maintain this prominent position turning for home, faded out.
Soon led on fence, skipped 3Ls clear turning for home, dug in well and only caught in shadows of post.
Always well outpaced in rear, about 8Ls back at 800 M, struggling to lie up in last entering home straight, weakened further.
Always caught 4-wide no cover, 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, still stranded out wide off final turn, folded over 200 M out.
3-back on fence about 4Ls behind the lead around midfield at halfway, stayed on fairly well without threatening to place.
Slow start, raced about 10th and 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, crept a little closer when 3-wide off final bend, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Improved performance, restrained about 9Ls last down the back, 3-wide turning for home with 6Ls to find, kept on well to be closest at the line.

Unbalanced early and over-racing in places down the back, forced to race 3-wide but with cover despite gate 5, about 4Ls back in midfield until home turn when under pressure, weakened inside final 200 M.
Settled better than midfield about 4Ls off speed until home turn, picked up well under strong riding to hit lead inside final strides.
On fence about 6Ls behind in 9th or so when checked at the 800 M, same margin behind turning for home, finished pretty well despite shifting out at 100 M, solid debut.
Around midfield 4Ls or 5Ls back with cover until straightening for home, lacked the needed response when asked, not the first time he failed to produce a strong enough kick.
Never better than midfield and mostly about 4Ls off pace on fence, always comfortably held in home straight.
Decent effort, raced in 3rd or about 2Ls or 3Ls from the pace through to home turn, stayed on fairly well and not too far away.
With cover in rear bunch about 7Ls behind at 1000 M, marginally closer turning for home, stayed on well enough down centre of track, nearest at finish.
Close up in 4th or 5th about 2Ls or so off pace but 3-wide no cover until halfway, hard pressed to hang onto this proximity at home turn and 200 M, one-paced close home.
Racing freely when 3-back on fence better than midfield about 4Ls off pace at halfway, edged a little closer turning for home, stayed on well for 2nd but winner was too strong.

Away well, soon settled into box-seat role on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd, keen at 800 M, found clear running room at top of home straight and stayed on well to hit lead 100 M out, eased down close home.
4-wide but mostly with cover in rear and about 6Ls back in 11th at 1000 M, 5-wide and still well back taking home turn, made little impact.
Bumped at start, on fence 8Ls off pace in last at 1000 M, 6Ls back in 13th at home turn, made some minor late headway but never dangerous.
Worse than midfield 3-wide with cover about 5Ls from the front at 1000 M, a little further back when 4-wide taking final bend, remained in rear.
Never travelled well, keen early on when about 3Ls back in 6th, under pressure to lie up 600 M out, gave ground tamely from top of home straight.
Slowly away, 4-back on fence about 5Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, same margin behind taking home turn, stayed on fairly late without threatening principals.
Always close-up in 2nd out 2-wide and about 1L off pace until home straight, had every chance to at least place but lacked an extra burst when it mattered.
Away well and soon led, crossed to fence leading by 1L at 900 M, same margin ahead until the 200 M, headed by winner at 100 M and quickly lost out on quinella.
Never better than midfield, slow break and always at least 4Ls from the front, lost further ground in homestretch.
Always 4-wide no cover and keen, checked at 1100 M when about 3Ls back in midfield, 4-wide turning for home when under pressure to keep up, dropped out rapidly, had excuses. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled in box seat throughout, not suited by the fast early tempo, ran on until 200 M, emptied.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed and keep up with the fast pace, always midfield, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground, completely emptied on straightening.
Bumped at start but soon went forward to take a prominent spot, 2Ls off the fast pace 2 wide, lacked room 400 M, no progress when clear, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 7.5Ls off the leader along the fence, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily 300 M, dominated last 150 M.
Eased at start to get across, 2 wide early behind midfield and raced keenly, 6.5Ls off the fast pace, swept 4 wide at the home bends, no progress in straight.
Steadily pressed forward and took the rail and led by 0.5L under pressure throughout, not suited by the fast pace, hung on until 250 M, weakened.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 2 wide early, 3.5Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, swept 3 to 4 wide at home bends, ran on fairly in final stages.
Eased back, 7.5Ls behind the leader 2 to 3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, blocked 4 to 2, made ground when clear.
Awkward away, pushed along and strode forward steadily to outside the leader, not suited by the fast tempo, dropped off quickly 450 M.
Eased at start to get across the rail behind the field, helped by the fast pace but never competitive.

Eased to get across the rail quickly and settled nicely behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 400 M, led briefly 250 M however run ended 150 M, just ran on in 4th.
Pushed early, 2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, moved up 800 M, exhausted in straight.
Eased back to get across behind the field, 9Ls off the leader, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily in straight along the fence and finished 3rd.
Pushed early but no early speed, 5.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, lacked room from 400 M, progressed steadily when clear to run 2nd.
Began well. Restrained to race in 4th within 2Ls of pace. 3rd rounding home bend and similar into straight. Quickened up to hit front inside 200 M but grabbed close to home.
Waited with. Did not find much room inside 200 M. Quickening well for a tight slit between first two when gap closed and forced to ease at crucial stage about 100 M out.
Settled 2 from rear 2 wide in small field stalking ARMADA. Commenced run inside 300 M and responded well to take charge inside final 50 M.
Settled just off the pace. Hit front taking over from tiring leader shortly after straightening only to be swamped inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field most of the way and never seen with a chance.
Never far off on rails in 3rd early. Dropped back slightly to 4th rounding home bend. Moved closer turning in but unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Began fairly. Took up running 200 M after start. Led field until headed over 350 M out. Dropped out tamely.

Bounced out, slotted into box seat on leaders back, had run of race with slow tempo, speed increased and tracked nicely on bend, steadied slightly 400 M, cut to inside and drove to lead at 200 M, all out and gallant to just fail.

Average jump, soon behind them in midfield role, raced 2 wide just off midfield 5 to 6Ls back, harmed by tempo, came 3 wide on bend, still well back on turning, steadily made ground in run home to be closest at finish.

Tardy from outset, assumed position at rear on rails 8Ls off pace, not suited by moderate tempo, lobbed along at rear to bend, last turning and swung to outside, made some good late ground when race was over.

Even break, posted wide early from difficult alley, pressed on 3 wide 3Ls back with cover, cut loose passing 1000 M and shot 2Ls clear on bend, tackled at 200 M, couldn't come again but showed plenty of fight to hold 3rd.

Away in line, kicked up to be in front of midfield, raced 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, in between horses on bend and lost spot to be 6Ls down, into clear on turning but just battled last 300 M holding ground to line.

Well enough to begin, pressed forward to take closer order, raced in coveted 1 out 1 back role and helped by the tempo, lost position on bend, kept to inside and stuck on gamely holding ground without threatening.

Fastest out, took up running as expected, set a moderate tempo 1L clear, overtaken at 1000 M and forced to lift speed, 2Ls down in 2nd turning in, made a good rally at 300 M but found out by trip and weakened last furlong.

Moderately away, took up a spot off midfield 3 wide with cover, forced to cover extra ground, improved to be 5Ls down in 8th on bend, came wide into straight but lacked usual finishing burst and was one paced last 200 M.

Well enough out, rolled forward to take up spot at leaders girth, had easy time with moderate tempo, worked to keep in touch from 1000 M, there at 300 M but run and trip had effect and stopped quickly last furlong.
Amongst first few to jump, held a prime position 3 back on rails, helped by tempo in first half, 4Ls back in 7th on bend, gap appeared but found nothing when asked and had little to offer last 300 M.

Fast out, pressed on wide from outside alley, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, suited by early tempo but had to work from 1000 M when speed went on, struggling on turning in, didn't find and weakened last 200 M.

Average break, slotted in behind midfield on rails 6 to 7Ls back throughout over racing with slow speed, still back in 10th on turning, kept to rails and made a little ground between horses but was a spent force last 200 M.

Moderate break, settled in last few 2 wide 7Ls away, had an easy trip but overraced when unsuited by slow early tempo, came 3 wide with trail on bend, swung widest in straight, made many lengths charging late to snatch victory.

Standard getaway, shared rear 7 to 8Ls back and came 3 wide with a trail from midpoint, covered ground but had a cart into race, eased 4 and 5 wide 4Ls back on bend, kept to task in straight making ground to just miss 3rd.
Chased behind leaders. Still within 2Ls of pace turning. Tightened and soon shuffled back to rear of field about 300 M out. Never recovered.
Slow out. Raced wide in last few. Circled field rounding home bend to be just worse than midfield into straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
In last few to straight. Made steady headway down centre of straight.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in last few. Improving when forced to steady inside 200 M. Sustained good impression to the line. (Mucus in trachea.)
Settled in 5th just better than midfield. Lost ground and dropped to midfield coming out of back straight. Wide rounding home bend and into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Lacked early pace. Gradually shuffled back to just worse than midfield on rails. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in last few. Hampered approaching 800 M. Remained rear and wide to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled well in 6th in mid-division. No clear running on inner early in straight. Shifted out to obtain run 300 M out. Ran on to do best work at finish.
Soon came to dispute lead from wide draw. Settled for one out one back position rounding home bend. Soon weakened under pressure after straightening.
Raced wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort rounding home bend. Soon faded after straightening. (Mildly lame.)
Made all. Soon drew clear after straightening and won unchallenged.
Travelled in midfield. Steadied coming out of back straight. Just worse than midfield turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never far off. Held a 2L 3rd rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.

Reasonable getaway, rolled on but trapped 3 wide from an awkward draw, 2Ls back with cover on circle and helped by average pace, dropped in on bend, couldn't dash again in straight and just kept on evenly last 200 M.
No speed as usual, dropped out to rear, raced 8Ls back on rails, not helped by tempo, switched out turning in, still behind them at 200 M, found a gap and closed evenly past some tired runners.

Bounced out, showed unexpected dash to be up challenging, raced in front 1/2L clear but couldn't cross, advantaged by slow pace to bend there to 250 M but faded thereafter weakened right out. (See Racing Incidents.)

Away with first few, went on with it but took a sit when couldn't progress, had 1 x 1 sit appreciating speed, lost position on bend, didn't find much when asked last 300 M and looked outclassed doing very little late.

Average getaway, rushed along to take up a role in midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 3 to 4Ls back, overraced with slow speed on, close enough turning in, kept finding and stuck on gamely in 3 way go for 4th.

Little pace from outset, took a spot 2 wide behind midfield, raced 5 to 6Ls off leaders not helped by gallop, cut back to rails on turning and made some ground but couldn't find any extra from 200 M. Plugged late.

Moderate getaway, settled in last few 2 wide 6Ls off pace, not helped by tempo back in 12th on bend, still behind back of horses turning, steadied at 200 M and weaved between them closing best out of pack to grab 3rd late.
Even getaway, positioned behind midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 5 to 6Ls back, not suited by speed, eased 4 wide on bend, lacked usual finish and run ended at 200 M just battling thereafter.

Tardy to begin, regathered to sit midfield on rails, had nice trip 4 to 5Ls back, tracked well on bend saving ground on fence, kept to inside in straight but only managed to hold ground in run to line.

Only fair to begin, restrained to settle next to last, 6 to 7Ls back 3 wide and unsuited by tempo, made a run 4 to 5 wide on circle, came to extreme outside and closed fairly in straight but set too great a task.

Began nicely, positioned closer than usual 2 to 3Ls back in 2 wide line, eased 3 wide on circle with slow tempo, had nice trail off turn, came with a big sprint from 250 M making up plenty of ground to just fail.

Began with rest, kept to rails holding position behind early leader, had nice trip 2Ls back, spent nothing to bend with little speed on, followed winner turning, kept on well without threatening to just miss frame.

Standard break, Whyte took initiative and went to lead, held them out and set a moderate tempo, dictated terms to bend 1/2L back holding inside, booted 2Ls clear on turning, dug deep late to hold on by a slender margin.

Out better than previously, rolled forward with slow pace to race up outside leaders, forced to work 3 wide without cover but helped by pace, shared lead turning and kept with them when sprint went on, stuck in well to make frame.
Slowly away. Remained towards rear to straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Trailed the field to 200 M. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled in one out one back position. Came under pressure turning in but could only keep on steadily without quickening.
Travelled towards rear to straight. Made steady headway to be nearest at finish.
Made all. Just held on to the line.
Slowly away. Soon picked up to rear of midfield on rails. Dropped out shortly after straightening. (Bled.)
Travelled in last few. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled on rails in 5th just better than midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Broke well. Remained wide before settling 2-wide in midfield. Similar turning in but gradually weakened inside final 200 M.
Ridden for pace early settling in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in but fought on well inside final 200 M.
Travelled in 3rd on rails behind leader. Slightly hampered coming out of back straight. Kept on gamely from 3rd into straight without threatening.
Raced 2-wide in midfield to straight. Fought on steadily without quickening.
1 out 1 back, weakened quickly turning for home.
Slowly away and settled midfield the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight but didn't make appreciable ground.
Settled in last position, found nothing in the straight when asked and dropped out.
Ridden along to sit outside leader. Hung in when under pressure in the straight but stuck to task well to grab a margin close to home.
Raced behind midfield along the fence, made ground over the last 200 M without ever threatening.
Raced midfield 1 off with cover after being crowded at the start. Worked home satisfactorily.
Positioned 1 off with cover at the rear of the field, failed to run on.
Was left racing without cover after the 600 M whilst in a midfield position 3-deep. Struggled from that point on.
Led comfortably, set an even tempo, overhauled in the shadows of the post.
Slow to begin, settled on the back of the leader along the fence. Found the line only fairly.
Raced behind midfield 3-wide with cover. Never a factor.
Settled behind midfield 1 off with cover, made some ground over the concluding stages.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. 3-wide and under pressure making home turn. Closed the race off well making up good ground.

Raced outside the leader early stages before taking over the lead on entering the back straight. Remained in the lead final 200 M but unable to find extra to hold off principals final 50 M. Solid for workload.
Raced on fence no better than midfield. Lacked the needed response and remained on same pace in the straight.
Raced in front before taking a sit behind the leader near 1000 M. Tracked leader into home straight but unable to turn up a notch. Faded in the final stages.

Settled behind the pace early stages. Continued to race on the fence and stayed within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Kept on well in the straight and charged through rivals in the final stages to win a close one.
Raced 2-wide at the rear of the field. Remained towards the back on straightening and rallied to be closest at finish.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Swung out on straightening and made a late push to grab 2nd.
Settled 2-wide and no better midfield. Unable to quicken when asked turning for home. Remained same pace in the straight.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced at the rear until home straight. Showed a nice rally and was closest at finish.

Raced 2-wide behind the pace. Remained 2-wide and 2Ls off the leader in 3rd place 800 M out. Kept on well after straightening and wore down early leader final 50 M but was headed by top pair just before the line.
A bit slow to jump and then was crowded and lost further ground. Raced along the fence in rear section and only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Caught wide in a forward spot into 1st turn. Settled 2-wide at midfield back straight. Hard ridden to keep pace turning for home, dropped out quickly after straightening and finished tailed out.
Nicely placed in the 'one-out-one-back' position 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th until the 600 M, a little further back when tapped for toe off final bend, weakened.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in midfield off home turn when angled inside to challenge, plugged on at the one pace and no danger.
Had the run of the race in 3rd early on, 4Ls back in 4th on fence taking final turn, no imression. Very one-paced.
Worse than midfield early, 4Ls off pace when left 3-wide no cover at 800 M, opted to stride on to lead, clear by 3Ls off final bend, treading water when headed over 100 M out.
4-back on fence about 6Ls back in 7th at 1000 M, lost position on the circle for home and one from rear 400 M out, well held by principals when tight for room at 200 M.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at halfway, marginally closer off home turn, stayed on well late and only narrowly missed a place.
Coldly ridden as usual, 10Ls last at 1200 M, still well behind in rear taking final turn, ran on strongly down centre of track to take the quinella without seriously testing the winner.
2-wide and 7Ls or so in 9th at 1200 M, tracked WONG'S FAVOURITE out 3-wide from 800 M to go 3Ls down in 2nd off home turn, stayed on well enough for third.
Always close up until the 600 M about 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide, hard pressed to lie up taking home turn, faded out rapidly and eased. (Bled.) (Blood in trachea.)
Caught 3-wide no cover early but got in 2-wide about 1000 M out when 4Ls back in 6th, a little further back taking home turn, never threatened to place on the run-in.
Settled 5-back on fence 7Ls from the lead at 1000 M, good headway from 600 M to home turn when 5-wide and 4Ls off pace, dug in well to lead over 100 M out, had a bit in hand.
Fractious in gates, clear lead on fence after just 200 M but always wanted to hang out, headed at 600 M and dropped out sharply from top of home straight, unacceptable performance.
Shared the rear out 2-wide about 9Ls behind a very slow pace, checked at 800 M, improved to 4Ls back in mid-division turning for home, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-back the fence 4Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, under pressure to maintain this proximity 500 M out, faded out from top of home straight.
Had the box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1400 M to home straight, had every chance to overhaul MATIRI KING but lacked the kick.
Pulled up 600 M out after completely losing his action first at 800 M and then at 700 M and nearly unseating rider, had been settled around midfield about 5Ls off pace before this incident.
In rear or one from rear on fence about 9Ls off early speed, 7Ls back in 10th turning for home, made only very minor late ground in the final quarter.
Didn't settle very well early on when 4-back on fence about 6Ls back in 7th, about 5Ls back turning for home, stayed on fairly well without troubling those ahead.
In 10th place about 7Ls off pace out 2-wide at halfway, checked at 800 M, still with plenty to do taking home turn, gave ground inside final 200 M.
Best away and led early on fence, handed up lead at 1400 M and opted to race 2-wide and 1L off fence until home turn, given every possible hope to go on and win but couldn't follow through. (Lame.)
Slow break, 6Ls off pace early on, left 3-wide no cover at 1000 M so pressed on to got 3Ls back in 4th off home turn, had very little left in homestretch and faded out.
7Ls back in 9th at halfway on fence, lost position on the final circle and slipped back 8Ls last, finished tamely. (Lame.)
Led out 2-wide at 1400 M and soon crossed to fence, set very slow tempo 1L clear through to home straight, always just about outstaying his rivals despite looking vulnerable at the 200 M.
3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide about 1200 M out when 3Ls back in 4th, driven along to get closer off final bend, stayed on okay but not well enough to place.
Crossed towards the rail steadily behind midfield, settled 6-1/2Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 250 M.
Hard ridden to hold the box seat throughout, 1-1/2Ls behind the fast pace, led 200 M, hung on strongly to win.
Pushed early, but soon took a sit in midfield, 3Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, made ground 300 M and briefly threatened the winner in 2nd, however flattened 50 M and just missed the place.
Trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout outside the pace group, lost too much ground at the bends and harmed by the fast pace, faded 500 M.
Hard ridden to take rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, hung on until 200 M, flattened.
Eased back as usual, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader along the rail, did not respond when ridden along from 800 M, helped by the fast pace but never progressed in final stages.
Eased early to get across the rail quickly just behind the pace group, checked at stable bend, 3Ls off the leader, helped by the fast tempo, made ground in straight.
Eased out of the race at stable bend. (See Racing Incidents.)
Eased back, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, lacked room in straight but still progressed steadily to take 2nd.
Failed to get across the rail in the front half of the field, trapped 3-wide at stable bend, then eased to sit 4-1/2Ls off pace, got the rail at home bend, made ground 300 M, however run ended 150 M.
Slowly away, eased back 7-1/2Ls behind the leader, trapped 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 600 M and sustained its finishing effort to the line to run 3rd.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot 2-wide, 1-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the fast pace, dropped off rapidly 250 M.
Soon dropped to rear. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in the run home.
Broke well, settling just off the pace on rails. In 3rd within 2Ls of pace rounding home bend gaining 2nd turning in but swamped inside final 100 M.
Attempted to make all going clear into straight only to be worn down inside final 100 M.
Broke well from wide draw, travelling wide in prominent position down far side before dropping out from 500 M.
Settled at the back. Saved ground on rails rounding home bend gaining midfield into straight. Ran on well down centre to be nearest at finish.
Settled towards rear. Came under pressure rounding home bend. Closer turning in, slightly inconvenienced over 200 M out. Produced good late impression under pressure.
Settled in midfield. Soon came to challenge upon straightening. Quickened well between runners inside final 200 M to assert close to home.
Prominent, dropping to midfield home bend. Weakened further approaching home turn.
Settled in midfield 2-wide. Gained a 2L 4th into straight but fought on steadily without threatening.
Jumped fairly. Ridden for pace settling in one out one back position. Found nothing after straightening.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Lost position going up Rock and dropped further back around home bend.
Raced wide in midfield. Gave ground steadily from approaching Rock.

Out with line, didn't have pace to match them and faded to be behind midfield, raced on rails 6Ls back, used little and saved ground on bend, back in traffic and lost run on turning, finished nicely when clear last 150 M.

Slowly into stride and settled in last spot, raced 8Ls back but made a 3-wide run passing Rock, came 4 and 5-wide on bend and made a little ground in straight (inconvenienced 200 M) but set too great a task.

First to hit ground, crossed comfortably and eased to take trail on leaders back, had dream trip to bend, 1L back turning in, accelerated nicely to take front at 150 M, went on with it to score with ease in good time.
Away with rest, trapped 3-wide in midfield from an awkward alley, did it tough without cover 4 to 5Ls back, still working on bend and under pressure 500 M after straightening, faded out of it late.

Began well, showed plenty of early dash to cross to front from widest alley, kept tempo reasonable and led by 1 to 2Ls to bend, kicked again on turning and just ran out off steam last 150 M. Good effort given workload.

Jumped nicely, urged along but had to settle with a spot 3 back on rails, had run of race to bend, inside run opened but couldn't find extra gear and just battled away at the same speed in home stretch.

Amongst first few to break, assumed role first without cover 2-wide 2Ls back, not pressured in run, gradually improved on turning, kept to task well in straight grabbing 2nd late. No match for winner.
Jumped with them, faded into midfield, raced keenly in 2-wide line 4Ls off pace, still 4Ls down in 6th on turning, gap opened but just appeared one-paced in straight plugging away to line.

Standard getaway, assumed expected role in rearward division, raced 2-wide 5-6Ls back, eased 3-wide on circle, 5Ls back in 8th swinging wide turning in, didn't have usual finish and just battled last 200 M.
Amongst them to leave, took a midfield spot on rails when outpaced, raced 4Ls back with an easy trip to bend, in traffic turning in, pushed into clear at 200 M and finished off nicely to make frame.
Ordinary getaway and soon towards rear, raced 2-wide 7 to 8Ls back with last few, didn't use much but steadily tracked up behind them on bend, found little under pressure and offered little run home.

Tardy to begin, outpaced from outset, raced at rear on rails 7 to 8Ls back, not asked in mid-section, still at rear on turning, saved ground sticking to rails and warmed up last 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well, restrained to angle into 1 out 1 back spot, travelled evenly with easy tempo, close enough on bend, left flat footed on turning and only maintained same spot in run home, one paced.
Even break, showed enough to hold leaders back, had run of race 1 to 2Ls away on rails, right there on bend, found little when they sprinted and just plodded to line last 200 M.

Slow to begin, soon at rear, raced greenly 2 wide 4 to 5Ls back, not helped by slow tempo, still had job to do on turning, hung badly in straight and made only fair ground in run to line lacking expected turn of foot.

Jumped nicely, showed dash to hold lead easily, didn't set a great pace and dictated terms on bend, 1/2L clear on turning in, drew away from rest with stablemate, kept fighting and just overhauled last 100 M.

First to hit ground, took hold to race outside of leader, raced a little keenly and remained 1/2 length down on bend, travelled strongly turning, engaged in battle with leader last 300 M drawing clear of rest, asserted authority late.
Moderate beginning, raced towards rear 5Ls back on rails, gradually became detached, well off there on turning in, beaten a long way. Unacceptable.
Average break, settled behind midfield on rails, 3 to 4Ls back throughout unsuited by tempo, looked green in action on turning, found little when required and gradually gave in.
Average break, slotted in behind midfield in 2 wide running line, raced keenly 3 to 4Ls back with unsuitable speed, came 3 wide on turning, kept on evenly in straight and took a distant 3rd.
Settled just behind the leaders along the outside fence, took the lead inside the furlong to draw away.
Raced in last position for most of the trip, hard ridden throughout, managed to make up some ground close to home.
Began awkwardly and raced midfield, struggled approaching the 400 M.
Settled in 2nd last position and raced down the grandstand side, passed some tiring runners towards the final stages.
Raced hard up the outside rail. Kept on one paced.
Lost ground at the start after being bumped and raced near the rear. Hung out when under pressure inside the 400 M, shifted ground, never a factor.
Parked handy to the leaders, failed to make any appreciable ground.
Ran usual honest race, leading, but faded inside the last 50 M.
Settled just behind midfield after being slowly away hung in from most of the trip.
Sat about a neck behind the leader, weakened after the 250 M, had every chance.
Camped behind the leading division, unable to sustain effort inside the final 150 M.
Settled just off midfield. Ran on strongly over the concluding stages to close off nicely down the outside.
Raced along in centre of the track and dropped to the rear near the 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly, but settled just behind the leaders. Gradually tired inside the 250 M.
Raced in a prominent position behind the leader. Couldn't make run when intended on bend, kept on well in the home straight but unable to gain much ground.
Botched the start and lost ground. Raced along the fence in rear section. Unable to quicken in home straight, remained on at same pace and was checked at 100 M when weakening.
Eased back to a rearward position. emained towards the rear turning for home. Made up a bit of ground in the straight.

On fence and better than midfield. 2Ls off the lead making home turn and had some trouble getting a clear run early straight. Steadily made up ground, kept on well final stages and just failed to run down the winner.
Caught wide into 1st turn and dropped to the rear. Ridden along to keep pace at the back and trailed field turning for home. No improvement in the home straight.
Dropped back and raced in a rearward position. Wide turning for home and never picked up in the straight.
2-wide at midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Swung out on straightening and rallied to be closest at finish. (Mucopus and lame morning after.)
Settled 2-wide behind the pacesetters. Gradually made up ground in the straight but not enough to run down the winner.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Made up ground after 800 M and was 4-wide midfield turning in. Continued fairly in the straight and made up a bit of late ground.
Ridden along from a wide draw and travelled alongside the leader. Kept on well in the straight but unable to turn up a notch to run down leader final stages.
Pushed along to take the early lead. Set a steady pace along the way and held a narrow advantage into home straight. Kept on gamely over final stages to deny challengers.
Raced along the fence and no better than midfield. Only remained on same pace in the home straight.
Caught wide at midfield into 1st turn. 3-wide and without cover in back straight and improved to be within 2Ls of the pace at 800 M. 3-wide disputing lead turning in but weakened final 200 M.
Caught 5-wide no cover in rear initially, gained cover 3-wide at 800 M when 6Ls off pace at 800 M, made only fair late ground in the home straight and never very dangerous.
Had the box seat run on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M in 3rd, under pressure to maintain this position at 500 M, weakened markedly in homestretch.
Nicely positioned in 4th or so about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace before the swing for home, went about a head down in 2nd or 3rd with 100 M to go, had every chance but just couldn't lead.
Always tended to hang in while rearward about 6Ls off pace, never on terms, substandard effort.
Slow away and crowded at start, 3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, picked up well to lead about 150 M out, collared inside final strides.
Over-raced a little disputing early lead on fence, 2Ls clear at 800 M and 1L to the good at final turn, headed about 150 M out and one-paced closing stages.
Slowest away, unbalanced between runners at halfway when about 5Ls back in 10th, a little closer turning for home, ran on gamely to poke head in front inside final few bounds.
Prominent with cover early about 2Ls off pace, hampered and pushed out 3-wide no cover at 800 M, edged forward 1L back in 2nd making final turn, outgunned by leading trio inside final 200 M.
Always in the rear bunch, 7Ls last at 1000 M, one from rear and same margin behind taking home turn, never in the hunt.
Dropped in 4-back on fence early about 6Ls off speed, hung out a little at halfway, tight for room taking home turn, ran on OK but always well held in mid-division.
Away well, keen while disputing early lead out 2-wide, 2Ls back in 2nd or 3rd from 800 M to final turn, beaten when tiring inside final 200 M.
Worse than midfield 5Ls off pace when hampered at 800 M and forced out 4-wide without cover, same margin behind when widest of all entering stretch, always well held.
Failed to show usual early pace, in midfield at halfway about 4Ls off the lead and same position entering home turn, never likely to draw much closer.
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls off pace down backstretch, edged a little closer turning for home, stayed on dourly under pressure but winning post came a stride too soon.
Better than midfield with cover about 4Ls or so off pace until home turn, stayed on OK for a place but well held from the quinella inside final 200 M.
Slowly away and always in rear trio, never better than 6Ls off speed at any stage.
Restrained to be about 8Ls last at 1200 M, 4-wide and still last off home turn, went past a few tired rivals on the run-in.
2Ls off speed in 2nd at 1200 M, a neck down in 2nd off final bend, one-paced and weakened inside final 200 M.
Away well, led out wide setting a good pace and clear by 2Ls on rail at 1200 M, a neck clear at top of home straight but kicked on again 2Ls clear at 200 M, all out to hang on.
3-wide with cover in rear bunch about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, similar margin behind when 4-wide taking final bend, plugged away down the centre of the track.
Awkwardly away, 3-back on fence around midfield about 5Ls from the pace through first half, under pressure to improve off final bend, made some modest late ground.
Midfield and caught 4-wide no cover about 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, still very wide turning for home and well back, posed no danger to principals.
Always towards rear, about 6Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, didn't manage to get much closer.
Lost ground at start, raced 5-back on fence towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, marginally closer turning for home but that was as close as he got.
Raced keenly with head up early when 4-wide no cover in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace, struggling to lie up turning for home, dropped out in straight.
4Ls back in 4th on fence at 1200 M, 3Ls back in 4th off home turn, found very little off the bridle and weakened out.
Raced keenly and more prominently than normal about 3Ls off pace out 3-wide no cover in 3rd at 1400 M, ridden along to stay in touch entering home straight, gave ground quickly.
Hard ridden early, lacked early speed, 5.5Ls off the fast pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground at the bends, no progress in straight.
Settled just behind the pace group along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, made up some ground lately 200 M to finish 3rd.
Pushed to keep up with the leading group, 2Ls behind the fast pace 2 to 3 wide, just held ground in straight.

Very slow away, 8.5Ls behind the leader at the tail, 2 to 4 wide, helped by the fast pace but covered too much ground at the bends, progressed steadily in straight and kept launching well at the finish.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader 3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, no turn of foot in final stages.
Hard ridden to keep up with the field but failed to muster speed, 7.5Ls off the fast pace along the fence, checked 800 M, never competitive at the back.
Settled nicely about midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, benefitted by the fast pace, blocked 400 M, progressed steadily when clear, dominated 100 M.
Hard ridden to get across the rail and led by 1.5Ls at fast early sectionals, hung on until 150 M overhauled, still ran on OK to the line.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, 7Ls behind the leader, 2 to 4 wide, benefitted by the past pace but covered much ground at the bends, moved up 300 M, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot as usual, trapped 3 wide early at home bend, took rail 600 M, 1.5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the fast pace, ran on until 150 M run ended.
Eased to the rear, 9Ls off pace 2 to 3 wide, travelled nicely throughout, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily 300 M.
Pushed to hold the box seat early, 1.5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the fast tempo, made ground in straight and led briefly 150 M, overhauled 50 M, ran on for 2nd.

Eased to sit about midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader on rails, checked 800 M, favoured by the fast pace, swept towards the middle of track immediately on straightening, had every chance, however made ground only until 200 M.
Pushed early, trapped wide outside the pace group, then eased to sit 3.5Ls off the fast pace, faded 500 M.
Led to 200 M. Dropped out under pressure.
Trailed the field throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Mostly 3-wide in 3rd within 2Ls of pace. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Chased leader in one out one back position. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out going 1L clear and flattened. Swamped close home.
Slow out. Soon picked up to midfield on rails rounding stable bend. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in last few. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on well inside final 300 M to take charge close to home.
Travelled just better than midfield in 6th. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Settled towards rear on rails. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M only to find winner too good.
Broke well from middle draw. Failed to muster speed early and settled in last few. Never featured.
Not too far off in 5th within 3Ls of pace most of way. Came under pressure rounding home bend but could only keep on at the same pace.
Travelled mostly in rear of midfield. Fought on steadily in straight before tightened about 100 M out.
Raced wide from outset, still 4-wide in prominent position to straight. Soon dropped out.
Out fairly well, didn't show much early and settled behind them, raced 4Ls back towards middle, inconvenienced at 400 M when moving into clear, got going late finishing hard to make the frame.
Even break, raced 3Ls from them towards middle, struggling at 400 M, couldn't find when they sprinted and just battled away last 200 M.
Slow by 10Ls, raced detached at rear, always struggling to regain lost ground, never got closer.
Away with line, back in pack 3Ls away with cover, had easy time and tracked well at 300 M, dashed hard when gap appeared at 200 M, motored late and just missed.
Reasonable jump, up leading those in middle of track, travelled well 1L down to mid-point, finished hard to take lead out 200 M, weakened a little last 100 M but held on by a narrow margin.
Standard break, raced in middle from an inside draw, 4Ls back throughout, made some progress 3Ls back at 300 M, maintained position without threatening last 200 M. Even.
Slow to begin, raced on outside rail 5 to 6Ls from pace, couldn't go early speed and struggling at mid-point. Didn't make any impact last 300 M just plugging to finish.
Jumped well, raced off stand side 1 to 2Ls from leaders, right there throughout, close enough at 200 M but condition gave out and weakened late, better for run.
Fastest out, shared lead on stand side rail, always prominent and travelled well to 300 M, just struggled to find again at the business end but kept on very well for 3rd.
Bounced out well, led them towards outside rail, kept running and was 1L clear at mid-point, hung throughout yet still prominent to 100 M, just ran out of gas late.
Sweated up badly prior to start, OK jump and positioned 4Ls back in midfield, didn't have much to offer at business end and produced a one paced effort in the run to the line.
Ordinary break, regathered to trail them 2Ls in behind near outside rail, tracked well but caught flat footed at 400 M, kept on and made some late ground despite never looking likely.
Raced on rails in midfield. Snuck up on fence turning in. Sustained effort down inner in straight to snatch victory near the line.
Raced keenly just worse than midfield. Towards rear turning in. Made up good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Finished off race strongly inside final 300 M. Did best work at finish.
Travelled mostly in 5th and within 3Ls of pace to straight. Soon weakened.
Raced wide in rear of midfield to approaching home turn. Soon weakened.
Chased leaders on rails in 2L 4th to straight. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Never better than midfield. Steadied for a run about 200 M out. Fought on steadily to the line without really getting a clear crack.
Never looked comfortable and raced in unusual role at rear. Never seen with a chance.
Raced wide behind midfield. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Made short-lived effort early in straight. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield early. Gradually improved to be 3-wide in 3rd far side. Similar turning in and fought on steadily without quickening.
Circled field around stable bend to obtain 2nd in one out one back position far side. Quickened to hit front over 300 M out only to be grabbed close to home.
Led to 300 M. Soon overhauled.
Settled towards rear on rails. Gained closer turning for home. Found nothing under pressure in straight.

Amongst first few to begin, pushed on but forced to race 3 wide without cover from a wide draw, 1 to 2Ls back working to bend, struggling turning in, lacked a finish in straight and run ended at 200 M. Battled to line.

Fair start, slotted in to running line 3 to 4Ls back, had an even run between horses on circle, in traffic turning in, didn't see much daylight until 250 M when cut back to inside, finished at the same speed.

Moderate beginning, urged along to take a midfield role on rails 3Ls back, not help by slow tempo but tracked nicely to bend, held up early in straight, got clear from 200 M and finished nicely for 3rd.

Standard break, regathered to take up coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had great trip with easy speed, right there on turning but bumped and pushed wide, couldn't find usual finish and just faded out last 200 M.

First to leave gates, didn't have speed to lead but ended up at leaders girth, had a nice trip with the easy speed on, right there on bend and took over at 400 M, kept on evenly but couldn't hold them out late.
Fast out, pressed on to take up lead, controlled race from top end setting a slow speed, held a half length advantage on bend, there to 300 M but couldn't keep on and dropped out badly last furlong.

Average jump, restrained from wide alley, raced slightly detached at tail 7Ls off speed, tacked on rounding bend 2 wide, last turning and eased wide, lacked usual finish and just battled making no progress in straight.

Standard jump, soon in rearward division, raced 2 wide 4 to 5Ls off them, not suited by slow speed, came 3 wide with a trail on circle, urged along turning, made good ground down outside to be nearest on line.
Ordinary getaway, settled next to last on rails 5Ls off them, unsuited by slow speed, kept to rails and saved ground to bend, made up plenty of ground along paint to be right there on line.

Away with line, caught wide from an awkward alley, raced 3 wide with cover 2 to 3Ls back, had a good trail on bend, switched 4 wide turning in and let down nicely but run ended at 200 M and faded late.

Average jump, regathered to hold leaders back, obtained run of race with slow tempo, had easy time to bend, bumped way into clear at 400 M, let down nicely and draw 3/4L clear at 200 M, stuck on well late to hold them out.
Always prominent, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at the 800 M, got to within 2Ls of the speed at the home turn, given every hope to place but failed to find extra and lost 4th final 50 M.
Taken back to 11th about 8Ls off speed until home turn, made only very minor late ground.
4-back on fence worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace until the 800 M, about 1L closer taking final turn, never loomed a threat.
Slowest away and never a factor, 8Ls back in 12th from 1000 M to home turn, left for dead and eased down as far out as the 200 M.
Tight for room on fence when about 6Ls off speed in mid-division at the 800 M, pushed along to pick up at top of stretch about 4Ls down in 5th, led inside final 30 M, will appreciate further.
Mostly raced in 3rd, about 4Ls off pace at halfway on fence, 2Ls down taking home turn, about 1L down at 200 M, stayed on well despite hanging out but couldn't match the winner.
Settled in rear as usual, about 10Ls behind at halfway and same turning for home, made up some nice late ground, nearest at the finish.
Held up in rear as normal, about 9Ls off the speed in 13th or so until home turn, made some minor late ground.
6Ls behind a strong pace in midfield at halfway, ran on fairly well down centre of track without troubling principals, never nearer.
2-wide in 5th about 5Ls back at 1000 M, under pressure to draw nearer to the speed into home straight, soon beaten and eased final 100 M.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls off pace out 2-wide until the 600 M, driven along to lie up taking final turn, kept on at same speed.
Disputed early running on fence, settled 3Ls back in 2nd at 800 M and 2Ls down in 2nd off final turn, soon outpaced.
Tended to over-race, caught 3-wide no cover in places midfield about 5Ls off pace at halfway, a little closer taking home turn, always held by those in front.
Led out 2-wide at 1000 M, crossed to fence at 800 M and set brisk sectionals to skip 3Ls clear at 600 M, only grabbed inside final 30 M and missed quinella on the line.

First to hit ground, didn't have enough speed to cross them, posted 5 wide in midfield, improved to be 2Ls back on bend working hard without cover, close enough on turning but hard run took toll and weakened out from 250 M.

Ordinary getaway, settled at tail, raced on rails 7Ls away, never really comfortable and ridden along to bend, back behind horses turning in, made some headway under hands and heels victory only. (See Racing Incidents.)

Away with line, lacked speed and ended up with last few 2-3 wide 6Ls back, tracked 3 and 4 deep on bend, in traffic for best part of straight, only clear when race was over and produced 1 paced finish.
Fast into stride, lead them early before taking a trail, had run of race behind leader, 1L down turning in, gave in easily and was passed by many in the run to the line.
Out in line, ended up in midfield 3 wide without cover 3-4Ls back, did share of work on bend (checked at 700 M), 2Ls down turning in, run ended at 200 M and only battled away at same pace to line.
Out fairly, showed some early dash but had to be content to settle 3 back on fence, had an easy time throughout, saved ground to turn, finished only at same pace keeping on to make the frame.
Showed pace from outset, raced first without cover 2 wide when unable to cross, 1L back to bend, urged along turning in, kept on evenly but found winner in another class. Best of rest.
Ordinary break, regathered to take a midfield role 4Ls back 3 wide with cover, back in pack under pressure on bend, found little when asked for effort turning in and was well beaten in straight.

Bounced nicely, showed good speed to press on and take up the running, lead at an even tempo and dictated to bend, 1L clear turning in, put foot down at 300 M and drew well clear in running to line to win by a big space.

Slowly out, soon in rearward division, raced 3 wide 5-6Ls back with cover, made a run 5 wide (still with cover) on bend, came to middle of track and finished off evenly closing best of the beaten brigade.
Even jump, posted 6 wide without cover from outside alley, always doing it tough 3 to 4Ls back, improved to be nearest turning in, effort told and found zero when asked in straight.
Slow to begin, pushed up to take a spot 2 wide 4Ls back in midfield, received a back check at 700 M and lost valuable ground, never recovered and not a factor thereafter.
Led, but commenced to weaken at the business end.
Parked behind the leader on the rails, hit the front approaching the 300 M, but peaked on its run close to the line.
Travelled slightly worse than midfield, but was caught wide and without cover, tired quickly in the straight.
Raced outside the leader, but faded inside the 400 M.
Settled behind midfield the fence, never likely.
Crowded at the start and raced back near the tailenders, never ran on.
Raced in a rearward position, 1 off with cover, battled away in the run home.
Steadied early and raced at the rear of the field, 3 to 4 wide with cover, dour in the run home.
Positioned behind midfield, 2 deep with cover, eased out turning for home, ran on fairly.
Settled 3 back along the fence, rolled outwards in the early part of the straight and worked to the line strongly.
Sat 1 out 1 back, had every chance but failed to go on.
Raced in last position, kept to the inside throughout, to close off strongly.
Raced 3 pairs back, 1 off with cover gave ground approaching the 400 M.
Caught 3 wide without cover, behind midfield, stayed on reasonably.
