Ridden out of the gates and took the lead. Maintained a slight advantage into home straight and was headed near 200 M. Unable to find extra to remain in contention thereafter.
Unable to find early speed and gradually dropped behind midfield. Towards the rear turning for home and did not pick up in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly but soon progressed to be racing 2-wide behind the leaders. Kept on evenly in the straight but unable to gain ground final stages.
3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken after straightening and kept on same pace to the line.
3-wide better than midfield. No more than 3Ls off the leader making the turn and attempted to challenge for the lead after straightening. Unable to keep pace and weakened final 300 M.
Settled in a prominent position behind the race leader. Quickened when asked 300 M out and took the lead at 200 M. Kept on well final stages to deny rival.
Midfield or better. 2Ls back on the rails making home turn. Kept on well final stages to grab a minor placing.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Checked near 1000 M and lost a bit of ground. 4 to 5Ls off the leader turning for home. Kept on evenly in the straight and made up some ground.
Jumped well from a wide draw and travelled alongside the leader until home straight. Took the lead briefly near 200 M but unable to match strides with winner in the final stages.
Jumped well and was taken back to the rear. 3-wide and trailed field into home straight. Mounted a strong rally and was closest at finish.
Off slowly and raced greenly in a rearward position. Remained towards the rear on straightening and made up ground in the straight.
Off slowly and raced on fence in a rearward position. Ran on fairly and made up ground in the straight.
Behind the pacesetters early. Steadied and dropped to midfield near 1000 M. Continued fairly but unable to gain ground in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Lacked a response when asked turning for home and remained on at same pace in the straight.
Soon 8Ls off pace in rear, made headway to move 5Ls off speed in 9th at the half-mile, all out to maintain this proximity taking final bend, weakened out.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at 1400 M, driven along to take closer order on straightening for home, troubled very few.
Always travelling well, disputed early lead on fence, held the box seat from 1400 M to home turn, switched out to lead over 100 M out, all out to barely get home.
Slow start, over-raced and green throughout, 6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1300 M, 4-wide and 5Ls back in 10th turning for home, no impression.
1L back in 2nd out 2-wide at 1600 M, always well there and a neck 2nd at top of straight, led 250 M out, headed over 100 M out but fought back gamely, missed by a nose.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th a mile out, same margin behind when 4-wide turning for home, still with place chances at 200 M but lost momentum nearer the line.
Slowest away and under pressure early on, about 10Ls last at halfway, still last when 6Ls down turning for home, kept on well inside closing stages to take 4th.
Nicely placed 3-back the fence no worse than 4Ls off pace in midfield until home turn, given every chance to place but lacked a turn of foot.
Restrained in rear bunch about 8Ls off pace at 1600 M, still well behind taking final bend, made no ground down the centre of track.
6Ls off pace out 2-wide at halfway in 8th place, headway out 3-wide with cover from 1000 M, forced out 5-wide off home turn when 2Ls back in mid-division, one-paced on run-in.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, within 1L or 2Ls of the speed in 3rd or 4th until the final turn, soon emptied out and eased down passing the 200 M.
Hard pressed early on to lead on fence at 1600 M, slowed the tempo down the back, headed about 250 M out but well positioned enough to still grab a place.
Away well and disputing early pace, 2-wide and 1L back in 3rd at 800 M, lost position on the circle and slipped 4Ls back to 6th off final bend, faded further in straight.
About 11Ls off pace at 1200 M in rear, under pressure and 8Ls down at back of main group making home turn, stayed there.
Poor debut, slowly away and never on terms, 10Ls off pace at 1200 M and much the same turning for home, soon with no hope.
Nice spot 2-wide and 4Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, made headway 3-wide with cover a neck off pace at 800 M, led at top of homestretch but headed at 200 M, tired late and missed a place.
Slowest away, in last about 12Ls back at 1400 M, 7Ls back in 10th at top of homestretch, made some minor late ground, nearest at finish.
At the back of main group 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, caught 3 and 4-wide no cover down the back, became detached on straightening, unacceptable performance.
3-back on fence about 5Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 5th taking home bend, opted for inside run at 200 M, stayed on well for 2nd but had little hope catching winner.
6Ls back in 7th at 1200 M but wide, without cover 4 wide at 600 M when 2Ls back in 5th, all out to keep within 1L of the speed at the 200 M, gave ground closer to the line.
Away well and prominent early out 2-wide, drifted 2Ls back in 6th at halfway, lost position on the circle, 4-wide and 5Ls back in mid-division taking final turn, continued to lose ground.
Over-raced when 8Ls back in 9th at 1200 M, let stride on to be 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, 5-wide turning for home about 6Ls behind, never likely to place.
Messy start, 4-back the fence in 8th about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, ridden along to be 5Ls back in midfield on straightening, responded well late to steal a place.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide at 1400 M, led on fence setting a good clip down the back, headed at top of home straight and folded inside final 200 M.
Held the box-seat position 1400 M out and enjoyed a nice trail behind strong pace until home turn, switched out to lead 200 M out, pushed clear and eased close home, track record.
Pushed to get across the rail and led by 0.5L, under pressure throughout, raced against the strong head wind and harmed by the fast pace, hung on until 200 M flattened.
Eased at start to get across towards the rear, 7Ls off the leader with cover, 2 wide, helped by the fast pace, blocked 400 M, progressed steadily when clear to finish 3rd without threat.
Pushed early, 2.5Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3 wide throughout, soon weakened 400 M.
Hard ridden to pressure outside the leaders and trapped 3 wide throughout, raced against the strong head wind and harmed by the fast pace, faded quickly 500 M.
Bumped start, settled about midfield without cover, raced against the strong head wind, 4Ls behind the fast pace, trapped 3 wide, no dash, weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 5.5Ls off pace along the fence, helped by the fast tempo but blocked most straight, made late ground last 100 M.
No cover early, eased to occupy the box seat, raced keenly, not suited by the fast tempo, run ended 200 M.
Eased back, soon got cover, 5.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily over last 300 M to win.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls behind the leader with cover 2 wide, favoured by the fast pace, blocked 4-2, lacked turn of foot when clear, just ran on OK.
Slow away and bumped, pushed forward but trapped 4-5 wide and lost too much ground, 1.5Ls behind the leader, raced against the strong head wind and harmed by the fast pace, dropped off rapidly 600 M.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 4Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M, led 200 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Settled 2Ls off the fast pace 2 wide with cover, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Pushed forward as usual and pressured outside the leader throughout, raced against the strong wind and harmed by the fast pace, ran on until 250 M, weakened.
With leaders early. Took up running 800 M out. Led until dropping out tamely 200 M out.
Slowly away. Remained in rear of field to straight. Finished off race well. Did best work at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early. Checked on rails coming out of back straight. Gradually recovered to midfield turning in. Improving when hampered 200 M out. Made no further impression.
Ridden to hold place early, settling in one out one back position rounding home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Began well from widest draw. Ridden along and raced very wide in prominent position far side before crossing to settle outside leader rounding home bend. Folded up quickly over 200 M out.
Began well from poor draw. Amongst leaders early before settling just off the pace. Travelled 3-wide in 5th within 2Ls of pace rounding home bend and dropped out into straight. (Saddle shifted.)
Never far off, settling one back on rails within 2Ls of pace. Responded well to take charge over 200 M out and hung on well to the line.
Travelled mostly behind midfield to straight. Driven to challenge upon straightening but could only run on steadily without threatening.
Jumped fairly. Ridden along in close-up position 2 wide far side before checked coming onto home bend, dropping to midfield. Remained same turning in and ran home one-paced.
Ridden along but lacked pace of leaders early, settling for midfield position. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight without threatening.
Slowly away. Trailed the field throughout virtually.
In last few. Switched widest into straight. Made up good ground down centre of straight without threatening.
Even jump out, raced towards standside with cover 3-4Ls back, steadily progressed through pack from halfway point, couldn't match first few last 300 M and just stayed on evenly in run to line.
Began nicely, showed usual speed to be 1L behind first few towards middle, under pressure soon after midpoint, found little when asked at dropped out noticeably last 200 M.
Out nicely, settled 2Ls back in centre of course, 4Ls down in midfield by midpoint, didn't find another gear when asked and only concluded things with a standard effort holding ground to line.

Away in line, soon prominent towards stand side, always on bridle just off lead, put in a challenge to lead at 300 M, accelerated nicely to score another strong win. Set course record (strong tail wind).
Ordinary beginning, settled 3Ls behind on standside, under pressure at halfway mark, didn't respond to hard riding at 400 M and gave in weakly in run to line to be well beaten.
A little awkwardly away, kicked up to settle behind front line 3 back in pack, always struggling to go the speed, found little when pressured and just plodded in run to line.
Away well enough, raced behind them in middle of course, 4Ls down a midpoint and struggling with the tempo, gradually faded out of it late.
Showed customary speed from outset, shared lead flying solo down inside rail, kept in there to be 1L down at 400 M, lost place at 200 M but held on well to make frame.
Average jumpout, crowded and raced at tail 5-6Ls away, never really comfortable and inconvenienced by outside horse throughout, not able to respond at business end and did little in finish.

Slow to begin, crossed in behind to trail 4Ls back in centre of course, in open running from 500 M, made ground steadily under hands and heels only, never really threatened but a promising debut nonetheless.
Reasonably away, held a prominent spot on stand side, shared front with eventual winner at midpoint, lost touch when speed increased from 300 M, run came to an end last furlong and weakened out.
Bounced out, lead them up by midpoint in centre of track, travelled well throughout, kicked hard at 300 M, lost front at 100 M but held on bravely running winner to a length in very fast time.
Ordinary break, settled at rear 5 to 6Ls back towards outside, always struggling to keep there, hung in throughout, managed to pass a few tired runners late but never really likely to figure.
Began well, sat just off them on standside rail, 2-3Ls back by midpoint, steadied before switching into clear at 400 M, stuck to task well in run to line doing best work late.
Never seen with a chance despite making some late progress past beaten horses in the straight while hanging in.
Always well there. Unable to quicken to threaten inside final 200 M and only kept on steadily to the line.
Sluggish at start, soon dropped to last and always struggling at the back.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on before finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Did not jump well. Travelled well back. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Travelled in midfield on rails to straight. 6th turning in. Kept on well to the line.
Attempted to make all. Only overhauled inside final 200 M.
Travelled in 2L 4th 2 wide most of way to straight. Came under pressure upon straightening but unable to quicken to threaten.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention upon straightening.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Never better than midfield, but kept on steadily to the line.
Slightly slow out. Travelled behind midfield. Similar turning for home. Shifted out for a clear run shortly and finished off race strongly inside final 200 M.
Travelled in 5th just better than midfield. Quickened well to hit front passing 200 M and fought on well to defy runner-up's strong late burst of speed.

Began with them, landed the box seat 1 out 3Ls back, had a nice run and travelled kindly to bend, switched out on turning in, took over passing 250 M, went on with job to hol challengers off in good style. (See Racing Incidents.)

Lacked dash from outset, settled behind midfield on the rails 7Ls off front runners, well back in 10th on turning weaved through pack switching right out in straight, kept closing to be nearest on the line.
No dash from gates, restrained to rear 3 wide 9Ls off leaders, tracked evenly on bend and switched 4 wide turning in, lacked a response when pressured a simply trailed field in straight.

Even jump, showed plenty of toe soon after to press on and take up running, kept on at an even tempo 1L clear in front, held some advantage turning in, found nothing under pressure and dropped out tamely.

Began in line, drifted back from an awkward alley, ended up next to last 2 wide 10Ls from them, still had field to pass on bend, wound up last 300 M and passed a few horses despite shifting out. Did best work late.

Began with first few, pushed on and landed leaders back, had a cheap trip and right there 1L back leaving circle, pushed along turning in, didn't get much room early on in straight but closed only fairly when clear.

Average jump and bumped early, regathered and ended up in midfield running line 5Ls away, had a good sit before easing out on turning, steadily improved just peaking on run at 100 M and lost a place late.
Bounced out, held leaders back but unable to keep spot, raced 4Ls back on rails thereafter, saved ground on bend and 2-3Ls back turning in, stuck on at 1 pace when running presented and faded late.

Moderate jumpout, recovered to hold a midfield role 5Ls back on rails, had a quiet trip and saved ground to bend, pushed into clear and made run with placegetters, run closed at 100 M and just stuck on fairly thereafter.

Awkwardly away, soon in rearward division on rails, didn't use much racing 10Ls off leaders throughout, well back with field to beat on bend, switched to inside and made some ground but set too great a task.

Lost ground at start when bumped, overraced when setting down behind midfield, raced 8Ls back in 2 wide line, in traffic on turning, in clear from 300 M but failed to run on just plugging steadily to line.
Well enough to leave gates, pressed on to race outside of leader, raced 1L back with even tempo, crept closer on bend, made run at 300 M but couldn't find extra gear and run ended final furlong.

Out evenly but took a hold from a wide alley, forced to settle in midfield without cover 4-5Ls back 3 wide, did work to bend and still 4Ls down at 400 M, steadily improved to be right in mix at 200 M, found winner too good.
Lacked speed as usual, posted 3 wide behind midfield, 6Ls off lead, had a good trail into race but still 5Ls back 9th turning in, came to middle and closed race off well to steal 3rd late.
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped inside final 100 M.
Ridden along early to hold prominent position, mostly in 4th in one out one back position to straight. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to draw level the length of straight.
Mostly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Plugged on at the one pace under pressure.
Behind midfield early soon picked up to forward of midfield in back straight. Improved to close-up 5th some 2Ls off turning in. Could only keep on at the one pace in the run home.
Broke well settling one back on rails within 2Ls of pace. In box seat early in straight before obtaining split over 150 M out. Responded well to assert late.
Broke well from poor draw, settling wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Raced outside leader throughout, but failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Travelled in last few to straight. Snuck up along rails in straight. Did best work at finish.
Raced wide at the back throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Broke well and close up early, dropping to midfield 4-wide going up Rock. Renewed effort shortly after straightening and fought on to be nearest at finish.
In forward of midfield when steadied and lost ground 800 M out. Remained behind midfield turning in. Found nothing under pressure.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Remained in rear to straight. Never nearer.
Travelled wide and without cover throughout, whilst racing handy to the leaders, finished off only fairly.
Raced in 2nd last position, 1 off with cover, ran on soundly in the straight.
Positioned close to midfield, 1 off with cover, kept on at the same pace.
No speed from outset. Raced in last position until the 400 M, made some late headway.
Tracked the leader on the rail, was a beaten horse turning for home.
Made the speed at a good clip, faded inside the 100 M.
Raced midfield, along the fence, never threatened.
Raced off the pace, 2-deep, had every chance.
Settled 3rd last, 2-deep with cover, finished off strongly.
Settled just off midfield the fence, held up until the 200 M, got to the line soundly.
Raced back in the field, along the fence, struggled in the run home.
Raced back in the field 2-wide, shifted after the 900 M into a 3-wide trailing position midfield. Swung wide turning for home and finished well to score a narrow victory.
Raced on fence at midfield. 2Ls down turning for home and ran on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Outpaced early and gradually dropped to the back. Detached rounding home turn and finished tailed out.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Quickened in the final 200 M and rallied late to gun down rival at the line.
Found good early speed and raced in the lead. Challenged turning for home but lacked the needed response in the straight. Faded gradually. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken in the home straight.
Crowded to a rearward position shortly after start. Remained towards rear and swung wide turning for home. Rallied home strongly and was closest at finish.
Jumped fairly from widest draw and was niggled to race alongside the leader. Took the lead shortly after straightening but didn't have enough to hold off rivals in the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back. Remained in rear section home turn and ran past tired runners in the straight.
2-wide and niggled along to keep pace behind leaders back straight. Unable to quicken in the home straight and remained on same pace to the line.
Settled prominently behind the leader. Switched out to make a run on straightening and took lead final 100 M. Just failed to hold off the late charging winner.
3-wide and niggled along to keep pace behind the leaders. Remained 3-wide no cover making home turn and weakened in the straight.
Off slowly and raced along the rails in a rearward spot. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and closed the race off nicely.
Driven to lead on fence at 1300 M, about 1L clear from 800 M to home turn, skipped 2Ls ahead at the 200 M and always in charge.
1L off pace in 3rd early on, settled about 2Ls or 3Ls back out 2-wide in 4th from 800 M to home straight, found nothing off the bit.
Bumped rail and unbalanced at 1300 M when about 9Ls back in rear, about 6Ls back in 10th off final turn, made minor late ground along the inner to be nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide no cover down the back straight in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed, 4-wide off final turn when hard ridden, dropped out sharply.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 9th or so at 1000 M and similarly placed turning for home, switched right into clear running at 250 M but made no inroads.
Always outpaced, in the rear bunch and no better than 7Ls from the front at any stage.
Never travelled well, close enough early when 3Ls pace in 5th with cover, came under pressure at 500 M and giving ground off final turn, faded further.
3-wide no cover early on and pressed on to go 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, hard pressed to maintain this position off home turn and petered out.
Box run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home turn, given every hope of at least a place but lacked the turn of foot.
Driven along early to hold a 3-back on fence position about 4Ls off pace in 6th, about 3Ls back in 5th off final bend, no chance with winner but stayed on okay for 2nd.
Dropped out 10Ls last at the 1000 M, about 8Ls last swinging for home, ran on past a few late to be nearest at the line.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, edged a little closer going well taking home turn, every chance of running 2nd but was outstayed by CHINOOK.
Keen at 1000 M behind the jogging pace when 3-wide with cover 4Ls off pace in midfield, similarly positioned taking final bend, kept on down centre of track without troubling principals.
Crossed from widest gate to lead on fence at 1300 M by 1L, set very slow tempo and still clear by a neck off final turn, headed at 200 M and just hung on for a place.
6Ls back in 10th out 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure to make some ground despite the slow pace at 500 M, never dangerous.
Held 2nd out 2-wide about 1L off pace at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd off home turn and led at 200 M, only caught inside final strides.
Awkward break and raced too keenly behind slow pace at 1000 M when 5th about 3Ls off pace, still close up on straightening but always outpaced by those in front.
8Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, had little hope with the cantering tempo, never landed a blow.
Good effort despite being 3-wide no cover from the 1000 M, regardless of the slow pace, 2Ls back out deep in 3rd or 4th until the homestretch, kept finding for pressure to lead final strides.
Couldn't lead and soon 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield, tempo of race and inability to lead compromised his chances.
Switched from wide gate to fence but soon over-raced behind slow tempo, always about 6Ls from the lead and never got into it.
Keen early on when 4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace, stuck in the same spot taking final bend and made no impression.
Mostly midfield, 3-wide with cover 3Ls back in 6th down backstretch, same turning for home, outsprinted by those in front once the tempo quickened.
Flew the start, handed up to hold box position 2Ls off pace on fence from 1300 M to home turn, in the right position to at least place but lacked acceleration.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made ground 250 M to run a minor 3rd.
Eased to sit 1-1/5Ls behind the good pace early, box seat along the fence, however lost ground 600 M, lacked room on straightening, ran on well to the line.
Slowly away, hard ridden to sit just better than midfield, 2-1/2Ls behind the good pace, lost ground 600 M, trapped 3-wide and covered too much ground, ran on well to the line.
Hard ridden throughout but failed to get across, 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Hard ridden to get across to the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at good pace, pressured throughout but never threatened in home straight, made all.
Slowly away, outpaced in second last, 7Ls off the good pace 2-wide, swept 4-wide on straightening and lost ground, dashed well 200 M and closed the race off remarkably.
Slowly away, more than 9Ls off the good pace at the tail, helped by the rails-run but ran on fairly in straight.
Pushed early, just worse than midfield, 5Ls off the good pace along the fence, made up some ground in straight.
Hard ridden to get across 2-wide 1-1/2Ls off the good pace, ran on well in final stages to finish 2nd but no threat to the winner.
Lacked early speed, soon dropped back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, no progress in final stages.
Hard ridden throughout, just managed to keep up in midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3-wide and covered too much ground, no turn of foot in straight.
Slowly away. Quickly picked up to race mainly 3-wide towards rear. Similar turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in 5th in midfield. Close up turning in but baulked momentarily. Fought on well under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in and ran on to assert authority over 100 M out.
Settled in midfield. Lost position 400 M out in home bend. Kept on at the one pace in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Travelled in last few. Snuck up to midfield saving ground on rails turning in. Briefly tightened 300 M out. Sustained headway down straight but did not have too much clear running closing stages.
Travelled one out one back in 2nd to straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Slightly slow out. Always in last few.
Chased leader one back in 3rd on rails. Gained 2nd position under pressure turning in but unable to sustain effort 150 M out.
Raced in behind midfield to straight. Weakened. (Heart irregularity and blood in trachea.)
Always struggling in last few and never seen with a chance.
Soon took up running and led field until overhauled over 100 M out.

Average getaway, taken down to rails to race behind midfield 6Ls away, had a quiet time in mid-section, back in traffic on bend and had no clear running to near 100 M, finished hard when clear. Unlucky not to be placed.

Even jump, had enough pace to hold a spot on rails behind lead group, switched out and raced 2 to 3-wide 4Ls back, had no cover from mid-point and worked hard to be 2Ls down on bend, flat out turning and faded when run ended at 100 M.
Lacked pace from outside and was restrained from a wide alley, lobbed along at rear 2-wide 8Ls back, still trailed passing rock, swung 5-wide turning in, made up plenty of ground from too far back.

Slowly into stride, drifted back to rear, settled 8Ls back on rails but made good ground to be 3 to 4Ls down at mid-point, tracked well on bend and gained dream split at 150 M, dashed nicely to lead at 100 M and hold them well.

Began nicely, assumed a forward role as expected, had ideal run in 2-wide line 3 to 4Ls off pace, in pocket 2Ls down turning, clear run presented but only closed at same speed sticking on soundly to line.

Average beginning, crossed to rearward spot from a wide alley, tracked 3-wide 8Ls down in mid-section, came 4-wide past Rock, switched out in straight but finished at same speed making little progress last 200 M.

Ordinary getaway and failed to muster, ended up further back than expected 3 to 4-wide midfield 6Ls back, kept making ground 4-wide without cover, 2-3Ls back under pressure on turn, couldn't go on when workload took toll and dropped out

Away in line, taken hold of to slot into running line in midfield, raced 5Ls off pace in 7th, didn't seem comfortable in going, made a 3-wide run past Rock, close enough at 200 M but produced a one-paced finish.
Began with first few, held a spot behind the leader on rails, had a reasonable trip 2Ls away, saved ground on bend under pressure turning but found little and dropped right out late.

Moderate getaway, raced 2-wide behind midfield, had an easy time 6 to 8Ls back throughout, still well back and in traffic on bend, held up after turning in but closed hard when clear last 150 M. Should be closer.

Away well, mustered plenty of dash to cross them by first bend, kept on at a decent clip early before backing off at mid-point, dictated to be 1L clear entering straight, fought to 100 M but run ended late.

First into stride, engaged in battle for front, ended up outside leader 1L back, did share of work facing breeze, had pressure on rounding bend, found little when asked and weakened tamely. (Blood in trachea.)
Moderate jump out, planted in midfield 2 wide 5Ls back from a wide alley, back in 7th on bend and tracked evenly turning, kept to task but never looked a threat making minor ground in stretch.

First to hit ground, raced more prominently and relaxed appreciably, had 1 out 1 back sweet seat in mid-section, 2Ls down turning, switched out and stuck to task gamely to take plenty of ground off winner despite being well held.

Awkwardly away, settled in rear division, shared rear of bunch 2 wide 8Ls back on circle, appeared green and inexperienced running about turning in, didn't produce any sprint in run home just battling to the line.

Even jumpout, didn't have early pace, raced behind midfield 7 to 8Ls back, travelled unkindly in mid-section and came 3 wide on circle, well back on bend, didn't lose ground in straight but never likely to figure.

Away better than most, ended up in running line in 2 wide line 4Ls back, over-raced a touch in mid-section, came to middle holding 5th off turn, steadily made ground in straight without threatening to make frame.
Out with them, taken to rails and ended up 3 back on the fence, had a quiet trip 3 to 4Ls back, saved ground to bend, didn't produce a dash in straight and just struggled at same speed last 300 M.
Reasonable beginning, secured a spot off midfield on rails 7Ls from lead, kept to fence on bend, had job to do on turning, found little when placed under pressure and plodded to line.
Began in line, rushed forward from a wide alley to camp outside the leader, a shade keen in mid-section, right there 1L down on turn, condition gave out at 200 M and weakened late. Better for run.
Bounced out but lacked the dash to hold a spot, shared rear on rails 8Ls off leaders, always well back and not asked until turning in, passed a few tired ones in straight but still beaten a long way.
Slowly away, couldn't keep up from the outset, 15Ls back by midpoint, lost further ground to bend and never in it. Clearly not there yet.

Away nicely, lead them easily, controlled the race from the outset, had an easy time to bend, held a 1 length break turning in, put foot down and kept a decent break for length of straight to score a comfortable win.

Moderate beginning, recovered to hold leaders back, had easy time on rails 1 to 2Ls back, tracked nicely to bend, couldn't sprint with more experienced rivals but kept on soundly for a clear 3rd. Useful debut.
Not the best to begin and always near the rear, never better than 8Ls from the leader.
Sat 3 deep, no cover, 1L back from the leader, gave ground inside the 150 M.
Covered ground midfield with cover, 3 deep, never loomed a threat.
Parked behind the leaders, on the fence, tired quickly after the 250 M.
Raced midfield along the fence, held up for most of the straight, not ridden out over last 50 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled close to midfield, 1 off with cover, took inside options in the straight. Finished off satisfactorily.
Failed to muster speed despite being ridden along and settled well back. Worked to the line well.
Began awkwardly and blundered, showed good speed to take up lead after the 1000 M, always 1 off no cover, dropped out in the straight.
Travelled wide and without cover in a midfield position, ran on soundly considering the trip.

From an inside draw, showed good gate speed to lead. Held inside running and allowed another runner to improve 3/4 of a length to its outside after the 1000 M, accelerated well in the straight and eased down close to home for strong win.
Raced 3 deep with cover, handy to the leaders, one paced over the concluding stages.
Raced 1 out, 1 back, had every chance.
Detached from the field throughout. To trial.
Settled at midfield. Made a strong closing run in the straight and was nearest at finish.
Jumped only fairly and hard ridden to take the lead. Maintained a length's advantage until final 300 M but unable to find more to hold off the top pair final stages.
Dropped to the back from an outside draw and trailed field into home straight. Staged a late rally and was closest at finish.
Blundered on jumping. Raced on the rails behind midfield. Stayed on same pace in the straight.
Best out but was eased back. Settled 3Ls behind the pace making the turn. Travelled nicely after straightening, cruised to the lead at 200 M and won easily without being tested.
Ridden along to be among leaders early stages. 2-wide and a length off the pace making the turn. Unable to keep pace final 300 M and faded out of contention.
Failed to find early speed. Raced on the rails in a rearward position. Near last on straightening, unable to quicken and never threatened.

Led briefly in the early stages. Took a sit behind the leader 900 M out. Remained behind the leader on straightening. Lacked a quickening pace after switching out and kept on at same pace to the line.
Got its head up and lost ground after jumping. Raced in a rearward position before gaining ground in a 3-wide position making the turn. Kept on fairly and made up ground in the straight.

Better than midfield. Hugged the rails making the turn and was 2Ls off on straightening. Held up 400 M out and took some time to switch out away from traffic. Ran on well final stages and was closest at finish.
Taken back at the start and raced behind midfield. Last few to enter home straight and made up a bit of ground in the straight.
3-wide at midfield. Hung out making the turn and weakened after straightening.
Refused to stretch out once gates opened, didn't want to know about racing and unseated rider.
Soon led on fence, always 1L to 2Ls clear until the 600 M controlling the pace, set alight to go 2Ls clear before top of home straight, tired a little late but always holding a break.
2-wide in 2nd between 1L and 2Ls from the front until the 600 M when niggled slightly, always held thereafter just keeping on at the same pace.
Unsuited by tempo on fence about 4Ls back in 5th (last) down the back, same turning for home when a little short of room, just missed 3rd but outpaced by quinella pair in any case.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls back in 3rd on fence until the 600 M, 3Ls down in 3rd turning for home, stayed on well to briefly threaten the winner but post came too soon.
Too keen early on and tended to hang in throughout, positioned in 4th about 3Ls or 4Ls while 2-wide until straightening, never likely to land a telling blow.
Best away, on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls back in 6th taking home turn, hard ridden among chasing pack at 200 M and stayed on dourly to take 3rd on the line.
Wiped out at the start and immediately with 6Ls to make up, worse than midfield about 4Ls off pace at home turn, never had any room in the straight.
Hindered at the start, always in rear, keen early about 5Ls off pace, checked at 800 M, 6Ls down in 13th turning for home, never on terms.
Unacceptable performance, wiped out a few at the gates and always very wayward towards the rear, detached turning for home. (Bled.)
Never any better than midfield, towards rear about 5Ls behind at 800 M, not much better off taking final turn when under pressure, plugged on past a few tired rivals late.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace at halfway, pressed on to dispute the lead out 3-wide on straightening, headed at 200 M, no extra.
Keen in places and 2Ls back in 5th with cover at 800 M, head up at 600 M but travelling well at 400 M and eased to lead at 200 M, pushed out hands and heels to score easily.
Always caught very wide, about 6Ls from the front early on and headway on the circle to be 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, briefly in midfield at 300 M but faded late.
Disputed pace out 2-wide at 1000 M, about 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls back in 3rd at final turn, one-paced thereafter.
Prominent throughout, 1L back in 3rd at 900 M, sent on to vie for the lead at top of home straight, stayed on at same pace and lost 3rd on the line.
About 4Ls back out wide worse than midfield at 900 M, left without cover on the circle and 4-wide turning for home, never threatened.
Disputed early pace out 3-wide no cover, crossed to lead on fence at 700 M, handed up the advantage before home turn, no further impression.
On fence about 4Ls back in 10th at 800 M and same taking final bend, always chasing at least half the field.
Hampered at start, always hung out, midfield about 4Ls off speed at 1000 M, severely checked at 800 M, closer turning for home, no chance with winner despite fair 2nd, hung badly late.
Hard ridden to get across and keep up in box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, lacked turn of foot in straight, held ground in 2nd until 50 M flattened, just missed 3rd.
Pushed early to secure a spot in midfield, 3.5Ls off the leaders 2 wide, helped by the fast pace, made some ground last 200 M.
Eased back, 7.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, travelled nicely and benefitted by the fast pace, however made no progress in straight.
Eased at start, more than 9Ls behind the leaders at the tail 2 wide, benefitted by the fast pace, made some ground 250 M.
Took up a more prominent spot than usual, always better than midfield, however trapped 3 wide early, 3Ls off the fast pace, crossed the rail at about 700 M, ran on until 100 M flattened.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 1.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, harmed by the very fast early sectionals, held ground in straight and struggled for 3rd.
Midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, however no turn of foot in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and lead, pressured throughout by very fast early sectionals, dropped off 300 M.
Hard ridden to get across in front, developed a pace battle against the leader from 1000 M, drifted away 300 M to go, went on to score well despite not suited by the very fast pace.
Eased to the rear 2 wide, never competitive despite helped by the fast early pace.
Hard ridden early, just worse than midfield 6Ls off the leaders along the fence, helped by the fast tempo but made no progress in straight.
Very slowly away and lost a considerable amount of ground, 8Ls off the fast pace at the back 3 wide, just ran on OK and passed some weakening runners.

Eased to sit worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, travelled comfortably throughout in a fast run race, progressed steadily 300 M to run 2nd with the help of all favourable racing situations.
Travelled mainly just better than midfield. Held 4th about 2Ls off the pace rounding home bend. Commenced move up on straightening and hit front passing 300 M. Held on well to the line.
Settled in midfield on rails. Did not have too much room upon straightening and switched out for a run. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish despite not threatening.
Jumped fairly and ridden for pace. Travelled in one out one back position turning in but soon weakened under pressure.
Hampered at start. Travelled towards rear to straight. Checked upon straightening. Finished off well inside final 200 M.
Gradually picked up along rails to prominent position. Held one back in 3rd on rails rounding home bend and into straight. Soon weakened under pressure.
Towards rear to straight. Battled on dourly to claim 3rd place inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails just behind midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on well under pressure to just fail to get up on line.
Slow out. Travelled at the back. Saved ground on rails turning in. Kept on one pace to finish.
Raced wide in forward of midfield after beginning from wide draw. Lost position coming out of back straight and virtually last turning in. Produced good late impression down centre of straight.
Travelled close up far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Went off the track turning for home. Never recovered. (Mucus in trachea.)
Raced wide in midfield. Quickened into straight to reach 3rd briefly 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well from poor draw, settling wide in forward of midfield. Gave ground gradually into home straight.
Travelled in rear to straight. Kept on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Soon took up running and led to 300 M. Dropped out tamely.
Standard jumpout, trapped 3 wide in midfield from outside alley, raced 3 to 4Ls back with cover on bend, eased 4 wide into straight, found little when asked though and just plodded to line.
Amongst them to leave gates, faced breeze 3 wide 2 to 3Ls back, always working wide to bend, 4th turning in but struggling when pressure went on, extra trip told and weakened out from 200 M.

Moderate to begin, back last 2 wide 4 to 5Ls off pace, travelled well on bend but steadied in traffic and last on turning, found daylight at 250 M and did best work final furlong making many lengths for 2nd.

Ordinary getaway, settled down in last few as expected, held a spot on rails 4 to 5Ls away, improved to be on 3Ls down turning, made run on fence hitting clear at 200 M, took over last 100 M to score with something in hand.
Fast into stride, up sharing lead and challenging on outside, keep tempo genuine in mid-section, 1L down in 2nd turning in, couldn't sprint again and workload took toll losing touch from 300 M point.

Reasonable jump but followed on with customary speed to lead them, set an even tempo with pressure from outside horse, held a 1L break turning, slipped away entering straight and held on to 100 M but collared late when run ended.

Standard to leave gates, settled in midfield 2 wide 3Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section, tracked well on bend but held up in traffic turning, only saw daylight at 200 M, finished soundly when clear to make frame.

Away with rest, ridden along to hold a spot behind leader, had run of race 1 to 2Ls back on trails, tracked well on bend, gap appeared at 400 M but couldn't dash and just plugged on at same clip in run to line.

Began awkwardly, ended up 3 wide in rearward division from an awkward draw, raced with cover 4Ls back on bend, came 4 wide turning and closed off evenly but couldn't wear down margin. Run ended at 150 M.
Well enough to begin, took up coveted 1 out 1 back spot trailing even speed, had ideal run to bend 1 to 2Ls down on turning, eased out and looked a chance but run ended at 200 M.
Very sluggish at start and soon dropped to tail-end. Ran past one approaching home bend. Switched wide into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish. (Lame.)
Midfield far side. Dropped towards rear rounding home bend. Kept on steadily to produce moderate impression late.
Missed the break. Ridden to midfield quickly. Same turning in but baulked for a run. Did not find too much room throughout the straight until late in final few strides.
Raced wide in prominent position. About 2Ls back in 5th rounding home bend. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Travelled in last few to straight. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and soon took up running. Headed coming out of back straight but held rails run in one back position, however, dropped out quickly after turning into home straight.
Trailed the field into straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Not far off in one out one back position. Similar turning in but found nothing inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 250 M.
Travelled wide in midfield. Slightly worse turning in but fought on steadily for 4th.
Jumped fairly and raced mainly 3-wide in prominent position down far side. Took over coming out of back straight and led until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Close up on rails. 4th rounding home bend and into straight. Came to challenge down inner of track shortly after straightening but found winner too strong.
Travelled just better than midfield. Commenced run over 300 M out but responded well to take charge inside 200 M. Won convincingly.

Moderate to begin, further back than expected in rearward division 2 wide 7 to 8Ls back, not helped by moderate tempo still well back to bend, came to middle but only passed tired runners late. (See Racing Incidents.)
Restrained from outset, settled at tail 2 wide 7 to 8Ls back, a little closer 4Ls down in 8th between horses on bend into clear from 300 M but didn't pick up as usual and just battled to line.

Bounced out well, led early before slotting into spot behind leader, had best trip on leaders back with slow speed, right there 1L back leaving bend, cleared traffic at 150 M but could only manage same gear keeping on evenly late.

Away with them, went forward and worked across to be outside leader, refused to settle and overraced throughout 1L back, moved closer on circle, made run with winner but couldn't sprint, held rest off gamely for a 2nd.

Well enough away, settled further back than expected from a wide alley, had cover 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back, harmed by moderate tempo, closed to be 2Ls down off bend, found under pressure and held ground well to make frame.

Out with line, ended up in prime spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls back in 5th, didn't spend anything with slow speed on, close enough turning in, followed them most of straight just lacking the turn of foot to capitalize.

Standard jump, assumed spot behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back 2 to 3 wide, not helped by slow tempo, improved with cover on the bend, 4Ls down coming 4 wide turning, sprinted hard to 200 M and looked a chance but just peaked last 100 M.

Even break, pressed on to sit closer, trapped 3 wide outside first few without cover, not harmed by slow tempo 3Ls back, improved to be 1 to 2Ls back on bend, took over at 400 M, went on to win in good style with something in hand.

Well enough away, in a handy spot 2Ls back on rails, had a quiet time with average speed on, kept to rails saving ground to bend, held up at 300 M, clear last 200 M but couldn't make a real impression when dashed home quickly.

Ordinary getaway, settled around midfield on the rails, had a quiet trip 5Ls back but not assisted by the speed, back behind traffic turning, clear from 300 M, closed off nicely without looking likely to be nearest on line.
Slowly away, settled near rear, raced on rails 7Ls off speed, not set a task in mid stages but disadvantaged by slow tempo, last on turning, failed to run on and struggled to line last furlong.

Fastest out, pushed forward to eventually lead them entering back straight, dictated terms at a modest speed 1L clear on bend, had pressure applied on turning, found little and weakened last 300 M to be beaten easily.
9Ls back in last on fence at 1200 M, tended to over-race also, out wider and still last 6Ls back off final bend, made some minor late ground.
Never any better than midfield, with cover about 6Ls in 11th at 1000 M, similarly placed off final bend, making minor ground when switched out at 150 M, never any danger.
3-wide with cover in midfield 4Ls off early pace, crept closer on the circle to be 1L off pace in 4th while hemming in FUJI SUNRISE at home turn, led 300 M out, always holding a break.
Always among rear bunch, 8Ls back in 12th on fence at 1000 M, one from rear turning for home, never troubled those in front.
Switched from wide gate to race 4-back on fence in 9th or 10th about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home turn, could only run on past a few flagging rivals inside final 200 M.
5Ls off pace with cover in 8th at 1000 M, edged closer about 3Ls down in midfield taking home turn, lacked the dash of quinella pair but ran on well for 3rd.
Awkward break with head up, worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed when 3-wide with cover down backstretch, forced 5-wide turning for home, no menace.
Always over-racing in rear about 8Ls off the speed out 3-wide but with cover, 5Ls back in 11th off final bend, ran on well late for creditable 4th.
Had the box-seat run 2Ls off pace in 4th until home turn, given every chance to quicken up but just too one-paced.
3Ls back in 5th and 2-wide at 1400 M, closer into straight but prevented by EVER BRIGHT from getting out, no clear run until the 300 M, stayed on well late but always just held.
Awkward break, 3-back on the fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1400 M and still nicely placed swinging for home, didn't find much off the bridle and weakened.
Opted to lead but race much too freely while hanging out down the back, headed at top of home straight and beaten when severely checked about 100 M, eased thereafter. (Sore and swollen tendon.)
Always caught 3-wide no cover, prominent throughout and 1L off pace in 3rd at 800 M, a neck down turning for home and still well there at 200 M, faded out late.
Held 2nd place about 1L off pace out 2-wide until the 600 M, briefly led at top of home straight but headed by winner at 300 M, tired a little final 100 M.
Out with rest, took up a spot 4Ls back on outside rail, had an even trip with cover throughout, lacked another gear last 300 M and just kept on at one pace in run to line.
Began reasonably, raced behind them towards middle of track, still 5Ls back at midpoint, ridden along from 400 M but failed to find and dropped out late.
Awkwardly away, raced at tail 7Ls back in middle of track, shifted in and out at midpoint, made some ground to pass tired horses last 300 M but never looked likely.
Bounced out with them, raced in middle of track 4Ls down in midfield, under pressure from 400 M, didn't produce a dash but held ground nevertheless in run to line. Reasonable return after a layoff.
Average getaway, at rear of main bunch 6Ls back towards outside rail, still had plenty to do at 400 M, progressed steadily and warmed up late over what was an insufficient trip.
Checked early, forced to race in rear 6Ls off them on outside rail, made some ground to 400 M, all out to dash again and struggled to line last 200 M.
Away only fairly, mustered to be in middle off pack 4Ls down midway off outside rail, still back in field at 400 M, got going last furlong to do best work late and snatch 2nd.
Showed abundant speed from outset, lead by 3Ls towards outside rail, kept running at a solid tempo, began to weaken as usual passing 200 M, faded last 100 M just holding 3rd.
Began evenly, lead division in middle of track 3Ls off horses on outside rail, 4Ls down at midpoint, began to struggle from 300 M and faded late when condition gave out.
Jumped nicely, sat 3Ls off leader on outside rail, still 2nd at midpoint hanging as usual, made good run from 400 M, hit lead at 100 M, held them well in run to line.

Away with rest, held a spot in midfield towards outside 4 to 5Ls back, improved gradually from the midpoint, looked a place chance at 200 M but just couldn't make up ground at same rate as others. Steadied slightly late.
Checked early and lost ground, raced at tail towards outside rail, raced 7Ls from lead, still well back at 400 M, did best work late and managed to pass a few over last furlong.
Jumped with rest, raced behind midfield towards centre of track, raced greenly 6 to 7Ls back, found little under pressure and only beat weakening runners in finish.
Moderate jump, prominent towards middle of course 3 to 4Ls off lead, there until 300 M but condition gave out and dropped right out of it late.
Crowded at the start and travelled well back, 2 to 3 wide with cover, failed to lengthen in the straight, weakening inside the 200 M.
Parked on the back of the speed, but was 3 wide no cover, no impression over the latter stages.
Settled back in the field along the fence, was steadied near the 300 M, shifted in closed off strongly.
Raced midfield the fence, worked well to the line while taking inside runs.
Raced midfield but was caught 3 to 4 wide no cover, solid effort.
Box seated, but commenced to tire after the 400 M, was checked near the 300 M, and finished well off.
Led, however was overhauled near the 200 M.
Wide for most of the trip, behind midfield, had cover, struggled under pressure.
Chased the leader, 1 off no cover, dropped out after the 400 M.
Just off midfield, 2 deep with cover, never likely.
Settled 1 off, midfield, stayed on one paced in the run home.
Ridden along early and settled just off the pace. Two wide with cover. Hit the front near the 200 M and stayed on soundly.
Settled behind midfield, 1 off with cover, held up for clear running for most of the straight.
Raced in last place, passed a few tired runners in the straight.

Eased back from a wide draw and raced behind midfield in early stages. 3-wide in midfield making home turn. Switched out and quickened nicely on straightening. Opened up a clear advantage final 200 M.

Jumped awkwardly and was taken back. Raced on the rails in rear section. Switched out turning for home and had trouble getting a clear run early part of straight. Rallied late and was closest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. 4-wide turning for home and quickened on straightening. Kept on well and made up ground in the straight.
Led or disputed lead until home straight. Unable to turn up a notch and remained on at same pace to the line.
Niggled along to be in a forward position. 2-wide behind the pace making the turn. Unable to keep pace 300 M out and faded steadily.
Taken back and trailed field. Made a ground saving trip around the turn. Had trouble finding a clear run 300 M out. Made a late dash once finding daylight.
Settled in a rearward position. Trailed field into home straight and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at midfield early stages. Checked at 1400 M. Went forward after 1100 M and joined the lead. Disputed lead into home straight but faded final 200 M.

Settled wide in a rearward position early. Advanced to midfield near 1000 M. Continued to improve in a 4-wide spot making the turn. Took lead near 200 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention final stages.
Among leaders early. Settled behind the pace after 1200 M. Blocked for a run on straightening and was unable to get a clear run for some time. Ran on only fairly in the closing stages.
Behind the pace early stages. Slipped back and was at midfield making the turn. Checked on straightening and kept on only fairly in the straight.
Settled on the rails at midfield. Stuck in traffic in the early part of the straight. Closed the race off strongly once finding a clear run.
Outpaced despite being ridden along and raced 3-wide in rear section. Lacked a response when pressured making the turn and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly then was crowded and lost ground. Raced keenly at midfield early stages. Made up ground 1000 M onwards. 3-wide among leaders turning for home but weakened in the straight.
3-wide with cover in mid-division about 4Ls off pace until home turn, very one-paced thereafter.
Laboured early on, worse than midfield on fence about 6Ls behind at 1000 M, ran on reasonably in the home straight, nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd at 800 M, struggling to lie up at final bend and wilted away.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls off pace in 8th or so at 1000 M, forced 5-wide (widest of all) taking final bend, posed little danger.
3-wide with cover towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, not much better off taking final turn, made only very minor ground and never much of a threat.
Settled in 4th about 3Ls from the pace at 800 M, briefly without clear running room at top of homestretch, well beaten over 200 M out.
Settled in 12th about 8Ls off the pace at 1000 M and still well back making home turn, finished well through the pace but post came a couple of strides too soon.
Towards the rear about 6Ls off pace through first half and niggled along to improve at 600 M, stayed on fairly in homestretch to nick 3rd on line, never nearer.
Over-raced down the back, 4Ls back in 5th at halfway and same turning for home, head up and hung in under pressure and had every chance to at least place.
Midfield on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls back through to home turn, always outpaced.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th or 6th until home turn, kept on one-paced along the inner.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls from leader in 2nd or 3rd until home turn, had every opportunity to at least place, relegated to 4th on the line.
Restrained in last place about 9Ls from the front at 1000 M, still last swinging for home, made some fair late ground, nearest at finish.
Pushed along to take early lead by 1L on fence, clear by 2Ls off final turn and same at 200 M, tied up in closing stages and all out to just hang on.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace until the 800 M, not any closer and forced 5-wide off final bend, never dangerous.
Nicely place din 'one-out, one-back' position within 2Ls of pace until home turn when under pressure, always outpaced by those in front.
Slowly away, 4-back on fence in 7th at 1200 M when 5Ls off pace, under pressure to lie up turning for home, very one-paced on the run-in.
Led on fence early on, set a very steady pace, about half a length clear until home turn, kept on at the same pace and tipped out on a place on the line.
Switched off about 11Ls last at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 12th taking home turn, made up some late ground, never nearer.
Always well back in rear behind the steady pace, never really got involved.
Ideally placed on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd until the turn, had every chance to overhaul ELEPHANT DANCE but just lacked the gears.
Slow to begin, 2-wide in 11th about 8Ls off pace at halfway, still well back making final turn, made only very minor late headway.
4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at midpoint of race, 4-wide turning for home, didn't have very much running room in the finish, unclear whether he would have finished much closer.
Keen behind the steady pace, pressed on out 3-wide no cover at 1000 M and 2Ls down in 4th turning for home, tired inside closing stages.
Always very prominent, half a length back in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, led at top of homestretch, always clinging on, won gamely.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in 6th at halfway, hard ridden to get closer on straightening, stayed on dourly, never nearer.
Settled about 10th early on, 3-wide with cover 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M, further headway but 5-wide turning for home, kept on at same pace.
Hard ridden to obtain a more prominent spot, 3Ls off the fast pace 2 wide, made ground 250 M for 3rd.
Bumped start, steadily strode forward, raced 1.5Ls off the leader but trapped 3 wide throughout and harmed by the fast pace, flattened 250 M.
Eased at start to get across 2 wide behind the field, 6Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace but never progressed.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field along the fence, 7.5Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, dashed well 400 M until 200 M totally blocked and on heels. Not tested thereafter.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3.5Ls off the pace along the rail, helped by the fast tempo, however blocked most straight and checked 250 M, ran on well to the line.
Trapped 3 wide about midfield throughout, dropped off quickly 500 M.
Eased back, 7.5Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast pace but trapped 3 wide, blocked 400 M, progressed steadily when clear.
Eased back as usual, 6Ls behind the leader 3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, made ground from 300 M but run ended 100 M.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, drifted away 400 M, hung on until 150 M overhauled and emptied.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M, led 150 M, hung on to win.
Eased to sit worse than midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leader, benefitted by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M.
Settled 1L off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the fast pace, ran on until 100 M, flattened.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, progressed steadily in straight to finish a close 2nd.
Eased to the rear, more than 9Ls behind the leader 2 to 3 wide, benefitted by the fast pace, made ground late last 200 M.
Travelled 2-wide in midfield. Quickened to challenge inside final 300 M but found winner too strong.
Broke well to lead from wide draw gradually crossing to rails. Led to 300 M and swamped for a placing inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails behind midfield. Only kept on at the one pace down inner of straight in the run home.
Travelled in rear to straight. Produced good late impression running on between runners inside final 200 M.
Midfield early. Quickly moved up to 4th within 2Ls of pace. 5th rounding home bend and into home straight. Kept on under pressure before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Held up in one back position on rails. In similar position in 4th to straight. Soon folded up quickly.
Sluggish under pressure early, eventually picked up to midfield 3-wide. Lost position slightly when wide rounding home bend. Only kept on steadily without making up on the lost ground.
Settled at the back. Finished off race well down centre of track inside final 300 M.
Settled behind midfield. Obtained a run over 200 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in last few. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Gradually weakened after straightening.

Did not jump well and steadied. Soon picked up along rails to forward of midfield. Tight between runners early in straight before obtaining split over 200 M out. Finished off race well to snatch victory close to home.
Broke well, settling one out one back. Same turning in but faded gradually.

Raced wide far side and behind midfield early. Made swift progress to reach prominent position coming out of back straight. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out only to be collared final few strides.

Began fairly, held a midfield role 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, had a nice run behind a solid speed, in between horses turning and into clear passing 300 M, didn't finish off with usual burst and was one paced from 200 M when run ended.
Average jump, restrained to rear, raced 10Ls back on rails, helped but the fast tempo, eased 3 wide on bend, still last at 300 M, came to middle and closed race off nicely to be closest on line.

Fastest into stride, showed plenty of toe to lead them early, headed by outside horse who pressured throughout, maintained rails on bend despite fast pace, kicked back to regain lead and held on for 2nd before being demoted.

Out with rest, rushed up to look for front, hit lead but couldn't find rail, kept pressure on at a good speed and drew 3 to 4Ls clear on bend, led turning in, early burn took effect and stopped quickly from 200 M.

Average getaway, back running 2nd last 9Ls off pace, given a quiet time and still well back on bend, helped by fast pace, in traffic and shifted out at 300 M, came with a strong run to be nearest on line. (Promoted from 3rd.)

Showed good pace from outset, held spot behind leaders on rails, raced 2 to 3Ls back and had run of race to bend, under pressure but without a run to 200 M, found little when in clear and weakened last 100 M.

Out in line, restrained from outside gate, settled down in last few 8Ls back in 2 wide line, appreciated fast pace, came to middle turning in, produced a big finish to hit lead at 100 M and hold off challengers despite running about.

Out with rest but soon restrained from a wide alley to sit behind midfield, raced on rails 5 to 6Ls back, had a quiet run to bend, no clear running 400 - 200 M, closed race off well when clear to be nearest on line.
Average beginning, pressed on 3 wide in midfield, raced 3Ls down with cover on bend, close enough on turning in but couldn't find when workload took toll and just battled in run to line.

Amongst first few to begin, couldn't hold spot and lost ground to be 4Ls back on rails, saved ground on bend, didn't have much room early in straight but effort was devoid of acceleration from 250 M. Just battled.

Even getaway, couldn't slot in and ended up 3 wide 4 to 5Ls away in midfield, had cover on circle, 3Ls down and into clear from 400 M, steadied slightly at 250 M but didn't finish race off final furlong.

Reasonable jumpout, took a midfield trail, raced 2 wide 4Ls back, tracked nicely on bend between horses, made a strong run from 250 M and set to be right in finish before being badly checked at 150 M. (Promoted from 3rd.)

Began reasonably well, pressed on from a wide alley 5 deep early, raced 4 wide 2Ls back without cover (hanging on bend), came to middle 1L down turning, was a spent force at 300 M and weakened tamely.

Standard jump, ridden up to go forward 3 and 4 wide, raced 3 wide 2Ls back without cover, did share of work to bend with speed on, still there to 200 M but hard run took effect and dropped off sharply late.
Settled in last few. Wide rounding home bend and into straight. Produced good late impression down centre inside final 200 M.
Travelled in rear to straight. No clear running until over 200 M out. Made some late progress.
Travelled just behind midfield. Badly hampered coming out of back straight. Never recovered. (Heart irregularity.)
Soon ridden to lead. Held running to 150 M out. Just plugged on for 4th.
Settled at the back. Made some effort turning in. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Broke well then travelled wide just better than midfield. Kept on before dropping out quickly passing 300 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Hampered and lost at least a length approaching 800 M. Recovered to midfield turning in and finished off well inside final 300 M to gain upper hand final strides.
Never far off in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Ran on alongside winner but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Raced wide in midfield before checked and lost position about 800 M out. Recovered to midfield turning in but did not find much room under pressure 200 M out, then badly weakened.
Travelled one out one back to straight. Dropped quickly out of contention after straightening.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Closer turning in but no clear run. Able to shift out into the clear 200 M out and ran on well to just fail to get up on line.
Chased leader on rails in 3rd. Only kept on steadily without threatening in straight.

Very slowly away. Gradually picked up to rear of midfield before home bend. Saved ground on rails turning in. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced moderate impression under pressure late.
Jumped best from widest draw then restrained to drop back to rear of field. Trailed the field rounding home bend and into straight. Made no impression in the run home.

Bounced out, taken back from wide alley, to sit 2 wide 6 to 7Ls back, helped by solid speed on, eased 3 deep with cover on circle, switched out turning, came with a solid finish to claim them at 100 M and score despite hanging in late.
Standard break, restrained from a wide alley, ended up in last few 2 wide 8Ls away, aided by solid tempo, switched 3 wide on circle, found little when pressured and just kept on at same clip to line.

Moderate beginning, positioned 2 wide behind midfield, on rails 6Ls back at midpoint, not asked and had an easy time to bend, between horses on turning in, battled steadily just holding ground in run to line.

Out better than most, trapped 3 wide without cover and 4 wide from 1000 M, not helped by solid tempo but improved to be 3Ls down on bend, lacked a finish last 300 M and weakened final furlong after a hard run.

Amongst first few to break, challenged for front, eventually eventually took a trail behind leader after early burn, raced 2 to 3Ls down throughout, struggling turning and faded quickly from 300 M to be well beaten.
Well enough to jump, couldn't lead them and had to be content with spot on fence 4Ls back, had a nice trail with speed on, behind tired horse on bend but only battled when clear last 300 M.

Little pace from outset, shared rear on rails 10Ls from front runners, had a quiet time on bend and aided by fast tempo, still well back turning, no clear run to 200 M and hung when in traffic last furlong. Pay to ignore.

Standard getaway, angled into 1 out 1 back slot but forced 3 wide without cover from 1000 M, raced in 3rd 2Ls down working on bend, took control from 300 M, looked set to win but couldn't hold off challenger late.

Fast out, pushed hard to lead them clearly at 1000 M, kept speed solid at the top end 2Ls clear on bend, still in front turning but quickly overhauled passing 300 M, hung in and gradually lost touch when condition gave in last 200 M.

A shade tardy to begin, regathered to hold a midfield position 2 wide 4Ls away, had a cosy trip to bend, 3Ls down in 5th turning, held up from 400 M to 200 M, closed evenly when clear but out too late.

Amongst first few to begin, couldn't hold front and popped off rails to race 2 wide 2Ls back, not given a rest carting field up under a solid speed, came with run at 400 M but just couldn't dash with rest last furlong.
Ordinary jump, ended up last 2 wide 10Ls off pace, helped by solid tempo throughout, still well back turning in, tracked into clear at 300 M, produced big finish to steal 3rd last 100 M.

Slowly into stride, settled in rearward division, improved on rails to be 5Ls down at midpoint, switched 2 wide on circle, shifted to inside, into clear at 300 M, closed evenly without ever really threatening.
Moderately away, positioned in midfield 3 wide with cover 5Ls from leader, helped by solid tempo, eased 4 wide on bend, let down nicely and kept coming with run to make frame (steadied late).
Chased leader throughout. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Always travelling in rear and never seen with a chance.
Raced mostly wide in forward in midfield. Faded into straight.
Sluggish at start. Travelled in last few. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Chased leader one-out-one-back to straight. Found nothing.
Made all. Won readily.
Jumped best. Settled behind midfield to straight. Made moderate headway past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled just better than midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Gained 3Ls 4th into home straight. Could make no further impression.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Ran past well beaten runners.
Raced wide in prominent position. Yielded ground from around home bend.
Never better than midfield. Faded into straight.
Travelled behind midfield. Came under hard riding rounding home bend and in straight. Produced moderate impression closing stages.
Positioned at the tail of the field, came to the outside turning for home, ran on smartly over the latter stages.
Raced handy early, but was checked and almost fell near the 1400 M, never a factor thereafter.
Travelled in 2nd last position, 2-wide with cover, struggled over the last 400 M.
Tracked the leader throughout, hit the front after the 200 M, peaked on its run inside the 100 M.
Had an easy time in the lead, given every chance.
Settled around 3 back along the fence, peeled out and went forward near the 500 M and drew away in the straight.
Parked behind the speed, 1 off, weakened passing the 200 M.
Settled just behind midfield, 1 off with cover, kept to the inside in the straight, never threatened.
Settled back in the field, 1 off with cover, ran on soundly.
Ridden a little more forward, raced midfield 1 off throughout, carried 3-wide after the 500 M. Struggled over the concluding stages.
Settled just off midfield, along the fence showed no dash in the run to the line.
Raced midfield the fence, dour in the run home.

Jumped well, but was checked and lost ground. 2-wide and no better than midfield back straight. Steadied making the turn at 500 M. Had some trouble getting a clear run on straightening and closed off only fairly.
Jumped only fairly but soon took the lead in a 2-wide spot. Started to fade 600 M out and continued to weaken in the home straight.

Checked and lost ground shortly after start. Better than midfield back straight and kept within 2Ls of the pace after 700 M. Carried back by a weakening runner 500 M out and kept on fairly in the straight.
Raced 3-wide in rear section. Trailed field turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Charged through strongly in the straight to run down rivals final 100 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Crowded and raced towards the rear. Last few to enter home straight and made up some ground in the straight.
Hard ridden to be in a forward position. 3-wide among leaders in back straight. A length down on straightening and kept on fairly in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped fairly and was pushed along to be in a forward position. 3-wide midfield or better back straight. 4-wide making home turn and kept on same pace.
Settled on the rails at midfield. Improved to be 2Ls down on straightening and kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.

Hard ridden to keep pace among leaders early stages. Held rails and raced slightly behind the leader in back straight. Took lead 600 M out and maintained advantage until being headed final 100 M. Kept on gamely to hold onto 2nd.
Botched the start and was never better than midfield. 3-wide behind midfield making home turn. Encountered traffic 250 M out but didn't show much after getting a clear run.
Soon trailed field. Made a ground saving trip on the rails making home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd early on, a bit over 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, plugged on at the same pace.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, still well there turning for home, given every chance to place but just too one-paced.
Lost ground at start, with cover around midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls from the pace until the home turn, made no impression.
Slowest away, always in rear couple until home turn, 8Ls back at 600 M when unbalanced on fence trying to improve, stayed on well late along fence, nearest at finish.
Slowly away, in 10th or so about 8Ls off pace with cover through first half, headway on circle to be 5Ls off pace but 5-wide (widest of all) into stretch, ran on strongly out wide for 2nd.
In 7th or 8th position about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed with cover until home turn, disappointed for running at 150 M, kept on at same pace.
Ideally placed on fence 2Ls off speed from 1200 M to home turn, given every hope to at least place but found nothing off the bit, no excuses.
Average start, 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, edged a little closer taking home turn, stayed on fairly well for a place.
Slowly away, always caught 3-wide no cover despite prominent position about 3Ls off pace in 4th or so, 4-wide turning for home, faded from top of homestretch. (Mucus.)
Soon led on fence, mostly a little over a length clear until the 600 M, kicked on before home turn and 2Ls clear at 200 M, always doing enough.
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn when 4-wide, stayed on fairly late, never nearer.
Squeezed at start losing ground, 10Ls off pace at 1000 M in rear, 8Ls last turning for home, made some nice late ground despite shifting out briefly at 100 M.
Soon settled into 3rd place, on fence 4Ls behind strong pace at 1000 M, over 2Ls back in 5th off final turn, stayed on at the same pace only.
Never travelled very well, well back in 10th at 1200 M, under pressure 7Ls off pace in rear at 600 M, never got much closer.
Nice early dash out wide but couldn't lead, settled 1L back in 2nd from 1000 M to 600 M, 2Ls back in 3rd off final bend, faded out from over 200 M out.
In 10th place about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, ridden along to take closer order entering home straight, never likely to place.
Reminders early on when 6Ls off pace 1300 M out, 4Ls back in midfield until home turn, always outpaced in the homestretch.
Slow break, tracked winner in 9th about 7Ls behind early speed, improved from 600 M to home straight when 3Ls back in mid-division, stayed on well for 2nd but had little hope with winner.
6Ls off pace and worse than midfield at 1200 M, headway with cover from 600 M to be 2Ls back in 4th to home turn, led 150 M out and quickened clear nicely.
10Ls last at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 11th turning for home, made some nice late ground out wider to be nearest at finish.
Midfield about 5Ls off pace until halfway, pressed on out wider to dispute lead from 600 M and a neck clear at top of home straight, headed 150 M out but comfortably held a place.
3-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, much the same before home turn, kept on at the same pace without threatening.
Tended to lay out, 2-wide and 4Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, no closer taking final turn in 7th, one-paced.
Kicked up to hold and early lead by 1L at 1200 M, joined at the 600 M and headed at top of homestretch, beaten 200 M out and faded.
Hard ridden to take a prominent spot, settled 3-1/2Ls behind the slow pace 2-wide, ridden along at 600 M but no respond, faded rapidly 300 M.

Pushed early but failed to get across, then soon eased back, 7Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide, lost ground and not suited by the slow tempo, little dash in straight despite all negative racing situations.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 2Ls at slow early sectionals, hung on until 50 M overhauled, ran on well for 2nd.
Stumbled badly early and never competitive thereafter, eased out of race in the back straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace and swept wider on straightening, dashed strongly 300 M to finish a close 3rd.
Eased back, raced very keenly throughout even with cover 1-wide, 7-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250 M making ground between runners.
Eased towards the rear, 8Ls behind the leader on the rails, raced keenly, little dash 200 M with the slow pace against.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Eased just worse than midfield, 6Ls off pace 2 to 3-wide, checked 600 M, harmed by the slow pace, blocked and checked top straight, flattened 200 M.
Pushed forward to get across the rail steadily, settled just behind the pace group, helped by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M to win.
Hard ridden early, just worse than midfield, 6Ls off the leader, helped by the rail-run but harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot, ran on just ok in final stages.
Awkward away and lost ground, hard ridden to occupy the box seat 2Ls behind the leader along the fence, favoured by the slow pace, however lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Began fairly settling in rear. Made up good ground down inner of straight.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Travelled one back in 3rd to straight. Gained upper hand under pressure over 200 M and just held on to the line.
Always struggling at the back. Never seen with a chance.
Broke well and held narrow lead. Broke a length clear briefly rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort and collared inside final 200 M. (Saddle shifted close to home.)
Raced wide just behind midfield. Failed to quicken under pressure in the run home.
