Missed the break. Soon picked up to just behind midfield. Similar turning in. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Similarly turning in. Kept on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Broke fairly from wide draw. Soon ridden to dispute lead. Gave ground from around home bend. Folded up quickly after straight.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Began well, settling in 4th about 2Ls off the lead. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Midfield throughout. Ran home one-paced.

Amongst first few to break, soon took hold to end up midfield on rails, had a quiet time 4Ls back appreciating speed, kept to fence saving ground turning, switched out and closed evenly just running out of condition last 100 M.

Bounced out fairly, restrained to sit behind midfield, raced 2-wide 5-6Ls back, didn't relax in mid-section, eased 3-wide on bend, lacked usual dash just plodding to line, weakening further late. (Blood in trachea.)

Tardy into stride, regathered to sit behind midfield on the rails 6Ls off front runners, helped by tempo and spent little to turn, well down into straight but closed fairly between horses passing some tired runners to line.

Showed pace from outset, held early lead before handing up by midpoint, had a good cart in on leaders back, 1-2Ls away turning, couldn't sprint again after early burn and hung in straight. Kept on without threatening.

Away with them, restrained for a midfield sit 4Ls off pace, enjoyed a nice trail in the 2-wide line on bend, 3Ls back in 5th turning, dashed hard down centre hitting lead at 100 M but beaten by a better horse.

Standard break, trapped wide and rolled forward to sit 3-4Ls back in 2-wide running line, 2Ls back in 4th turning, dropped whip and hung in straight, was a spent force by 200 M and did little thereafter.

Slowly away, soon at rear, tightened at 1000 M, raced on rails 8Ls away, appreciated fast pace, still well back on bend and pursued inside runs at 200 M, accelerated to gather them in with ease and score a facile win.
Away well, pressed on in search of front, did work to eventually take over, kept tempo even 1L clear, held a narrow advantage on turning, kicked hard and defied them to 100 M but run ended late.
Fastest out, took hold when unable to lead and raced on rails 2-3Ls back, had run of race with speed on, close enough swinging for home and eased into clear at 200 M, finished race off soundly.

Moderate jump, drifted towards rear, forced to race 3-wide 6-7Ls from front, always working covering ground on circle, switched inside in straight and made ground to 1200 M but only battled from that point.

Jumped nicely, up challenging for early lead, sat just behind pace horses but gradually moved up to be 1L back at outside leader, right there turning and made strong challenge until 50 m but run ended and couldn't match them.
Unbalanced and lost ground at jump, soon in last few 7Ls off pace, raced 2-wide well back but not harmed by the tempo, came 3-wide on bend lacked another gear in straight and struggled last furlong.
Average jump and faded back into a midfield role, raced 3Ls back with cover towards outside, awkwardly placed when making ground and 400 M, accelerated nicely when clear from 200 M to just fail.
Flat footed at start and lost considerable ground, raced back near tail 5Ls away, always struggling to make headway only battled to line last 200 M.
Ordinary getaway and soon at tail 5Ls off pace, shifted to centre at midpoint, 4Ls off them and continued to drift in badly, steadily made ground last 200 M but couldn't match top pair.
Even break, not far away from lead in middle of track, 3Ls back at midpoint, urged along to improve at 400 M, reached 3rd for a time before tiring a little late to miss out on frame.
Showed some early toe, raced 3Ls back on rails behind leaders, close enough at 1400 M, found little when pressured and gradually lost touch in run to line when condition gave out.

Shifted in on jumping but showed plenty of toe to cross and lead on outside rail, made rest work rolling along at a good clip, still 2Ls clear passing 250 M, condition started to weaken but held on bravely last 100 M to score.
Showed speed from outset, in front early before travelling 1 to 2Ls back behind leader, had a good cart in but urged along at 400 M, lacked a dash but kept on well all the same to make frame.
Crowded on jumping, green early and settled in pack 2Ls back not far away, still 2Ls back at midpoint, couldn't find extra gear at 300 M when asked and just kept on at same speed to line.
Two wide equal leading, weakened inside the 250 M.
Parked just behind the frontrunners, 1 off had the run of the race, didn't go on.
Settled just behind the speed, three wide without cover, responded well under pressure to win by a close margin.
Couldn't go the early speed and took up a rearward position along the fence, failed to run on.
Settled near the rear, 1 off with cover. Never threatened.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, plugged away at the same speed over the concluding stages.
Led throughout, but always had company to its outside, overhauled close to the post.
Raced midfield, 3 wide with cover, worked to the line well.
Raced 4 to 5 wide, midfield, without cover, never likely.
Caught 3 to 4 wide without cover, midfield began to feel the pressure turning for home, weakened in the straight to be well beaten.
Positioned midfield the fence, one paced in the straight.
Struggled throughout, whilst racing in last position for most of the trip.
Raced wide in a forward position early stages. 3-wide at midfield making the turn and faded after straightening.
2-wide behind midfield. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Outpaced and raced in a rearward position. Near last on straightening and steadily made up ground to be closest at finish.

Missed the jump slightly but was pressured to take the lead. Led or disputed lead with eventual winner from 1000 M onwards. Had a 1/2L advantage turning in but unable to match pace with eventual winner final 200 M.
Led briefly from a wide draw. Then was outpaced by leaders and raced wide in midfield. Widest making home turn and closed the race off with a strong rally.
Jumped only fairly but was ridden along to be 3-wide in a forward position entering the turn. Unable to keep pace with leaders after straightening and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Led or disputed lead until home turn. 1/2L down on bend but kept on well after straightening to wear down the early leader final 200 M to win the race.
Missed the jump and soon raced at the rear. Hugged the rails making home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly, failed to muster early speed and raced at the rear. Trailed field and was steadied on straightening. Made up some late ground by running past tired runners.
Niggled along to be around midfield. 3Ls off the leader entering the turn. Never quickened on straightening and soon weakened.
Raced 2-wide behind the pacesetters. Unable to keep pace after straightening and gradually dropped out.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Failed to quicken at home turn and weakened final stages. (Bled.)
About half a length back in 3rd until the 400 M, soon came under pressure and gave ground steadily.
Always laying out in rear at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the lead until halfway, petered out very tamely late.
Always in rear bunch, about 4Ls back early 5Ls down at 400 M when driven along, no impression.
Led by a neck early on, going well at 400 M, headed about 150 M out and no extra thereafter.
About 4Ls back in midfield early on, made solid late headway down the centre to take 2nd close to the line.
Never going very well from far-side draw, under pressure 3Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, gave ground steadily.
Keen early and tended to hang a little, always about a neck back in 2nd until the 200 M, lacked the winner's dash and lost 2nd final two strides.
Close-up in 5th about 2Ls behind the early speed, off the bit to lie up at 400 M, pretty one-paced final 200 M.
Always going well in 4th on stands' rail about 1L off pace, hit the front about 150 M out and ridden out to score.
Always worse than midfield and under pressure, 5Ls down and struggling at halfway, soon well beaten and eased.
Never much better than midfield about 3Ls off the speed at any stage.
Detached in rear about 9Ls off pace at halfway, made a little minor late ground.
Mostly caught 3-wide no cover, 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, improved to 1L down in 2nd off home turn, missed a place on the line after the tough trip.
Nice position 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M, still right there off final turn, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, had every chance to figure, lacked the pick-up.
Disputed fast early tempo at 1200 M, persisted to lead at 900 M, 2Ls clear on circle but headed 300 M out and weakened.
Blundered the start, 12Ls last in rear at 1000 M, 4-wide turning for home with 7Ls to make up, stayed on fairly out wider to be nearest at finish.
Slow start, niggled along in rear about 9Ls off pace at halfway, ordinary finish, never nearer.
Slow away, 8Ls back in 9th at 1100 M, hard ridden to draw a little closer taking home turn, never likely to pass too many of those in front.
Led on fence early on, set a fast pace before handing up advantage at 900 M, began to give ground on the circle and well beaten before home turn, unacceptable performance.
With cover 8Ls back in 10th at 1100 M, improved on the circle to be 4-wide and 4Ls back in midfield turning for home, stayed on fairly to nick 3rd on the wire.
Switched from widest gate to trail field in rear, 10Ls back in 12th at 1200 M, same position but 6Ls back at final turn, stayed there.
6Ls back in 8th at 1200 M, good headway on the circle out wider, 4-wide and 2Ls back in 4th off home turn, led about 250 M out, looked the winner before being overhauled final strides.
5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 1200M, driven along to get within 4Ls of the pace turning for home, still 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on well to lead final strides.
On fence 5Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, ridden along to be 3Ls down in 4th off final turn, soon outpaced.
On fence 6Ls back in midfield at 1200 M, steadied out when 5Ls down off home turn, made no inroads in homestretch while hanging under pressure.
Always worse than midfield with cover, about 8Ls back at halfway and only slightly closer on straightening, cut no ice.
Eased to sit just off the slow pace, however trapped 5 wide throughout and covered too much ground, ran on until 150 M, weakened out of it in straight.

Awkwardly away, pushed to sit midfield 3.5Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the slow tempo, lacked room in straight, no dash when clear. Checked near post.
Hard ridden but failed to get across in front, 2Ls off the slow pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground, briefly threatened but showed little dash 400 M, run ended 50 M.
Pushed forward as usual and settled 1.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, helped by the slow pace, travelled well until 400 M dropped off rapidly.

Hard ridden early to hold rails and take a prominent spot, however eased back 1400 M to sit back in midfield 4.5Ls off pace, pushed back further 800 M, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, little dash when clear.
Dipped at start, crossed to the rails, settled at the rear 6.5Ls off the leaders until the home straight, dashed strongly 200 M to run 2nd despite the slow pace.
Eased to sit worse than midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leaders, pushed back 800 M, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room in straight, ran on fairly.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, just managed to keep up in midfield, trapped 3 to 4 wide and covered too much ground, moved up 1000 M to share the lead at slow pace, weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 4.5Ls behind the leaders, 2-3 wide at stable bend, harmed by the slow tempo, swept 4 to 5 wide at home bend, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Eased back, 5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide. swept 4 wide on straightening to obtain clear run, dashed strongly 300 M despite the slow early pace, drifted away 100 M to win.
Settled just behind the pace group early and trapped 3 wide, moved up 1200 M to take the rail and shared the lead at slow sectionals, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, ran on OK.

Eased back, 6.5Ls behind the leaders, trapped 3 to 5 wide, lost too much ground at bends and harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 250 M with the winner until 100 M when run ended, just good enough to finish a minor 3rd.
Pushed to get across the rail in front then eased into box seat and took advantage of the slow pace, pushed further back at 800 M, ran on well until 150 M flattened.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace and totally blocked in straight, just ran on.
Settled wide in last few. Made some late headway past beaten horses inisde final 200 M.
Never better than midfield on rails. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled in rear. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M to snatch 3rd late.
Made all setting a steady pace. Just held on under pressure to the line.

Jumped fairly. Soon ridden to muster pace to 3rd on rails some 2Ls back. Lost position when awkward rounding 1200 M bend. 3-wide in forward of midfield before short-lived effort home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Travelled in rear of midfield. Soon came to challenge upon straightening but could only produce moderate impression.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced mainly 2-wide in midfield. Closer order turning in but could only run on steadily without threatening. Lost 3rd late.
Rear early. Made steady headway wide far side to be just worse than midfield. Similar turning in but soon weakened.
Jumped fairly. Settled one out one back in 2nd. Came under pressure to challenge after straightening but unable to peg back winner throughout.
Slow out. Virtually trailed the field to straight. Only ran past well beaten horses.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing.
Travelled just better than midfield. Close up in 3rd turning in. Soon weakened.
Stumbled shortly after start. Tailed off before pulled up far side.
Reasonable jump, faded back when unable to get closer, raced 2 wide behind midfield 7Ls from pace, urged along turning in and came to middle but only plodded last 300 M.
Ordinary break as usual, settled well back 12Ls away in 2 wide line, had field in front on bend and well back (awkwardly placed) turning in, made plenty of ground last 300 M from an impossible spot.
Even jump, ended up 7 to 8Ls back on rails, had a quiet run behind midfield, switched out on turning, made a little ground to 200 M but just turned in a one paced effort thereafter.
Not much speed from outset, raced on rails towards rear 10Ls back, saved ground on bend, kept to fence in straight but found little in finish.

Moderate getaway, ended up behind midfield 10Ls back in 2 wide line, helped by tempo but unsuited by track pattern, lost position on bend, made run between horses turning and closed best of beaten brigade.

Bounced out well, had plenty of pace and lead them easily, held a 3Ls advantage and ran them along on bend, still 2Ls clear turning, tackled at 300 M and just couldn't dash again. Stuck on well to make frame.
Ordinary break, took up a spot 8Ls back in 2 wide running line, not asked in mid-section, still well back to bend, offered little in straight and just battled in run to line.

Jumped nicely, took a trail behind speed, had cover 3 to 4Ls back on rails, appreciated tempo and eased out on straightening, gradually pulled back ground but found margin beyond him last 200 M, solid effort.

First to hit ground, settled prominently behind leader, had a reasonable trip 3Ls back but had to cart field up on bend, dashed well when balanced up to hit lead at 250 M, held rivals comfortably for a solid win.

Slow to begin, rushed along to recover into a spot in midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls from leader in 5th, had easy time thereafter, switched out on turning but found little and weakened badly from 200 M when run ended.

Awkwardly away, positioned in midfield on the rails 5Ls back, checked at 1200 M, saved ground on bend to be 4Ls back in 5th turning in, briefly promised when shifting out but just kept on at one pace last 300 M.
Began awkwardly, ended up 3 wide in midfield 6Ls back, always working without cover, under pressure turning, steadily weakened to be well beaten.
Amongst first few to begin, positioned 3rd 2 to 3 wide 4Ls back, closed steadily on bend to be 2Ls down, made strong run with winner and got closest at 200 M but just unable to pull back margin.

No speed from outset, took up spot at rear more than 12Ls off leaders, switched 3 wide on circle, had field to pass and switched to outside in straight, made many lengths down outside rail to be nearest on line.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Mostly around midfield to straight. Weakened.
Always struggling at the back. Tailed off in the straight.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened. (Mucus.)
Raced wide in last few. Finished off race well inside final 200 M to grab 2nd late.
Raced wide in prominent position. Fought on steadily to hit front over 100 M out. Hung on well.
Travelled at the back. Made some late progress under pressure past beaten horses closing stages.
Rear early. Soon picked up to 3-wide in rear of midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Fought on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Travelled in midfield on rails. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield. Lost position around home bend. Towards rear into straight. Made some late headway past beaten horses closing stages.
Soon took up running and held clear lead until weakened over 150 M out.
Broke well then settled just off the pace on rails. Slightly lost position approaching home bend. Could only keep on at the same pace without quickening.
Standard break, slotted in on rails behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back, 2 wide from midpoint, in traffic between horses turning, closed evenly down middle when clear to be closest at finish.
Restrained from outset, raced 2 wide at rear 8Ls off pace, not helped by slow tempo, switched 4 wide on circle, made little impact in the straight and only passed some tired runners late.
Away well, showed more speed than usual and ended up outside leader, had an ideal trip 1L back with slow tempo, moved up to challenge leaving bend, run ended at 100 M but held on well to 4th.
Standard break, drove up to be prominent 3 wide just off pace, had cover 3Ls back throughout, close enough on bend, found nothing when asked and plodded to line in straight.
Began in line, ridden up to hold leaders back, had the run of the race with average speed on, eased out turning in, gradually progressed to challenge and did best work late to finish over the top.
Had plenty of dash from outset and crossed them easily, lead at a moderate tempo 1L clear, still held narrow advantage turning, kicked hard in straight and in front everywhere but line.
Reasonable break, ended up in coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race 2Ls back to bend, switched out turning in, ran on to 200 M when run ended and weakened out of it late.

Standard break, taken to rails and ended up in midfield role 4Ls away, not asked throughout and close enough not to be harmed by speed, in traffic turning, clear from 300 M and made good ground last 200 M for 3rd.
Began nicely, pressed on to take closer order, raced 1L back 3 wide without cover, had a hard trip to bend, unable to find when pressure was applied and weakened right out.

Away with line, drifted back as usual to slot in behind midfield, raced 2 wide 6Ls back, not aided by slow speed, switched 3 wide on bend, came widest turning in and made some ground but never a factor.
Ordinary getaway, assumed rearward role as usual, took up a spot on rails 6Ls from pace, unsuited by tempo, kept to rails on turning, made plenty of ground from well back to be nearest on line.

Amongst first few to begin, forced to cover ground from a wide alley, posted 4 wide without cover 3Ls back, always working to be 2Ls back on bend, was a spent force turning and dropped right out in straight.

Slow to begin and intentionally ridden in a rearward role, raced 7 to 8Ls back on rails, not helped by average speed on in front, tracked between horses in straight and made a little ground without threatening.
Caughjt 4-wide without cover down the backstretch about 4Ls back in 9th or 10th, gained cover on the circle but further back taking home turn, no impression, unacceptable display.
No worse than 1.5Ls back in 2nd or 3rd until home turn, all out to improve when same margin back in 3rd at 200 M, no extra late and lost 3rd on the line.
Awkward break and soon 8Ls off pace in rear, about 5Ls back in 13th off final turn, stayed on past several beaten rivals late.
3-wide with cover at 800 M when 4Ls back and worse than midfield, similar turning for home, never landed a blow.
Always midfield 2-wide with cover about 3Ls back until home turn, got clear at 300 M and quickened well to lead 150 M out, soon well in command.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls back until the 600 M, hard ridden to lie up entering homestretch, beaten over 200 M out.
5-wide without cover early on, relegated to last at 1000 M, 4-wide and 6Ls down on straightening, posed no danger at all.
Crowded at start, nicely placed on fence in 4th about 2Ls back until home straight when driven along to improve, stayed on fairly well and nosed into 3rd on the line.
Away well and soon led by 1L on fence, clear by similar margin until the 200 M but headed about 50 M later, comfortably held onto 2nd.
Better than midfield about 2Ls off pace but trapped 3-wide no cover down the backstretch, 4-wide no cover on circle and losing ground entering stretch, faded right out.
Towards rear about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M and only marginally closer swinging for home, soon beaten.
Always close up, no worse than 2Ls off pace until home straight in 3rd or so, failed to accelerate and well held final 200 M.
On fence about 4Ls back in 8th or so until home turn when a little tight for room, soon clear but never really threatened.
Chased leaders 3-wide one back in 4th to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Began well. Led or disputed lead. Kicked about a length clear briefly early in straight but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Settled well back. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Towards rear. Obtained split passing 200 M and fought on under pressure to gain upper hand late.
Ridden to dispute lead 3-wide, holding slender advantage briefly around Rock. Folded up quickly upon straightening.
Midfield. Did not find clear running early in straight. Kept on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide mainly in forward of midfield. Shifted wider turning in. Fought on steadily to just fail to peg back winner.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. No extra.
Slightly sluggish at start. Travelled in last few to straight. Never nearer.

Ridden along in rear of midfield early, gradually improving to 5th some 2Ls back approaching home bend. Fought on steadily to reach 2nd on rails before tightened badly and lost position nearing finish.
With leaders to 400 M. Swamped for a placing inside final 200 M.
Slightly slow out. Remained in rear to straight. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Raced just off the speed, 2-wide with cover, kept on one-paced.
Raced at the rear, 3-wide no cover, struggled over the last 400 M.
Settled outside the leader, weakened final 200 M.
Checked early in the race and settled behind midfield along the fence. Closed off well although ran into some traffic problems in the straight.
Positioned near last, battled to the post.
Overraced in a midfield position, 1 off with cover. Came wide in the straight. Found no extra in the run home.
Checked about 200m after the jump while racing at the rear. Failed to run on in the final stretch.
From outside barrier, was taken across behind runners and settled near the rear. Made little impression whilst sticking to the inside.
Raced midfield along the fence, gained narrow split after the 400 M and finished off strongly.
Was able to lead in even time but nailed over the final stages.
Slow to begin and checked at the jump. Improved its position near the 1100 M after racing back in the field. Took up 3-wide position, no cover midfield, no impression in the straight.
Box-seated and stayed on well.
Raced along the rails and was never worse than midfield. 2Ls behind the leader and switched out turning for home. Kept on well final stages and just missed catching the winner.

Hard ridden from widest draw to be in a forward position. Better than midfield but 3-wide without cover early back straight. Improved to within a length of the leader home turn but unable to keep up after straightening.
Among leaders early stages. 2-wide better than midfield in 4th place 800 M out. 2Ls off the pace at home turn but didn't find much in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Quickened and staged a rally after straightening. Kept gaining ground before being tied up in traffic 150 M out. Continued only fairly thereafter.
Ridden along early stages, steadied at 1400 M and then raced wide at midfield. 3-wide in back straight and swung widest turning for home. Found nothing in the straight.
Pushed along out of the gates and took the lead. Held a 1L advantage on straightening. Swamped final 150 M.
Among leaders early. Settled behind the pace from 1200 M onwards. Kept on well in the home straight and contended for the lead inside final 200 M. Unable to keep pace with top pair final stages.
Dropped back to a rearward position and trailed field until 500 M. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Eased back to a rearward position and raced along the rails. Made up some ground in the straight.
Missed the jump and raced in rear section. Last to enter home straight and only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Swung wide turning for home and was one-paced in the straight.

Raced along the rails no better than midfield. Checked making the turn at 600 M without losing much ground. 3Ls off the leader turning for home. Ran on well in the straight and kept on gamely final stages to deny rival.
Made all, clear by about 1L on fence until home straight, quickened clear under hand riding, tidily.
3-wide no cover early but pressed on to race 2-wide in 2nd about 1L off pace until the home straight, one-paced finish and lost out on a place in final 100 M.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to final turn, stayed on well enough for 2nd but had little chance with winner.
Nicely placed in one-out-one-back spot in 4th about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed through to straightening for home, failed to quicken up and faded final 200 M.
2-wide about 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, moved out 3-wide to try and improve on the circle, didn't find much under pressure.
3-back on fence in 5th about 4Ls off pace until home turn, kept on at the same pace along fence to just take 3rd.
Checked at 1200 M, 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in 7th until the home turn, stayed on fairly well but just missed out on a place.
Switched from widest gate to race 8Ls back on fence at 1200 M in 11th, not much closer turning for home, found nothing off the bit.
8Ls off pace in 12th when 2-wide at 1300 M, still well back on straightening, very weak.
3-wide without cover in places, 2-wide and 6Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up at 500 M, petered out in the stretch.
Never any better than midfield, with cover 6Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, similarly placed off final bend, posed no threat finishing along the fence.
Poor beginning and never going well, head up too and keen at 1200 M about 8Ls back in rear, never a factor.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, every chance 1L back in 3rd when edging out 2-wide, failed to quicken up sufficiently.
Best away to lead by 1L on fence early on, headed at top of home straight but rallied to lead again at 200 M, one-paced close home but held on for a place.
Travelled well, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls back in 3rd until the 600 M, closer taking final turn, squeezed through to lead at the 100 M, driven out.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, headway to be 5Ls back in midfield at final turn, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed at halfway, some headway when 3-wide turning for home, faded out steadily.
Crowded at start, went forward but caught 3-wide without cover early on, 4Ls down in midfield at halfway, 4-wide and struggling turning for home, unacceptable performance.
Slowly away and soon 10Ls back in rear, still last but only 6Ls behind off home bend, ran on past a few tired rivals without threatening.
In 5th about 3Ls back and 2-wide at 1200 M, improved out 3-deep at 600 M to lead at top of home straight, headed again at 200 M and tired close home to miss a place.
4-wide no cover 1300 M out, steadied at 1000 M but tended to hang out down the back about 5Ls back in 9th or so, always outpaced through final 600 M.
A neck off pace out 2-wide about 1300 M out, began to lose position at 600 M and beaten at top of home straight, unacceptable performance.
On fence worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at the 1200 M, improved to 3Ls back in 5th turning for home, ran on well down centre of track for 2nd.
Eased back from the bad draw, trapped 5-wide first turn, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide at home bend, harmed by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Awkward away, trapped 4-wide first turn, eased to sit behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, moved up 600 M, not suited by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Pushed from outset but lacked early speed, 3-wide first turn, took rail 800 M just worst than midfield, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, never progressed in final stages.
Hard ridden to secure the box seat, benefited by the slow pace and the rails-run, however lost ground 600 M, faded 200 M. (Bled.)
Hard ridden to get across to the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at slow early sectionals, hung on until 150 M when overhauled, run ended 50 M and just missed 3rd.
Very slowly away, bumped and lost ground, never competitive at the rear.
Hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, made the run early from 600 M to overcome the slow pace, dashed well 200 M whilst hanging in and finish a close 2nd.
Slow away, settled at back along the fence, pushed further backwards 600 M, raced 8-1/2Ls off the leader and harmed by the slow pace, ran on fairly until 100 M made up some ground.
Eased to the rear, more than 9Ls off the leader 2-wide, moved up 600 M, dashed well to 100 M despite the slow pace.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield along the fence, 5Ls behind the leader, pushed back at 600 M, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 250 M, lacked room at 100 M and kept on evenly thereafter.
Pushed forward, settled 2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo, ran on until 200 M weakened.
Pushed early but soon took a sit just behind the pace group on the rails, pushed back 600 M, 3Ls off the slow pace, dashed well 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Not far off in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening. Fought on dourly to just draw level on line.
Broke well, settling one back on rails. Still 2nd turning in and forced to change course when gap closed 200 M out. Fought on steadily to hold placing.
Began fairly and soon dropped to rear. Trailed the field to straight. Ran on strongly past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Wide in forward of midfield early. Improved to dispute 2nd passing 600 M. Dropped out tamely 400 M out.
Checked shortly after start and dropped to rear. Similar turning in. Kept on steadily in straight for good late impression closing stages.
Began awkwardly. Settled behind midfield. Shifted out for a run turning in and ran on quite well under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Most in 5th in better than midfield position to straight. No further impression.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Widest runner when some 3Ls back turning in. Failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Held rails run in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Broke well from widest draw. Took up running around 1000 M bend, holding about a one-length break until trimmed down close to home.
Always struggling in last few.

Fair to begin, slotted in nicely to 1 out 1 back 3Ls behind speed, had a dream trip in mid-section, used little on bend, urged along turning in, had chance but failed to go on when run ended at 150 M.

Shade tardy to begin, ended up on rearward division on rails 5Ls back, had a quiet trip in mid-section with reasonable speed on, still back behind horses turning, closed of nicely when clear last 200 M.

Even break, ridden along to hold a position in midfield on rails, had a quiet time in mid-section 4Ls off speed, back behind horses leaving bend, kept closing without a great deal of room last 100 M, even effort.

Fastest into stride, lead comfortably by post first time, handed up at midpoint and had run of race thereafter, close enough on circle, didn't quicken with them and just closed at same speed in straight.

Restrained from outset, took up spot at rear 8Ls off pace on rails, lobbed along at tail throughout, aided by tempo but track condition against, still well back turning, closed nicely last 200 M (tight 100 M) to be closest on line.

Slowly into stride, mustered to push forward in search of front, applied pressure and took up running by midpoint, kept pace genuine despite doing share of work, lead turning and held on to 100 M before going down in 3 way go.

Moderate jump, restrained from a wide draw, posted 3-wide in midfield with cover 4Ls back, did share of work covering ground, pushed along approaching bend, switched out but just finished at one pace.
Reasonable break, pushed on in search of closer spot, posted 3-wide without cover 2-3Ls back, always doing it tough to stay there, under pressure on bend, weakened out last 200 M after a hard run.

Standard getaway, took up expected role near rear, raced 2-wide 6Ls from them, had a quiet run in mid-section but no helped by racing pattern, 3-wide passing Rock, accelerated hard down outside to claim them late.

Out with rest, showed enough dash to hold a forward spot 2-3Ls back on rails, travelled comfortably and not forced to do any extra work, niggled on bend, kept to fence but found little in straight just battling to line.

Bounced out well, took up a prominent role outside leader, had cover for a time but eventually held spot 1-2Ls back facing breeze, close enough on bend, gradually wore down leader to hit front but collared right on line.
Average beginning, assumed expected role behind midfield, raced 2-wide between horses 4Ls back, still in traffic turning and no real work to 150 M, closed at one pace when race was over.

Even break, settled down in 2 wide line amongst horses in midfield, had fair run 6Ls back, steadied at 1000 M, took a 3 wide trail at 600 M, didn't handle bend well, closed off only at same speed in straight.

Slow to begin, raced at rear 10Ls off speed, outpaced in early part and detached from pack, stuck to rails and got closer on bend, kept to inside in stretch and did best work late to get past a few (cut left heel).

Slowly into stride, regathered to race towards rear 7Ls down on rails, continued to improve on circle, awkwardly placed at 500 M, steadily closed between runners in the straight to be nearest at finish.
Bounced out well, faded back from widest alley, ended up 8Ls back on rails, not asked on bend, still well back turning in, managed to pass a few tired runners in straight but never really threatened.

First to hit ground, crossed to rails but outpaced and forced to take trail behind leader on rails, moved 2 wide leaving circle, applied pressure at 400 M, there to 200 M but run ended and weakened out thereafter.

Reasonable break, didn't have speed early and posted 3 wide without cover from midpoint, always working 4 to 5Ls back, still wide in 6th leaving bend, stuck to task well and held ground creditably last 300 M.

Began nicely, ridden along and showed good dash to cross them, kep them rolling 1-1/2Ls clear, took a breather approaching turn, challenged at 400 M, found plenty holding them off to 100 M before run ended.

Amongst first few to leave gates, took a spot 2Ls away first without cover, travelled well to bend, eased out and gradually wound up, closed hard last furlong to lead at 100 M and hold off challengers.

Away with line, 3 wide early before slotting in 1 out 1 back 3Ls back, enjoyed a dream trail to bend, followed eventual winner on turning, lacked a dash in straight but kept on solidly to make the frame.
Began evenly from inside alley, showed enough to hold a nice spot 4Ls back on fence, had easy trip on circle, struggling on turning when asked to improve, dropped out in straight. (Blood in trachea.)

Even getaway, slotted in behind the speed, lost ground at bend to be 2 wide 5Ls back, bumped on circle, reluctant to shift out and raced greenly in straight, put it together last 200 M and finished hard late. Promising debut.
Awkwardly away and lost valuable ground, ended up detached at rear more than 12Ls away, always struggling to keep up, still last into straight, did little in run to line passing a beaten horse.
Moderate beginning, settled in rearward division, raced 3 wide 8Ls from top end, urged along on bend, found little when asked and only plodded in straight (cut left front heel).

Out in line, no speed shown early and took a sit on rails behind midfield, 5 to 6Ls back and had a quiet time to bend, kept to fence and didn't have much room at 400 M to 200 M, only battled when clear.
Slow to muster speed and settled, just off midfield, the fence. Made late ground, after working its way out to the middle of the track.
Raced 3Ls back, the fence. Lacked response in the straight.
Raced 1 out 1 back, checked near the 350 M, did go on afterwards.
Settled in second last position along the fence, dour in the run home, although did experience some difficulty obtaining clear running near 300 M.
Level pegged with the leader for most of the trip, 2 wide. Hit the lead after the 400 M. Overhauled in the run home.
Faded early in the straight after leading.
Parked behind the speed, but 3 wide without cover, no impression.
Tracked the leader on the rail, had every chance and was disappointing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well and was caught wide early, restrained and took up a 3 wide position with cover, midfield. Taken wider near the 600 M, to 4 deep no cover, kept on in the straight.
From a wide gate, was taken back to the rear of the field, 1 off with cover. Finished off soundly in the run home.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Peeled out 4 deep turning for home to hold narrow advantage.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover, came wide turning into the straight, lacked dash after the 400 M, but ground to the line well.
Among leaders early but gradually drifted back to midfield. Ran on at same pace in the straight and was steadied final 50 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Widest turning for home and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
2-wide and no better than midfield. Failed to quicken on straightening and remained one-paced to the line.
Contested the early lead before taking a sit behind the pace 1000 M out. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to threaten.
Niggled along to keep pace behind leaders. 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Remained on same pace in the straight. (Saddle shifted at 600 M.)
3-wide and never better than midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight and made up some ground.

Midfield early stages. Drifted back near 800 M and was behind midfield turning for home. Quickened well on straightening but had to steer away from slow traffic after 200 M. Kept on fairly thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled nicely in midfield. Showed good response when asked at 400 M and swept past rivals to take the lead at 200 M under hands and heels. Cruised home for an easy win.
Ridden along to be 3-wide without cover in a forward spot. Remained wide and a length off the leader turning for home. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and faded final stages.

Missed the jump and was hard ridden to challenge for the lead at 1000 M. Settled behind the leader making home turn. Switched out and took the lead final 400 M. Ran on well but was outclassed by winner final 200 M.
Led until final 400 M. Kept on fairly before getting swamped inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and gradually dropped back to the fence and trailed field. Remained towards the rear on straightening and did not quicken.
Soon in rear section. Trailed field into home straight and made up some late ground.
Taken back to a rearward position and helped by fast pace. Switched out turning for home and mounted a strong rally for a minor placing.
In rear at least 8Ls behind leaders through to home turn, ran on strongly, never nearer.
Slightly worse than midfield with cover about 5Ls from the lead until home turn, made some nice late ground to be nearest at the finish.
Went back from wide gate, 7Ls down in 10th or so at 1000 M, a little closer turning for home, never likely to improve much further.
Disputing pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, ridden along to lie up at 800 M and same turning for home when over 1L back in 4th, soon gave ground.
Niggled along in 6th with cover about 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 4-wide and 3Ls back in 5th off final bend, knuckled down well to lead 100 M out, gamely.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, soon outpaced.
Disputed early lead on fence, headed at top of home straight, faded right out. (Bled.)
Fractious in gates, 3-wide with cover about 6Ls back in 10th or so early on, left without cover on the circle and 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, dropped right out.
Disputed the lead out 3-wide without cover down backstretch, led by a neck at top of homestretch but headed about 250 M out, faded thereafter.
Box-seat position in 4th about 2Ls off pace until straightening for home, given every chance to reach the quinella but always about a neck short.
On fence in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls back until the 600 M, hung in a little entering stretch, 2Ls down in 4th with place prospects at 200 M but couldn't follow through.
Nicely placed in 5th about 2Ls off speed and 2-wide until home turn, led over 200 M out but overhauled by winner 100 M out and no response late.
Always towards rear, about 8Ls behind at 800 M, further back turning for home, poor effort. (Heart irregularity.)
Slow to begin and failed to muster early speed, 9Ls last at 1000 M, never on terms.
Always leading by 1L on fence or in a close 2nd position, headed by MARIBEAU inside final 200 M but battled back to score, gutsy win.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, 3Ls back in 3rd or 4th down the back straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of home straight, one-paced final 200 M.
Awkward break, prominent but racing too freely early on, over 2Ls back in 4th at halfway and hard pressed to maintain this proximity at home bend, beaten over 200 M out.
Over-raced a little early on, 4Ls back in midfield at halfway and same turning for home, stayed on quite well, nearest at finish.
Always close up on fence about 3Ls back in 5th until home turn, stayed on fairly well and just secured a place.
9Ls back in last at 1200 M, about 6Ls back in 13th turning for home, never landed a blow.
Covered up towardsd rear about 6Ls off speed at halfway, a little closer in midfield taking final turn, always held by most of those in front.
Always well and led by half a length at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 600 M, led briefly at 200 M but out-fought by the winner close home.
Should have placed but for wayward shifting left inside final 200 M, midfield with cover early on, 4-wide and 2Ls down turning for home, 1L down at 200 M before veering out.
Always worse than midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace until home straight, didn't find much off the bit.
Worse than midfield covering ground but mostly with cover down backstretch about 6Ls off pace, closer but 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, soon tired and well beaten.
Slowly away, 4-back the fence in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls or so behind the speed until home straight, stayed on at just the one pace.
Settled in rear from wide gate about 7Ls off pace, about 5Ls back in 10th turning for home, stayed on OK without threatening. (Blood in trachea.)
Never travelled well, ridden along towards rear early on, 7Ls last and struggling taking final bend, no impression.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1.5Ls at fast early sectionals, made too much use of fuel early and totally emptied 200 M.
Hard ridden to get across in front, 1.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, but trapped 4 to 5 wide and covered plenty of ground, incredible turn of foot 400 M, soon dominated 200 M, not fully tested.
Hard ridden early to keep up about midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader 2-3 wide, benefitted by the fast tempo, however just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to press forward, 3Ls off the fast pace 2 to 3 wide, ran on well and held ground in straight to share 2nd.
Pushed forward for prominent spot (close than usual), trapped 3-4 wide outside the pace group, harmed by the fast pace, faded in straight.
Eased to the rear, more than 9Ls behind the leader 3-4 wide, favoured by the fast pace, however never progressed in final stages.
Bumped start, worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, lacked room 400 M to 200 M, ran on evenly when clear.
Trapped 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground, 5Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast pace however no turn of foot in straight.

Eased back to get across towards the rail, 7.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M, totally blocked 200 M, just ran on late but not really tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Eased to sit just worse than midfield 3 wide with cover, 5Ls off the leader, assisted by the fast pace, lacked room at 400 M, just ran on fairly when clear.
Settled along the rails midfield, 4Ls off the leader, travelled nicely and helped by the fast tempo, but never progressed in final stages.
Eased to sit behind the leader, box seat, not suited by the fast pace, blocked 4-2, lacked turn of foot when clear but ran on to the line.
Pushed to sit 3.5Ls behind the leader, raced 3 to 4 wide and lost ground at bends, helped by the fast tempo, just ran on until 200 M making up some ground to share 2nd.
Settled 3-wide in 7th almost 5Ls off the lead, Similar turning in and soon came under pressure to challenge but could only quicken inside 250 M. Did best work at finish.
Settled at the back. Produced late impression running past well-beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Held 2nd on rails behind leader within 2Ls of pace. Came under pressure to challenge upon straightening but unable to quicken to threaten.

Began well, settling in 4th in midfield. Drifted off rails passing 1200 M, racing 2-wide home bend. In box-seat early in straight. Produced only moderate impression inside final 300 M without threatening.
Settled at the back. Baulked for a run on inside upon straightening. Ran home strongly inside 300 M but the post came too soon.
Towards rear early, improving to midfield along rails. Still in midfield about 3Ls off turning for home. Soon faded.
Travelled 2-wide in 3rd just over 2Ls off the pace. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily throughout straight but pipped for a placing late. (Epiglottic eatrapment.)

Soon took up running and set a steady pace. Held clear advantage rounding home bend and into straight. Extended lead to 2Ls 200 M out. Plugged on under pressure when challenges came too late to be threatening.
Began well, settling in 5th in rear of midfield. Moved closer 3-wide coming out of back straight. Still 3-wide in midfield turning for home and soon dropped out of contention.

Away better than expected, wide leaving straight but eased to take up rearward spot 5 to 6Ls back in running line, not helped by slow tempo, eased wide at 500 M, chased gamely down outside but gave too much a start. Could be closer.

Bounced out well, held a more prominent role 3Ls back on rails, had run of race in mid-section, kept to rails and saved ground on bend, lacked a finish in straight and only passed beaten runners late.

Reasonable break, rolled forward to sit first without cover in running line 2 to 3Ls back, overraced in middle stages with slow tempo, same distance back in 3rd on bend, lacked dash of winner but stuck on gamely for 2nd.

Away in line, didn't have much speed and forced to cover ground 3 wide behind midfield 5Ls from speed, always doing share of work wide without cover, bumped at 300 M, didn't dash but fought on at same speed to line.

Even break, ended up in midfield 2 wide 4Ls back, close enough to be not harmed by slow tempo, still 1 out 1 back on bend, eased 4 wide into straight, not much turn of foot but kept coming to be nearest on line.

Restrained soon after start to assume spot at tail, raced on rails 7Ls from front runners, disadvantaged by slow speed, urged along on bend, last turning in, found nothing in straight and plodded to line.

Moderate beginning, faded back to sit behind midfield on rails, relaxed well 5Ls back on fence, 4Ls down in 6th off turn, came between horses and hit clear at 300 M, surged to front at 200 M and drew away to score comfortably.

Out fairly, restrained to assume usual spot towards rear, positioned on rails 6Ls of pace, unsuited by moderate tempo, well back on turning, couldn't make much progress in straight but held ground in run to line.

Amongst first few away, pressed on in search of front, took lead entering back straight, dictated terms at a slow pace 2Ls clear throughout, held 1L advantage on bend, made them chase from 400 M, claimed at 200 M, stuck on evenly.

Plenty of speed from outset and crossed them easily, took a trail leaving first bend, raced 2Ls back behind leader, helped by slow tempo, close enough on turning, found little when they sprinted and dropped out at 200 M.

Quickly crossed to rails in rear after start. Crept up to just worse than midfield coming out of back straight. Did not find much room after straightening. Ran on between runners to be nearest at finish.
Behind leader far side. Switched off the rail to gain slender lead approaching home bend. Overhauled over 200 M out.
Travelled wide in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening, improving to hold every chance inside final 200 M but caught close home.
Travelled on rails mostly in 6th just better than mid-division. Commenced run turning for home creeping up on rails to a narrow leader briefly 200 M out. Swamped for a placing close to home.
Broke well, settling 3-wide in midfield. Hampered and lost position turning in. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in 4th on rails. Switched out to challenge upon straightening drawing level briefly over 200 M out. Soon swamped.
Settled in last few. Briefly tightened after straightening. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Finished off race quite well down centre of track.
Always in last few. Fought on under pressure without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Shaken up upon straightening and ran on determinedly under pressure to snatch victory close to home.
Not far off in 3rd far side, travelling one out one back around home bend. Folded up quickly upon straightening.
Niggled at after sluggish start, settling wide behind midfield. Similar turning in and made up good ground inside final 350 M to snatch 3rd close to home.
Settled 2-wide in 5th within 3Ls of pace. Briefly baulked about 350 M out. Kept on before fading steadily inside final 200 M.

Took up running about 400 M after start. Ceded narrow advantage back to DARE TO WIN coming out of back straight. Still with leaders when under pressure to hold place early in straight but quickly overhauled.

Even jump, allowed to fade back to settle amongst rearward few, raced 2 wide 10Ls from them, wide from 1000 M, still well back at 400 M, made many lengths in straight but run ended at 250 M. Held on fairly thereafter.

Restrained from a wide alley, raced at tail 12Ls from pace, not asked throughout, kept to rails and saved ground on bend, still last turning in, switched out and made some progress but never really competitive.

No speed from outset and taken back to expected spot in last trio, raced 10Ls back on rails, helped by racing situations, gave start turning in, steadily made ground without threatening to be closest on the line.

Moderate getaway, settled behind midfield 2 wide 7Ls back, helped by fast speed, eased 3 wide on bend, gave a big start at top of straight, didn't avoid task and pulled plenty of ground back to finish a solid 3rd from impossible spot.

Well enough to beginning, took up a spot in front of midfield 5Ls from pace group, helped by tempo but had to cart field up on circle, made some headway but run ended at 200 M and was one paced thereafter.
Little speed from barrier amongst rear division 8Ls from lead on rails, no excuses in run, saved ground on bend, showed little when pressured and gradually lost touch in straight.

Average getaway, regathered to be in midfield on rails 6Ls back in 7th, suited by speed and not required to do extra to bend, kept to paint in straight but only battled last 300 M. (Mucopus in trachea.)

Respectable beginning, pressed on when caught wide to race 2Ls back outside leader, did share of work chasing solid pace, right there on bend, challenged briefly at 300 M but found winner too good. Stuck to task well for 2nd.

Taken back from unfavourable draw, ended up 2 wide 12Ls back at rear, helped by solid speed, came 3 wide with trail on bend, gave too great a start turning but made up plenty of ground last 300 M to make frame.

Amongst first few to break, drove clear to lead them, overraced and was 2Ls clear throughout, kept tempo solid and still held advantage leaving bend, kicked hard and made rest chase, defied them to score easily in handy time.
Moderate beginning, took a spot in front of midfield 5Ls back in 5th, had a ground saving trip on rails, pushed along on turning, found nothing on straightening and just plodded to line.

First to hit ground, rolled on but outpaced and had to be content with spot behind leader, carted along at a fast tempo 3Ls back well clear of rest, close enough on turning but couldn't sprint again, run ended at 200 M.
Ordinary jump, regathered to position in running line 6Ls back, had an easy time in midfield with pace on, made some in ground to 200 M before condition gave out, one paced thereafter.

Jumped nicely, led comfortably, controlled race from the outset at a slow pace, had a dream trip to bend, under a hold and narrowly clear turning, pressured from 400 M and fought on well to earn a narrow win.

Lacked speed from outset, ended up at rear 3Ls back on rails, not helped by slow tempo, checked at 1200 M, again struggled to quicken and out of sorts turning, wound up late to do best work last 200 M.

Restrained from outset, taken in behind to race on leaders back, overraced badly with slow tempo, kept to rails 1-2Ls back on circle, switched out turning, couldn't dash after using up early and run ended at 200 M. (Tactics queried.)
Fast out, took a sit behind pace, had a nice trail in 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls back, tracked nicely on bend, switched out to middle, lacked a real dash but kept on evenly in run to line.
Bounced out evenly, took a position at leaders girth, helped by slow tempo, right there on turning, applied acid test from 400 M, kept worrying leader duration of straight to just go down.
Settled behind midfield along the fence. Ran into some traffic problems in the straight whilst closing off well along the inside.
Tracked the leader along the fence, peeled out turning for home, ran on to be nearest without threatening.
1 out 1 back, had very chance.
Positioned 2-wide, midfield with cover. Shifted out for a run after straightening and ran on steadily to the finish.
After the 1000 M was left racing without cover, 3 to 4-wide in front of midfield. Stayed on well in the straight.
Raced midfield, 3-wide with cover. Lengthened well in the straight to score a good win.
Began awkwardly and lost ground, settled 3-wide with cover midfield, only plodded to the line.
Led but faded quickly passing the 400 M. (Swollen right front fetlock.)
From an outside gate, was taken back across runners to take up a rearward position. Worked to the line well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced outside the leader, gradually weakened after the 200 M.
Raced midfield on the rails, struck interference near the 200 M but was a beaten horse.
Positioned towards the rear, 1 off with cover, showed no turn of foot in the run home.
Raced near the tail of the field, 3-wide with cover, showed no response when pressured after the 400 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Settled in rear section and was last to enter home straight. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Settled 3 to 4Ls off the pace in 4th place at 1400 M. Went forward 800 M out and raced alongside the leader making home turn. Weakened final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Switched out at 300 M and mounted a strong rally. Kept gaining on eventual winner final stages but the line came too soon.
Hard ridden from the get go to be alongside the leader. Struggled to keep pace at the turn and ran out of gas in the straight.
Slow to muster speed and settled towards the rear. Steadily made up ground after straightening but was steadied to avoid slow traffic at 200 M. Closed off only fairly thereafter.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Quickened and steadily made up ground after straightening. Took the lead at 100 M and kept on well enough to hold off late challenger.
Never worse than midfield. Improved a bit making the turn and was 3Ls down in 3rd place on straightening. Kept on fairly and held on for a minor placing.
Pushed along to take the lead. Continued to hold a length's advantage final 200 M but unable to find extra over the closing stages.
Settled 3Ls off the pace in 3rd place at 1400 M. Remained in similar position turning for home. Only stayed on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section. Made up ground by running past tired runners in the straight.
Awkward jump and was taken back. Near last on straightening and finished off with a nice rally. Just missed a minor placing.
Messy start, with cover but worse than midfield at least 5Ls from the front through to home turn, made some minor late ground without really threatening a place.
Worked hard early 3-wide no cover when 1L off pace at 1000 M, a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home turn, could only stay on at the same tempo.
No early speed, 8Ls off pace towards rear at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 12th off final turn, ran on well late to nick 2nd on the line.
Always covering extra ground out wide, 3Ls back out 3-wide no cover at 800 M, wider on the circle, wilted from top of homestretch.
Around midfield about 3Ls off pace until home turn, given every chance to place but missed out inside final 50 M.
3-back along the inner about 3Ls behind the lead in midfield until home turn, had every chance to figure in the money but too one-paced final 200 M.
Never going well, failed to muster any early dash, 10Ls behind in rear and ridden along 700 M out, very tame performance.
Best away, led by 1L at 900 M on fence, headed shortly after straightening and gave ground, very weak late.
Moved inside from wider gate, over 4Ls back in midfield at 800 M and at home turn, stayed on fairly in stretch for a place, tipped out of 2nd on the line.
Always close-up within 2Ls or so of the speed around 5th, going well off final turn and led 300 M out, forged clear.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th from 1000 M to home turn, given every hope but was just too one-paced.
Raced greenly throughout, 3-wide with cover and worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at 700 M, struggling entering home straight, gave ground.
Slowest away, on fence about 6Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, couldn't draw any nearer.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at 1200 M, still tucked away in midfield off home turn, failed to quicken up and beaten at the 200 M.
Pushed along to dispute early pace out 2-wide, led by a neck at top of homestretch, headed at 200 M but stayed on well for pressure to hang on for 2nd.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace at halfway, 2Ls down in 5th turning for home and led about 200 M out, always doing just enough to win.
Always caught 3-wide no cover about 2Ls back at 1000 M in 6th or so, pressed on to go 1L back in 2nd at final turn, all out to hold this spot at 200 M but tired late.
Slowest away, 5-back on fence in 12th about 6Ls off speed down the back, only marginally closer at top of home straight, ran on strongly especially inside final 50 M to take 3rd.
Mostly 5th or 6th with cover about 2Ls or 3Ls from the lead until home turn, largely one-paced in the finish and had his chance to place.
8Ls last at the 1200 M, no closer taking home turn, never competitive and eased down a long way out.
3-wide with cover about 7Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, headway to be 3Ls back in midfield at home bend, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, appeared certain to place 50 M out but caught on the line.
Over-raced early on worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace, held up for a run turning for home, 3Ls down in mid-division at 200 M but couldn't improve any further.
Switched from wide gate to race 4-back on fence about 5Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, about 4Ls back in same position taking home turn, never likely to land a blow. (Lame next day.)
Awkward break, 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, similarly placed on straightening, always held by principals.
Slow to begin and slid inside from wide gate, 7Ls back in 13th at halfway, edged a little closer taking home turn, never likely to finish any better than mid-pack.
Driven along to vie for early lead on fence, 1L ahead at 800 M and hung out on the circle, overhauled at top of homestretch and faded out rapidly. (Mucus.)
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, still bang there at top of home straight, plugged on at the one speed in the finish.
Took the rail and led easily despite the wide draw, headed the field at very slow early sectionals, dominated until 100 M overhauled, just ran on for 2nd.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, blocked from 400 M to 200 M, dashed well when clear and finish 3rd.
Hard ridden to occupy the box seat, favoured by the slow pace, however soon weakened 300 M.
Bumped start and lost ground, midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased back and crossed the rails, 7Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace and blocked most straight, just ran on.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader, trapped 4-wide and covered too much ground at bends, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M.
Eased towards the rear, 9Ls behind the leader 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well and made ground 200 M.
Eased back as usual, 7Ls behind the leader 3-wide, travelled nicely, dashed impressively 300 M despite the slow pace and won remarkably.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader, raced keenly, moved up 800 M without using any effort, helped by the slow pace, however just held ground in straight.
Better than midfield, 3Ls off the slow pace along the fence, dropped off 400 M.
Settled 2Ls off the leader 3-wide, helped by the slow pace, travelled nicely until 200 M weakened.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, ran on fairly in final stages.
Midfield, 3-wide throughout, 3-1/2Ls behind the slow pace, ran on until 300 M faded.
Raced 4-wide throughout, never competitive at the rear.
Broke well from widest draw holding narrow advantage down centre of back straight. Worked his way to cross for rails run passing 100 M and led until finding no extra to sustain effort at the 300 M.
Began fairly racing wide in midfield early. Moved up to prominent position coming out of back straight. Folded up quickly inside final 400 M.
Settled at the back. Baulked for a run early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Midfield early, steadied and lost position over 1000 M out. Towards rear rounding home bend and into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Slightly bumped turning for home, then dropped out tamely.
Travelled on rails in rear of midfield. Steadied for a run about 300 M out. Fought on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M without threatening.
Broke well and up with pace early, gradually settling in one out one back position in 4th rounding home bend. Similar turning in but couldn't hold place under pressure.
With leaders far side. Travelled one back in 3rd on rails around home bend. Obtained run shortly after 400 M and quickened well to hit front over 250 M out only to be caught close to home.
Settled just behind midfield. Baulked behind runners upon straightening before clear passage came after 300 M. Ran home strongly to just fail to peg back winner on line.
Settled 2-wide in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to gain every chance inside final 200 M, however, lost 3rd late.
Raced wide in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Soon dropped to rear and trailed the field to 400 M. Finished off race nicely past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Raced very wide in midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.

Broke well from inside gate. Restrained to hold 5th 2-back on rails coming out of back straight. Similar when baulked briefly on straightening. Came to challenge dourly passing 300 M and gained upper hand close to home.

Fastest out, lead them with ease, rolled along at an extremely swift pace 2 to 3Ls clear on circle, still 2Ls in front on turning, had enough by 200 M as expected but kept in together bravely to take 3rd.

Away in line, didn't show customary speed and ended up 2 to 3-wide 8Ls back at tail, helped by fast tempo, well back between horses turning, cut back to fence and reeled them in with ease in straight under hands and heels to score.

Ordinary jump, settled in last few 8Ls back on rails, improved to be 6Ls back in 8th on circle, shifted out on turning, made fair ground in straight finishing off nicely last 200 M but ran out of ground.

Began nicely, took a prominent spot 3Ls back on rails, had dream trip with fast pace, same margin down in 3rd turning in, switched out and gradually closed, found winner in another grade but held 2nd easily.

Away in line, faded back when steadied at 1000 M, brought up rear 10Ls back racing 2-wide, still saw them all leaving bend, widest in straight and made some progress but only passed well beaten runners.

Average jump, recovered to be prominent on rails behind pacey front runner, carted along at a solid tempo 2Ls back, eased 2-wide turning and challenged at 300 M, didn't have enough last 200 M but held on nicely to make frame.
Standard beginning, took up a midfield role 6Ls off pace, raced between horses on circle and helped by speed, switched to middle and closed to 250 M when run ended, never likely thereafter.

Always with first few, couldn't slot in and forced to race 3-wide 6Ls back without cover, didn't have an easy time working hard with speed on, found little when pressured and dropped out badly. (Lame and soft palate displacement.)

Positive jump, took up a spot trailing speed 3Ls back 2-wide, travelled kindly first without cover on circle, close enough on turning but soon weakened when asked for effort, dropped out quickly last 200 M.

Slowly into stride, urged along from outset, raced 2-wide 8 to 9Ls back, helped by fast tempo, gave a sizeable start on bend, kept to rails and made some headway gradually in straight without threatening.
Settled one back in 3rd on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening but never able to get to heels of winner.
Tracked leader one-out-one-back in 2nd to straight. Moved up to lead passing 400 M and easily went 2Ls clear 200 M out. Unextended.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced one out two back in 4th to straight. Soon weakened.
Travelled on rails in rear of midfield. Switched 2-wide for a run turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Jumped moderately. Settled in midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Raced wide behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled at for pace at start, settling 2 back in 5th on rails within 3Ls of pace. Shaken up upon straightening but was one-paced before fading passing 200 M.
Travelled mainly in rear of midfield. Made moderate headway down centre of straight without ever threatening.
Raced wide in last few. Dropped to last turning in. Ran past well beaten horses early in straight. Did best work late at finish.
Always towards rear. Kept on at the one pace in straight.
Soon taken to the rear of field. Remained same turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure.
Led to 350 M. Weakened under pressure.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up good ground down inner to be nearest to finish.

Began nicely, held a prominent role before settling behind speed 3Ls back on rails, tracked nicely saving ground on bend, in amongst horses most of straight but steadily progressed closing hard late to grab 2nd.

Jumped well but soon faded back, raced 2 to 3-wide behind midfield 6Ls off front, had cover but raced ungenerously on bend, switched out in straight and closed off nicely from impossible spot to be closest at finish.

Stumbled on jumping, didn't have speed to go with rest early, raced at tail 9Ls back on rails, helped by the slow pace, saved ground on bend, worked home nicely along inside over an insufficient trip.

First to hit ground, had plenty of toe and took up spot on leaders back, didn't get a rest with solid tempo, right there on turning in, didn't have a dash in straight but stuck on evenly in run to line.
Out with rest, couldn't muster early speed and settled back with last few 8Ls back on rails, moved 2-wide on circle, lacked usual finish in stretch and made little progress in run to line.
Even getaway, soon sharing rear when unable to match them, raced 2-wide 8Ls back, helped by tempo, switched 3-wide on bend, last on turning and never really nearer.

Away in line, didn't have speed to cross, slotted into nice trail in midfield 3Ls away in running line, had ideal trip behind speed, eased out on turning, gradually closed to hit lead at 100 M and held challengers well in run to line.

Out only fairly but showed plenty of dash to cross outside leader from 14 gate, kept pressure on throughout, 1/2L down on turning, hit lead briefly at 250 M, stuck on gamely in straight for a solid finish in frame.

Fair break, pushed on to take closer order, had ideal spot 1 out 1 back but overraced in mid-section, 2Ls down on turning, there to 200 M but received a bump when weakening and dropped out thereafter.

Began with rest, outpaced and had to be contend with a midfield berth 5Ls away on rails, had a quiet time in mid-section same margin back on turning, closed race off nicely down centre to be closest on line.

Out with field, showed good early speed to apply pressure and take up running, rolled along at a solid clip, held a 1/2L break on turning, stuck on to 200 M but condition gave out and dropped off in run to line.

Away with line, dropped into a midfield spot, raced 2-wide 4 to 5Ls back, tracked eventual winner on bend, switched to middle but caught a little flat footed when sprint went on, did best work late and closed off nicely for 3rd.

Standard beginning, regathered to sit just off midfield 7Ls back in running line, still well down between horses turning, made only moderate progress in straight, tightened late but never really threatened.

Moderate getaway, taken back from a wide draw, ended up 3-wide without cover 6Ls back in midfield, did plenty of work to bend with speed on, couldn't find to raise another effort in straight and just plugged on line.

3-wide with cover about 4Ls back in 9th or so at 1000 M, still 5Ls down turning for home when 4-wide, finished off strongly despite hanging right under pressure, got up to lead final strides. (Saddle shifted.)
Mostly midfield about 4Ls off speed when 2-wide or 3-back on fence until the home straight, stayed on well late, nearest at finish.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, 2-wide off pace in 4th or 5th early on, lost his position on the circle, petered out.
Raced 3-wide with cover around midfield about 5Ls back at 1200 M, 4Ls down at home turn in 8th or so, very one-paced and posed no danger at all.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home turn, found nothing much off the bridle and beaten 200 M out.
A neck off early pace out 2-wide in 2nd, still 1L down in 2nd at final turn, failed to quicken up and faded further inside final 200 M.
Went back from wide gate to be 3-wide with cover about 8Ls down at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 12th off final bend, stayed on only fairly down centre of track, never nearer.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 5Ls back in about 10th at halfway, same position but without clear running at top of homestretch, soon clear and ran on well late, nearest at finish.
Always close-up, never worse than 2-wide or 3Ls off pace from 3rd to 5th until home turn, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, outpaced by leading pair but checked close home.
Very flat effort, always rear and never better than 8Ls off speed at any stage, eased down a long way from home.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off pace in 9th or 10th from 1200 M to home turn, no form of acceleration in the home straight.
Dwelt at start, 10Ls back in rear at 1200 M, 6Ls down off final bend when sent out into the clear, ran on okay late, never nearer.
Soon led on fence by a neck, maintained advantage to lead by 1L at home turn, stayed on well but grabbed by JOY AND FUN inside final strides.
Away in line, faded back as expected to race 2 wide 4Ls away in running line, had a fair trip and improved between horses on bend, into clear on turning and closed steadily to be nearest on line.
Amongst first few to break, pressed on to take a prominent sit 1L away outside leader, edged closer to leaders girth on circle, took over passing 200 M but couldn't sustain run last 100 M.

Checked and lost ground early (rider briefly lost iron), regathered to push up into midfield, had ideal run in on circle, 2Ls down on turning, switched out but lacked another gear and finished at one speed last 200 M.

Taken back from outset, ended up racing 5Ls back on rails, had a quiet time in mid-section, crowded 600 M, saved ground on bend, never really got a clear crack when held up at 200 M and battled when clear (steadied late).

Awkwardly away and lost further ground when checked, settled in last few but raced ungenerously, raced on rails 6Ls back at midpoint, last on turning, picked up at 200 M and charged last 100 M making many lengths to make frame.

Average break, ridden along to hold a spot 3Ls back on rails, had good trip off pace in midfield, still same margin back in 6th on turning, split emerged at 150 M and ascended under hard riding to score in good style.
Away with first few, couldn't slot in and ended up 3 wide 4Ls back with cover, midfield between horses throughout, struggling on bend and weakened right out in straight. (Heart irregularity.)

First to hit ground, had speed but required to work to eventually find lead, headed them up at 800 M, steadied tempo on bend, 1/2L clear on turning, couldn't dash again when tackled at 150 M. One-paced (checked 100 M).
Reasonable beginning, posted 3 and 4 wide in midfield 5Ls back, always doing it tough off course to bend, 4Ls down on turning in, run ended at 100 M when hard trip took toll.

Even break, ridden along to challenge for front, held rails early before taking a trail on leaders back, had dream trip thereafter, didn't find when gap appeared and just closed at same pace in straight.

Ordinary jump, regathered but posted 3 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls back, did share of work on circle, gradually closed to be 1L back in 3rd on bend, hit lead briely at 100 M but couldn't hold winner out late. (Dropped whip.)

Restrained behind runners from outset, raced 2 to 3 wide 6Ls back at tail, checked at 1000 M and overraced in mid-section, switched 4 and 5 wide turning in, made some ground to 200 M but battled thereafter.
Raced 1 off in 2nd last position, had cover, no acceleration.
Raced near the rear along the fence, failed to run on.
Slow to begin and checked soon after the start. Settled a long last and beat home tired runners.
Ridden off the speed, 3 wide at times without cover, failed to find extra gear in the run home.
Led, but overhauled near the 200 M.
Raced behind midfield, 3 wide with cover for parts of the trip, finished off soundly.
Box seated, held up near the 200 M, closed off well once into the clear.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and settled midfield the fence. Weakened quickly turning for home.
Settled just off midfield, 1 off with cover, kept to the inside in the straight finished off fairly.
Settled in 3rd last position on the fence, came wide turning for home, didn't go on.
Parked outside the leader, drew away near the 200 M to finish off strongly.

Pushed along early to be in front of midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 800 M out. Improved gradually and was 1-1/2Ls down at home turn. Kept chasing but unable to take ground off eventual winner in the home straight.

Contested for the early lead. Settled on fence and 2Ls behind the pace at 800 M. Gradually slipped back and was 2-wide at midfield making home turn. Stayed on one-pace in the straight and was checked 100 M out.
Checked at 1100 M and trailed field. Remained in a rearward position making home turn. Rallied from behind and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Ridden along early stages and settled 2-wide at midfield back straight. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped well from an outside draw and was allowed to settle 3-wide without cover at midfield. Remained 3-wide and was 3Ls off the leader turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Ridden along out of the gates and took the lead at 1000 M. Had a 1-1/2Ls advantage into the home straight. Kept on well and held a comfortable margin in run to the line.
Bumped on jumping and lost ground. Spent most of the trip in rear section and ran on without threatening in the straight.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily and made up ground in the straight.
Settled on fence at midfield. Never got a clear run from 400 M onwards and didn't get a real crack at them in straight.
Jumped fairly but was soon outpaced. Trailed field from 800 M onwards and only ran past a beaten runner in the straight.
