Dropped to a rearward spot from a wide draw. 3-wide behind midfield in back straight. Ran on under same pace in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates to take up a forward position. Settled behind the pace after 900 M. Unable to keep pace and weakened before straightening.
Unacceptable performance, always off the bridle and struggling in rear, beaten a long way out.
Away well but couldn't lead on fence, disputed quick early tempo, 2Ls back in 2nd at 800M, hard ridden when 3Ls back in 2nd off final turn, faded out.
Ridden along early when 8Ls off pace in 9th, worse off when turning for home, never much of a factor.
3-back on fence about 5Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, ridden along when similarly placed at final turn, stayed on fairly late for a place.
Around midfield with cover about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure to try and improve at 500 M, never dangerous.
Always caught 3-wide without cover, about 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, hard pressed to lie up 500 M out, beaten soon after straightening.
Pressured to lead on fence by 1L at 1100 M, appeared to be going well when 3Ls clear at final bend, found nothing off the bit and dropped out very rapidly once headed at 200 M.
Caught 3-wide no cover early on, got in 2-wide at 1100 M, mostly 4th between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace until home turn, one-paced thereafter.

About 5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide with cover from 1000 M to home straight, moved 3Ls back in 3rd at 200 M, ran on well late despite interference to be a nose 2nd, placed 1st after Stewards' inquiry. (Distressed.)
Ideally placed on fence in 3rd between 2Ls and 4Ls off speed from 1000 M to home turn, led about 200 M out, shifted left final 50 M, won by a nose but placed 2nd after Stewards' inquiry.
Keen early on in rear, still 9Ls back when checked at 500 M, ran on fairly well in the straight, never nearer.
In rear about 9Ls behind speed at 1000 M, still a good way behind off final bend, stayed on well late, never nearer.
About 9Ls back in 7th with cover at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 8th making final bend, ran on strongly but the line came a fraction too soon.
3-wide with cover but 5Ls back in 8th at 1000 M, never any better than midfield and very weak in home straight.
Caught 3 wide without cover throughout, 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, lost position in the circle and faded right out in home straight.
3-back on the fence about 3Ls or 4Ls back in 4th through to home turn, lad his chance to place but lacked the dash.
Made all, led on fence by 1L at 1200 M and held a similar break turning for home, stayed on well for pressure to prevail.
2-wide and 1L off speed in 2nd at 1200 M, always tended to hang out, under pressure to lie up at the 500 M, very weak finish, unacceptable effort. (Mucus.)
slowly away, 5Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at 1200 M, same margin back in midfield taking home bend, stayed on well to take 3rd inside final 50 M.
Had a lovely trail about 2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd or 3rd until home turn, should have at least placed but too weak inside final 50 M.
3Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at 1200 M, still close enough at home turn but very one-paced in the stretch.
4-back on fence about 6Ls off speed in 8th or so from 1000 M to home turn, stayed on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious in gates and lost ground at start, always in rear bunch about 7Ls behind leader until home turn, made some minor late ground.
Shared last place about 8Ls off the speed, on his own in rear at 600 M, made only a scant late impression.
Pushed forward to sit outside the leader 2 wide throughout, benefited by the slow tempo, ran on until 200 M but faded when run ended.
Eased back to cross the rails and sit just behind midfield, 4.5Ls off the leader, helped by the rails run but not suited by the slow pace, no turn of foot in final stages.
Slowly away, hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot 2Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on strongly 200 M to win by a narrow margin.
Pushed to take the rail and led at slow tempo, hung on until 250 M weakened.
Just better than midfield, 3.5Ls off the slow pace 2 wide, dashed well 300 M, took lead 200 M and hung on until 50 M overhauled, just ran on for 2nd.

Eased to the rear and crossed the rails, 6.5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 3 wide at home bend to obtain clear running, however remained flat until 100 M, produced little dash.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field along the fence, 3.5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 400 M to 200 M dashed strongly when clear to finish a strong 3rd.
Eased to sit worse than midfield 2 wide, 4.5Ls off the leader, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 250 M but never threatened.
Eased back, 5.5Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace, trapped 3 wide throughout and covered too much ground at bends, closed the race off strongly 200 M despite all negative racing situations.
Settled in the box seat throughout, however blocked most straight, never fully tested, just ran on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed early but failed to muster speed at the back, 6.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, lacked room 300 M, dashed well when clear and closed the race off nicely.
Worse than midfield, trapped 3 wide throughout and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, no progress in straight.
Never far off in better than midfield position on rails. In similar position in 4th turning in. Ran home well under pressure to do best work at finish.
Began awkwardly. Soon dropped to last. Trailed the field to home bend. Kept on one pace in the run home.
3-wide and with leaders till Rock. Dropped to 3L 4th coming out of back straight. Still plugging on turning for home but weakened noticeably inside final 200 M.
With leaders for first 200 M. Dropped to mid-division before Rock. Checked and dropped out of contention coming out of back straight.
Broke well. Close up early. Gradually dropped to forward of midfield approaching Rock. Sustained moderate progress down straight despite a wide trip throughout.
Began fairly. Ridden to join leaders. Ceded lead coming out of back straight. Soon dropped out from 2L 2nd into straight.
Broke well and kept in touch till lost position slightly rounding home bend. Still in 3rd but over 2Ls behind turning in. Fought on steadily but lost placing late.

With leaders racing wide down centre of track throughout far side. Gradually worked his way to lead for rails run around home bend. Kicked 2Ls clear upon straightening and just held off runner-up's late surge.
Settled towards rear. Ran on well late closing stages.
Midfield. Steadied for a stride about 500 M out. In rear of midfield turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Raced wide behind midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure down centre of track.
Niggled along on rails in last few. Slightly hampered coming out of back straight. Took closer order on rails around bend. Ran on under pressure in straight for best effort at finish.

Showed enough to be up there early, tried to restrain but ended up 3 wide (with cover) 3Ls back, covered ground to bend, came 4 wide into straight, didn't have a dash but kept on steadily holding ground to line.

Out with rest, had enough dash to hold a prominent spot 3Ls back on rails, took a breather on fence in mid-section after early turn, had chance when close enough turning in, never quickened and just battled late.

Began well, restrained out of early fight, behind midfield 2 wide 6Ls back throughout, switched to rails but still gave a start on bend (steadied 600 M) didn't get a crack when in from 200 M and only clear when all over.

Slowly out as usual, settled at rear 3Ls off field, helped by fast tempo, still at rear 8Ls back passing rock, well down and took inside runs turning in, switched to middle and made many lengths last 200 M to score deserved win.
Standard break, went forward but unable to lead after being 4 wide early, pressured at mid-point and kept working to bend 1/2L down on turning, weakened when workload took toll last 150 M.

Broke nicely, in front leaving straight, eventually surrended lead after pressured, behind the leader thereafter, saved ground on inside to bend, kept to rails in straight but lacked another gear, one paced.

Average jump, ended up near rear as expected, helped by tempo, raced 2 wide 6Ls away in mid-section, took off on bend, came with strong run 4 wide into straight, hit front and looked the winner before collared late.

Moderate jump and crowded early, drifted back towards rear, raced 2 wide 6Ls away at rear, came 3 wide with a trail at 1000 M, hung when making a 4 wide run on bend, just battled away down outside in straight.

Away with them, pressed forward but avoided speed battle and camped in 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls back, relaxed well just off speed in mid-section, close enough when switching out turning, couldn't match first two last 150 M.

Away in line, pushed on from outside alley, worked hard for first half being 4 wide, eventually 3 wide without cover challenging 1L back, under a lot of pressure on bend and dropped right out in straight after tough trip.

Shared speed from outset, ridden hard to look for front, used plenty to take over in back straight, kept going at a reasonable tempo, 1/2L clear on turning, couldn't dash again at 150 M but held on creditably to make frame.

Out only fairly, allowed to drift back to settle behind midfield, had a suitable trip in running line 5 to 6Ls away, back in traffic on turning, clear at 150 M but steadied again at 150 M, closed evenly with impeded passage.
Soon settled wide in midfield. Kept on same pace early in straight before making some late impression closing stages.
On pace early, settling in midfield on rails. Shuffled back to rear of field 800 M out and in last from Rock. Just managed to beat the worse pair home.

Ridden along after jumping from wide draw but beaten for pace early. Renewed effort to make rapid progress to dispute lead about 800 M out. Chased leader into straight and unable to move any closer throughout.
Soon took up running after beginning from barrier 10. Held narrow lead to straight. Fought on well to kick clear of placegetters inside final 200 M.
Settled just off the pace mainly in 3rd or 4th. Came to challenge under pressure early in straight but unable to make any impression throughout.
Settled in midfield. Did not have too much room between runners early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to 500 M. Made up good ground in straight. Best effort at finish.
With pace early. Steadied and lost position over 800 M out. Hampered again coming out of back straight when towards rear. Weakened in straight.
From widest barrier, travelled wide in last few early. Made swift progress passing 800 M to dispute 3rd 3 wide at Rock. Similar turning in but soon weakened.
Raced keenly behind midfield. Lost ground when wide home turn. Did nothing in straight.
Jumped fairly. Settled behind midfield. Steadied 500 M out. Commenced run turning in. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, settling just off the pace, mostly one back sharing 3rd on rails. Switched off rails for a run upon straightening but could only keep on steadily without threatening.
Amongst first few to begin, took a sit behind leader, did share of work behind genuine speed, close enough on bend, run opened but could only produce a one pace rally to hold ground in run to line.
Well enough to begin, held a spot in front of midfield, travelled nicely 4Ls off speed on rails, run opened on turning but lacked a turn of foot and battled to line last 200 M.

Improved jump out, settled more prominently and challenged early, did share of work outside leader at a genuine clip, kept there and was 1L down on turning, condition gave out at 200 M and dropped off after a hard run.
Away well but allowed to relax in midfield, raced 6Ls back in running line, tracked nicely behind eventual winner on bend, couldn't match first two but closed race off soundly down centre.

Away well, hard ridden in the early stages to hold a forward role, raced in coveted 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls away, aided by tempo, had chance on turning but didn't have required turn of foot, steadied at 100 M but never likely.
Moderate getaway, raced in a rearward position as expected, 6Ls back on rails at midpoint but helped by tempo, still well back on turning, switched 2 wide and closed evenly to be nearest on line.
Little speed from the outset, assumed usual rearward role 7Ls back on rails, still well back approaching bend, lacked a finish but did make up a little late ground between horses last 200 M.

Fastest into stride, crossed them with ease, kept speed even in front 1L clear, made them chase on circle, held a 1L advantage turning, kicked hard in straight and only reeled in last 100 M by winner.
No speed as usual, soon settled at tail, raced 2 wide 8Ls or more back, switched by tempo, still had field to beat on bend, didn't finish off as normally would and just plodded to line.

Flat footed at start and lost considerable ground, raced at rear on fence 8Ls from them, helped by genuine tempo, switched 2 wide but gave a huge start on bend, made many lengths down outside from an impossible spot.

Away in line, didn't have early pace but settled closer 4Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section aided by even tempo, came 2 wide at 600 M, switched 4 wide turning, ascended at 150 M to claim them and score with ease.
Even getaway but soon in latter half of field, raced 7Ls away in running line, advantaged by the speed, switched between horses turning in, closed at same speed making little impression in straight.
Travelled behind midfield. Took off around home bend and went wide into straight for a run. Finished off race dourly to just get up on line.
Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened.
Travelled in midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw, settling at the back. Hampered on rails when under pressure over 200 M out. Never recovered.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Began well. Settled 2-wide in 3rd mostly about 2Ls off to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all, kicking nearly 3Ls clear 200 M out. Flattered and caught in the shadows of the post. (Thumps.)
Towards rear to straight. Improving down inner when checked 200 M out. Never recovered.
Raced 2-wide in forward of midfield. Took closer order around home bend, but could only plug on at the one pace in the run home.
Trailed the field to straight. Made up good ground down centre of the track inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Travelled on rails just better than mid-division. Fought on steady in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Settled behind midfield on the fence, made good ground over the final 400 M along the inside.
Raced just off midfield, 3-wide with cover, stayed on soundly.
Settled midfield the fence, railed up in the straight finished off well.
Settled in 3rd last position along the rail, found nothing under pressure.
Positioned 1 out 1 back, battled away one-paced in the run to the line.
Led, capitulated soon after turning for home.
Travelled in 2nd last position, 1 off, ran on strongly in the straight.
Camped behind the leader on the fence, faded inside the 200 M.
Failed to muster early speed and raced midfield, 3-wide no cover, struggled in the straight.
Raced close to midfield, 2-wide with cover, never threatened.
From a wide barrier, went forward to race outside the leader, hit the front near the 400 M and drew away in the straight to score easily.
Began awkwardly and almost dislodged its rider. Settled in last position, passed tiring horses over the latter stages.
Soon led. Took a length's advantage into the home straight, stayed on well and held a comfortable margin to the finish.
Raced 2-wide in a forward position. A length off the leader turning for home. Unable to turn up a notch and kept on only fairly to the line.
Jumped well but failed to muster speed to keep pace in front Gradually dropped back to behind midfield amongst last few to enter home straight and made up ground by running past tired runners.
Settled on the fence towards the rear. Made a ground saving trip around home turn. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Raced towards the rear, well back and gave a big start on bend, only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Slowly away and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight and unable to quicken.
3-wide without cover in a forward position. Remained 3-wide and a length off the lead making home turn. Unable to keep pace final 200 M and weakened.
Settled 2-wide and no worse than midfield. Lacked a response when asked after straightening and gradually faded.
Ridden along early stages and raced 3-wide at midfield. Unable to find more in the home straight and faded final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Raced along the rails behind midfield. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Raced on fence behind the pace. Kept on well in the straight but couldn't find enough to get closer in the final stages.
2-wide in 7th about 4Ls off speed at 1200 M, same margin back in 9th turning for home, one-paced through closing stages.
Always well there, over 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, led by a neck at top of home straight, headed about 150 M out, one-paced and lost out on 2nd final 50 M.
Disputed early tempo out 3-wide without cover, still close up having had a tough trip taking home turn, gave ground 200 M out.
Slid across from wide gate to 8Ls last at 1200 M, improved from rear on the circle, 6-wide (widest of all) in 10th into straight, quickened up well to lead at 150 M, driven out.
Crowded at start and ridden along early, on fence 7Ls back in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 11th at final bend, stayed on only fairly.
Away well, settled 3-back on fence in 5th about 3Ls off pace at 1100 M, going well 2Ls down in 4th on straightening, had every chance but outpaced by the winner.
Over-raced early on fence, 3-back about 4Ls off speed in midfield through to home straight, never looked like improving very much.
Wide early but led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, headed just before the home turn and petered out.
In 6th about 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, closer turning for home, very one-paced and no excuses.
4-wide no cover at 1300 M, 3-wide with cover down the back about 4Ls down in midfield, a little closer turning for home, plugged on at the one pace.
Caught wide without cover throughout, 3-wide back in 5th at 1200 M, 4-deep down backstretch in midfield about 4Ls off pace, retreating before the 200 M pole.
Always towards rear, 6Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, no better off swinging for home, no impression.
2-wide about 6Ls back in 9th at halfway, ridden along to take closer order on straightening, stayed on okay for 2nd but had no hope with the winner.
Good early dash to lead easily 1300 M out on fence by 1L, headed 800 M out, 2Ls back in 3rd off final bend, very weak final furlong.
Caught 4-wide no cover in midfield at 1200 M, pressed on to lead at 800 M but headed at top of home straight, plodded home at the one pace.
Nicely placed on fence in 4th or 5th about 3Ls off speed until home turn, found zero off the bridle and beaten 200 M out.
Around midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed until the 600 M, edged a little closer turning for home, very one-paced.
Switched from wide gate to fence in rear about 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th off final turn, never troubled those ahead.
Shared rear position on fence about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, niggled along at 800 M, encountered traffic problems in the stretch but never really threatened.
4-wide no cover at 1200 M, gained cover down the back in 8th and 5Ls off pace, left 3-wide no cover on circle and ridden hard to be 4-wide in 4th about 3Ls back in stretch, emptied out.
3-back on fence and mostly 7th between 4Ls and 5Ls off pace, never likely to progress much further.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, lost this position turning for home when under pressure, soon beaten.
Tacked across from wide gate to share rear position about 8Ls off pace until the 600 M, still well back turning for home, stayed on through tired rivals for a place.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, eased to the front at top of home straight, dashed clear, comfortably.
Eased to get across and sit at the rear, 7Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly last 200 M.
At back, 1-wide, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to get across to the rail towards the rear, 7Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, improved 4-wide at the home bend, lost further ground in straight making no progress in final stages.
Midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to finish a remarkable 2nd.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, raced closer than usual but raced keenly, favoured by the slow tempo, ran on until 250 M flattened.

Very slowly away, hard ridden to keep up about midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, progressed forward 3-wide steadily and made ground at Home Bend, little dash 300 M whilst hanging in, run ended 100 M.
Hard ridden to get across and sat outside the leader, helped by the slow pace, hard ridden again 800 M to increase the pressure in front, however soon weakened 500 M. (Lame.)
Pushed early to keep up, settled worse than midfield, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, never competitive.
Settled in a prominent spot 2-1/2Ls behind the slow tempo 2-wide, travelled nicely, lacked turn of foot in straight but still managed to run on well to the line for 3rd.
Led by 1L easily along the rails and clocked very slow early sectionals, received some pressure 800 M, hung out abruptly 200 M, made all to score well.
Eased to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, bumped 600 M and then dropped off.
Broke well. Ridden for pace. Settled rails run behind leader entering back straight. Came to challenge turning in and hit front over 200 M out. Fought on well to the line.
Always struggling at the back.
Raced wide behind midfield. Similar turning in. Made no impression in straight until late nearing finish.
Always in last few, gradually dropping to tail-end turning for home. Only ran past well beaten horses.
Began fairly. Took up running and crossed to rails about 900 M out. Led until narrowly headed over 200 M out. Just held on for 2nd.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
Raced mainly one out two back in 3rd. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Settled in midfield. Held on to rails run turning in and ran on quite well to narrowly miss 2nd.
Raced in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slowly away. Remained in rear before commenced run around home bend. Shifted out wide to centre of straight for a nice run home.
Broke well and in front briefly. Settled 2-back on rails in 4th. Similar turning in. Kept on same pace under pressure early in straight before finding no extra close to home.

No speed from outset, settled in 2nd half 4 to 5Ls back on rails, had an easy time throughout but not assisted by tempo, saved ground on bend, angled into clear passing 200M, made good ground late to just miss frame.

Away with first few, not too far back on rails 3Ls off pace early, overraced a touch but had ideal trip with steady tempo, on leaders back 1L down on bend, cut to inside but lacked acceleration, kept grinding away to be close up.
Well enough away, assumed prime position 1 out 1 back 2Ls away, had ideal trip with moderate tempo, under pressure on bend, didn't respond when run appeared in straight and weakened last 100 M.

Jumped nicely, rolled on in search of spot, forced to race 3-wide without cover 1-2Ls back outside leader, had a tough trip facing breeze, urged along on bend, hard run took toll and dropped out last 200 M.

Little speed from jump out, settled in rearward division, moved 3-wide to be 5Ls back in midfield with cover, came 4-wide but under pressure on bend. Condition gave out turning in and just battled to line.

Began nicely, urged along to take up expected role in front, dictated terms 1L clear of field, upped pace from Rock, 1/2L down on turning, headed at 200 M, one-paced but stuck to task and just lost 3rd late.

Began with more purpose, drifted back to sit behind midfield 2-wide 5Ls back, not aided by tempo but travelled well, same margin down turning, made a strong run down the middle making many lengths picking up all but winner.
Moderate beginning, soon settled towards rear, raced 6Ls back in running line, not helped by tempo, still well back to bend, came between horses at 200 M, motored late to snatch 3rd. Big effort.

Restrained from outset, didn't muster and ended up at tail 8Ls off leaders, not advantaged by pace in middle stages, well back passing Rock, saved ground turning and got going last 200 M to make many lengths from impossible spot.

Awkwardly away and lost ground, settled back with rearward division, raced on rails 6Ls back, harmed by steady tempo, still had job to do on bend, switched out in straight and made good ground to be nearest on line.

Away with them, had enough speed to hold a prominent spot, enjoyed good run on leaders back early before switching 2-wide at 1000 M, 1/2L down on turning in, hit front at 200 M and held off late challengers nicely.

First to show, behind leader early before angling 2 wide 3Ls back on bend, had ideal trip behind solid speed, switched to middle at 300 M, worked over the top of them last 200 M to score in very fast time.

Reasonable break, allowed to slot into midfield from a wide alley, raced on rails 4 to 5Ls back, improved on bend 3Ls down turning in, behind horses and switched out at 200 M, closed off nicely for a promising debut.
Tardy to begin, raced ungenerously throughout, ended up in midfield on rails 8Ls back, helped by tempo, was a spent force at 300 M and weakened thereafter.
Awkwardly away, raced greenly again, ended up 2 to 3 wide at rear 12Ls back, still in last trio leaving bend, showed nothing in run to line.
Slowly away, settled in last few 10Ls back 2 wide made a little ground on bend but lacked experience, urged along on circle, made a little progress in straight but never a real factor.
Out with line, held a spot behind pace 4Ls back in 5th in running line, urged along to improve on bend despite suitable run, hung in turning, just kept on at same pace in run to line.
Poor jump, raced at rear on rails 12Ls or more from front runners, still well back with field to beat on bend, managed to pass only tired runners late.
Moderate getaway and didn't have pace to match them and faded back, raced on fence 10Ls back struggling to hold spot on circle, found nothing when asked in straight.

Began with rest, had enough dash to keep with them early, raced 2Ls back in 3rd on strong speed 2 wide, followed nicely with cover on turning, couldn't dash again at 300 M, inexperience told and just weakened last 200 M.

Away in line, hard ridden to front, pressured throughout at fast tempo but held inside 1L back, fought back to share lead 1/2L down turning, regained front at 200 M but couldn't hold off principals late after early work.
Bounced in air and lost ground, soon towards rear, improved to be 8Ls down in 8th on bend, progressed 2 wide on turning, some run on but just holding ground from too far back to make a difference.

Amongst first few to break, showed good pace to challenge for front, lead 1 off fence at a fast tempo, still leading leaving circle without crossing, tackled at 200 M and condition gave out but held on well for 4th.
Settled near the tailenders on the rail, never a factor.
Travelled behind the leader on the fence, found no extra in the run home.
Made every post a winner, to score by a big margin.
Camped outside the leader, but out paced turning for home, ran well but no match for the winner.
A little slow to begin, then hard ridden to make up ground taking up position behind the speed, two wide with cover. Gave ground near the 400 M.
Jumped on terms, but failed to muster speed despite being ridden along and settled last. Never threatened.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Battled away over the final 250 M.
Raced back in the field, 3 wide with cover weakened over the last furlong. (Blood in trachea.)
Fair to begin, raced midfield, 3 deep with cover, never likely.
Settled 3 wide, no cover, close to the speed, commenced to tire after the 400 M.
Slow to begin, to take up a spot just in front of midfield, 2 wide with cover struggled inside the 300 M.
Slow to begin and settled midfield the fence. Made some ground over the concluding stages.
Taken back from widest draw. Raced in rear section and swung wide on straightening. Rallied and closed the race off well.
Led field before settling behind the pace 800 M out. Regained lead shortly after straightening. Kept on well but unable to hold of winner last few strides.
Settled 2-wide at midfield or behind. Gradually picked up on straightening and made up some ground in the straight.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. Kept on without quickening in the straight.
Lacked speed to keep pace with leaders. Raced around midfield but drifted back after crowding 700 M out. Pushed along to keep pace at the turn and weakened in the straight.
Pushed along to be in a forward position. 3-wide without cover and better than midfield at the turn. Lacked a response on straightening and weakened in the straight.
On the rails among leaders early stages. Better than midfield and 2 to 3Ls off the pace making home turn. Failed to keep pace on straightening and gradually weakened.
Settled 3-wide at midfield. Unable to quicken and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Jumped well from a wide draw but was allowed to drop back to a rearward position. Swung wide turning for home. Mounted a strong rally and was closest at finish.
Kept pace behind leaders early stages. 2-wide at midfield making home turn. Quickened when asked on straightening and steadily made up ground. Ran down rival inside final 50 M.
Jumped well and raced among leaders early stages. 2-wide and 2Ls back at 800 M out. 3-wide disputed lead turning for home but unable to turn up a notch in the home straight.
Off slowly and raced at the rear. Widest turning for home and made up good ground in the straight to be nearest at finish.
Off slowly, pushed along early stages and made its way back to midfield. Crowded at 900 M and slipped towards the back of the pack. Last on straightening and only ran past some beaten runners.
Jumped only fairly. Kept being ridden along and eventually reached the lead 900 M out. Held a slim advantage on straightening but weakened thereafter.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed until home turn, always well outpaced despite being a little tight for room close home.
Prominent early and left 3-wide no cover at 800 M when 2Ls back in 5th, 1L down in 3rd turning for home, kept on one-paced.
Never on terms, niggled along when 5-wide no cover early on, 8Ls off pace in 13th at 600 M, posed no danger.
Led out wide early on and crossed to lead on fence by 1L, headed at top of home straight and weakened inside final 200 M.
Close-up on fence at 1200 M, box-seat run on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th from 800 M to home turn, failed to quicken up.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls off speed through the first half, under pressure to lie up before the home turn, still thereabouts at 200 M but folded late.
No better than 12th or 7Ls off pace until the 600 M, ran on well down the centre of homestretch to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious in gates, never travelled well, niggled along in 11th about 7Ls back early on, under pressure when over 4Ls down in 10th off final bend, had his chance to run 2nd but fell just short.
Slowest away and always well behind, 8Ls back in 12th at halfway, never got much closer and eased 200 M out.
1L back in 2nd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight but headed 150 M out, all out to barely cling onto 2nd.
Worse than midfield 6Ls back at 1000 M, improved 3-wide with cover on circle to be 2Ls down in mid-division off final bend, led 150 M out, ran on well.
Mostly midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed until the home straight, ran on fairly without any menace.
Held the 'one-out-one-back' position about 2Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, same at top of home straight, plugged on at the one pace.
Always struggling, soon behind and under pressure, 10Ls detached in rear turning for home, made some very minor late headway.
Prominent when 3-wide no cover early on at 1200 M, lost position very rapidly on the circle and beaten before the home turn.
Hard driven along to lead at 1400 M but lacked the pace to cross to fence, couldn't lie up with them and headed 800 M out, soon beaten, unacceptable effort and to trial.
Settled around 10th place and 6Ls back at halfway, edged a little closer in midfield on straightening, finished quite well only to be tipped out of quinella final strides.
Slow to begin, towards rear about 7Ls off speed at halfway, wide and 5Ls off pace turning for home, stayed on well to nick 2nd close home.
Settled rearward on fence about 7Ls off speed at 1200 M, closer and going well turning for home, 2Ls down in 5th and every hope of a place at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
On the pace but caught 4-wide no cover down the back, 1L down and 3-wide no cover at 800 M, in 2nd at final turn but ceded ground very quickly.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, moved into 3rd at home turn and upsides winner at 300 M, given every chance to at least place, no excuses.
Settled about 10Ls rear early on as usual, niggled along to take closer order taking home turn, never dangerous.
Travelled nicely 3-back on fence about 4Ls back at halfway and same on straightening, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, pulled clear.
Nicely placed in midfield about 5Ls off pace until halfway, rideen along to take a hand at final turn but only briefly loomed a place hope, tired final 200 M.
Another poor effort, always under pressure in rear and never any closer than 8Ls off the speed.
Box-seat position 2Ls off pace at 1400 M, eased to the front at 800 M and 1L clear at final turn, headed over 200 M out and one-paced on the run-in.
About 9th and 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, lost ground on the circle and 7Ls back in 12th taking final turn, ran on fairly past beaten rivals.
3Ls behind in 6th on fence at halfway, still right there off home turn, found nothing off the bridle.
Pushed early to occupy the box seat, travelled nicely on bend under the good pace, however blocked most straight, dashed well 100 M when clear and just in time to grab 2nd.
Pushed to take the rail and led at good pace, under pressure throughout, hung on until 200 M run ended. (Bled for 2nd time.)
Bumped start, pushed forward to settle behind the front runners, 1.5Ls off the good pace 3 wide, progressed steadily 300 M and drew away 100 M to win with ease.
Pushed early but lacked early speed, more than 6Ls behind the good pace 2 wide, no turn of foot in straight, just made ground on weakening runners.
Trapped 4 wide throughout and lost ground, eased to sit behind the pace group, 1.5Ls off the good pace, faded quickly 600 M.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide outside the leaders and under pressure throughout, led briefly 200 M, overhauled 150 M, just ran on to finish 3rd.
Very slow away, hard ridden to obtain a midfield position, 3Ls behind the good pace 2 wide, made good ground last 250 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 3 wide, travelled well, little dash 250 M.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, more than 6Ls off the good pace at the rear, raced 4 wide at the home bends and covered too much ground, ran on OK in final stages.
Raced 5 wide throughout behind the pace group, covered too much ground at bends, dropped off rapidly 600 M.

Slow away, hard ridden to regain a forward position half a length just outside the leader, pushed along to keep up with the good pace and had no chance to recover at any stage, soon weakened in straight.
Eased back, trapped 3 wide, never competitive.
Settled in midfield. Only kept on at the same pace under pressure without quickening in straight.

Improved gradually from wide draw to outside leader passing winning post the first time. Settled 2-back in 4th then 5th far side. Regained 4th 1 out 1 back home bend. Commenced move passing 300 M and ran on dourly to get up late.
Midfield early around stables bend. Improved wide to prominent position far side. Folded up quickly after straightening.
Settled behind midfield. Only produced moderate progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily under pressure after straightening to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader in one out one back position to straight. Gradually weakened.
Travelled mostly in 6th on rails within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in but soon faded gradually. (Abnormal breathing noise.) (Back pain next day.)
Attempted to make all. Kicked 2Ls clear passing 400 M but only to be worn down close to home.
Settled at the back. Trailed the field into straight. Made good progress down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, settling on rails in midfield. Made moderate headway under pressure in straight without threatening.
Settled in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening but could only produce moderate effort without threatening.
Travelled mainly worse than midfield. Dropped out passing 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Chased leader to straight. Soon weakened out of contention after straightening.
Always in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Reasonable break, restrained to slot into midfield, raced 2 wide 4Ls back with ideal trail behind speed, angled 3 wide turning, threatened strongly at 250 M but run ended at 100 M (bumped late).
Standard break, ridden up to take up coveted 1 out 1 back spot 3Ls back, had nice trail behind speed, tracked well turning, struggled when they sprinted and just kept on at same pace to line.
First to hit ground, had plenty of dash to lead at a good tempo, raced at leaders girth on bend, 1/2L down turning, couldn't muster at 300 M and faded out from 250 M when workload took toll.

Ordinary getaway, ridden up to position in rearward division 8Ls back on rails, advantaged by fast speed, saved ground on bend, in traffic for most of straight, only clear last 150 M and got no real crack.

Speedy beginning, drove through to hold lead, kept them rolling at a solid speed, maintained margin 1/2L clear on turning, still travelled at 300 M but found little when they dashed again and dropped right out late.

Began with rest but taken hold of to sit in midfield 3 to 4 wide without cover, had a hard run doing plenty with pace on, 3Ls down on bend, soon a spent force and dropped out from 300 M to be well beaten.

Began with first few, unable to slot in and forced to face breeze 3 wide 3Ls back, did share of work with speed on, improved to be 1L down in 3rd turning, hit front at 200 M and did well to fight off challengers late.
Away in line, restrained to slot in on rails in midfield 5Ls back, had easy time with speed on, niggled along turning in, found little when asked and just battled in run to line.

Out fairly, allowed to drift back and take sit behind midfield, relaxed well 7Ls back in two wide line, helped by tempo, came widest turning, only warmed up late and made good ground down outside to be closest on line.
Moderate getaway but soon recovered to drive up into spot behind leader, raced on solid speed 1L back, close enough in 4th turning, run emerged and looked promising but just couldn't match first two.

Began in line, unable to get to rails from a wide alley, covered ground 3 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls back, had a good trail on circle, switched 4 wide on turning, made only moderate headway down outside in straight.

Began with field, couldn't match rest for speed and settled further back than usual 7Ls away on rails, helped by solid pace, angled 2 wide turning in, stuck on evenly in straight running usual honest race to be close up.

Restrained from an outside gate, finished up at rear 10Ls back on rails, aided by fast pace in front, still seeing field leaving bend, kept to inside and made plenty of ground between horses (held up 200 M) to be nearest on line.
Out with line but soon drifted back from wide alley, raced 10Ls back on 2 wide line, helped by fast tempo, back in traffic turning in, clear at 250 M and flew late making many lengths to just miss.
Well back. Saved ground on inside turning in. Made modest headway down inner of straight without threatening.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Commenced move approaching home turn gaining 5th turning in. Sustained progress to grab 2nd passing 200 M but had no chance with winner.
Raced wide in prominent position to 400 M. Kept on under pressure before overhauled for a placing inside final 150 M.
Prominent, settling one out one back in 2nd far side. Similar turning in. Kept on before folding up quickly under pressure inside final 200 M. (Blood and mucus in trachea.)
Broke well from widest draw. Circled field around stables bend to take up running far side. Extended advantage to 2Ls shortly after straightening. Hung on well under pressure to score convincingly.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M without threatening.
Steadied at start. Soon recovered to just behind midfield. Steadied again 300 M out and baulked behind runners passing 200 M. Finished off race well late.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Similar turning in. Kept on well to finish.
Settled towards rear on rails. Fought on steadily under pressure in home straight without threatening.
Raced wide and mostly in forward of midfield to straight. Overhauled when no extra inside final 200 M.
Ridden to muster speed early, settling on rails in midfield. Similar turning in. Could only keep on steadily at the one-pace under pressure. Steadied passing 200 M.
Soon in rear. Trailed the field into straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Waited with. Switched wide to challenge turning in. Made up good ground down centre of track. Did best work at finish.
Not far off on rails in 4th or 3rd. Still one back in 3rd on rails turning in but soon weakened under pressure.

Out with them, unable to slot in from a wide alley and posted 4 wide without cover 5 to 6Ls away, did it the hard way and under pressure to stay there on bend, dropped out when tough run took effect just battling to line.

Well enough away, slotted into a prominent role 2Ls back trailing leader, carted along behind a solid pace, close enough entering straight, lacked a dash but held ground evenly with a one paced finish.
Moderate break, urged to sit closer, had ideal trip 1 out 1 back 2Ls back, tracked speed nicely on bend, ridden along when checked at 300 M, only closed at one speed in run to line.
Bounced out, had plenty of toe to lead them at a good gallop, pressured on circle by outside horses, held a narrow lead turning in, kicked hard in straight, defied them to 100 M before overhauled.

Began with first few, held a forward spot but couldn't cross, forced to race 3 wide outside leader, kept pressure on with solid speed, right there but under pressure on turning, weakened out from 300 M after hard run.
First to hit ground, pressed on to challenge for front, raced at leaders girth working to hold spot, right there turning in, workload took toll at 250 M and steadily faded out thereafter.

Tardy to break, ridden along early, settled in rear on rails 6Ls from leaders, saved ground on fence rounding turn, made run between horses in straight making steady progress to 200 M before checked, moderate thereafter.

Restrained from outside alley, ended up at tail 8Ls off the lead, raced 2 wide and helped by solid tempo, still last leaving circle, came to outside still 5Ls back at 200 M, flew late making huge amount of ground to just miss.

Standard jump, raced on rails 4Ls back in midfield, had a quiet run in mid-section and aided by tempo, urged along turning in, kept to rails and made steady progress without threatening to be nearest on line.

Away with them, proved difficult to settle early when taken back to find position, ended up trailing 3 wide 6Ls of pace towards rear, assisted by speed, made plenty of ground from well back to be just behind in 5 way finish.

Slow to begin, steadily improved to sit 3 wide 5Ls back with cover in midfield, had an even trip with pace on, shifted to middle turning, came with strong run hitting lead 100 M out and fought hard holding slender margin on line.

Standard beginning, faded back to settle in midfield 2 wide 5Ls back, had an even trip between horses pushed along on turning, lacked usual finishing burst, inconvenienced at 200 M but was one paced regardless.
Only fairly away, raced 3 wide in midfield 3Ls back with cover, urged along to improve on circle, made 4 wide run turning in, threatened at 200 M but just peaked on run at 100 M.

Bumped on jumping, ended up in rearward division, raced 2 wide 6Ls from frontrunners, aided by speed in mid-section, in behind horses and without a clear run early in straight, flew late when clear to make frame.

Jumped fairly. Soon ridden to lead from middle draw eventually crossing to rails 800 M out. Still held half a length advantage home bend but joined into straight. Gave ground under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Came under pressure to challenge inside 250 M and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield early, dropping towards rear up Rock. Lost further ground in straight.
Raced widest in midfield. Took closer order passing Rock. Still 3-wide when prominent rounding home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening.
Close up, settling 2-wide in 4th within 2Ls of pace shortly after turning into back straight. Similar turning in and came under pressure to challenge but could only keep on at the one pace.
Jumped fairly ridden for pace, settling one out one back in 2nd. Commenced move rounding home bend sharing lead into straight. Came a length clear under pressure 200 M out and hung on to the line.
Soon dropped to the rear and always struggling.
Never far off on rails, settling one back in 3rd halfway down back straight. Fought on steadily down straight without quickening.
Travelled well behind to straight. Made up good ground to do best work at finish.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Soon picked up to rear of midfield but tightened rounding 1000 M bend. Remained in last few to straight. Made up good late ground in the run home.
Raced mostly 3-wide in midfield to straight. Found nothing.
After being checked near the 800 M, settled in midfield, 2-wide with cover, kept on in the straight without yielding ground.
Made the running 1 off shadowing the eventual winner, stayed on one-paced in the straight.
Didn't muster early speed and was caught 3-wide without cover in midfield. Struggled over the final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield from a wide gate and parked on the fence. Behind horses turning in, weaved a passage through in the straight and closed off well.
Caught 3-wide early, shifted in near the 800 M to be 1 off with cover 1L back. Came 3-wide turning for home, failed to accelerate.
Positioned near the tail of the field. Never likely.
Running 2nd the fence, about 1/2L inside the leader, railed up in the straight for strong win.
Travelled behind the speed along the rail, kept to the inside in the run home but didn't quicken when asked for an effort.
Ridden at the tail of the field, made good ground over the concluding stages under hands and heels riding. (See Racing Incidents.)
Unable to keep up with the fast pace early stages and raced behind midfield. Pressured from 800 M out. Gradually picked up at home turn and made a late burst between rivals to be closest at finish.
Settled on the rails just behind the pace. Kept on fairly after straightening but unable to find extra over the final stages.
Ridden along to take up a forward position. Disputed lead from 600 M out. Held a length's advantage into final 200 M but unable to hold off the late charging winner.
Settled in rear section. Steadily made up ground after straightening but was held up in slow traffic over the final stages.
Raced wide and without cover among leaders. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Lacked speed from widest draw. Trailed field throughout the race but made a late progress near the line.
Midfield or better. 3Ls behind the pace at the home turn. Continued well after straightening and charged home strongly last 150 M to run down rival near the line.
2-wide and kept within 2Ls of the pace. Right behind the leaders turning for home. Stayed on well in the straight but unable to gain ground.
Jumped only fairly. Pushed along to take the lead 800 M out. Disputed lead turning for home and kept pace before fading out of contention final stages.
Slow out of the gates and then was checked and lost ground. Remained in rear section until straightening. Closed the race off well despite not having the clearest run late.
Held up towards rear, 8Ls last at 1000 M, made some minor late ground in the straight but never seriously threatened.
In the one-out-one-back position at 1200 M, improved to be 1L down in 2nd at 600 M but faded tamely in the straight.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to final bend, had his chance but couldn't overhaul the winner.
Disputed early speed on fence, clear by 1L from 1200 M to home turn, always holding a similar margin to the line.
3Ls back in 6th out 2-wide early on, improved out 3-deep without cover from 1000 M, a close 2nd at home turn and closer at 200 M, tired inside final stages.
Slow away, worse than midfield early on, caught 3-wide no cover from the 1000 M and 3Ls back in mid-division at halfway, faded from top of home straight.
4-back on fence in 9th place about 5Ls from the front until the 600 M, switched out 3-wide off final bend to challenge, briefly threatened a place but the run faded inside final 150 M.
Keen early when disputing the pace, settled better about 2Ls off the lead in 5th at halfway and same off home bend, moderate finish.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed until the home turn, never loomed much of a danger.
Slowest away, mostly in 10th position about 5Ls from the lead, stayed on one-paced.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace at halfway in 11th, in rear and struggling taking final turn, no impression.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off speed until home straight entrance when hard pressed to maintain a position, wilted.
Tucked in 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, had every hope but just lacked the gears.
In 10th on fence about 4Ls off pace early on, never really threatened and only stayed on past a few beaten rivals late.
Caught 5-wide down the back straight when about 1L off the speed, lost his position on the circle and very weak in the home straight.
Always prominent but caught 3-wide throughout, 1L down in 3rd on straightening, folded soon after.
Always in the front line about 1L off pace in 2nd or 3rd until home turn, upsides the winner and dangerous 250 M out, failed to follow through.
No early speed and about 6Ls down in 11th taking home turn, never got into it.
Trapped six-wide (widest of all) without cover down the back straight, widest and further back taking final bend, emptied out at the 200 M.
Fractious in the gates and hopeless at the start losing about 10Ls instantly, never a factor.
4-wide (with cover) down the back straight about 1L off pace, over 2Ls down in midfield turning for home, petered out.
Worse than midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home turn, gave ground steadily.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on okay but never likely to catch the winner.
Made all, led by 1L on fence at 600 M, looked vulnerable about 250 M out but found enough to maintain a margin of about 1L inside final 200 M.
Eased back, 7Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, swept forward 4-wide on straightening, progressed steadily 400 M to finish 2nd.
Took a prominent spot early and not suited by the fast tempo, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader in middle stages 2-wide, pushed back 400 M, faded in straight and tailed out.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, never better than midfield, tailed out from 600 M.
Hard ridden but failed to take the rail and lead, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast pace, dropped off rapidly 400 M.
Eased at start to get across at the rear, more than 8Ls behind the leader 2-wide, swept towards 4-wide on straightening, helped by the fast pace, made ground last 300 M without looking likely.
Always prominent, 2-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, not suited by the fast early sectionals, led briefly 300 M, overhauled 150 M, ran on for 3rd.
Eased to cross the rail towards rear, helped by the fast pace, however never competitive and finished tailed out.
Pushed to take the rail and led at fast early sectionals, hung on until 250 M flattened.
Bumped start and lost ground, at back, favoured by the rail-run and the fast tempo, however never competitive, crowded for room 300 M.
Hard ridden early, just managed to hold the rail about midfield, checked 1st bend, favoured by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily 300 M to score without much trouble.

Pushed early to hold the rail, worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader, helped by the rail-run and the fast tempo, swept forward the middle of track in straight and made ground steadily despite hanging.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, crowded for room 400 M, dropped off afterwards.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace to the line.
Raced wide in prominent position in straight. Dropped away quickly.
Raced wide in midfield. Fought on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped to midfield from widest draw, gradually settling in 2nd last. Only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Always wide in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Close up early. Steadied to 5th some 3Ls back on rails turning into back straight. Similar turning for home. Soon faded gradually.
Began well from middle draw to lead. Soon crossed to rails and made all. Drew clear after straightening.
Never seen with a chance.
Chased leader to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Not too far off in 4th always within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Raced just worse than midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Made modest headway without threatening.

Fast out, ridden hard from a wide alley, cleverly slotted in behind the leader, had a charmed run with steady tempo, cut back to inside on turning, lacked usual finishing burst and just closed at same rate in straight.
Awkwardly away, ended up in midfield but posted 3-wide, covered ground but did have a trail 4Ls from lead, under pressure from 600 M, dropped out on turn and was eased down in straight.

Little speed out but pushed on to take spot in midfield, checked first bend, proved difficult to settle and was 3-wide 3Ls back at midpoint, urged along on circle, found nothing and weakened out quickly. (Blood in trachea.)

Taken back from a wide alley, raced at tail 2-wide 7Ls from leaders, not helped by slow pace, still back with last few on circle. Steadied in traffic leaving bend, made plenty of ground through pack in straight to snatch 3rd late.

Out with rest, taken back as expected to race rear to last, had a fair trip 7Ls back in running line but not aided by pace, still well back approaching turn, failed to close as normally would and just struggled to line.

Ordinary getaway, assumed expected role towards rear on rails, improved to be 4Ls back in midfield by halfway point, came 2-wide at 600 M, 3Ls down turning, gradually closed but only had 1 gear last 200 M.

Amongst them to break, slotted into sweet seat 1 out 1 back, had nice trail 2Ls back with moderate speed on, close enough turning in, chimed in strongly at 200 M, hit lead at 150 M but unable to hold off late challenger.

Began well, urged along to take up running, dictated terms 1L clear at a modest tempo, increased speed on circle, held a 1/2L break leaving bend, kicked hard but smothered by rivals at 100 M and one-paced late.

Even jump, held a closer spot before checked on first bend, raced 5-6Ls back on rails, not helped by steady tempo, came 2-wide passing Rock, 4Ls back in 6th coming 3-wide turning, dashed quickly down outside to snatch lead late.

Came out with them, ended up going forward to race 3-wide 2Ls behind leader without cover, always working but pace helped, 1L down outside leader at 500 M, threatened on turning and hit lead briefly but run ended at 150 M.

Away in line, unable to take a closer spot and ended up 5Ls back behind midfield, had a fair trip in running line, disadvantaged by tempo, urged along on bend, made a little ground without threatening in straight.
Broke fairly, urged along to hold spot 3Ls back on fence, had a quiet time in mid-section, helped by tempo but pushed along on bend, didn't find in straight and dropped out last 200 M.
Fastest out, took lead and rolled along at a good clip 1L clear, still held advantage at midpoint, tackled at 400 M, couldn't sprint again but kept on at same pace for 3rd.
Away with them, raced ungenerously 4Ls back towards outside rail, became unbalanced at 500 M, checked shortly after and produced nothing final 300 M.
Out with line, ended at in rearward division 5Ls back amongst horses, ridden along from 600 M, found little at business end and simply battled to line.
Tardy to begin, failed to muster and was 7Ls off pace towards middle, always appeared to be doing it tough in going, still well back at 300 M, only passed tired runners late.
Even jump, settled in midfield in centre of course, raced 3Ls down at halfway, made a little progress late to make frame.
Away nicely, took a trail behind leaders 3Ls back in midfield, urged along at 500 M, stuck in there under hard riding holding ground in run to line without threatening.
Moderate break, sat at rear 4 to 5Ls back in middle of track, still behind field at midpoint, made ground to be 3Ls back at 300 M, did best work late to work into 2nd. Winner in another class.
Slowly out, recovered to be 4Ls back on outside rail, gradually lost ground from 600 M, checked at 500 M, showed little thereafter.
Standard jump, recovered to be 2 to 3Ls back trailing front runners in centre of course, began to struggle at 400 M, condition gave out and just weakened late. Better for experience.
Out fairly but checked shortly after, raced in midfield towards outside 4Ls off pace, a little green and under pressure from 400 M, struggled when they sprinted and weakened last 200 M.

Bounced out with field, sat close up 1L back in middle of course, always travelling strongly, took over at 400 M, given some reign at 250 M and dashed clear, eased down under hold to score a facile win. Could be anything.
Midfield position. Along the fence, briefly held up after straightening, closed off nicely.
Raced in a rearward position throughout, never a threat.
Raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover, directed to the outside fence in the straight to score effortlessly.
Came from last position to run on smartly.
Trapped 3-wide, no cover, not far from ?? speed. Kept on in the straight.
Positioned close to midfield, two wide with cover, didn't quicken in the run home.
Ridden along fairly from an inside gate, but only managed to settle behind midfield, the fence. Struggled in the straight.
Travelled in 3r4d position 2 to 3 wide no cover, gave ground after the 200 M.
Led at a strong tempo, faded inside the 100 M.
Raced 3 wide with cover, near midfield, ranged up after the 400 M, but failed to go on.
Settled near the tail at the field, 3 wide, no cover, showed nothing under pressure.
Raced in second position, but was overhauled after the 200 M.
Travelled among the fence, just behind the speed, gave in quickly turning for home. (Irregular heart beat.)
Soon trailed field. Swung wide on straightening, launched a strong rally on the outside part of the track and swept past the entire field at 200 M for an easy win.
Raced wide at midfield early stages. Dropped back to a rearward position near 800 M. Last on straightening and rallied past some tired runners.
Jumped only fairly. Niggled along to make up ground and was racing 2-wide amongst leaders. A length off the leader turning for home but soon weakened.
Towards the rear early stages. Gradually made up ground to be racing behind the pace at 1000 M. Unable to find extra after straightening and faded steadily.
3-wide and never better than midfield. Slid further back to rear section making the turn. Unable to quicken and tired final stages.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield. 6Ls down on straightening and rallied in the straight to be closest at finish.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Quickened on straightening and kept on well over the final stages for a distant 2nd.
Sat wide among leaders early stages. Gradually dropped back making the turn. Lacked a response when pressured on straightening and finished tailed out.
Settled in a prominent position behind the leader until straightening. Responded only fairly when pressured in the home straight. Remained on same pace final stages. Not comfortable in ground.
Led shortly after the start. Took a 2L advantage into the home straight. Headed 200 M out and kept on fairly for a minor placing.
On or near the pace early stages. Gradually dropped back and was racing at midfield 800 M out. Had trouble keeping up at home turn and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Raced near the back early stages. Improved along the rails and was at midfield at home turn. 3Ls off the leader turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Always 3-wide without cover, 6Ls back in 4th at 1200 M but under pressure to keep within this range at the 800 M, gave ground from top of home straight.
Best away but handed up lead to race 3Ls off speed in 2nd at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd into home straight, given every chance to at least place but lacked the dash.
Caught 5-wide without cover throughout when no better than 8Ls or so from the front, struggling and further back on straightening, soon eased down.
8Ls back in 8th on fence at 1100 M, headway to be over 3Ls down in 5th at home turn, led 150 M out, driven clear.
About 12Ls last at the 1200 M, 8Ls down in 12th turning for home, got no closer.
In 5th place out 2-wide and 7Ls back at 1100 M, tracked winner about 4Ls back in 6th on straightening, kept on at the one pace.
4Ls back on fence in 3rd at 1200 M, niggled along at halfway to maintain an interest, under pressure when over 2Ls down in 4th on straightening, moderate finish.
3-back on fence in midfield about 7Ls off speed at 1100 M, 2Ls down in 3rd and dangerous off home turn, led briefly but outpaced by winner inside final 200 M.
In rear early on, under pressure at 1000 M when about 9Ls off pace among backmarkers, still well behind into the stretch, never troubled leaders. (Lame next day.)
Worse than midfield about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, not a great deal closer taking home turn, made only very minor late ground.
Slowly away, 11Ls behind pace in rear at 1200 M, about 8Ls down entering home straight but tired inside final 200 M.
Worse than midfield and caught 4-wide without cover throughout, about 7Ls behind the leader at halfway, never on terms and eased down in home straight.
Set a strong pace to lead by 3Ls on fence at 1200 M, 2L clear at top of home straight and headed over 200 M out, did enough to hang onto a place.
2-wide and 8Ls back in 7th at 1100 M, 4-wide and about 5Ls down in midfield rounding final turn, didn't threaten principals.
Raced about 5Ls off pace in mid-division at halfway, 4Ls down in midfield turning for home, every chance to place but but could only stay on evenly and missed out.
Caught without cover early on, gained cover at halfway when 4Ls off speed, very weak from top of home straight.
Slipped into box-seat position 2Ls off pace in 4th on fence at 1300 M and moved into the clear entering home straight, led over 200 M out, tired late and just hung on to score.
Slowly away again, never travelled very well, niggled along on fence in midfield about 5Ls off the pace at halfway, laboured his way to place inside final strides.
Disputed early speed out 3-wide no cover before leading on fence at 1000 M, same margin clear at home straight entrance but headed about 250 M out, faded late.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, steadily lost this position on the circle and off the bridle turning for home, gave further ground.
Settled 9Ls last at 1400 M, 6Ls down in 11th turning for home, stayed on strongly down centre of track but post came a few strides too soon to deny victory.
Crossed to fence from wide gate, settled at least 6Ls back in 12th or so until halfway, edged a little closer off home turn, plugged on at the same pace.
Awkward break, worse than midfield 3-wide no cover when 7Ls off pace at 900 M, 6Ls off pace in 10th at home turn, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
More prominent than usual, disputed early pace out 2-wide on fence at 1300 M, 1L down in 2nd at halfway, 2Ls down in 4th and under pressure to lie up, gave ground.
10Ls last on fence at 1000 M, 7Ls down in 12th off final turn, never remotely dangerous.
2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, caught 3-wide no cover on the circle and 1L down in 2nd at home turn when hard ridden, soon wilted.
Caught 4 and 5-wide without cover throughout, pressed on to to 3Ls back in midfield at halfway, lost this position on the circle and poor in the finish.
Best away and disputed early pace on fence, settled over 1L back in 3rd at halfway and still right there 2Ls down in 3rd taking final bend, one-paced in the finish.
Prominent as usual, 1L behind the leader 3 wide, not suited by the fast pace, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up in midfield, 5.5Ls off the leader along the fence, helped by the fast pace, but never progress in straight.
Slow away, hard ridden to press forward along the fence, 2.5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the fast pace, ran on until 200 M flattened.
Took the rail and led by 1L at fast early sectionals, under pressure throughout, drifted away by more than 2Ls on straightening, raced on slower part of straight, hung on until 100 M, run ended.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, never better than midfield.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3 wide, favoured by the fast pace and raced on faster part of straight, made ground 300 M, on heels 150 M, run ended 50 M.

Always prominent, 2.5Ls off the leader 2 to 3 wide, used up lots of fuel to keep up with the fast early sectionals, however kept running on strongly along the faster part of straight to score without much threats.
Hard ridden to pressure the leader, 1L off pace 2 wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, weakened 250 M.
Outpaced at back, 8Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 to 4 wide, helped by the fast pace and raced on faster part of straight, made ground 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls behind the leader 2 to 3 wide, travelled nicely throughout, picked up well 400 M and progressed steadily to finish 2nd.
Eased back and crossed the rail, helped by the fast tempo, however never competitive.

Eased towards rear, 9.5Ls behind the leader, trapped 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground at bends though suited by the fast pace and raced on faster part of straight, progressed steadily 250 M along the outside fence.
Eased to rear, 9Ls behind the leader 3 wide, favoured by the fast pace, ran on OK in straight.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 6.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, helped by the fast tempo but lacked turn of foot in straight, just be able to make ground 300 M to finish 3rd without much threats.
Ridden for pace from poor draw, disputing lead before hitting front over 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort and collared close to home.
Raced wide in rear of midfield to straight. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Began fairly. Prominent briefly before racing very awkwardly dropping to tail end. Never recovered.
Always well behind and wide. Dropped out noticeably rounding home bend.
Settled just worse than midfield. Produced short-lived effort around home bend, but made no show in straight.
Never far off on rails. Close up in 3rd just 1L back turning in when not much room, however, found nothing under pressure inside final 200 M.
Close up 3 wide most of way. Commenced move after straightening and fought on steadily to gain upper hand close to home.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field to home bend. Made up good ground past beaten runners down centre of straight.
Amongst leaders early. Prominent in 4th before steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Dropped to 6th about 3Ls off lead home bend. Ran home one-paced.
With leaders far side, In one-out-one-back position rounding home bend and into straight. Did not find much room early in straight. Made modest headway inside final 200 M without threatening.
Broke well and held slender lead on rails. Headed passing 300 M and weakened under pressure.
Raced wide in prominent position. Dropped out into straight.

Showed customary speed to hold a forward spot just off lead pair when unable to cross, improved 3 wide without cover to share lead on circle, hit front at 400 M, collared at 250 M and just held ground thereafter.

Ordinary getaway, drifted back to tail to assume usual trailing role, raced 2 wide 7 to 8Ls back but helped by tempo, switched 3 wide on circle, last turning, closed best of rest down outside rail to snatch 3rd.

No speed as usual, showed enough to hold a midfield spot on rails 4Ls off pace, had a soft run thereafter, travelled well on bend, shifted out in straight and made good ground last 300 M finding winner too good on day.

No early speed, recovered to hold a position 4Ls back in midfield running line, improved between horses on bend, 3Ls down turning in, switched out but lacked usual finishing burst just battling away in run to line.
Bounced out, up there with first few, faded back to race 3 wide in midfield 4Ls back, had a nice trail to turn, switched to better going but run ended at 200 M and weakened out after a tough trip.

Awkwardly away but soon recovered and drove through towards leading bunch, slotted in perfectly behind leader at 1200 M and had run of race to bend, switched out and hit clear at 350 M, asserted authority last 250 M for another easy win.

Amongst first few to hit ground, couldn't slot in and posted 4 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls back, always working with pace on, improved to be 1/2L down turning in, hard run took toll and weakened from 300 M.
Began well, up challenging for front but unable to cross, raced at leader's girth applying pressure throughout, right there on turning, failed to quicken and gradually faded out (on worsed going).

Fast into stride, showed plenty of dash to hold early lead, keep pace even before backing off on circle, challenged on bend and just lead turning, quickly passed and found no response in straight (on worsed going).

Tardy to begin, settled back with last few, raced 2 wide 6Ls back, not harmed by tempo, had an easy time throughout, well back between horses turning in, came to better part of going and closed off well before run ended at 100 M.
Standard break, posted wide in midfield from outside alley, raced 5Ls of pace 4 wide on circle eventually, getting cover, came to extreme outside in straight and closed steadily without threatening.

Restrained from a wide alley, raced 3 wide at rear 7Ls off lead, had cover and suited by speed, made a 4 wide run on circle, still back with last few turning in, widest of all and made little progress in straight.
Away in line, raced behind midfield as expected, posted 3 wide with cover 6Ls back, urged along on bend, well back turning in, made only moderate headway on worsed ground in straight.

Moderate getaway, soon in last few, raced on rails 6 to 7Ls back, not harmed by tempo, improved to be 4Ls down turning, switched out but not on best ground when running on until 100 M before run ended.
Broke well from wide draw, settling 3-wide in 4th. Gave ground gradually shortly after straightening.
Settled just better than midfield. Fought on steadily down straight without threatening.
Raced wide just behind midfield. Baulked for run on stands side about 300 M out. Kept on same pace to finish.
Made all. Kicked about 2Ls clear upon straightening. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Raced on rails in forward of midfield. Saved ground on inner turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Just kept on steadily at the same pace without quickening.
Slow out. Gradually picked up to rear of midfield. Commenced move turning in. Ran on determinedly to just fail to get up on line.
Settled towards rear. Made only steady headway down straight without quickening.
Raced wide at the back. Dropped out after straightening.
Settled in midfield. Made steady headway under pressure in straight.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Kept on same pace to finish.
Chased leader. No extra passing 200 M and checked and lost position shortly afterwards.
Not far off racing 3-wide most of way to straight. 3rd turning in. Gradually weakened under pressure inside final 200 M.
No speed from outset, raced 2 wide 6 to 7Ls back at tail, had a quiet run but not helped by average speed, came 3 wide on bend, showed nothing in straight and was well beaten.

Began with line, allowed to stride on to hold spot behind leader, had run of race in mid-section, camped behind them and took inside runs turning, hit front and fought doggedly to maintain advantage for length of straight.

Moderate jump, made some progress to hold a midfield role 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had a quiet time in mid-section, trailed eventual winner on turning, cut to inside and steadily pegged back margin to be right in finish.
Amongst first few out, rolled on to take up running, dictated terms at a moderate tempo, held a narrow lead on bend, tackled turning and found little dropping out tamely thereafter.
Restrained from outset, posted 4 wide behind midfield 6Ls back with cover, forced to cover plenty of ground to bend, switched 5 wide turning and made good ground down outside to be closest on line.
Away well, couldn't slot in and race 4 wide without cover 2Ls back, improved to challenge 1L back on bend, still there turning but weakened from 300 M when hard run took toll.
Even getaway, slotted in to coveted 1 out 1 back trail, had soft trip throughout with steady tempo, 2Ls down turning, one-paced when run appeared but stuck to task and held ground strongly to finish.
Standard break, raced near to rear 2 wide 6Ls from speed, not set a task in middle stages and helped by speed, back in traffic turning, cut to inside and closed evenly under hands and heels riding.

Moderate beginning, ended up not too far back 3 to 4Ls off pace in midfield running line, tracked nicely between horses on circle, in traffic turning, into clear at 300 M but lacked usual finish and just plodded to line.
Ordinary jump, settled next to last 6Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, still well back to bend, made little progress in straight beating home only tired runners.
First to hit ground, rolled forward to race at leaders girth, had a fair trip with moderate tempo, still right there turning, didn't quicken but stuck on gamely in straight to make frame.

Fair break, couldn't find a slot and posted 3 and 4 wide without cover 4Ls off pace, did plenty in mid-section, crept closer to be 2Ls down turning, came to better ground and progressed steadily down outside to take 3rd.
Average jump, ended up racing behind midfield, 5 to 6Ls back, tracked 3 wide with cover on circle, switched wider on turning, closed off nicely doing best work late to be not far away in finish.

Out well, unable to slot in, proved difficult to settle and ended up 3 wide 2 to 3Ls back with cover, had a fair run thereafter, close enough on bend, couldn't sprint when gap appeared and run ended at 200 M.
Away well, held a more prominent role 1 out 1 back 2Ls behind leaders, followed even tempo to bend, closed steadily at same speed in straight to make frame.
Restrained from outset, ended up trailing field 9 to 10Ls off speed, helped by even pace, still had field to beat on turning, switched out and passed a few but gave too great a start.
First to hit ground, challenged for lead, kept pressure on at an even pace when unable to cross, did work to bend, run took toll at 200 M and dropped out tamely.

Slowly out, took a spot behind midfield 6 to 7Ls back in 2-wide line, not asked to work before improving 3-wide on bend, came with strong run from well back to hit lead at 150 M, collared right on line.

Ordinary jump, ridden along to take a midfield spot in running line, raced 2-wide 5 to 6Ls off speed, not harmed by position, back in traffic turning in, clear from 250 M and made many lengths late for 3rd.
Amongst first few to jump, took up spot 2Ls back on rails trailing speed, tracked at a reasonable pace to bend, eased into clear but run ended at 200 M and weakened thereafter.
Moderate break, ended up in midfield racing 2-wide 4 to 5Ls off pace, had a suitable run to bend, a little unbalanced on turning, regathered but produced only a one-paced finish.
Away in line, restrained from a wide alley, raced 2-wide 8Ls off pace, tempo even throughout, tracked 3-wide on circle, eased to middle 6Ls back turning, closed steadily to snatch victory on line.
Showed plenty of early pace, held lead on rails but worried throughout, shaded on circle and kicked back on turning, had no answer when tackled at 200 M and weakened late.
Out with rest, hard ridden to hold a spot in midfield on rails 5Ls off pace, had an ideal trip and not asked to bend, got split at 850 M but didn't have another gear and just held ground to line.
Little speed from outset, raced 3-wide near tail 8Ls off pace, covered ground to bend, found nothing in run to line.
Even getaway but failed to muster, urged along in a rearward post, raced 8Ls back on rails, had a quiet trip to bend, made only moderate progress in straight.

Tardy to begin, ridden along at tail, made some progress to settle 6Ls off speed in 10th place, enjoyed a soft run on rails, still well back turning, held up to 200 M and only really clear when race was over.
Reasonable break, showed speed to take a spot 3Ls off pace in 2-wide line, suited by tempo and travelled well on bend, urged along turning, lacked a dash but kept on to 100 M before run ended.
Positioned near the rear along the fence, never in the race.
Had the run of the race behind the leader, gave ground after the 450 M.
Faded quickly passing the 400 M after leading.
Settled near the tail of the field, 3-wide with cover, finished off nicely.
