After the 1000 M was left racing 3-wide no cover, about 1L back, finished off soundly considering the trip.
Raced 1 out 1 back, peeled out 3-deep after the 200 M. Hit the front turning for home and held on for a narrow victory.
Raced 3-back along the fence, struggled in the straight.
Settled outside the leaders girth, made little impression after failing to find extra turning for home.
Raced in midfield on the rail, didn't run on.
Raced in last position, made satisfactory ground in the run home.
Positioned 2-wide with cover in midfield, drew on terms approaching the 100 M but couldn't sustain run.
Sat close to midfield, 3-wide with cover, worked to the line strongly.
Positioned close to the tail enders, 2-wide with cover, closed off fairly.
3-wide among leaders early stages. Took sole possession of the lead on entering back straight. Disputed lead turning for home but unable to keep pace 300 M out and weakened.
Lead or disputed lead early stages. Settled behind the leader in the back straight and home turn. Kept on fairly in the early part of the home straight but tired over the final 200 M.
Dropped back to a rearward position. Amongst last few turning home. Rallied in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled towards the rear. Trailed field and swung out on straightening. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.

Settled behind the leaders early stages. 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of the leader in back straight. Improved to within a length turning for home and took over the lead 300 M out. Stayed on gamely final stages to deny rival.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. On the rails and 3 to 4Ls off the lead at home turn. Never quickened and only ran past a beaten runner.

No better than midfield. 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace making home turn. Quickened on straightening and challenged the eventual winner over final stages. Came within a neck 50 M out but unable to find more to take the lead.
Botched the start and raced in a rearward position. 2-wide behind midfield making home turn. Made up ground by running past tired runners in the home straight.

Raced along the fence and was never worse than midfield. 2Ls behind the pace making home turn. Steadied and switched out away from the rail to find clear run 400 M out. Kept on well final stages for a minor placing.

Among leaders early stages closer than usual. 2-wide behind the pace leaving back straight. Disputed lead turning for home. Remained in contention early part of the straight but tired over final 200 M.
Always in midfield in cover and no better than 4Ls off the speed at any stage, posed no great threat.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, briefly without cover on the circle and still midfield at top of home straight, stayed on okay for a place.
Worse than midfield on fence about 5Ls off pace through to home turn, never really got into it.
Slowest away, 5Ls back in 12th early on, still 12th about 6Ls back turning into the stretch, continued to give ground.
No early pace and trailed field in rear about 7Ls off pace until home turn, never a factor.
Settled in rear group about 6Ls off pace down the back, wider on the circle and 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls off in 13th, ran on well past beaten rivals late.
Raced prominently with cover, 2Ls back in 4th at the 700 M, under pressure 3Ls back in 5th off final turn, finished off at the same pace.
Close to the fence in midfield about 4Ls off the lead through to home turn, ran on past a few tired rivals for 4th.
Always in 2nd or 3rd place with cover within 2Ls of the speed from 1000 M to the 600 M, no chance with impressive winner but stayed on fine for 2nd.
Pressed on from wide gate to cross to fence at 800 M and lead by 2Ls, going well on straightening, surged clear under hand riding, impressively.
Away well, hugged rails in a forward position no worse than 3Ls off the speed through to home turn, had every chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
No early speed, about 5Ls back in 10th at 800 M, midfield on straightening when 4-wide, moderate finish.
Ridden along to hold a prominent position within 2Ls of the pace until the 800 M, lost ground on the circle and retreated 4Ls behind off final bend, well beaten.
A neck off the early pace in 2nd but trapped 3-wide no cover from 800 M to home turn in 3rd while 2Ls off the speed, found nothing off the bridle.
Midfield and 2-wide with cover about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, over 2Ls back and with solid place hopes at the 200 M, lacked the follow-through.
Nicely placed in the box-seat at 1600 M, slightly less prominent when breaking down about 900 M out, pulled up.
Held the one-out-one-back position about 2Ls off pace and 2-wide in 4th from 1600 M to the 600 M, 3-wide off final bend and led at the 200 M, driven clear.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back in 5th at 1600 M, checked at the 800 M and under pressure when 3Ls back in midfield off final bend, stayed on at same pace.
About 9Ls behind in rear before being left without cover at 1000 M, sent on out wide to go 4Ls back in midfield at the 800 M, lost position on the circle and faded out.
2-wide a neck off pace in 2nd at 1600 M, box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1200 M to home turn, had every chance to at least place, just too slow.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 1400 M, advanced to 3Ls down in 5th from 800 M to home turn, very one-paced in the finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 4Ls back in 7th at 1600 M, pressed on to go a neck 2nd at the 800 M and stayed there until the home turn, faded inside final 200 M.
One from rear about 9Ls back at 1400 M, 8Ls last at the 900 M, headway on the circle to be over 4Ls back off home turn, stayed on fairly well for 2nd but never looked the winner.
Tended to over-race in 9th about 6Ls off pace in rear at 1400 M, 5-wide and over 4Ls back at final turn, stayed on for pressure and only just missed quinella.
Led by 1L on fence very early on, led until home turn when a neck clear, headed about 200 M out and just about hung on for 4th place.
On fence 5Ls back in 8th at 1400 M, hung out once hindered at the 800 M when 6Ls behind, always one-paced and chasing others in the homestretch.
Raced worse than midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow pace and totally blocked in straight, just ran on but not properly tested.
Slowly away, 8-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M, improving effort.
Eased back, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader 2 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, lacked room at 400 M, dashed impressively when clear at 200 M to finish a strong 2nd, just missed by a narrow margin.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 5-wide, covered too much ground and harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 400 M and threatened briefly, however run ended at 100 M.
Eased at start, 8Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide and no cover throughout and harmed by the slow pace, made the run early 900 M, soon emptied 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield 2-wide, settled nicely 5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, delivered a strong finishing effort as usual to score a narrow victory.
Eased back, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, swept forward 4-wide on straightening, little dash in final stages.
Eased to sit just behind the pace early, however failed to get cover, moved up 1200 M to take the rail and led at slow early sectionals, hung on strongly until 100 M when overhauled and flattened.
Eased to sit worse than midfield 2-wide, 7Ls behind the leader, raced keenly, closed the race off strongly last 300 M despite not being suited by the slow pace.
Always prominent, no cover early, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, helped by the slow tempo, however weakened quickly 300 M.
Pushed to take a prominent spot, no cover early, 3Ls behind the leader 2-wide, favoured by the slow early sectionals, weakened 300 M.
Pushed to take a comparatively forward position along the rail, no cover early, 3Ls off the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, flattened 200 M.
Always well there on stand's side. Fought on stoutly to hold every chance only to be outsprinted final strides.
Never far off in midfield of packed field. Fought on well despite failed to feature in the blanket finish.
Soon dropped to tail-end. Never seen with a chance.
Always in rear of bunched field. Could only run home at the one pace under pressure.
Began well. With leaders until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
About mid-division. Forced to steady and switched out onto grandstand rails for a run 400 M out. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of bunched field. Finished off race well.
Led of disputed lead. Faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled just off the pace in the middle of the pack. Steadied about 300 M out before running on nicely to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts in the centre of the course. Joined leaders passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Never far off in around midfield. Kept on well at the finish.
Never better than midfield and never dangerous.
Began fairly. Ridden for pace early. Always prominent. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear of midfield of packed field running down the centre of the straight course. Commenced run about 300 M out and quickened up nicely to score close to home.
Standard getaway, ended up 3-wide in midfield with cover 5 to 6Ls back, did share of work to bend, switched out but found little and dropped out last 200 M.

Tardy from jump, faded back to a clear last 8Ls away, appreciated solid tempo, had field to beat turning, in traffic and not clear until 250 M, rocketed late to finish a solid 2nd (21.5 secs last 400 M), should be closer.

Bounced out on back of speed, had ideal trail 2Ls back on rails, travelled well on bend, in behind horses when turning in, gained split at 200 M, accelerated like a Group One horse to score easily in track record time.
Began in line, drifted back to take up a post behind midfield on rails 5 to 6Ls back, niggled along on bend, still well back on turning, made little impact in straight just battling to line.
Standard jump, outpaced in early stages, raced 3-wide 6Ls back towards rear, covered ground but had cover throughout, well back turning, closed off creditably given wide run making good late ground.
Bounced out and led them easily, rolled along at a solid clip in front as expected, worried on bend, held a 1/2L on turning in, there to 200 M but found out by extra trip and dropped out late.
Standard jump, regathered to race in midfield, posted 3-wide without cover 4Ls away, had a hard trip with pace on to bend, kept giving in straight but unable to respond last 200 M when run ended.

Away nicely, raced more prominently 2Ls back in 1 out 1 back spot, carted along by hot speed (going a little keenly) to bend, close enough on turning, stuck in there but unable to overhaul them in run to line.
Out with field, ended up behind midfield, raced 2 to 3-wide 6Ls back, helped by tempo, back in traffic on turning, in behind horses for most of straight but had nothing to offer when clear.

Amongst first few to jump, showed usual pace to race outside leader at a solid tempo, did share of work pace on, 1/2L down turning in, hit lead briefly but couldn't dash again at 200 M and faded late.
Began with rest, settled in midfield 2-wide 4Ls off speed, had a good run to bend, urged along turning in, failed to run on with great purpose but made a little late headway without threatening.
Lacked early dash, ended up 5Ls back on rails, steadily improved to be 3 or 4Ls back in midfield at 600 M, followed strongly on turning, closed hard last 200 M to take 3rd.
Broke well from poor draw racing wide in prominent position early. Lost position and dropped to mid-division home bend. Recovered some late ground inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at the start. Always travelling well behind. Ran home one-paced.
Towards rear into straight. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Broke well and in front early, settling one out one back in 2nd coming out of back straight. Hit front narrowly after straightening but soon overhauled inside final 200 M.
Always 3-wide in prominent position. Came to challenge upon straightening and fought on steadily without threatening.
Midfield far side. Lost position rounding home bend. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M.
Raced keenly in prominent position far side. Still keen in 5th rounding home bend. Gave ground into straight.
Raced on rails in midfield. Shifted out upon straightening for a clear run over 200 M out. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight. Headed upon straightening and soon dropped out. Fell about 100 M out.
Slow out. Travelled at the back. Ran on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly from wide draw settling behind midfield. Made up good ground inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily down straight for good late impression at the finish.
Settled just off the pace. Shifted out for a run from 3rd into straight. Ran on to hit front 200 M out and drew clear gradually.
Fair getaway, ended up settling 3-wide with cover in midfield 4 to 5Ls back, tightened and unbalanced at 800 M, cut back to inside turning, progressed steadily to 250 M but only battled thereafter.

No speed from jump, posted 4-wide throughout without cover in midfield, gradually closed to be 2Ls down turn, kept giving and found plenty to threaten at 200 M, stuck on gamely given hard run. Big effort.
Ordinary jump, raced 5-6Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, urged along on turning, showed nothing in straight weakening out to be well beaten.

No speed from jump, drifted back to race with last few 7 to 8Ls back in running line, had an even trip and made a 3-wide run on bend, still back in behind them turning in, found another gear at 200 M to sprint over the top to score.
Slow into stride, drifted back to share rear 9Ls from front runners, made a 3-wide run on circle, travelled nicely and came to centre on turning, made some progress to 200 M before run ended.
Reasonable jump, positioned in midfield 3-wide before slotting in at 800 M, raced 2-wide 6Ls back on bend, urged along on turning in, found little in run to line.

Moderate beginning, ended up in rearward division 7 to 8Ls back on rails, had a quiet run in middle stages, still had job to do turning, made some progress but held up last 150 M and not ridden out late.
Away nicely, had enough speed to take up 1 out 1 back spot, had an ideal run 2Ls back with even tempo, took inside runs turning, lacked turn of foot but kept on evenly to hold ground in run to line.
Out with rest, posted 3-wide without cover when unable to slot in, always working 2Ls back covering ground on bend, 1L back in 3rd turning in, hard run took toll and run ended at 200 M.

Restrained from outset, assumed usual role sharing rear, raced keenly 2-wide 9Ls off speed, tracked field on circle, well back turning, made plenty of ground between horses in straight finishing close up from too far away on bend.

Began nicely, had speed to cross and take up running, dictated terms in mid-section running even sectionals, still 1L clear leaving bend, tackled at 350 M and didn't show usual fight giving in easily last 250 M.
Away with rest, assumed a close up spot 2Ls back behind leader, enjoyed run of race on bend, urged along on turning, gave in meekly and dropped right out last furlong.
Even getaway, took up a spot in midfield racing 2-wide, shifted back at mid-point to be 7 to 8Ls back, switched to outside in straight and made good late ground last 200 M to be closest on line.
Broke nicely, took a more forward role outside leader 1L back, had an easy time with consistent tempo, right there on turning, hit lead at 200 M and gave plenty only to be overhauled late.
Began fairly, took a hold when unable to take a prominent spot, raced 2 wide in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, suited with speed on, ridden along on turning, found extra last 200 M to close nicely for 2nd.

Standard jump, faded back towards rear as expected, aided by solid tempo racing 2 wide 8Ls off pace, still had field to beat leaving bend, made good ground down outside after giving too great a start.
Even jump, ridden up to hold prime spot 2Ls back in 2 wide role, tracked solid speed throughout, switched out on turning but run ended quickly and dropped right out from 300 M.

Began fairly, hard ridden for front but unable to hold lead and had to be content with trail, tracked solid speed on rails thereafter, eased out on turning and briefly threatened but offered little from 200 M fading late.

Out fairly, urged to take up a midfield role on rails 4Ls back, suited by speed but appeared to be struggling on bend, same distance down turning, warmed up late to make good ground between horses for 3rd.
Lacked pace from jump, ended up in rearward division 6Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, still well back and saved ground on bend, only struggled on straight.
No speed from outset, settled at rear on rails 8Ls off pace, had a quiet time and appreciated speed on, still well back on turning, only passed tired runners in the straight.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, taken back to race at tail 3 wide 7Ls off speed, always working in middle stages, failed to make an impact just battling away in straight.

Moderate break, ended up behind midfield 6Ls back in 2 wide running line, helped by solid tempo, niggled along on bend, made a little progress in straight (steadied 200 M) but never really threatened.

Fastest into stride, rolled on to attack for front, unable to cross but ensured a solid clip pressuring inside horse, right there 1/2L down on turning, couldn't sprint again and ran out of gas last furlong.
Out with rest, faded into midfield running line 4 to 5Ls off pace, suited by speed on, eased 3 wide on circle, made some ground in straight but effort was largely one paced and run ended at 100 M.

Away well, showed more pace than usual to take up running, went along at a solid clip when pressured by outside horse, held a 1/2 length turning, kicked hard and defied rivals to win easily under hands and heels.
Travelled in 2nd position, 1 off, gave ground quickly in the straight and was disappointing.
Settled in last position, made up a little ground over the concluding stages.
Raced near the tailenders along the fence, passed tiring horses in the run home.
Raced midfield the fence and compounded after the 450 M. (To trial.)
Parked behind the leader along the fence. Ridden along after the 500 M, peeled to the outside in the straight and drew away for convincing win.
Faded passing the 300 M afer settling the tempo.
Raced handy to the speed, 1 off with cover, closed off satisfactorily.
Raced midfield, 3 wide without cover, struggled in the last 350 M.
Travelled in second last position, 1 off with cover, made good ground in the straight.
Settled with the leading division, 3 wide no cover, battled on soundly.
Positioned midfield, 1 off with cover, never a factor.
Settled at midfield or behind. 4-wide making home turn and near last on straightening. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Ridden along to be in a forward spot from widest draw. Settled 4-wide at midfield after 1000 M. Kept on steadily in the straight.

3-wide in rear section. Gradually improved making the turn and continued well after straightening. Ran into some traffic at 300 M but picked up again once finding clear running and was closest at the line.
Gradually slipped towards a rearward position and trailed field 1000 M out. Last on straightening and made up ground by running past tired runners.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Improved to be within 2Ls of the pace turning for home. Stayed on well in the straight and eventually ran down the early leader final 50 M.

Ridden out of the gates and had the early lead. 3-wide and kept within a length of the pace from 1000 M onwards. Lacked the needed response to stay with the leaders after 400 M and remained on at the same pace thereafter.
Raced very wide and without cover at midfield or worse. Failed to quicken after straightening and weakened final stages after a hard trip.
Checked and blundered at 1500 M and dropped to a rearward position on the fence. Made a ground saving trip around the turn. Rallied and made up good ground in the straight.
Settled in a prominent position behind the leader. Kept on only fairly in the straight and unable to turn up a notch.
Settled 2-wide just behind the pace. Kept on steadily after straightening and took the lead briefly 100 M out. Unable to find extra to remain in contention final stages.

Jumped only fairly but was hard ridden to take the lead. Held a 1/2L advantage into home straight. Kept on gamely to hold onto the lead in the straight but not enough to fend off the winner in the final 50 M.
2-wide and no worse than midfield until home turn. Had trouble keeping pace turning in and weakened in the straight.

Dropped back and taken across to the fence. Gradually moved up and settled on the fence at midfield after 1000 M. Kept chasing in the straight without the clearest running, couldn't find enough to get closer late.
Gradually dropped to a rearward position. Among last few on straightening. Rallied home and was closest at finish.
Awkward break, 2-wide back in 7th about 5Ls off early pace, 3Ls back in 6th at home turn, 2Ls down and staying on at 200 M, nearest at finish.
Went back from the wide gate, 6Ls behind in 9th at the 800 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down in 8th into home straight, led inside final 50 M, all out to score.
Outpaced and under pressure right from the start, never better than 5Ls off the speed at any stage, very weak in home straight.
Always 3-wide without cover, 3Ls off pace in 5th at the 800 M and similarly placed at home turn, stayed on at the same pace.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, closer taking home turn but held up nearing the 200 M pole, stayed on okay without reaching principals.
Had the box-seat position 2Ls off pace in 3rd down the back, 1L down in 3rd off home turn, led at the 200 M but grounded down by the winner inside final 50 M.
Slow away, recovered well to take the 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until the home turn, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, about 6Ls down in 8th at the 800 M, remained a similar distance behind at all stages.
Never on terms with principals and always in rear at least 6Ls off the pace.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, led at top of home straight but pegged back about 200 M out, tired late.
Good early speed to cross from wide gate and lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, headed at top of homestretch but rallied at 200 M to lead again, no extra inside final 100 M.
4-back on fence 5Ls off the lead in midfield at halfway, same margin back 3-wide turning in, good headway to be over 1L back in 2nd at 200 M but the run ended final 100 M.
Caught 3-wide no cover about 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, steadily lost this position on the circle and dropped out tamely in the straight.
Settled 3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1300 M, improved to 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn and led 250 M out, all out to just cling on for the win.
No early pace and always niggled along in rear about 8Ls off the pace down the back straight, never got competitive.
2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, under pressure to stay within 3Ls of the pace in 3rd at the 600 M, all out to be 3Ls down in midfield at final bend, tired late.
Set a brisk tempo and never clear by more than 1L until home turn, weakened sharply once headed about 250 M out.
Awkwardly away losing ground, 6Ls off speed in 10th at halfway and same entering home straight, threatened a place when 3Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, no extra.
Worse than midfield when pulled up and eased out of the race at around the 1200 M.
Disputed early lead out 2-wide, 1L down in 2nd at home turn, failed to quicken up and weakened final 100 M.
About 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th with cover through to home turn, vying for a place at the 200 M when 2Ls back in 4th, failed to follow through.
Always towards the rear, 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, still well back taking home turn, made only very minor late ground.
Niggled along when 8Ls off pace in rear at 1400 M, still well back off final bend, stayed on well through the field but post came two strides too soon to deny the win.
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace through to home straight, could only plug on at the same pace.
Always caught 3 and 4-wide without cover, 5Ls down in midfield at halfway, struggling to lie up off home bend, stayed on at the one pace.
Very slowly away, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout at the rear, never competitive.
At back, 8Ls off the good pace 2 wide, swung 4 wide on straightening to make run, closed the race off strongly 200 M to win.
Hard ridden to get across to the rail, led by 1L at good pace, overhauled and flattened at 300 M.
Eased to rear, more than 9Ls off the leader 2 wide, swept 4 wide on straightening, however never accelerated, just ran on fairly in final stages.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, settled nicely throughout, lacked turn of foot in straight but still ran on well to the line to finish 3rd.
Eased back, 6.5Ls off the good pace 2 to 3 wide, travelled nicely throughout, looked to have something to offer however just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide and covered too much ground at bends, no turn of foot in straight, weakened 300 M. Didn't handle track.
Pushed forward, trapped 3 wide throughout 1Ls off the good pace, lost too much ground at bends, led 300 M, hung on until 100 M overhauled, ran on for 2nd.
Pushed early to take a position just behind midfield along the fence, 5.5Ls off the good pace, no dash, crowded for room on several occasions last 250 M, then faded.
Eased to sit just behind leader 2 wide, travelled well until 450 M dropped off rapidly.
Pushed early but lacked early speed, then eased to sit 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 to 4 wide and covered too much ground at bends, weakened quickly 250 M.
Eased to sit about midfield on the rails, 4Ls off the good pace, ridden along from 600 M but no response, run ended 200 M. Didn't handle track.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls behind the good pace 2 to 3 wide, weakened 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield 2 to 3 wide, 5Ls off the good pace, made ground steadily to 300 M, on heels 100 M.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Fought on steadily in straight without threatening.
Midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Raced towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always struggling at the back.
Soon in rear. Tailed off from home bend. (Lame.)
Began awkwardly losing ground. Travelled towards rear to straight. Made good progress to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to halfway mark. Dropped out under pressure. (Heart irregularity.)
Broke well settled just better than midfield. Some 3Ls back in 5th into straight. Quickened to reach 1L 3rd 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Travelled a distant 3rd. Still 3rd but just 2Ls off turning for home. Hit front over 200 M out but caught close to home.
Just better than midfield early. Improved to 2nd some 2Ls back after halfway mark. Similar turning in but soon weakened over 200 M out.
Midfield. Closed order turning in. Weakened out of contention over 200 M out.
Broke well. Raced 3-wide in midfield. Took closer order home bend. Sustained progress down straight to assert authority close to home.
Soon took up running going over 4Ls ahead far side. Came back to within 2Ls of 2nd home bend and headed over 200 M out when weakening.
Never seen with a chance racing well behind.
Fast away, led them up racing hard on outside rail, still 1L clear at 400 M, showed good fight to hold them off until 100 M when overhauled, game in defeat finding winner too good.
Jumped nicely and settled 1 to 2Ls back towards middle, had a fair trail but began to struggle at 400 M, produced a one paced finish getting further behind over concluding stages.
Little pace from beginning, raced at rear 4 to 5Ls back in middle of course, steadily drifted in, lacked a real dash and just plugged away last 200 M.
Slow into stride, raced at rear 5Ls back towards outside rail, always had trouble keeping in touch, weakened noticeably from 400 M to be well beaten.
Out well, up close to lead 1L back in middle of course, under pressure from midpoint, didn't find under pressure and dropped out tamely.
Not the best out, regathered to be not far away close to outside rail, travelled well 1L down at 400 M, right there at 200 M but just couldn't match top 3 late.

Began well but proved difficult to settle early. Obtained a trail 1 to 2Ls back behind leader hard against outside rail, had little room when run closed at 200 M and lacked any real chance thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Showed good pace from outset, lead division in middle of course, still there until 400 M, condition gave out and weakened out gradually in run to line.
Awkward jump and didn't show expected speed, settled back with last few 4Ls away, under a hold at midpoint, didn't find enough when let down just holding ground to line.
Out in line, sat 2 to 3Ls back between middle and outside, travelled reasonably to 300 M but failed to find usual dash and just held ground late. (Jockey reported didn't handle going.)
OK to begin, took a trail in midfield close to outside rails, raced 3Ls back with cover, tracked well at 400 M, drove through from 200 M and drew away to score comfortably.
Showed speed from outset and raced 1L off front in middle of track, right there at 300 M but run ended at furlong pole and just lost touch late.
Ordinary jump, ended up at rear 4 to 5Ls back towards outside rail, steadily improved between horses to share lead at 300 M, a little wayward under pressure but stuck on well 3rd.
Raced prominently in one-out-one-back position to straight. Weakened out of contention passing 200 M.
Travelled on rails in midfield. Kept on well to produce good late impression in straight.
Slightly slow into stride. Soon raced in rear of midfield. Dropped out into straight.
Raced wide in midfield after beginning from poor draw. Remained same into straight then dropped out under pressure.
Raced 4-wide in prominent position to straight. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Slightly slow into stride. Raced in last few throughout. Made no show in straight.
Travelled outside leader. Took lead shortly after straightening but worn down close to home.
Broke well. Settled one back in 3rd on rails. Came to challenge shortly after straightening and asserted authority close to home.
Raced wide in last few. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out. Quickly picked up to midfield. Weakened after straightening. (Mucus.)
Travelled well back and wide. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off racing 3-wide most of way to straight. Made moderate progress without threatening.
Broke well. Held slender lead on rails before headed 400 M out. Ran home one-paced.

Away well, didn't have usual speed, travelled more comfortably at leader's heels 1L back in 2 wide line, carted field up and still 2nd turning, struggled to dash in straight but held on well to make frame.

Steady jump, didn't have early pace but raced not far away 4Ls back on rails, had a quiet run to bend, eased out at 400 M and closed gradually making good ground last 200 M, found winner too good on day.
Crowded early and ended up towards rear, raced back on rails, urged along to hold position throughout, came 2 wide on circle, found little when asked just plodding to line.
Awkwardly away but regathered and showed plenty of dash to cross and lead, rolled along at an even clip, 1 to 2Ls clear rounding for home, kicked hard and defied them to 200 M before overhauled.

Bounced out, took up a prime position on leaders back, enjoyed run of race to bend, 2Ls down on turning, responded to pressure and charged from 200 M relishing going to gap rivals and score with ease.
Out with rest, pressed on to race 2 to 3 wide 2Ls off lead, followed an even speed and did share of work to bend, 3rd turning in and tried gamely but couldn't get closer with run ending last 100 M.

Lost ground on jumping, drove up to settle down in behind midfield 6Ls down on rails, not asked in mid-section, ridden along on turning, kept to inside and made some headway from an impossible spot. Never threatened.
Away well, ridden closer than usual 3Ls back in 2 wide line, had reasonable trip on back of speed, under pressure turning, faded out tamely to be well beaten. (Jockey advised didn't handle track.)
Ordinary break, raced behind midfield 2 wide 7Ls back, helped by tempo in mid-section, still well back switching 3 wide on turning, lacked a finish and just plodded to line.
Poor beginning, settled at rear 12Ls from lead, never really comfortable, well back with job to do on bend, switched wide but made no progress in straight.

No speed and restrained from a wide alley, raced 3 wide with cover 7Ls back behind midfield, steadily improved to be 8th switching 4 wide turning, closed best of beaten brigade but never really likely.
Reasonable jump, raced 3 wide 5 to 6Ls back in midfield, covered ground to bend, urged along in 9th turning in, made some progress but never competitive.
Standard break, pushed on to race 3 wide in midfield 5Ls off pace, helped by speed in middle stages, gradually improved but couldn't make impact from 400 M and faded out in straight.
Little early pace, ended up close to tail, raced 2 wide 10Ls away in mid-section, ridden along to improve on bend, well back on turning, passed some tired horses making some late headway.
About 4Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, still 4Ls to make up at the 200 M, finished off well to lead inside final 50 M.
4-back on fence about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, further back at top of home straight, stayed on dourly, never nearer.
Always worse than midfield, about 6Ls off speed at the 1000 M, worse off turning for home and tight for room at the 300 M, never dangerous.
Midfield about 5Ls down at the 1000 M, left 3-wide no cover on the circle, 6Ls down in 5th at top of home straight, soon petered out.
Slowly away, 2-wide in rear bunch about 8Ls off pace at 800 M, 10Ls last on straightening, made some minor late ground.
Soon led on fence, kicked over 4Ls clear at top of home straight and 3Ls ahead at the 200 M, grabbed inside final 100 M but hung on for a place.
2Ls back in 2nd at the 1000 M, over 4Ls back in 2nd taking home turn, stayed on at the same pace.
Keen early on, worse than midfield when 6Ls back at the 1000 M, further back taking home turn, faded out.
Midfield about 5Ls off pace at the 1000 M, 6Ls back in mid-division at home turn when tight for room, never looked like taking a hand in the finish.
7Ls last early on, same margin behind in midfield when 4-wide on straightening, ran on okay late without threatening to place.
Lost ground at the start, caught 4-wide no cover throughout, worse than midfield and 6Ls off early pace, about 5Ls back in 4th turning for home, ran on well late, nearest at finish.
On fence in midfield about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, a little further behind taking home turn, made some fair late ground on the fence, never nearer.
3Ls back in 3rd at the 1000 M, 5Ls down in 3rd off home turn, swamped out of a place inside final 200 M.
3-wide with cover in rear about 8Ls down at the 1000 M, unbalanced at 700 M, never competitive.
Began very awkwardly from poor draw losing ground. Quickly recovered to midfield and closer up going up Rock. Improved to dispute 2nd 3-wide turning in but folded up quickly under pressure. (Mucus.)
Broke well from wide draw. Settled wide in rear of midfield. Shuffled further back approaching home bend. Renewed effort turning for home and ran on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Did not jump best but quick into stride to retain rails run holding slender lead. Fought on under pressure to resist second runners-up's challenge in straight only to be worn down by winner 100 M out.
Midfield early. Took closer order after Rock. One back in 3rd on rails turning in. Shifted off rails to challenge 200 M out and quickened well to take charge close to home.
Began fairly. Raced amongst leaders 3-wide throughout. Still disputing lead after straightening but gradually overhauled inside 200 M.
Began slowly. Remained well behind before making significant progress in straight. Did best work at finish.
Jumped fairly. With leaders 4-wide early. Taken back to 4-wide midfield at Rock. Tended to hang making home bend losing ground. Kept on same pace to finish.
Quickly moved up after fair start to dispute lead. Yielded ground reaching 400 M mark and folded up quickly after straightening.
Soon dropped to the rear and trailed the field until running past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Raced in rear far side. Made swift progress rounding home bend. Midfield into straight but could find no extra.
Settled midfield, 1 off with cover. Rolled out on straightening under hard riding, secured the win close the post.
Tracked the leader along the rail, had every chance.
Stalked the leader 1 off, gave ground after the 450 M.
Raced close to midfield on the fence, plugged away at the same pace over the concluding stages. Better effort.
Positioned with the backmarkers, didn't run on.
Slowly away and raced near the tailenders, made satisfactory ground without threatening.
Set solid tempo in front, challenged after the 200 M and stuck to task gamely.
Raced behind midfield 2-deep, came 3-wide turning for home, closed off well to miss by a narrow margin.
Positioned 3Ls back along the fence, ran on well.
Settled 1 off about 3Ls back, made some headway over the final 200 M.
Slow to begin and took up 2nd last position on the rail. Kept to the inside in the straight and finished off nicely without the clearest passage late.
Raced in last position, shifted 3-wide after the 600 M to commence its run but didn't go on last 150 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Pushed to dispute lead 3-wide, 2-wide off pace 900 M out, run ended near 250 M and dropped out final 100 M.
Midfield making first turn awkwardly, checked and dropped to rear, widest turning in, made up some ground before tiring close to home.
Slowly away, ridden but soon detached, 8Ls off on fence turning for home, ran on steadily.
Taken back from wide draw to rear 2-wide, found rail at 700 M, crept closer rounding home turn, ran on through field to be nearest at finish though no hope with winner.
Slow away, pushed along but only managed position behind midfield, raced awkwardly 800 M and dropped to rear 600 M out, ran on steadily final 200 M.
Niggled along to take up box seat, responded well entering home straight and took over passing 200 M, drew well clear.
4-wide without cover in midfield or slightly behind, under pressure 400 M out, bit tight 200 M but never posed any threat in the straight.
Awkward break then ridden to secure midfield position on rail or half a horse out, 2 1/2Ls off leader straightening up, kept on at same pace.
Hard ridden but only managed midfield position, dropped back slightly half way, under pressure 400 M out, crowded 200 M but never looked likely.
Ordinary getaway, pushed along to take lead 900 M out with 1-1/2Ls advantage, headed passing 200 M and kept on well enough to keep a minor placing.
Hard pushed to be 4-wide near lead first turn, still 3-wide 2Ls off down back straight, under pressure 400 M out without quickening, tired final 100 M.
Rearward on fence 5 or 6 lengths off leader, switched out on straightening, took time to respond, ran on well to just miss a placing.
Slowest away, 8Ls last 1400 M out, pressed on out wider and 4-deep no cover in 7th about 4Ls off pace in mid-division at 800 M, gained cover on the circle, one-paced final 200 M.
Nicely positioned about 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd or 4th through to final bend, led 300 M out and looked the winner before hanging in at the 200 M and tying up late on.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 3Ls back in midfield out wide at halfway, struggling to keep up on straightening and wilted in the closing stages.
In rear about 7Ls back at 1200 M, 5Ls down and improving when short of room turning for home, ran on fairly well late, never nearer.
Always prominent, 2Ls back in 3rd at the 800 M, driven along to make an impact from same position off final turn, very weak finish.
Crossed to lead by 1L on fence at 1200 M, headed at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd off home turn, faded out tamely.
2Ls behind pace in 6th when 2-wide at the 1000 M, same margin back in 4th when 3-wide off home bend, had every chance to win and no excuses.
Always on and off the bridle 3-back on the fence in mid-division about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on okay to just nick a place.
One from rear passing post for the first time, same position about 6Ls behind on the turn for home, stayed on fairly out wide, nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls back with cover at 1200 M, still 4Ls down in about 8th off final bend, closed off well through the pack to lead final strides.
2Ls off pace in 4th but 4-wide without cover at 1000 M, sent on to lead at 800 M but couldn't cross to fence, headed at top of homestretch and faded final 200 M.
Awkward start, 4Ls back in midfield with cover at 1000 M, lost position and hard ridden in rear at the 600 M, no impression.
3-back on fence about 3Ls back in 8th at the 800 M, a little closer taking home bend but held up until the 200 M, didn't recover.
Had the run of the race, about 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd until home turn when going well, picked up adequately to lead over 50 M out, ran on.
Over-raced when vying for the early lead, a neck down in 2nd off the home turn, soon capitulated.
Never troubled principals, on fence about 7Ls back towards rear at the 800 M, made some minor late headway in the homestretch, never nearer.
Pushed along on fence when 5Ls back in 9th at 1000 M, closer turning for home but short of running room until the 200 M, ran on well late, unlucky not to place.
Settled about 8th place out 2 and 3-wide and mostly with cover, 5Ls off pace at 800 M, plenty to do turning for home but ran on well late, nearest at finish.
With cover in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until the home turn, given every hope to win but could only stay on to be nearest at finish for a place.
Awkward break, had a nice spot 2-wide about 2Ls or so in about 4th until home turn, had every chance to at least place but couldn't quicken up.
Switched inside from wide gate to be 10Ls last at the 1000 M, 8Ls last turning for home, only passed one very tired rival on the run-in.
Slowly away, raced too freely throwing head around in 10th when 7Ls off pace early on, wasn't any closer on straightening, made some minor late ground out wide.
Pestered for the lead by free-running JADE DANCER, a neck clear on fence off final turn and over 1L ahead at 200 M, overhauled over 50 M out, held on for 2nd.
3-wide without cover throughout, close-up about 1L down in 3rd at the 600 M, 4-wide off final turn and faded markedly through final stages.
Eased to rear and took rail, 7Ls behind the good pace, 2-wide at home bend, made ground 200 M, lacked room 100 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and covered too much ground at the bend, pushed back just before straightening, ran on fairly in final stages.
Hard ridden to get across the rail and led by 1-1/2Ls at good pace, hung on strongly until the last few strides when overhauled, just missed win.
Raced 3-wide throughout just behind the pace group and lost too much ground at the bend, dropped off 400 M.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 6Ls off the good pace trapped 3-wide, lost too much ground at the bend, progressed steadily 200 M.
Bumped start, immediately ridden along to hold the rail spot about midfield, 4Ls behind the leader, blocked 400 M to 200 M, closed the race off strongly when clear and scored a narrow victory.
Pushed early to get closer towards the rail about midfield, 5Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, made up some ground in straight without really threatening.
Pushed to get across in front and settled 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, ran on well to the line to finish 3rd.
Pushed early to take the box seat, 2Ls off the good pace, ran on fairly on straightening, flattened 200 M.
Raced 3-wide throughout at the back and covered too much ground, never competitive.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed and to hold the box seat, raced keenly behind the front-running group, 3Ls off the good pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot in straight, made ground 100 M.
Settled worse than midfield, 6Ls off the good pace along the fence travelled nicely, however no progress in straight.
Slightly slow out. Raced near rails in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning for home. Faded under pressure inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and responded well inside final 200 M to swoop on leader close to home.
Amongst leader early, travelling in just better than midfield far side. Similar turning in and fought on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Brief lead early. Taken back to settle just a neck off the pace far side one off the rail. Slightly inconvenienced making home bend and gave ground before turning for home. (Blood in trachea.)
One pace amongst leaders. Shared pace on rails rounding home bend. Drew clear under pressure but caught by fast-finishing winner close to home.
Ridden for slender lead from wide draw racing 3-wide most of way. Dropped out upon straightening.
Niggled at on rails early. Held rails run despite a 4th some 1L back throughout back straight. Still one back on rails in 3rd when crossed after Rock. Plugged on under pressure in straight.
Raced wide from poor draw in midfield, shuffling back to rear of field at 1000 M bend. Remained rear to straight. Only ran past well beaten horses final 200 M.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon urged to go forward and was racing wide with leaders far side up to 700 M when commenced to give ground.
In rear to straight. Made moderate headway running past beaten horses closing stages.
Raced down centre of back straight in midfield. Made some headway after Rock before running off the track not making home bend properly. Never recovered.
Began fairly, quickly settled towards rear on rails. Badly held up for a run over 250 M out before switching out and running on well to be nearest at finish.
Even jump but drifted back from a wide alley, settled in rearward division as expected on rails 8Ls back, helped by solid speed on, in traffic until 200 M, made some late progress when clear.
Moderate jump, forced to take a 3-wide trail 6Ls back in midfield, did share of work in mid-section, 4Ls down turning in, run closed at 200 M, didn't respond to hands and heels riding thereafter.
Standard jump, raced behind midfield 8Ls away in running line, helped by reasonable speed, back in traffic turning under pressure but steadied at 200 M, did little thereafter.
Bounced out, rolled on to assume role at head of affairs, kept them running at a good clip 2Ls clear, kicked on circle but tackled on turning, unable to dash again but kept on evenly to make frame.

Began well, took a hold to take an early trail, tracked pace nicely 3Ls racing 2-wide, gradually improved on bend, travelled strongly to challenge turning, raced away in straight to score a facile win by a big space.

Awkwardly away and restrained to rear, raced 10 or more lengths back in a clear last place, aided by even sectionals, still well back turning, made some good late ground but gave too much start on straightening.
Slow into stride, angled to rails for a midfield trailing position, raced 8Ls from front and suited by speed, spent nothing to bend, plugged steadily in straight just holding ground to line.

Well enough to begin, posted 3-wide without cover when unable to slot in, did it tough 4 to 5Ls off pace, crept closer passing Rock, 3Ls down in 4th leaving bend, run ended at 150 M and battled thereafter.
Fast away, tried to hold front but eventually handed up for trailing position heading into back, did share of work a even tempo, eased 2-wide passing Rock.
Amongst first few out, positioned handy 3 to 4Ls back in 2-wide line, had good trip throughout, tracked eventual winner on bend, kept on steadily when clear on turning, found winner in another class.

Average break, taken to rails and slotted in nicely 4Ls back, not set a task in mid-section, crept closer 3Ls down in 5th turning, kept to rails but couldn't make much impact when in clear from 200 M. Closed steadily.
Moderate to begin, faded back to next to last, 10Ls back racing 2-wide, advantaged by speed, came 3-wide passing Rock, found little under pressure in straight and plugged to line.
Jumped well, had plenty of early speed, took up running and dictated terms at a steady tempo, 1/2L clear on circle, challenged on turning, gave in weakly for a below par run. (Blood in trachea.)

Average jump, soon regathered and drove through to hold leaders back, had run of race thereafter with steady tempo right there on turning, gap emerged but just produced a one paced finish last furlong.

Away fairly, gathered momentum to race up outside leader, had a good trip at leaders girth with moderate tempo, challenged on turning, took over briefly but lacked a dash and run ended at 200 M, weakened late.

Ordinary getaway, ended up amongst last few, raced 2 wide 6Ls back, unsuited by tempo in mid-section, switched 3 wide in circle, came 4 wide into straight but lacked usual finish making ground to 200 M before putting up white flag.
Restrained from outset and taken down to rear, always urged along 7 to 8Ls back, not helped by tempo but made 3 wide run on circle, failed to run on and made little impression.

No speed from outset, pushed along to hold spot behind midfield, raced 2 wide 5Ls off frontrunners, in traffic and bumped on bend, switched to middle on straightening and closed best of beaten runners to take 3rd.
Fastest into stride, challenged for front but unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, had tough run to bend, improved and challenged turning, hit front but peaked on run at 100 M.

Away in line, drifted back to settle in midfield on rails 4Ls off pace, had a soft trail throughout, saved ground on fence, in traffic turning in to 200 M, sprinted sharply to collar leaders and score with something in reserve.
Moderate to break, regathered to hold coveted 1 out 1 back spot, travelled well 2Ls off front, tracked well turning in, switched out and closed steadily producing an improved finish for 2nd.

Standard jump, little pace in early stages, positioned in rearward division 2 to 3 wide 5Ls back, never better than midfield to turn, switched wide on turning, closed only fairly at same speed over concluding stages.
Even beginning, took a midfield trail behind speed, raced 4Ls back in two wide line, had good trip but found traffic on circle and again at 300 M, closed only moderately when clear.
Became fractious as the start was effected, got head down and was slow to begin. Settled at the tail of the field, never got into the race. (Mucopus.)
Travelled near the rear of the field, was left racing wide and without cover after the 900 M, made reasonable late ground.
Raced midfield, the fence, away in the run home.
Parked behind the leader, didn't go on after having every chance.
Raced behind midfield, the fence, made no impact in the straight and battled to the line.
Travelled in 3rd position, 2 wide no cover, cruised to the front early in the straight but couldn't hold off the winner over the concluding stages.
Travelled near the rear, and was never in contention.
Faded in the straight after settling a solid tempo in front.
Positioned on the back off the speed along the fence, hit the line satisfactorily.
Settled close to midfield, 1 off with cover, ran on strongly to clinch the win close to the post.
Positioned handy to the leaders, never a factor.
Raced with the backmakers, but struggled over the final 300 M.
Settled near the rear as usual, faded to run on.
Midfield 4 wide without cover, bumped and carried wider 450 M, dropped out steadily inside final 300 M.
Ridden early to be behind midfield, widest turning in, made moderate headway down centre of track.
2nd last 6Ls off pace, took time to wind up on straightening, made steady progress final 250 M.
At rear 7Ls off lead, crept closer rounding home turn still 5Ls away, traffic problem after 300 M, ran on steadily.
Ridden to sit behind fast pace, 2 wide on leader's hindquarters 1200 M out, kicked well clear inside final 200 M, eased down near line to score impressively in fast time.
Hard ridden to lead from widest gate, setting fast tempo, found rail after 1300 M, run ended soon after straightening, dropped right out final 200 M.
Not far off, hampered and carried 3 wide 1200 M out, over-racing afterwards, made home turn awkwardly, brief threat to winner 300 M out, no extra final 100 M.
3Ls off pace mostly midfield 3 wide, shifted out before straightening and bumped another runner, responded well in home straight and made ground gradually.
Worse than midfield on fence, niggled along early, shaken up after 600 M, 4Ls off entering home straight, in clear from 300 M and ran on well but never a threat to winner.
Niggled along early on rail in front of midfield, 2Ls off fast pace, one-paced in home straight, faded inside final 200 M.
Disputed early lead out 4-wide without cover, clear lead at 900 M, 2Ls in front on fence off final bend, overhauled about 50 M out, no extra.
Keen early on, midfield about 4Ls back with cover at halfway, stayed on dourly in the home straight and nearest at finish.
Crowded at start, about 7Ls off pace in rear bunch early and still well back on straightening, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Midfield or a little better about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, very one-paced in the finish.
Trapped 4-wide without cover throughout, midfield about 4Ls off pace at halfway, struggling at top of home straight and soon gone.
In rear bunch about 8Ls off speed at 1000 M, still with plenty to do off final bend, ran into traffic problems about 300 M out, no great threat once clear.
Slowest away, in about 10th place and 7Ls off the pace at halfway, midfield about 6Ls back at home bend, found nothing off the bridle.
Tame effort, one from rear about 9Ls off early pace, in rear and widest (5-wide) turning in, no impression.
Handed up the lead about 900 M out, 2Ls down in 2nd off final bend, 1L down in 3rd and appeared certain of a place at the 200 M but missed out final stages.
Bounded at the start, 9Ls last on fence at 1000 M, still well back off home turn, made some minor late ground past tired rivals.
Slowly away but recovered to race 3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in mid-division until home turn, petered out in the straight.
Nicely placed with the box run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, stuck on well to grind his way to the front 50 M out, kept on.
Disputed early speed, eased back to race 2Ls back in 3rd at halfway, 3Ls down in 4th and paddling off home turn, soon beaten.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at the 1000 M, struggling to lie up turning for home, weakened out. (Bled.)
Handy position 2Ls back in 4th at the 800 M, under pressure when 4Ls back in 5th at final turn, finished off at the one pace.
Worse than midfield early on, 5Ls back in 8th at the 800 M and same turning for home, plugged on at the same speed to the line.
Fractious in gates, 9Ls last at the 800 M, further back and struggling off home turn, never got involved.
Towards rear about 6Ls off pace at the 800 M, further behind and 3-wide in rear and hard pressed to keep up on straightening, beaten a long way out.
Always in rear, in 13th about 8Ls off pace at the 800 M, further behind on straightening, poor effort.
Disputed early pace on fence a neck clear from 800M to home turn despite hanging out slightly, headed about 300 M but rallied well, went down fighting.
Nice position in 3rd on fence 2Ls behind leading pair until home turn, stayed on well along to fence but just couldn't pick up the leading pair.
About 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th through to home turn, stayed on quite well without really threatening the leading trio.
Disputed early lead out 3-wide no cover, 2-wide and a neck 2nd from 800 M to home turn, led narrowly at the 300 M, fought on well to maintain a similar margin to line.
Missed the start and immediately 6Ls last, improved position but same margin back in 9th turning for home, made no impression on those in front.
Slowly away, with cover about 6Ls back in 10th at the 800 M when hindered, widest (4-wide) off final bend and further back in 12th, no impression.
Caught 3-wide without cover from 800 M to home turn when about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace around midfield, couldn't offer much more.
Fractious in gates, never travelled well and without cover down the backstretch in midfield about 4Ls back, checked at the 800 M and lost position on the circle, eased out. (Mucus.)
Lacked early pace, 5Ls back in midfield at the 800 M and same off home bend, never troubled leaders.
Eased to sit further back than usual about midfield, 2Ls behind the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, trapped 3 wide and lost too much ground at bends, weakened in straight.
Hard ridden to share the leader at slow early sectionals, however hung out badly covering extra ground on bends, ran on well to the line without threats.
Jumped very well, however eased to sit behind the front group, not suited by the slow pace, raced 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground at bends, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, settled nicely 1.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the slow pace, however no turn of foot in straight, weakened 250 M.
Hard ridden early but lacked early speed, more than 7Ls behind the leaders at the rear, helped by the rail run but harmed by the slow pace, no dash in final stages.
Midfield along the rails, 3.5Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground and ran on OK in straight. Even debut.
Eased back at start, 4.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to score a remarkable victory.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, benefitted by the slow pace and the rail run, closed the race off strongly to finish 2nd.
Crossed the rail easily and shared the lead at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled, just ran on for 3rd.
Trapped 3 wide throughout at the back, 4.5Ls off the leader, covered too much ground at bends and not harmed by the slow tempo, flattened in straight.
Travelled in 4th in midfield of strung-out field. Commenced move approaching home turn and ran on to hold some chance over 200 M out but soon outstayed by winner.
Settled towards rear in 5th stalking VENGEANCE OF RAIN throughout. Quickened well early in straight to grab lead 200 M out. Won convincingly.
Raced 2-wide in 3rd in forward of midfield. Weakened under pressure upon straightening.
Soon led setting fast pace. Held clear running until finding no extra when overhauled over 300 M out.
Broke well holding 2nd some 3Ls behind most of way to straight. Easily passed by winner and second early in straight but plugged on for remote 3rd.
Settled at the back and trailed the field into straight. Found nothing.
Settled at the back. Failed to muster speed under pressure after straightening.

Slowly into stride, ended up behind midfield on rails 4 to 5Ls back, didn't settle well with slow speed, tracked eventual winner on bend, kept to inside and hit clear at 150 M, charged late and just went under.

Only fair to jump, pushed along to drive up into spot behind leader, had run of race thereafter, 2 to 3Ls back in awkward spot on bend, steadily shifted to hit clear at 250 M, dashed hard and stuck to task for a narrow win.
Taken back from outset, raced amongst last few on rails 5 to 6Ls down, not helped by slow pace, still had job to do on bend, closed race off nicely between horses in straight to be nearest on line.

Fast into stride, couldn't cross and was posted 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, always working and crept close to challenge on circle, right there entering straight and in it to 200 M before run ended.

Amongst fastest away, pressed on in search of lead, had to be content to race outside lead 1L away, crept close on circle, right there turning but dropped out tamely from 200 M. (Jockey reported abnormal breathing.)
Bounced out, showed usual speed to take up running, controlled the race 1L clear of rivals, challenged on circle, kicked again turning and held 1L to 200 M before overhauled. Even effort.
Reasonable beginning, ended up 3 wide 3 to 4Ls back in midfield with cover, covered ground throughout but helped by speed, under pressure on turning, there to 200 M but only paddled late.
Even jump, assumed a midfield spot 1 out 1 back, had an easy time between horses, 2Ls down on turning, under pressure when run closed at 300 M, dropped right out last furlong.
Ordinary getaway, soon detached at rear 12Ls off front runners, unsuited by going and always under pressure throughout, still well back on turning, made little impact in straight.

Standard jump and faded to muster, raced behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, came 3 wide from midpoint, well back turning and without a clear run, shifted out in straight and closed evenly without threatening.
Towards rear early. Gradually picked up to be midfield approaching home bend. Remained 3-wide in midfield turning in. Ran on under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly then ridden to wide in midfield. Dropped out from home bend. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Mostly in forward of midfield to straight then ran home one-paced.

Quickly into stride and led early. Ceded advantage to settle for 3rd on rails passing 1000 M. One back on rails turning in and baulked early in straight. Squeezed through gap to challenge 200 M but winner too strong.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Improved gradually from wide draw to race outside leader before home bend. Gained slender advantage briefly upon straightening but soon overhauled.
Began fairly from poor draw. Taken back to rear and ended up trailing the field around home bend. Fought on steadily to run past beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear most of way to straight. Switched out for a run over 350 M out and produced moderate headway down straight without threatening.

Jumped fairly then soon dropped back along rails to midfield. Checked and lost position coming out of back straight. Gradually picked up from towards rear to midfield turning in. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in just worse than midfield. Dropped out in straight. (Bled.)
Beginning from wide draw, gradually moved up to lead and cross to rails coming out of back straight. Soon headed after straightening and dropped out tamely.
Never seen with a chance.
Never far off. Raced in one-out-one-back position around home bend. Drifting early in straight but soon took charge over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Settled in forward of midfield on rails. In 5th with over 4Ls to make up on leader turning in. Ran on well to do best work at finish.

Out with rest, checked early and ended up in midfield half carting 4Ls back, raced on rails from midpoint, had an easy time to bend, eased 2 wide on turning, closed nicely between horses in straight to make frame.

Little speed from jump and settled at rear, raced 2 wide 6Ls from leaders, not helped by steady pace, switched 4 wide on circle, last and widest into straight, closed hard down outside making good ground for 3rd.

Fastest into stride, crossed them easily, dictated terms 1/2Ls clear setting a steady pace in mid-section, pressed by outside horses on bend, quickly overhauled passing 300 M and weakened out tamely thereafter.

Taken back soon after start, ended up racing in last place on rails 6 to 7Ls back, harmed by tempo, on heels at 500 M and still held up passing 250 M, did best work last 200 M when clear to be nearest on line.

Began with more purpose, took closer order in midfield 2 wide line 4Ls from pace, had a reasonable trip at even speed, improved between horses on bend 1L down switching 4 wide, hit front at 250 M and safely held a margin to finish.

Crowded early, ended up behind midfield 4 wide 6Ls away, had cover but did share of work covering ground, tracked 5 wide on turning, run ended at 200 M and just battled away over concluding stages. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderate jump, received a bad check early, raced 2 wide in rearward division 6Ls back, still towards tail behind horses leaving bend, made some ground through pack in straight but peaked on run at 200 M.

Standard break, ridden along to take closer order, challenged for front but had to be content to sit at leaders girth, had a fair trip with steady pace, challenged again on turning, found zero when asked and dropped right out.

Even jump, worked forward to race 3 wide outside leaders, always covering ground without cover, right there on circle and hit front turning in, still green but fought strongly coming again late to regain 2nd.
Began nicely, took up box seat on rails 3Ls behind speed, trailed leader throughout and suited by muddling pace, right there on turning, found little under pressure and gradually weakened last 200 M.

Away reasonably, no early pace, ended up 3 wide with cover behind midfield, raced 5Ls back between horses covering ground, same margin turning behind runners for most of straight and really clear. (See Racing Incidents.)

Moderate jump, ended up in rearward division 5Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, still well down turning but crept closer entering straight, steadily improved in straight making late ground to be nearest on line.

Well enough away, took a prominent spot 1 out 1 back 2Ls off pace, tracked well throughout, same margin back in 5th turning, gap appeared at 400 M but just closed at same speed and couldn't match them over last 200 M.

No speed from jump, posted 4 and 5 wide at rear when unable to slot in, improved wide on cover to be 4Ls down at midpoint, 2Ls down on bend, briefly threatened at 350 M but knocked up after hard run last 200 M.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield far side. Similar rounding home bend. Found nothing in straight.
Began well and soon in prominent position. Raced mainly one out one back to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Joint 4th into straight. Fought on steadily to reach 2nd late.
Did not jump well. Soon travelled in rear. Shared last spot turning in. Made up ground along rails past beaten runners in the run home.
Jumped fairly soon ridden to lead. Held clear advantage to straight. Headed under pressure passing 200 M. (Bled.)
Midfield to straight. Fought on steadily to narrowly miss 2nd.
Settled at the back. Went wide into straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Never far off most of way only to be overhauled inside final 200 M.
Midfield early. Shuffled back towards rear at 1000 M bend. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily.
Broke well. Raced on rails in 3rd just off the pace. Hit front inside 200 M and stuck on well.
Travelled in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M down centre of track.
Raced on rails in midfield. Lost position going round home bend but fought on steadily to finish.
For the major part of the race travelled 3-wide without cover, close to midfield. Never a factor.
Made up fair ground in the straight after settling back in the field.
1 out 1 back, struggled in the run home.
Bounced to the lead and made every post a winner, effortless win.
Tracked the leader along the fence, had the run of the race but winner was too good.
Bounded in the air at the start and settled behind midfield, 1 off with cover, failed to run on.
Travelled in 2nd last position after being checked near the 1000 M. Kept to the inside in the straight, made some headway over the last furlong.
Raced and finished in last position.
Raced outside the leader, but weakened early in the straight.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and settled behind midfield along the fence. Got to the line satisfactorily.
Parked 3-back on the rail, peeled out turning for home, had every chance.
Positioned midfield along the fence, kept on one-paced in the straight.
Waited with towards rear and saved ground on fence, took off switching wider at Rock, circled field rounding home turn, hit front 100 M out, won readily.
Slow to jump, niggled but only managed rearward position 2-wide 6Ls off lead, under pressure at 600 M, only ran past well beaten runners final 150 M.
2-wide rear of midfield, didn't quicken in home straight.
Hard ridden early to stay behind midfield on rail, found nothing in home straight.
In handy position 2-wide 1-1/2Ls off lead, struggled to keep up 600 M out, dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.
Niggled to set steady tempo hugging rail, all out after straightening, stayed on well though no answer to winner's challenge inside final 100 M.
Ridden hard to secure position on rail around midfield, briefly disappointed for a run 250 M out, kept on one paced to the line along fence.
Soon at rear, under pressure 800 M out and became detached 500 M out, not persevered with in home straight.
Ridden forward from widest draw, eased to be in front of midfield 3-wide first turn, loomed up to challenge rounding home bend, found no extra final 200 M after being wide without cover throughout.
Jumped best then slotted in 2Ls behind leader on fence, switched out 2-wide 200 M out, kept on well despite showing no real acceleration.
2-wide midfield 3Ls off pace, 3-wide similar margin turning in, only made moderate headway final stages.
Ridden to go forward from wide gate, took a closer role 2-wide flanking leader 1200 M out, similarly placed straightening up, run ended 200 M out and swamped.
Towards rear, niggled along on the circle for home when 5Ls back in 9th place, never looked like improving any better than midfield.
Caught 4-wide no cover throughout, about 4Ls back worse than midfield early on, same margin back when widest (5-wide) into stretch, faded.
6Ls back in 11th at the 800 M, same position when 5Ls down turning for home, very weak finish.
Raced 3-wide but with cover about 4Ls off pace around midfield early on, 4-wide turning for home, failed to trouble leaders.
Solid effort despite a wide trip, 3-wide no cover throughout about 2Ls back in 5th, stuck on gamely in the stretch, no extra late.
Nicely placed in about 6th with cover and 3Ls off pace through to home turn, given every chance to win but could only manage a place.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace until home turn, short of room 250 M out, soon clear and always held.
Tardy start, recovered to be 3-back on fence 3Ls or 4Ls back in midfield until home turn, quickened up well to lead 50 M out, kept on.
Always in 2nd out 2-wide and no worse than a half length back until home turn, stayed on well closing stages but lacked winner's late dash.
Best away and soon led on fence, about half a length clear until straightening, 1L clear at the 200 M, headed over 50 M out and lost out on a place.
Soon 7Ls last, steadied out when 6Ls last entering home straight, ran on past just two rivals.
Stumbled at start, in rear trio about 5Ls or 6Ls back, making some late ground when held up for a run final 50 M and not ridden out late.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 10th at the 1000 M, similarly unpromising position off final bend, weaved his way through the field to lead inside final strides.
Awkward break, in 5th about 4Ls off speed out 2-wide at 1000 M, lost ground on the circle and 4-wide and over 4Ls down in 6th at final bend, petered out.
Soon struggling in rear about 8Ls last, never on terms and a very poor effort.
Darted inside from widest gate to race 5Ls back in 8th at the 1200 M, same turning for home, produced a strong run inside final 200 M, only just missed.
3-back on fence about 4Ls behind lead in 6th at 1000 M, over 3Ls down in 5th off home turn, plugged on at just the one pace.
Blew the start and forced to go 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in 7th at the 1200 M, no better off on straightening, steadied inside final 50 M but was held in any case.
Soon led on fence, clear by about a neck until the home turn, barely headed about 200 M out, stuck on late at the same pace and just missed a place.
Held the one-out-one-back position about 2Ls off pace out 2-wide in 4th until home turn, very one-paced in the stretch.
Never going well, without cover early on about 7Ls behind in 11th, struggling a long way out and eased down from top of home straight.
A neck off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, marginal lead at the 200 M but foiled by winner inside final strides.
3-wide no cover in 9th place about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, in 8th off home turn when 5-wide (widest of all), ran on fairly, never nearer.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off speed in 3rd until the home turn, failed to quicken up sufficiently.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at fast early sectionals, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, weakened when run ended.
Worse than midfield, 4Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 200 M.
Pushed early, but soon eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leaders along the fence, favoured by the fast tempo, made steady ground in straight, lacked room 200 M.
Midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, just ran on until after 200 M making up some ground from well back.
Very slow away, more than 10Ls behind the leaders at the tail, helped by the fast pace and the rail-run too far back to make an impression, however just held ground in straight

Hard ridden throughout but failed to muster speed and found it hard to keep up with the field, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders along the rails, helped by the fast tempo, however ran on fairly in final stages.
Hard ridden to take a forward spot as usual, 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the fast pace, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2-wide, harmed by the fast early sectionals, flattened 200 M.
Pushed to secure the box seat, 1-1/2Ls off the fast pace, checked 600 M, ran on strongly 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Slow away, trapped 3-wide at back, 7Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast tempo but covered too much ground at the bends, made ground in straight.
Hard ridden to press forward, 1-1/2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground at the bend, soon emptied 300 M.
Very slow away, crossed the rails behind the field, 8-1/2Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace and the rail-run, progressed steadily 300 M, made many lengths in straight to finish a close 2nd.
Soon took up running from inside draw and led until headed over 200 M out. Kept on but lost placing late.
Quickly into stride and veered across to lead. Ceded advantage passing winning post the first time and settled one back on rails in 3rd. Came to challenge upon straightening but outsprinted home.
Never far off mostly in 5th two back on rails. Did not find much room between and behind runners the length of straight.
Raced 2-wide in midfield most of way to straight. Kept on well to finish.
Settled one out two back in 4th. Came wide into straight and quickened well to hit front inside 200 M. Won well.
Always well behind. Made no impression in straight.
Raced 3-wide in midfield to straight. Ran on quite well to do best work at finish.
Midfield throughout. Fought on steadily in straight without quickening.
Quickly ridden to prominent position, racing one out one back to straight. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Trailed the field throughout and never seen with a chance.
Travelled behind midfield most of way to straight. Made up late ground under pressure inside final 200 M.
In similar position throughout. Ran home one-paced.

Well enough to begin, came across from a wide alley to take a spot outside leader, raced 1 to 2Ls back and did share of work with even tempo, still there on turning but couldn't sprint and capitulated from 150 M.

Unbalanced early and ended up at tail, raced 2-wide 8Ls of frontrunners, helped by fast tempo, well back passing 600 M, still last on turning in, kept on evenly making some late ground passing tired a few horses.

Fast away, showed plenty to cross them from an outside alley, took up running and kept speed even throughout, rolled along from 600 M and pinched a 3Ls break, had rest chasing and held on well despite tiring a little late.
Jumped fairly, pressed on but trapped 3-wide in midfield without cover, had a hard run 4 to 5Ls back with speed on, clearly struggling on bend and weakened right out of straight.

No pace from outset and taken back from awkward draw, posted 3-wide 6Ls back without cover, did share of work with pace on, still well back on bend, made good ground last 200 M down middle to make frame.

Ordinary jump, ridden along but received a bad check passing post on first occasion, raced 7 to 8Ls back at rear, helped by tempo but gave too much start at 600 M, rallied hard and made plenty of ground last 200 M without clearest run.

Began with rest, faded back as expected to race behind midfield, raced 7Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by slow tempo, but niggled from mid-point, lacked usual finishing burst and just plugged in straight.
Reasonable break, urged along to hold a midfield berth, raced 5Ls away in midfield running line, niggled along from 600 M, didn't have a turn of foot and just plugged steadily in straight.

Began with rest, lacked early pace and checked soon after start, raced behind midfield 7Ls back on rails, helped by tempo but set a big task on bend, made even progress once clear of traffic turning but held up again last 100 M.

Out with line, took up prominent spot camped behind speed, had run of race 3Ls back in 2-wide line, tracked well at Rock but leader got away, stuck to task well steadily closing in straight without looking likely.

Even jump, ridden along to hold a midfield position on rails, had a good trip 4Ls back suited by good pace, not asked in mid-section, pushed along to make ground on bend, made progress in straight to snatch 3rd.

Showed customary speed to hold a spot behind leader, raced 1 to 2Ls back throughout, chased solid speed from mid-point and under pressure on turn, gradually passed by others last 150 M when labouring late.

Fastest into stride, pressed on and challenged for front, led field 2 wide but unable to cross, worked throughout and held a narrow advantage turning in, couldn't dash again turning in and gradually lost touch in straight.
Even break, pushed forward and took a spot behind pace 3Ls back 2 to 3 wide, raced keenly on bend, still green in straight, made little impression and run ended at 200 M.
Awkwardly away, settled behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back on fence, had a quiet trip to bend, in behind horses but switched out at 300 M and made some late ground without threatening.

Began well but lost spot when crowded, raced near to last 7Ls back on rails, still well back on turning in, had an impossible job to do but rallied well in straight making up many lengths to be nearest on line.
