Out well, had enough pace to hold rails near to lead, shaded throughout but pushed through to keep them out to turn, levelled up on turning in, soon under pressure and faded out of it late.
Ordinary getaway, pressed on to race 3 wide challenging for front, had a tough run on circle, 1/2L down turning, challenged again at 400 M and fought on strongly getting the better of all but winner.
Away well, took up a prominent spot 1 out 1 back, had an even trip on speed, close enough on turning in, began to struggle at 400 M and dropped out tamely from 300 M.
Tardy to begin, raced detached at tail 12Ls or more back, gradually lost touch on circle, beaten a long way.

Slowly into stride, regathered to hold a midfield position on rails only 3 to 4Ls back, settled well and had run of race to turn, made steady ground between horses and picked up nicely last 200 M to overhaul them with ease.

Out with rest, eased out of early speed battle, raced behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back in running line, eased wide on turn, came to middle and progressed well last 300 M to make frame. Definite improvement to come.
Reasonable break, didn't have pace to cross, raced 3 wide in midfield 3Ls back with cover, came 4 wide on circle to be 1L down turning, hit front at 250 M but run came to an end at 100 M.
Slowly away but managed soon after to join the leader 1 off. Started to weaken approaching the 200 M.
Missed the kick and settled behind midfield. Struggled in the run home.
Raced near the rear, always wide, never a factor.
Couldn't match the early speed, settled behind midfield, the fence. Made good ground in the straight.
Ridden along hard early and landed on the back of the speed, 3 wide with cover, stayed on dourly.
Raced 3 wide without cover, outside the leaders, hit the front early in the straight to win in good fashion.
Raced 1 out 1 back, closed off satisfactorily.
Settled with the backmakers, never likely.
Slow to begin, then pressured to take up a position behind the leader on the fence. Commenced to give ground after the 400 M.
Positioned midfield, 1 off, battled away over the final furlong.
Always in last position.
Found the lead early from an inside gate and kept on soundly in the run to the post.
Taken across to rear from wide draw, travelling 3 wide 7Ls off lead, still 6Ls off straightening up, quickened well final 300 M to score readily.
Ridden from widest gate to be midfield, 6 wide first turn, 3 wide 3 to 4Ls off pace back straight, dropped back a bit at 600 M, no real acceleration in home straight.
Ridden to secure midfield position on fence, 3 to 4Ls off pace, steadied 350 M out, responded well when into clear and took many lengths off winner final 150 M.
Hard ridden early to contest lead, hugging rail from 1100 M, all out after 350 M and looked likely for a moment until headed inside final 150 M and tiring late.
3 wide around midfield 4 or 5Ls off pace, 5 wide slightly closer turning in, kept on at same pace in home straight.
Disputing lead on rails going into first bend, box-seated from 1200 M, kept on very much one-paced in home straight, tired close home.
Tardy start, at rear on fence 8 or 9Ls off lead, still 7Ls off turning in, ran on well through field final 300 M to just miss a minor placing.
Pushed hard from wide gate to contest lead 5 wide early, 2 wide with 1/2L advantage 1100 M out, run ended straightening up and dropped out tamely.
Slow to jump, niggled to be behind midfield on rails 5Ls off lead, under pressure 700 M out, found nothing entering straight and dropped right out.
2 wide behind midfield, 5Ls off pace, dropped towards rear 800 M out when off bit, 2nd last straightening up, only ran past well beaten runners. (Jockey reported "never comfortable".)
Up there 2 wide going into first bend, 2Ls off 1200 M out, checked at 900 M and lost a length, under pressure from 500 M, tired final 200 M.
Wide into first bend towards rear, 4 wide 6Ls off along back straight, widest entering home straight, only plodded on.
Niggled to dispute lead early, then just behind leader 2 or 3 wide 1200 M out, kept on one-paced before tiring inside final 200 M.
Over-raced a little towards rear about 6Ls behind leader down the backstretch, not much closer entering stretch, plugged on down centre of track at the same pace. (Mucus.)
Crossed to lead on fence at 900 M but always hung out, shifted out into PEARL OF INDIA four times in final 300 M when disputing lead, finished 2nd but placed 3rd after inquiry and objection.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at the 800 M, same margin back and off the bit at the home turn, plugged on past a few tired rivals.
Always on the pace, out 2-wide a neck back in 2nd at 1200 M, tended to over-race, about 2Ls back in 3rd taking home turn, faded out steadily. (Blood in trachea.)
Never any better than midfield, 3-wide with cover about 6Ls behind pace at 1000 M, 5Ls down and under pressure in 9th off final bend, made no impression.
3Ls back on fence in 6th at 1000 M, edged closer in 4th about 2Ls behind swinging for home, stayed on well along fence to lead inside final 30 M.
Slow start, worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, 4Ls off pace making home turn, stayed on at the one gallop and didn't really threaten to place.
Nice position between 2Ls and 3Ls off speed in 4th or 5th until the final turn, still with place hopes at the 200 M but weakened late on. (Mucus.)
3-wide with cover about 3Ls back in 5th until the 1000 M, left with cover from the 800 M and under pressure when still 3Ls back off final turn, soon gave ground.
Always in front rank, 1L down in 2nd off final bend, bumped 4 times by MULTI KING inside final 300 M when disputing lead, finished 3rd but placed 2nd after inquiry and objection.
Poor effort, struggled to muster early speed, 6Ls down in 12th at the 1000 M, lost ground on circle and became detached in rear making home turn, dropped out.
Slowest away and soon 8Ls last, about 6Ls down in 12th off final turn, never dangerous.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 7th at 1000 M and in a similar position on straightening, finished off at the one pace.
Eased back from wide gate, on fence 7Ls back in 9th at the 900 M, ridden along when 6Ls down off home bend, stuck on dourly to finish 4th, nearest at finish.
Switched inside from wide barrier and shared last place about 6Ls off speed early, worse off turning for home, always well behind.
Trapped very wide early on, got in 3-wide with cover about 3Ls back in midfield at the 800 M, lost ground from the 600 M and faded out from top of stretch.
4Ls back in 10th when 900 M out in a tightly packed field, same margin back in midfield at final bend, finished only fairly and couldn't reach the frame.
5Ls back in rear at 1000 M, tried to improve on the circle but toiling long before the home turn and soon left for dead.
Slowest away, 4-back on rails about 5Ls back in rear bunch, midfield about 4Ls behind making home turn, stayed there.
Good effort despite being 3-wide no cover throughout, always prominent about 1L off pace in 3rd until the 600 M, hung on well for 3rd in straight.
Handy position 2-wide about 2Ls back in 5th at the 900 M, 4-wide turning for home when still 2Ls back, held his ground but only at the one-pace.
3-back the fence about 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, held up for a run from 400 M to 200 M, failed to cut back the margin once clear. (See Racing Incidents.)
Very disappointing finish having had a nice position 1L off pace in 2nd until the 600 M, under pressure on straightening and found zero off the bridle.
Shared last place about 6Ls off pace at the 1000 M, same margin back in 10th turning for home, made only very minor ground.
Led by half a length at 1000 M, crossed to lead on fence soon after and 1L to the good off final turn, soon kicked clear and always in command.
Always close up on fence in 3rd or 4th and within 2Ls of the pace until straightening for home, had little chance with the winner but chased best of the rest.
Never any better than midfield, 5Ls back around 11th at 1000 M, struggling in same position on straightening for home, very tame finish.
Eased to sit just worse than midfield along the fence, 5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, dashed strongly 300 M to finish a remarkable 2nd.
Hard ridden early but lacked speed, trapped 3 wide throughout about midfield, covered too much ground on bends and not suited by the slow pace, faded quickly 400 M.
Never competitive, tailed out.
Hard ridden to cross the rail in front, then eased to sit 3.5Ls off the slow pace, ran on until 200 M, weakened.
Not suited by the slow pace, never competitive and tailed out.
Hard ridden to occupy a forward position 2 wide, took rail at 1400 M and led by 1.5Ls at slow early sectionals, hung on until 300 M overhauled, ran on OK.
Eased back, 2 wide throughout, not suited by the slow pace, never competitive.
Pushed early but lacked speed to take a prominent spot, 4Ls off the leader 2 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, blocked 400 M, ran on well to the line for 3rd.
2.5Ls off the leader, trapped 3 wide throughout and lost ground at bends, favoured by the slow pace, however did not close the race off strongly as in its previous runs, weakened 250 M.

Eased back to sit worse than midfield, unbalanced early, 5Ls off the leader, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground on bends, not suited by the slow pace, showed a little dash 400 M but run ended 200 M.
Eased to get across at the rear, 6.5Ls behind the leader, 3 to 4 wide at home bend, harmed by the slow pace, little dash in straight.
Slow away, checked early, dropped to rear, 8Ls off the leader 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, no progress in final stages.
Crossed the rail in front easily despite the wide draw, settled back 1.5Ls in box seat, helped by the slow pace and the rail run, led 300 M and drifted away the field, kept on strongly to win.
Eased back for cover early, trapped 3 wide, moved up to sit outside the pace group, 1.5Ls off the slow pace 2 wide, dropped off rapidly 400 M, tailed out.
Settled in rear. Produced very late impression closing stages.
Reluctant to stride out after jump. Trailed the field throughout. Never seen with a chance.
Raced wide in midfield. Running home one-paced when steadied 200 M out.
Raced wide behind midfield. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Brief lead early, settling one back in 3rd on rails. Came to challenge about 300 M out. Responded well to take charge just inside 200 M.
Raced outside leader around home bend. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to peg back winner early in straight. Folded up quickly final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled mainly one out one back in 4th. Fought on steadily down straight without quickening.
Settled 2-wide in midfield. Came to challenge passing 250 M. Only produced moderate progress without threatening winner.
Always struggling in last few and never seen with a chance.
Jumped fairly. Soon took up running and led until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Travelled not too far off in 5th just better than mid-division. Badly baulked for a run in straight until 200 M. Produced moderate late headway closing stages.
Sluggish at start. Soon picked up to midfield on rails. Shuffled back to rear of midfield home bend. Did not find much room in straight but produced good late impression.
Out nicely, raced prominently and part of pace battle early, worked for first part before dropping to leaders back on circle, there to 250 M, lost touch when hard run took effect at 200 M.
Even jump, lacked pace and assumed expected spot in midfield, raced 6Ls back on rails with a soft run to bend, angled 2 wide on circle, came to centre and made some minor headway in straight.
Tardy to jump, took up spot behind midfield 8Ls back 2 wide, suited by speed on in front, niggled along on bend, only managed a one paced effort beating tired horses. (Bled.)

Jumped nicely, settled in nicely to 1 by 1 spot 3 to 4Ls off speed, tracked nicely to bend, angled out under urging at 400 M, didn't let down as expected in conditions, just plugged steadily last furlong.
Began with rest, raced 6Ls back 3 wide without cover, worked through mid section, switched 4 wide on turning, couldn't muster and struggled last 300 M.

Moderate jump, showed usual speed to kick up and take up running, overraced and kept them going at a solid speed, raced 2Ls clear on bend, defied rivals with ease dashing sharply in straight to score comfortably.
Away in line, allowed to drift back from a wide gate, raced 3 wide with cover 8Ls back towards rear, still well back on turning, made ground evenly without threatening to be closest at finish.
Left rider in gates.
Standard break, regathered to slot in behind pace group on rails 3 to 4Ls back, enjoyed a soft trip to bend, briefly looked a place chance at 250 M, kept on evenly to just miss 3rd.
Poor break, raced in rearward division 8Ls back on rails, didn't use much in middle stages, saved ground on turning, progressed nicely before hitting traffic last 100 M, nearest on line.

Ordinary to begin, settled towards tail 2 wide 10Ls from lead, tracked group throughout and suited by tempo, had job to do turning, free of traffic at 350 M and closed race off with purpose making many lengths last 200 M.
First to leave stalls, raced 3 wide outside pace group without cover, did plenty of work challenging at a strong tempo, 2 wide on circle, couldn't dash again at 300 M and run ended last 100 M.
Ordinary jump, posted 4 wide in midfield when tried to take closer order, 7Ls back on circle, did it tough and was feeling effects on turning in, made no impression in run to line.
Even break, assumed a midfield position 2 wide 5 to 6Ls back, helped by tempo but clearly not relishing conditions on bend, found little from 400 M and dropped out tamely in straight.
Broke well, gradually settling in 3rd some 4Ls back. Came to challenge upon straightening moving up gradually but had too much to do.
Jumped very awkwardly losing considerable ground. Remained in rear throughout.
Began well from widest draw. Ridden along for slender lead before kicking clear and crossing to rails approaching home bend. Still maintained a 3L break after straightening. Won easy.
Midfield throughout. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon ridden to join rear of midfield. Closer up turning in. Fought on steadily down straight but lost 3rd late.
Settled behind midfield. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Close up on rails to straight. Dropped out tamely. (Blood in trachea.)
Ridden along far side but failed to get to the lead. 3-wide in prominent position rounding home bend before dropped out into straight.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Produced moderate late headway closing stages.
Raced wide in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Kept on steadily under pressure to finish.
Lacked pace and detached from main group. Still last turning in but ran past a few beaten runners.
Wide throughout. Prominent far side. Dropped out from halfway.
Reasonable beginning, couldn't slot in and posted 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back with cover, did share of work with speed on, tracked 4 wide on straightening, only plugged away last 300 M.
Began with rest, held a midfield position 2 wide 4Ls back, followed pace nicely on bend, 3Ls down between horses on straightening, into clear at 300 M and closed steadily for minor placing.
Fast into stride, led early but ended up 3Ls back on fence, close to a fast pace throughout, angled 2 wide at 600 M, niggled on turning and dropped out tamely from 300 M.
Out with rest, took up a midfield spot, raced 2 wide 5Ls back, shuffled back between horses on bend, held up on turning, but picked up nicely last 200 M to make some late progress. Even debut.

Amongst first few out but outpaced shortly after, raced 3 wide with cover 4Ls back, still in midfield tracking nicely on bend, switched to middle and finished off steadily (despite hanging) to make frame.

Poor to begin and lost considerable ground, mustered and circled field to eventually take up running, kept pace on 1/2L clear on turning, workload took toll at 300 M and tired badly dropping well back.

Away with first few, pressed on to take early lead before electing for trail on leaders back, had good run thereafter, angled 2 wide and took over turning in, dashed 2Ls clear and kept on strongly for a solid win.
Only moderate speed early, raced in midfield 4Ls back on rails, had a soft trip throughout, 2Ls down on bend and tracked eventual runner into clear, fought on doggedly but couldn't run down winner.

Poor getaway, raced at rear 12Ls back, failed to muster and urged along when becoming detached. Still gave a big start entering straight, switched wide and made good ground in straight from impossible spot.
Standard jump, drifted back to rear 10Ls off pace, raced 2 wide and aided by pace on at top end, still well back turning, switched widest in straight and made good progress from an impossible spot.
Average jump, positioned behind midfield on rails 6Ls from leaders, relaxed well and had an easy time throughout, kept to rails and only got clear at 300 M, closed evenly without threatening.
Amongst those fast away, pressed on in search of prominent spot, raced 2 to 3 wide 2Ls back, did it tough without cover to bend, run ended at 300 M and stopped quickly thereafter. (Bled.)
No pace early as usual, raced 7Ls back in 2 wide line, helped by solid tempo, had field to beat on turning and saved ground on bend, made good headway between horses to be nearest on line.
Settled in 11th or so about 5Ls off pace at 1200 M when 2-wide, improved to be 3Ls back in midfield off home turn, picked up well to lead about 20 M out but foiled on the line.
Big effort despite very wide trip without cover, always prominent but between 6 and 4-wide no cover down the back, stayed on gamely in the stretch but no more to give final 50 M.
Worse than midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace at the 1200 M and similar turning for home, strong run inside final 200 M and only just missed quinella.
On fence 1L back in 2nd at the 1000 M and identical position turning for home, all out to hold this spot at 200 M, finished off one-paced.
Raced 3-back on fence in 9th or 10th about 4Ls or 5Ls from the front through to home turn, found nothing under pressure.
Midfield about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until the 600 M but trapped mostly 4 and 5-wide without cover, struggling when making final bend and dropped out rapidly.
No early dash and 6Ls back in 12th at 1200 M, a little worse off on straightening when 5-wide (widest of all), battled on at the one pace and never nearer.
Narrow lead out 2-wide at 1400 M, about a neck clear and always 2-wide until home turn, 1L clear at 200 M, tired late and swamped inside final 30 M.
One from rear 6Ls off pace at 1200 M, raced wide but had cover, still well back entering the straight, never troubled principals.
7Ls back in last after just 200 M, still 6Ls last turning for home, ran on very strongly out wide despite slow tempo to lead on the line, great late kick.
Awkward break, midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M and soon ridden along to lie up, struggling in same position off final bend, very one-paced and weakened final 200 M.
Nicely placed on the rail in 5th or 6th between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace until straightening, had every chance to at least place but outpaced final 50 M.
Prominent early position about 1L off pace in 3rd or 4th, under very strong pressure to maintain this proximity at the 600 M and folded shortly after straightening.
Awkward break, darted in from wide gate to take up 2-wide position about 3Ls back in mid-division from 1000 M to home turn, emptied out very quickly and eased down final 200 M.
Always well behind. Found nothing in the run home.
Ridden early. Disputed lead. Did not find much under pressure inside final 200 M and just missed a placing.
Broke well from rail draw. Held narrow lead and only drew clear under pressure inside final 100 M.
With leaders early. Gradually dropped back to race in one-out-one-back position up Rock. Similar turning in but fought on steadily without quickening. (Tendon injury.)
Travelled on back in 3rd on rails. Did not find much room behind runners in straight until over 100 M out. Snatched 2nd late.
Settled in midfield. One-paced early in straight before making some moderate impression closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on well to finish.
Broke well from poor draw, settling 2-back in 5th mainly one off the rail. Switched in for rails run upon straightening but could not find much room 200 M out. Fought on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped fairly. Soon dropped to rear.
Raced in rear of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Raced 1 out 1 back, given every chance but failed to run on.
From an inside draw, managed to sit closer than usual a length back outside the leader, never went on with it at the business end.
Equal tailender, gave ground over the concluding stages.
Raced 3 back along the fence, kept on one-paced in the straight.
Settled back in the field, 1 off with cover, shifted out and went forward after the 600 M but its run came to an end inside the 100 M.
Dictated terms after rolling forward from the 1700 M. Galloped along at a moderate tempo and was able to snatch victory.
Made reasonable late ground after settling in 3rd last position along the fence.
Raced at the tail of the field, struggled in the run home.
Led early then settled in second position, enjoyed the run of the race. Closed evenly.
Box-seated behind the leader. Struggled to keep pace 700 M out and weakened at the home turn.
2-wide behind the leaders early and middle stages. 4Ls behind the pace in 3rd place making home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight and was checked 50 M out to avoid a weakening runner.
Settled on fence at midfield. Continued well on straightening and made a strong charge 200 M out to gun down rival near the line.
Raced 3-wide and without cover after 1200 M. Lacked a response when pressured 600 M out and found nothing in the home straight.
Soon raced in a rearward position. Only ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
Missed the jump and raced behind midfield. Checked at 600 M, made up some late ground and was closest at finish.
Settled towards the rear. Staged a strong rally in the straight and made up good ground.
2-wide disputed lead 1200 M onwards. Got a break from the field with co-leader making home turn. Wore down co-leader final 100 M to take the lead. Just failed to hold off a late charging rival.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Ridden along and made up ground rounding the home turn. Continued well in the straight and was closest at finish.
Soon led. Joined by a rival 1200 M out and gradually opened up a break from the field. Continued to be in front final 200 M but tired and faded last 100 M.
Checked after 1400 M and saddle shifted forward. Trailed field thereafter and was mostly detached from the field.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Kept on steadily in the home straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Always travelling well 3-back on the fence about 3Ls or 4Ls in 5th or 6th through to home turn, picked up nicely to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Caught 3-wide no cover early on before tracking leader by 1L out 2-wide from 1000 M to final bend, finished one paced but still did enough to place.
Soon led on fence by 1L but always hanging out, over 1L clear at top of home turn, hung out further in the stretch, headed 100 M out and lost a place final strides.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence through to final bend, never likely to grab the winner but stayed on along fence to take 2nd close home.
On fence but over-raced early on, 6Ls back in 9th at the 1100 M and about 5Ls back turning into stretch, moderate late headway.
Slowly away, soon 9Ls last, one from rear and 7Ls off the front taking home turn, made only minor late ground along the inner.
Slow start, in 5th out 2-wide about 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, under pressure to hold this position on the circle, finished off at the one pace and never really threatened.
Slow to start, switched in from wide gate to race 2-wide and 7Ls off speed in 10th at the 1100 M, 6Ls down on straightening, plugged on home at the one pace.
Caught 4-wide without cover in midfield early on, eased back to rear with cover about 7Ls off pace from 1000 M to home bend, never troubled leaders.
Always under pressure, left 3-wide without cover in 8th when 6Ls off speed at 1100 M, gained cover from the 600 M and 5Ls back taking final bend, never dangerous.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 7th at the 1100 M, pressed on out 3-wide no cover from the 700 M and forced 5-wide (widest of all) in midfield turning for home, emptied out.
Handy position in 2nd out 2-wide and 1L off pace at the 1200 M, struggling to maintain this proximity 500 M out and beaten at top of home straight. (Blood in trachea.)
3-wide without cover at the 1000 M in around 4th place, mostly trapped wide but still only 3Ls back in 4th making final turn, fizzled out.
Well placed on the fence between 2Ls and 3Ls off pace from 3rd to 5th until home turn, briefly off the bridle at the 600 M, stayed on well in the straight to lead 50 M out, driven clear.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace in early stages, 5Ls down in 5th swinging for home, had every chance to place but tired final strides and caught on the line.
Shuffled back to 5Ls off pace in 8th about 900 M out, no better off taking the home turn, found nothing off the bridle.
Caught 5-wide without cover early on around midfield, about 5Ls back when 3-wide with cover on the circle, struggling entering straight and soon well beaten. (Lame following day.)
Best away and disputed the pace out 2-wide with KINGSTON MARBLE until straightening for the line, soon tired and leaden-footed inside final 100 M.
Handy position with cover in 3rd about 3Ls off pace early on, losing ground and hung in at the 600 M, 5Ls down off final bend but very tame in the finish.
One from rear about 6Ls off pace on fence at the 800 M, still well back when short of room on straightening, ran on past tired rivals to nick a remote 3rd on the line.
Always wide on the track and at least 8Ls last until home turn, never a factor.
Towards rear about 5Ls off pace out 3-wide early on, about 7Ls off pace and 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, never a likely candidate.
Checked at 1000 M back to 6Ls off pace in 10th, worse off on straightening and never in the hunt.
Always right on the pace on the fence, pestered for the lead by TERRAFERMA from 800 M to home turn, 1L clear 200 M out but ground down by the winner 50 M out, long way clear of 3rd home.

Awkwardly away, ridden vigorously in first half to get across, trapped 6-wide 1st bend, shared lead 2-wide at good until 600 M when took rail and solo lead, soon pressured by another front runner 500 M, overhauled 300 M.
Pushed to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, dropped back to box seat 600 M, proved hard to settle, flattened in straight.
Very awkwardly away, never competitive at back.
Hard ridden early but lacked speed, trapped 4-wide in midfield throughout and lost too much ground, dropped off 500 M.
Slow away, midfield with cover 2-wide, 5Ls behind the good pace, made ground 200 M.
Hard ridden early to occupy the box seat, pushed back 600 M, 2Ls off the good pace, never threatened the winner but ran on well to the line for 2nd without threats from the rest of the field.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 5Ls off the good pace along the fence, checked 600 M, no turn of foot in straight.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 2 to 3-wide and lost ground at bends, no progress in final stages.
Hard ridden early but failed to get across in front of the field, trapped 3-wide in midfield throughout, further back than usual 5Ls off the good pace, covered too much ground at bend, faded 200 M.
Slowly away, 3-wide at home bend, never competitive at the rear.
Pushed to keep up with the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, just held ground in straight to run a minor 3rd.
Hard ridden to hold a prominent spot, 1-1/2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, pressured the leader early from 500 M, kicked away 250 M to win with ease.
Broke well, disputing lead outside leader. Gained slender advantage rounding home bend, running 1L clear early in straight before tiring and overhauled 200 m out. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Broke well and ridden for pace, settling mainly 2Ls off the lead on rails to straight. Could only plug on at the one pace under pressure.
Ridden for early pace, racing 3-wide with leaders early. Gradually dropped to one back but still 3-wide turning into back straight. Folded up quickly after 400 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Trailed the field to 200 M. Ran past well beaten runners closing stages.
Travelled on rails in rear of midfield. Ridden leaving Rock before losing position and hampered rounding home bend. No further impression. (Mucus.)
Lacked early pace and settled in last few. Made up some late ground inside final 200 M past beaten horses.
Niggled at early. Never far off. Hit front under pressure over 100 M out only to be collared close to home.
Always struggling at the back.
Held narrow lead to 400 M then gradually weakened.
Raced 3-wide in forward of midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and ran on to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Raced mainly in rear of midfield. Switched off heels of runner for a run after straightening, running on steadily alongside winner throughout final 200 M to just fail to peg him back.
Raced 3-wide in rear of midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily under pressure inside final 200 M to lead close to home.

Out with rest, drifted back to race in rearward division, enjoyed an easy trip but harmed by the moderate tempo, gave a sizeable start turning, got through horses at 250 M and did best work late to make frame.

Fast away, showed plenty of dash to lead them, rolled along early before backing off tempo nicely in mid-section, controlled race to bend, 1L clear turning and never challenged when ridden out for a strong win.

Amongst first few to break, ridden up to hold leaders back, had run of race when pace slackened in the middle stages, tracked well on bend, angled out on turning but couldn't match winner, kept finding to get closest late.

Even getaway, no early speed and assumed usual role at rear, raced 7 to 8Ls back on rails, not suited by slow pace in mid-section, still well back to bend, kept to rails and did best work late along inside to take 3rd.
Fair jump, unable to position in running line and posted 3-wide without cover throughout, gradually improved to be 3Ls down at Rock, under pressure shortly after and faded quickly after a hard run.
Broke well, took up closer order outside leader, did some early work but relaxed well when speed backed off, spent little to bend, 1L down on turning in, no run on last 200 M closing at one pace.

Broke nicely, pressed on from a wide alley, assumed coveted 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls behind pace, had a soft trip with dawdling speed, 5th turning and eased out but lacked usual sprint and simply laboured last 200 M.
Began better than usual, ended up in midfield spot 3 to 4Ls back on fence, relaxed well and used little to bend, 3Ls back in 4th turning in, kept to rails and plugged steadily at same pace to line.
Badly away, raced at rear 10 or more lengths from lead, didn't look comfortable throughout and urged along to hold spot, well back on bend and found nothing in straight to be beaten a long way.

Away with line, no early dash and faded back towards tail, raced 2-wide 6 to 7Ls from lead, not aided by slow sectionals, still well back on turning, came to middle and passed a few under hands and heels riding.

Began fairly, couldn't slot in early and ended up worse than midfield 6Ls back in 2-wide line, harmed by lack of pace, still had job to do on bend, found little and weakened out (didn't handle conditions).

Tardy to begin, urged along and regathered to hold midfield spot in 2-wide running line, didn't look comfortable and not helped by tempo and still 4 to 5Ls back on bend, didn't close as per usual and battled late. (Blood in trachea.)
Out with rest, raced on outside rail 5Ls off leaders, gradually lost touch from midpoint, only battled from 400 M to be well beaten.

Amongst first to break, took a forward role early before racing 1 to 2Ls back behind leader, didn't look 100% comfortable in going and niggled from 400 M, lacked a finish and just kept on at same pace to line.
No speed from outset, raced at rear and drifted to centre of track, still 5Ls back at midpoint, passed only some struggling runners and never likely.
No early dash, ended up towards rear 5 to 6Ls back, raced in centre of course but steadily became further behind, lacked finishing burst of last time and did little over concluding stages.
Even getaway, had pace and raced prominently, shared front before racing 1L off lead towards outside rail, knuckled down to task at 250 M, asserted authority at 150 M to score with something in hand.

Broke evenly, ridden along to take closer order from an inside alley, raced 2Ls back towards middle of course, urged along from midpoint, hung throughout but stuck to task well at business end holding ground to line.
Fast into stride, led them comfortably, controlled affairs at an even clip, held a 1L advantage at 400 M, right there at 200 M but condition gave out and weakened late. Solid debut.

Began in line, took a sit behind pace group hard against outside rail, raced 1 to 2Ls back throughout, gained split at 400 M, gradually improved but found winner too good last furlong. Better for further.
Standard jump, assumed a midfield role 3 to 4Ls back behind pace group, niggled along when lost touch at midpoint, kept on evenly thereafter holding same margin in run to line.
Slowly into stride, settled back in last few 7 to 8Ls back, raced greenly and niggled along to improve from 600 M, showed nothing and plodded to line.
Ridden hard early to land on the back of the speed, 2 wide with cover, carried wider turning for home, not likely from that point.
Weakened inside the final furlong after setting the pace.
Positioned as usual at the tail of the field, took inside runs in the straight, ran on soundly.
Raced behind the leading division, 3 wide with cover, kept on one paced in the run to the line.
Never competitive after travelling, 5 wide without cover, midfield.
Raced 1 off with cover, midfield, never likely.
Began awkwardly and settled midfield the fence. Shifted out turning for home and closed off satisfactorily.
Parked behind the leader along the fence, peeled out on straightening and drew away for a solid win.
Positioned outside the leader and commenced to give ground approaching the 400 M.
Positioned 4 wide, without cover, midfield, struggled over the latter stages.
Raced three wide outside the two leaders, no cover, struggled under pressure.
Settled at the rear and compounded in the straight.
Raced towards the rear early and middle stages. Made up some late ground from well back.
Crowded after the start and raced towards the rear. Lacked a response when asked midway through the race and only ran past a weakening runner.
Settled in a rearward position. Unable to pick up when asked final 300 M and remained on same pace to the line.
Raced around midfield early stages. Drifted back in the middle stages and ran on without quickening over the final stages.
Raced behind midfield. Lacked the needed response and stayed on same pace over the final stages.
Never more than a length off the leader. Failed to keep pace 400 M out and faded thereafter.
Kept within 2Ls of the pace. Checked at 200 M whilst making a run. Continued well thereafter and salvaged a minor placing.
Jumped well and led. Weakened noticeably after the halfway mark. Lame after race.
Off slowly and lacked speed. Detached most of the way and tailed out.
Never far off the pace. A length off the eventual winner at 200 M. Kept on well but only managed to pull to within a neck at the line.
Kept pace with leaders and disputed lead from 500 M to 300 M. Unable to find extra to remain in contention final 200 M.
Niggled along early stage to be near midfield. Kept on fairly over the final stages to make the frame. Nice debut.
Checked on jumping and raced towards the rear early stages. Niggled along and improved to be closer to midfield. Failed to quicken under the whip at 400 M and gradually faded.
Led or disputed lead. Opened up a clear advantage at 200 M and kept on gamely final stages to deny challenger.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1200 M and similarly placed taking home turn, very one-paced in the closing stages.
Held a nice position out 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, niggled along to maintain this proximity from 1000 M to home turn, very weak inside final 200 M.
Had the run of the race on fence in 3rd about 2Ls behind leader until home bend, given every chance to run the quinella only too lack the required turn of foot.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace on fence at the 1200 M, niggled along thereafter and 5Ls down in rear turning for home, made some minor late ground.
Led by a neck at the 1400 M, maintained a similar margin on fence from 1200 M to about 500 M out, headed at top of home straight and faded out.
Caught 3-wide no cover before getting in 2-wide in 8th about 5Ls off speed at the 1200 M, same margin back but 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, ran on well, nearest at the line.
7Ls last out 2-wide at the 1200 M, about 5Ls down and one from rear turning for home, ran on well out wider for 2nd to be closest at the finish.
Disputed very early lead out 3-wide no cover, parked 2-wide about a neck off pace until leading at top of home straight, 1L clear at the 200 M, stayed on dourly to score.
Switched inside from wide gate to be 3-back on fence 4Ls down in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls down off home turn, always held.
5Ls behind in 8th when 4-back on the fence at the 1200 M, closer but a little short of room taking final turn, stayed on fairly along the fence, never nearer.
prominent early on, led by 1L on fence at the 900 M and a neck to the good entering straight, headed about 200 M out and quickly folded.
Very poor performance, slowly away, always a long way detached in rear, to trial.
Awkward break, midfield racing 3-back on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed through to the 600 M, closer on straightening and with every hope of at least a place, tired final 100 M.
7Ls off pace in 11th out 2-wide at the 1200 M, niggled along on the circle to take closer order entering straight, finished off strongly to hit lead about 50 M out, kept on.
Ridden along to dispute early lead on fence, soon handed up the lead at 1000 M and adopted 'box seat' position 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd or 4th until home turn, weakened sharply final 200 M.

Over-raced early on in a prominent role, left 3-wide no cover from the 800 M when 3Ls off pace in 5th, made headway to be 1L down in 3rd at home bend, still there at 200 M but wilted markedly final 200 M.
Never on terms, 10Ls off pace in 12th at the 1000 M, still well behind off final turn, never landed a blow.
Nicely placed around midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off lead with cover until the 600 M, 2Ls back when 3-wide off final bend, every chance when a neck down at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Prominent but caught 5-wide without cover early on, got in 2-wide and 1L off pace at the 800 M, a neck down 2nd at home turn, all out at the 200 M and faded late.

About 7Ls from the front in 10th on fence at the 1000 M, 4Ls down on straightening but never had very much room on heels of those in front through closing stages, may have finished closer. Not properly tested.
Handy position early on, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at the 800 M, struggling to lie up turning for home and weakened out, eased down late.
5Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure 600 M out and 3Ls down when 5-wide (widest of all) off final bend, responded well to lead 200 M out but headed by winner final 50 M.
Didn't break well and soon a long way behind, 12Ls behind at the 1000 M, never a factor.
4-back on fence 5Ls off pace in 8th at the 1000 M, edged closer 3Ls behind in mid-division at home turn, vying for the lead at 200 M, no extra final 100 M but did enough to place.
Slow away, hard ridden to hold the rail about midfield, 3.5Ls behind the good pace, no dash, flattened 200 M.
Raced midfield, 4Ls behind the good pace 2 wide, progressed steadily 300 M until 100 M, no threat to winner.
Eased to sit just behind the leaders, 2Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 wide, closed the race off nicely until 200 M when run ended.
Settled in box seat, travelled nicely throughout, closed the race off strongly to finish 2nd. Just missed by a narrow margin.
Very slow away, crossed the rail towards the rear, 6.5Ls off the good pace, made ground gradually in straight. Steadied 200 M.
Pushed forward to share the lead at good pace 2 wide, ran on until 200 M, flattened.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 2Ls off the good pace 2 wide, weakened steadily 300 M, checked badly 200 M. (Mucopus.)
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3 wide, lacked turn of foot in straight, ran on fairly. (Mucopus "Roarer".)
Eased back for cover, 6.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, blocked 4-2, progressed steadily when clear to finish a close 3rd.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the good pace, trapped 3 wide throughout about midfield 3.5Ls behind the leaders, hung in and just held ground in straight.
Slow away, trapped 3 wide at back, 6.5Ls off the good pace, no progress in final stages.
Crossed the rail easily and shared the lead at a good pace, made all to hang on for victory.

Ridden to muster speed early travelling just 2 back on rails within 1-1/2Ls of speed. Lost position slightly 1000 M out. Remained effort turning in and ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield ealry. Raced keenly and pulled to race in prominent position before home bend. Still one out one back in 3rd turning in but soon dropped out.
Soon dropped to last few and raced wide. Never seen with a chance.
Settled at the back. Commenced move turning in and had to switch in for a run early in straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield early. Soon shuffled back towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Began fairly from poor draw. Held slender lead outside 2nd. Crossed to rails over 1100 M out and held lead to 300 M when overhauled.
Midfield. Badly jostled between runners early in straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Close up. Tracked leader one back on rails around home bend. Gained narrow advantage passing 300 M only to be overhauled about 100 M out.
Settled behind midfield. Obtained clear run over 350 M out and quickened well to take charge 100 M out.
Never far off in 4th racing 3-wide. Had bumpings and leanings early in straight. Made no impression in the run home.
Raced wide in midfield. Lost position coming out of back straight. Tightened between runners when towards rear upon straightening. Never recovered.
Travelled towards rear. Badly baulked for a run early in straight. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.
Sluggish at start. Trailed the field before joining back markers rounding home bend. Did not find much room early in straight before finishing race off nicely inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Made no show in straight.
Out fairly raced 3Ls off speed in middle of course, switched out from 500 M, closed race off evenly closest to inside to take a placing late.
First to hit ground, shared lead 1L clear of rest, 2nd from midpoint, urged along at 400 M, didn't respond and dropped out tamely when run ended at 250 M.
Moderate break, soon at tail, raced detached and struggled throughout, never in it and was well beaten.
Reasonable break, raced 2 to 3Ls back towards outside rail, not travelling at 400 M, couldn't muster an effort when asked and struggled in run to line.
Ordinary break, raced in midfield 2 to 3Ls back towards outside, gradually improved to be in 3rd at 300 M, couldn't dash again last furlong and just held ground thereafter.
Jumped well, raced prominently sharing lead in centre of course, urged along to go with leader at midpoint, still 2nd at 300 M but run ended and faded last 100 M.
Fair to begin, not as prominent as usual, raced back until last few 4 to 5Ls back, niggled along at midpoint, made some even progress last 300 M but never really threatened.

Away nicely, raced 2Ls from lead back against outside rail, not travelling well when unbalanced at midpoint, lacked usual finish and just battled last 300 M. (Didn't stride out and mucopus in trachea.)
Average jump, raced 2 to 3Ls back behind pace in middle of course, held up in traffic passing 350 M, into clear last 200 M and made good late ground but couldn't wear down margin.
Began with line, raced 1 to 2Ls back just behind pace, in amongst horses throughout, lost spot at 500 M when couldn't go pace, unable to find at business end and just battled away last 300 M.

Slow into stride, raced at rear 4 to 5Ls back close to outside, behind traffic for best part, weaved between horses and only clear from 200 M, finished best of beaten brigade making good late ground. (Bled 2nd time.)
Began nicely, raced close to front 1L back well off outside, held together at 400 M, threatened for a place at 300 M but didn't let down and struggled in run to line.
Away with rest, gradually improved from inside draw, hit lead at 600 M and worked across to outside, slipped away with a 3Ls break at 300 M, held rivals comfortably to score in good style.
Began fairly, raced close to speed 1L back towards outside rail, slipped back at 400 M, gradually weakened out when condition took effect.
Settled towards rear. Quickened well inside final 300 M to just get up in the bobbing of heads.
Midfield to straight. Looked quickening over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Dropped out tamely.
Raced in last few on rails. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on quite well inside final 200 M to go down by the narrowest of margins.
Led field to 250 M. Dropped out.
Travelled just better than midfield. Faded out of contention passing 300 M.
Midfield to straight. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced wide just behind midfield. Ran on under pressure inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Travelled one back in 4th to straight. Quickened well to hit front over 200 M out, however, unable to sustain effort and swamped shortly afterwards.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Disputed 3rd into straight and held every chance inside final 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Trailed the field to straight. Did not find much room early on. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Always well there. Held every chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Well back. Kept on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Standard jump, raced 2 wide 5Ls back in midfield, not harmed by tempo, still back between horses on circle, found little in straight just plugging away at same speed to line.
Promising jump but drifted back to midfield posted 4 wide throughout 5Ls back, came 5 wide on turning in, hard run took toll shortly after and gradually dropped out to be well beaten.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, settled behind midfield 6Ls back on rails, had a soft run throughout and saved ground on bend, not far back on turning but run ended at 200 M and faded thereafter.

Away in line, pushed on to take close order, couldn't cross and posted 3 wide 3Ls back with cover, made bend awkwardly 2Ls down in 5th, came again in straight doing best work late for a respectable 5th.
Fast into stride, took up running comfortably and rolled along at an even clip, held a 1L advantage leaving circle, kicked nicely into straight, overhauled at 300 M but stuck on gamely for a place.
Moderate jump, ended up in rearward division 7Ls from speed, bumped rail at 800 M, still well back on fence on turning, made some progress along fence to 200 M before run ended.
Amongst first to begin, took up a spot outside leader, raced 1L back at an even speed, drew level upon straightening, briefly threatened but run ended over concluding stages. Better effort.

Taken back from outside alley, raced at tail 5Ls back much further away than usual, last throughout and tracked 3 wide on circle, switched to middle on straightening and made plenty of late ground from an impossible spot.

Stumbled out but regathered and kicked through to race behind the leader, had run of race with even speed, only 1 to 2Ls down on turning, held up to 250 M, dashed smartly when clear to socre with something in hand.

Out well, ridden along to take closer order, raced prominently 2Ls back 2 to 3 wide, slotted in on circle, same margin back in 4th turning in, eased out but lacked usual close and produced a one paced effort last 200 M.
Out with rest, restrained from a wide alley, made best of shortcut to race 4Ls back on rails, tracked eventual winner on bend, gained split at 300 M and closed nicely but unable to track down winner.
Ordinary to begin, drove through to take a closer position, posted 3 wide 5 to 6Ls back in midfield with cover, switched 4 wide on bend, under pressure on turning and only battled in straight.

Began nicely, didn't have pace to cross and dragged back to settle near rear, raced 2 to 3 wide 7Ls back, still well back behind horses leaving bend, switched to middle and made many lengths to be nearest on line.
Away with rest, raced in a handy position 3 to 4Ls back in 5th in 2 wide line, had a fair run to bend, niggled along on turning, gave ground weakly in run to line.
Checked at the 1200 M and 4Ls back in midfield when 2-wide at the 1000 M, left 3-wide without cover on the circle and 4-wide off final turn, beaten 200 M out. (Lame morning after.)
Led out wide at 1200 M and a neck clear on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls in front off home turn and 1L to the good at the 200 M, swamped inside final 50 M.
Settled about 9Ls off pace mostly in 13th down the back straight, 6Ls back in 11th at home turn, disappointed for running at 300 M and clear at 200 M, finished strongly, never nearer.
3Ls off pace in 5th when 2-wide at 1000 M and looking dangerous in a similar position at final bend, finished off strongly but found JOY AND FUN a bit too good.
Settled 4-back on fence about 7Ls off pace in 9th when 900 M out, 6Ls down in midfield making home turn, never any better than midfield.
Caught 4-wide no cover throughout, about 6Ls back in 10th or so at the 1000 M, worse off on straightening and weakened further.
Eased back to race 10Ls off the lead in rear at the 1000 M, not much better off on straightening, never loomed a danger.
Crowded at start but soon slipped into the box-seat position 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th until home turn, 1L down in 2nd and with every chance at 200 M, kept on at same pace.
Restrained 8Ls off pace in 12th with cover at the 1000 M, 4-wide off final turn and with about 6Ls to make up, failed to mount a serious threat from down the centre of the track.
Caught 4-wide without cover early on but pressed on to track leader a neck down in 2nd out 2-wide at the 1000 M, under pressure to lie up in 3rd when 2Ls down off final bend, fizzled out.
Lost some ground at the start, worse than midfield about 6Ls off the speed at halfway, 4-wide on straightening when 4Ls back in midfield, never troubled the principals.
3-back on the rails about 4Ls behind pace in 6th at halfway and same turning for home, always held by those ahead.

Checked badly at the 1200 M and checked again at 900 M, 6Ls back in midfield with cover at halfway, a little closer turning for home, accelerated well despite hanging in to lead final 50 M, scored readily.
Never worse than 4th or about 2Ls off pace until turning into home straight, given every chance only to find the quinella pair a touch too strong, solid effort nonetheless.

Away well, pressed on but didn't have enough pace to cross, posted 3 wide 2Ls back without cover for best part, did it tough to bend, switched to middle but lacked a turn of foot and just battled at same pace to line.

Out with rest, held a prominent spot behind leader, had run of race with steady tempo, tracked nicely on bend, eased out on turning, took over at 250 M and held on strongly to defy rivals. Much improved effort.
Began with first few, up challenging for front and pressured leader early, couldn't keep on and took 1 x 1 trail at midpoint, under urging on leaving bend, gradually weakened in straight.
Shade tardy to begin, regathered to hold a spot behind speed 2 wide 2Ls back, lost ground at 700 M, 3Ls down on turning, switched out but lacked finish of previous start, closed steadily for 3rd.
Awkwardly away, failed to muster, raced at rear 5Ls back early but lost touch in mid-section, made plenty of ground to be 4Ls back turning, kept on to 200 M before run ended. Better effort.
Moderate break, soon outpaced and raced 10Ls back near rear, niggled along at 600 M, found nothing in run to line. Hardly sighted.
Awkwardly out, ended up in behind main bunch 3Ls back racing 2 wide, travelled well on circle and tracked 3 wide 4Ls back on turning, gradually improved in straight to be nearest on line.
Out with first few, pushed on to tackle leader, applied pressure throughout shading inside horse, did share of work despite steady tempo, couldn't find at 400 M and dropped out tamely thereafter.

Fastest out, took up running easily but pressured throughout by outside horse, kept rails and managed a moderate tempo, under a hold turning and fought hard but couldn't dash with winner, came again for 2nd.

Was ridden along after beginning awkwardly and overraced in the early stages when positioned back in the field along the fence. Closed off well despite having difficulty obtaining clear running after the 200 M.
Positioned 3 wide with cover, midfield never threatened.
Settled in last position, came wide in the straight, ran on strongly.
Began awkwardly and was crowded near the 1000 M. Settled midfield the fence and experienced some difficulty obtaining clear running inside the 200 M when closing off fairly.
Was taken back at the start and raced in second last position. Came wide in the straight, made little impression. Suffered to the right front tendon.
Tracked the leader along the fence, weakened after the 300 M.
Camped outside the leaders, struggled over the final 300 M.
Raced on the back of the speed, 3 wide with cover. Peeled out turning for home, responded to strong riding to clinch victory close to home.
Missed the start and ridden along to land behind the pace, 1 off with cover. Fought to the line strongly.
Raced wide and without cover throughout, whilst in the leading division. Struggled over the final furlong.
Took up leading position after being slowly away but faded after the 400 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced 1 off, midfield, disappointed when placed under pressure in the run home. (Pulled up lame following day.)
Raced close to the leaders, 2 to 3 wide. Had every chance.
Resuming from a long break and ridden in a rearward position. Never a factor.
Ridden along and took the lead at 1000 M. Held advantage before being swamped inside final 400 M.
Raced at midfield. Hung out and was wide making the turn. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Off slowly. Outpaced and trailed field until straightening. Launched a late rally and made many lengths from well back to be closest at finish.
3-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the early part of the straight. Made a strong closing run final 200 M and was nearest at finish.
Always behind midfield. Remained on same pace after straightening and weakened final stages.
Niggled along to a forward position. Tracked leader in a 2-wide position from 900 M onwards. Fought for the lead early part of the straight but faded out of contention over final 100 M.
Settled behind midfield. Switched wide turning for home and made up some ground in the straight.
Best out and took a sit behind leader after 1000 M. Kept on fairly in the straight and held on for a minor placing.
2-wide and better than midfield. 2Ls off the pace making the turn. Took the lead near 200 M and continued well over the final stages to hold off challenger.
Raced in midfield. Hung out and raced wide without cover around the turn. Kept on same pace after straightening and tired in the closing stages.
Taken back from a wide draw and raced in rear section. Trailed field before making a late run over the final 200 M.
On the rails and better than midfield. Quickened after straightening, made up ground on eventual winner over the closing stages but winning post came too soon.
Settled in rear section. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and advanced to midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Steadied near 1000 M and raced at midfield. Ran on without quickening in the straight.
Always well there out 2-wide about a neck off pace in 2nd until home turn, had his chance to win but held by quinella pair inside final 200 M.
Restrained in rear about 6Ls off pace, checked slightly at 800 M, still well back turning for home, very one-paced and left well behind final 200 M.
Crowded at start, box-seat position on fence between 1L and 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, vying for 3rd when denied an inside run 150 M out, possibly unlucky not to place.
Slowest away, settled 4Ls off speed in 5th early on and still towards rear off home turn, always outpaced by principals.
Disputed early lead on fence, set steady pace, about a neck clear at the home turn, stuck on gamely for pressure to scrape in by a tight margin.
Away well and raced 2-wide about 2Ls off pace early on, began to over-race and posted 3-wide no cover 700 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd turning for home, one-paced final stages.
5Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at the 800 M, 3Ls down turning for home in 5th when set alight, ran on strongly and only just failed to overhaul the winner.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off speed in 6th at the 1000 M, wanted to hang in on the circle, had his chance to place but his run died final 150 M.
Slowest away, 8Ls last early on, very wide and still well back taking home bend, never went past one horse.
One from rear on fence about 7Ls off pace at the 1000 M, with about 5Ls to make up entering straight, ran on well late to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, 3-wide no cover throughout, worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace before pressing on out wide from the 800 M to lead 300 M out, just hung on final 50 M.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, similarly placed swinging for home, had his chance to place but always hanging in one-paced under pressure.
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd or 4th until home turn, didn't find much off the bit and no excuses.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, headway on the circle to be 5-wide on straightening about 3Ls back in mid-division, ran on strongly late but post came a few strides too soon.
4-back on fence in 9th about 5Ls off pace at the 900 M, about 4Ls and 3-wide taking final bend, strong run inside final 50 M to nick 3rd on the line.
1L back in 3rd out 2-wide at the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 4th soon afterwards, still bang there when 3-wide off home bend but fizzled out final 200 M.
Disputed early pace out wide, got in 2-wide and a neck 2nd at the 800 M, still right there at top of home straight and at 200 M, kept on dourly but lost 3rd on the line.
Ridden along to dispute an even early pace, half a length clear on the circle but headed by winner 300 M out, well beaten when steadied inside final 100 M.
Handy position early, slipped back to 8th about 5Ls back out 2-wide at 900 M, 3Ls back in midfield turning for home, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, no extra late.

Eased back, 6Ls off the leaders in main bunch, trapped 4 to 5 wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in final stages but ran on OK to the line despite the negative situations.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2 wide in main bunch, benefitted by the slow pace, ran on well until 200 M when on heels, weakened thereafter.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders along the fence in main bunch, not suited by the slow tempo, held ground until 200 M, flattened.

Eased at start to cross to the rail behind the field, 6Ls off the leaders along the fence in main bunch, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 400 M and once had threats, however run ended 100 M. (Dropped whip 150 M.)
Settled 1.5Ls off pace in main bunch, 2 wide, helped by the slow early sectionals, but soon weakened 300 M.
Eased to rear and raced along the fence, 8Ls behind leaders in main bunch, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, no progress when clear.
Slowly away, hard ridden to hold the rail and shared the lead at slow sectionals in main bunch, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Bumped start, eased to sit 5Ls off the leaders in main bunch, 3 to 4 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well 400 M, led briefly 250 M, just beaten by a narrow margin on the post.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 6Ls off the leaders in main bunch, 3 to 4 wide, not suited by the slow tempo, showed some dash in straight and made considerable ground.
Eased to sit about midfield 2 wide, 4Ls off the leaders in main bunch, pushed back 800 M and lost ground, not suited by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly 250 M to finish 3rd.
Pushed early to keep up with the field towards the rear, 8Ls behind the leaders in main bunch, 2 wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, closed the race off nicely when clear.
Settled 1.5Ls off the leaders along the rail in main bunch, favoured by the slow pace, ran on strongly to the line and won by a narrow margin.
Eased to sit about midfield 2 wide, 2.5Ls off the leaders in main bunch, not suited by the slow pace, weakened in straight.
Showed pace and raced more than 3Ls ahead of the main bunch, led at good pace along the rail, hung on until 250 M, flattened.
Began fairly. Waited with. Made up good ground down centre of straight without threatening.
Not far off and wide to straight. Soon came under pressure after straightening and found nothing.
Slightly slow out. Soon recovered to race on rails in midfield or just worse than midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight but only produced moderate impression closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Responded well down centre of straight to take charge close to home. Readily.
Midfield early. Soon began to race keenly and hung out badly making home bend. Never recovered.
Slightly slow out. Soon improved to take up winning 300 M after start. Joined around home bend and gradually weakened out of contention after straightening.
Settled wide in midfield after beginning from poor draw. Quickened well to hit front inside 200 M only to be outsprinted close to home.
Settled on rails in midfield. Similar turning in but soon dropped out.
Settled just behind pace. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front momentarily over 200 M out. Soon overhauled. (Epiglottic entrapment.)
Broke well, niggling along to hold place. Travelled 2-wide just a neck off the leader before disputing straightening. However, soon folded up quickly.
Raced wide in last few. Never seen with a chance.
Settled in last few. Badly baulked for a run in straight until after 200 M. Kept on well to finish.
Slow into stride but quickly recovered to prominent position. Shared pace three-wide rounding home bend. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 300 M.
Jumped well, settling 2-wide in mid-division. Found no clear running early in straight until 200 M. Produced only moderate impression late.
Standard jump, outpaced by first few but took a trail 4Ls off hot speed on rails, had a fair run in 3rd to bend, urged along and briefly threatened at 300 M but was one paced thereafter.
Tardy to begin and lost considerable ground, raced at rear 10 to 12Ls back, helped by fast tempo, still well back with field to beat on bend, made minor progress in straight.

Broke nicely and showed usual speed, couldn't cross as expected and raced 2Ls off pace at a solid speed, always working to chase to bend, led briefly at 300 M but run ended soon after and weakened right out.

Average jump up, raced at tail 12Ls off pace, suited by fast tempo but set a big task taking off 3 wide at 600 M, widest bend and closed well down outside but didn't find last 200 M (note jockey explanation).

First to hit ground, showed plenty of pace to hold out noted speedster, set very fast pace in front, kept 2 to 3Ls clear leaving bend, stopped quickly at 300 M and dropped right out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well enough away, took a sit in midfield, raced 7Ls back in 2 wide line, tracked well on bend, made a strong run with 2nd horse but just peaked on run at 100 M. Better effort.
Began with them but showed no early dash, settled behind midfield 8Ls down, suited by tempo, still back with last few turning, made steady ground before flattened out at 200 M and didn't run on late.
Little speed from gates, raced behind midfield 6Ls back, improved to be 5th 4Ls back on turning, couldn't dash with them when sprint went on at 400 M and just plugged steadily in run to line.

Amongst first few out, took a trail behind pace pair, raced 2 wide in 4th 5 to 6Ls off tearaway leader, same distance back on turning, knuckled down to task and hit front at 200 M, went on with it to score in good fashion.

Average jump, lacked early pace and ended up in rearward division 10Ls back, suited by pace still gave a big start away on bend, came to middle in straight and closed off nicely making many lengths from an impossible spot.
Began well and travelled one-out-one-back most of way to straight. Soon dropped out.
Settled in midfield on rails. Did not find much room early in straight before making good late progress inside final 200 M.
Raced freely when taken back to race in rear early. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in forward of midfield. Could only keep on steadily at the same pace without quickening under pressure in straight.
Soon took up running and led to straight. Swamped under pressure inside final 200 M.
Well back. Made significant progress down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
In lst few. Kept on steadily along rails in straight. Never nearer.
Chased leaders. Came to challenge under pressure 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield or just worse. Towards rear turning in. Improving when hampered passing 200 M. Kept on well to finish.
Niggled at wide in forward of midfield. In similar position in 5th turning in. Kept on before fading passing 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in mid-division. Shaken up upon straightening. Quickened well under pressure to take charge over 100 M out. Convincingly.
Broke well from widest draw, settling in 2-out-one-back position before improving to race outside leader home bend. Hit the front passing 400 M but unable to sustain effort and overhauled 100 M out.
Tardy to begin, regathered to drive through and sit just behind pace, had ideal trip 3 to 4Ls off speed on rails, lacked pick up when asked on turning, faded out last furlong.
Bounced out nicely, assumed prominent spot behind leader, right there on an even tempo throughout, niggled along on turning, gave in easily on straightening and dropped right out.

Slowly into stride, urged along to take closer order 8Ls back in midfield, had a fair trip 2 wide helped by even tempo, back in 9th easing 3 wide on turning, ascended quickly down centre to hit lead at 200 M and score easily.

Out with rest, assumed a midfield role, raced 6Ls back in midfield 2 wide line, travelled well throughout, crept closer on bend, didn't let down with usual dash and just finished at same speed last 300 M.
No pace from outset, raced towards rear, saddle shifted early on, always rearward thereafter, beaten a long way.

Little speed from outset, positioned in back half 8Ls back on rails, not set a task in middle stages and still well back on bend, switched out on turning and made good progress last 200 M to fill place.
Ordinary beginning, mustered to hold a position in front of midfield, raced 4Ls back in 2 wide line, had ideal run, just off speed, niggled on turning, lacked usual dash and struggled in run to line.

Fastest away, rolled on showing customary speed to lead, kept proceedings going at an even clip, 1L clear on bend, kicked hard and pinched a break on turning but had no answers when collared at 200 M.

Well enough to break, pressed on but unable to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls back, did share of work with pace on, niggled on bend, hung on to 200 M but faded late when workload took toll.

Even jump, slotted in on rails in midfield, had a quiet run 6Ls off pace, not asked throughout, made run between horses into straight, closed steadily doing best work late but unable to peg back winner. Honest effort again.
Fast away, didn't have early pace to match them but steadily worked up outside leader, raced 1L back on circle, under pressure to level up at 400 M but couldn't find extra gear. Same speed to line.

No pace from outset, drifted back to tail, raced more than a dozen lengths off lead, assisted by even tempo, did little in middle stages, saved ground on bend, angled out and did best work late to be nearest on line.

Ordinary getaway, restrained back to rear from a wide alley, raced 12Ls or more from lead in running line, aided by tempo, eased 3 wide at 600 M, in impossible spot turning but made plenty of ground in straight to make frame.
Little speed from jump and assumed usual role near to rear, raced on rails before racing 2 wide at 800 M, switched wide turning but didn't close as normally would and made minimal progress to line.
Mostly midfield with cover between 3Ls and 4Ls off pace until home turn, kept on fairly without posing a serious threat in the straight.
Good performance despite tough trip, prominent but caught wide early, pressed on 4-wide no cover to lead at top of stretch, headed about 250 M out, lost a place in closing stages.
Had the box-seat position about 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th from 800 M to home bend, very one-paced thereafter.
Got a fair way behind, 6Ls down in 10th with 600 M to race, 4-wide off final turn when 5Ls back in midfield, quickened up very well to lead inside final 50 M, value for greater margin.
No early pace and held rails position in midfield about 4Ls off speed until home turn, failed to quicken up with the principals.
Always towards rear on the fence, about 5Ls off pace when tight for room at the 800 M, same position on straightening, always well held.
Always well behind in rear and covering plenty of ground down backstretch, 5-wide without cover at 900 M when 6Ls back in 13th, no closer turning for home, finished strongly out wide for a place.
Better than midfield about 2Ls off pace down the backstretch, left 3-wide without cover at the 600 M, petered out once straightened for home.
Awkward break and raced ungenerously with head up down the back while racing about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, always remained a similar distance from the pace.
Always prominent but always wanted to hang in, 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at the 800 M, 1L back in 3rd off home turn, weakened inside final 200 M.
Hard ridden to lead on fence from widest gate at the 900 M by 1L, headed at top of home straight but rallied to lead again 250 M out, collared by classy winner final 50 M, solid effort.
Unacceptable performance, raced freely without cover down the back straight, 5Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, slipped back to last entering homestretch and soon eased down.
Handy position with cover about 2Ls off pace early, fired up at the 800 M but still 2Ls off pace in 4th taking final bend, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, no extra final 100 M.
Got well back, 9Ls last at the 900 M mark, 6Ls down in 12th turning for home, never likely to improve better than mid-division.
Midfield early, improving to 2-back in 3rd on rails coming out of back straight. Fought on steadily to hold some chance but soon outsprinted inside final 200 M.
In last few to straight. Only ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Ridden to master pace early, settling 3-wide in midfield. Gave ground from home bend.
Not far off to straight. Faded under pressure.
Jumped best gradually crossing to rails before Rock and attempted to make all. Swamped when found no extra near finish.
Ridden along early, settling one-back on rails. Still chasing leader turning for home but had not much to give.
Settled in mid-division. Came to challenge upon straightening and responded well to take charge over 100 M out.
Began well but soon taken to rear. Trailed field into straight to run past well beaten horses closing stages.
Began fairly but soon steadied to rear. Recovered to rear of field approaching Rock. Made steady headway along rails in straight. Did best work at finish.
Close up early. Raced freely and lost position approaching Rock. Dropped out from midfield into straight.
Travelled just worse than midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Never better than rear of midfield. Kept on steadily to finish.
Raced at the leaders headquarters, was a beaten horse turning for home.
Settled 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Raced midfield along the fence, came with dashing sprint over the last 200 M. Received interference close to the line and was awarded the race. (See Racing Incidents.)
Positioned behind midfield, 1 off with cover after being slow to begin. Not fully clear turning but made reasonable late ground last 200 M.
Faded inside the 200 M after setting the tempo.
Positioned 1 off with cover in midfield, shifted wide turning for home, battled away.
Parked behind the leader along the fence. Sprinted clear after the 300 M, looked like the winner but shifted out close to the line, losing race on protest. (See Racing Incidents.)
From a wide barrier was taken back and settled near the near on the fence. Never threatened.
Took up last position, failed to run on. (Lame right fore leg morning after.)
Was eased down out of the race after the 1200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced outside the leaders, wide and without cover. Weakened inside the 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-deep with cover in midfield, stayed on well in the straight after peeling wide on the final circle.
Among leaders early stages. Gradually slipped back in the back straight and was 3-wide at midfield making home turn. Unable to quicken and weakened final stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled towards the rear and was near last turning for home. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at the line.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Made up ground in the home straight by passing beaten runners.
Lacked early speed and slipped towards the rear. Near last on straightening and failed to quicken.
Settled 3-wide at midfield or behind. Wide turning for home and only kept on one-paced in the straight.
Niggled along and did some work to lead on entering back straight. Held a length's advantage on straightening but faded out of contention inside final 200 M.
Missed the jump. Travelled along the rails behind midfield. Rallied in the straight for a minor placing.
Among leaders early stages. Better than midfield and kept within 3Ls of the pace back straight. Remained on same pace in the home straight.
Settled in midfield. Made a ground saving trip around home turn and made a nice run through traffic in the home straight for an impressive debut.
Quickest out and led briefly. 2-wide and remained within a length of the pace back straight. Weakened after straightening.
Settled in a prominent position behind the leader. Quickened after straightening and took the lead final 150 M. Kept on well to hold off late challenger.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the home straight.
Soon led on fence by 1L and held this margin before being headed 300 M out, faded into midfield.
Always in rear bunch, 7Ls down at 1000 M and no better off entering home straight, no threat.
Raced outside leader 1L off pace until turning for home, assumed the lead 300 M out and driven well clear.
Never any better than midfield, with cover 5Ls back in 8th at 1200 M and closest when 6th about 4Ls off pace on straightening, weakened.
Raced 3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th or 6th from the 1200 M to home turn, checked when disappointed for a run 250 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away and failed to muster early speed, 6Ls down in 9th at the 1000 M, 5Ls down in 8th at home turn, very one-paced in the finish.
Slow away, had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th until home turn, given every hope to fill the quinella but lacked the turn of foot.
3-wide but with cover when 5Ls back in 7th at 1200 M, struggling to lie up taking home turn, weakened.
Unacceptable performance, 2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M when 3-wide without cover, still deep and toiling a little further back off final bend, emptied right out.
Caught 4-wide without cover early on, slipped back to 7Ls in rear at 1000 M, further back making final bend, never a factor.
3Ls back in 5th when 2-wide at 1200 M, ridden along to be 4th turning for home, stayed on okay to take 2nd inside final 100 M.
Held up at least 10Ls last at 1000 M, minor headway when 6Ls down in 10th off final bend, ran on well late to grab 2nd on the wire.
Failed to muster any early pace and 7Ls back in 10th on fence at 1000 M, 5Ls back in midfield off final bend, stayed on strongly to lead inside final 50 M.
3-back the fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, struggling to hold this position from the 600 M, dropped out tamely in the straight.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M and 6Ls back in 9th or so taking home turn, ran on okay, nearest at the finish.
Unacceptable performance, 3-wide with cover about 3Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, lost this position from the 600 M, very week.
Had a nice run on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd, appeared to be going well turning for home, found very little off the bridle and petered out final 200 M.
Didn't break well, 3Ls back in 6th at 1000 M, same margin back in 3rd off final bend, very one-paced thereafter.
5Ls off pace on fence in 9th at the 1000 M, same margin behind when ridden along on straightening, finished off fairly, never nearer.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, lost this position rapidly on the circle, very weak late.
Led on fence by 1L 1300 M out, only headed inside final 50 M and missed 2nd on the line.
Worse than midfield with cover about 5Ls off early pace, held up entering homestretch when 7Ls back in rear, no impression.
Unacceptable performance, 2Ls off pace in 3rd at the 1000 M, weakening and widest (5-wide off final bend), dropped right out.
Eased back and crossed towards the rail, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast pace and the rail-run, made ground 200 M without really threatening.
Eased back to get across the rail, more than 10Ls behind the leader, benefited by the fast pace and the rail-run, ran on ok in straight.
Pressured early, led by 3-1/2Ls at fast early sectionals along the fence, hung on until 200 M when overhauled, kept running on well to the line and finished a remarkable 3rd.
