At back, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, but never progressed.
Settled in front of midfield, travelled nicely along the fence, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to win.
Hard ridden early to get across in front of the field, took rail and then eased to sit 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M, led 200 M, overhauled 50 M, ran on for 2nd.
Eased to rear, more than 11Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace but no turn of foot in final stages.
Midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, helped by the fast pace, made ground 250 M.
Pushed to sit 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, just held ground in straight.
Jumped well but eased back, raced very keenly throughout, 8-1/2Ls off the fast pace 2-wide, no progress in straight.
Eased to rear, raced 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground at bend, never competitive.
Hard ridden early but lacked speed and trapped 3-wide in midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast pace crossed to 2-wide at home bend, soon weakened 400 M.
Niggled at in first few early, dropping to 5th about 2-1/2Ls off the pace going up Rock. Similar turning in but fought on steadily to reach a placing late.
Ridden for speed early, showing the pace. Dropped to one-back in 3rd on rails passing 600 M. Baulked for a run upon straightening and dropped out tamely inside 200 M.
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Dropped out from home bend.
Began fairly from wide draw travelling wide in prominent position. Shuffled back to mid-division before home bend. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Behind midfield most of way to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Began only fairly. Quickly moved up to dispute lead. Fought on gamely in straight despite racing tightly throughout. Just denied.
Settled at the back. Last into straight. Only kept on past beaten horses.
Broke well from widest draw, settling 3-wide in close-up position in 4th. Gained 1L 3rd upon straightening but unable to quicken under pressure to lose 3rd late.
Never better than midfield. Kept on at the one pace to the line.
Jumped early. Quickly ridden to gain narrow advantage approaching Rock. Still holding slender lead turning in and maintained same throughout despite shifting grounds.
Raced in rear of midfield on rails to straight. Ran home steadily without threatening.

Jumped well, took a prominent spot 2Ls back in running line, had great run mid-race with slow speed on, switched 3-wide on circle, briefly threatened turning but didn't go on with it and tired last 150 M.
Out with rear, faded to race in midfield on rails 4Ls off pace, spent nothing in mid-section, saved ground on bend, kept to inside and made good late progress to make frame.
Began nicely, went on to take a position outside lead, rolled on to take front at 1200 M, set a steady tempo in front, held a narrow lead turning, couldn't dash again and wilted after early work.
Out with field, went on to take closer order working 3-wide before racing at leaders girth, had a fair trip thereafter with dawdling tempo, under pressure on turning, dropped out tamely.

No speed from jump, raced in rearward few on rails 7Ls off pace, not asked in mid-section, still had field to beat on bend, took inside run and closed off nicely (without clearest passage) to be nearest on line.

Even getaway, elected not to go back and posted 3-wide in midfield, left without cover from 1000 M, did share of work to bend, improved to be 3rd 1L back turning, stopped quickly at 150 M when run ended.

Checked early and settled at tail, raced 7-8Ls back 2-wide line, not helped by steady tempo in front, still well back passing Rock, tracked 3-wide turning, widest in straight and made outstanding progress to pass all but winner.

Ordinary break, settled towards tail as usual, raced 5Ls back in 2-wide line, had an even trip but not aided by tempo, tracked 3-wide turning, swept 4-wide into straight making run with winner, just tired last 50 M.
Moderate jump, raced behind midfield in 2-wide line, 7Ls off leader and not helped by tempo in mid-section, switched wide approaching turn, made steady progress in straight without threatening.
Fast into stride, showed customary initiative to lead them, took a trail when pressured at 1200 M, had a soft run thereafter, close enough on straightening but had no answer last 200 M.

Began with rest, slotted in nicely to a midfield position, raced 2-wide 3 to 4Ls back, had reasonable run with steady tempo, hampered at 500 M, tracked 4-wide on turning, came with a strong run to lead at 150 M and win comfortably.

Well enough to begin, had some dash to hold a spot behind leader, had run of race with moderate tempo, eased 2-wide at Rock, held up turning but run opened in straight yet produced only a one-paced finish.

Moderate break, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run with even pace on, 2Ls back in the turning, came between runners and inconvenienced at 200 M when improving. Kept on well to make frame.

Fair to begin, went forward to take a prominent role, raced 3 wide outside leaders 1 to 2Ls back, worked hard without cover to bend, 1L down turning, run ended at 200 M and only held ground thereafter.

Out with rest but soon taken back to rail, improved to be 5Ls back on fence behind midfield, saved ground on bend, had every chance in straight but lacked an extra gear, made some late ground at same speed.
Began well, showed early pace to lead, kept pace honest with pressure by eventual winner, 1/2L clear on circle, kicked to 300 M but folded tamely thereafter losing plenty of ground late.
Broke with first few, held a prominent spot on leaders back, had run of race in mid-section, still 1L down on turning, angled out at 300 M, closed off well to narrowly take 2nd.
Even jump but faded back to race behind midfield, 5Ls back in 2 wide line throughout, niggled along on circle, made some minor progress between horses in straight but never really threatened.

Fastest out, couldn't take up running and took a trail 1 out 1 back, had a fair trip to bend before steadied at 600 M, close enough 2Ls down turning, struggled when sprint went on in straight, gradually dropping out.
Standard jump, lacked early pace and drifted back to be 8Ls back on rails, saved ground on fence in mid-division, always well back turning, one paced in finish but did hit trouble at 100 M.

Away fairly, pressed on but posted 3 wide in midfield and became unbalanced 4 to 5Ls back, had trail but forced to cover extra ground to bend, flat out to pick up turning, just produced a one paced effort last 300 M.
Began with rest, pushed on from a wide alley to race 4 wide outside midfield, always working 2 to 3Ls back, had cover on bend, came to middle on straightening and did best work late for a placing.
Began with rest, raced 3 wide behind midfield 6 to 7Ls back, had cover but did share of work to bend, gradually weakened over the concluding stages.
Slow into stride, ended up at tail 10Ls from speed, chased along and raced greenly on circle, offered nothing in run to line.

Away nicely, pressed on to race outside leader, raced on bridle with even tempo, 1/2L down on circle, moved up to challenge at 400 M, took over passing 250 M, urged along under hands and heels to score with something in hand.
Restrained from a wide gate, ended up 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back near to last, had trail and improved wide on bend, widest in straight and made a little ground under hands and heels riding.
Settled midfield, 3 wide with cover, ran to the line soundly.
Positioned at the tail of the field and didn't pass another runner.
Ridden along from an inside alley and enjoyed the run of the race in the box seat. Peeled out passing the 400 M after being held up and lengthened nicely to score well.
Despite being ridden along early, failed to muster speed and settled 3 wide with cover midfield. Didn't respond to rider's efforts in the straight and was disappointing.
Led, 1 off, no cover, gave in quickly passing the 400 M.
Raced in a rearward position, 3 wide with cover, struggled in the straight.
Raced close to the leaders, but was wide and without cover for the majority of the trip.
Led in the early stages along the fence, then was shadowed by another runner, to sit 3/4 of a length to the inside. Just held on for 2nd.
Raced midfield the fence, kept on one paced in the run home.
Slow to begin and took up rearward spot. Never a factor.
Raced 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Closed off well after settling in last position.
Positioned along the fence, on the back of the speed weakened inside the 200 M.
Settled behind midfield, 1 off with cover, worked home without threatening.
Taken to the back from a wide draw and trailed field until straightening. Quickened well and made up good ground in the straight despite running into traffic at 200 M.
Jumped well but was allowed to drop back to a rearward position. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Rallied strongly in the straight and was closest at finish.
Failed to find early speed and raced 3-wide at midfield. Hung wide turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 2Ls of the leader making home turn. Quickened near 300 M and took control final 100 M.
2-wide behind midfield. Kept on fairly after straightening but lost all momentum after checking at 300 M.
Hard ridden to take the lead. Held a slim advantage on straightening but soon weakened.
Raced along the fence behind midfield. Switched out making the turn at 600 M. Rallied home for 2nd place.
Jumped fairly and was allowed to slide back to behind midfield. Widest turning for home and trailed field at 400 M. Made up some late ground.
Ridden along to be in a forward spot. 3-wide behind the leaders making the turn. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch in the final stages.
Missed the jump but soon recovered to midfield. Made a ground saving trip along the rails making the turn. Showed a brief dash at 200 M but unable to sustain effort over the final stages.
No more than a length off the pace. Travelled alongside the leader making home turn and opened up a clear advantage at 400 M. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back. Raced along the rails in rear section. Stuck in traffic for the final 200 M and was not tested.
On fence and better than midfield early stages. Improved to a prominent spot behind the pace making the turn. Unable to quicken and stayed on same pace in the straight.
Gradually moved into a forward position but was 3-wide without cover. Weakened after straightening.
Posted 4-wide without cover about 4Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, 2Ls behind in mid-division taking home turn and 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, one-paced close home.
Settled around 9th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until the 600 M, trying to challenge when tight for room at 300 M and 200 M, held inside final closing stages.

Towards rear with cover about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4Ls back and still with several blocking his path off home turn, clear 250 M out and briefly loomed a quinella chance, run died inside final 100 M.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide and eventually led by 1L at 900 M, headed at top of home straight and swamped at the 200 M.
Towards rear 4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed until the final turn, blocked for a run until switching into the clear at 200 M, stayed on strongly late to lead final 2 strides.
Disputed early pace, handed up the advantage to sit 1L down in 3rd or 4th from 900 M until home turn, led about 100 M out and looked the winner before being collared final strides.
Slowly away, under pressure at halfway when 7Ls last, still detached turning for home, plodded on past a few tired ones late.
Slowest away and about 6Ls adrift in 12th or so, a little closer turning for home but never threatened to improve much better than midfield.
Within 3Ls of the pace better than midfield before being left 3-wide no cover from 800 M, 1L down in 3rd off final bend, led 200 M out but headed again at 100 M, held on for a place.
No excuses having had a nice position with cover in midfield about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until home turn, found nothing off the bit and soon well beaten.
Caught 5-wide no cover throughout, about 6Ls back in 10th at the 1000 M, widest of all turning for home when 4Ls down in 10th, entitled to weaken right out but stuck to task quite well.
Mostly 3-back on fence about 3Ls off speed in midfield until home turn, stayed on at the same pace along the inner without threatening.
Raced in 2nd about 1L off pace out 2-wide at the 800 M, kept on to lead at top of home turn but headed again about 200 M out, faded thereafter.
Never better than midfield, about 4Ls off pace at the 800 M and 3Ls off pace at home turn, very weak inside final 200 M.
Rider lost iron exiting gates and recovered it after 200 M, 2.5Ls back in 6th at the 1000 M with cover, still in a nice position on straightening and 1L down at 200 M, faded late.
About 8Ls off pace and one from rear early on, wide off final turn when 6Ls off pace, ran on strongly late down the centre of track and only barely missed out.
Over-raced early when 3-back on fence position, about 3Ls off pace in mid-division until home turn, 1L down in 4th at the 200 M and faded close home.
Decent effort having raced 3-wide without cover throughout, always prominent about 1L or 2Ls off pace in 4th or so until home turn, a neck down in 2nd at the 200 M, one-paced close home.
Slowest away, about 11th and 6Ls off speed until home turn, stayed on only fairly in the stretch.
Always rearward about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace, never a factor.
Crossed from wide gate to lead on fence by 1L at the 1200 M, held same margin until being headed final 200 M, only swamped inside final 50 M.
Raced 3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, ridden along to try and close on straightening but found little and beaten 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd but always struggling to lie up with the pace, hard ridden turning for home and fizzled out, poor effort.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at the 1100 M, 1L back in 3rd at home turn, every chance when a neck down in 3rd at the 200 M but no extra late on.
Held up worse than midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home bend, quickened up to lead inside final 50 M despite hanging badly right close home, just scraped in.
4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 7th between 4Ls and 5Ls off speed until the straight, ran on well through closing stages for a place.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover about 5Ls off speed in 9th at the 1000 M, wider making home turn when same margin back mid-division, no impression.
On fence about 7Ls last at the 800 M, still there turning for home, made some good late ground down centre of the track, never nearer.
Eased to sit worse than midfield back the field, 6Ls off the good pace, blocked most straight, checked 250 M, made ground 100 M.
Midfield, 5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, blocked and checked 350 M, progressed gradually when clear to finish 3rd but was promoted to 2nd.
Eased to sit 2Ls off the leader, trapped 3 wide, led briefly 300 M, soon flattened 200 M.
Settled just behind the front runners, 3Ls off the good pace 2 wide, made the move 400 M, checked 250 M, ran on well to the line, finished 2nd but was relegated to 3rd.
Occupied the box seat at good pace, however blocked most straight and checked 100 M, just ran on.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 wide, made ground 400 M, however checked badly 250 M, just ran on afterwards.
Bumped start, eased to sit back, 7Ls off the good pace, trapped 3 wide, dashed well 300 M but kept hanging in badly, drifted away 100 M to win.
Pushed early to cross the rail just behind the front runners, 4Ls off the good pace, blocked most straight, checked 100 M, made ground 50 M.
Awkward away, hard ridden to take the rail and led at good pace, hung on until 350 M dropped off, checked 200 M.
Settled 1.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, travelled nicely throughout, ran on until 250 M, weakened.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 6.5Ls off the good pace 2 wide, blocked and checked 350 M, no progress when clear.
Eased back to get cover behind the field, 8.5Ls off the good pace 3 wide, progressed steadily 250 M but lacked usual strong finishing effort.
Slow away, eased to rear, never competitive.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace, trapped 4 wide throughout and lost too much ground, no turn of foot in straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to hold every chance inside 200 M but swamped for a placing final few strides.

Settled at the back after beginning from widest draw. Took closer order passing 1100 M before making another move around field home bend. Wide in rear of midfield turning in. Ran on strongly down centre of straight to just fail.
Settled in last few. Wide in last turning for home. Made up good ground under pressure down centre of straight.
Raced on rails in midfield. Stuck behind runners for the majority of straight. Not fully tested.
Raced wide without cover in midfield. Took closer order around home bend and made moderate headway early in straight before overhauled over 100 M out.
Broke well. Settled behind midfield. Shuffled further back to last coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace without threatening in the run home.
Settled in worse than midfield. Switched out for a run over 300 M out. Ran on well to just prevail in a 4-way photo finish.
Raced wide without cover in better than midfield. Improved around home bend and was close up turning in. Gave ground steadily final 200 M.
Niggled at early, settling one back on rails. Hung around home bend and baulked early in straight until 200 M. Fought on dourly to only narrowly miss a placing in a 4-way photo finish.
Slightly slow out. Remained in rear to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Jumped fairly. Gradually took up running but raced keenly far side. Led until headed after straightening. Dropped out tamely.
Disputed lead early, settling one-out-one back. Hit front upon straightening only to be overhauled inside 200 M.
Slowly away. Raced towards rear to straight. Forced to switch off heels of runners for a run over 250 M out. Ran on dourly under pressure to just fail to get up by the narrowest of margins.
Blundered at start. Ridden along for prominent position early, settling some 2-1/2Ls off the pace. Came under pressure rounding home bend and found nothing in straight.
Lacked dash from outset and ended up 3 wide 6Ls back, improved 4 wide in middle stages, did share of work without cover to bend, made progress to 200 M but run ended last bit when workload took toll.

Slowly into stride, regathered to be 7Ls back in rearward division on rails, not asked in mid-section and helped by fast pace, kept to rails and made solid progress between horses to be closest on line.
Showed more speed than recent starts to take a midfield spot, raced 3 wide with cover 2 to 3Ls back, urged along on bend, responded gradually in straight to reduce margin and make frame.
Even jump, ended up 3 wide 6Ls back behind midfield, had trail but proved difficult to settle in mid-section, lost position to be back last on turning, offered little in run to line.
No speed from jump and allowed to settle at tail, raced much further back than usual 8Ls back 2 wide, still well down on bend, only managed to pass some tired runners in run to line.

Jumped well, pushed along to hold leaders back, on bridle 2Ls back on circle following solid speed, no run at 400 M, clear from 250 M but couldn't muster and effort was one paced over concluding stages.

Even jump, outpaced and ended up in midfield, raced 3 to 4Ls back on rails suited by solid tempo, tracked nicely on bend, kept to rails and improved into gap at 200 M, surged to front at 100 M to score with something in hand.
Out with rest, took up a midfield role 2 wide 3 to 4Ls back, had run of race with reasonable pace, back between horses leaving bend, found nothing and dropped right out in straight.

Even jump, trapped 3 wide early, overraced and forced way forward to race closer than usual, raced outside leader shading inside horse, right there on turning but hard run took toll and weakened out from 200 M.
Lost ground on jumping, urged along to sit behind midfield 2 wide 6Ls back, helped by early tempo, trailed 3 wide on bend, closed steadily before run closed at 100 M, only finished fairly thereafter.

First to hit ground, led easily from wide alley and rolled along at a solid clip, shaded throughout by outside horse, kicked back to lead narrowly on turning, fought off challengers to 100 M but couldn't deny rival last 100 M.
Little speed from outset, raced with last few 3 wide 8Ls back, improved 4 wide in mid-section to be 4Ls back without cover, swung widest in straight and made good progress to be nearest on line.
Away nicely, took a prime position 1 out 1 back right on speed, on bridle on bend and eased into clear 1L down turning, challenged strongly at 300 M and showed good fight to narrowly miss 2nd.

Moderate jump, faded back from an awkward alley, trapped 4 to 5 wide 5Ls away throughout, used up to improve 4 wide without cover on bend, 1L down straightening, dropped out tamely last 300 M when run took effect.
Soon took up running and led while cocking his jaw as usual. Still held nearly a length's advantage turning for home. Fought on well to stave off challengers readily.
In last few. Made no impression in straight.

Sluggish at start. Swiftly crossed from 9-draw for rails run and picked up to 4th about 2Ls off the speed. Reached 3rd around home bend but baulked early in straight. Kept on same pace under pressure closing stages.

Broke well settling mainly one out one back far side. Shifted back to 4th some 2Ls back approaching home bend. Held some chance when similar turning in reaching 2nd over 200 M out. Swamped when one-paced final stages.
Broke well. Soon taken back to race in rear for a late run. Shaken up 400 M out and finished off race strongly.
Raced in last few. Rider reported saddle shifted 1200 M out. Closed steadily in straight to run home to be nearest at finish.
Raced in mid-division of this small field. Held rails run to straight when switched out for a run. Ran on well inside final 300 M to snatch 2nd without seriously threatening the winner.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield of the small field. Ran home one-paced under pressure without quickening.
Broke well but had to settle 3-wide without cover in prominent position. Gained one-out-one-back position coming out of back straight. Held similar until no extra passing 200 M.
Tardy to begin, raced 2 wide in midfield 5 to 6Ls off pace, had an easy trip to bend, back between horses turning, lost run when checked at 350 M, had chance but didn't respond from that point.
Standard jump, lacked pace and faded back to midfield, had a tough trip 3 wide without cover 6Ls away, lost ground on circle, dropped out tamely when run took toll at 300 M.

Out fairly but lacked early dash and ended up 8Ls back on rails, improved to be 6Ls down in midfield, 4Ls back in 6th turning in, improved between horses and surged into clear at 200 M, dashed late to hit front on line. Clever ride.
Restrained from a wide alley and taken back to tail, raced 2 wide 10Ls back aided by tempo, tracked well 3 wide on bend, made good ground down centre from an impossible spot to be nearest on line.
Standard jump, ended up securing a nice spot 4Ls back on fence, had a soft run in mid-section, 3Ls back in 4th turning in, switched out and looked a genuine threat at 200 M.
Broke with field, pressed on to take close order, raced 4Ls back in 2 wide running line, switched 3 wide without cover on circle, same margin down on turning, offered nothing in straight.
Broke well, took up coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had an easy time on back of speed, 1L back in 3rd leaving bend, into clear at top of stretch but didn't dash as normally would and was one paced late.

Began with line, couldn't slot in and snagged back to race in rearward division, raced 3 wide 8Ls back, aided by tempo but set task on bend, switched 4 wide but made no headway over concluding stages.
Fast into stride, pressed forward to race at leaders girth, applied pressure throughout at a genuine tempo, right there on turning in, couldn't dash at 250 M but stuck on nicely for a solid 4th.

Even jump but lacked speed early, raced well back 8Ls down behind midfield on rails, gradually improved following eventual winner, cut corner on turning, hit clear at 250 M and made good late ground for 5th.
Slow into stride, assumed usual role 9Ls away on rails, suited by early pace, not asked to bend, back in behind horses turning, only clear from 250 M and closed off evenly final furlong.
Out with them but restrained from an awkward draw, raced 3 wide 7 to 8Ls back behind midfield, helped by tempo, improved to be 4Ls down turning, lacked usual close and run ended at 200 M.

Amongst first out, went on with it to work across to front, controlled race from 1000 M and held a narrow advantage to turn, dug in entering straight finding plenty and had race won everywhere but last few strides.
Moderate jump but ridden hard to regather and race behind leader, trailed even pace well enough to bend, had something to offer but found little when let down, just battled last 300 M.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace at halfway, always remained this distance from the front and didn't really threaten.
Prominent out wide early on and did well to adopt box-seat position on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, hard ridden to maintain this proximity at top of homestretch, faded out.
Led on fence early on, a neck clear at the 800 M and dropped out quickly once headed at top of home straight.
9Ls last at the 1000 M, 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 7Ls last, ran on past several tired rivals late, never nearer.
Always handy, 3Ls back in 5th at the 800 M, closer turning for home, never quite got to grips with quinella pair.
Never travelled well, 5Ls off pace at the 1000 M and lost position gradually on the circle, well held thereafter.
Pressed on from widest gate to dispute the pace out 2-wide at halfway, led at top of home straight, all out inside final 200 M and caught inside final strides, brave effort nonetheless.
Always caught very wide without cover, 4-deep in midfield at halfway, 5-wide off final bend and losing his position, faded out.
Never travelled well, around 8th place and under pressure at halfway, rapidly lost this position on the circle and eased down a long way out.
Gradually slid over from wide gate to race in 1 out 1 back position in 4th at the 800 M, a neck down in 2nd at top of home straight, stayed on gamely to lead final strides.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off the speed and in a wide position, always well held.
Hugged rail down backstretch about 4Ls off pace, edged closer turning for home, had every chance to place but failed to pick up.
Slowly away and lost more ground when checked, raced 8 to 9Ls back on fence, helped by pace but still well back approaching bend, failed to run on in straight.
Out well, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover 2Ls back, did share of work to turn with reasonable tempo, there to 200 M just running out of gas late but kept on gamely.
No speed from jump, raced at tail 10Ls from leaders, made a 3 wide run from 600 M, came widest in straight and passed some tired runners late. Gave too much start.
Took no part.
Reasonable jump, took up a spot 4Ls back on fence in midfield, not set a task in mid-section, had chance to progress on turning but only battled at same speed.
No speed from outset and raced back with last few 8Ls off pace in mid-section, still gave a big start on turning, progressed well last 250 M making some good late ground.
Out with rest, ridden with urgency to take close order, did work to keep a spot outside leader, challenged on circle, under pressure on turning and weakened out tamely in stretch.
Amongst first few out, pushed on and took up front, rolled along at an even tempo, 1/2L clear on turning, kicked strongly at 300 M and kept rivals at bay to score with some ease.
Fastest out, took a sit in coveted 1 out 1 back spot 2Ls back, had a dream run in mid-section, angled clear at 400 M but didn't really pick up and only kept on at same pace in straight.
Moderate jump, settled in a two wide spot in midfield 4Ls back, had an even run with pace on, ridden along on turning but struggled last 300 M. Fitter next time.
Bounced out, didn't have pace to cross and drifted well back to be 6Ls away on rails, niggled on bend and made run between horses in straight but failed to make ground.

Even beginning, pressed on to assume a prime position behind leader, had run of race 1 to 2Ls back, tracked well to bend, had clear running from 400 M and stuck on nicely without showing much of a sprint.
Fair jump, always 4 wide from outside alley 4Ls back in midfield throughout, urged along turning in, weakened out easily after tough trip.
Ordinary break, lost further ground when checked, raced 2 wide 5 to 6Ls back, still well back on turning, came to middle and produced best finish making many lengths.
Raced 3 wide with cover in 2nd last position. Never went on.
Throughout the race, travelled wide without cover, midfield.
Travelled in last position, looked for inside passage in the straight but had no luck and went to the line untested.
Overraced slightly whilst in a leading position. Headed after the 400 M to finish midfield.
Settled 1 out 1 back, failed to find any extra in the run home.
Raced 1 off, midfield. Passing the 700 M. Was obliged to race 3 deep without cover. Took the lead near the 250 M but was nailed inside the 150 M.
Raced 3 back along the fence, worked to the line nicely.
Enjoyed the run of the race behind the leader, had every chance.
Landed midfield the fence, commenced to angle out after the 700 M. Peeled to the outside in the straight and finished with a sustained run.
Parked in 2nd position, 1 off, battled away in the run home.
Settled near the rear on the fence. Shifted out in the straight, but failed to run on.
Crowded at the start and settled near the rear of the field, 2 deep with cover, closed off well.
Lacked early pace and raced behind midfield. Crowded at 800 M and slipped further back. Near last on straightening and made up some ground. Unable to sustain effort final 100 M.
Quickest out. Settled on the fence at midfield. Ran on without quickening after straightening and only ran past some beaten runners closing stages.
Among early leaders. Gradually slipped back and was 2-wide at midfield making the turn. Only kept same pace in the straight.

Among early leaders before slipping to midfield. 3-wide without cover making home turn. Steadily closed in on leader after straightening and contended for the lead 200 M. Unable to find extra to remain in battle final stages.
Settled on fence in rear section. Switched out to find clear running after straightening. Rallied home and was closest at finish.
Hard pressed and had the lead briefly before being outpaced. Settled behind leader until straightening. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to threaten.

Slow out of the gates and was ridden along to tack on near the back of the field. Improved nicely in a 4-wide spot making home turn. Continued well in the straight and charged past rival to take command final 100 M.
Pressed forward and raced in a disputed lead. Maintained lead into home straight but unable to find extra and was swamped final 200 M.
Botched the start and sat quietly at the rear. Swung wide and last to enter home straight. Strong rally final 300 M for a minor placing.
Tracked leaders in a 2-wide position. Kept on fairly in the straight. Will improve from run.
Pressed forward from widest draw and was 2-wide in a disputed lead heading into the turn. Kept grinding to maintain lead after straightening but ran out of gas final 200 M.
Settled wide and without cover behind midfield. Lacked a quickening pace after straightening and weakened close to home.
Covered up in midfield about 5Ls off pace at halfway, nice headway to ease to the front 300 M out, pulled clear to win with authority.
Slow to begin, towards rear about 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, improved but caught 5-wide without cover at 600 M and swung wide into home straight, kept on for a place.
Disputed early pace out 3-wide without cover, 2-wide and 1L off pace at 800 M, began to tire before the home turn and continued to fade.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 5th at halfway, never found too much room pinned to the fence and not fully tested.
In 10th or so about 7Ls off pace at 1000 M and steadied soon after, improved to 2Ls back in 5th when 4-wide swinging for home, couldn't sustain the bid.
Always towards the rear, unbalanced in 12th at 600 M when 6Ls behind the pace, never looked at all likely.
Around midfield but left without cover at 900 M and began to race keenly, strode on out wide without cover to dispute the lead before home turn, emptied out at the 200 M.
Away well and enjoyed a nice trail no worse than 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so before straightening for home, one-paced in the finish.
Marginal lead out 2-wide early, 1L clear on fence at 800 M, headed by the winner 300 M out and did well to cling onto 2nd.
Briefly 3-wide without cover at 900 M when 2Ls back in 4th, lost this position taking final bend and steadily faded out.
Missed the start, about 9Ls last on fence at 1200 M, still in rear and widest (5-wide) until home turn, ran on past some tired rivals.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off pace until halfway, within 2Ls of the lead when steadied entering home straight, soon outpaced.
Slowly away, worse than midfield 5Ls off pace at midpoint, closer but held up for running at top of home straight, never saw too much daylight.

4-back on fence and 5Ls off speed inside the winner at 800 M, shuffled back into straight and held up until the 200 M, edged out to the clear and ran on for 4th, unlucky not to place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Disputed early out 2-wide, a little keen before crossing to lead on fence by 2Ls at 800 M, headed about 150 M out, finished off at same pace.
Bumnped at start, 6Ls back in 6th at halfway, closer turning for home and all out to be within 2Ls of the lead at the 200 M, tired markedly final stages.
Never any better than midfield, 2-wide in 8th about 7Ls back at 800 M, ridden along to improve on straightening, never really threatened.
Caught 3-wide without cover in rear about 8Ls off pace early on, wider off final bend when 6Ls down, never in the hunt.
Bumped at start, disputed early pace on fence but headed and 2Ls back in 2nd at 800 M, led again 150 M out and only grabbed by quinella pair final strides.
8Ls behind in last at 1200 M and still well behind off home turn, ran on very strongly out widest of all, only just failed.
Slowly away, restrained in 10th on fence about 8Ls off pace early on, making headway when short of room about 350 M out, never looked like breaking from the pack.
Awkward break, quietly ridden near the rear about 8Ls off down the back, 5Ls behind and 4-wide turning for home, ran on strongly down the centre to lead on line.
Enjoyed a nice run on fence 2Ls or so off pace in 3rd until the home straight, every chance when a neck 3rd at the 200 M, no extra closing stages.
7Ls back in midfield on fence at halfway, trying to challenge when 3Ls down in 5th at final turn, run ended final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, ridden along to maintain this proximity at final bend, kept on without quickening.
2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls back in 5th at 800 M and similar off final turn, briefly loomed a place chance at 200 M but couldn't follow through.
Settled well back in rear about 9Ls off speed at 800 M, on fence and 6Ls off pace swinging for home, always chasing at least half the field.
Eased back from the start, always a good 9Ls from the front down backstretch and 6Ls off pace at home turn when under pressure, very much outpaced. (Lame following morning.)
Eased to sit 2Ls off the fast pace, 2 wide, lacked turn of foot, just held ground in straight.
Eased to rear, more than 8Ls off the leaders 3 wide, helped by the fast tempo, made ground 300 M, however run ended 100 M.
Travelled just behind the pace group, 2.5Ls off the leaders 3 wide, weakened gradually 500 M.
Soon dropped to the rear, more than 10Ls off the leaders along the fence, helped by the fast pace but never progressed in straight.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed, 4.5Ls off pace 2 wide, helped by the fast tempo, no progress in final stages.
Hard ridden to get across and led at fast early sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled, still stuck on well for 3rd.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4.5Ls off the leaders, 2 wide, helped by fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M.
Pushed to take the rail in front, 1.5Ls behind the leader, harmed by the fast early sectionals, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Eased to sit just behind the leaders, 2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, ran on strongly to the line, led briefly 100 M, just missed win by a neck.
Slowly away, eased back, 5Ls behind the leaders 3 wide, helped by the fast pace, however finished the race off only fairly.
Worse than midfield along the fence, 7.5Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast tempo, closed the race off strongly 200 M to win by a narrow margin.
Slowly away, pushed to occupy a midfield spot along the rails, 4.5Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, made up some ground in straight.
Just worse than midfield, 5.5Ls behind the leaders 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, but ran on fairly in final stages.
Hard ridden to obtain a prominent spot, 2Ls off the leaders 2 wide, not suited by the fast early sectionals, faded rapidly 400 M.
Never better than midfield. Struggling from halfway out.
Jumped fairly. Not far off in centre of the track. Faded gradually inside final 200 M.
Began well. Raced with leaders. Hit the front over 300 M out holding eventual winner by a neck 200 M out, only to be worn down close to finish.
Began well. Soon shifted out from widest draw onto grandstand rails for a prominent position. Failed to quicken to challenge closing stages but plugged on for 3rd.
Held narrow lead early stages. Ceded advantage coming onto course proper. Still a neck down about 200 M out but fought on gamely under pressure to get up late.
Settled in rear after beginning from low draw to race down the centre of the track. Commenced moved inside 300 M and ran on steadily to narrowly miss placing.
Behind midfield. Faded under pressure inside final 400 M.
Mainly in better than midfield. Kept on steadily at the one pace to finish.
Prominent briefly. Gave ground from halfway out.
Did not jump well but always prominent. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Away with them, showed speed but elected to take trail, had ideal trip behind leader, 2Ls down on turning, into clear at 250 M, closed off nicely to make frame.

Poor to break and assumed usual role near tail, raced 8Ls back on rails, helped by solid tempo, eased 2 wide at 600 M, checked turning and swung wide at 400 M, made up plenty of ground in stretch from impossible spot.
Standard jump, mustered speed to make up lost ground and race outside leader, raced 1/2L back travelling sweetly on bend, threw down challenge at 200 M and edged clear late for a solid win.

Began nicely, rolled forward and took up running, kept tempo solid throughout, 1/2L clear on bend, kicked at 400 M and pinched a break but couldn't hold off lightweighted rival late. Strong effort given weight.
Lost considerable ground at start, always detached and well off 2nd last horse. Never a factor and pulled up quickly.
Began well, restrained when unable to cross, posted 3 wide 4 to 5Ls back in midfield without cover, did share of work to bend, closed steadily in straight without really threatening.
Average jump as usual, raced at tail 10Ls off pace, helped by speed and made 3 wide run on circle, 4 wide into straight and still 8Ls back, made huge amount of ground to take 3rd. Big effort.
Began well, took up a prime position 1 out 1 back, had a fair run 3Ls back, struggling to pick up at 600 M, lacked usual finishing burst and faded out in straight. (Sore morning after.)
Even jump, took a trailing position 4Ls back on rails in midfield, had a quiet time on circle, niggled on turning, stuck on evenly last 300 M holding ground in run to line.
Fast into stride, couldn't cross and drifted back to midfield 5 to 6Ls back in running line, struggling on bend, slight check turning, couldn't go with them and battled in straight.
Out with rest, allowed to slide back from a wide alley, ended up 6 to 7Ls back on rails, helped by speed, kept to rails in straight and made steady progress before struggling last 200 M.
Lost ground at start dropping to last. Moved closer along rails rounding home bend gaining to rear of midfield. Just kept on one-pace under pressure to finish.
In front early. Gave up lead to settle one back on rails over 1000 M out. Remained same turning in but soon weakened.
Well back. Last into straight. Kept on well past beaten runners in straight.
Never far off on rails in midfield or just better. Angled off rails for a run when about 6th turning in. Kept on same pace under pressure to finish.
Slightly sluggish at start but soon picked up to one-out-one-back position in 3rd before home bend and briefly 2nd into straight. Soon dropped out.
Close up. Took over lead 1000 M out gradually crossing to rails. Held a length's advantage from after straightening to 200 M. Headed under pressure nearing finish.
Wide in midfield early. Behind midfield rounding home bend. Weakening when tightened 350 M out.

Midfield early. Closer up before taken back to forward of mifield and not far off before home bend. About 5th turning in and quickened under pressure to hold every chance throughout closing stages to only go down by a head.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Better than midfield, gaining 4th 3-wide around home bend. Short-lived effort upon straightening but soon found no extra under pressure.
Never better than midfield and ran home one-paced.
Wide in prominent position after beginning from wide draw. Gradually dropped to behind midfield coming out of back straight. Produced moderate impression late.
Raced 3 wide in midfield mainly. Similar turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced move inside 300 M and quickened well to assert authority close to home.
Average jump, ridden along to hold spot in rearward bunch, raced 8Ls back on rails appreciating even tempo, kept to rails to 400 M before hitting clear at 300 M, did best work late. Nice return.
Fastest out, led them easily before handing up to stablemate, raced outside leader from 700 M, challenged on turning, there to 200 M before early work took toll and weakened out.

Moderate break, took a spot behind midfield 6Ls back on rails, struggled early but suited by pace in middle stages, 2 wide leaving circle, progressed steadily last 300 M making some ground without looking likely.
Jumped with rest, lacked early dash and settled towards tail 7 to 8Ls back in running line, helped by tempo but niggled along at 600 M, gave a big start but did warm up late. Better for run.
Well enough away, unable to get to rail and forced to do it tough 4Ls back 3 wide without cover, still working creeping closer on bend, didn't dash but stuck to task well, will improve.

Even jump, settled behind pace pair 3Ls back in running line, had a trail on circle, 2Ls down on turning, closed strongly and took lead at 200 M, looked set to win before being caught on line. (Dropped whip at 50 M.)
Fair to leave gates, took a midfield role 4Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, overraced on bend, in traffic to 300 M, progressed nicely when clear but couldn't match first two.
Showed good natural pace to go forward and take front from outside alley, kept pace genuine 1L clear, still held advantage leaving turn, defied them to 200 M but condition gave out late.

Began with line, couldn't slot in and drifted back to race in midfield, 3 wide with cover 6Ls away throughout, urged along on turning, flat out in straight and ran out of gas last 200 M. Better for run.
Ordinary getaway, raced at tail 9 to 10Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, still well back on bend, stuck to rails in straight but unable to make much progress.
Began in line, ridden up to hold a closer spot, ended up well placed 4Ls back in running line, travelled well on bend, hit clear at 300 M and showed good dash charging late to get up on line.
Taken back from an awkward draw, raced 7Ls back 3 wide with cover, helped by pace, swung 4 wide turning but still gave a big start, made some headway down centre however lacked usual finish.
Slowly away, bucked early and lost further ground, caught up to race 10Ls back in 2 wide line, back with last few, weakened out in straight.
Away well, had speed to race in forward division 3Ls back on fence, had dream trip with tempo to suit, 2Ls down at 400 M, failed to match them from 300 M and struggled late.
Began well. Disputed lead outside leader far side, hitting front briefly rounding home bend. Kept on before fading inside 200 M.
Never far off and always within 2Ls of pace despite racing in 5th or 6th position early. Responded well to take charge passing 200 M. Won easily.
Niggled along just worse than midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Fought on steadily under pressure.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Settled on rails just behind leader. No clear run in straight and not fully tested. (See Racing Incidents.)
Close up far side. Lost ground and dropped to midfield coming out of back straight. Shifted out for a run turning in but could only produce moderate headway without threatening.
Always well back. Tailed-off home bend.
Jumped fairly. Soon took up running on rails and led narrowly most of way until headed inside 200 M. Hung on under pressure for 2nd.
Remained wide in prominent position after beginning from poor draw. Still 3-wide and one back in 3rd rounding home bend but lost position turning in. Plugged on under pressure.
Broke well racing 4-wide in prominent positions before dropping to midfield home bend. Lost further ground turning in.
Slightly slow out. Settled at the back. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly but lacked pace to contest early lead, settling behind midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and ran home steadily under pressure without threatening.
Went forward early, but found the pace too solid and settled 3-wide with cover in midfield. Struggled in the run home.
Caught wide early and crossed over to sit outside the leader passing the 1100 M, battled away over the last furlong.
Travelled on the fence near the rear of the field, made up some ground in the straight.
From 4 wide barrier was taken back, settled in 3rd last position, 1 off with cover, peeled out on straightening and lengthened well to gather in a rivals easily.
Had to work hard early to take the lead after the 1100 M, stuck to task well at same pace.
Raced in last position, worked to the line soundly.
For the major part of the race travelled wide and without cover whilst in a forward position, tired after a hard run.
Settled just behind the speed, 2-wide with cover, stayed on in the straight.
Failed to muster customary early speed despite being ridden along, settled midfield the fence, failed to run on.
Raced 1 off in a midfield position, took the inside run in the straight and finished off gamely.
Parked behind the leader, gave ground turning for home.
2-wide at midfield. Under the whip turning for home and took some time to pick up. Made up some ground but ran on only fairly in the home straight.
Lead or disputed lead in a 2-wide spot. Gained a slim advantage final 200 M. Kept on well but unable to find enough over the final stages to hold off placegetters.

Niggled along to be among early leaders. Remained in the lead or disputed lead until home straight. Continued to vie for the lead at the 200 M but unable to find extra to stay in contention over the final stages.
Settled behind midfield. Made up ground in the home straight and was closest at the line.
Raced behind the pace until home straight. Unable to quicken and tired final 200 M. (Mucopus.)
Off slowly. Dropped to the back and trailed field until home turn. Rallied strongly and just missed catching the winner.
Raced towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Good jump and raced better than midfield. Stayed within 3Ls of the pace in back straight. Kept on steadily in the home straight but unable to threaten.

Ridden out of the gates and was wide without cover in a forward spot early. Gradually slipped to midfield but remained without cover middle stages. Struggled at the home turn and found nothing in the straight.

Slow to begin. Squeezed shortly after start and settled towards the rear. Made a ground saving trip around home turn. Charged through rivals in the final 100 M and held off a late challenger at the line to prevail.
Raced along the rails in midfield. Pressured from 400 M out but was only able to maintain same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails in a prominent spot behind the pace. Switched out on straightening and continued well for a minor placing.
Nice position 3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until home turn, switched out to challenge at 200 M, finished strongly but post came too soon.
Always tucked away on fence worse than midfield about 4Ls off speed until home turn, made only slight late ground.
7Ls last on fence until the home turn, made some nice late ground out wide and never nearer.
Midfield 3Ls off pace with cover until being niggled along at the 600 M, outpaced by principals.
Led 3-wide without cover from widest gate at 1000 M, crossed to lead on fence at the 600 M, 2Ls clear off home turn, foiled right on the line.
Poor finish despite a handy position 2Ls off pace in 3rd or so until the 500 M, very weak in the home straight.
Slow start losing about 3Ls, 2-wide and 5Ls back in 10th through to home turn, ran on very strongly late and only just failed.
Caught 4-wide without cover throughout, around midfield 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until final bend but covering ground, petered out in straight.
Mostly 3-wide without cover about 3Ls off pace in midfield until the 600 M, big effort to be 2Ls back in 3rd at 200 M but one-paced late.
Held 2nd on fence from about the 1000 M and never worse than 2Ls behind leader, gave chase in stretch and only led on the line.
3-wide with cover about 3Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, stayed on fairly well in the straight but without seriously threatening a place.
Never really got involved, 7Ls back in 11th and one from rear until home turn, made very moderate late ground down centre of track.
Caught 3-wide early and again at 800 M when 2Ls or 3Ls off pace among the front rank, 2Ls back in 3rd off final turn, extra work took its toll close home.
Trapped 4-wide without cover in midfield at 1000 M and strode on to lead by 1L on fence at 800 M, faded once headed by the winner inside the final 200 M.
Crossed to lead on fence by 1L about 1300 M out, headed soon after and came under pressure to hang onto to 2nd place from the 600 M, beaten before the home bend.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace at the 1000 M, only marginally closer on straightening and made no significant impact.
Always wanted to hang out, 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M and pressured to remain there at the home bend, continued to hang and one-paced closing stages.
Unacceptable performance, never travelled well and ridden along towards rear about 7Ls off pace at halfway, lost further ground from top of home straight.
Settled in rear as usual, 8Ls last at halfway, got going when left 3-wide no cover at 600 M, stayed on well to take a clear 3rd.
Caught 3-wide but with cover throughout, in midfield about 4Ls back at the 800 M, headway 500 M out and stayed on well to secure 2nd but had no hope with winner.
Failed to muster any early speed and 4-back on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace from 1200 M to home turn, plodded on.
2-wide in 8th or so about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home turn, lacked any turn of foot and beaten 200 M out.
No excuses having had a nice run on the fence around midfield about 3Ls off pace from the 1000 M to home turn (when slightly held up), found zero off the bit.
Good spot with cover about 3Ls back in 5th from the 1200 M, niggled along to improve turning for home, led 150 M out and won with plenty in hand.
Hard ridden to challenge the lead but only managed to pressure the leader half a length behind 2-wide. Weakened tamely at 250 M despite the early sectionals only fair.
Hard ridden to take the box seat and pressure the leader at good pace, closed the race off strongly to finish 2nd, just missed by a neck. (Post race "Thumps".)
Settled just worse than midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the good pace along the rails, lacked turn of foot and only held its position in final stages.
Very slow away missing the kicked by at least 3Ls, more than 10Ls off the good pace, raced 3-wide at bends and lost ground, ran on fairly in straight.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, swept-wider on straightening, progressed steadily 200 M to grab 3rd.
Bumped start then dropped to rear, hard ridden to keep in touch with the field, 8Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran flat until 100 M making up some late ground.
Eased early and crossed the rails steadily behind the leading group, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace, made ground in straight.
Slow away, eased back and crossed the fence, 7Ls off the good pace, progressed steadily 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled 2-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot in straight and just held ground.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and led by half a length at good pace, kicked away by 2Ls on straightening, hung on strongly to win by a narrow margin.
Insufficient early speed, tried to get closer to the fence behind midfield, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, ran on fairly in straight.
Trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground at the bends, 2-1/2Ls off the good pace, flattened 200 M.
Niggled at early, travelling 3-wide in midfield before improving to 4th just one-off the rails. Fought on steadily in straight to reach 2nd late.
Settled behind midfield. Finished off race strongly down centre of track to take charge inside final 100 M.
Settled in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace. Similar turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Headed under pressure inside final 200 M.
Travelled at the back. Commenced move upon straightening and made up good ground down centre of straight to narrowly miss 2nd.
Niggled along and close up early. Dropped back to midfield on rails far side. Dropped further back coming out of back straight. Made no impression in the run home.
Settled in last few. Kept on same pace in straight.
Began fairly. Soon taken to rear. Remained well back to straight. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide 3-back in 4th to halfway. Lost position and dropped to midfield up Rock. Kept on one pace without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight. Never nearer.
Raced wide behind midfield. Took closer order going up Rock. Just better than midfield when still wide home bend. Made modest headway in straight without threatening.
Travelled in 2nd in one-out-one back position. Hit front shortly after straightening only to be worn down quickly inside final 200 M.
Moderate jump and allowed to drift back to tail, raced 2-wide 8Ls back, helped by tempo in mid section, swung wide into straight, made huge amount of ground to just miss. Unlucky.

Awkwardly away, regathered and drove up to race outside leader, did share of work with speed on, moved up to challenge on circle, right there at 150 M but condition gave out late and couldn't sustain effort.
Standard jump, outpaced early and settled towards rear 6Ls back in 2-wide line, had a good run with solid speed, travelled well turning, hit clear at 150 M and surged late to hit lead on line.
Last out, took up spot at rear 8Ls from lead, helped by solid tempo in mid-section, cut corner and saved ground, made plenty of ground in straight before run closed, not ridden out late.
Restrained from a wide alley, raced 3-wide 7Ls from speed, always amongst last few but helped by tempo, still well back on turning, made a late ground from well back.
Began OK, drifted back to a mid field position in the running line 4Ls off front, helped by even pace, travelled well bend, angled out on turning and closed nicely to make frame.
Reasonable beginning, unable to slot in, posted 3 wide without cover 3Ls back, improved to be 2Ls down on turning in, hard run took toll and weakened out late. (Lame)
Out with rest but couldn't go early pace, ended up towards rear 2-wide 6Ls back, gradually lost position on bend, struggled in straight, will derive benefit from run.
Reasonable break, faded back to race midfield on rails 4Ls off lead, had an easy time with pace on up front, saved ground turning and gradually took ground off leaders without threatening.
Broke nicely, showed plenty of early toe to take up running from a wide alley, kept rolling at a solid tempo, joined on turning, headed at 150 M and weakened late after early work.

Out with line, had pace to hold a position 3Ls back on rails, had a nice run following speed, angled 2-wide on bend into clear turning and challenged to hit head briefly at 150 M before being run down late.
First to hit ground, led easily but took a trail after 200 M, had an even trip behind leader with pace on, took a gap turning and hit lead passing 200 M, peaked on run and dropped off last bit.
Ordinary getaway but regathered to hold leaders back, broke away from back trailing at a solid tempo, 2Ls down on turning, there to 200 M but faded late when workload took toll.
Fastest to begin, showed pace to lead them easily, ran field along at a genuine clip 3Ls clear, had rest chasing on circle, shot away in straight and scored convincingly in handy time.
Slow from jump, raced at rear 12Ls from pace pair, helped by pace on, still had field to beat on turning, couldn't get closer in straight.
Out nicely, settled prominently 3rd on rails 5Ls off pace, had to cart field up on circle, urged along on turning, made some progress in straight at same speed.
Jumped in line, drifted back to tail 10Ls off pace, aided by strong sectionals in front, still well back approaching straight, made little impression in run to line.
Moderate jump, drove through to settle in midfield 6 to 7Ls off front runners, lost spot approaching bend, well back turning, kept to rails and made some late headway.
Away well, unable to slot in and forced to travel 3 wide in midfield without cover, 6Ls back at midpoint, weakened out in run to line.
Standard jump, ended up in middle of pack 7Ls off pace, had an even trip with speed on, kept to rails on circle, switched out but only managed a one paced finish.
Began in line, faded back to race behind midfield 8Ls away in 2 wide line, helped by tempo in mid-section, found rails on circle, steadied at 400 M, closed evenly when clear.
Lost position on jumping and raced at rear 10Ls off pace on rails, helped by tempo in mid-section, well back on bend, came to outside and made many lengths but got nowhere near winner.
Slow to begin, however was able to take up a position on the fence, behind the leader. Had every chance.
Raced in a midfield position 3 wide, but was left racing without cover after the 800 M, loomed up and looked the likely winner at 200 M, but its run ended over the concluding stages.
Began well and after being wide early, crossed to 2nd position behind the leader. Challenged near the 200 M after kicking to the lead, held on to win drawing a margin.
Knuckled at the start and lost ground. Raced behind midfield 3 wide with cover. Gave ground inside the furlong.
Parked just behind the speed on the fence, gave ground turning for home.
Settled 1 out 1 back, battled along dourly in the run home.
Led in a one off position, stuck to task satisfactorily in the straight.
Settled in 2nd last position on the fence. Had some difficulty obtaining clear running on straightening. Angled to the outside of the field after the 300 M. Ran on well.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and settled behind midfield, two wide with cover. One paced under pressure in the latter stages.
Slowly away, settled close to midfield the fence. Struggled over the final 400 M.
Raced in last position, came to the extreme outside in the straight, closed off soundly.
Widest among leaders. 3 wide without cover and struggling to keep up at the turn. Finished tailed out. (Mucopus.)
Failed to find early speed and raced towards midfield. Made a ground saving trip along the rails rounding home turn. Maintained same pace in the straight and weakened final stages.
Raced among leaders early before sitting off the pace after 1200 M. 3-wide turning for home and was one-paced thereafter.
Lead or disputed lead. Held a length's advantage 200 M out but winner proved too strong over the final stretch.
Raced along the rails and kept within 2Ls of the pace. Settled in a prominent spot behind the lead turning for home Kept on fairly in the straight and held on for a minor placing.
Raced in rear section until straightening. Steadily made up ground and was closest at finish.
Disputed lead until 1000 M. 2-wide and a length off the pace making the turn. Lacked the needed response when put under pressure after straightening and weakened out.

Missed the jump and raced at the rear. Checked and lost ground at the 800 M. Remained towards the rear turning for home and kept on same pace after straightening. Showed a late dash in the final 200 M and made up some late ground.

Settled in rear section before advancing to midfield at the home turn. Continued well after straightening under hands and heels. Quickened under the whip and charged past rivals final 150 M to win easily.
Settled in rear section. Kept on steadily in the straight and made up some ground.
Narrow lead on far side early on, disputing the pace at halfway, went a neck down to the winner inside final 400 M but didn't lose much more ground and comfortably held 3rd.
Tended to hang while 1L off the early speed, all out to remain within 1L of the pace at the 200 M, tired thereafter.
Prominent early but niggled along 3Ls off speed to remain in touch at halfway, continued to fade.
2Ls back in midfield until halfway, stayed on gamely for pressure to get within a neck of the winner on the line.
Among the front rank, hung out at halfway when a neck down, steadily yielded ground inside final 300 M.
Disputed early pace on near fence, outpaced when 1L down at halfway and soon left behind.
Disappointing effort, under pressure 600 M out on fence when 3Ls down in midfield, soon beaten.
Awkward break and ridden along in rear from an early stage, never a factor.
Slightly worse than midfield about 3Ls off pace until halfway, made some fair late ground without troubling the first three.
Always close up, smooth headway to dispute the lead 400 M out, didn't quite shake off his pursuers and all out to just about scramble in.
Slow start, always toiling in rear, left well behind through the closing stages.
Worse than midfield on stand's rail about 3Ls off pace through early stages, stayed on well for pressure, nearest at finish.
Hung out early on when about 1L adrift of the pace, outpaced when 3Ls behind at halfway, soon beaten and eased late.
Slowly away, always in rear about 4Ls off pace early on, never on terms.
Towards rear on fence about 6Ls adrift of the lead at 1000 M, 5Ls down on straightening, ran on fairly but not quickly enough to place.
8Ls last at the 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home when 6Ls last, made some good late ground for a place but failed to reach to quinella pair.
Broke well but steadily lost position and 5Ls down in midfield inside the winner at halfway, continued to lose his place, poor effort.
Never any better than midfield, one from rear and 7Ls down at 1000 M, short-lived effort when 3Ls off speed at the 300 M but the run faded in concluding stages. (Bit pulled through.)
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, held similar margin until home turn and headed at the 300 M, faded.
Slowest away, 2-wide and 5Ls back in midfield at halfway and edged a little closer in 4th turning for home, led 200 M out and only just repelled MOONGLOW in tight finish.
1L off pace in 3rd when 3-wide without cover at 1200 M, soon gained cover and 3Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, under pressure to lie up off home bend, very tame finish.
Slowly away, 3-wide without cover when 6Ls back in 9th at halfway, 5Ls down in 6th or so swinging for home, faded final 200 M.
Raced too freely in 2nd place about 1L off the speed early on, pressed on to lead briefly about 300 M out but headed at the 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Keen at 1000 M when 4Ls off speed in 5th, hard pressed to maintain this proximity at home turn, very weak final 200 M.
Trapped 3-wide without cover down backstretch, 3Ls back in 4th and 2-wide at 700 M, 2Ls down in 3rd off home turn, headed by winner at 200 M but rallied strongly and only just failed.
Prominent and held the rails early, not suited by the fast early sectionals, soon dropped back 3Ls off the leader, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Pushed forward to obtain a prominent spot, 2Ls behind the leader 2 wide, harmed by the fast pace, completely emptied 400 M and faded quickly.
Hard ridden early to keep up with the field at the back, 8Ls off the leader along the rails, checked 800 M, helped by the fast pace, made up some ground 250 M.
Hard ridden to go forward as usual, 2Ls behind the leader, trapped 3 wide throughout, not suited by the fast pace, held ground until 200 M, flattened.
Jumped well, crossed the field in front easily, led by 2Ls at fast early sectionals, hung out at bends, hung on until 100 M overhauled, still ran on well to the line, improving but still green.
Worse than midfield, 6.5Ls off the leader along the fence, favoured by the fast pace, however ran on fairly to the line.
Hard ridden from gates but lacked early speed, never better than midfield and trapped 3 wide, dropped off dramatically in straight.
Settled 5Ls off the leader along the fence, checked 1000 M, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to win by a short head.

Eased at start, 9.5Ls behind the leader 2 wide, travelled nicely, helped by the fast pace, made the move on straightening, closed the race off strongly last 300 M to finish 2nd, just missed by a narrow margin.
Hard ridden to join the leading group and took the box seat, 2Ls behind the leader, harmed by the fast tempo, run ended 250 M.
Worse than midfield, 6.5Ls off the leader 2 wide, favoured by the fast tempo, however stayed flat until 200 M, made ground steadily doing best work late.
Eased to rear and crossed towards the fence, 9.5Ls behind the leader, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M without threatening.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, 8Ls off pace at back, 2 wide, helped by the fast tempo, but finished the race off only fairly.
Pushed early to occupy a spot just better than midfield, 4Ls off the fast pace 2 wide, made ground last 300 M to run 3rd.
Never far off in 3rd or 4th within one and a half lengths of pace. Obtained clear passage about 350 M out. Fought on under pressure without quickening.
Raced wide in forward of midfield in 4th within one and a half lengths of pace. Gained 3rd rounding home bend but not closer. Soon weakened after straightening. (Mucus.)
Jumped best, settling 3-wide just off the pace. Disputed lead rounding home bend, hitting front over 500 M out. Outsprinted by winner inside final 200 M.
Soon raced keenly in front. Still holding narrow advantage around home bend. Headed before turning for home. Weakened out of it inside final 200 M.
Travelled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Soon in rear. Trailed the field coming out of back straight. Produced good late impression inside final 300 M past beaten horses.
Settled in midfield or slightly worse on rails. Quickened well along rails in straight to take charge inside 200 M.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Settled on rails in second last of small field within 4Ls of pace. Ran home one paced under pressure.
Travelled in last few. Similar turning in. Produced good late finish inside final 200 M.
Fast into stride, worked hard to cross to lead, pressured throughout but held inside narrowly, under siege on bend weakened last 200 M when workload took toll.

Began in line, rushed forward but unable to take closer order, forced to come back in behind midfield 8Ls back 3 wide, urged along to improve on turning, couldn't find another gear and gradually weakened.
Bumped early and ended up amongst last few 12Ls off pace, saved ground on fence, helped by solid tempo on circle, made many lengths along fence to take 2nd late. Promising return.
Average break, settled 3 wide 10Ls back amongst last few, niggled along on circle, still had plenty to do turning, unable to make an impact and beaten a long way.

Amongst first few to break, challenged for front and held a slender advantage racing wide, kept pace on round circle, lead until 300 M but found nothing thereafter and dropped out tamely, hung badly. (Lame.)
Out with them, had early pace to take spot behind leaders 2Ls back, tracked solid speed throughout, struggling on turning in, gradually faded out in straight.
Lost ground on jumping, regathered to race at rear 12 or more lengths from pace, struggling to make progress running 3 wide on circle, passed a few tired runners late.
Outpaced early and drifted back to settle amongst rearward few, raced 10Ls back in mid-section, helped by pace on circle, gave a big start but warmed up last 250 M closing race off nicely.
Began well, slotted in to running line 3Ls back, had a dream run trailing eventual winner on circle, didn't dash but kept grinding away strongly for a placing. Useful debut.
Awkward to begin, crowded at 800 M losing spot and ended up 5 to 6Ls back in running line, same margin back on turning, switched out and steadily closed down middle before run ended late.
Standard jump, ridden hard from a wide alley to press on and cross to 1 out 1 back spot, had a good run thereafter, into clear on turning, ran to them easily and went on for a deserved victory.
OK to begin, took a midfield berth 6Ls from front runners, had a quiet time in mid-section, kept to fence until 300 M, closed off well before run closed at 100 M, nearest on line.
Fair break, outpaced early and raced behind midfield 8 to 9Ls back 2 wide, niggled along on circle, still well back turning in, picked up bit at 300 M and closed nicely making some late progress.
Even jump, held a position behind midfield 8Ls back on rails, and led 2 wide on circle, switched to centre in straight and did best work late to make frame.
Held a half length lead 2-wide before crossing to rails 1100 M out. Still in front turning in but soon headed.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on same pace to finish. (Mucus.)
Close up in 3rd. Led shortly after straightening. Won easily.
Trailed the field to 200 M. Finished off race well down centre of track.
Towards rear. Fought on under pressure past beaten horses late.
Stalked leader. Quickened upon straightening to hold slight chance but unable to sustain effort and swamped closing stages.
Travelled in last few. Made up good late ground inside final 200 M.
Very sluggish under pressure at start. Gradually picked up to midfield on rails before home bend. Not much to give when asked in the run home.
Travelled towards rear. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 3-back in 4th or 5th to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled on rails in midfield. Took closer order steadily rounding home bend. Just 2 back in 4th on rails turning in. Fought on under pressure to reach 2nd late.
Away well enough but unable to slot in, raced 4 wide 5Ls back without cover, did plenty of work to bend, weakened out in straight (severely lame).
Slow to begin and lost ground, urged along and ended up 5Ls back on rails, enjoyed soft trip to turn, made some progress before being checked at 200 M, too late to recover.
Amongst first to break, pressured and took up running past 1000 M, set an even tempo to bend, 1L clear turning, soon collared and weakened tamely in run to line.
Standard jump, settled in 2 wide line 4 to 5Ls back in midfield, not used in mid-section, inside winner on bend, amongst horses to 250 M when tightened, closed well when clear last furlong.
Away in line, drifted back to midfield from a wide alley, 5 to 6Ls back 3 wide with cover, had a good trail in, 4 wide turning, accelerated nicely to hit lead at 150 M and power away for a soft win.
Out with rest, took closer order racing outside leader, relaxed well and no more than 1/2L back throughout, challenged turning, unable to sustain effort last 200 M.
No pace from outset, took a position 3 wide without cover in midfield, raced 3Ls back and was difficult to settle in mid-section, close enough turning but just produced a one paced finish.
No early pace, ended up at rear as expected 8Ls back on rails, spent nothing throughout, well back on turning, only held ground in straight.
Ordinary break, mustered to sit more prominently 2Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled well and close enough in 4th turning, took over at 300 M but couldn't hold off challengers weakening last bit.
Out in line, drifted back from a wide gate to be 7 to 8Ls back in last trio, covered ground with a trail throughout, well back turning, steadily progressed and did best work late to make frame.

Began fairly, showed enough to hold spot 3Ls back on rails, had a dream run in mid-section not using much to bend, made even ground before racing tight at 200 M, closed off reasonably thereafter. (Injured right hind.)
Fast into stride, led early but handed up after short distance, had easy time behind leader to bend, run opened at 300 M but couldn't dash and just plugged away in finish.

Little pace from gates, raced behind midfield 6Ls back in 2 wide line, travelled sweetly through middle stages, same margin back on turning, hung in straight, progressed well under hands and heels. (See Racing Incidents.)
Allowed to drop back from outside draw, raced 7 to 8Ls back in running line, not asked in mid-section, last on turning switching 4 wide, made good ground down centre to be nearest on line.
Travelled 2-wide in 4th within 3Ls of pace early. Commenced run rounding home bend and was 3-wide in 3rd turning for home. Improved to as close as 3/4L in 3rd inside 200 M. Tightened over 100 M out.
Close up settling one out one back in 2nd. Similar turning in. Kept on under pressure before failing to hold ground passing 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Quickened into straight and ran on well down centre of track to assert authority 100 M out.
Slightly slow out, travelling at the back. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Raced 3-wide just behind midfield. Took closer order around Rock. Worked home one-paced under pressure from midfield into straight.
Jumped in air and slightly slow out. Travelled in rear to straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Close up holding rails run early. Steadied to race with cover 1200 M out, travelling some 2Ls back down far side. Similar turning in but weakened under pressure. (Mucus.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well, settling on rails just worse than midfield. Baulked for a run 200 M out. No further impression nearing finish.
Soon took up running and crossed to rails at stables bend. Failed to hold place under pressure and headed 100 M out.
Raced behind midfield along the fence, made nice ground early in the straight, got into traffic problems over the final furlongs. Not properly tested.
Throughout the race, travelled wide without cover in a midfield position, closed at same pace.
Parked behind the speed, 1 off, battled on in the straight.
Crossed to inside the speed after the 700 M. Kicked after turning for home and found extra under pressure at the business end.
Settled 3 back along the fence, railed up in the straight and held ground in the run to the line.
Settled towards the rear of the field, came wide turning for home, failed to run on.
Took up midfield position, 1 off with cover, weakened inside the 250 M. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame morning after.)
Hampered soon after the start and settled back in the field. Closed off strongly down the outside.
Vigorously ridden in the early stages to go forward from a wide alley to take up the lead. Handed up that position near the 650 M, couldn't match the winner in the run home.
Raced midfield on the fence, made good ground in the straight.
Raced in last position, struggled for most of the trip.
Settled midfield, 2-wide with cover, worked to the post soundly.
Jumped awkwardly and then was checked to the rear shortly after. Raced towards the back and trailed field into home straight. Made up ground by running past tired runners.

Led briefly at the start and then slipped back gradually to settle on the fence at midfield. Caught behind slow traffic and shuffled to rear section making home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight but had trouble finding a clear run.
Raced wide in a forward position before rolling to the lead 1200 M out. Held a slim advantage leading into the home straight but weakened thereafter. Overraced and didn't handle trip.
Off slowly and settled at the back. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Staged a late rally and was closest at the line.
Under the whip to obtain a forward spot. Settled behind the pace from 1200 M onwards. Remained in a prominent spot behind the lead turning for home but unable to find much in the straight.
Tracked leader in a 2-wide position. Improved gradually making home turn and took the lead shortly after straightening. Headed by winner 200 M out and kept on fairly for a minor placing.

Niggled along early stages to move into a 2-wide position better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader back straight. Lacked the needed response when asked turning for home and weakened final stages.
Settled in rear section. Improved to midfield in a 4-wide spot at the home turn. Ran home strongly and just failed to catch winner. Clear of rest.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Made a move 500 M out and advanced to be 3-wide among leaders turning for home. Took the lead final 200 M and found enough in the closing stages to hold off challenger.
Settled on the fence and no better than midfield. Switched out to a 3-wide spot and ridden along making home turn. Kept on without threatening.
Checked at start and soon one from the rear about 8Ls off the pace, no closer on straightening, flat effort.
Caught 5-wide no cover early, 5Ls back with cover in midfield at the 600 M, never landed a blow.
Crossed from wide gate to fence, keen and steadied at 600 M when about 6Ls back at the 600 M, made some stealthy late ground, nearest at finish.
Checked early on and never any better than 7Ls off pace in rear throughout, tame performance.
Crossed from widest gate to lead by 2Ls on fence at 800 M, headed at top of home straight and faded.
