A touch slow to start and checked early, 3-back on fence 4Ls off pace turning for home, never really threatened to place.
4Ls back in 5th at halfway with cover, never likely to improve much more.
4Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls down swinging for home in same position, outlasted for quinella but ran a comfortable 3rd.
Away well, handed up early advantage to sit 2Ls in 2nd at 800 M, led at top of home straight, stayed on well for commanding win.
Slowest away and lost 3Ls at start, always well back and 8Ls off speed at final turn, no impression.
3-wide no cover at the 800 M, headway to be 2Ls back in 4th off final bend, stayed on for 2nd but never got to grips with the winner.
About 7Ls back in 9th at the 800 M and not a great deal closer on straightening, kept on one-paced.
Towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls back until straightening when ridden along, always outpaced.
Best away and led by 2Ls on fence 900 M out, 1L clear taking home turn, headed by winner at the 50 M, stayed on well for 2nd.
3-wide without cover about half a length off the early pace, still 3-wide no cover and 1L down in 3rd making home turn, beaten 200 M out.
Crossed from wide gate to be 6Ls or 7Ls last until home turn, ran on fairly late through beaten rivals.
2-wide with cover about 1L off pace until home turn, had every hope but wavered 200 M out and weakened close home.
Midfield about 3Ls off pace early on and similar turning for home, disappointing under pressure and soon beaten.

Crowded at start, enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to final turn, every chance when 1L back in 2nd at 200 M, one-paced late, tight for room final strides and lost 4th.
Slow to start, felt for when 5Ls back in 10th on fence at 700 M, checked soon afterwards, 4Ls down in 8th off final turn, ran on well along the inside for a place.
Worse than midfield with cover about 5Ls behind leader until home turn, slightly inconvenienced 100 M out but never dangerous in any case.
Slowest away, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in mid-division until home turn, briefly pocketed 200 M out when 2Ls down, quickened once clear to lead 50 M out, value for a greater margin.
4-wide without cover when 3Ls back in 6th at the 800 M, 4-wide (widest of all) turning for home, entitled to cede more ground than he did in the finish after the tough trip.
Taken back to lie 7Ls off pace in 11th at halfway, made eyecatching late ground to be nearest at the finish.
Eased back but failed to get across to the rails, 6Ls off the good pace 3-wide, no dash in straight.
Pushed to get across in front and led along the fence by 1L with good pace, hung on until 150 M when overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Eased early and soon took rail about midfield, 4Ls off the good pace, crowded 600 M, just held ground on the inside part of the home straight.
Eased at start to cross the rail towards the rear, 8Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot in final section. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow away, soon at back, 6Ls off the good pace 2-wide, swept forward 3-wide on straightening, drifted out but progressed steadily last 250 M on the outer part of the track.
Pushed to sit 1-1/2Ls off the good tempo, travelled well 2-wide throughout, however showed nothing and flattened in straight.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 1Ls off the good pace 2-wide, travelled nicely, closed the race off strongly to win without threats.
Settled nicely in box seat, 2Ls off the good pace, no turn of foot early in straight, green and only made up some ground late 100 M to finish 2nd.
Pushed forward to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the good tempo, trapped 3 to 4-wide throughout, ran on ok in final stages despite covering so much ground on the bend.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4.5Ls off the good tempo, trapped 3 to 4 wide throughout and covered too much ground, flattened in straight.
Eased to sit just better than midfield, 3Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, hung in on several occasions and never accelerated, weakened 250 M.
Eased back, 6Ls off the good pace along the fence, never progressed.
Raced wide in rear of bunched field. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight without quickening.
Slightly slow into stride. Soon niggled at and settled in rear of mid-division. Similar turning in and continued to make steady headway between runners down straight. Never nearer.
Prominent and wide early. Improved to gain narrow lead from Rock. Worn down by fast-finishing winner over 150 M out.
Raced wide in midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Broke well. Niggled along to hold early pace. Settled one out one back in 3rd or 4th. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced.
Settled behind midfield on rails. Saved ground on inside turning in straightening a 2L 6th. Sustained progress down inner of straight to reach 2nd late without matching winner.
Began well, then settled one back on rails within 2Ls of pace. Shifted out for a run turning in and responded well to take charge over 150 M out.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend and very wide in close-up 3rd turning in. Weakened under pressure inside 200 M.
Held narrow advantage on rails early. Headed at Rock and travelled a close 2nd to 200 M when weakened under pressure.
Midfield early. Lost position 800 M out. Regained midfield but very wide turning in. Made moderate headway down straight without threatening.
Raced widest of all throughout. Behind midfield most of way. Kept on well down centre of straight.
Soon dropped to rear. Tailed off far side. Picked up to rear of field turning in. Produced good late impression under pressure late.
Taken back from a wide alley, raced on rails at tail 8Ls away from front runners, harmed by slow pace, gave a big start on bend, couldn't make an impression in straight.

No speed from outset, raced amongst last few 6Ls back on rails, not used in middle stages, not helped by tempo and saved ground on rails throughout, made some late ground along fence from impossible spot.

Away well, able to hold leaders back despite check, had run of race thereafter, not asked in middle stages, right there turning and took run on inside but lacked turn of foot just holding ground in run to line.
Fair to begin, angled across to rails to race 3Ls off pace, had soft trip in mid-section, not asked with slow pace on, same margin back turning, gained split at 150 M charging late to score narrowly.
Even jump, held a forward spot 1 out 1 back just off pace, used little in mid-section with slow pace, peeled out turning and looked the winner but went down in 3 way go.
Bounced out, had more pace than usual and led them leaving straight, set a leisurely tempo controlling race to bend, kicked length clear turning, just caught on line.
Standard jump, couldn't get closer and ended up in midfield running line 4-5Ls back, not helped by tempo, urged along on bend, gradually made ground without threatening.
Out well, taken back when posted wide, raced 8Ls back at rear in running line, not helped by slow pace, had field on front on bend, unable to get closer.
Dropped to a rearward spot soon after start, raced 6Ls back in 2-wide line, had easy time to circle, well back on turning, closed off evenly under hands and heels. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well enough to begin, unable to slot in, forced to race 3-wide without cover 5Ls off pace, harmed by slow tempo, 3Ls down turning, made some progress down middle at an even rate.
Began nicely, took up role outside leader, not used 1/2L back with slow pace, had easy time to bend, right in action turning, condition gave out last 100 M.
Began with rest, drifted back from a wide alley, raced 3-wide with cover 6Ls from leaders, disadvantaged by tempo, switched wide turning in, made limited progress in straight.
Moderate jump, driven up to race 3 wide in midfield, had tough run without cover throughout, niggled along on bend, 2 to 3Ls down turning but soon weakened in straight.
Began with them, showed pace to race more prominently outside leader, did share of work overracing to bend with pace on, challenged into straight, led from 300 M, kicked but no match for winner late.
Broke fairly, amongst rearward division, raced 5Ls back on fence, saved ground on bend, same margin back turning, lacked a finish.
No real pace, raced behind midfield 6Ls back in 2 wide line, niggled on circled, no real run on just battled at same pace. Heart irregularity.
Even break, took up prime position 1 out 1 back 3Ls back, tracked nicely on bend, brought with run at right time and looked a chance at 300 M but run ended late.
Slowly away, failed to muster, caught up at 1000 M and suited by solid tempo thereafter, 6Ls down turning, switched to middle and closed hard, taking over at 200 M to score with ease.
Amongst first to jump, had pace and took up lead, set a solid tempo throughout, 1/2L clear on turning, gave up easily when challenged and weakened from 200 M.
First away, took spot behind leader, had even run but didn't have an easy time with pace on, right there but held up to 300 M, closed race off fairly when clear.
Away with rest, lacked early dash and raced 5Ls back in running line, same margin back turning, only battled in straight.
Standard jump, ended up 7Ls back on rails sharing rear, always well down, struggling on bend and dropped out tamely.
Raced midfield, 1 off with cover, peaked on its run inside the 100 M.
Went to the front early, however surrendered the lead after the 900 M, racing 1 off, 3/4 of a length back. Rolled to the front passing the 400 M and scored narrowly.
Slow to begin and raced behind midfield along the fence. Took inside runs in the straight, closed off well only to come up marginally short.
Began only fairly and settled in the last position. Came widest in the straight and ran on soundly.
Raced about 5L back on the fence, improved nicely after the 600 M, tracked the leaders turning for home, but was held up from the 400 M to 200 M. Finished off satisfactorily.
Took up leading duties after the 900 M, overhauled passing the 400 M, stuck to task gamely.
Travelled midfield, 2 wide with cover, stayed on one paced in the straight.
Settled back in the field and ran on nicely.
Throughout the race travelled 3 wide without cover, midfield. Never likely.
Ridden back in 2nd last position. Struggled in the run home. (To Trial.)
Ridden along out of the gates and took the lead entering 1st turn. Held a slight advantage turning for home. Kept on gamely in the straight and maintained that lead to the line. (Dropped whip.)
Raced in a prominent spot behind the pace. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to take ground off the pacesetters.
Raced along the rails and was no better than midfield. Kept on steadily in the straight and ran past some tiring runners.
Settled towards the rear. Ridden along but lacked a response making home turn. Kept same pace in the straight and only ran past a tired runner.
Caught wide into 1st turn and had to settle for a rearward spot. Trailed field into home straight and found nothing thereafter.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Kept pace when being ridden along rounding home turn. Continued only fairly in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. 4-wide and was ridden along turning for home. Remained on same pace after straightening and weakened final stages.
2-wide and raced alongside the eventual winner in the lead. Kept pace with eventual winner after straightening but just couldn't find enough to run it down in the closing stages.

Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. Made up ground rounding home turn and was 4-wide among leaders on straightening. Kept chasing for the lead but unable to find extra to take ground off early leaders.
2-wide better than midfield. Unable to pick up when asked 400 M out and weakened shortly after straightening.
Raced wide and without cover in midfield. Advanced to a forward position 1000 M out but remained wide. A length off the pace turning for home but dropped out soon after.
Settled in rear section. Quickened well after finding a clear path final 350 M. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Closed the race off with a strong rally and threatened top pair at the finish.
Ridden along to hold a 3-back-on-fence position 4Ls off pace at the 1000 M, shuffled back a little turning for home, always well outpaced.
With cover better than midfield about 3Ls off speed through to homestretch when briefly short of room, finished one- paced for a place.
Always under pressure in rear, in 11th about 7Ls behind at the 800 M, never got a great deal closer.
Lost ground at start and always in rear, never any better than 6Ls from the leader, very wide 600 M out, very weak effort.
Always off the bridle, 5Ls worse than midfield at the 800 M, hard ridden to try and improve turning for home, never likely.
4Ls off pace with cover early on before being trapped out 3-wide no cover at 700 M, 2Ls down in 3rd out wide into stretch, tired inside latter stages.
Slowest away and switched from wide gate to fence to race 7Ls last, hung out making final turn when 6Ls back in 10th, finished off out widest of all, no danger.
Away well and adopted customary front-running position, 1L clear on fence from 800 M to home turn, headed 300 M out and run out of the money final 100 M.
Trapped very wide without cover always, 5-wide early on about 4Ls off speed, same margin back but still posted deep on straightening, yielded ground.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until home turn, had little hope with the winner but ran on well enough for 2nd.
Led early stages out 3-wide no cover, settled 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, led 300 M out, stayed on strongly for comfortable win.
Caught about 3 and 4-wide throughout but mostly with cover in midfield about 4Ls from the front until halfway, beaten when squeezed for room 250 M out, eased close home.
Prominent within 2Ls of the speed but 2 and 3-wide without cover down back straight, 3Ls down in 3rd turning for home, faded out one-paced.
Slowly away, 4Ls back in midfield along the inner at the 800 M, struggling to lie up making final bend, very weak finish.
Always towards rear, 6Ls off pace in 11th with cover at halfway, further back on straightening, never dangerous.
Slowest away, towards rear and 7Ls behind leader at halfway, never on terms in the home straight.
Switched from widest gate to fence to settle 8Ls last at 900 M, tight for room at 600 M and still a fair way back off home bend, retrieved some late ground, checked final strides.
Ridden along to race 6Ls back in 10th on fence at the 800 M, losing further ground making home turn, no impression.
Worse than midfield out 3-wide but with cover 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, same margin back when 4-wide swinging for home, finished impressively out wide to lead inside final 50 M.
Never a factor, 7Ls off pace one from rear at the 800 M, tracking winner when 8Ls down on straightening, lacked any kind of acceleration.
In 4th or 5th with cover between 2Ls and 3Ls from the front until home turn, given every hope to figure in the quinella but failed to quicken sufficiently.
Over-raced with head up early on, prominent about 3Ls off pace at halfway but hard pressed to maintain this proximity at final turn, fizzled out.
Soon led on fence by 1L, set a solid tempo until home straight, grabbed by winner about 50 M out, well clear of 3rd home, creditable run.
Held box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M, going well when 1L back in 2nd at top of straight, didn't find much under pressure and missed a place final 50 M.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls off speed at midfield, lost position on the circle and 6Ls down in 8th off final turn, made only minor late ground out-wide.
Always very wide without cover, 5-wide no cover early, 4-wide no cover when 3Ls back in 5th or so at 800 M, under pressure when 5Ls down into straight, tired close home.
Eased to get cover and sit behind the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the good tempo 2-wide, going fairly when checked severely 300 M and flattened afterwards, not tested.
Lacked early speed to compete for the lead, settled just better than midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, made ground last 250 M to be nearest on line.
Eased to sit worst than midfield, 6Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to finish a very close 2nd just beaten by a short head.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace along the fence, checked 700 M, lacked turn of foot in top straight, only made up some ground last 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, travelled nicely on the bridle, 4-1/2Ls off the good tempo, finished off only fairly over final stages.
Bumped start, ridden vigorously throughout but never muster speed, trapped 4-wide at bends and lost too much ground, never better than midfield.
Took rail and led easily by 1-1/2Ls at good tempo, only little pressure throughout, hung on until last 2 strides overhauled, just beaten by a neck in 3rd.
Hard ridden to obtain the box seat, travelled comfortably with the good pace, made the move 400 M and closed the race off strongly, close up a neck behind in 4th.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3-1/2Ls off the good tempo 3-wide, no turn of foot in last quarter, just held ground.
Lacked early speed as usual, 7-1/2Ls off the good pace at the tail 2-wide, checked 700 M, swept forwards 4-wide on straightening and tried to get closer, however never progressed.
Awkward away, but soon settled 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, quickly out of fuel at 300 M and shifted ground whilst weakening.
Eased to rear, 8Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3-5 wide and lost too much ground at bends, made ground steadily 300 M with the eventual winner, however run ended 100 M.
Eased to sit about midfield on the rails, 5Ls behind the good pace, ran on ok in straight.

Jumped far better than previous outings, pushed early to keep close to midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout, dashed strongly 300 M to score a narrow win despite losing ground on bends.
Began fairly, settling in rear of midfield of small field. Shifted out for a run when 7th into straight. Ran on gamely under hands and heels riding to assert final strides.
Worked his way 3-wide to prominent position early, disputing lead briefly over 1000 M out. Still 3 deep in 1L 3rd turning for home but soon weakened.
Settled in rear. Raced awkwardly coming out of back straight. Still in rear turning in. Produced modest late impression closing stages.
Broke well. Soon crossed to rails to hold narrow lead. Kicked 2Ls clear shortly after straightening, only to be worn down close to home.
Travelled in midfield far side. Lost position noticeably coming out of back straight. Made no further impression.
Never far off in 4th or 5th on rails. Gained 2nd and still 2Ls behind when runners weakened upon straightening. Kept on well to finish.
Began well. Taken back to race wide keenly in 4th or 5th. Similar turning in but unable to quicken under pressure and only kept on steadily to the line.
Began fairly, settling in last few. Dropped to last rounding home bend. Finished off race strongly inside final 250 M.
Settled in rear on rails. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Over 3Ls back in 6th turning in. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began fairly, niggling along to get to one out one back position early. Similar turning in but dropped out tamely shortly after straightening. (Mucus.)

First to hit ground, took up ideal position on leaders back, travelled well in mid-section, right there turning, held up and only gained split at 200 M and closed nicely last bit. Solid return from long time off.
Ordinary jump, posted 5 wide without cover 6Ls off pace, set on impossible task covering too much ground throughout, widest turning and in impossible spot but still made some progress. Forget run.
Fast away, took a prominent spot outside leader, raced on level terms and travelled strongly throughout, hit front passing 250 M, kept on well to score a solid win.
Even getaway, held a midfield role 4Ls back on rails, had easy run in mid-section, in behind horses turning in, kept on at same pace along inside to be not too far away at finish.

Began well, raced 3 wide without cover close to lead, applied some pressure in mid-section striding to leaders, did work to turn, right there at 350 M but couldn't go on last 200 M when workload took toll.
Reasonable jump, ended up in midfield 4Ls away in running line, not used on mid-section, back between horses on bend, made some late progress in straight at same pace.
Showed good pace and driven hard to find front, rolled along at an even pace with pressure from outside, shaded on turning, there to 200 M but couldn't match them late.
Out with rest, ended up near to tail as usual 5 to 6Ls off speed, well back on bend, in traffic to 200 M, made many lengths last furlong closing best of rest. Big finish.
Out with rest, pressed on to take closer order raced 1 out 1 back but overraced in mid-section, switched out turning, within a length at 200 M, but just peaked on run and held margin in finish.
Standard beginning, raced 3 wide in midfield with cover, 4Ls back rounding bend, switched very wide on bend, closed steadily down centre without threatening.
No pace, regathered to race 6Ls back on fence, lost ground at 1000 M, a clear last on bend, found little in run to line passing only a tired runner.
Began in line, posted 4 wide without cover from an awkward alley, used plenty in middle stages, niggled on turning, weakened out noticeably from the 300 M.
Standard getaway, raced on rails behind midfield 6Ls from pace, not set a task in middle stages, saved ground on bend, closed only at same pace.
Standard jump and taken back to race in rearward division, 2 to 3 wide, 5Ls off pace in middle stages well back and bumped on straightening, one paced over concluding stages.
Did not jump well and travelled at the back. Did not find much room early in straight. Produced some late impression final 200 M.
Stalked leaders to straight. Steadied between leaders upon straightening before hitting front under pressure over 200 M out. Soon swamped when unable to sustain effort a few strides late.
Settled wide in midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and responded well to take charge over 150 M out.
Soon took up running and made most to 250 M. Dropped out tamely.
Raced wide in rear of field after beginning from poor draw. Ran on stoutly under pressure down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up ealry. Dropped out from 700 M. (Dynamic pharyngeal collapse.)
Wide in midfield. Worked his way up to share the pace rounding home bend. Kept on before weakening badly inside 300 M. (Saddle shifted early in straight.)
Raced wide in prominent position after beginning from poor draw. Similar turning in then gradually weakened.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Travelled on rails towards rear. Did not find much room early in straight and checked over 200 M out. Took late to make any impression inside final 200 M.
Not far off within 3Ls of pace mostly in 5th far side. Similar turning in only to be overhauled inside final 200 M.
Raced wide towards rear. Ran on quite well down centre of straight to do best work at finish.
Ridden to keep pace in midfield on rails. Remained same turning in but found no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear dropping to last coming out of back straight. Baulked for a run early on before taking a tight gap over 200 M out. Finished off race well.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Not much room behind runners early in straight. Ran on well inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well, pressed on and raced 3 wide outside the leaders, did plenty of work without cover for journey, began to struggle turning, dropped out easily. (Irregular heart beat and bled.)
Moderate jump, raced behind midfield 2 or 3 wide. 6Ls off speed, trailed 3 wide between horses on circle, in traffic turning, warmed up last 250 M making plenty of late progress.
Began with field, couldn't get across from wide gate and posted 3 wide 2Ls back with cover, eased 4 wide turning, let down nicely and kept closing to go down by only a narrow margin.
Checked early and lost valuable ground, raced at tail 10Ls back, circled field on bend, from 600 M, came widest into straight, made some progress but set an impossible task.
Ordinary jump, settled amongst last few 7 to 8Ls back on rails, eased 2 wide on circle, still well back on bend, made plenty of ground between horses in straight to be nearest on line.
Fair to jump, raced in midfield on rails 5 to 6Ls back, had a quiet time throughout, saved ground on bend, just produced a one-paced effort in straight.
Began with them but caught out from a wide alley, posted 3 and 4 wide without cover 5Ls back, did plenty of work in run, niggled turning, faded out easily.
Fast jumpout, took a trail and ended up 3Ls back in midfield on fence, not asked in mid-section, tracked nicely on bend, couldn't find daylight and only found run last 150 M when race was over.
Well enough to begin, ended up in midfield running line 3 to 4Ls back, gradually improved to be 2Ls back turning, didn't pick up but kept on evenly in run to line (steadied 100 M).
Slow to begin, raced towards rear 7 to 8Ls 2 to 3 wide, always rearward and same margin back on turning in, lacked usual finishing burst but made some late progress from an impossible spot.
Standard beginning, settled 2 wide 6Ls off frontrunners in midfield, travelled well between horses on circle, hit clear at 350 M, produced an improved effort finishing off well to make frame.
First to hit ground, ended up outside leader, pressured throughout by outside horse, right there 1/2L down turning, weakened from 250 M before checked and dropped out all together.
Away smartly, held leaders back and had an easy time in mid-section, right there on turning, steadily progressed into clear at 250 M, just ran out of condition last 100 M.
Away with rest, ridden hard to drive through and take front, travelled well setting an even speed in front, 1/2L clear turning, showed plenty of fight to hold off late challenger.
Began with them but taken back from an awkward draw, raced 6Ls back on rails, still well down on bend, in traffic early straight, closed nicely last furlong to make frame.
Showed good pace, raced outside leader applying pressure before taking over at 1000 M, kept a genuine pace on, kicked clear on turning by 1L, couldn't hold them off and plugged last 100 M.
Away with them, lacked early pace and ended up 5Ls away on rails, helped by early speed, 2-wide on bend, came with well timed run to challenge at 250 M, hit lead late and held on.
Away with them, took a spot in midfield 3Ls back on rails, had a quiet time in run, found nothing in straight making no impression.
Ordinary jump, soon at rear, raced 8Ls back in 2-wide position, aided by tempo, still well back on bend, closed nicely down outside making good late ground, set an impossible task.
Broke well, overraced and rolled forward to race outside the leader, had no rest with even pace, niggled along to challenge at 300 M, faded quickly. (Mucopus.)
Showed speed from start, held rails early but elected for trail at 1000 M, raced behind the leader thereafter, into clear at 300 M, only produced a one-paced close.
Showed little pace from gate, ended up in midfield 3 to 4Ls back in prime position but overraced in mid-section, 2Ls back turning, no run on and only plodded in straight.
Even jump, lacked pace and restrained to race in last few, raced 6Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by tempo, still well back on bend, made good late ground closing hard for a narrow defeat.
Settled near the rear of the field, ran on fairly.
Ridden prominently from an inside barrier and was joint leader racing 2-wide. Kept on running an improved race.
Shared leading duties along the fence, stayed on one-paced in the straight.
Camped in the speed but was 3-wide without cover throughout Stayed on well.
Went along whilst travelling in a forward position and was retired in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced handy to the leaders, but on two occasions was checked, stayed on soundly in the straight.
Couldn't muster speed and settled back in the field. Took inside runs to the straight and finished off well.
2-wide with cover, midfield, shifted out turning for home, never a threat.
Travelled in last position, passed one horse in the straight.
Raced midfield the fence. Pocketed soon after turning for home and was unable to secure clear running over the final furlong. Not properly tested.
Blundered badly at the start and consequently was very slow to begin. Eased down in the early stages and took no part. (See Racing Incidents.)
Box seated, peeled out into the clear after straightening, lengthened nicely to score well.
Kept within 2Ls of the pace. Made a brief dash at 200 M but unable sustain effort over closing stages. (Breathing problem, see Racing Incidents.)
Led until final 400 M. Kept on fairly despite being headed and remained on same pace to the line.
Pressed forward and raced near the pace. Assumed lead briefly at 400 M but unable to muster enough to stay in contention over the last 200 M.
Kept pace behind leaders. Stayed on well over the final stages to land a minor placing.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily over the final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the back. Gained some ground when pressured at midpoint. Ran out of steam final 200 M and weakened.
Raced near the back of the pack. Struggling to keep pace halfway through. Regained momentum in the final stages and ran past some beaten runners.
Raced by itself along the inside rail. Tired in the final 300 M.
Just off the pace. Gained lead near 300 M and kept on well over the final stages to hold off rival.
Missed the jump and raced towards the back. Made up some ground when pressured at 500 M. Unable to sustain effort 200 M and was steadied 100 M.
Raced in midfield. Found trouble in heavy traffic near 400 M and again at 150 M. Closed strongly after finding daylight and just missed catching winner.
Crowded at the start and race at about midfield until 400 M. Failed to keep pace thereafter and dropped out.
Kept pace behind leaders. Continued fairly over the final stages, steadied 150 M but unable to find extra to pose serious threat.
Travelled around midfield. Lacked the needed response and stayed on same pace to the line.
Taken back from the start, raced 9Ls off pace in 11th at halfway, 5Ls down in midfield making final turn, stayed on at the same pace out wide, nearest at finish.
4-back on fence when 5Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, 3Ls behind in mid-division into home straight, made a bid towards inside when 1L down in 4th at 200 M, outpaced by winner late.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M and not much closer on straightening, switched out to challenge at 300 M and without clear running until the 200 M, no late headway.
Settled in 12th about 10Ls off pace down the back, tight for room when about 7Ls down swinging for home, clear 300 M out and ran on strongly to lead inside final 50 M.
3-back on fence 4Ls off speed at 1200 M, 1L down in 3rd entering stretch, upsides leaders at 200 M with every chance, no extra in concluding stages.
Better than midfield but caught 3-wide without cover between 2Ls and 4Ls from the speed until the 600 M, under pressure on straightening, one-paced thereafter but not beaten far.
5Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at 1200 M, 3Ls down in midfield turning in, had his chance to place when 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, kept on at same pace.
Enjoyed an uncontested lead by 2Ls at the 1400 M, ridden along to try and kick clear entering straight, headed 350 M out and beaten 150 M out.
Caught 4-wide no cover for most of backstretch about 7Ls off pace and worse than midfield, gained cover from 900 M out, still well back into homestretch, always outpaced.
Always among front rank, 2-wide about 2Ls back in 2nd down backstretch, led about 350 M out, had every chance but one-paced late and clung onto 3rd in blanket finish.
Crossed from wide gate to race 3rd about 2Ls off pace until home turn, found no room to manoeuvre until inside final 100 M, failed to recover, unlucky not to finish plenty closer.
No early dash and settled one from rear 10Ls off pace at halfway, 7Ls down turning for home, kept on fairly well out wide, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 8th or so off home turn, stayed on only fairly but still didn't finish too far away.
Soon in last place and still with 11Ls to make up on the remainder at the 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, made some minor late ground without threatening.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd when 900 M out, 2Ls down in 2nd at homestretch entrance, failed to quicken and faded to 5th.
With cover in midfield about 3Ls off pace at halfway, hard pressed to improve when over 4Ls back on straightening, held when badly checked 200 M out, eased down.
Untidy break, a neck 2nd on fence early, box-seat position 2Ls back in 3rd from halfway to home turn, every chance of a quinella finish at 200 M, no extra late.
Crowded at start, 4-back on fence in 9th or 10th about 5Ls off pace for most of back straight, about 6Ls down entering straight, never posed much of a threat.
About 4Ls back in 8th or 9th at the 1000 M and with cover, lost this position on the side and relegated to 9Ls last off final bend, very weak finish.
Restrained towards rear about 6Ls from the front with cover, about 7Ls down in 11th at the final bend, moderate late headway down centre of the course.
Poor effort, held up in 13th about 6Ls off early pace, briefly caught 4-wide without cover at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) and a good margin back entering home straight, soon beaten.
Held up worse than midfield as usual, about 5Ls behind pace at 1000 M and much the same turning for home, made some late headway for 4th.
With cover about 3Ls behind speed in 6th at 1000 M, niggled along to improve when 4Ls down turning in, hampered at the 200 M when held, one-paced.
Last about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace down the back, same margin behind turning for home, improved to be 3Ls down in mid-division at 200 M, kept on finding, post came a few strides too soon.
Hampered at start, led on fence by about 1L from 1100 M to home turn, shot 2Ls clear at the 200 M, challenged late and only just hung on.
Mostly wide without cover throughout, 4-wide no cover when 3Ls back in 5th at halfway, yielded ground on the circle and beaten before entering home straight.
Raced prominently, 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at the 1000 M, ridden along and struggling to improve off final bend, beaten when interfered with 200 M out, eased down.
3-back the fence about 4Ls from the lead in midfield until home turn, hampered 200 M out but was well held in any case.
Hard ridden to hold the rail and shared the lead, helped by the track favouring on-pace runners, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, ran on for 3rd.
Hard ridden to press forward, trapped 4-wide throughout outside the leaders, lost too much ground at bends, dropped off 300 M.

Jumped well, had sufficient early speed to share the lead 2-wide without using much effort, suited by the track that helped front runners, lacked turn of foot in straight, ran on and held ground until 150 M when run ended.
Eased to rear, raced 3-4-wide throughout and lost ground, not suited by the track favouring front runners, never competitive.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, dashed well at 250 M to win by a narrow margin on a track that favoured front runners.
At back, 9-1/2Ls behind the leaders, raced 3-wide at bends and lost ground, not suited by the track that favouring front runners, closed well last 200 M despite all negative racing situations.
Eased to sit behind the leaders, 2-1/2Ls off the front 2-wide, travelled nicely, closed the race off strongly to finish 2nd, just beaten by a head.
Prominent early but trapped 3-wide, pushed to get closer towards the fence in front and battled for the lead, helped by the track that suits on-pace runners, however soon weakened 300 M.
Very slowly away, hard ridden immediately to obtain a midfield spot along the fence 6-1/2Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the track that helps on-pace runners, ran on ok in final stages.

Slow away, hard ridden to go forward but failed to muster speed, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, not suited by the track that helps on-pace runners, faded gradually 500 M.
Slowly away, at rear more than 11Ls off the leaders along the rails, harmed by the track that favours on-pace runners, made up some ground 200 M.
Eased at start, 8-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, little dash in straight despite not suited by the track.
Began well. Disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort inside final 400 M.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Gradually improved to midfield approaching 600 M. Baulked for a run briefly passing 400 M. Fought on gamely inside final 200 M to grab 2nd late.
Never far off, reaching 2nd briefly passing 200 M but unable to sustain effort to the line.
Never better than midfield. No extra closing stages.
Broke well. Settled in midfield on grandstand rails. Gave ground gradually after 400 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily in the run home without quickening.
Never far off and mostly in 3rd but unable to quicken to threaten throughout closing stages.
Made all. Unextended.
Broke with field. Soon dropped to last few. Made no impression after halfway mark.
No pace early, settled in last trio 2-wide 5Ls back, came 3-wide with trail on circle, widest in straight and let down with a good run but just peaked last 100 M.
Even jump, pressed on to race outside the leader shading inside horse, kept pressure on with standard speed. On level terms turning in. Couldn't dash with them late but stuck on evenly for 4th.
Standard jump, mustered to be 3 to 4Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, had something to offer saving ground to bend, didn't see daylight in straight and was not properly tested.
Even beginning, went on with it but caught 3-wide without cover 1L back, did share of work but aided by modest pace, couldn't dash when they sprinted at 300 M, dropped out easily.

Fair break, raced closer than usual, 3 to 4Ls back in 2-wide line, checked at 1200 M, between horses on circle, still without much clear running in straight however just finished at same speed when clear last furlong.
Began in line, held a prominent spot behind leader 2Ls away on rails, had soft trip thereafter, found little when sprint went on and gradually weakened in straight.
Away evenly, caught wide from an awkward draw. No better than 4-deep the trip without cover, did plenty of work to bend, soon beaten on straightening.
Out with rest, caught 3-wide 3 to 4Ls back in midfield but did have cover, travelled comfortably on turning, gradually made ground before checked at 200 M and gave in easily thereafter.
Fastest away, prominent early but took a trail 1 out 1 back, had an easy time with steady pace on, right there turning and run appeared but only managed a finish at same speed.
Away in line, pressed on and took up lead, dictated terms in front, stacked them up on bend, increased tempo, regaining lead on turning in, kicked strongly and defied all but winner.
Restrained from a wide alley, raced at rear 6Ls back on rails, disadvantaged by pace, well back turning and in traffic to 200 M, finished off well late when race was beyond reach.

Slow into stride, ended up with last few 5Ls back on rails, overraced early and not helped by slow pace, 2-wide but well back on bend, held up to 200 M, flew late to score a big win with some in reserve.
Raced very wide down far side in close-up 2nd position. Crossed to inside to race one-out-one-back around home bend. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
Settled in rear. Wide into straight. Made up good ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3Ls off the pace on rails in 4th. Moved closer rounding home bend. Came to challenge inside 300 M. Ran on well but no quite match the speed of fast-finishing winner. Narrowly missed 2nd place.
Prominent. In 3L 3rd around home bend and still prominent turning in. Kept on until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Travelled on rails in midfield. No clear passage after straightening until passing 200 M. Produced moderate late impression closing stages.
Began very slowly losing ground. Trailed the field to straight. Did not find much room early on. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M.
Broke well, settling 3-wide in midfield. Produced short-lived effort after straightening and dropped out from 200 M.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight without quickening. (Mucus.)
Settled in 5th in forward of midfield. Still some 3Ls off the lead when 7th entering home straight. Fought on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Broke well from poor draw, settling wide in just behind midfield. Commenced move upon straightening and quickened well to take charge 100 M out.
Attempted to make all. Went 1L clear into straight but unable to sustain effort and worn down closing stages.
Towards rear. Produced moderate impression passing 200 M.

Began in time, pressed on and took slot behind leader, not given a rest with solid speed on, right there but no run on turning, hit front briefly at 300 M out, lacked the dash but plugged steadily for 4th.
Began ok but couldn't get closer than 4Ls back on fence, had a good run in mid-section, had something to offer but behind tired horses turning to 200 M, finished off creditably when clear.

Restrained from outside alley, raced at rear on rails 9 to 10Ls away, helped by fast tempo, still well back approaching bend, saved ground and angled into clear at 300 M, produced a big sprint to score comfortably in finish.
Well enough to begin, went on but unable to slot in and raced 3-wide without cover 2 to 3Ls away, had a tough run on circle, struggling soon after straightening and dropped out late.
No pace early, drifted back to share rear 9 to 10 Ls back in 2-wide spot, helped by fast pace on, well back and switched widest in straight, made good late progress from an impossible spot.

Standard jump, checked at 1500 M, raced wide with cover 7 to 8Ls back, further back than usual, helped by tempo, still well back to bend, switched to middle and finished off fairly after being set a task.
Pace from outset, up challenging for front shading leader throughout, set a solid clip pressuring on circle, right there hitting front turning in, stopped quickly from 300 M.
Away reasonably, pushed on to race on the back of pace group, had an easy trip 2-wide 4 to 5Ls away, had chance when run appeared at 300 M, finished only with one speed.

Awkwardly away, mustered to slot in nicely 2Ls back in prime position, didn't have an easy time with solid pace, eased out and challenged strongly at 300 M but condition gave out quickly and knocked up.
Showed customary pace to take up running, lead them and pressed throughout at a solid tempo, shaded on turning, capitulated easily and was soundly beaten.

Lacked pace as usual, ended up in rearward division 8Ls back on rails, assisted by solid speed on at front end, saved ground on fence, in traffic at 300 M, closed nicely along fence when clear to snatch 3rd.
No pace to speak of, ended up behind midfield 3-wide 7Ls back, suited by speed on in mid-section, lacked usual sprint and found nothing in run to line. (Irregular heart beat.)
Standard break, ended up behind midfield 8Ls back on rails, not asked with fast tempo on at top end, switched wide on turning, made some steady progress down middle without looking likely.
Began evenly, outpaced and ended up in midfield 4 to 5Ls back, tracked nicely in mid-section, peeled 4-wide turning, made good run and looked chance at 200 M but couldn't match winner late.
Out with them but restrained from a wide draw, raced 3 wide at rear 6Ls back, not suited by slow pace, made a wide run on circle, run ended at 200 M.
Fair to begin, ended up 3 wide no cover 4 to 5Ls back, did share of work and crept forward 4 wide on circle, found nothing at business end, plodding to line.
Standard jump, taken back from outside alley, raced near to last 2 wide 5Ls back, not suited by speed, well back to bend, swept down middle with a big run to overhaul them and score easily.
Awkwardly away, rushed forward to take up running dictated terms in front, challenged on bend, stopped quickly, well beaten.
Away in line, landed 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race with no pace on, challenged 3 wide without cover on circle hit lead briefly at 200 M but couldn't sprint again to match winner.
Average jump but pushed on to race behind leader, not used with slow pace, right there on turning, found nothing under pressure and dropped out. (Blood in trachea.)
Bounced out, lead then with ease, elected for trail and ended up outside leader by midpoint, had good trip with lack of pace on, tackled at 300 M, one paced.
Failed to muster, ended up on rails 6Ls back at rear, not helped by tempo, in traffic on circle, still behind horses and steadied when improving at 150 M, even close to make frame.
Even jump, settled in midfield on fence, had easy trip 4Ls back, lost position on bend, made little impression in straight, just battling at same speed.
Better jump, settled a little close 4Ls away in running line, had a fair trip, behind horses on turning 2Ls back, closed evenly along inside late.
Raced midfield, but was caught wide for most of the trip, battled to the line.
Led at as even tempo, kicked clear early in the straight, only to be worn down close to the wire, whilst hanging out.
Raced at the rear of the field, 1 off with cover, closed off nicely.
Settled in last position, came wide in the straight, ran on smartly.
Settled in second position, 1 off. Had every chance but failed to capitalize.
Raced on the back of the speed, however was obliged to cover ground, 3 wide no cover after being carried out by another runner. One-paced in the straight.
Slowly away and settled back in the field, 1 off with cover. Had some difficulty obtaining clear winning near the 300 M, ran on soundly.
Raced 2 deep, midfield with cover. Failed easily after the 200 M.
Raced 3 back early improving to land on the back of the leader mid race. Peeled out near the 400 M and closed off well over the concluding stages.
Slow to begin and settled close to midfield, the fence. Made steady ground in the run to the line.
Steadily made progress along the rails and moved into a prominent spot behind the leader 1000 M out. Lacked the needed response when asked after straightening and only maintained same pace.
3-wide with cover at midfield. Ran on well in the home straight.
Settled behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight and was closest at finish.
Settled towards the rear. Trailed field at the turn and made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along behind midfield. Bumped and lost balance 600 M out and took a wide turn home. Near the back on straightening and found nothing thereafter.

3-wide among leaders early. Eased back and was no worse than midfield after 1200 M. Lost a bit of ground when awkwardly placed making home turn. Found some traffic at 300 M. Hung in over the final stages and stayed on late.
Settled in a rearward spot. Steadily made up ground in the straight.
Failed to muster early speed and raced near the back. Rallied late and made up ground in the straight.
Disputed lead before taking a sit behind the pace 1000 M out. Regained lead 300 M out and kept on well over the concluding stages to hold off late challengers.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Pressured to keep pace making the turn. Ran on steadily after straightening and made a late charge to be closest at the line.
Off slowly. Better than midfield but was wide and without cover. 3Ls off the pace turning for home but soon dropped out.
Disputed lead before shaking off stable-mate 1000 M out. In front by a length heading into home straight but unable to find more to hold advantage. Weakened final 200 M.
7Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at midpoint of race, 3Ls down in 6th at home bend, over 1L back in 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on well but never reached the winner.
Keen early on, towards rear about 6Ls off pace down back straight, not much closer on straightening, never troubled principals.
Caught 3-wide no cover early but slipped into 2-wide position about 2Ls back in 3rd at 800 M, pressed on to lead 250 M out, always doing enough to score.
Always worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace down back straight, never likely to land a blow.
Settled 8Ls off pace when one from rear at the 800 M, only marginally closer taking final bend, made only moderate late headway.
3-back on fence when 3Ls off speed in 4th at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th making home turn, no further impression until 200 M out and faded final stages.
Disputed the pace out 2-wide until home turn, a neck down in 2nd behind winner at the 200 M, tired in final stages.
Slowest away losing about 3Ls at start, 7Ls off pace on fence in 8th at the 700 M, improved to 2Ls back in 4th making home bend, stayed on at the same pace for 3rd.
Soon settled 6Ls last and further back at halfway, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 7Ls last, made no significant late headway. (See Racing Incidents.)
Disputed the pace on fence until home turn, left behind from about 300 M out.
Left 3-wide without cover at the 800 M when 4Ls off pace at the 1000 M, worse off making home turn, very one-paced.
4Ls back in 5th out 2-wide at the 800 M, left 3-wide without cover at 600 M and 4Ls down in 7th entering homestretch, stayed on at the same pace.
Worse than midfield 6Ls behind and 3-wide but with cover at 1000 M, still 5Ls down turning for home, ran on well to lead inside final strides.
4-back on fence towards rear about 6Ls from the front at the 800 M, 4Ls back in 8th turning in, short of room 200 M out, one-paced in the finish but still nearly placed.
Enjoyed the run of the race, 2Ls back in 3rd on fence at halfway, peeled out to lead 200 M out, grabbed by the winner inside final strides.
Sent on out wide early on, could only cross to lead on fence by 1L at 800 M, headed at the 200 M and tired quickly.
8Ls last at the 1000 M, still towards rear about 6Ls back making final bend, headway 2Ls back when tight for room at 200 M and again when unbalanced soon after, not fully tested.
With cover about 4Ls from lead in mid-division through to final bend, every chance of a place when 1L down at 200 M, evened out thereafter.
Close up 2Ls off pace but trapped 3-wide without cover down back straight, got in 2-wide from the 800 M to home bend when 1L back in 2nd, swamped at the 200 M.
Reluctant to load, pressed on out wide early on, caught 3-wide no cover about 3Ls back at 800 M, lost ground on the circle and finished off one-paced.
Always caught wide but mostly with cover, 4Ls back in midfield at halfway, further back and 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, always well outpaced and eased down final 100 M.
Slowest away and failed to muster any early dash, no better than 6Ls from the front until home turn when 4-wide, made no impression finishing down centre of track.
Always towards rear, raced greenly and checked to about 8Ls last at the 800 M, about 6Ls down in 13th at final turn, never on terms and eased down close home.
Best away and held early lead, niggled along at halfway when 2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th, still there within a neck of the speed at 200 M but petered out late.
3-back on fence at halfway when about 5Ls back in 8th, in 5th about 3Ls off pace entering straight, chopped out of a run from 200 M to 150 M out, not fully tested.
Slowly away, raced freely at halfway when about 5Ls back in 9th, edged a little closer on straightening and 1L down when unbalanced 150 M out, just managed 3rd.
Always prominent, 1.5Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the fast pace, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3.5Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 200 M to run 3rd.
Worse than midfield, 4Ls off the leaders, favoured by the fast pace, made ground 300 M, checked 100 M, just ran on afterwards.
Just better than midfield, 2.5Ls behind the leaders, helped by the fast tempo, but soon dropped off 300 M.
Pressured the leader throughout with fast early sectionals, led briefly 200 M, run ended 100 M.
Pushed to lead by 0.5L under pressure, not suited by the fast early sectionals, hung on until 200 M, flattened.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3.5Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, however weakened 300 M.
Awkward away, favoured by the fast tempo, never competitive at the rear.
Settled 2.5Ls behind the leaders, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M to finish 2nd.
Never competitive at the rear.
Eased back, 4.5Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast tempo, but no progress in final stages.
Eased back, 4.5Ls behind the leaders, helped by the fast pace, never progressed.
Settled 1.5Ls off the fast early sectionals, waited patiently until 250 M to close the race off strongly and scored third victory over the trip.
Just better than midfield, 3Ls behind the leaders, suited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 250 M, finished 4th, just missed 2nd by narrow margin.
Niggled along to muster pace in rear, picking up gradually to lead over 1200 M out. Still held a 1L break after straightening but soon weakened under pressure. (Mucus.)
Settled in rear of midfield most of way to straight. Raced tight between runners early in straight before steadied 200 M. No further impression closing stages.
Raced wide without cover in rear of midfield. In similar position in midfield turning in. Ran home one-paced.

Soon took up running and raced keenly. Gradually ceded advantage to SOCRATES after crossing to rails and settled better in 2nd. Angled off rails for a run upon straightening and hit front in a matter of strides. Easily.
Raced wide in prominent position. Just better than midfield in 4th rounding home bend, gaining 3rd into straight. Unable to sustain effort and swamped over 200 M out.
Settled towards rear. Raced wide without cover rounding home bend. Slightly hampered 300 M out before making up good ground down centre of straight.
Began fairly. Soon picked up to better than midfield position, gradually improving to 3rd approaching home bend. In 2L 4th turning in and fought on steadily to reach 2nd 200 M out.
Travelled in last few. Commenced run upon straightening and ran on without threatening.
Settled in rear of midfield. Steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. Last turning for home. Ran on steadily past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. In last few turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled at the back on rails. Saved ground on inside turning in. Midfield on rails when not much room early in straight. Kept on steadily without quickening inside final 300 M.
Began well, raced 2Ls back alongside eventual winner, into clear at 300 M but lacked usual turn of foot and just held ground over concluding stages.
Poor break, settled at rear on outside, urged along 6Ls back at midpoint, passed only beaten runners late.
No pace from outset, always struggling 7Ls back in last place, never got into it and finished back with tailenders.
Out nicely, raced 1L back closer to outside rail, niggled at midpoint, kept on evenly before checked at 200 M, not a factor thereafter.
Even jump, ended up in midfield 3Ls back towards middle, progressed between horses at 300 M, closed off nicely but not in same league as winner.
Began with promise, raced 1 to 2Ls back on outside rail, close enough at midpoint, didn't go on with it at business end and just kept same speed in finish.
Moderate jump, raced towards rear 5Ls off pace, in behind horses to 250 M, closed without purpose when clear last furlong.
Away fairly, raced solo along inside rail, not far away throughout, couldn't match outside horses late and never really threatened on what was the slower side of the track.
Raced amongst pack 3 to 4Ls back close to outsider rail, urged along at midpoint, did best work late finishing well for nice 3rd.
Showed customary pace to share lead, kept solid pace on throughout, tackled at 300 M, couldn't dash again but kept on evenly to make frame.
Broke well, sat 1 to 2Ls off them towards stand side. Shared lead at midpoint, took over at 300 M, had them beaten by 100 M and eased down to score a comfortable win.
Not best away, soon at rear, struggled to keep up, found nothing under pressure and weakened out late.
Away nicely, raced 1 to 2Ls off leader in centre of course without cover, didn't have enough dash to go with them at 200 M but stuck to task well nevertheless.
First to hit ground, shared lead on outside rail, began to struggle at midpoint, lacked usual finish and weakened badly last 300 M.
Settled in 4th within 3Ls of pace. Just 2Ls off turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Checked and lost position passing 1200 M. Travelled in last few to straight. Not much room early on before finishing off race strongly inside final 200 M to miss narrowly.
Began fairly, settling in midfield. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Broke well from widest draw, gradually settling in 1 out 1 back position. Came to challenge under pressure over 200 M out and hit front at 150 M. Fought on well to the line.
Soon in rear and always struggling.
Settled on rails in midfield. In 6th about 3Ls off turning in. No clear passage early in straight. Kept on well to finish.
Settled in midfield or just worse. Soon came under pressure after straightening but could make no impression in straight.
Close up early. Soon took up running, cocking his jaw as usual. Led the field around home bend and into straight but failed to quicken to resist winner's challenge inside 200 M.
Settled a 2L 3rd on rails. Caught in a box-seat after straightening. Continued to race tight between and behind runners to the line.
Raced wide in midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening before yielding near finish.
Settled at the back holding rails run. Saved ground on inside turning in. Badly bauled for a run in straight until after 200 M. Made up some late ground.
Settled just worse than midfield. Made steady headway down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well, settling wide towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Broke well, prominent early and slotted in nicely on back of speed, raced 3Ls back and tracked well to turn, took over at 350 M, kept on strongly before overhauled last 100 M.
OK jump but restrained to midfield running line, lost spot and was 8Ls back by midpoint, in amongst horses turning, gradually made ground to 200 M but was one-paced thereafter.
Well enough away, ended up in midfield 6 to 7Ls back, had an even run to bend, switched out but just battled away holding ground in stretch.
Ordinary getaway, raced at rear 10Ls back on rails, helped by tempo, still well back to bend, made limited progress in straight.
Began with first few, pressed on to race outside leader, did plenty of work with pace on 1 length down on turning, soon weakened and lost ground last 300 M.
No pace from jump, raced 3 wide without cover 8Ls back, struggling on circle, stuck on evenly in straight but failed to threaten at any stage.
Restrained from an awkward draw, ended up 2 wide 10Ls back, aided by solid pace at top end, last on turning, closed well down outside from impossible spot.
Reasonable jump, took a spot in midfield on rails 5Ls back, had a soft run, eased 2 wide on bend, made well timed run at 300 M but didn't dash and just kept grinding away for a placing.
Bumped on jumping, raced in rear division on rails 8Ls back, aided by fast tempo, steadily made ground on rails but just unable to make further in roads last 200 M.
Began well, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot, did share of work close to speed, under pressure turning, dropped out tamely.
Inconvenienced early, ended up well back, raced 8 to 9Ls away in running line, checked again at 900 M, well back on turning, switched out and did best work late to be nearest on line.
Fast into stride, took up a spot 5 to 6Ls away in mid-section, helped by solid tempo, made a 4 wide run leaving bend, just finished off at same speed to make frame.

Crowded after jump, settled in behind midfield 7Ls back on rails, aided by solid tempo, used little to bend, 3Ls back turning, hit clear at 250 M and asserted authority last 100 M to score a handy win.
Fast out, lead them with relative ease, rolled along at a solid pace with pressure from outside horse, 1 length clear turning, quickly gave in and dropped out tamely.
Even jump, ended up behind pace 3Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, progressed along rails turning in but had no dash, just held ground last 200 M.
Poor jump, ended up back with last few, raced 8Ls back with job to do, last on turning, switched to middle and made many lengths in straight to make frame.
Slow to jump, mustered to sit behind midfield on rails 5Ls back, had an easy time throughout, 4Ls down turning, eased wide and closed off best to hit lead at 100 M and score nicely.
Away well, pressed on and raced 3 to 4 wide outside leaders, had a hard run without cover, under pressure on bend, dropped out tamely.
Showed some pace from gates, assumed spot behind leader but raced 2 wide from circle, did share of work with even tempo, niggled on turning, closed only at same speed.
Away fairly, rallied to take up running as usual, rolled along at a solid tempo, kept running freely on circle, pinched a break on entering straight, run ended at 100 M.
Well enough to jump, took a role in midfield 3 to 4Ls back, raced between horses throughout, not travelling on bend, lacked usual finish and just battled in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
OK jump but lost ground shortly after, ended up 6Ls back on rails, saved ground throughout and helped by fast tempo, didn't finish race off making only moderate headway.
Fair beginning, ridden up to race 2 to 3 wide amongst pace group, did some work in run, 2Ls down turning, run ended at 250 M and one paced thereafter.
Jumped with line but steadily faded to midfield raced 5Ls back 3 wide with cover, struggling on bend, failed to find another gear and just plugged home in straight.
Moderate break, ended up 6Ls back 2 wide, not used in mid-section, still amongst last few leaving circle, steadily progressed down outside to be nearest on line.
Began with them, drifted back shortly after when outpaced, ended up 2 wide 5Ls away, helped by fast tempo, made some ground but never really threatened . (Lame day after.)
Midfield, 2 deep with cover, struggled over the concluding stages.
Raced 2nd the fence, at a good clip. Tired over the concluding stages, after heading the field early in the straight.
Led, 1 off setting an even tempo, faded quickly after turning for home.
Taken back from a wide barrier and raced in last position. Made a forward move, 3 wide after the 600 M, hit the front after the 250 M before fading on its run.
Raced 3 deep with cover, midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Raced midfild the fence, kept to the inside in the run home, but finished off one paced.
Positioned 3rd last, 1 off with cover, steadied near the 600 M, never went on.
Tracked the leader, 1 off. Took a narrow run approaching the 200 M, and under hard riding grabbed victory inside the final strides.
Began awkwardly, settling in 2nd last position, the fence. closed off well down the outside without threatening.
Parked behind the speed along the fence, gained split in the straight, looked the likely winner until the shadows of the post.
Raced on the pace, 3 wide no cover, run took its toll in the straight, weakening in the final stages.
Kept pace behind the leaders. Got a bad check at 800 M and dropped to midfield. Made a good run in the home straight and got close late despite some traffic problems.
Taken back to the fence from a wide draw. Made a ground saving trip around the turn. No luck in finding a run in the home straight and was severely checked 200 M. No chance thereafter.
3-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
Spent most of the time in rear section. Made up ground by running past beaten runners in the straight. (Bled.)

Led in the early stages. Slipped back to be racing in front of midfield after 1000 M. 2-wide and 2Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on steadily but ran into trouble 200 M out. Remained same pace thereafter.
Ridden along and was wide among leaders. 2-wide and a length off the pace making the turn. Kept strides before dropping out final 250 M.
Hard pressed from widest draw and took the lead before heading into the turn. Fought hard to keep advantage before fading out of contention final 100 M.
Jumped well but lacked speed to keep up with leaders. Raced 2-wide at midfield. Switched out for a run on straightening but only able to keep same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Steadied whilst making turn at 600 M and slipped further back. Kept on fairly after straightening but found trouble again near 200 M. Ran on but unable to threaten.
Checked a few times at the start and was playing catch-up at the turn. Last on straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Raced wide behind midfield. Hung out and swung wide on straightening. Rallied well and matched strides with eventual winner in the straight. Came up just short in its debut.
Off slowly and raced behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and swept past the field for a successful debut.
Among early leaders. Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace making home turn. Kept chasing in the straight but just couldn't muster enough to gain any ground.

Among leaders early stages. 3Ls off the pace at 800 M and steadily crept up 3-wide on turn. Within a length on straightening and ran down early leader near 100 M. Unable to find enough to hold off top pair late.
Never travelling well, ridden along when 5Ls behind in 6th at 1000 M, all out to get within 3Ls of the pace turning for home, beaten when checked at the 200 M.
Switched from widest gate to fence, 7Ls off pace in rear bunch at the 1000 M, 5Ls back in 11th taking last bend, never landed a blow.
Dragged back to race about 9Ls last in 13th with cover at 1000 M, 6Ls back and still in rear off home turn, quickened up very well to lead inside final 100 M, won with a little in hand.
4-back on rails 5Ls or 6Ls back in midfield at the 1000 M, 4Ls back about 8th swinging for home, never likely in the finish.
Soon led on fence by 1L, still holding a margin turning for home, headed inside the 200 M and one-paced closing stages.
Keen early on, enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls back in 3rd until home turn, upsides leaders at the 200 M, failed to sustain the bid and lost 2nd on the nod.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, about 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, 5-wide entering home straight when 3Ls back, soon faded and hung in under pressure.
Handy position 2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 4th down backstretch and same into home straight, found very little off the bit and beaten when hindered about 200 M out.
Messy start, a neck back in 2nd out 2-wide at 1200 M, still 2nd on straightening, yielded ground final 250 M.
Awkward break, worse than midfield 3-wide with cover about 7Ls off speed at halfway, edged closer about 4Ls into stretch and with every chance at 200 M, outpaced by winner and just held 2nd.
Slow to start, 4Ls off pace 3-back on the fence in 5th at 1100 M, ridden along to maintain this position taking final turn, plugged on home at the one pace.
8Ls last at the 1000 M and 6Ls back taking final bend, ran on past a few beaten rivals.
6Ls off the speed in midfield with cover at the 1000 M, ridden along to be about 3Ls down making final turn, weakened out inside final 200 M.
Always worse than midfield and about 7Ls adrift through first half, with 5Ls to make up on straightening, posed no danger.
3-wide no cover throughout, 6Ls back in 6th at 1400 M, 4Ls down at 800 M but lost ground on the circle and faded out from top of home straight. (Mucus.)
Keen early, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 3rd at 1400 M, advanced into 2nd at the 1000 M, 2Ls back in 2nd taking final bend but found nothing once off the bridle.
3-wide with cover when 8Ls behind speed in 9th at 1400 M, 5-wide turning for home when 6Ls off pace, made no impact.
Took very strong riding to lead 1500 M out, briefly 3Ls clear at 1200 M and 2Ls to the good off final turn, fizzled out once headed about 150 M out.
12Ls off pace in rear early when 4-wide no cover, still last at 800 M and 400 M when 8Ls down, stayed on well late to take 4th, nearest at the finish.
12Ls last on fence through early stages, 7Ls down turning for home, looked held when disappointed for running about 150 M out, eased late.
Another poor effort: 10Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, still well back when 8Ls back 7-wide (widest of all) in 13th into home straight, passed no rival and eased late.
Raced in 2nd about 3Ls off pace early on, 3Ls back in 3rd off final bend when under pressure, could only plod on at home at the one pace.
In 12th place about 9Ls behind at halfway, ridden along to take closer order from 600 M and 6-wide turning for home, responded well down centre of track and only just failed.
7Ls off pace with cover in midfield at the 1400 M, about 5Ls or 6Ls down at home straight entrance, never looked like breaking from the pack.
Travelled nicely on fence about 7Ls back in 8th at 1400 M, 4Ls down in 6th and still going well off final turn, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, all out to hang on.
Awkward break, 9Ls back in 10th on fence when 1300 M out, still with 7Ls to redress on the leader making final turn, stayed on fairly well, jockey lost whip 50 M out, nearest at finish.
Awkward break, 4Ls back in 4th on fence at the 1400 M and much the same taking home bend, kept on without quickening for 3rd.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 5th at 1400 M, about 4Ls down in mid-division taking final bend while 3-wide and ridden along always outpaced.
Eased to sit worse than midfield with cover, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader 3-wide, dropped further back 700 M, harmed by the slow tempo, never accelerated.

Pushed early to take the rail in front, then eased and settled in box seat avoiding battle for the lead, enjoyed the soft early sectionals, momentarily blocked in early straight, dashed well when clear late and won by a neck.
Bounced well, showed a lot more early speed than usual, 4-1/2Ls off the slow pace 3-wide, moved up 700 M and kept closely in touch with the front group, dashed well last 200 M to finish 3rd.
Eased back, 6Ls behind the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly from 250 M but had to be content with sharing 3rd placing.

Jumped with them but surprisingly showed very good early speed, settled 2-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide without using much, helped by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly after straightening, led briefly 150 M, overhauled.
Eased back and crossed towards the rails, 6Ls behind the leader, lacked room in early part of straight, little dash despite harmed by the slow pace.
Awkward away, eased to sit 4-1/2Ls off the leader about midfield with cover, raced very ungenerously throughout, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M but without threatening to the winner.

Awkward away, eased to sit 4Ls behind the leader along the fence, raced tight in early and middle stages, not suited by the slow pace, lacked usual strong finishing effort and only showed little dash 300 M, made some ground until 100 M.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led at slow early sectionals, hung on until 150 M when overhauled and flattened.
Eased to sit behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, slightly harmed by the slow tempo, had every chance in straight but no turn of foot, ran on fairly.
Awkward away, but soon back in midfield, 3Ls off the leader along the fence, raced keenly, not suited by the slow pace, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Eased to sit just behind the leader 2-wide, favoured by the soft early sectionals, however lacked turn of foot and just ran on very ordinarily in final stages.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader 2-wide, travelled nicely, however not suited by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, just ran on ok when clear.
Bumped start, never competitive at the rear and tailed out.
Broke well from poor draw. Soon settled at the back. Took closer order home bend. Quickened well inside final 300 M down inner of straight to take charge passing 100 M.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Gave ground from around home bend.
Failed to muster early, racing wide in midfield or worse position to straight. Towards rear turning for home. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Similar turning in when gradually shifted out for a run. Made steady progress down centre of straight without threatening.
Jumped fairly. Raced in just better than midfield in 5th or 6th. Similar turning in. Produced shortlived effort early in straight but had no more to give closing stages.
Began fairly, settling on rails just better than midfield. Gained 4th rounding home bend, however, found nothing in the run home. (Heart irregularity.)
Raced wide in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Broke well. Among leaders before settling in 2L 3rd approaching home bend. Came under pressure upon straightening but gave ground passing 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Dropped towards rear before home bend. Lost further ground in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Raced 3 or 4 wide with leaders early. Still disputed lead around home bend. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Began awkwardly but soon picked up to share pace on rails. Soon broke 2Ls clear after straightening but unable to sustain effort and worn down inside final 100 M.
In last few far side. Tailed-off from around home bend.
No speed from outset, took up spot at tail 7 to 8Ls away, disadvantaged by slow speed at top end, still last turning, made good progress down outside from an impossible spot.
Began well, had natural speed to take up running, dictated terms in front, held a 1L advantage turning, kicked strongly but just ran out of condition late to hold off challenger.
No pace from outset, raced 2 wide 8Ls back, harmed by slow pace, hampered on bend and 3 wide thereafter, set too big a task on turning, didn't close off.
Ordinary jump, raced in rear division, raced 7Ls back on fence throughout, saved ground on bend but harmed by tempo, failed to run on in straight. ("Roarer".)
Out only fairly, drifted back to race behind midfield, always 3 wide without cover, 5Ls back on bend, struggling on turning and faded out of it after covering ground.
Standard jump, lacked early speed and ended up towards rear 3 wide, raced 7Ls back and made 4 wide run on circle, progressed to 200 M before flattened.
Even break, took a midfield berth 3 to 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run, saved ground on bend, between horses turning, only managed one speed in straight. Better effort but had all favours.
Reasonable jump, ended up 4Ls back in running line. Had a soft trip but not advantaged by tempo, eased out on turning, made some solid progress without looking likely to make frame.

Jumped nicely, took up box seat on leaders back, had run of race thereafter but overraced with steady speed, angled around horses turning and lost some advantage, came again late to go down in 3 way go.
Even jump, pressed on to assume 1 out 1 back role, had a good trip 2Ls back on bend with standard pace, eased out leaving turn, couldn't match first 3 but battled on fairly nevertheless.
Amongst first to jump, pressed on and raced outside leader, had an easy time with steady tempo, a length down turning, kept to task and asserted authority late to score.
Little speed from outset, ended up 5Ls back in running line, not helped by slow pace, well back turning, into clear from 250 M and closed nicely to be nearest on line.
Out with rest, allowed to drift back to race behind midfield on rails, raced a little keen and not helped by average pace, kept to rails in straight but lacked usual finish just battling to line.
Always thereabouts travelling just behind leaders along rails. In box-seat briefly early in straight before quickening well to hit front inside 200 M but only to be caught close to home.
Well back. Made significant progress inside final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled mainly in 7th always within 3Ls of pace to straight. Badly baulked early on and eventually forced to check inside 200 M. Never recovered.
Not far off and 3-wide in 6th most of way before making home bend. Carried wider and lost position turning in. Responded well after straightening to just prevail on line.
Travelled behind midfield. Commenced move when tight between runners early in straight. Found no extra inside final 200 M.
Raced in last few. Made up good ground inside final 300 M.
Broke well from widest draw. Raced wide in prominent position. Raced one-out-one-back around home bend. Disputed lead early in straight. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Not far off to 200 M. Weakened.
Very sluggish at start. Trailed the field to straight. Not much room early on. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran wider turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Soon took up running and led to 300 M. Weakened under pressure.
Began well. Soon taken back to race wide behind midfield. Swung very wide turning for home losing ground. Ran on well down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Sluggish at start. Gradually picked up to prominent position and was 3-wide in 3rd 1000 M out. Similar rounding home bend but dropped out upon straightening.
Raced in rear of midfield on rails. Did not find much room early in straight. Ran on well inside final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Broke well but drifted back to midfield, no better than 4 wide throughout, always doing it tough without cover, widest turning, dropped out tamely in stretch.
Even getaway, ended up in midfield 4Ls back in 2 wide line, not used in mid-section, bumped on turning in, just battled away in straight.
No pace from outset, ended up 3 to 4 wide, 5Ls back in midfield, no cover from midpoint, 3Ls back turning in, looked a chance at 300 M but couldn't sustain effort late.
Restrained from outset, raced 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls back, covered ground throughout but did have a trail, 5 wide turning, did best work late and made good progress last 300 M.
Poor to begin and struggled to keep in touch early, raced 8Ls back 2 wide at tail, same margin away turning, passed a few weakening runners but set too great a task.

Away in line, pressed on and worked from a wide draw to take up running, continued to roll along to take up running, continued to roll along at a decent tempo, headed turning in, stopped quickly from 250 M when workload took toll.

First to hit ground, showed good pace to be in leading few, eventually took a sit 1 to 2Ls back 2 wide, eased out to challenge at 400 M, in mix to 200 M but couldn't dash again and only held ground in finish.
Standard jump, held spot 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed a quiet run throughout, saved ground on bend, came with a well timed run at 300 M, looked to have race won when 2Ls clear but was run down late.
Fair to jump, ended up in rear division 6Ls away on fence, helped by pace on at top end, well back on turning in, closed off only fairly but didn't lose ground in stretch.
