Little pace from outset, drove through to take midfield role 4 to 5Ls back in 2 wide line, 3 wide behind horses on circle, held up until 250 M, charged late when clear to finish a nice placing.
Out amongst last few, raced close to tail, always 6 to 7Ls back but helped by tempo, saved ground close to fence turning, progressed between horses and dashed hard last 200 M to get up in shadows.
Away nicely, showed good pace to hold leaders back, did share of work with pace on, right there on turning, took inside runs and into clear at 250 M but just peaked on run at 100 M.
Away with them, able to hold a spot behind pace 3Ls back in turning line, niggled along on circle, into clear on turning and challenged to 200 M but didn't finish off thereafter.
Standard jump, pressed on to eventually race outside leader, continued to work with speed on, took over turning for home, under seige at 200 M and weakened shortly after when workload took toll.
Taken back from gates, raced further back than usual sharing rear 14Ls from top end, well back leaving bend, made even progress from an impossible spot.

Standard jump as usual, taken back to be more than 12Ls away early, pace fair throughout, still well back to bend, angled to middle and made many lengths to overhaul them last 100 M. All out to score.
Standard jump, took up a spot 8Ls off pace, had a soft trip in mid-section, kept to rails on bend, in traffic early straight but closed only fairly when clear.
Standard jump, ended up 4 to 5Ls back in running line, not asked in mid-section, behind horses early straight, had chance but was only battling before run ended late.
Bounced out well, assumed 1 out 1 back role, enjoyed good trip, 3Ls back on turning, steadily made progress making run to 200 M but couldn't go with winner late.
Away in line, pressed on and raced 3 wide without cover 2 to 3Ls off lead, had a tough run with reasonable pace on, couldn't sustain effort turning and dropped out easily.

Fast away, took up expected role in front, worked early setting a solid tempo with pressure applied, steadied off rounding bend, 1 to 2Ls clear turning, there to 200 M but weakened quickly when petrol ran out.
Began well but taken back from a wide alley, raced 8Ls back behind midfield, helped by reasonable speed on, 2 wide 6Ls down turning, made steady progress but was on heels late although run had ended.
Away with rest, overraced and allowed to stride forward, applied pressure on leader, 1 to 2Ls down leaving bend, niggled at 300 M, didn't respond and run took toll dropping out easily thereafter.
Out well, raced behind leader but proved difficult to settle throughout, lost momentum and position rounding bend, got going again but in traffic for best part of straight. Kept giving.
Slow away, taken back to rear, overraced in mid-section more than 12Ls off pace, still well back rounding bend, made even progress in straight from too far back.
Only fairly out, taken back to race behind midfield 10Ls off pace made a 3 wide run on circle, came 5 wide in straight, only wound up last furlong closing well for 3rd.
Tardy jump, re-gathered to race 4Ls back in midfield, had easy trip on fence, saved ground on rails turning, made good progress with a checked passage and held up last 100 M. Better effort.
Even jump, ended up in midfield but unable to find cover despite doing share of work 3 wide in mid-section, 4Ls down on circle, only battled at same speed in straight.
Slow to begin, then ridden along to settle slightly worse than midfield, the fence. Finished off well despite being checked near the 50 M.
Best to begin and led early before handing up near the 1200 M and box seating on the rail. Worked to the lead near the 250 M and fought on strongly.
Slowly away, settled behind midfield 3-4 deep with cover. Ran on fairly.
Settled behind midfield, 2 wide with cover, copped a check near the 800 M. Closed off satisfactorily without threatening.
Raced 1 out, 1 back, peaked on his run after looming as a contender inside the 300 M.
Began awkwardly, lost ground and settled in last position. Took runs through the field in the straight and closed off strongly, but experienced some traffic problems over the later stages.
Settled on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover, ran on strongly.
Began only fairly, couldn't go the early speed and raced in 2nd last position. Failed to respond to pressure over the final stages and weakened noticeably. (To trial.)
Raced midfield, 4 deep no cvoer, kept on well despite tough run.
Parked midfield, the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight but didn't go on.
Settled outside the leader, weakened over the concluding stages.
Ridden along, early but didn't muster and settled along the fence near the tail of the field. Struggled in the run home.
Landed midfield, 3 wide no cover and overraced early. Remained wide for the remainder of the trip, kept on soundly.
Gave in quickly, turning for home after settling the pace.
Dropped to a rearward position. Hugged rails at home turn and made up some ground along the inside fence in the straight but gave too much a start.
Taken back from wide draw and raced in rear section until straightening. Rallied and closed the race off nicely.
Among early leaders. Took a sit towards midfield after 1000 M. Remained on same pace in the straight and faded final stages.
Behind midfield. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and remained on same pace to the line.
Raced among leaders early. Ran along the rails and better than midfield at the turn. Kept on steadily in the straight to make the frame.
Settled behind midfield. 4-wide turning for home and closed the race off with a strong rally.

Set a quick pace in front. Continued to travel nicely into the home straight. Shook off co-leader final 300 M and opened up a clear advantage. Stayed on well final stages to hold off late challengers.
Pressed forward from widest draw and raced alongside the eventual winner in the lead. Failed to keep strides final 300 M and faded gradually.
Kept within a length of the pace early stages. 3-wide without cover better than midfield making home turn. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Hung in in the straight and was steadied at 300 M. Made up a bit of late ground.
Jumped only fairly and was pushed along to be in a forward spot. 4Ls off the pace in 3rd place making the turn. Unable to turn up a notch after straightening and kept on one-paced final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Made a strong closing run between rivals and was closest at finish.
Hard ridden to be among early leaders. 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 4th making home turn. Dropped out quickly after straightening.
At the rear and struggled to keep pace. Trailed field into home straight and found nothing thereafter.
In midfield about 4Ls off pace towards far side early on, under pressure at halfway to improve, one-paced and never dangerous.
Prominent along stands rail, 2Ls back in 3rd at halfway, led inside final 200 M but soon collared by the winner.
Better than midfield throughout but never any closer than 2Ls off the lead, lost further ground final 300 M.
Away well and held prominent early position, about 3Ls back in midfield at 400 M and blocked behind a wall of horses, failed to improve once clear final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Took time to load, away well and sped about 3Ls clear at the 600 M, came back to the field about 300 M out and dropped away sharply.
Handy position in 3rd at the 600 M about 3Ls behind leader, outpaced final 400 M and no excuses.
Slowest away losing about 4Ls on the pack, always detached in rear and eased final 200 M.
Behind early, about 4Ls behind in 10th at halfway, gradually crept into the reckoning and led inside final 50 M, driven out.
Niggled along towards rear early on, about 5Ls behind at halfway, plugged on past a few tired rivals final 200 M.
Covered up in midfield about 4Ls off early speed, given every chance but no extra inside final furlong.
Lost about 3Ls after a poor break, edged over towards far rail but never better than midfield about 4Ls behind the leader, weakened final 200 M.
Slowly away but recovered to lead main bunch early on standside, kept on to lead 350 M out but headed about 200 M later, just hung onto 3rd.
Among the front rank until halfway about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace, very weak final 400 M and eased close home.
Nearer the far rail and under pressure at halfway when about 3Ls back in mid-division, faded final furlong.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at halfway and similar off final bend, found nothing off the bridle and weak through final 200 M.
Led by 1L from wide gate at 1200 M and soon crossed to fence about a neck clear turning for home but soon headed and weakened.
Best away, raced keenly 1L off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, same margin back in 3rd turning for home and all out to be a neck 2nd at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Slowest away, in rear about 5Ls off pace at the 1000 M and no closer on straightening 3-wide, stayed on fairly down centre of track, never nearer.
Slowly away and caught 4-wide without cover throughout, towards rear about 5Ls off speed at the 800 M, same when widest turning for home, no impression.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off the lead in mid-division at the 1000 M and about 3Ls down in 6th turning for home. Challenged for the lead 150 M out but couldn't sustain the run.
Caught 3-wide without cover at 1100 M and pressed on to race out 2-wide in 2nd a neck off pace from 800 M to home turn, led about 300 M out but faded fast once headed inside final 200 M.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls from the front from the 1000 M to final turn, stayed on fairly well, nearest at finish.
3-wide but with cover in midfield about 3Ls off speed until home turn, had his chance to at least place but didn't find enough under pressure.
4-back on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed down backstretch, snuck a little closer turning for home and hit the front 100 M out, ridden out.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls down in 4th at the 900 M, failed to find cover on the circle and fell away inside final 200 M.
About 9th and 4Ls or 5Ls off speed through first half, shuffled back on circle and held up 6Ls last entering home straight, stayed on well late, unlucky not to finish closer.
Eased back from a wide gate, 7Ls last at halfway when niggled along, steadily made ground but disappointed for running at 200 M, ran on well again for a place once clear.
Eased back and soon took rail, 9-1/2Ls behind the good tempo travelled nicely throughout, but only ran on fairly in final stages, very one-paced.

Jumped well, eased steadily into midfield along the fence, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace, travelled nicely until 1000 M, made efforts to keep up with the tempo, blocked 4-2, made ground when clear but couldn't run them down.
Eased early to get closer towards the rail just behind midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made ground steadily 300 M to finish 2nd, just missing by a neck.
Eased immediately after start to cross towards the rail at the rear, more than 11Ls off the good pace, picked up 300 M and kept making ground to the line, however out of fuel 100 M.

Hard ridden early to occupy a position just better than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, made a move early from 500 M, swept forward 3-wide on straightening, closed off nicely until 100 M run ended.
Pushed along to obtain a favorable spot just behind the pace group, 4Ls off the good pace on the rails, progressed steadily in straight to win by a neck. (Dropped whip.)
Pushed early but lacked speed, soon took cover worse than midfield, 8-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, had every chance at top of straight but dashed only fairly.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2-wide at good pace, under pressure in major part of race, took rail and dominated briefly from 800 M, held ground until 250 M weakened.
Pushed to obtain the box seat, 2-1/2Ls behind the good pace, swept forward 3-wide at home bend and made ground early from 600 M, ran on well in 2nd until 100 M emptied.
Eased towards the tail, more than 11Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, made ground late until 200 M, no threat to winner.
Slow away, eased back and raced along the fence, never better than midfield.
Pushed forward, 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground at bends, dropped off quickly 500 M.

Hard ridden to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, under pressure throughout, took breather from 800 M and shifted 2-wide, regained lead 300 M, hung on until 100 M when overhauled, kept finding to the line.

Failed to get cover in early stages, then was taken back to rear, 10Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide in major part of race and covered too much ground, checked 400 M, regained balanced and closed the race off strongly 200 M.
Began fairly then settled 2-wide in forward of midfield. Made modest headway in straight to narrowly miss 3rd.
Raced in last few. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and obtained clear passage over 300 M out. Ran on without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well to share the pace early. Gradually settling in 3L 2nd and remained similar to straight. Fought on until finding no extra closing stages.
Settled in distant 3rd about 5Ls off the pace. Commenced move upon straightening. Responded well inside final 250 M to take charge over 100 M out.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Made steady headway down straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced 3-wide in midfield. Lost position slightly coming out of back straight. Just worse than midfield turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced keenly towards the rear to straight. Ran on without threatening.
Held up in rear. Second last into straight. Made no impression.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Began fairly from wide draw. Settled just better than midfield in 6L 4th. Similar turning in then soon weakened. (Blood in trachea.)
Virtually last throughout.
Around midfield. Ran home one-paced. (Blood in trachea.)
Began well. Ridden to soon take up running, kicking 3Ls clear around home bend. Still clear early in straight but soon flattered and swamped over 100 M out.
Sluggish at start. Rear early. Gradually improved to rear of midfield coming out of back straight. Similar turning in. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Even break, ended up 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had easy trip using nothing to bend, saved ground on turning, held up for best part of straight, had something to offer but not fully tested.
Broke nicely, moved up to race outside leader, had ideal trip with little pace on, right there but niggled on turning, no turn of foot and dropped out tamely last 200 M.
Little early pace as usual, ended up in midfield 6Ls down on rails, chances harmed by slow pace, came 2 wide on circle, in traffic turning in, made even progress but lacked dash to be a factor.
Reasonable jump, took up a spot just off pace 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, tracked nicely on bend, didn't pick up in straight but still fought on steadily to be not far away at finish.
Showed plenty of pace to lead easily, dictated terms 1L clear, still set a steady tempo to bend, wound up from 400 M, fought on when challenged and only run down late.
Better away and raced closer than usual on leaders back, had a soft trip with moderate tempo, tracked through nicely and took run at 200 M, finished off best to score a nice win.

Well enough to begin, ended up 4 to 5Ls back in two wide line, had a fair trip but went forward 3 wide on circle, 4 wide 2Ls back turning, dashed sharply hitting front but ran out of condition and faded late.
Took a rearward role soon after start, raced 8 to 9Ls back on rails, chances spoilt by slow pace, still well down on turning, switched out and kept on fairly giving too big a start.
Out well, pushed on to race 3 wide without cover, did share of work but helped by standard pace on, edged closer on bend, 1L down entering straight, couldn't sprint and just held ground in straight.
No pace from outset, taken back to rails, raced 12 or more lengths from leaders, disadvantaged by tempo, still well down approaching bend, saved ground turning but made only limited progress.
No early toe and shared rear 12 or more lengths back, raced 2 wide throughout, well back turning, in traffic for considerable distance and only held ground when clear.

Taken back from an outside alley, raced 10Ls back in 2 wide line, not suited but moderate tempo, sent forward 4 wide from 800 M, made steady progress giving too much start to make frame. Solid return.
Standard jump, ended up behind midfield 7Ls back, harmed by slow pace, made 3 wide run at 600 M, came widest into straight, did best work late making many lengths to be not far away.
Restrained to midfield from jump. Dropped further back and still raced keenly coming out of back straight. Checked and lost position 600 M out. Produced some late impression inside final 200 M.
Settled in last few. Shifted wide onto the centre of straight for a run. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back Switched off rails for a run upon straightening but was checked about 300 M out and shifted back in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled one-out-one-back in 2L 4th. Soon came to challenge upon straightening. Improving when ducked away from whip over 150 M out. (Finished 2nd, placed 3rd.)
Raced wide in rear of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Continued to run on under pressure in straight. Improving when carried wide inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced a few times far side. Shifted wide around home bend and into straight. Fought on steadily without quickening.

Settled in 6th in forward of midfield. Unable to obtain clear run behind runners early in straight. Obtained split passing 200 M and was improving when carried outward sharply. (Finished 3rd, placed 2nd.)
Ridden to lead and made running to 400 M. Soon dropped out under pressure.
Raced on rails in rear of midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in 5th on rails within 3Ls of pace. Had to snatch up when pace slackened around home bend. Soon came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but could only produce moderate headway.
Prominent. 3-wide far side. Improved to race outside leader around home bend. Hit front briefly inside 400 M. Soon headed and weakened.
Settled one back on rails in 3rd. Soon came to challenge upon straightening and led 300 M out. Kept on well under pressure.
Settled in last few. Wide rounding home bend. Found nothing under pressure in straight. Beaten when hampered inside 200 M.
Raced wide without cover in midfield. Lost position approaching 1000 M. Made effort when widest rounding home bend. Kept on one-pace from midfield into straight.
Even getaway, raced 3 wide with cover 6Ls back, covered ground throughout, switched 4 wide turning, flattered at 200 M and just battled away thereafter.
No pace and restrained from a wide gate, back with last few, not helped by slow pace at top end, last on turning, switched out and made good progress late from too far back.

Not much early speed, ended up behind midfield in running line 5 to 6Ls back, had a fair trip between horses but not helped by pace and difficult to settle, no clear run turning for home, closed well when clear last 200 M.
Away well, took up spot on leaders back, had run of race in mid-section, right there on turning, couldn't match winner but kept on fairly to narrowly hold 2nd place.
No speed on jumping, raced 3 wide 11Ls back at rear, had cover in mid-section, went forward with trail at 600 M, 5 wide turning, run ended at 250 M and struggled thereafter.
Moderate jump, pushed up to recover in a midfield slot, had a soft trip 6Ls back on fence, saved ground on bend, made no progress in straight and just battled to line.
Began nicely, went forward to race 3 wide without cover, did share of work on circle despite slow tempo, urged along at 300 M but hard run took toll and dropped out last furlong.
Lacked early pace, settled in rear 9Ls back in 2 wide line, harmed by tempo, well back on turning in, came between horses and held up 400 to 200 M, closed off nicely when clear. Solid debut.

Restrained from start to assume usual role as a back marker, raced on rails 10 or so lengths away, made a run 5 wide from 600 M, made good ground down middle and not disgraced after giving away start.
Standard jump but drove through into prime 1 out 1 back position, had easy time throughout, into clear at 300 M and kept trying but couldn't get closer in dash to line.

First to hit ground, lead them easily in unexpected role, controlled race from outset, had 1/2L break on turning, turned race into a sprint home and let down nicely at 300 M to dash away for an easy win.
Fast away, pressed on from an outside alley to race outside leader, suited by leisurely tempo, 1/2L down turning, no dash but held ground when run ended at 200 M to make frame. (Dropped whip.)
Fair break, ended up in midfield, raced 3 wide with cover 3 to 4Ls back, came 4 wide with trail into straight, kept on evenly without looking likely, sound for covering ground.
Out with rest, took a midfield spot 3 to 4Ls back on fence, had an easy time in mid-section, saved ground on fence, lacked turn of foot but kept grinding away in run to line.
Restrained in rear bunch about 6Ls off pace until the 600 M, 3-wide swinging for home, made some fair late ground, never nearer.
Soon led on fence, always about 1L clear before turning for home, headed 150 M out and faded.
Caught 3-wide no cover when disputing very early pace, 2-wide with cover and 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at final bend, soon outpaced.
In rear 4-back on fence at 1000 M when 6Ls off speed, 4Ls behind when tight for room off home turn, making headway when steadied again at 200 M, no further progress.
Over-raced in places early, 3-wide but with cover in midfield down the back straight, held up turning for home when 3Ls down, outpaced by principals and eased late.
7Ls last at 1000 M, still at the tail 5Ls behind pace and 4-wide turning for home, stayed on strongly down centre of track for a place, improved effort.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls off pace until home turn, all out when 2Ls down in 5th or so at 200 M, tired late.
Raced freely about 5Ls off speed early on, unbalanced at 900 M when 3-wide with cover, 5-wide (widest of all) into homestretch, beaten 200 M out.
2Ls down in 3rd at 1100 M, improved to be 1L down in 2nd turning for home, led about 150 M out but collared by DAO DAO final 50 M.
Mostly 3-back on the fence about 4Ls behind lead in midfield until home turn, ran on strongly along inside rail under hand riding to lead 50 M out, nice performance.
Trapped 3-wide without cover throughout, 2Ls off pace in 4th out wide at 1000 M, ridden along to maintain this proximity taking final bend, fizzled out quickly.
Awkward break, midfield outside the winner down back straight 4Ls off pace, closer on straightening when 4-wide, 1L down with place prospects at the 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Raced just behind midfield. 3-wide rounding home bend and towards rear into straight. Made no further impression. (Mucus.)
Raced in just better than midfield. In 3L 4th far side. One-paced turning in and failed to quicken in straight.
Settled towards rear. Came to challenge upon straightening, producing good late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced mainly in midfield to 500 M. Gradually weakened under pressure.
Raced in one-out-one-back position far side. Gave ground gradually from 500 M.
Began fairly settled in 4th or 5th on rails within 3Ls of pace. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
In last few when broke down over 800 M out.
Settled in rear of midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Ridden along early and gradually took up running from wide draw. Held a 2Ls break turning in and hung on well to the line.
Very slow out. Quickly picked up to rear of field. Made gradual headway 3-wide down far side. Midfield rounding home bend and into straight. Continued to close steadily without threatening.
Trailed the field to 200 M. Only ran past well-beaten horses.
Close up, settling just off the pace on rails. Became 3rd still within 2Ls of pace turning into back straight. Failed to quicken. Similar turning for home.
Travelled wide for most of the trip, midfield no cover. Faded early in the straight.
Began awkwardly then parked behind the leader along the fence. Railed up in the straight and finished off solidly.
Slow to begin and settled in last position. Did little in the straight.
Was checked near the 900 M and settled midfield the fence. Shifted to the outside in the straight and worked to home soundly.
Slow to muster speed in the early stages, was ridden along to go forward and then travelled wide and without cover throughout in leading division. Was a spent force inside the 100 M.
Settled close to midfield further back than usual. Was Was hampered near the 600 M, ran on fairly in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Couldn't go the early speed and raced behind midfield on the rails. Had to be checked near the 600 M, peeled out turning for home and found the line well.
Raced 1 off level with the leader, stuck to task gamely over the final furlong.
Raced 3 deep midfield with cover struggled over the latter stages.
Raced 1 out 1 back, weakened in the straight. (Lame right front leg and displacement of the soft palate.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Took up leading duties and despite being pressured for the lead in the early stages, managed to maintain advantage. Kicked clear early in the straight to win nicely.
Fair to begin and settled towards the rear of the field. Made good late ground along the inside.
Pressed forward. Led under a comfortable pace back straight before being overtaken at 600 M. Lacked a response when asked to quicken and weakened after straightening.
Settled on the fence behind the pace. Caught behind slow traffic and lost ground making home turn. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was taken back to a rearward position. Near last on straightening and made up ground in the straight.
Slowly away. Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Remained on same pace in the straight and only ran past beaten runners.
Settled in rear section. Made up some ground in the straight.
Manoevered its way to the fence in the early stages and was never worse than midfield. Switched out on straightening and ran on well to the line.
Unable to muster early speed and raced at the rear. Trailed field into home straight. Made up some ground in the straight despite hitting traffic near 100 M.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Surprised others by taking off near the rock and opened up a big lead making home turn. Found enough in the final stages to seal victory.
Raced along the rails and no better than midfield. Swung out on straightening and closed the race off well.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. 3-wide turning for home and kept on steadily in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and raced 2-wide better than midfield. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Hard pressed from widest draw to take an early lead. Sat outside the pace in a 2-wide spot back straight. Hard ridden to keep up when overtaken at 600 M. Tired and dropped out final 250 M.
Settled in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls from pace with cover until straightening, ran on strongly late but winning post came a few strides too soon.
Disputed pace out 3-wide no cover at 1300 M, crossed to fence to lead by 1L at 1100 M and held a break until the final 200 M, driven out to just hang on.
4-back on fence about 5Ls off speed in 8th or so at halfway and same off last bend, made some minor late ground.
Slowest away and switched from widest gate to fence, never any better than 6Ls off pace at any stage.
Always in rear and at least 5Ls off the speed until the final 200 M, never passed more than one rival.
Mostly 3-wide with cover down the backstretch in 9th or so, 4-wide when 4Ls back in midfield turning for home, place prospects at the 200 M but no extra late.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 1100 M, still in 2nd swinging for home, swamped inside final 200 M.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls behind lead until the 600 M, unbalanced when bouncing off rail at 500 M, never troubled leaders in homestretch.
Slowly away and no early speed, in rear about 7Ls last at the 1000 M, briefly without cover at 500 M, still well back turning in, ran on fairly and never nearer.
3-wide without cover throughout, checked at 1300 M and worse than midfield over 5Ls off pace until halfway, made some headway swinging for home but one-paced in finish.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, still close up making final bend, kept on fairly for a place.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off lead in 3rd until the home turn, given every chance to at least place but lacked acceleration.
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until final turn, could only hold his ground in the finish.
2-wide and sharing the early pace, unbalanced at the 600 M and steadily lost ground, very weak final 200 M.
Worse than midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed until midway point, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in front rank at 600 M when unbalanced, yielding ground when 1L back at the final turn, weakened.
Always close up within 1L or so of the speed until the home turn, gave chase to the winner and while outpaced he comfortably held on for a place.
Disputed early speed on fence, 1L clear into home straight and same at the 200 M, all out to cling on.
Slowest away losing about 5Ls on the field, never got into the contest.
Worse than midfield throughout, 4Ls down at the 800 M and further back on straightening, switched towards centre of the track on the run-in but made no ground.
3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, no closer than 2Ls down at the final turn and 200 M, stayed on very well but just ran out of ground.
One from rear down backstretch when about 7Ls off pace, always well behind. (Lame.) (Heart Irregularity.)
Trapped 4-wide without cover while right on pace through to the 500 M, yielded ground final 400 M and eased late.
3-wide with cover throughout but close to the early pace, 2Ls down in midfield at home bend when short of room, failed to make a late impact.
Hard ridden to keep up with the pace group along the rails, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, not suited by the very fast early sectionals, held ground until 100 M flattened.
Eased at start to cross towards the rear, more than 11Ls behind the leader 2-wide, favoured by the very fast pace, made ground 200 M.
Eased back and settled along the fence, more than 10Ls off the leader, helped by the very fast pace, made ground in straight but without really threatening.
Pushed early to secure a spot just better than midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader on the rail, suited by the very fast pace, swept 2-wide at home bend, made ground steadily in straight to finish 2nd.
Hard ridden to join the pace group, 3Ls behind the leader 2-wide throughout, made ground 400 M despite not suited by the very fast early tempo, however run ended 100 M.
Pushed forward to take the rail and led at very fast early sectionals, hung out in straight as in previous outings, hung on until 150 M when totally emptied.

Eased back, 9-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, favoured by the very fast pace, however rider lost the use of his right rein for some distance in home straight, closed the raced off strongly 100 M to run a close 3rd.
Pushed to obtain a midfield position 2-wide, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, but never progressed in final stages.

Hard ridden throughout to keep up with the pace, about midfield 7-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, helped by the very fast tempo and the rails-run, progressed steadily 300 M to win by a short head.
Crossed towards the rail in front of the field easily, 2-1/2Ls behind the leader in box seat, not suited by the very fast pace, weakened 100 M.
Eased back to get closer towards the rail, more than 11Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the very fast pace, but finished the race off very ordinarily.

Eased at start to cross the fence towards the tail, more than 11Ls behind the leader, helped by the very fast tempo and the rail-run, overraced and failed to repeat its usual strong finishing efforts, only ran on fairly.
Towards rear. Hampered while straightening. Made some late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Responded well under pressure inside final 200 M to prevail by a narrow margin.
Raced mainly 3-wide without cover in 4th. Lost position turning in then soon weakened.
Always well back. Hampered coming into home straight. Made no impression.
Wide throughout. Settled behind midfield. Ran on well down centre of straight to fail narrowly.
Broke well. Held rails run in 2nd. Hit front under pressure inside 200 M only to be swamped close to home.
Settled in rear mostly 3-wide. Produced only moderate impression in straight.
Began only fairly then ridden to take up running before 1000 M bend. Crossed to rails approaching Rock and led until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Took closer order turning in. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Niggled at early, settling in forward of midfield. Gained 4th about 2Ls off the pace turning in. Faded gradually.
Failed to muster speed early racing towards rear. Made home turn awkwardly losing ground. Never recovered.
Settled in 3rd about 2Ls off the pace. Commenced move approaching home turn and caught on steadily to hold every chance only to be swamped close to home.
Bounced out, showed usual pace but unable to lead on this occasion, had run of race with slow pace, saved ground taking inside runs on bend, made steady progress to snatch 2nd late.
Showed early speed, occupied prime position 1 out 1 back on pace, had ideal trip with slow speed, close enough on bend, found little turning and just battled away in straight.
Lacked pace form outset, shared tail 8Ls back on fence, not helped by speed, attempted to get closer passing Rock, 6-wide turning, made little headway from impossible spot.
Fastest into stride, pressed on and took up running, controlled raced at a moderate tempo, held a 1/2L on bend, wound up well but lacked dash from 150 M just battling late.
Began well, took up a position 3Ls back on rails, enjoyed a soft trip with little pace on, same margin down turning, made steady progress between horses in straight to just miss 2nd.
Standard jump, raced 5Ls back on rails, had a soft run saving ground on fence but not helped by slow pace, shuffled back to bend, kept to rails but didn't get a real crack and not tested late.

Not fast away, ridden along to hold a midfield spot 3-4Ls back in running line, had an easy run, took off at Rock when pace slowed, joined leader turning and took control at 150 M, held margin for a handy win.
Little pace from outset, ended up midfield in 2-wide line 5Ls from lead, harmed by tempo, switched 3-wide on bend, steadily made ground without really threatening.
No early speed, ended up 7Ls back in running line, pace against, made 3-wide run passing Rock, well back on turning, couldn't made an impact when race turned into a sprint home.
No pace from outset, raced 2-wide 8Ls back at rear, not helped by tempo, took off before rock 3-wide, 4-wide 2Ls down turning, there to 100 M but run ended late.
Amongst first few to break, took a prominent spot outside leader, suited by slow sections mid-race, 1/2L down turning, hard ridden but failed to show much dash and kept on at same pace to make frame.
No pace from outset, ended up 6Ls back on rails, overraced with slow tempo, well back near last turn, held up to 150 M, pushed through gap and made good late progress to be not far away at finish.
Fast into stride, pressed on and did share of work to lead from a wide alley, dictated pace thereafter, held 1/2L on turning, held out to 150 M but couldn't sustain effort late and overhauled.

Lost ground at start, took up a rearward role 7Ls back on fence, harmed by slow tempo, well back on turning, made plenty of ground between horses doing best work late before running into a dead end last 50 M.

Away fairly, lacked early pace, ended up towards rear 2 wide 7Ls back, not helped by slow pace, in traffic on turning, made substantial ground in stretch to snare a close up placing. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well, didn't have pace to go on with it, travelled midfield 5 to 6Ls back in running line, not helped by tempo, back between horses on turning, made good progress when in clear last 200 M.
Ordinary jump, assumed spot at tail 9Ls from front, not helped by slow pace at top end, still rearward on turning, made no impact in straight.
Out in line, couldn't press on from a wide gate, posted 3 wide with cover 7Ls back, still well down turning, made fair progress without looking likely.

Awkwardly away and checked early, mustered to race in front of midfield on rail, 3 to 4Ls back throughout obtaining a soft run, niggled on turning, steadily made up late ground to be nearest at finish.
Lacked pace from jump but ridden up to sit just behind pace, had a fair trip 3 to 4Ls back in running line, travelled well to bend, lacked a dash in straight, battled late.
Began well, took prime position 2Ls back in running line, close enough on bend, eased out on straightening, made steady progress at same speed to go down in 3 way go.
No real early pace, ended up behind midfield, raced 3 wide with cover, pace against and did share of work to bend, kept on fairly in straight before jumping marks on track last 150 M.
Even getaway, ended up 3 wide midfield or better without cover, did share of work on circle, niggled on turning, looked a prospect until 200 M before hard run took toll.
No pace from outset, raced 6Ls back on rails, had an easy time in mid-section but disadvantaged by slow pace, kept to rails in straight but couldn't find a gap last 200 M and not properly tested.
Well enough to begin, ended up behind the leader, suited by slow tempo, eased 2 wide on bend, into clear turning in, gradually overhauled them to hit lead at 100 M and cling on for victory.

Jumped nicely, pressed on from a wide gate, assumed position outside leader, assisted when pace dropped a notch in mid-section, up challenging on turning, hit lead briefly at 150 M but couldn't dash again.
Positioned 1 off with cover in last spot. Attempted to track into the race after the 900 M but failed to run on.
Went forward early to race upsides with the leader. Couldn't maintain its position from the 800 M and gradually drifted back.

Couldn't go the early speed and settled near the rear of the field. Turning into the back straight while 3-wide, no cover, went forward to join the leader on its outside at the 800 M. Managed to out grind challengers in the run home.
Raced close to midfield, 1 off with cover before shifting to the 3-wide line and going forward near the 1000 M. Was caught wide & without cover for the remainder of the journey.
Raced at the tail of the field 2 deep with cover, was hampered near the 1200 M and did little over the final 300 M.
Led along the fence at even tempo, no excuses.
Was 3 deep with cover until slotting into 1 off passing the 1400 M. Dour when under pressure over the final stages.
Raced midfield before being shuffled back to last position along the fence near the 900 M. Was checked near the 700 M, however made fair ground over the concluding stages.
Raced 3 back along the fence peeled out on straightening, loomed as likely danger, was given every chance.
Settled in the rear division on the fence, shifted out 3 deep and went forward with cover from the 800 M, but was never likely.
Settled 2 deep midfield with cover, received a check near the 700 M when giving ground. Never a factor.
Travelled midfield the fence, copped a check near the 700 M. Made some headway early in the straight before fading on its run inside the furlong.
Parked behind the leader on the fence, struggled at the business end.
Shortly after the start was checked and stumbled when crowded. Postioned 1 off behind midfield, overraced in the early & middle stages & travelled wide and without cover from the 1100 M.
Botched the start but soon recovered to midfield. Raced on the rails and was 2Ls back turning for home. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Raced 3 wide at the rear and near last on straightening. Rallied and made up good ground in the straight.
Best out. Unable to muster enough to remain in front and gradually slipped to midfield. Ran on a bit after straightening but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Jumped only fairly but was ridden along to take the lead. Kept on fairly after straightening but was headed by eventual winner near 200 M. Lost 2nd place at the line.
Raced 3-wide without cover in a forward position. Weakened shortly after straightening.
4-wide behind midfield. Widest turning for home and kept same pace with rider adjusting stirrup after 200 M.
In rear section most of the way, trailed field into home straight and finished tailed out.
Settled in a prominent position behind the pace. Travelled nicely at the home turn. Ran down leader at 200 M and cruised home to score easily.
2-wide better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the pace making home turn. Ran on steadily in the straight but unable to pose serious threat.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Took some time to quicken after straightening and only made up some late ground.
Jumped fairly and allowed to slip back to behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip around the turn. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and remained on same pace.
Ridden along to follow the leader early stages. 2-wide and a length off the pace turning for home. Gradually faded thereafter.
Allowed to drop back from a wide draw and raced towards the rear until straightening. Took some time to find a clear run in the early part of the straight. Closed off strongly once finding daylight.
2-wide behind midfield. Switched out on straightening and closed the race off with a strong rally.
4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield at halfway, slipped back to 5Ls down entering homestretch, kept on at the same pace.
Better than midfield about 3Ls off pace down the back but left 3-wide no cover on the circle and 2Ls down in 4th off final bend, didn't find much under pressure.
Trapped 4-wide no cover throughout, about 5Ls behind pace in 10th or so at the 1000 M, widest and further back entering homestretch, made no impact.
Slowest away and 7Ls last at the 1200 M, marginally better off swinging for home straight, no impression.
Keen early on but held box-seat position on fence in 3rd from 1000 M to home turn, still with place prospects at furlong pole, faded out and no excuses.
Worse than midfield 3-wide with cover about 6Ls off pace before straightening, ran on strongly down centre of the track to lead on the line.
3-wide with cover and one from rear about 7Ls off pace through early stages, in a worse position circling for home, made some modest late ground past beaten rivals.
Took a while to muster speed but led by 1L on fence at 1000 M, held same margin 200 M out when hard ridden, foiled on the line to end up 2nd.
With cover in midfield through first half about 4Ls off pace, hung out on the circle and under pressure to improve on final corner, stayed on dourly, nearest at finish.
Settled in rear on fence about 7Ls off pace down backstretch, under pressure in same position turning for home, ran on well through the field for a place, would have won with more ground.
Prominent but 3-wide no cover early on, 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide tracking leader from 1000 M to home straight, all out in same position at the 200 M, weakened.
Worse than midfield 900 M out when niggled along about 6Ls off pace, struggling in rear making final turn, never in touch thereafter.
3-back on fence down backstretch about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield, steadily lost position from the 600 M and plugged on home without posing any danger.
Over-raced early on, 2Ls back in 4th at the 800 M and same into home straight, emptied out and eased final 100 M. (Bled.)
Caught 4-wide no cover from first bend and out on a limb for most of backstretch, 3Ls back in 5th at halfway, improved on the circle and held every chance of a place but tired final 150 M.
Switched from wide gate to fence and 10Ls last at the 1400 M, still 7Ls last off home turn, made no impression.
Enjoyed the run of the race in 4th about 2Ls off pace through to home turn, ran on well for 2nd but always held by the winner.
Caught 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, up with the early pace and 2Ls down in 3rd at halfway, all out to maintain this proximity into home straight and dropped away quickly.
Couldn't get a soft lead this time, raced 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd from 1200 M to home turn, had every chance to at least figure in the quinella but no extra final 200 M.
Handy position 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at the 1200 M, steadily lost his position and under pressure towards rear turning for home, very weak performance.
Left in a wide position without cover for majority of race, 5Ls back in midfield at the 1000 M, 4-wide no cover from the 600 M and widest on straightening when 5Ls off speed, fizzled out.
Messy start, 3-back on fence about 3Ls from the front in midfield until home turn, outpaced by principals.
4-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield from 1200 M to final turn, briefly loomed a place chance at the 300 M but couldn't follow through.
Worse than midfield on the fence about 7Ls off pace at the 1200 M, tight for room from final turn to the 200 M when about 6Ls back, steadied again soon after, never got into it.
Best away and led on fence by 1L at the 1400 M, set an even tempo and held the same break throughout, responded well to pressure in latter stages to score.
3-wide no cover early on but recovered to find a nice spot 2-wide and 3Ls off pace from halfway to find corner, didn't find anything under pressure.
3-wide with cover when worse than midfield about 5Ls off early pace, ridden along to get a little closer taking final turn but soon outpaced.
In rear group with cover about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, not much closer on straightening, plugged on home one-paced.
Easily took the box seat, checked 1000 M and then raced keenly afterwards, favoured by the slow pace, led 300 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, emptied and just missed 3rd.

Settled 1/2L away outside the leader and favoured by the soft early sectionals, travelled nicely until 600 M when hung out slightly, hung out wider on the track in straight, closed the race off strongly and just beaten in 2nd.
Slow away, but soon moved up 2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, weakened 350 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, harmed by the slow pace, dashed fairly in final stages after the very tough trip.
Eased towards the rear, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader, raced 3-5 wide, lost too much ground at bends, harmed by the slow pace, lack turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Eased to sit worst than midfield for cover, 6Ls off the leader 2-wide, lacked room 400 M, dashed strongly 200 M despite harmed by the slow pace.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader, trapped 3-4 wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, failed to demonstrate its usual strongly finishing efforts.
Settled 4Ls off the leaders 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 300 M to win by a narrow margin.

Very slow and awkwardly away, checked early, 7Ls off the leader at rear 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, tracked eventual winner top straight but no turn of foot to keep up, picked up late and dashed well 100 M.
Pushed early to hold the rail position just behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250 M to grab 3rd.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 0.5L at slow early sectionals, overhauled quickly at 300 M, flattened 100 M.
Went back as usual, 7Ls behind the leader along the fence, not suited by the slow tempo, ran flat until 150 M closed the race off strongly but too late.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, only managed to keep up a spot just behind the pace group, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace 2-wide, lacked turn of foot in straight, little dash 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield along the rails, 5Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow tempo, never accelerated and ran on fairly in straight.
Settled in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 250 M down centre of the track.
Prominent. 5th about 2-1/2Ls off the pace rounding home bend. Similar turning in and ran home one-paced.
Settled one-out-out-back in 2nd. Hit front over 200 M out and soon drew clear. Hung on well to the line.
Settled one back in 3rd on rails. Held in box-seat early in straight. Fought on steadily inside final 200 M without threatening.
Lost considerable ground at start. Trailed the field most of way.
Settled in last few. Made moderate progress under pressure inside final 200 M.
Not far off 3 wide in 4th within 2Ls of pace to straight. Came to challenge upon straightening but failed to quicken under pressure.
Very slowly away. Always struggling at the back.
Raced on rails in midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled behind midfield. Made nice headway inside final 250 M.
Settled just worse than midfield. Quickened nicely inside final 250 M and ran on to be nearest at finish. Kept finding.
Raced 3-wide in midfield after beginning from poor draw. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield early. Bauled behind horses early in straight. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Broke well to lead, holding 1L break to straight. Headed over 200 M out and gradually weakened.
Even beginning, ended up 5Ls back in running line, aided by fast tempo, back in pack on turning, made some ground to 250 M but flat thereafter.

Jumped well, restrained to find a trail but forced to race 3 to 4 wide without cover throughout, had a hard run with pace on, run took toll from 300 M and couldn't close off. Just holding ground late.
Showed pace, travelled first without cover 2 wide, didn't have an easy run with fast pace on, 2Ls down on turning, failed to respond when pressure applied and dropped out easily.
Out with line, raced 3 to 4 wide 4Ls back, working on circle and ran off on bend, took no part thereafter.
Began with them, raced 3 wide without cover 3Ls back, used up with pace on, weakened out easily on turning
Began with first few, held leaders back but raced 2Ls behind throughout with fast tempo, close enough on turning, gradually took ground off winner but didn't have any extra to get close late.
Standard jump, settled in midfield 2 wide 4 to 5Ls back, switched 3 wide on bend, same margin back on turning, made even progress in straight to make frame despite lacking usual finish.
Away well, kept close enough 1 out 1 back trailing hot speed, 3Ls down turning, eased out and closed off nicely taking plenty of ground off winner last furlong.
Standard Jump, drifted back to race behind midfield on fence 5Ls back, helped with pace on, shifted off rails turning in, didn't dash in straight and just battled away in finish.
Fastest away, crossed easily from widest alley, set swift sectionals in front, kicked 2Ls clear on turning, ran them off their legs and held on gamely despite tiring late.
Slowly away, recovered to race 3 to 4Ls back in midfield, saved ground on rails, same margin down turning, held ground at same pace in run to line.
No pace from outset, raced at rear 8Ls back, helped by solid sectionals at top end, well back on turning in, passed some tired runners in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, raced near to last 7 to 8Ls back, aided by fast pace at top end, gave a big start entering straight, made good ground last 300 M from impossible spot.
Ordinary beginning, displayed little speed and ended up 6 to 7Ls back on fence, niggled to keep up in mid-section, showed nothing in run to line.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted wide into straight and worked home steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never far off within 3Ls of pace in 5th. Gained 4th position approaching home bend and then 3rd rounding it. Ran on from 2L 3rd into straight to grab lead inside 200 M. Readily.
Began fairly then settled at the back. Still last 200 M out. Made up good ground down centre of track to do best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace early in straight before swamped inside final 200 M.
Jumped in air at start losing ground. Gradually picked up to just worse than mifield position. Improved slightly to midfield into straight when jostled between runners. Ran home one-paced.
Broke well, then settled 3-wide in better than midfield position. Still wide turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Close up early and never far off in 3-wide position to straight. Gradually faded.
Settled in last few. Ran home steadily without quickening.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Soon picked up to rear of midfield. Similar turning in when briefly baulked. Made steadily headway under pressure down inner of straight to pinch 2nd on line.
Settled on rails in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Made moderate headway closing stages without threatening.
Settled 3-wide in forward of midfield early. Lost position coming out of back straight. In rear of midfield turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Settled in 2nd one-out-one-back. Soon faded shortly after straightening.
Very slowly away and sluggish at start. Recovered to rear of field 200 M after start. Finished off race strongly despite held up briefly 150 M out.
Began fairly. Gradually improved to take up running over 1200 M out and led until headed under pressure 200 M out.
No real early pace, settled in midfield 3 wide without cover 5Ls away, did share of work with pace on, crept closer on bend, made good inroads on leaders to 100 M before run ended.
Reasonable break, pressed on and settled 4Ls back in 2 wide line, eased 3 wide at 500 M, close enough turning, couldn't dash with them from 300 M and only battled in finish.
Fairly out, ended up in midfield racing 2 wide 6Ls back, ended by fast pace, tracked up nicely on circle, made steady headway between horses in straight to make frame.
Even jump, ended up behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back on fence, overraced but spent nothing in mid-section, kept to fence in straight, weaved between horses and closed off nicely for 2nd.
No early speed, raced behind midfield 8Ls back, used nothing in run and helped by fast pace, kept to inside in straight and only warmed up last 200 M. Good for further.

Amongst first few to break, took a sit behind pace pair 3Ls away racing 2 wide, gradually got closer on circle, 3Ls down turning, cruised up to hit lead at 250 M, drew away to win with something in hand.
Lacked usual pace, ended up further back then expected 7Ls back in 2 wide line, still well down and in traffic turning, didn't really get a clear crack until race was over and finished off nicely.
No real speed, ended up 3 wide 7 to 8Ls away behind midfield, had cover and trailed well to bend, in traffic for best part of straight and lost run at 200 M, closed at one pace thereafter.
Little dash from gates, shared rear 9 to 10Ls off leaders, helped by fast pace in mid-section, still well back on turning in, passed some tired runners in run to line coming from impossible spot.
Even getaway, pushed up to race 4 to 5Ls back on rails, had ideal trip behind solid speed, kept to fence, on circle, didn't see daylight in straight and had plenty to offer but not properly tested.
Taken back from a wide gate, shared rear 10Ls away, made a 3 wide run on bend, tracked 4 wide on straightening, gradually made ground to 150 M before run ended.
Fast into stride, raced on leaders back following a solid speed, right there on turning, challenged and briefly hit front at 300 M, soon weakened when hard run took toll.
Showed plenty of pace to take up running, kept a strong tempo in mid-section, 1L clear on turning, challenged at 350 M and folded tamely to be well beaten.
Away in line, taken back from a wide gate, suited with pace on, 8Ls back on circle, well down turning and came to middle, made up plenty of ground to finish a creditable 3rd.
Settled in rear. Commenced move entering straight gaining midfield. Sustained progress down straight to reach 2nd late.
Not far off 3-wide in 6th. Raced awkwardly and slightly lost position approaching Rock. Lost further ground rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Broke well to hold narrow advantage on rails briefly, settling in 2L 4th. Took closer order turning in and fought on well to hit front 100 M out.
Raced outside leader to straight. Dropped out shortly after straightening.
With leaders. Took up running shortly after turning into back straight. Led until headed 100 M out. Found no extra and lost 2nd late.
Settled towards rear. Made modest headway in straight without threatening.
Towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Mainly in better than midfield position until finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Trailed the field to straight. Made moderate progress past beaten runners down inner of the track.
Broke well. Raced wide in prominent position. Gave ground from 400 M.
Not far off in 7th early stages. Shifted back to mid-division approaching Rock. Saved ground on inside turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Raced wide at around midfield. Gave ground into straight.
Faded inside the 100 M after leading.
Settled near the rear of the field, looked for inside runs in the straight but only battled to the post.
Raced 3-wide no cover behind the speed, weakened passing the 200 M.
Camped outside the leader and commenced to give ground quickly after the 200 M.
Shortly after the start was eased down & took no part in the race. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame morning after.)
Drifted back in the early stages to settle behind midfield on the fence. Made up good ground in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Tardy to begin and was ridden along from gate 1 to land on the back of the leader along the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight to draw away and score nicely.
Positioned 3-wide with cover, midfield. Peeled out turning for home and kept on well over the final stages.
Raced 3 back along the fence, kept to the rail in the straight but made no impression.
Raced 1 out 1 back, ranged up in the straight and looked likely threaten before ending its challenge close to the line.
Raced at the tail of the field, shifted to the outside rounding the home turn, struggled thereafter.
Ridden out of the gates from a wide draw to be in the lead or disputed lead. Continued to share lead at home turn but weakened after straightening.
Outpaced and spent most of the time at the rear playing catch-up. Near last on straightening and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Slowly away. Outpaced and was detached most of the way. Made up ground over beaten runners in the straight.
3-wide without cover in a forward spot. Kept within a length of the leaders at home turn but tired after straightening.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Took a wide turn into home straight and ran on same pace to the line.

Better than midfield and always kept within 3Ls of the pace. 2-wide and a length off the lead at home turn. Swung out on straightening and charge to the lead at 200 M. Stayed on well final stages to hold off rival.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.

Jumped well and led early stages. Took a sit behind the leader at 900 M and was boxed seated until home straight. Ran on well in the straight but just cannot find enough to run down winner final stages.
Lead or disputed lead before being headed in the final 200 M.
Off slowly and spent most of the time behind midfield. Lacked a response in the home straight.
Off slowly. 2-wide and was never better than midfield. 3Ls off the lead at home turn. Closed the race off well for a minor placing.
2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off speed around mid-division until home turn, kept on at the same pace.
Couldn't lead, sat about 1L back in 2nd on fence before disputing lead from 600 M to 200 M, forged a neck in front but thwarted last strides.
In rear bunch early, some headway when 4-wide no cover down back straight and widest (5-wide) when 3Ls off pace in midfield turning in, retreated hastily.
Crossed from widest gate to lead on fence by 1L at the 1300 M, joined from 600 M to 200 M, one-paced final closing stages and bumped by winner inside final 100 M.
3Ls off pace in 3rd about 2-wide at 1100 M, closer again turning for home and 1L down with every chance at the 200 M, no extra late.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1100 M, 1L down in 3rd making home turn, given every chance but lacked acceleration.
Raced keenly towards rear early on, looped field out wider without cover down backstretch to dispute lead at 600 M, faded out from top of home straight.
Checked soon after the start, about 6Ls off pace 2-wide in rear mostly outside eventual winner until the 600 M, made some minor late ground but never really dangerous.
Slowest away, in rear through to home straight when about 6Ls back, made some late ground through the pack, nearest at the finish.
Midfield with cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until the 600 M, always held by principals.
Held up, still one from rear and 6Ls off pace at the 600 M, 4Ls down turning for home, finished strongly along the inner to lead inside final strides.
4Ls back in 5th on fence at the 1100 M, 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, switched out wider to challenge and ran on well, nearest at finish.
Caught 3-wide no cover about 1L back in 3rd at the 1000 M, 2-wide for most of back straight and 1L down in 2nd swinging for home, soon yielded ground.
4-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 8th or so until straightening, headway until being tight for room at 200 M, ran on well again for 2nd once clear.
Trapped very wide throughout from widest gate, 5-wide no cover and prominent 1300 M out, midfield but still wide until home turn, petered out.
Drifted back towards rear and 9Ls behind at 1000 M, still well back when badly checked making final turn, no impression.
Led by 1L out 2-wide at the 1000 M, couldn't cross until the 600 M, headed at top of home straight and faded out.
2-wide and 4Ls off speed in midfield at halfway, pushed out wider to challenge 400 M and 4-wide entering homestretch, kept on to lead at the 200 M, all out to score.
Slowest to break, 7Ls last at 1200 M and still well back turning for home, never landed a blow.
Crowded at start, worse than midfield on fence about 6Ls off speed at 1000 M, about 4Ls down and 2-wide in 9th turning for home, outpaced inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd early on, 3-back on fence at the 800 M, right there with every possible hope into home straight, lacked the kick and missed a place final 50 M.
Not looking good when under pressure and 8Ls back in 10th at the 800 M, making some ground 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, stayed on strongly for a place.
Led early on by 1L on fence, handed up advantage from 1000 M to track in 2nd until home bend, led again 250 M out but soon headed and lost a place final strides.
Held a nice position 2-wide about 3Ls back in 5th until final turn, just over 1L back in 5th at the 200 M but couldn't follow through and faded, no excuses.
Eased back but still trapped 4-wide at 1st bend, 7Ls behind the leader, harmed by the slow pace, made the move 3-wide rounding the home bend, dashed strongly 250 M to finish a remarkable 3rd.
Eased to sit about midfield, trapped 5-wide at 1st bend then crossed to 2-wide, 3Ls behind the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, stayed flat until 200 M before showing some dash and making ground.

Eased at start and crossed the fence behind the field quickly, then hard ridden back in midfield, 3Ls off the leaders, helped by the rail-run but not suited by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M to score.
Hard ridden to sit half a length outside the leader, favoured by the slow early sectionals, ran on ok until 200 M flattened.

Pushed early for a more prominent spot, however checked 1st bend and lost ground, 5-1/2Ls off the leaders behind midfield along the rails, harmed by the slow pace and blocked most straight, little dash when clear late.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by half a length at advantageous slow early sectionals, hung on until 250 M overhauled and weakened steadily.
Easily joined the pace group though trapped 6-wide at 1st bend, 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, 3-wide at home bend, dropped off quickly in straight after losing too much ground at bends.

Bumped start, hard ridden but then took hold to sit behind midfield, raced keenly afterwards 4-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground at bends, harmed by the tempo, didn't run on.

Pushed early for a few strides, but soon eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leaders along the fence, not suited by the slow pace, just held ground in straight, blocked 200 M, dashed fairly when clear.
Eased at start to cross to the rails towards the rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M in between runners to make frame.
Hard ridden to hold the box seat, favoured by the slow tempo as well as the rail-run, closed the race off nicely, led 250 M, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, beaten by a neck in 2nd.
Pushed early for a prominent spot, then soon took hold to sit 2Ls off the leaders and as a consequence raced keenly, 2-wide throughout, helped by the slow tempo, however just held ground in straight.
Taken back to race with cover behind midfield early. Commenced move rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to reach 2nd late.
Chased leader in 2nd or 3rd to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Settled on rails in midfield. Similar turning in. Fought on steadily between runners to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Responded well in straight to run home strongly snatching 3rd late.
Wide towards rear to straight. Made no show.
Raced one-out-two-back in 3rd. Moved closer far side improving to one-out-one-back in 2nd rounding home bend. Hit front shortly after straightening only to be swamped 100 M out.
Midfield when carried wide by awkward runner at 1200 M bend. Continued to race wide making steady headway passing 1000 M and disputing 4th rounding home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to 2-back on rails in 4th. Remained similar to straight. Fought on steadily to hit front about 100 M out.
Settled at the back. Ran home moderately past well beaten horses.
Soon took up running and led until finding no extra 200 M out. Gradually faded.
In better than midfield in 5th when awkward shifting ground at 1200 M bend. Raced keenly in midfield before dropping to rear after straightening.

No pace from outset, assumed position towards rear of field, raced 4-5Ls back but not helped by pace, still well back to bend, saved ground and warmed up last 100 M making good ground along inside for 3rd.

Amongst first into stride, held a prominent role 1 out 1 back, travelled well camped on back of slow speed, close enough on turning, found little in run home weakening in run to line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Fair getaway, ended up 3Ls back on fence, had a quiet time on rails, followed nicely on circle, weaved between horses entering straight, finished over the top of them last 100 M to score handy win.
Bounced out well, showed usual pace to take up running, controlled race in middle stages 1L clear, lifted a notch on circle, kicked hard in straight and only collared last 100 M.
Moderately away, urged along to take closer order and travelled 3-wide 1 to 2Ls back without cover, had a tough run to bend, kept on nicely in straight to make frame.
Showed early pace to press on and assume spot outside leader, had a good run with moderate tempo, right there on turning, found little from 150 M and folded tamely.
Slow to go, couldn't lead as usual and posted 3-wide in midfield, raced 4Ls back throughout and not helped by slow pace, did share of work to bend, stick on evenly without threatening.
No pace from jump, drifted back to tail, raced 5-6Ls back in running line, harmed by slow tempo, swung wide on home turn, made only moderate progress in straight holding ground in run to line.
No real early pace, ended up in midfield running line, not really suited 4Ls back further away than usual, back in traffic on bend, progressed nicely last 150 M to be not far away at finish.
Bounced out, slotted into box seat behind leader, had ideal trip with steady tempo, travelled sweetly on turning, run opened but lacked dash to go on with it. Every chance.
Standard jump, ended up 3-wide behind midfield but ran to outside on first turn, locked jam and continued to race on outside rail. Took no part thereafter. (See Racing incidents.)
Began well, pushed on but unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover 2Ls off 2nd horse, did share of work with tearaway leader setting fast pace, capitulated badly in straight.
Moderate jump and lacked early initiative, ended up well back racing 2 wide 5Ls away in main group, helped by pace up front, switched 3 wide turning, made some progress without threatening.
Began well, took a spot on back of leader but forced to cart field up at a solid pace, closed to be right there turning, couldn't dash again and weakened out in run to line.
Away on line, faded back to midfield, raced 3 to 4Ls back on fence in rest of field, had a reasonable run with tearaway leader, eased out leaving bend, fought battle to 100 M but out paced late.

Away evenly but lacked speed to take a spot, raced near to rear 6Ls back in 2 wide line, came 3 wide passing rock, came widest in straight and made good ground down centre of track to be nearest on line.
Jumped fairly, kicked up to hold spot towards front of trailing group, travelled well in mid-section, 3Ls down on turning, no clear run until 150 M and flashed home late when race was over.

Lost ground at start, taken to rails to race 5 to 6Ls off pace, not used throughout but helped by fast pace, eased wide on turning in when split appeared, closed best to hit lead at 150 M scoring a shade easily.
Broke well enough, pressed on but posted 3 wide midfield 4Ls back in main group, covered ground and did work to bend, kept on to 150 M but just battled away late.
Showed customary speed to race first without cover, didn't have an easy time pursuing breakaway leader, struggling on bend, dropped out easily last furlong.
Away reasonably but elected to take a trail behind pace, 4Ls back on fence passing rock. trailed well turning and made some ground to 150 M but flat thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Showed pace to lead, went out 6Ls in front at a fast speed, came back to them passing rock, 1L clear leaving bend, couldn't sustain effort last 150 M.
Taken back from outset, raced at tail 7Ls behind 2nd horse, and well off tearaway leader, still well back to bend, passed only tiring runners in straight.
Began awkwardly then ridden along to park behind the speed 3-wide no cover. Covered ground turning the circle and struggled in the straight.
Began awkwardly, bounded in the air and lost ground, settling near the rear of the field. Covered for most of the trip. Came widest turning for and although inclined to hang in, closed off strongly.
Settled 1 off midfield with cover. Copped a check near the 600, and failed to finish the race off.
Settled midfield along the fence, finished off fairly while sticking to the fence in the straight.
From a wide gate got across to the fence in the early stages and went to the front before handing up the lead near the 600 M. Found plenty in the run home to gain advantage in the run to the post.
Settled 3 back along the fence, struck some interference near the 600, failed to accelerate at the business end and dropped out to finish down the track.
Worked to the lead approaching the 600 and found the fence. Overhauled near the 200 M, and faded on its run soon after.
Settled outside the leader, hit the front near the 200 M before peaking on its run in the the final stages.
Settled 3 deep with cover, then near the 600 M raced 4-wide and without cover midfield for most of the journey. Never a factor.
Raced a long last before gradually making up ground to the home turn. Kept to the inside in the run home and finished off fairly.
Settled behind midfield 2-wide. Was checked on straightening and ran into traffic problems for most of the straight.
A little slow to begin and then lost further ground when checked. Raced with the tail enders, railed up in the straight and ran on very well
Took the lead at 1500 M. Remained in a disputed lead turning for home but soon weakened.
Off slowly and raced in rear section early stages. 3-wide behind midfield in back straight. Took a wide turn home and only ran past a beaten runner.
Crowded at the start and raced towards the rear. Last to straighten and made up some ground in the straight.
Mostly behind midfield. Ran on same pace in the home straight.

Crowded at the start and was outpaced early stages. Remained at the rear and hugged the rails making home turn. Encountered traffic after straightening but closed off strongly once finding a clear run.
Raced along the fence at midfield. Kept on well after straightening. Crept to within a short-head of the eventual winner but unable to find extra to run it down in the final stages.
2-wide behind the leaders. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to gain ground.
Raced alongside the leader. Opened up a clear advantage 300 M out but unable to find enough to hold off top pair in the final stages.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. Had some trouble getting through traffic after straightening. Ran on only fairly in the final stages.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Switched out for a run when turning for home and only kept same pace to the finish.
Raced 3-wide without cover at midfield. Remained on same pace in the straight.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the leader. Switched out and responded nicely after straightening. Ran down leader inside final 100 M and kept on well to hold off rival.
Got back worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls off speed at the 800 M, struggling to make an impression entering home straight, never on terms.
Keen early on and sent on to lead at 800 M, set a fast pace and 3Ls clear at 500 M, weakened and headed 100 M out, tired late and slipped out of a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off speed from 800 M to home turn, helped by fast pace to make some good late ground, never nearer.
3-wide with cover in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off speed until home turn, made some late ground without threatening leaders.
Went back from the wide gate, 8Ls last turning for home, ran on well along fence, never nearer.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace out 2-wide until home turn, made only minor late ground.
Broke badly and always towards rear at least 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace, never dangerous.
Mostly 4th out 2-wide between 3Ls and 5Ls from the speed until straightening for home, stayed on at the same pace.
In 3rd place on fence through to home straight between 2Ls and 4Ls from the front, dug in well to lead about 50 M out, did just enough.
3-wide no cover down the backstretch, 5Ls back in 6th at the 800 M, fell further back turning for home, weak in the finish.
Led by 1L at the 1000 M but headed soon after, about 3Ls back in 2nd at the 500 M, picked up again to lead briefly inside final 100 M but was ran out of the quinella close home.
Mostly 5th on fence between 3Ls and 5Ls from the speed until straightening for home, ran on strongly late for 2nd but post came too soon for the win.
5Ls off pace in 9th at the 1100 M, 4Ls down but 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, ran on strongly but couldn't quite get to grips with the winner.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at the 1100 M, still right there turning in, beaten when checked 150 M out.
4Ls back and 2-wide in 7th at 1100 M, 3Ls down and 3-wide in mid-division turning for home, one-paced in the home straight.
Worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace at the 1000 M, a little closer taking final bend, staying on well when checked at the 150 M, didn't recover.
Enjoyed the run of the race 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1100 M to final bend, found very little off the bridle.
Hung out as usual, 4-wide no cover at 1300 M, 2-wide and under 1L back in 2nd from 800 M to home turn, failed to quicken up and swamped final 200 M.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, left 3-wide no cover soon afterwards and pressed on to be 1L down in 3rd turning for home, weakened inside final 200 M.
3-back on fence about 3Ls back in 6th at 1100 M and similarly placed swinging for home, had every chance but outpaced by quinella pair final 200 M.
4-back on fence and 4Ls off pace in 8th at the 1100 M, got off the fence turning for home in midfield but held up until the 100 M, couldn't recover, worth overlooking the run.
Drifted back to last from wide gate, 8Ls last at halfway, pulled out 5-wide turning for home, place chances when 1L down at the 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Settled one from rear about 8Ls off pace at the 1200 M, about 5Ls down in 11th making final turn, picked up nicely to lead at the 200 M and stayed on well to score.
Led from gates, crossed to fence to lead by 1L at the 1100 M, headed over 200 M out and faded rapidly. (Mucus.)
Eased back as usual, 6Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the very slow pace, swept 3-wide at home bend ready to make the move, dashed impressively 200 M to run a remarkable 4th.
Eased to sit about midfield, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost too much ground, 4Ls off the very slow pace, moved up early from 600 M, prominent briefly on turning in but soon ran out of fuel 250 M.

Eased back and crossed to 2-wide, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, made an early move to keep up in midfield from 700 M round the field 4-wide, lost too much ground at bends and harmed by the very slow pace, still be able to close strongly.
Pushed to sit 1Ls off the leader 2-wide, travelled comfortably and benefited by the very slow tempo, led 250 M, hung on until 50 M overhauled, just beaten by a head in 2nd.
Slow away, but soon settled in midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, swept to 2-wide at home bend but blocked 400 M, harmed by the very slow tempo, no turn of foot in straight.

Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed, just held a spot behind the pace group along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, harmed by the very slow pace, blocked whole straight and never got chance, just ran on.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow tempo, however just managed to hold ground in final stages, very one paced.
Pushed along to take the rail and led by 1L at very slow advantageous sectionals, soon overhauled 300 M in straight but kept running on strongly to the line to finish a close 3rd.
Settled nicely about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, swept forward 3-wide at home bend and picked up steadily, dashed impressively 300 M to win despite being harmed by the very slow pace.
Eased back and took rail early, 6Ls behind the leader, not suited by the slow pace, swept 2-3-wide at home bend, but only showed little dash late until 100 M.
Very slow away, eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the very slow pace, swept 3-4-wide at home bend, just ran on ok in final stages.
