Eased to take the box seat instead of taking the lead, enjoyed the very slow early sectionals and also the rail-run, however lack turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Began fairly. Raced wide in behind midfield. Shaken up turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.

Towards rear far side. Took closer order rounding home bend. Moved up along rails to 6th within 3Ls of pace turning in. did not have too much room early in straight. Kept on at the one pace closing stages.
Driven to lead after a slightly slow start. Held narrow advantage far side before moving a length clear around home bend. Hung on well to the line and never threatened.
Raced 3-wide in close-up position. Slightly inconvenienced and dropped to 5th within 2Ls of pace coming out of back straight. Similar turning in. Ran home one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began best from middle draw. Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Weakened badly.
Began fairly but had to niggle along to hold place. Raced just worse than midfield most of way to straight. Finished off race strongly inside final 200 M.
Began fairly. Disputed lead before dropping to 1-out-1-back position coming out of back straight. Still there turning in but soon weakened.
Always in last few. Produced moderate late impression closing stages. Never nearer.
Began very awkwardly losing considerable ground. Trailed the field to 400 M when taking closer order. Made up good ground under pressure in the run home.
Began fairly. Soon picked up to join leading group in 4th or 5th. Held one back position on rails rounding the bend. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Showed customary speed to take up running, elected for a sit after 300 M, travelled sweetly on leaders back, challenged turning in, went to front easily and held off rest to score stylishly.
Out in line, pressed on to assume role first without cover, did share of work with even speed, under pressure on turning, dropped out tamely last 200 M.
Out in line, 3 wide behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, covered ground throughout, still had job to do on bend, made a little ground before losing run at 100 M.
Average jump, ended up 4 to 5Ls away on rails, enjoyed a quiet time in mid-section, saved ground on rails turning, closed off nicely last 200 M doing best work late.
Lacked usual pace and settled in rear division, not asked 6Ls back on rails throughout, still amongst last few turning, switched out but couldn't pair back margin. (See Racing Incidents.)
Amongst first few out, took up running after 300 M, kept pace reasonable 1L clear throughout, held same advantage entering straight, couldn't dash again at 200 M but plugged evenly to make frame.
Broke with them, raced 3 back on fence with a nice run, appreciated even speed, tracked nicely on circle, made even progress in straight to just miss 2nd.
Restrained from outset, ended up at rear, travelled 8Ls back by midpoint, in an impossible spot on bend, switched widest in straight and made many lengths to snare 2nd late.
Ordinary jump, recovered to race in midfield 3Ls back in running line, travelled well on bend, same margin down on turning, kept on to 150 M before run came to an end.
Standard break, raced 5Ls away in running line beyond midfield, had a reasonable run to bend, had something to offer before checked at 150 M, closed only fairly thereafter.
Bumped shortly after start and settled amongst last few, raced 6Ls back in 2 wide position, not harmed by tempo, still well back turning, made even progress without threatening.
Standard jump but rushed forward to take closer order, ended up 3 wide outside leader, did it tough and raced ungenerously on bend, couldn't sustain effort last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Broke well to lead and soon crossed to rails. Ceded advantage rounding stables bend and settled for one back 2nd on rails far side. Badly baulked early in straight and checked passing 200 M. One paced closing stages.
Prominent 3-wide in 4th. Effort rounding home bend and led into straight only to be swamped inside final 200 M.

Shared 5th 2-wide within 3Ls of pace. Commenced move turning in and shifted wider. Responded well to lead passing 200 M despite hung in away from whip on two occasions. Headed passing 100 M and pipped for 2nd late.
Settled well back. Widest runner in last turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Similar turning in but ran home one-paced under pressure.

Well there. Took up running rounding stables bend briefly before settling one-out-one-back approaching back straight. In similar position in 4th turning in when carried slightly wider. Quickened to hold some chance 200 M out. Soon faded.
Settled in last few. Shifted out to the centre of track for a run turning in. Ran on well to take charge close to home.
Began fairly settling behind midfield. Switched out for a run turning for home but could only produce moderate progress without threatening.
Began well, settling one back in 3rd on rails. Shuffled back to about 3Ls off the pace on rails far side. Did not find much room on inner early in straight. Made no impression closing stages.
Settled on rails towards rear. Switched off rails to challenge making home turn and only produced moderate progress under pressure in the run home.
Wide in midfield early stages. Moved up to join leaders coming out of home straight and led from stables bend to 350 M. Weakened badly after straightening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Similar turning in before switching off rails after straightening. Fought on under pressure but could only produce modest headway between runners.

Standard jump, drove up on fence to race 4Ls back in midfield, had an easy time in mid-section, angled 2 wide on circle, in amongst horses on straightening, did best work late when clear to snatch 2nd.
Ordinary jump, settled behind midfield 4Ls back in 2 wide line, not helped by tempo, switched 2 wide on circle, shifted out and made steady headway in straight without looking likely.
Began in line, faded back to race beyond midfield, harmed when tempo steadied in mid-section, made a 3 wide run, passing rock, didn't go up a gear and just kept on at same speed.
Amongst pace horses leaving gates, landed an ideal spot 1 to 2Ls back in 2 wide line, raced keenly with standard speed, niggled to challenge on bend, found little and just plugged to line.
No pace early and allowed to drift back to last, raced 8Ls back unsuited by tempo, in an impossible spot turning, closed race off well but set too great a task.
Moderate jump, ended up just behind midfield 5 to 6Ls back on rails, not helped by speed, still well back to bend, found nothing in run to line.
Began well, assumed box seat 2 to 3Ls back on fence, overraced with slow tempo, saved ground on turning, lacked usual pickup and just battled away last 200 M.

No pace from outset and assumed usual role near rear, raced 6 to 7Ls back and not helped by slow pace, still well back to bend, made good headway turning without clear running and sprinted hard when clear to make frame.

Well enough to begin, did some work early to race outside the leader to avoid being caught wide, had an easy time, with average speed, close enough on turning, couldn't go with winner but kept on soundly all the same.

Fair to begin, went on to cross to lead leaving first turn, backed off tempo after early work, dictated terms to bend, kicked strongly from 200 M but lacked pace to match winner, held on well for 3rd.
Away with first few, took prime position on leaders back, had easy time with slow pace, right there turning in, found nothing and dropped out in straight.

Well enough away, eased out of early pace battle, had a nice trip 3 to 4Ls back in 2 wide position, had plenty to offer on bend, let down nicely at 200 M to account for rivals easily scoring with something in hand.
Settled mainly in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Slightly lost position coming out of back straight. Made moderate headway closing stages without threatening.
Settled on rails in midfield. Saved ground on inner turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Sluggish at start and soon dropped to rear. Recovered to rear of midfield shortly after turning into back straight. Commenced run passing 400 M and ran on stoutly under pressure to just fail.
Began fairly. Ridden to first few, settling mainly one-out-one-back far side. Moved slightly closer around home bend and hit front into straight only to be overhauled inside 200 M.
In last few to straight. Ran on past well beaten horses down centre of straight.
Began fairly and soon ridden to lead. Led until narrowly headed into straight. Weakened under pressure. (Mucus.)
Broke well from the one draw. Settled one back on rails to straight. Angled off rails for a run and hit front just inside 200 M. Hung on well under pressure to the line.
Broke well. Steadied to midfield at 1000 M bend. Made steady headway 3-wide after 600 M to be with leaders rounding home bend. Gradually faded in the run home. (Blood in trachea.)
Broke well from widest draw. Raced wide behind midfield before taking closer order leaving Rock. Weakened into straight.
Soon outpaced and trailed the field to straight. Ran on and did best work at finish.
Raced wide in midfield or just worse. Gave ground from 400 M.
Broke well, settling in last few. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Worked hard early to obtain the lead after the 700 M. Gave in meekly passing the 150 M.
Handed up the lead after the 700 and raced in 2nd position. Never went on at the business end and folded tamely over the latter stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced handy to the leaders, but was caught 3-wide no cover, struggled over the last quarter.
Settled in last position and made some late ground.
Raced 3 back the fence, peeled out turning for home and responded well to vigorous riding. Held off late challengers.
Camped behind the speed on the fence, had every chance despite being checked near the 250 M. Pulled up lame. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced on the back of the speed, 1 out 1 back, loomed as a challenger but ended its run short of the line.
Did not show natural gate speed of runners drawn to the inside and settled 2-wide, midfield with cover. Ran on smartly in the straight.
Was checked near the 1000 M and thereafter raced 3 deep with cover in midfield. Struggled over the concluding stages.

As the start was effected momentarily became caught on a platform inside the barrier. Began awkwardly and lost considerable ground. Settled behind midfield the fence. Made some ground on the inside in straight.
Was slow to begin and raced in 2nd last position. Came 3-wide after the 400 M and ran on nicely.
Despite being ridden along in the early stages failed to muster speed and then throughout the race travelled wide and without cover, midfield. Spent force turning for home.
Soon in a forward spot. Raced alongside the leader back straight. Badly hampered and taken wide when leader broke down 500 M out. Never recovered.
Off slowly and raced in rear section. Behind midfield passing the Rock and steadily made progress at the turn. 4-wide turning for home and kept on fairly to make the frame.

Failed to find cover and raced wide in a rearward spot early stages. Remained towards the rear with cover in a 3-wide spot back straight. Last to enter home straight and made no impression thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced at the rear. Near the back but no more than 3Ls off the lead turning in. Kept on same pace in the straight and unable to draw any closer.

Jumped awkwardly and slow to muster speed. Raced on the rails behind midfield. Remained on fence and was within 2Ls of the leader turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight and unable get closer.
Jumped awkwardly and soon trailed field. Remained towards the rear but within 4Ls of the lead turning for home. Ran on strongly and swept past rivals to take the lead 50 M out.

2-wide at midfield early stages. Steadily made progress from 800 M out and was behind the pace heading into the 600 M turn. Badly hampered and carried very wide when leader broke down 500 M out. Unable to recover.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Improved to midfield at the home turn but was checked severely and taken out of the race when a runner broke down 500 M out.
Led race before breaking down near the 500 M and was eased out of the race.
Raced on the fence at midfield before shifting out to be 2-wide 1000 M out. 3-wide among leaders turning for home. Continued to fight for the lead before bowing out final 100 M.
Raced along the rails behind the pace. Took the lead briefly when leader broke down near 500 M but soon weakened.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2-wide among leaders turning for home. Shook off co-leader to take a 1/2L advantage 100 M out but unable to find extra to hold off the winner.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1100 M, 3-wide on straightening when 2Ls back in 3rd, given every possible hope to at least place but too weak when it mattered.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1100 M, held same position until home turn but soon dropped right and gone before the 200 M.
Led by 1L on fence at 1200 M, set a steady pace and still 1L clear swinging for home, shot 2Ls clear at the 200 M, always holding a break.
3-back on fence in 5th at 1100 M when 4Ls off pace, similarly placed turning for home, gave chase to the winner but always held.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls back in 7th at 1100 M, closer in midfield on straightening, given his chance to place but foiled final 50 M.
Set early pace but handed up the advantage at 1300 M, nice position on fence about 2Ls back in 3rd or 4th until home turn, very one-paced.
In rear 2-wide and 7Ls off pace at 1100 M, still last making final turn, no impression.
Towards rear about 6Ls off early speed, 5-wide (widest of all) and 5Ls back in 9th taking final bend, stayed on stoutly for a place.
3-wide no cover at 1300 M despite exiting from gate 3, coursed wide in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn, yielded ground quickly.
One from rear about 7Ls off pace on fence at 1100 M, not much closer turning for home, made some minor late ground but no great threat.
4-back on fence about 5Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, much the same position off last turn, bereft of acceleration.
Slow start, 3-back on fence about 3Ls off pace in 5th at halfway, same turning for home, held up for the entirety of home straight and not tested at all, ignore the run.
Checked at 1000 M but recovered to hold a nice position on fence between 2Ls and 3Ls from the pace in 3rd until home turn, very one-paced and soon beaten.
Led early on but couldn't cross to fence, tracked leader about neck down in 2nd out 2-wide until final turn, kept on at the same pace.
Checked at 1000 M, 6Ls back in 7th at 800 M but closer making final turn, soon outpaced.
10Ls last at the 1200 M, 4-wide (widest of all) when 5Ls down in 9th on straightening, stayed on well for a place.
Checked at 1000 M and 4Ls back in 6th out 2-wide at 700 M, good headway to lead at the 200 M, no extra when headed inside final 50 M by winner.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, every chance in 3rd at top of home straight, one-paced in the finish.
Nicely placed in 3rd before breaking down at the 1000 M and pulled up.
Checked at start, one from rear on fence about 7Ls off pace at halfway, closer about 4Ls back making final turn, stayed on well through the pack to lead inside final strides.
Led by a neck on fence at 1200 M and shared the lead at top of home straight, found nothing off the bridle and soon beaten.
Got back, one from rear about 7Ls off pace at the 600 M, 5Ls last turning for home, made some fair late ground along the inner without threatening.
Very slowly away, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the very slow pace, swept 3-wide on straightening and picked up steadily, delivered strong finishing efforts in final 200 M, improving.
Pushed forward but not charging for the lead, settled 1L off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the very slow early sectionals, ran on until 150 M flattened.
Hard ridden to occupy a prominent spot just off the pace 2-wide, 2-1/2Ls behind the leader, helped by the very slow early tempo, closed the race off strongly to grab a 3rd.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L, favoured by the very slow early sectionals, hung on until 200 M, emptied thereafter.
Settled in box seat, benefited by the very slow early tempo, however soon weakened after straightening.
Eased to rear and crossed the fence, 7Ls off the leader, enjoyed the rail-run but not suited by the very slow pace, blocked from 400 M to 200 M, dashed strongly when clear.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader along the fence, not suited by the very slow pace, dashed well 250 M to score a second victory for the season.
At rear, 7Ls behind the leader 2-wide, not suited by the very slow pace, swept towards 3-wide on straightening, stayed flat until 100 M, showed little dash made up some ground late.

Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader, raced 3 to 4-wide throughout, harmed by the very slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, still held ground in straight despite all the negative racing situations.
Eased back as usual, soon took rail and travelled 5-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the very slow pace, momentarily blocked 300 M, dashed strongly when clear to finish 2nd.
Eased to sit about midfield 2-wide at stable bend, 4Ls off the leader, swept 3-wide at home bend and lost ground, disadvantaged by the very slow pace, showed little dash in straight.
Broke well. Settled in 5th on rails just about 2Ls off the speed. Switched off rails for a run turning in and quickened well to take charge 200 M out. Hung on well to the line.
Prominent. Settled one-out-one-back mainly in 3rd or 4th to straight. Looked beaten 200 M out but fought on well to renew effort and reach 2nd late.
Niggled along on rails behind midfield. Similar turning in. Kept on past beaten horses late.
Raced wide in prominent position to straight. Soon weakened.

Broke well. Ridden to take lead and crossed to rails at 1000 M bend. Gave up advantage going up Rock and held a neck 2nd to home turn. Renewed effort to gain some chance early in straight but unable to sustain run 200 M out.
Settled in last few and last into straight. Ran on to do best work at finish.
Always well back. Wide throughout. Ran home one-paced.
Well there. Took up running going up Rock and held narrow lead until shortly after straightening. Soon faded.
Raced mainly in 6th just better than midfield to straight. Ran on quite well closing stages to just get bobbed for 2nd.
Never better than midfield. Just kept on at the same pace in the run home.
Trailed the field. Commenced move coming out of back straight. Midfield turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced in midfield. Checked and lost position over 500 M out. Made no further impression in straight.
Well enough to begin, took up spot 3Ls back on fence, had nice trip in middle stages, took inside runs on turning in, had chance but failed to quicken and just held ground to line.
No real pace from outset, faded back near to last, raced 7-8Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by tempo, well back on turning, switched out and closed hard to finish a close up 5th.
Showed plenty of pace to take up running from a wide gate, did plenty of work setting speed in front, came back to them on circle, under pressure turning and unbalanced, dropped out thereafter.
Standard jump, pressed on but unable to slot in, raced 3-wide in midfield without cover 5Ls back, kept working to be 2Ls back turning, couldn't find in straight and weakened when effort took toll.
Moderate getaway, didn't go forward as usual and dropped to tail, raced 10Ls back in 2-wide line, well back and struggling to bend, passed a few tired runners in run to line.
Bounced out with them, had a nice trip in prime position 1 out 1 back, 4Ls back at mid-point, improved to be 2Ls down on turning, challenged for lead at 150 M and missed a place in way go.
No early pace as usual, raced at tail 10Ls back, suited by fast pace, kept to rails and saved ground on circle, made only moderate headway along inside in straight.
Away okay, couldn't take closer order and ended up 3-wide in midfield, had a tough run without cover in middle stages, 4Ls down turning, closed race of nicely out wide to just miss 2nd.

Standard break, had no early pace and ended up 5Ls back on rails, suited by reasonable speed, eased 2-wide passing Rock, still well back turning, into clear at 150 M and dashed hard late to finish over the top of them.

Slowly away, settled behind midfield 4Ls back, had an easy time in mid-section, angled 2-wide passing Rock, gained split on turning and finished race off nicely hitting front before being overhauled late.

Average jump but showed move initiative to take a spot first without cover 3Ls back in 2-wide line, forced to work a bit with genuine pace, took over briefly on turning but had little to offer last 200 M.

Showed customary speed to lead shortly after start but handed up leaving straight, did share of work trailing reasonable pace, close enough on bend, didn't have extra gear and just held ground last 200 M.
Fair break, taken to tail from a wide alley, raced well back 8Ls off lead, gave big start on bend, saved ground on inside and passed a few last 200 M.
No pace early, re-gathered to race in midfield 3Ls back, had run of race in middle stages, saved ground on circle, pushed into gap on turning but run ended at 200 M and weakened thereafter.
Plenty of early pace to lead them easily, rolled along 2Ls clear at even tempo, 1L clear on circle, kicked hard turning but overhauled at 150 M, fought back doggedly late.
Standard jump, recovered well to be 2Ls back in 2 wide line, improved on bend 1L back, struggling to hold spot turning, battled in run to line.
Out with line, ended up 4 wide without cover 4Ls back in midfield, did plenty of work on circle, same margin back turning, couldn't dash and kept on at same speed.
Began well, assumed spot on leaders back, tracked well 2Ls back throughout, had chance to improve on bend but couldn't muster dash, kept on evenly without quickening in straight.
Ended up in midfield from a moderate jump, raced 5Ls back and unable to hold position, always struggling to go speed, didn't make any impact in straight.
Away fairly, pressed on 3 wide early to take spot outside leader, 1L back on bend, challenged on turning, gradually pulled back margin to hit lead at 150 M and hold off game fight back late.
Ordinary break, rushed up to midfield 2 wide 3 to 4Ls away, kept progressing with a 3 wide run to turn, dropped out tamely from 400 M.
Slow into stride, chased up to race 6Ls back 3 wide behind midfield, always well back in mid-section, switched out in straight and made some late progress to make frame.
Tardy to begin, on heels at 1000 M, raced 6Ls back on rails, tightened at 700 M, saved ground on circle, had nothing to offer last 300 M.
Sluggish into stride, raced 3 wide 6Ls from leaders, well back and struggling on bend, found little in run to line.
Raced near the tail of the field, struggled at the business end.
Camped behind the leader on the fence. Had every chance.
Began awkwardly, got its head up, then in the early stages raced greenly. Parked midfield the fence, finished off dourly.
Slow to begin and settled in last position. Had to be steadied on straightening and after obtaining clear running soon after worked home nicely.
Led on the fence, overhauled near the 200 M and faded from that point on.

From a wide barrier was taken across behind runners in the early stages. Positioned in 2nd last spot, kept to the inside in the straight and closed off strongly although ran into some traffic over the final 50 M.
Sat outside the leader, gave in quickly over the final 150 M.
Settled at the back of the field, 1 off with cover. Closed off fairly. (Blood in the trachea.)
Raced 2 off, midfield with cover. Shifted wide on straightening and closed of solidly, although inclined to hang out in the run to the post.
1 out 1 back, no excuses.
Caught wide and without cover for most of the trip, around midfield. Never threatened.
Settled on the back of the speed, 2 deep with cover. Came to the outside in the straight lengthened nicely to score by a neck.
Positioned behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Let down nicely over the final furlong.
Ran close to midfield, the fence. Battled away in the run home straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace until straightening. Kept on well in the straight for a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Took a wide run on home turn and was 4Ls down on straightening. Made up ground in the straight and was closest at the line.
Led field until being headed 300 M out. Stayed on fairly before fading late.

Raced along the rails better than midfield. 2-wide and within 3Ls of leader turning for home. Steadily made up ground in the straight and came within a length of eventual winner. Unable to get closer final stages.
Midfield. Towards the rear with a 4Ls deficit on straightening. Closed the race off with a nice rally.
Eased back from widest draw and raced 2-wide behind midfield. Made progress in a 3-wide spot at the home turn. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Kept within a length of the leader until home straight. Faded gradually thereafter.
Off slowly and trailed field throughout. Widest turning in and made no impression in the straight.

Urged forward with the whip early stages. Better than midfield and kept within 3Ls of the leader. Crept to within a length turning for home and took the lead 250 M out. Stayed on well and held off challenger.
Raced on the fence behind midfield. Made a ground saving trip around the turn and no more than 4Ls off the lead turning in. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
About 5Ls off pace in 10th or so and 3-wide with cover down the back straight, never better than midfield.
Disputed early tempo out 2-wide but soon settled back to 3rd about 2Ls off pace, same margin back in 4th at top of home straight, had his chance to at least place, no dash.
Close up in 4th on fence early, 2Ls down in 3rd on straightening, looked the winner when easing to the front at 300 M, didn't find much off the bridle and outfought final 50 M.
Midfield on fence about 4Ls off speed down backstretch, tight for room at top of home straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well for pressure but couldn't quite reach quinella pair.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 6th at the 1000 M, steadily lost this position and under pressure swinging for home, dropped out further.
Totally blew the start losing at least 10Ls on the main bunch, fighting a losing battle thereafter.
Led early on fence by 1L, headed at 1000 M and raced 1L back in 2nd until home turn, back on terms but headed again inside 200 M, rallied gamely final 50 M to lead close home.
Towards rear about 7Ls off pace and 5-back on fence at 1000 M, only marginally closer turning for home, made some minor late ground.
Poor effort, failed to muster any early dash and always well back at least 8Ls from the front.
Worse than midfield with cover about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, hung out on the circle and with plenty to do on straightening, no impression.
3-wide no cover before crossing to lead by 1L on fence at 900 M, clear until home turn but one-paced when headed about 300 M out.
Prominent position in 5th through early stages but left 3-wide no cover from the 900 M, struggling in midfield off home turn, one-paced.
Always in the rear bunch and never any closer than 7Ls from the leaders after the 1200 M.
Missed the start and never on terms, finished tailed off.
Slow away, one from rear on fence about 9Ls off pace at 1300 M, improved to 4Ls off pace into straight, switched left to challenge but outpaced by winner final 150 M.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off pace in 7th at 1300 M, ever better placed taking final turn, failed to quicken up and left well behind final 200 M.
Poor performance having enjoyed a nice trail in 3rd in the box-seat from 1200 M to final bend, dropped out very quickly.
Given every possible hope with a cushy position 2Ls back in 4th with cover until home turn and disputing the lead at 200 M, weakened sharply final stages.
Crossed to lead on fence at the 1300 M by a neck, about 1L to the good at the final bend, headed at the 300 M and dropped out quite tamely.
About 11Ls last at the 1200 M, headway turning for home and switched out wider to challenge, ran on well nearer stands' rail to challenge for a place at the 200 M but tired close home.
Towards rear 4-back on fence about 7Ls off early pace, 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, briefly short of room at 300 M, over 1L down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
Never travelled well, 4Ls off pace 3-wide no cover at 1300 M, tried to press on but hung out on the circle and 5-wide off final turn, extra work soon took its toll.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at the 1400 M, a little closer in midfield taking final bend, stayed on well enough to lead 150 M out and asserted thereafter.
6Ls back in 8th out 3-wide but with cover at the 1200 M, edged closer but pushed out 6-wide (widest of all) making final turn, petered out inside final 200 M.
About 11th and 7Ls off the early speed, still 6Ls back towards rear turning for home, devoid of any pick-up in the finish.
Held 5th place 2-wide and 3Ls off pace at 1400 M, closer when 4-wide entering home straight, vying for the lead from 300 M to 200 M, not much left final furlong but enough for a place.
Caught 3-wide without cover early, in leading group within 2Ls of the pace from 1400 M to home turn, struggling on straightening, dropped right out.
8Ls back in 12th at the 1200 M, still in rear but 5Ls back on straightening, made some fair late ground without threatening.
Settled in midfield along the fence, 6Ls behind the leaders, helped by the fast pace, momentarily blocked 400 M, progressed steadily when clear to finish 2nd without much threat to the winner.
Eased to sit behind midfield, 8Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made up some ground 400 M, however run ended 150 M.
Pushed early to take a more prominent spot, 4-1/2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, swept 2-wide on straightening for run home, however stayed flat and soon emptied 250 M.
Eased to rear, more than 11Ls behind the leaders, raced keenly 3-wide throughout and lost ground, favoured by the fast tempo, however stayed flat until 200 M made ground lately.
Eased to rear and crossed the fence, more than 11Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, made ground last 200 M.
Worse than midfield, 8Ls off the leaders along the rails, favoured by the fast tempo, moved out at 700 M towards a 3-wide position for clear running, made ground steadily 400 M to run 3rd.
Pushed to take the rail and battled for the lead, under pressure throughout and not suited by the very fast early sectionals, weakened quickly 400 M.
Hard ridden to share the lead 2-wide at very fast early sectionals, dominant briefly from 400 M, hung on until 200 M overhauled and flattened.
Eased back but failed to obtain cover, 9-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, slightly inconvenienced 700 M, helped by the fast pace, closed the race off nicely last 300 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 6Ls off the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily in straight to score its first win with some ease.
Awkwardly away, settled at back 10Ls off the leaders on the rails, favoured by the fast pace, but never progressed in final stages.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, not suited by the fast tempo, held ground until 200 M out of fuel.
Hard ridden throughout to keep up with the field, helped by the fast tempo but never competitive at the rear.
Eased at start to cross to the rail behind the field, 10Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast tempo and the rails-run, but never showed great turn of foot and only ran on fairly in straight.
Ridden along from start to gain prominent but wide position turning into back straight. Mostly 3-wide in 3rd or 4th far side and around home bend. Weakened under pressure after straightening.
Trailed the field to home bend. Commenced move turning in. Made up good ground down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield early. Dropped towards rear half way out. No further impression.
Raced wide in midfield only. Taken back to rear of field far side and still wide. Made no further impression.
Settled on rails in rear of midfield in small field. Came to challenge under pressure from 3L 6th turning in and ran on steadily along rails to be nearest at finish.
Settled in one-out-out-back position. In similar position in 2nd turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Close up with rails run early. Taken back to sit 1 out 1 back in 3rd or 4th to straight. In box-seat early in straight. Could only keep on steadily at the same pace without quickening closing stages.
Mainly in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Raced wide early after beginning from poor draw. Taken back to race in rear of field stables bend. Took closer order turning for home and found nothing under pressure in the run to the line.
Slightly sluggish at start. Soon ridden and settled in midfield of small field. In 5th 2-1/2L back turning in. Ran on inside final 150 M to just get up on line.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Held more than a length advantage most of straight only to be caught when tiring close to home.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up at tail 8Ls back, not helped by tempo, made a 3 wide run leaving bend, had field to beat but made good progress down outside from an impossible spot.
Ordinary jump but pushed up to take a close spot in midfield running line, raced 2 wide 4Ls back, trailed well on bend, had chance on turning but lacked turn of foot just holding ground late.
Out in line but taken back to get cover, raced 3 wide in midfield 5Ls back with trail, not helped by tempo and overraced a touch, in traffic on turning, made gradual progress without threatening.
Moderate getaway, took up role behind midfield racing 2 wide 5 to 6Ls off pace, not aided by steady pace, progressed between horses on circle, made good ground in straight to be closest at finish.
No real early pace, assumed spot amongst last few 6 to 7Ls back, tempo played against in mid-section, back 2 wide on circle, held up turning in, made good progress last 300 M doing best work late.
Out in line but restrained to take trail, raced 3 wide behind midfield 7Ls back, not assisted by speed, made a 4 wide run on circle, lacked usual finish just closing at same speed.
Well enough away, raced 3 wide first without cover 2 to 3Ls back, crept closer on bend, did some work to bend, 1L back turning, had little to offer from 300 M point.
Showed customary speed to lead easily, kept tempo even 1L clear in front, relaxed more than usual and held narrow lead turning, couldn't dash again and folded tamely from 300 M.
Ordinary to begin, raced 7Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section but tempo was against, well back turning, made gradual progress between horses in straight without looking likely.
Out with rest, ended up 3 wide midfield 3Ls back, pressed close on circle, came 4 wide leaving bend, found little when asked and weakened out late.
Awkwardly into stride, raced in mid-division on fence 4Ls off pace, had soft run in mid-section, urged along turning, didn't close off and just struggled to line.

Began in line, pressed on to race outside leader closer than usual, raced 1L back and edged close on circle, took over shortly after straightening, no match for winner last 200 M but stuck on strongly.

Standard jump, ended up behind leader 2Ls back on rails, had soft trip with steady tempo, tracked strongly on turning, into clear at 350 M, challenged and assumed lead passing 200 M, went on to score easily.
Well there. Gradually crossed to rails and settled one back in 3rd or 4th. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Fought on steadily but winner too good.
Always struggling at the back.
Ridden along early settling in better than midfield position. Weakened under pressure upon straightening.
Always well there. Travelled one-out-one-back rounding home bend. Soon hit front after straightening and kicked clear to win readily.
Travelled in rear. Only ran past beaten runners in straight.
Never better than midfield. Lost position into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Settled on rails in rear of midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Quickly renewed effort into straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners rounding home bend and did not find much room early in straight. Finished off race nicely final 200 M.

Slightly slow into stride. Settled 2-back on rails before slightly shuffled back to midfield around home bend when pace steadied. Saved ground on inside and turned in for 5th. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Well there. Took up running coming out of back straight and soon crossed to rails. Headed by winner 400 M out and ran home one-paced.
Settled in rear. Effort when very wide around home bend. Midfield turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped out tamely inside 200 M.
Broke well. Raced in forward of midfield. Effort 3-wide rounding home bend disputing 3rd into straight. Soon faded.
Broke well from poor draw. Settled wide in midfield. Similar turning in. Ran to be nearest at finish.

Showed plenty of speed but elected for a trail behind pace, raced 2 to 3Ls back on fence, had soft trip throughout, behind horses turning in, into clear at 200 M. Went to front quickly and held off late chasers for solid win.

No early pace and faded back from an awkward draw, raced 7 to 8Ls back in 3 wide line unsuited by pace, back in traffic on bend, didn't have any luck finding daylight in straight and had no real crack at them.

Slow into stride, regathered to take a midfield position 4Ls back on rails, had a soft trip, tracked eventual winner on circle, saved ground along fence, only clear last 100 M and closed hard late to go down by narrow margin.

Began with them, outpaced early and ended up behind midfield on rails 6 to 7Ls back, not asked in mid-section but disadvantaged by tempo, in traffic turning, no real chance to improve at not tested in straight.
Restrained from a wide alley, raced 9 or more lengths back, harmed by tempo, tracked 3 wide from 600 M, 5Ls back on turn, switched wide and made many lengths last furlong to go down in 3 way go.
Taken to tail from a wide alley, raced 10Ls adrift of leaders, made a searching 4 wide run from 600 M, widest bend, faded out gradually from 300 M.
Fair to begin, pushed on to race behind leader, 2 wide 1L back on circle, travelled comfortably leaving bend after nice trip, went to lead and looked a chance to 200 M but couldn't sprint again.

Moderate break, ended up parked 3 wide without cover 4Ls back in midfield, tempo suited and pressed on to be 1/2L down challenging entering straight, there to 200 M before workload took toll and weakened.
Began with purpose, raced 3 wide with cover in midfield 5Ls back, covered ground on bend, in amongst horses turning and never had run present. Not fully tested. (Saddle shifted.)

Out in line, pushed on to take closer order, took a sit behind pace pair 2Ls back 2 wide, on bridle throughout, lost run at 250 M, in amongst horses for rest of straight but only finished off fairly regardless.
Standard jump, drifted to behind midfield 6Ls back in search of cover, raced 3 wide with trail not helped by tempo, improved 4 and 5 wide bend, looked a chance at 250 M but peaked on run late.
No early pace, soon towards rear, raced on rails 9Ls back, harmed by tempo, well back approaching bend, spent most of straight looking for runs but to no avail. No real chance at clear running.
Out with line, ended up 5Ls back in 2 wide line, had a suitable run and edged closer 3 wide on bend, 2Ls back coming 4 wide turning, in contention to 200 M but didn't finish off thereafter.
Broke well, rolled on and took up running, set an even tempo in front, 1L clear on circle, under siege on bend, found until 200 M but weakened out tamely thereafter.
Began fairly. Prominent when steadied and lost position coming out of home straight. Travelled 2-wide in midfield far side. Quickened well down straight to snatch victory close to home.
Broke well from middle draw. Stalked leaders to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in 4L 3rd. Close up and still 3rd turning in. Fought on steadily under pressure without quickening.
Always in rear with short-lived effort when turning for home.
Soon took up running from the one draw and attempted to make all. Failed to sustain effort under pressure inside final 200 M.
Midfield early. Dropped behind midfield far side. Ran home one-paced.
Close up early. Dropped back to 5L 4th far side. Commenced move rounding home bend and closer up turning in. Made no impression in straight.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.
Awkward early. In last few to straight. Ran on steadily between runners in straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced on rails in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Kept on before finding no extra inside final 200 M. (Bled.)
Began fairly but failed to muster speed. Dropped to rear of field turning into far side and trailed the field into straight. Always struggling.
Held up towards rear on rails. Took closer order turning into back straight. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
From gate 1 worked hard from the outset to hold its forward advantage on the rail, maintained an on speed position for most of the trip, punctured after entering the straight.
Settled back in the field 2 deep with cover, came wide in the straight and ran on strongly.

Ridden along early from a wide gate to cross to the front but was unable to clear one runner to its inside and raced one off in the lead. Kicked clear near the 200 M and stuck to task well in the run to the post.
Raced 1 out 1 back, had every chance but faded on its run close to home.
Parked on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover. Stayed to the inside in the run home and finished off nicely.
Couldn't match the early speed and settled last. Ridden along from the 600 M, and only passed tiring horses over the latter stages.
Settled in front of midfield the fence, never threatened.
Taken back from a wide barrier and raced in 2nd last position on the rails. Worked home late.
Raced near the rear of the field, was wide in the straight and struggled over the concluding stages.
Settled well back in the run and commenced to gather in the field turning for home. Worked through the field in the straight and found enough to prevail.
Throughout the race travelled wide and without cover behind the pace and in the Straight gave ground. (Mucopus.)
Raced 3-wide in the lead. Headed 600 M but remained outside the leader. Carried out when leader hung out and took a wide turn home. Near the back on straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Eased back to race behind midfield in a 3-wide spot. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Hard pressed from the start to be in a forward spot. On the rails behind the leader 600 M. Assumed the lead when leader hung out at home turn. Weakened and swamped final 200 M.
Missed the jump and raced along the rails behind midfield. Crowded twice making the turn and was 4Ls down on straightening. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. 3Ls off the lead turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Within 3Ls of leader turning for home. Kept on briefly in the early part of the straight. Unable to find more and faded final 100 M.
Off slowly from widest draw and allowed to drift back. Raced at the rear and swung out wide on straightening. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Quickened after straightening and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Quickened on straightening but was caught in heavy traffic 250 M out. Continued to close strongly after finding daylight but was again checked near the line.
Raced on the fence at midfield. 2Ls down turning for home. Steadied and switched out to avoid slow traffic 250 M out. Kept on fairly for the remaining trip before checking near the line.
Raced behind the leaders. 2-wide and a length off the pace turning for home. Took over lead 200 M out and kept on well over the final stages to hold rivals at bay.
Niggled along to be in a forward spot. Took over the lead at 600 M but hung out badly at the home turn and never recovered from that.
Led on fence at the 1200 M and held a break of about 2Ls until home turn, headed over 200 M and quickly raised the white flag.
6Ls back in 6th on fence at 1000 M, a little closer and saving ground turning in, very weak final 200 M.
Poor effort, detached in rear, 10Ls off pace and last at the 600 M, never a factor.
One from rear 12Ls off the speed at 1000 M, still well back taking home bend, nearest at the finish but pretty harmless overall.
8Ls back on fence in 7th at 1100 M, 2-wide and 6Ls back at 500 M, 3-wide into home straight, plugged on at same pace for 4th.
9Ls back in 9th on fence at the 1100 M, 6Ls back in 8th swinging for home, always comfortably held.
6Ls and 2-wide back in 5th at 1100 M, 4Ls down in 5th on straightening, outpaced by the winner but still had his chance to run 2nd.
9Ls back in 8th at 1100 M out 2-wide, under pressure on circle to sneak slightly closer, made some minor late ground.
Best away, held 2nd place on fence about 2Ls behind leader from 1200 M to home turn, led over 200 M out and always in charge.
2-wide and 4Ls down in 4th at 1100 M, loomed with every chance in 2nd at top of home straight, found zero off the bridle and very weak final 200 M.
10Ls off pace in 10th out 2-wide at the 1000 M, 8Ls down taking final turn, moderate late headway along fence, also hung in under pressure.
Good riding to slot in 3rd on fence 3Ls off pace at 1200 M despite wide barrier, prominent until home turn and stuck on dourly to just take 2nd.
2-wide and 3Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, still nicely placed turning for home, didn't find a great deal off the bridle despite the soft passage.
8Ls off pace 4-back on fence in 8th at 1100 M, nice headway to be just 3Ls back in 5th entering home straight, dug in well to lead final strides.
Slow to begin and lacking early pace, 10Ls off pace in 10th at the 1100 M, still well back turning for home, never on terms.
On pace but trapped 3-wide no cover at 1300 M, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1100 M to 500 M, led at top of home straight but one-paced final 200 M.
Nice position on fence 2Ls back in 4th at 1200 M, 4Ls down at 800 M, briefly held up turning for home, threatened the quinella but no extra final 100 M.
7Ls back in 7th out 2-wide at 1100 M, 4-wide in midfield but 4-wide turning for home, kept on at same pace.
Slow to muster early pace and 12Ls last 1000 M, ridden along to make some ground on the circle but couldn't sustain the run.
9Ls off pace in 9th out 2-wide at 1100 M, same position but closer about 4Ls down off final turn, made some nice late ground out wide, never nearer.
Enjoyed the run of the race on fence 2Ls back in 3rd from the 1200 M to home turn, had every chance to at least place but found wanting again inside final 200 M.
Messy start, in rear about 10Ls back at the 1000 M, still near the rear out 4-wide turning for home, never threatened principals.
6Ls back on fence in 6th at 1100 M, pressed on 500 M out and 3-wide off final bend, led 200 M out but grabbed by winner final strides.
Pressed on to lead on fence by 1L at 1300 M, headed turning for home and weakened rapidly.
Pushed early but failed to muster speed and keep up with the field, 6Ls off the leader along the fence in main bunch, harmed by the very slow tempo, no progress in final stages.
Pushed early to occupy a midfield spot 2-wide, 5Ls behind the leader of the main bunch, harmed by the very slow pace, held up for running 400 M to 200 M, finished the race off fairly when clear.

Eased at start to cross the rail behind the field, 7-1/2Ls behind the leader in main bunch, harmed by the very slow pace, swept 3 to 4-wide and moved forward early from 500 M, sustained its run until 200 M ended.

Eased back as usual, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader in main bunch 2-wide, not suited by the very slow pace, made a quick moved round the field 3 to 4-wide from 600 M, kept dashing strongly to the line in straight and run a strong 3rd.

Pushed to battle for the rail and lead but failed, trapped 2-wide during the first section and cleared out by more than 6Ls, took seat 1-1/2Ls behind the lead from 1200 M, helped by slow mid-section, one-paced in straight.
Hard ridden early to take a more prominent position along the rails, 1-1/2Ls off the leader of the main bunch, not suited by the very slow pace, dropped off rapidly 500 M.
Travelled in a comparatively more prominent position, 1/2L outside the leader in main bunch, enjoyed the very slow tempo, however never showed great turn of foot and weakened 250 M.

Hard ridden early to take rails, led by 1-1/2Ls and cleared out from rest by more than 6Ls, clocked red-hot first section, eased the tempo from 1200 M, fully recovered and helped by slow middle, kicked hard in stretch to defy them.
Hard ridden to cross to the rail, led the main bunch by 1/2L, favoured by the slow pace and the good trip, closed the race off strongly to finish 2nd.
Hard ridden early to obtain a midfield spot, 2-1/2Ls off the leader in main bunch 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, delivered little dash late in straight.

Awkward away, pushed to take a midfield spot along the fence, 3-1/2Ls behind the leader in main bunch, not suited by the very slow early tempo, held up 500, pushed back badly and lost ground, flattened when clear in straight.

Eased to rear and took rail, 9Ls off the leader in main bunch, harmed by the very slow pace, made the move from 500 M round the field 4 to 5-wide, lost too much ground at home bends, still held ground and ran on ok in final stages.
Broke well from wide draw. Raced wide in prominent position early settling in 4th down back straight. Similar turning in then gradually weakened.
Midfield to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Stumbled and lost ground at start. Remained well back to straight. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Travelled behind midfield on rails. One-paced in straight.
Raced mostly 2-wide in forward of midfield in 5th. Kept on one pace in straight without threatening.
Slow out and lost ground at start. Always struggling and detached.
Lost ground at start. Travelled at the back. Ran home well inside final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Broke well. Raced in one-out-one-back position. Held some chance when drew level 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort close to home.
Towards rear. Made up good ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Tracked leader along rails. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front inside 200 M. Ridden out.
Broke well. Soon led and went clear far side. Tiring when overhauled 200 M out.
Broke well. Settled around midfield. Commenced move swinging in. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slow into stride, forced to race further back than expected 3 to 4Ls away on rails, not asked in mid-section, tracked well on bend, made good progress between horses in stretch to be nearest on line.
No early pace, raced at tail 8Ls from leaders, assisted by even tempo, 2-wide from mid-point, made a 4-wide run on bend, made plenty of ground widest in straight to be not far away in finish.
Out with them, didn't go forward but elected to slot just off pace, raced 3Ls back 1 out 1 back, swept forward 3-wide leaving bend, went to front at 200 M and fought on well serving late challenge.
Allowed to drift back from gate, raced well back 7Ls away in 2-wide line, some interference passing 600 M, still well back entering straight, motored last 200 M to narrowly go down.
Not much dash from gates, settled a bit closer 5Ls away in running line, had easy time throughout, 3Ls back turning, got back to inside and made steady progress final furlong.
Began with purpose, elected for a trail, 3Ls behind leaders having an easy time in mid-section, saved ground but urged along on bend, kept to inside but lacked turn of foot just battling to line.
Standard jump, went forward in search of lead, took over on first bend, did share of work early but backed off tempo at mid-point, joined on bend, under pressure on turning, faded tamely from 200 M.
Out well, lead early before relinquishing on first bend, had a fair trip behind leader, niggled along on bend, found little on turning, very one-paced thereafter dropping right out.
Jumped in line, tried to obtain trail but posted 3-wide without cover in mid-section, had a tough trip throughout, struggling on bend, faded out gradually in straight.

Ordinary break, ridden up to race 6Ls back behind midfield on rails, overraced a touch when pace backed off at 900 M, near to last turning, ran into traffic problems in straight and made solid progress despite checked passage.
Began well, positioned first without cover 2Ls away, crept forward despite even pace to be 1L down at Rock, challenged strongly at 200 M but lacked dash, kept on gamely to make frame.

No early pace and taken back from a wide alley, raced 8Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by even tempo, made 3-wide run at Rock, came 4-wide turning, produced an improved finish making good ground for 3rd.
Out in line, slotted in to midfield spot 2 wide 5Ls back, suited in run, angled clear on turning in, found little last 300 M, struggling late. (Blood in trachea.)
Out well, pressed on to take a prominent spot 1 out 2 back 3 to 4Ls away, came 3 wide on bend and made progress to get within a length at 200 M, couldn't dash again and just kept on steadily.
Slow to begin, ended up behind midfield on rails 6Ls or more from front, suited by speed on, made some steady progress to 200 M but only held ground thereafter.
Showed plenty of pace to lead them early, held rails but pressured throughout by outside horse, 1L back on inside on turning, no dash at business end and folded tamely.
Even jump, assumed a midfield role 4 to 5Ls back on rails, enjoyed a soft trip, moved 2 wide on circle, in between horses turning, clear last 300 M but only turned in a one paced effort.
Began awkwardly and lost ground when checked, raced well back at rear 10Ls from speed, never really in it and set a big task from bend, only passed tired runners in straight.
Began with first few, raced 3Ls back on fence, had run of race on back of speed, not asked in mid-section, kept to fence turning in, into clear running shortly after but only battled at same speed.

Began well, pressed on in search of front, held lead nearly 1 length clear but couldn't find rail, kept pressure on throughout, held advantage turning and led to 200 M, couldn't keep up effort and overhauled last furlong.

Fairly away, taken back from a wide alley, raced 6 or more lengths away in 2 wide line, suited by speed, into clear running turning and looked a threat but just produced a one paced finish final furlong. Needs further.
Began awkwardly, ended up racing 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls back, never nearer on bend, found nothing when asked and lost touch in straight.

Standard break, drifted back towards tail, raced greenly 8Ls back in running line, helped by reasonable speed, still well back on turning, took a while to balance up however put it together last 200 M doing best work late.

Slow into stride, back with last few 2 wide 8Ls off speed, helped by genuine tempo, still well back turning, made solid ground between horses picking up well last 200 M to hit front and score with some in hand.
Began with them, took up spot in midfield 3 wide with cover 5Ls back, did share of work in run, didn't respond in straight and just kept on at same speed racing greenly.

Began well, pressed on from a wide gate to be 3 wide without cover for first half, slipped in 2 wide 2 to 3Ls back on bend, under pressure on turning, soon weakened and gave in easily when run took toll.

Pushed to go forward early, after the 900 M continued to be ridden to avoid being caught racing wide and without cover. Near 800 M shifted across to be 3 wide outside leader no cover thereafter, faded in straight.
Parked just off midfield, 2 deep with cover. Had to shift out after entering the straight to get into the clear, but after having done so worked home well.

Landed in a forward position and near the 700 M after racing wide and without cover, was ridden along to go forward and shift across to race outside the lead. Copped a check near the 200 M, but was a spent force.
Slowly away and settled at the rear. Was a beaten horse turning for home.
Travelled midfield 3-wide with cover, dashed to the front approaching the 200 M, but peaked on its run over the latter stages.
Throughout the race travelled wide and without cover behind the speed and near the 800 M was steadied. Never likely.
Raced at the rear of the field, was checked near the 800 M, and then raced 4 deep with cover. Made forward move inside the 600 and ran home well down the outside.

When the gates opened was leaning against the outside of its stall, was slow to begin and lost a considerable amount of ground. Settled in last position, came to the outside in the straight and finished off well.
Slow to begin and settled midfield the fence. From on straightening until after the 300 M was held up and unable to obtain clear running, closed off strongly passing the 150 M.
Took up leading duties early in the event along the rail. Hung out on the circles and faded inside the 200 M.
Began awkwardly, then proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Settled 1 out 1 back, had every chance.
Raced behind midfield and was caught 4-5 deep with cover. Battled away in the run home.
Raced midfield, 2-wide with cover, struggled under pressure.
Raced on the back of the leader, found the front near the 200 M and kicked strongly along the inside for easy victory.
Settled at the rear of the field. 5Ls off the pace making home turn. Mounted a strong rally after straightening and swept past the field.
Raced alongside the leader early stages. Took a sit behind the pace near 800 M. Quickened after straightening and took the lead 200 M out. Failed to hold off the top pair final 100 M.
Behind midfield but no more than 4Ls off the pace. Quickened well after straightening. Unable to match strides with winner closing stages.
Soon took the lead. Headed 300 M out and faded gradually.
Raced along the fence and never more than 3Ls off the pace. Kept on fairly in the straight but no real threat to top pair.
Pushed along early to race behind the leaders. 2-wide in a disputed lead making the turn. Lacked the needed response to keep up after straightening and weakened.
Caught 3-wide no cover at the 1600 M, pressed on to dispute the lead out 2-wide from 1300 M to home turn, one-paced thereafter.
Held up as usual, about 10Ls last at 1400 M, still in rear about 5Ls down off final turn, ran on well but could only get as far as the winner's girth.
6Ls off pace at halfway out 2-wide, only 2Ls down out 4-wide turning for home, found more to lead at 200 M and always repelling the runner-up.
Uncharacteristically flat effort, led as usual at 1600 M but flanked by ALL CHANCES from 1300 M to home turn when headed, found nothing under pressure and eased late.
In 5th about 4Ls from the lead at 1000 M, on and off the bit until home turn when 1L back in 4th, didn't shirk the task even if he had his chance to place.
Raced more forward than normal, 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, led at top of home straight but headed by winner at the 200 M, one-paced late and just held on for 3rd.
Over-raced towards rear at 1600 M, 9Ls off speed in rear at 1400 M, 6Ls last turning in, never on terms and eased late. (Mucus.)
Towards rear about 8Ls off early pace, niggled along to improve at 600 M, never quite threatened the main players in home straight.
4Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, enjoyed a soft and prominent passage until home bend, possibly short of room 350 M out but ultimately outpaced.
Good riding to take up 3-wide position on fence 5Ls off pace at 1500 M, over 2Ls back in midfield on straightening, outpaced by the principals.
Got well back and no better than 6Ls from the front through to final turn, never competitive.
In front rank about 2Ls back in 3rd or 4th until home bend, given every chance but weak in the finish along the rail.
Never too far away, about 4Ls back in 5th from 800 M to home turn, cruised to the front 250 M out, pulled well clear, easily.
Midfield or better throughout, caught 3-wide no cover when 4Ls back in 5th at halfway, 2Ls down in 3rd at home bend and 200 M, very tired close home.
Set the early pace on fence, clear by about half a length from 800 M to final turn, dropped away tamely once headed 400 M out.
One from rear about 7Ls behind early tempo, 6-wide (widest of all) swinging for home, posed no threat whatsoever.
No early speed, towards rear about 7Ls from the speed until home turn, made some minor late ground past beaten rivals for 4th.
2Ls back in 5th at 1200 M, left 3-wide no cover on the circle, 4Ls down turning for home, weakened rapidly final 200 M.
Always worse than midfield at least 7Ls from the pace, never on terms.
On fence in midfield between 4Ls and 6Ls from the front through to final turn, made no impression.
Slowest to break, around midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls back until home turn, never threatened and eased late.
With cover around midfield about 6Ls off pace early on and marginally closer when 4-wide turning for home, kept on at same pace for a place.
Over-racing when 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd early on, still a close 2nd at top of home straight, gone by the 300 M. (Distressed.)
8Ls last at the 1200 M, 6Ls down in 10th turning for home, ran on quite well for 2nd but had no chance with the winner.
Settled in midfield early, moved steadily forward from 1200 M to sit outside the lead, enjoyed the slow early tempo, however soon weakened 250 M.
Hard ridden early to maintain the box seat, travelled nicely 1-1/2Ls off the slow pace, however held up for running 4-2, finished strongly when clear to grab a remarkable 3rd.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 5Ls behind the leaders, not suited by the slow early tempo, blocked 4-2, only showed little dash when clear.

Eased to sit about midfield and tracked the eventual winner, 3-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed well in final furlong to finish 2nd but without threatening to the winner.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, blocked most of straight until 100 M, dashed strongly when clear, just missed a placing.
Hard ridden early to keep up in a more prominent position about midfield, 5Ls behind the leaders 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, just ran on.
Awkward away, hard ridden to gain the rail and led at slow early sectionals, dropped off quickly soon after straightening.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, demonstrated strong finishing efforts last 300 M despite being harmed by the slow pace.
Eased to rear, 8Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, harmed by the slow pace, never accelerated.
Eased to sit about midfield, trapped 3 to 4-wide and lost ground, 4Ls off the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, lack turn of foot in straight and just held ground, flattened 100 M.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 3 to 5-wide throughout and lost ground, disadvantaged by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M.
Travelled half a length just outside the leader, helped by the slow early sectionals, led briefly 400 M, totally emptied 250 M.
Jumped well, easily settled in a prominent spot 2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, benefited by the slow pace, closed the race off strongly and kicked away over last 200 M to win easily.
Eased at start to cross the fence behind the field, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders, not suited by the slow early sectionals, no progress in final stages.
Travelled in 3L 4th on rails. Switched out for a run turning in. Fought on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well to lead early, settling one back on rails coming out of back straight. Chased leader into home straight but soon weakened.
Began fairly from poor draw. Gradually ridden to take up running coming out of back straight. Led field until headed by winner over 200 M out. Weakened.
Soon in rear. Made steady headway down centre of straight. Never nearer.
Broke well, settling in midfield. Tended to hang in when looking for a run early in straight. Finished off well.
Missed the break. Soon picked up to rear of field. Came to challenge under pressure after straightening. Only produced moderate progress without threatening.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield to straight. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 3rd, one-out-one-back rounding home bend and into straight. Soon came to challenge upon straightening and led over 200 M out. Hung on under pressure to the line.
Raced in midfield. Obtained a clear passage over 200 M out. Responded well to be nearest at finish.
Travelled on rails and never better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M. Nearest at finish.
Towards rear to straight. Soon weakened.
Raced 3-wide in 5th about 3Ls off the pace. Similar turning in but one-paced early in straight before fading under pressure inside final 200 M.

No early pace, took up a spot 6Ls back in 2 wide line, relaxed beautifully and helped by reasonable tempo, tracked well on bend, behind horses turning clear at 300 M and let down quickly, scored easily under hands and heels.

Lost considerable ground at start, recovered to race at rear 10Ls back, early paced helped but not assisted when it steadied at midpoint, still well back to bend, outclassed in stretch and made no impression.
Out with line, pressed on to take close order, unable to slot in and forced to race 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, improved 4 wide on bend, didn't let down and soon dropped out in straight.

Little pace from outset, ended up 2 wide 8Ls back behind midfield, suited by early speed, made a 3 wide run from 700 M when pace slowed, made gradual headway down middle in straight to take 3rd. Still improving.
Showed usual early pace to battle for front, did share of work before taking over in back straight, tried to steady from 1000 M, under pressure on bend, weakened out tamely in straight.
Moderate jump, faded back as usual to share rear 8Ls back in running line, last on turning making 3 wide run, made gradual progress down outside to be closest at finish.

Fast into stride, led early and proved difficult to settle, surrended after speed battle, raced outside leader thereafter, travelled keenly to turn, took over briefly turning but found trip too tough and dropped out.
Bounced out and settled quickly into rails slot, raced 3Ls back first behind leader, relaxed well and had an easy time throughout, had chance but appeared one paced over concluding stages.
Lacked early speed, assumed expected spot behind midfield 10Ls away early, helped by tempo, saved ground on bend to be 5Ls down angled out and closed race off nicely finishing best for 3rd.
Well enough to begin, ended up in midfield trailing position 4Ls back, had a soft run on rails in mid-section, in traffic on turning but lacked dash from 300 M and gave ground in run to line.
Began fairly, assumed ideal position 1 out 1 back 3Ls away, travelled well from midpoint, came 3 wide on circle, took over at 300 M, no match for winner late but fought on strongly all the same.
Restrained to race in rear. Second last turning for home. Made steady headway down straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well and niggled along to remain a 1L 3rd 3-wide. Improved to one-out-one-back position around home bend and still 2nd into straight. Found nothing.
Raced 3-wide better than midfield. Took closer order but wider turning in. Fought on under pressure to hold some chance over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Raced 3-wide towards the rear. Quickened well passing 300 M to assert over 100 M out. Won well.
Broke well. Disputed lead on rails. Gave up lead coming out of back straight and travelled one-back on rails to straight. Badly baulked early on before finishing race off nicely inside final 200 M.
Travelled behind midfield. Did not find much room on inside after straightening until too late near the finish. Not properly tested.
Settled mainly in better than midfield position. Did not find much room behind runners early in straight. Kept on to finish.
Raced wide behind midfield. Took closer order when still very wide around home bend. Gained closer from midfield into straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Raced in rear of midfield mainly 3 or 4 wide. Behind runners early in straight before attempting to switch out 200 M out. Fought on steadily closing stages without quickening.
Slightly slow out. Raced in rear. Hung out turning for home. Never nearer.
Raced in midfield. Faded steadily after straightening.
Close up in 4th 2-wide. Similar turning for home. Hit front over 200 M out but caught close home.
Broke well. Led or disputed lead far side. Crossed to rails and led from 800 M, holding a 1L break turning in. Headed over 100 M out and soon overhauled.
Began well, lobbed a prime position behind leader, tracked well throughout, right there turning, no clear run at 300 M, closed evenly when clear but couldn't sprint with winner last 200 M.
Began with first few, raced in coveted 1 out 1 back spot, 2Ls back throughout, 1L down on turning, gap emerged and looked a threat but only held ground in run despite proving difficult to ride out.
No real early pace after even jump, raced 2 wide in midfield 5Ls from front runners, travelled well between horses on bend, closed only at same speed when clear.
Away well, pressed on from a wide gate to race outside leader, had a fair trip but didn't settle on bend, hit lead turning in, held out to 200 M but couldn't dash with them last bit.
Ordinary break, shared rear 8Ls back racing 2 wide, niggled along on turning, didn't pass a runner and gradually lost touch in straight.

First to hit ground, pressed on but unable to slot in, raced 3 wide without cover, did share of work to bend, challenged turning, kept trying in straight and did well to hold on for 3rd given workload.
Moderate beginning, soon back amongst rearward division 6Ls or so away, had a fair run but not helped by tempo, well back approaching turn, never really nearer and just plugged away late.

Away poorly and lost ground when bumped, raced further back than usual, 7 to 8Ls away on rails, not aided by tempo. Still well back leaving bend saving ground on inside, made some headway in straight from an impossible spot.
No dash from gates, raced behind midfield 6Ls back on fence, tempo against but spent nothing in run, well back to turn, found little when asked and struggled to make an impression.
Only fair to begin, ended up in midfield running line 4Ls from leaders, had a reasonable run and tracked nicely on bend, into clear on turning, made steady progress in straight without threatening.

Broke with them, ended up in midfield 4Ls back but raced keenly throughout, had a soft run in mid-section, in traffic turning and no clear passage in straight but appeared to be only struggling to hold ground. (Checked 50 M.)
Bounced out, showed more pace than usual to take up the running, overraced in front and pressured throughout, under siege on turning in, found little and quickly weakened out.

Standard jump, raced 3 wide in midfield, 4 to 5Ls back, had cover in mid-section, improved on bend, 4Ls down at 200 M, accelerated nicely once balanced dashing hard to claim them at 150 M and score nicely.
No dash from outset and faded back to race 3 wide 6Ls away, not helped by standard pace, made a 4 wide run leaving circle, made some ground to 200 M but run ended late.
8Ls off pace in 9th at halfway, ridden along when 6Ls back turning for home, stayed on fairly well without threatening.
On fence 6Ls behind speed in 7th at 1200 M, nice headway to be 3Ls down in 5th off final bend, quickened well to lead 200 M out, drew clear, impressive.
Set a strong pace on fence in front by 1L from the 1300 M to home straight entrance, headed 300 M out and retreated quickly.
Briefly 3-wide no cover early on but got into the 'one-out- one-back' spot at 1100 M, still well there at top of homestretch but very weak in the finish.
Had the run of the race in 3rd about 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, close-up but starting to fade upon straightening, dropped out.
Worked early to race 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1200 M to home straight, led briefly 300 M out but soon headed and weakened.
Went back from wide gate, one from rear about 11Ls behind at 1200 M, 4-wide off home bend with 6Ls to make up, no impact.
2-wide and 6Ls back in 6th at 1200 M, 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Ridden coldly about 10Ls from the lead at 1200 M, niggled along to take closer order at 800 M, made some fair late ground but not enough to threaten a place.
4Ls off speed in 5th on fence at 1200 M, looked dangerous when 2Ls down in 3rd into home straight and closer 250 M out, one-paced and outclassed by SUNNY KING on the day.
Slowest away, 13Ls last at 1200 M, never really got into it.
10Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, about 6Ls back in 10th into homestretch, yielded ground.
Midfield early on, pushed out 3-wide no cover at 1100 M when 6Ls back in 8th, about 2Ls down when 4-wide turning in, no chance with winner but did well to take 2nd after extra work.
Niggled along at the beginning. Prominent to home bend and not far off entering straight. Dropped out upon straightening.
Trailed the field most of way to straight. Ran on past well-beaten horses closing stages.
Began only fairly. Quickly ridden up rails to hold narrow lead. Maintained a similar advantage turning in. Swamped inside 250 M.
Raced wide in prominent position. 5-wide when joining leaders rounding home bend. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out only to be denied close to home.
With leader early. Slightly lost position approaching home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled one back on rails within 2Ls of pace of the bunched field. Fought on steadily down inside of straight while racing tight inside and behind runners most of way.
Travelled in last few. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Disputed lead until gradually yielding ground from home bend. Soon dropped out after straightening. (Blood in trachea.)
Settled behind midfield. Quickened well inside final 300 M to assert close to home.
Wide in prominent position early. Lost position approaching home bend. Found nothing entering home straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Never far off in 4-wide position to straight. Only kept on at the same pace without quickening.

Began from widest draw. Taken to rear at start to cross to rails early. Raced in rear before taking closer order coming out of back straight. Behind midfield turning in but did not find much room throughout straight despite a switch.
Ridden hard early and settled midfield, 3-wide with cover. Didn't find any extra at the business end.

From a wide barrier raced in a forward position 3-wide and without cover. In the early stages hung in and did not travel comfortably. Near the 500 M carried 4-wide, shortly after this gave ground and was well beaten.
Couldn't match the early tempo and was made use of to obtain a forward position behind the leader. In the middle stages hung out, shortly after entering the home straight commenced to give ground.
Raced in last position, wide and ridden along to keep in touch for most of the trip. When under pressure over the last 300 M showed little.
Landed on the back of the speed, 1 off with cover, came 3-wide turning for home and took up the challenge early in the straight only to be ground down over the concluding stages.
Raced 1 off midfield with cover, searched for runs through the field but was off the bridle and failed to run on.
Led at a good clip, 4Ls clear on turning in, faded inside the 100 M.
Found the early pace too slick and settled in 2nd position from an outside gate. Came to the outside rounding the home bend and extended nicely for strong win.
Travelled towards the tail of the field, never in the hunt.
Average jump and raced midfield the fence, straightened up on the rails, no dash over the last furlong.
Hard ridden to race handy to the leaders on the fence, railed up in the run home but didn't kick and kept on at the same pace.

Began awkwardly then lost further ground when buffeted. Was checked near the 1000 M and settled behind midfield 1 off with cover. Took inside runs in the straight and despite being briefly held up near the 400 M, closed off soundly.
Settled in rear section. Made up ground by running through traffic in the straight. Carried wider near the line and not able to be ridden out fully.
2-wide and no better than Midfield. 5Ls off the lead making home turn. Ran on well in the straight but not able to threaten winner.
Raced behind the pace in a prominent spot. Ran down the early leader 200 M out but was soon headed by eventual winner. Kept on fairly final stages and held on for a minor placing.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Lacked the needed response in the straight and weakened.
Travelled nicely at midfield. 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Responded well and took the lead 200 M. Maintained a comfortable advantage to the finish.
Settled at the rear and trailed field into home straight. Mounted a strong rally in the straight and was closest at finish.
Followed the pace in a 2-wide spot. Had trouble keeping up turning for home. Weakened in the straight.
Off slowly and raced 2-wide in Rear section. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Led field, worked early but slowed in mid-section before tiring final 200 M.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until the 600 M, had the opportunity to place but failed to quicken.
Close to the pace but covering plenty of ground down backstretch, led at top of home straight but headed at 200 M, did enough for a place.
Towards rear about 8Ls off pace early, 3-wide turning for home when 6Ls back, minor late headway, nearest at finish.
3-back on fence and worse than midfield about 5Ls behind at 1000 M, without clear running turning for home but found zero once in the open.
Led on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, held a break until the final bend but swamped over 300 M out, eased close home.
In 2nd on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 600 M, one-paced and swamped inside final 200 M.
3-wide with cover down backstretch about 8Ls off pace, pressed on from 600 M but 6-wide (widest) turning in, stayed on strongly for 2nd but post came too soon.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover through to final turn in a midfield position roughly 3Ls or 4Ls from the speed, yielded ground final 400 M.
4Ls back and 2-wide in 5th at 1000 M, 4-wide swinging in and grabbed the lead at the 200 M, kept up to the job for a narrow win.
3-wide with cover about 5Ls back in 10th at 1000 M, not much better off turning for home, no impression.
4Ls behind in 4th on fence at 1000 M, driven along to maintain this proximity at the 600 M, weakened steadily.
