Slowest away, 12Ls last at 1200 M and 3-wide with cover, never on terms.
One from rear about 10Ls behind at 1200 M, headway when opting for an inside run which closed into home straight, switched out wider at 300 M, stayed on strongly, never nearer.
3-back on fence in 6th about 5Ls off speed at 1000 M, hard ridden to improve at the 600 M, had his chance to place.
Pressed on out 4-wide no cover early to track leader and winner out 2-wide at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd at top of home straight, faded out one-paced.
Nicely placed in 5th about 4Ls off pace and 2-wide until turning for home, stayed on best of the rest for 2nd but had little hope with the winner.
Always in the rear bunch at least 6Ls from the speed, never on terms.
Switched from wide gate to be 8Ls last at 1000 M, made only very minor late ground in the stretch.
2-wide in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls back until home bend, never dangerous.
Slowest away, got back and left 4-wide no cover at the 800 M when 6Ls back in 10th, never landed a blow.
3-back on fence in midfield about 5Ls from the front before the final turn, sluggish under pressure.
Always about 5Ls back in midfield with cover, very one-paced and no excuses.
On fence about 2Ls or 3Ls from the lead on fence in 3rd or 4th till the final turn, had every chance to at least take 2nd but was simply outpaced.
Well placed in 3rd or 4th out 2-wide between 2Ls and 3Ls from the speed until home bend, found very little under pressure.
Never better than midfield, towards rear with 5Ls or 6Ls to make up until home turn, no significant impression. (Lame next day.)
First to show out 3-wide without cover but soon crossed to lead on fence, up to 1L clear until home turn, driven clear for convincing victory.
Eased back, 3-wide throughout, helped by the fast pace and also the track pattern, however never competitive.
Hard ridden early to take a prominent spot, 3Ls off the fast pace 3-wide, helped by the track pattern, ran on well to the line for 3rd but never be a threat for the winner.

Hard ridden early to keep up with the field at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, favoured by the fast pace, however lacked room 400 M to 200 M, made ground steadily despite racing on the slower part of track.
Obtained a position just better than midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the fast pace, tried to make the move early but blocked 6-4 and was bumped, flattened when clear in straight.

Eased to sit just worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader 3-wide, swept forward 4 to 6-wide on straightening, benefited by the fast pace and as well as the track pattern, progressed steadily 300 M, dominated last 100 M.
Pushed to take the box seat 2-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the fast pace and raced on slower part of track, weakened quickly 300 M.

Hard ridden to take the rail and lead early, took sit 1L off the leader 2-wide from 1000 M, not suited by the fast early sectionals and raced on slower part of track, still managed to run on until 250 M when ran out of fuel.
Midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, swept forward 3 to 4-wide at home bend, was unfortunately held up from 6-2 and checked 300, run ended afterwards.

Eased at start to cross the fence behind the field, then soon moved up to occupy a midfield spot, 4-1/2Ls off the leader, favoured by the fast pace, but raced on slower part of track, dropped off 300 M.

Hard ridden to join the pace group, 1-1/2Ls off the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the fast early tempo, led and kicked away 400 M, hung on until 100 M overhauled, still ran on well to secure 2nd without other threats.
Eased at start to get closer towards the rail behind the field, 5-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, helped by the fast early tempo, blocked 4-2, no progress when clear.

Pushed early for a few strides then soon took back to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, swept forward 4 to 5-wide at home bend, helped by the fast pace and the track pattern, just ran on ok in straight.
Eased to rear, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader 4-wide throughout, favoured by the fast pace and the track pattern, made up some ground 250 M. (Jumped marks again.)
Pushed to take the lead steadily, 3-wide at stable bend, then took rail from 1000 M and clocked fast early sectionals, raced on slower part of track, faded rapidly 500 M.
Not far off on rails in just better than midfield position. Baulked for a run early in straight before making steady headway inside final 200 M.
Well there in 3rd. Hit front under pressure briefly 200 M out but soon swamped.
Showed usual early speed and led early. Headed approaching home bend. Gradually dropped out from 2nd into straight.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Towards rear early before picking up to 3-wide in midfield 1000 M out. Ran on steadily in straight but had no answer to winner's late burst of speed inside final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Close up. Took up running approaching home bend, going over 1L clear turning in, only to be caught inside 200 M.
Settled just better than midfield. Responded well inside 200 M to take charge close to home.
Settled in rear of midfield. Gave ground into straight. Found nothing. (Bled.)
Raced awkwardly at start. Jockey said saddle shifted jumping out. Never in contention.
Soon dropped to rear. Last into straight. Made moderate headway past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Travelled in rear. Produced moderate late headway inside final 200 M.

Restrained from gate, ended up sharing rear 2-wide 8Ls back, tracked forward 3-wide with pace steadied, made 4-wide run (without cover) on bend, 1L back turning in, kept giving but couldn't pair back margin late.
Taken back from wide alley, shared rear 7Ls back on rails, harmed by slow tempo, still had a job to do on bend, switched out turning in, only made moderate headway passing beaten runner.

Had enough early speed to take a prominent role outside leader, had an easy time in mid-section with sensible sectionals, couldn't sprint when tempo increased turning in and just held ground before weakening late.
Showed customary pace to take up running, backed off tempo after some early work, had a reasonable run dictating terms to bend, found little when challenged on turning and faded out easily.

Out in line, ended up just worse than midfield 5 to 6Ls back not helped by slow pace in mid-section, tracked 3-wide on circle, looked a threat turning in but just managed a one paced finish holding down 4th.
Began fairly, ended up a little closer than usual 3 to 4Ls back in midfield racing 2-wide, in traffic on circle, came to outside and closed off nicely for 3rd.
Began in line, faded back to race 6Ls away on rails, always in rearward division, chances harmed by muddling pace, didn't make any impact in straight.
Kept with them at first before drifting back to race 5Ls back beyond midfield, not asked in run but disadvantaged by pace, couldn't made impression and just battled to line.
Showed some dash from gates to take up box seat 1 out 1 back, had easy time 2Ls back, caught between horses on circle, in traffic to 200 M but only closed at same tempo when clear.
Showed usual pace, slotted into a forward spot first behind leader 2Ls back, had run of race with steady speed, niggled along on bend, found nothing and beaten a long way.

Jumped in line, faded back to rear 7Ls or so away, made a 3-wide run when pace slackened, pulled way forward working without cover, up challenging at 400 M, hit front shortly after and pulled out all stops to defy them.
Began well enough, took a midfield position 3Ls back on rails, had a soft run and used little to bend, niggled on turning, didn't find extra gear and just battled away in home stretch.
Showed pace from a wide alley to cross and lead, used a little early but backed off in mid-section, under pressure when challenged leaving bend, capitulated from 250 M showing little fight.
Had some early speed to go forward in search of front, raced 3 wide first without cover, crept closer to be right there turning in, didn't respond from 300 M and dropped out late.
Began in line, niggled to hold a midfield role 4Ls back in running line, in amongst horses on circle, had some trouble working into clear at 300 M but stayed on at same pace when in open running.

Standard jump, ridden along to race in leading group, had an ideal run behind leader, eased 2 wide on bend, on level terms at 400 M, kicked strongly 1 to 2Ls clear at 300 M, held on to score with something in hand.
Fair to begin, posted 4 wide in midfield without cover, pressed on in mid-section to be closer but used up to do so, up challenging on turning, run ended at 300 M and just plugged away thereafter.
Allowed to slide back to tail from a wide gate raced 7Ls away in running line, helped by fast early pace, tracked well on turn, made up plenty of ground from impossible spot to make frame.
Began in line, ended up 3 wide in midfield with cover 4Ls down, did share of work on bend, struggling on turning and didn't seem to make much impression in straight.

Away fairly but bustled up to race on pace, angled into 1 out 1 back spot with run of race to bend, still a little green making circle, into clear running at 350 M and stuck to task well but unable to peg back winner.

Out with rest but soon settled behind midfield in running line, not asked in mid-section, still 6Ls down on circle, between horses turning, made steady progress to 200 M before steadying, only battled thereafter.
Bumped early at ended up detached 10Ls back, always rearward and pushed along on turning, made little headway in home stretch.
Reasonable break, landed 3Ls back on rails, had a soft trip in mid-section, close enough same margin down turning, held ground in straight but was unable to lift a notch to threaten for place.
Moderate jump, drifted back to behind midfield, 6Ls back on fence sharing rear at midpoint, on bit on bend, kept to rails saving ground but found little passing only beaten runners late.
No early dash, drifted back to race 3 wide behind midfield 6Ls away, had cover throughout, did share of work, covering ground, switched out and did best work late down centre to make frame.

Slow into stride, settled behind midfield when recovered, raced on rails 5 to 6Ls back, not asked in middle stages, in traffic on turning, got no real crack at them in straight and was not properly tested.
Settled 1 off midfield, peeled out after straightening and hung out for some distance afterwards. Proved to be somewhat one paced down the running.
Raced 2 deep, had cover with the backmarkers. Made up satisfactory ground in the run home.
Raced at the tail of the field 4-wide without cover. Never in the hunt.
Enjoyed the run of the race in 2nd position, tired after the 450 M, had no excuses.
Took up leading duties and in the middle stages proved difficult to settle and would not relax while holding a commanding lead. Looked likely winner before tiring close to the line.
Settled near the rear of the field on the rails. Closed of nicely.
Was a little slow to begin, then despite being ridden failed to muster speed, settling midfield the fence. Angled out early in the straight and gained advantage in the shadows of the post.
After being caught wide early in a midfield position, was allowed to stride forward near the 600 M and shifted in, behind the leader, 2 deep. Commenced to give ground after the 400 M.
Travelled in a rearward spot 1 off with cover, struggled over the final furlong.
Travelled in 3rd position some lengths off the leader along the fence. For some distance after the 400 M, had difficulty obtaining clear running. Ran on soundly.
Raced in last positon came widest in the straight and ran on well.
Raced behind midfield but was caught wide for most of the trip, never likely.
Raced on the back of a quickly run race, made up good ground turning for home, worked to the line solidly.
Raced along the rails and no worse than midfield. Within 2Ls of the leader turning for home. Took the lead 200 M out but unable to hold off winner final stages.
Settled in rear section. Swung wide turning for home. Rallied and made up ground in the straight.
Travelled near midfield. 5 to 6Ls off the lead make home turn. Rallied home and was closest at finish.
2-wide and settled at midfield. Lacked the needed response in the straight and weakened final stages.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Ran on well in the home straight and showed a nice closing run.
Pushed along in early stages and took some time to get to a forward spot. 2-wide and behind leader in back straight. Commenced to fade at home turn and weakened in the straight.
Ridden out of the gates and led briefly. Settled behind the pace from 1600 M onwards. Regained lead 300 M out but unable to find enough to stay in contention final 200 M.
Better than midfield racing a little keenly. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Within 3Ls of the pace turning for home. Found some traffic 300 M out but staged a strong closing run to gun down rival final stages.
Settled behind midfield. Took a wide turn home and made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Midfield early stages. Made up some ground after 1600 M and was better than midfield in back straight. 4-wide and 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Remained on same pace and weakened final stages.
Led a steady pace. Headed 300 M out and gradually faded.
Unable to find enough speed to go forward and had to settled towards the rear. Had trouble keeping rounding the home turn and trailed field into the straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Taken back from widest draw and trailed field. Made a ground saving trip around home turn and closed the race off strongly.
3-back on stands' rail about 4Ls off pace through to the final 200 M, ceded ground final 200 M. (Bled.)
Prominently placed within 2Ls of the speed until the 200 M, kept on well for a place.
Midfield about 4Ls behind early speed, headway to be 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, stayed on well down centre of track but post came too soon.
Slowest away, always worse than midfield and never got much closer than 3Ls from the speed.
Tracked leader on stands' rail 2Ls off pace in 5th or 6th until the 400 M, came under pressure at 1400 M but held ground closing stages.
Worse than midfield about 4Ls off early speed, made some decent late ground, never nearer.
Midfield down centre of track prior to improving to 1L down in 4th at the 200 M, failed to sustain the effort final stages.
6Ls back in rear at 800 M, making some improvement through the field when steadied at 100 M, ran on again, never nearer.
Covered up in midfield through first half, tried to challenge final 400 M but outpaced by leading trio.
Behind early down centre of track, flat out when 2Ls down in midfield at the 200 M, outpaced.
Towards rear throughout on the wrong (centre) part of the stretch, not given a hard time final 200 M.
Hung left within 2Ls of the pace until halfway, didn't find much off the bridle final 400 M.
Soon led on fence, between a neck and 1L clear before being headed 300 M out, tired final 200 M.
1L back in 2nd nearer stands' rail before hitting the front 300 M out, responded well for pressure.
Slowly away, about 9th place and 5Ls or so from the lead with cover until home turn, made some late headway for 4th.
Led on fence by 1L at 1200 M and same margin clear to top of home straight, headed 300 M out but held his ground late.
In rear bunch at least 7Ls from the pace until home turn when 3-wide, never dangerous.
Slowest away and switched to rail from wide gate, about 7Ls down in rear until final turn, posed little threat.
Mostly 3-wide no cover down backstretch in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls from the front, never got to grips with the principals.
Well back and 4-wide no cover throughout, 8Ls behind off final bend, soon beaten.
2-wide and 2Ls in 3rd at 1000 M, ridden along to maintain this proximity at home turn but soon swamped, eased final 200 M.
8Ls last at 1000 M and still well back on straightening, failed to quicken up.
2-wide in midfield at halfway about 5Ls off pace, similar position swinging for home, one-paced.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 2nd at the 800 M and 3Ls down in 4th off home bend, every chance to run 2nd but outfought by DECENT FELLOW.
3-wide with cover towards rear at least 6Ls behind early tempo, never on terms in latter half of race.
Crossed from wide gate to be 2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, 1L back on fence in 2nd at 800 M, led 300 M out, driven clear.
4Ls back in 5th on fence at 800 M, soon under pressure and looked set to weaken out at top of home straight, battled on dourly to nick 2nd close home.
4-back on fence about 6Ls off pace in 8th or 9th at 1000 M, same off final turn, short of room in places on the run-in but unlikely to have got much closer. (Lame.)
Eased back, 8Ls behind the leader 3 to 4-wide, raced keenly, not suited by the slow tempo, little dash 200 M and made up some ground late.
Jumped well, then eased to sit behind the pace group, however failed to obtain cover and raced keenly, 3Ls off the leader trapped 3-wide, lacked turn of foot in straight, ran on only fairly.
Eased at start to cross the rail behind the field, 8Ls off the leader, disadvantaged by the slow tempo, never showed any significant finishing effort.
Eased back, 5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight, still managed to demonstrate little dash under restricted room.
Eased back, 6Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, raced keenly and harmed by the slow pace, no turn of foot in final stages.
Occupied a comparatively forward spot along the fence, 4Ls off the leader about midfield, not suited by the slow pace, no dash, flattened 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader 3-wide, raced keenly, dashed well 250 M despite harmed by the slow pace, placed 3rd for some distance, however run ended 50 M and overhauled.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 6Ls behind the leader 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, dashed strongly 200 M to finish a strong 3rd.
Took rail and led easily at soft early sectionals, kicked 400 M and hung on strongly to win.
Hard ridden early, trapped wide outside the pace group, then soon eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader trapped 4-wide and lost ground, harmed by the slow pace, emptied in straight.
Slow away, but soon moved forward and settled just behind the pace group, 3Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, dropped off steadily 300 M.
Eased to rear, 9-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, started pushing along from 800 M but lacked response, swept forward 5-wide on straightening, lost ground, stayed flat until 150 M, showed little dash.
Settled 1-1/2Ls 2-wide outside the leader, enjoyed the slow early sectionals, however soon weakened 300 M.
Pushed to occupy the box seat, favoured by the slow early tempo, once threatened the winner in early straight, closed the race off strongly but only good enough to finish 2nd.

Broke well and close up early. Lost position when awkwardly placed behind runner and dropped to 5th some 2Ls back coming out of back straight. Baulked for a run after straightening and finished off race nicely final 200 M.
Broke well. Showed early speed to lead holding a length's break most of way until tiring and swamped over 200 M out.
Slightly slow out. Quickly picked up wide far side to be 3-wide in 1L 3rd rounding home bend. Shakened up after straightening but unable to quicken and overhauled inside final 200 M.
Raced wide and at times keenly in mid-division. Still 3-wide turning in. Responded well to grab lead 200 M out. Won convincingly.
Travelled just worse than midfield to straight. Dropped out tamely. (Heart irregularity.)
Settled just worse than midfield and was 7th turning in. Shifted inside for a run early in straight but did not find much room around the 200 M mark. Sustained progress to the line.
Settled in rear. Did not find much racing room on rails early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Began well. Niggled along to race mainly in 1-out-1-back position to straight. Gradually weakened before checked and lost further ground over 200 M out.
Raced one-back in 4th on rails within 2Ls of pace. Similar turning for home but soon weakened.
Soon settled at the back. Trailed the field into straight. Finished off race well inside final 200 M.

No pace from jump and assumed rearward position, raced 7 to 8Ls, helped by genuine tempo, still well back leaving bend, saved ground and made plenty of headway late between horses only warming up last 200 M. (Steadied 150 M.)
Showed pace from outset, led early before handing up after working to race behind leader, did share of work on bend with even tempo, challenged turning but couldn't dash, weakened out late.
Well enough away, ended up first without cover 3Ls away, had a reasonable run but didn't get a breather, made presence felt to 250 M but struggled thereafter weakening out late.
Even getaway, took a position in midfield racing 2 wide, 3 wide with cover from 800 M, trailed well on bend, didn't let down when sprint went on and only battled away in straight.
Standard jump, to race midfield in running line 5Ls back, became unbalanced at 800 M and steadied, lost position and rearward on turning, last run at 300 M, closed only fairly thereafter.
No early toe, shared rear 7 to 8Ls back in running line, suited by tempo, still close to last on bend, came widest in straight, gradually took ground off them to be nearest on line. Nice effort.

Out with line, pressed on to hold a spot behind pace on rails 3Ls or so back, had an ideal trip, saved ground on bend, angled into clear turning, came with dash to hit lead at 200 M and fought hard losing advantage late.

Bumped and lost ground on jumping, unable to slot in and posted 3 wide early, had some cover 5 to 6Ls back suited by tempo, travelled well 3 to 4 wide turning, closed best down centre to gain ascendancy late.

Reasonable jump, pressed on and used a bit to take up running, over-raced as expected and set a useful speed, 1L clear on turning, held them off until 200 M but found out thereafter and couldn't respond.
Out with line, unable to slot in and raced 3 wide without cover 4Ls back, gradually crept closer but used resources to do so, niggled on turning, couldn't contend turning and faded out. (Mucopus.)
Standard jump out, raced behind midfield 6Ls or so from top end, enjoyed a quiet run on rails using little to bend, took a split at 300 M and closed off nicely to make frame.
Broke well from wide draw, settling one-back outside leader rounding home bend. Gradually faded.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. In similar position turing in. Fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind midfield. Produced good late impression under pressure inside final 200 M.
Never far off in 3-wide position to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Travelled in last few. Slightly inconvenienced 300 M out. Produced moderate late impression inside final 200 M.
Always well back and made no show.
Soon dropped to rear. Made no impression in the run home.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Went about 2Ls clear before winner quickened over 200 M out. Headed inside 100 M.
Tracked leader one back in 3rd on rails. Soon obtained split after straightening and quickened well to take charge just inside 100 M. Readily.
Travelled in better than midfield position far side. Midfield turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Reared before start and slightly slow out. Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace behind runners early in straight before quickening inside 200 M. Did best work at finish.
Travelled mainly in 6th just better than midfield. No clear run when hanging in behind runners early in straight. Kept on steadily to the line. Not quite properly tested.
Towards rear and wide. Soon weakened into straight.
Soon in prominent position, racing one-out-two-back in 4th. Just kept on at the same pace in straight.
No pace from outset, raced in rearward division 6Ls away on rails, not used in mid-section, pace was a disadvantage and overraced on bend, only battled on at same speed in straight.

Hit ground running and showed plenty to lead, dictated terms from outset with steady speed, still controlled race 1L clear on turning, found plenty in straight to hold off placegetters late. Well clear of rest.
Began well enough, shuffled when trying to slot in, raced 7Ls back in running line, not assisted by tempo, still well back on bend, only managed to hold ground in straight
Ordinary to break and ended up at rear, raced 8Ls back, harmed by tempo, still sharing tail on turning, only passed tired runners late.

Out reasonably, tried to angle in but instead posted 3 wide without cover in midfield 4Ls back, did share of work to bend, 4 wide turning, threatened to 300 M but flattened thereafter and weakened late.
Began a little awkwardly and lost ground, ended up in ideal spot 1 out 1 back, overraced in mid-section, a little unbalanced turning, closed off nicely when balanced up to make frame. Still green.
Had some early pace, crossed to race outside leader, had a reasonable run in mid-section, 3 wide turning in, there to 250 M but faded out thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
No early pace, ended up 5Ls back in running line, not helped by pace, back between horses on bend, held up 200 M, made steady progress through pack when clear in straight without threatening.
Standard jump, unable to slot in and caught 4 wide beyond midfield, did plenty of work and not helped by tempo, came 4 wide turning, kept coming in straight to be nearest at finish.

Taken back from outside alley, raced mid-section further back than usual 8Ls back 2 wide, trained by slow pace, had field to beat on bend, found little in straight and just plodded last 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

No pace as usual at back early but drove through to race 4Ls back on rails, had a quiet time in mid-section racing closer than expected, in behind horses turning, warmed up last 200 M to close stylishly for 3rd.
Began well, assumed spot 3Ls back on rails, had a soft trip with steady tempo, used nothing to bend, followed nicely and made ground on leader last 300 M but didn't have enough to quite get there.

No pace from outset, ended up 3 wide towards rear, 7Ls away, disadvantaged by slow tempo in middle stages. Still some margin away turing, switched to outside and made good progress from an impossible spot.
Amongst first few to begin, assumed spot on leaders back, had ideal trip with steady tempo, moved 3 wide at 800 M, right there on turning, couldn't dash with them at 300 M and faded last furlong.
Soon dropped to rear. Never seen with a chance. (Heart Irregularity.)
Always well back.
Settled around midfield. Finished off race well down centre of straight.
Close up. Travelled mainly one-out-one-back before taking over 200 M out. Won handily.
Mainly in rear of midfield. Fought on steadily after straightening until finding no extra closing stages. (Finished 4th, placed 5th.)
Not far off far side. Slightly lost position around home bend. Ran home one-paced in straight.
Never far off travelling mainly 2-wide within 3Ls of pace to straight. Soon weakened.
Began fairly from poor draw. Raced wide in midfield to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Mainly in just better than midfield position to straight. Steadied over 250 M out. Recovered some late ground closing stages. (Heart Irregularity.)
Jumped best and ridden to bend. Led to 200 M. Weakened.
Raced mainly 4-wide in prominent position. Kept on before finding no extra over 200 M out.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Soon ridden to race in 3rd last position. Improving when steadied for a run 200 M out. Continued to make ground to the line. (Finished 5th, placed 4th.)
Raced inside the leader on the fence until being crossed passing the 600 M. Looked the likely winner before fading on its run inside the 100 M.
Raced in front of midfield 1 off with cover, failed to quicken when under pressure in the run home.
Found the lead early but was always 1 off until crossing to the fence near the 600 M. Allowed to open up a slight margin turning for home but weakened inside the 200 M.
Settled in last position and struck interference near the 700 M. Kept to the rail in the straight and closed off soundly.
Shortly after the start, was checked when crowded for room and travelled towards the rear of the field along the fence. Worked home fairly but was steadied near the 100 M.

Raced on the back off the speed, 1 off with cover, was left racing without cover near the 600 M. Commenced to give ground prior to straightening and weakened right out over the concluding stages. (Lame morning after.)
Raced 3 back on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight. Lengthened nicely and gained the upper hand inside the 100 M.
Settled behind midfield, 3 deep with cover. Was checked severely near the 700 M and never recovered.
Raced in 2nd last position, and received interference near the 700 M. Came to the outside in the straight and made late ground.

In the early stages, when wide and without cover was steadied near the 1300 M and raced midfield, 3-wide with cover. Was then left racing without cover after the 950 M and near the 700 M the rider was dislodged.
Enjoyed the run of the race on the fence tracking the 2 front runners. Kept on strongly in the run to the post.
Slow to begin and travelled midfield 2 deep. Kept on to the final furlong but struggled from that point on.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Ran on well in the straight and picked up a minor placing.
Boxed seated behind the leader. Kept on fairly after straightening but unable to turn up a notch.
Lead or disputed lead. Held a length's advantage 200 M out but unable to hold off winner final 50 M.
Jumped only fairly. Advanced steadily and was racing among leaders from 800 M out. Just off the pace turning for home and weakened gradually thereafter.
Caught wide and raced behind the leaders. Midfield and widest turning for home. Didn't find much in the home straight.
Jumped well and led briefly. Sat behind the leaders in back straight. Had trouble keeping pace rounding home turn and weakened in the straight.
Behind midfield early stages. Made up ground along the rails after 800 M and was 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Quickened and ran down early rival final 50 M to secure victory.
Steadied at 1000 M and forced to settle 3-wide at midfield. 2-wide and 5 to 6Ls off the pace making home turn. Made up ground in the straight but posed no serious threat.
Raced in rear section. Saved ground along the rails making home turn. Ran on only fairly in the straight.
3-wide in a disputed lead. Gradually lost touch at the home turn and weakened in the straight.
Off slowly and trailed field until home straight. Made up ground by running past beaten runners.
Settled towards the rear and trailed field into home straight. Rallied and made up good ground in the straight.
Nicely placed in one-out-one-back position in 4th until the 600 M, lacked a kick when it mattered.
2-wide with cover about 6Ls behind early pace in 8th or so, tracked CENTENNIAL SMILE 3-wide with cover into home turn, kept on well to lead inside final few strides.
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until the 600 M, soon came under pressure to keep up and beaten before the home turn. (Heart Irregularity.)
Led on fence 1300 M out, set a very slow tempo until final bend, headed 250 M out and weakened, no excuses.
3-back on fence in midfield about 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, worse off and crowded turning for home, no impression.
One from rear about 8Ls back at the 1000 M, improved soon after but 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, stayed on fairly well for 4th.
10Ls last at 1000 M behind a slow pace, pressed on 3-wide no cover from the 700 M to join leaders at top of home straight, had his chance and only just failed.
4-back on fence in 7th at the 1000 M, shuffled back to last turning for home, never on terms thereafter.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls behind leader until the 600 M, could only finish off one-paced along the inner.
Sat 2-wide outside leader and 1L from the pace until the 600 M, driven along to lead 250 M out, headed inside final 100 M and only just missed the quinella.
Dwelt at start, on fence 6Ls back in 9th at halfway, 3Ls back in midfield swinging for home, outpaced by principals.
3-back on fence about 4Ls back 5th from 1100 M to final turn, stayed on nicely along the fence to lead 100 M out, kept on well.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 4th at 1100 M and held this position till home straight, one-paced in the finish.
4-back on fence in 7th at 1100 M when 6Ls from the front, still midfield when unbalanced entering straight, made some ground late, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 1L down in 2nd from 1100 M and just a neck 2nd making final turn, had his chance to at least place but the run petered out final 100 M.
Caught 4-wide no cover in rear early on, got in 2-wide with cover 7Ls behind speed in 11th at 1100 M, still well back on straightening, tame finish.
Trapped 3-wide without cover through to home turn while about 4Ls down in 8th or so, extra work took its toll in the straight.
6Ls back in 9th with cover at the 1200 M, not much closer on straightening, made some late ground while hanging in under pressure.
Led by 1L on fence at 1100 M, a neck clear entering straight and headed at 250 M, one-paced close home. (Bled.)
8Ls down in rear early, 7Ls last on straightening, made some nice late ground, never nearer.
5-back on fence towards rear at least 7Ls off pace until final turn, made some decent late ground without threatening.
5Ls down in 6th out 2-wide at 1100 M, 4Ls down in same position at final turn, ran on well down centre of track of track for a place.
In 3rd on fence 2Ls off speed until home turn, ran on well for 2nd but couldn't match pace of winner.

Pushed along to obtain a prominent spot 1-1/2Ls off the leaders, trapped 5-wide at 1st bend, then crossed to 2-wide, favoured by the slow tempo, closed the race off nicely but just good enough to finish 2nd.

Hard ridden early but lacked usual speed, only managed to occupy a spot just better than midfield, 2-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, never progressed in straight, lacked room last 50 M.
Prominent early, checked 900 M and lost ground, settled 4-1/2Ls off the leaders along the fence, dashed strongly 250 M to grab its first win despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to rear and crossed towards the fence, 6-1/2Ls behind the leaders, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 200 M.
Secured a midfield spot from a better draw, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, checked 900 M, harmed by the slow pace, blocked most straight and run closed at 100 M, kept dashing well to the line.
Slow away, eased to sit 5Ls off the leaders, raced keenly without cover 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, never progressed.
Eased to sit just better than midfield, 3Ls off the leaders, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, not suited by the slow tempo, just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and shared the lead at advantageous slow early sectionals, crowded for room and unbalanced on straightening, ran on well until 200 M when flattened.
Pushed early to take the rail, then settled easily in box seat, checked 900 M and lost ground, 2Ls off the slow pace, lacked turn of foot in straight, held up for running 150 M.
Worse than midfield, 5Ls behind the leaders 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace and lost some ground at the bends, still managed to deliver strongly finishing efforts 300 M to run a remarkable 3rd.
Trapped 3 to 5-wide without cover throughout at the back despite pushing along early on, disadvantaged by the slow pace and lost too much ground at bends, just ran on in final stages.
Slow away, hard ridden to share the leader 2-wide, helped by the slow early sectionals, ran on well to 100 M when run ended.
Ridden for speed early. Soon settled in midfield passing winning post the first time. Came under pressure rounding home bend but found nothing.
Raced wide without cover in prominent position to 400 M. Dropped away quickly.
Jumped in air and lost ground at start. Travelled towards rear to straight. Fought on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Improving well when forced to switch out for a run 150 M out. Sustained a strong finish to the line.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield. Went wide and became last turning in. Found nothing in straight.
Travelled in forward of midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Fought on under strong pressure to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain nearing finish.
Settled at the back. Finished off race well to assert close to home.
Well there travelling inside leader on rails. Hit front rounding home bend and led to 300 M. Folded up quickly.
Led field but not able to cross to rails. Lost advantage coming out of back straight. Dropped out tamely over 200 M out.
Not too far off one back on rails within 2Ls of pace. Quickened for a gap to hold slight chance early in in straight. Unable to sustain inside final 200 M.
Settled on rails in midfield. Switched out to the centre of straight to challenge. Ran on to hit front briefly inside 200 M but soon collared.
Broke well. Raced one-out-one-back in 3rd. Came to challenge turning in. Hit front under pressure 200 M out despite hanging in. Soon swamped.

Moderate beginning, soon back with lat few, raced 5Ls back in running line, well back on circle and not helped by dash home, made no impact in straight (see racing incidents - jockey not happy with action.)
No early pace, restrained to slot in at tail 9Ls back on rails, not helped by leisurely pace up front, gave too big a start turning in but made little headway all the same.
Standard getaway, raced 5Ls back in running line, not helped by steady sectionals at top end, improved on circle to middle and closed off soundly late to snatch a place.
No pace from outset, ended up 2-wide 9 or so lengths off pace, harmed by tempo in middle stage, lobbed along at tail to bend, made an effort to improve but only passed tired runner late.

Began with more purpose, took a closer position, had run of race 1 out 1 back thereafter, helped by slow tempo, caught a little flat footed when they dashed, 3rd on turning but effort petered out at 100 M.

Bounced out with them, took up a position in front of midfield, had a quiet trip on rails, forced to angle off to avoid tiring horse leaving bend, made even ground in stretch to finish a close up 5th.

Ordinary jump but ridden hard to take closer order, assumed more prominent role outside leader, had a good trip with easy tempo, joined leader turning, mid-point at 200 M and held on strongly sustaining late challenge.
Fastest into stride, took lead easily, controlled tempo and dictated terms to throughout, wound up from Rock when challenge, fought strongly and right there to 100 M when run ended.

Moderate jump, ridden up and held 1 out 2 back spot, had nice run of race 3Ls back, suited by tempo, in mid-section, ridden along to improve on circle, kept coming in straight and did enough to make frame.
Bounced out, took a close up spot on leaders back, no excuses in run with steady pace on, urged along when speed increased on bend, found little from turn weakening rather easily.
Seasonable break, drifted back to race beyond midfield 6 to 7Ls back on rails, spent little in mid-section, kept to inside on turning but unable to threaten just battling in straight.

Slow into stride, drove through into midfield to race 4Ls back on rails, had a soft run in mid-section, unable to improve on bend when tired horse came back, kept to inside, only picked up last 200 M flying late to just miss.

Slow into stride, lost further ground when checked, rearward 4Ls back, in traffic when improving at 600 M and checked at 400 M, continued to make good headway before striking more trouble inside last 50 M.
Showed natural pace to be up sharing lead off outside fence, kept pace genuine throughout, right there to 150 M before condition gave out and was passed late.
No pace from jump, lost ground and raced detached 8Ls or so away, niggled throughout, made little impression in run to line.
Ordinary jump, raced detached at rear of main group, best part of 8Ls back towards centre of course, never nearer.
Standard jump, raced 2 to 3Ls back on outside rail, under pressure at midpoint, found nothing and dropped right out.
Began well enough, not far away early but ended up 3Ls back by midpoint racing in centre of course, tried hard but lacked pick up over the concluding stages.
Began with them, camped behind leaders 2Ls off lead, improved to be on terms at 200 M, asserted authority last 100 M and went on for another strong win.
Unbalanced on jumping, regathered and raced 2Ls back towards middle, improved from 500 M, kept finding inside last 300 M to land a solid 3rd. Nice debut.
Standard jump, raced 3Ls back towards outside rail, niggled along at midpoint, lacked extra dash last furlong, battled away in run to line.
Showed customary pace, shared lead between middle and outside rail, kept speed genuine throughout there to 300 M but capitulated quickly which is now becoming a common scenario in these events.
Moderate getaway, soon at rear racing along outside rail, 5Ls back, made ground from 400 M, 3Ls down at 150 M, steadied 50 M when finishing hard to make frame.
No great early pace, raced in middle of bunch 2 to 3Ls back, tracked well throughout, shifted at 200 M into clear running, closed race off nicely making good late ground.
Plenty of natural pace, up sharing lead towards stand side, niggled from 400 M, found little when asked and fitness gave out swiftly, checked at 200 M when weakening.
Crowded shortly after start, ended up 3Ls or so back in midfield towards centre of course, didn't have another gear and just held ground in run to line.
Just prior to the start being effected became fractious, then reared as the gates opened and as a consequence lost a considerable amount of ground. Raced at the rear and was never competitive.
From a wide gate was dropped into a rearward position one off with cover. Rolled forward inside the 500 M, and worked to the line satisfactorily.
Raced near the rear of the field, along the fence, came wide in the straight but made little impression.
Pulled early and was steadied near the 900 M, and settled 2 back with cover. Shuffled back another position passing the 700 M but found nothing in the run home and plodded to the post.
Settled 3-wide with cover, midfield. Ridden along to stay in touch after the 500 M, responded and worked to the line well.
Parked behind the leader on the fence, had every conceivable chance.
Raced 3 back, but was caught wide and without cover after the 800 M. Struggled over the last furlong.
Raced on the back of the speed, 3 deep with cover. Rolled out turning for home, picked up well and went to the post strongly.
Raced outside the leader early, then gained cover to travell 1 out 1 back after the 700 M. Gave in quickly passing the 400 M.
Raced 3-wide early and slipped across to race outside the leader near the 700 M. Weakened inside the final stages.
Raced close to midfield, 1 off with cover. Stayed on dourly in the straight.
Shared leading duties on the fence, overhauled inside the 100 M and faded in the run to the post.
Raced 4-wide early with the front division, then travelled 3 deep without cover after the 800 M until turning for home. Kept on soundly in the straight.
Travelled midfield the fence, gave ground early in the straight.
Raced at the back as usual and trailed field into home straight. Staged a strong rally and made up good ground in the straight.

Jumped awkwardly and lost ground. Settled on the fence behind midfield. Made up a bit of ground rounding the turn. Continued well in the straight despite having to weave through slow traffic. Unable to sustain run late.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Made a strong run between rivals in the straight but just cannot find enough to gain ground on eventual winner final stages.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Switched out for a run turning for home. Quickened nicely and ran down early leader 100 M out. Kept on well final stages to maintain advantage.
Hard ridden early stages to be in a disputed lead. Shook off co-leader 200 M out and kept on fairly. Unable to find more to hold off principals final stages.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Continued its run along the fence in the home straight and kept on steadily for a minor placing.
Dropped to the rear and then shifted to the fence. Remained in rear section and made a ground saving trip rounding home turn. Made up some ground in the straight.
Settled behind midfield. Steadily made up ground in the straight but unable to sustain the run over the closing stages.
Disputed lead before tiring final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and raced wide without cover at midfield. Taken back to race behind midfield after 1000 M. Slipped further back at the turn and found nothing in the straight.
Raced on the rails behind the leaders. Lacked a response when asked on straightening and dropped out.
Jumped well from a wide draw and raced among leaders early stages. Settled 2-wide behind the leaders after 1000 M. Unable to pick up after straightening and weakened final stages.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Only kept same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section and near last on straightening. Closed the race off with a strong rally.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, 1L down in 2nd at home turn, had every chance to win but came up a head short.
Always worse than midfield, about 9Ls adrift at halfway, 5Ls down in 12th and under pressure swinging for home, no impression.
Keen early on, restrained about 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, ridden along to take closer order taking final bend, never on terms.
Better than midfield about 5Ls from the front at 800 M, 4-wide and closer turning for home, had his opportunity to at least place but run peaked 200 M out.
Midfield on fence about 6Ls back at halfway, burrowed through to lead 200 M out, did just enough to hold a margin.
6Ls from the pace in midfield at halfway, without cover from the 600 M and 4-wide turning in, all out to be 1L down in 4th or so at 200 M but tired late.
On fence about 7Ls down in 8th at midway, edged closer on straightening but held up until the 100 M, unlucky not to have finished closer.
4Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls down off final turn, unbalanced when challenging 300 M out, always just held by leading trio.
Pressed on out wide to lead on fence by 2Ls at 1200 M, just 1L ahead and off the bit at final turn, soon headed and swamped 200 M out.
On fence 4Ls back in 4th at 1000 M, closer in 3rd swinging for home, had his chance but couldn't get past the winner.
Caught 3-wide no cover down back straight in 10th or so about 8Ls from the pace, 4Ls back into final bend, weakened.
Disappointing run, 3-wide with cover in rear about 9Ls off pace at halfway, 5-wide (widest of all) turning for home, never a factor.
10Ls off speed in rear at 1200 M, 4-wide and at least 6Ls behind in 13th off final bend, posed little danger.
Keen early on, towards rear about 8Ls from initial tempo, 4Ls back about 10th on top of home straight, one-paced.
With cover about 2Ls from the speed in 4th until home turn, never quite got to grips with leading trio and petered out final 200 M.
About 4Ls behinds speed in midfield until home turn, could only stay on at the same pace.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace until home turn, stayed on only fairly in the finish.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th until the 600 M, found nothing off the bridle and very weak final 200 M.
Held up as usual towards rear, about 7Ls down in 12th turning for home, stayed on well while hanging in and just missed a place.
Raced outside winner with cover about 5Ls off pace, left without cover on the circle and yielded ground soon after straightening.
About 3Ls off early pace in 5th, hung out 3-wide no cover from 800 M to home turn when 1L down in 3rd, all out to be a neck 2nd at 200 M, faded final 200 M.
4-back on fence about 5Ls from the speed until the home turn, held up for a run off home turn and checked 300 M out, recovered to nick 3rd on the line.
3-back on fence about 4Ls from the speed until the home straight, launched his bid inside final 200 M but outpaced by the winner.
With cover around midfield about 6Ls behind early pace, still with plenty ground to make up on straightening but picked up well to lead 100 M out and ran on well.
Soon led on fence, clear by about 1L from 1000 M to home turn, headed 300 M out and fizzled out.
Poor debut, slowest away, always detached in rear and never better than 8Ls off speed from the 1000 M.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn and going well, led 300 M out but headed about 100 M out and tired late.
Worse than midfield about 7Ls at 1000 M, worse off turning for home, offered little.
Eased back as usual, 5Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace and held up for running in major part of straight, showed little dash and made some ground without being fully tested.

Eased to sit in front of midfield, trapped 4-wide throughout without cover, raced too keen and moved forward from 800 M, suited by the slow tempo, but soon dropped off 400 M. (Irregular heart beat and blood in trachea.)
Eased at start to cross behind the field for cover, 6Ls off the leader 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, dashed strongly 250 M but too late to grab a placing.
Settled in prominent spot behind the leaders, 2-1/2Ls off pace 3-wide without cover, made the move 600 M, favoured by the slow tempo, closed the race off strongly to finish a close 3rd.
Eased back as usual, 4-1/2Ls behind the leader, trapped 4-wide and lost ground, not suited by the slow tempo, dashed well to the line and made ground steadily last 300 M.

Eased to settle in box seat, travelled nicely, however blocked most straight. Not suited by the slow tempo and unable to be fully tested early in straight, just held ground when clear running presented.

Jumped almost the best, however eased back to rear, unable to obtain cover and trapped 4 to 5-wide, 6-1/2Ls off the leader, lost ground on bend and harmed by the slow pace, finished race off strongly last 400 M, run ended at 50 M.
Very slow away, but soon moved forward to sit in midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leaders 3-wide, momentarily blocked 400 M, dashed well to the line despite harmed by the slow pace.

Settled half a length away outside the leader, travelled comfortably without being used in early stages, benefitted by the slow early sectionals, however ran on only fairly in straight and emptied 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost ground, demonstrated superior finishing efforts last 400 M despite not suited by the slow pace.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, blocked 4-2, dashed strongly when clear to score a stylish victory.
Eased to sit just behind the leader 2-wide, 2Ls off the slow pace, had every chance in straight, lacked turn of foot, flat late and didn't make an impact.
Very slowly away, at rear, 7-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, dashed well 300 M, however on heels 200 M, then flattened afterwards.
Pushed forward and obtained the lead along the rail, benefited by the slow early sectionals, hung on until 50 M when overhauled, held ground for 2nd.
Settled just behind midfield of bunched field. Finished off race nicely to reach 2nd late.
Close up early. Gave ground gradually after coming onto course proper.
Always close up near the centre of the track. Hit the front under pressure over 100 M out and hung on well to finish.
Never better than midfield of bunched field. Faded onto course proper.
Always thereabouts. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Never better than midfield. Lost position coming onto course proper. Ran on past beaten horses late.
Settled just off the pace near the centre of the track. Could only keep on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Travelled mainly in midfield of bunched field along grandstand rails. Travelling well when lost position over 100 M out. Made no impression thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never far off. Hit front inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Disputed lead to about 300 M. Gradually faded.
Began fairly. Soon in rear. Detached 200M out. Plugged on to beat one home.
Mainly in midfield before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Held very slender advantage racing along grandstand rails until swamped inside 200 M.
Around midfield before fading inside final 400 M. (Mucus.)

No pace from outset, drifted back to race behind midfield, posted 3 wide 7 to 8Ls off solid pace, work without cover 6Ls down turning, came to middle, gradually narrowed gap hitting top gear last 200 M to win easily.
No pace from jump, taken back to rails to race 9Ls away, had a soft trip with solid sections, saved ground on rails, well back turning, made some progress to 200 M but flattened out thereafter.
Had enough dash to be prominent early, raced on leaders back, did work under solid pace, right there turning in, began to struggle to find extra at business end and faded last 200 M.

Amongst last away in line, ended up towards rear in 2 wide line, 9Ls off speed, aided by tempo in mid-section, improved between horses on bend, only got going last 250 M and made good progress despite still appearing green.

Reasonable jump, raced in midfield 4Ls back in running line, travelled well in run, same margin back turning, came with run to hit lead at 350 M, couldn't go with others last 200 M just maintaining same pace to line.
Showed abundant pace to lead easily, ran them along at a genuine speed, held a length advantage turning, found nothing when challenged at 300 M and weakened quickly.

Ordinary beginning, raced in rearward division 7 to 8Ls back on rails, spent little in run, helped by fast tempo, improved to be 4Ls or so back turning, held up at 300 M, closed race off evenly once clear.
Slowly away, regathered and drove through pace to end up in 1 out 1 back slot, did share of work 2 to 3Ls back behind pace, niggled turning but had nothing when asked. Dropped right out.
Even break, ended up 7Ls away in running line, suited by pace and took rails spot on circle, eased out turning but lacked usual close and just held ground in run to line.

No speed in early stages and allowed to settle at tail, raced 10 or more lengths away, suited by solid splits in middle stages, set a task when still last into straight, passed a few weakening runners late.

Began only fairly, raced in midfield 5Ls off solid pace in 2 wide position, suited by pace on, not asked to improve until leaving bend, came with a strong run to hit front at 200 M but couldn't match run of winner last 100 M.
Out with first few, raced outside leader at solid tempo, did plenty of work in run 1L down rounding bend, had nothing to offer when they dashed again and weakened tamely.
Back with last few soon after jumping, shared rear 10Ls or more from lead, helped by fast tempo, still well back rounding for home, only past tired runners in straight.
Settled at the back. Worked home well inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled on rails in forward of midfield. Came to challenge over 350 M out and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Broke well. Settled wide in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily and passed a few beaten horses closing stages.
Began fairly. Raced keenly when taken back to settle in midfield. Similar turning in and not clear run the length of straight. Not fully tested.
Broke well. Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Led far side. Ceded advantage to travel one-back on rails. Obtained split and commenced move over 300 M out. Soon hit front and hung on well under pressure.
Close up. Took over coming out of far side. Led until finding no extra over 200 M out. Dropped out tamely.
Settled towards rear. Did not find too much room early in straight. Made modest headway closing stages.
Began well. Travelled 3-wide just better than midfield. Took closer order award home bend and gained 1L 3rd into straight. Soon weakened.
Not far off until tiring over 200 M out.
Slightly slow out. Gradually picked up to 3-wide position in forward of midfield before home bend. Gained a 2L 5th turning for home when still 3-wide. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never far off in 3rd or 4th. Improved to dispute lead into straight and unable to quicken under pressure to match speed of winner over 200 M out. Died on its run close to home.
Settled behind midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure down centre of straight without quickening.
Moderate beginning, assumed usual role well off pace, raced 5Ls back in midfield, made a 3 wide run on bend to take closer order from 500 M, didn't let down and battled at same pace last 300 M.
Standard jump, ended up 6Ls or so away on rails, harmed by tempo and raced keenly, saved ground on circle, switched out at 400 M and kept closing gradually to snare 3rd. Improved run.

Pressed forward from outset, raced outside leader and applied pressure throughout, kept working on circle, still held a narrow leader at 400 M but couldn't dash when they sprinted at 250 M, faded quickly.
Out in line, able to hold a midfield spot 4 to 5Ls back on fence, angled 2 wide on circle, in amongst horses on turn a little awkwardly, closed off evenly making gradual progress without threatening.
Began with more purpose, raced 3Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, same margin down on turning, hard ridden and failed to respond, very one paced late.
Reasonable jump, took a nice position 4Ls back in running line, had no excuses trailing eventual winner in run, close enough turning, didn't have a turn of foot and weakened out tamely.
Bounced out, slotted into ideal spot 1 out 1 back, had dream run with steady tempo, tracked nicely 2 to 3Ls down on bend, went to them easily at 250 M, kept going late for a smart win.

Showed expected turn of foot to take up running, pressured early before slowing pace a touch, under siege throughout and steadied on bend, fought back turning but ran out of petrol last 200 M. Did too much work.

Showed no pace from outset, ended up towards rear 7 to 8Ls back, not helped by standard sectionals, raced keenly on circle, near to last taking inside runs turning, made many lengths without clearest passage and not tested late.
Little pace from outset, posted 3 wide without cover 6Ls back behind midfield, did share of work to bend, same margin down turning, switched wider and made solid progress down centre.

Even jump, tried to slot in to midfield but caught 3 wide, crept closer without cover to be up outside leaders on circles, under pressure turning in, didn't respond and gradually faded when had run took toll.

Stood flat footed and lost considerable ground, raced 10Ls back at rear, not helped when pace slowed, still had field to beat leaving bend, tracked 3 wide and switched to middle, made many lengths from impossible spot.

Allowed to drift back from a wide alley, ended up 6Ls back in 2 wide line, overraced when tempo slackened, still well back turning, came to middle and closed race off stoutly taking plenty of ground off winner.

Taken back from a wide gate, raced back with last few 7 to 8Ls away, harmed by tempo, set a task on turning, weaved between horses in straight and made plenty of progress without clearest run to be nearest on line.
Settled behind midfield. Became second last rounding home bend. Switched off rails for a run after straightening. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Shaken up upon straightening. Fought on steadily down straight to just fail to get up on line.

Took up running passing winning post the first time. Headed before 1200 M bend and settled one back on rails. In similar position in 3rd turning in. Obtained split over 150 M out. Fought on dourly to just get up on line.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room on inside after straightening. Could only keep on at the same pace.
Slowly away. Always at the back. Never nearer.
Broke well. Settled on rails in midfield. Caught behind runners after straightening. Ran home one-paced.
Always prominent. Improved to one-out-one-back position around home bend and hit front shortly after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and collared close to home.
Settled in forward of midfield. Commenced move at Rock. Improved to 1L 3rd 3-wide turning in. Ran home one pace without quickening.
Prominent. Travelled mainly 2 back in 4th far side. Became 5th into straight. Soon found nothing.
Gradually improved to take up running from 1200 M. Led field until headed shortly after straightening. Dropped out.
Held up in last few. Baulked badly for a run after straightening until after 200 M. Finished off race nicely.
Settled in rear. Made steady headway around field from 600 M. Still in last few but in more bounced field turning in. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Shared the lead early on the fence before being crossed near the 700 M, and racing in 2nd position. Shifted out around leader after the 600 M, however peaked on its run over the final stages.
Crowded for room at the start and took up a midfield position 2-wide with cover. Failed to quicken enough to overhaul the placegetters.
Was slow to begin and settled in 2nd last position, never a factor.
Raced just behind the speed on the fence, hung in badly and commenced to give ground at the 600 M and finished tailed out. Pulled up lame, to Trial & OVE.
Raced 1 off on the back of the speed, copped some tightening near the 800 M, but was a spent force early in the straight.
Travelled midfield the fence, made some ground in the run home but never threatened.
Worked hard to reach the lead and managed to cross to the fence after the 700 M to race solo in front. Kept on soundly in the run to the post.
Settled in 3rd position, 1 off but was carried 3-wide without cover after the 600 M. Closed of soundly only to be caught close to the wire.
Began awkwardly and was then taken back behind runners. Settled at the rear of the field and battled on one paced in the straight.
From a wide gate was taken back to settle with the rear division, behind midfield 1 off with cover. Rolled out to be 3 deep turning for home and made up good ground inside the furlong.

Received a bump at the start and couldn't match the early speed, settling in 3rd last position. Travelled well throughout on the fence, ridden patiently early in the straight, lengthened strongly to score a nice win.
Raced 3-wide without cover, midfield. Struggled inside the final furlong.
Tracked leader in a 2-wide spot. Remained a length off the lead 200 M out but faded thereafter.
Eased back from a wide draw and trailed field until straightening. Made up ground by running past beaten runners in the straight.
2-wide and better than midfield. 2Ls off the pace turning for home. Quickened and took the lead 100 M out. Kept on well and held off challenger closing stages.
Never more than 3Ls off the lead but was wide and without cover. Had trouble keeping up at the home turn and weakened thereafter.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the leader until home straight. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch.
Raced along the rails behind midfield. Gradually picked up after straightening but caught in traffic for some distance after 200 M. Closed off fairly thereafter.
2-wide behind midfield. Angled out and swung wide turning for home. Rallied and chased to within 1/2L of the eventual winner 100 M out but unable to draw any closer thereafter.
Settled 2-wide in a rearward spot. Swung wide and near last on straightening. Closed the race off with a strong rally to pick up a minor placing.
Raced 3-wide at midfield. Kept on fairly in the straight and made up some ground.
Taken back from widest draw and raced in rear section. Remained towards the tail on straightening and never really picked up in the straight.
Botched the start and was ridden along. Found a spot at midfield but over-raced in the early stages. 2 back on the fence making home turn but never quickened in the straight.
Led most of the way. Tired and faded 100 M out.
2-wide and worse than midfield in 9th about 5Ls off pace at halfway, 4-wide and under pressure turning for home, checked at 100 M but unlikely to figure in quinella.
Midfield before being caught 3-wide no cover at halfway about 4Ls off pace, extra work took its toll in the home straight.
One from rear about 8Ls off pace until home turn, never remotely dangerous.
Nice position in midfield 2-wide about 4Ls off speed until final turn, outpaced and no excuses.
Checked on fence early on, 3-back on fence at halfway in midfield about 4Ls off speed, faded out tamely in homestretch.
Had the box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd passing post the first time, still right there turning for home but lacked any sort of kick.
In 'one-out-one-back' position in 4th from 1800 M out to home turn, very weak in the finish.
Forced to work too hard to lead on fence by 1L at 1100 M, same margin clear turning for home, headed at 200 M and just hung on for 3rd.
Led or disputing early pace, 1L down in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, led again 200 M out, scrambled in for the win.
Settled in 10th place about 8Ls or so from the front until halfway, 5-wide turning for home, ran on strongly but post came a few strides too soon.
In 7th position 4-back on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls from start to 600 M out, made some minor late ground along the inner.
Dwelt at the start, at least 8Ls off pace in rear and hanging until home turn, without clear passage at 200 M, ran on fairly late still hanging.
Midfield or better with cover no worse than 3Ls from the speed until home turn, had his chance to place but lacked the acceleration.
Did well to get into 'one-out-one-back' position at 1200 M despite wide gate, 1L down in 4th at top of home straight, outpaced by winner but did enough for 2nd.
Trapped 3 and 4-wide without cover throughout, always around midfield about 4Ls from the front but beaten at top of home straight, eased down.
6Ls back in 9th on fence at 1100 M, outpaced turning for home when still 6Ls off pace, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
3-wide with cover in rear bunch about 6Ls from the early tempo, never likely to take a hand in the finish.
Sent on to lead by 1L at 1000 M, weakened once headed at top of the home straight.
Led by a neck on fence at 1200 M but handed up the advantage soon after, box-seat run until home turn but always hanging out, very weak in homestretch.
2-wide and 4Ls back in 6th at 1100 M, pressed on out 3-wide no cover from the 600 M to lead at top of home straight, nothing left final 300 M.
Slowly away and soon in rear about 8Ls from the front, 6Ls last turning for home, never on terms.
Switched from widest gate to be 7Ls back in 11th at 1200 M, 4Ls down and hanging in when 9th turning for home, stayed on pretty well for a place.
2-wide and 5Ls back in 8th at 1100 M, headway out 5-wide turning for home, didn't trouble the principals.
3-back on fence 4Ls back in 5th at 1100 M, popped off the fence down backstretch and pressed on at 500 M to lead at top of home straight, comfortable win.
Eased back from a wider draw, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, however held up for running 4-2, progressed steadily when clear.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group, 2-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast tempo, made ground 250 M to grab a close 3rd.
Settled in box seat, not suited by the fast early sectionals, ran on well until 100 M run ended.

Eased to sit midfield, 3-1/2Ls behind the leaders 2-wide, hung in badly throughout, alleged interference to 2nd placegetter 800 M, took rail afterwards, favoured by the fast pace, made ground steadily 300 M to win, demoted to 2nd
Pushed early to go forward but soon took hold to sit 1-1/2Ls behind the leaders, 2-wide not suited by the fast pace, on heels on straightening and out of fuel after that.
Awkward away, pushed forward to share the lead at disadvantageous fast early sectionals, trapped 2-wide, out of battery and faded rapidly 400 M.
Settled 5Ls off the leaders along the fence, suited by the fast pace, interfered by winner and checked 800 M, momentarily blocked 200 M, progressed steadily to finish 2nd , promoted to 1st.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the leaders, suited by the fast tempo but trapped 3-wide throughout without cover, lost too much ground, ran on ok in final stages.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, checked 800 M, blocked and checked severely 250 M, just ran on when clear.
Pushed to take the rail and lead, clocked fast early sectionals, hung on until 100 M overhauled and flattened.
Slow away, hard ridden to keep up with the field at rear, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2-wide, helped by the fast pace, blocked 300 M, ran on fairly when clear.
Slow away, eased to sit behind midfield 2-wide, 5Ls off the leaders, benefited by the fast pace, swept 3-wide on straightening, made some ground 250 M.
Never far off. Settled one back on rails most of way. Came to challenge upon straightening. Responded well to take charge over 150 M.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Quickly recovered to midfield on rails. Took closer order turning in and disputed 4th over 200 M out. Found no extra thereafter.
Began fairly. Settled towards rear. Ran home okay without quickening.
Hampered and lost a few lengths shortly after jumping out. Remained well back to straight and never on terms.
Settled in rear from wide draw. Made no show.

Broke well from wide draw and soon ridden to maintain lead, however, unable to cross to rails. Joined around home bend but fought hard to retain slender advantage early in straight. Overhauled 150 M out.
Began only fairly but ridden to hold rails run inside leader. Took up running rounding home bend before headed turning in. Could only keep on at the one pace inside final 200 M.
Settled in rear of midfield. Slightly further behind turning in. Ran home well to be nearest at finish.
Ridden for early pace. Settled one-out-one-back in 4th most of back straight. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Broke well. Settled 3-wide in prominent position within 2Ls of pace. Became midfield when over 3Ls back turning for home. Finished off race well to snatch 2nd late.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight. One-paced.
Began fairly. Settled towards rear. Held rails run turning in. Ran home strongly inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Began only fairly, posted 3-wide without cover 5 to 6Ls back, used resources throughout, same margin down by Rock, couldn't respond when they dashed for home and struggled in run to line.
Showed good early pace to take expected prominent role, raced outside leader 1L back, had a fair trip with standard sectionals, close enough turning and threatened to 100 M but just tired late.
Showed early toe to take spot behind leader, no excuses in run with leisurely sections, close enough on turning, compounded rapidly when pressure applied from 200 M, displayed little turn of foot.
Even jump but couldn't go early speed, ended up 6Ls back in running line, not aided by steady tempo, made a 3-wide run on circle, switched widest and made plenty of late progress to make frame.

No early pace and drifted back towards tail, raced 7 or more lengths back in 2-wide line, disadvantaged by sections, switched 5-wide turning in, made steady headway final furlong from impossible spot.

Began nicely, took up coveted 1 out 1 back spot, had run of race 2Ls away with steady tempo, close enough making turn, swept up 3-wide entering straight, closed well but overhauled by top 2 last 200 M.
Okay jump but allowed to settle into midfield running line, raced 4Ls back throughout enjoying nice trip, switched 3-wide on bend and hit lead rounding for home, couldn't hold off winner late.
Standard jump and taken back from a wide alley. Raced 6Ls back on rails, harmed by tempo, still back amongst horses and held up rounding bend, closed race off nicely down outside when clear.
Tardy to begin, settled behind midfield on rails, 5Ls back but saved ground on inside despite sectionals against, back in amongst horses on turning, made some late headway without threatening.
Displayed expected pace and lead them easily, dictated terms 1L clear throughout, upped tempo on circle, under siege at 200 M, gave in weakly and dropped out quickly.
Slow into stride, back at rear as usual, ended up best of part of 8Ls away, not helped by steady sections, well back and in impossible spot turning in, made good late progress when race was all over.

Out in line. Settled in the ideal position 3Ls back on rails, had soft trip throughout, in behind runners on circle, same back turning, quickened nicely into gap last 200 M to go on and score with same in hand.

Amongst first to jump, pressed on outside leader but elected for a trail 1 x 1 entering back straight, had a cosy trip thereafter, didn't quicken when gap presented turning and just plugged away evenly.
Jumped nicely, held lead but presented by outside horse throughout, held a narrow advantage on circle, 1L clear turning, couldn't dash last 200 M and faded late.
Began evenly, settled in midfield running line 3Ls back, not asked in mid-section, eased into clear 2Ls back turning, ascended down middle to hit lead at 200 M and hold them comfortably.
Slow into stride, ended up sharing 5Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, saved ground on bend, held up 300 M, made good progress when in clear last 250 M.
Amongst first few to jump, pressed on to race outside leader, challenged leader throughout, 1/2L down on bend, couldn't respond at 400 M and gave in easily.
Away OK but soon drifted back towards rear, 5Ls off pace, had an easy time throughout, still well back to bend, switched out and made good ground down centre but couldn't track down winner.
Better beginning, took a spot on leaders back, had run of race behind pace, close enough on bend, didn't have a response in straight and lost track last 200 M.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, ended up 4Ls back on rails, not asked in mid-section, found little at business end and lost touch last 200 M.

Standard break, assumed usual role well off pace, raced behind midfield 4Ls back in turning line, switched 3 wide tracking winner into straight, lacked pick up but did best work late to be nearest on line.
Settled behind midfield, 4 deep and without cover. Travelled last turning for home and struggled in the run to the line.
In the early stages was taken across behind runners from the outside barrier. Travelled 2 deep with cover, never likely.
Raced outside the leader, found the front near the 200 M and kept on soundly.
Raced midfield, the fence. Kept on one paced over the closing stages.
Led along the fence but faded on its effort close to the wire.
Raced 3-wide and without cover in a midfield position and just prior to straightening commenced to give ground. Finished tailed out. To trial prior to next start.
Ridden back in the field, 1 off with cover. Overraced somewhat in the early stages and failed to find any extra in the run home.
Was slow to begin and settled 2-wide midfield with cover. Peeled out turning for home and ran on well to win nicely.
Settled behind midfield along the fence, made some late ground without ever threatening.
Travelled in last position, stayed to the inside in the straight and closed of fairly.
Raced 3-wide with cover midfield. Was a beaten horse before the final bend.
Stalked the 2 leaders, 1 off. Kept to the inside in the straight and was given every chance.

Disputed lead before settling behind the pace 1000 M out. A length off turning for home and was in a 3-way battle for the lead 200 M out. Continued well in the final stages but unable to match strides with winner.
Hard ridden from the start and took until the 1000 M to reach the lead. Maintained a length's advantage into the home straight but was swamped final 200 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2-back on the fence making home turn. Lacked the needed response on straightening and remained on same pace to the line.
Mostly behind midfield. 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead making home turn. Kept on fairly and made up ground in the straight.
Settled at the rear. Switched out on straightening and rallied to make the frame.
No worse than midfield but was wide and without cover. Found nothing and weakened in the straight.
2-wide at midfield. Ran on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.

Just behind the pace in the early stages. Slipped back after 1200 M and was in rear section making the turn. Found a run towards the inside on straightening and made a strong rally to chase down rival final 100 M and score easily.
Led briefly from widest draw. Took a sit near 1000 M and kept within 2Ls of the pace until home straight. Regained lead 250 M out but was soon headed by top-pair.
Off slowly. Settled towards the rear and last on straightening. Only ran past beaten runners in the straight.
Keen early on, much closer to pace than for previous win just 1L back in 2nd until leading at top of home straight, driven clear, comfortably.
In last but only 5Ls adrift of the leader at the 800 M, ran on best of the rest in homestretch and nicked 2nd on the line.
2Ls back in 5th through early stages but unbalanced on the circle and lost his position into home straight, faded further.
Soon led but couldn't cross to fence until 750 M out, headed at top of home straight, one-paced and lost out on 2nd in the home straight.
Caught very wide 5 and 6-wide no cover down backstretch in rear, detached about 8Ls off speed turning in, never a factor.
About 2Ls back in 3rd but trapped 3-wide no cover until homestretch, had his chance but weakened after wide trip final 200 M.
Very disappointing, 3-wide with cover about 4Ls off pace in 8th or so down the back, under pressure and struggling into home straight, found zero off the bit and eased late.
Lost 3Ls by messing up the start and tended to hang out from fence towards rear, one-paced in homestretch, tight for room final 50 M.
Under pressure to hold midfield position about 3Ls off pace until home turn, lacked any kind of dash in final stages.
Worse than midfield when badly checked back to a 4-back position on fence final 200 M, never recovered from that setback.
Switched inside from wide gate to race about 5Ls off early pace in rear, briefly threatened out wide 300 M out but run peaked and tired late.
Nice position on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th until the 600 M, struggling to lie up into home straight despite soft run, weakened out.
7Ls from the early pace in rear, about 5Ls back in 12th turning for home and never much of a threat.
Restrained about 7Ls behind early tempo, headway to midfield when 4-wide swinging for home, had his chance to place but was too one-paced.
Fractious in gates and lost ground at start, always towards rear on fence at least 4Ls or 5Ls from the speed, simply outpaced.
Towards rear early on, caught 3-wide no cover from the 800 M to home turn when detached in rear, soon eased down.
Caught 4-wide no cover on first bend, midfield about 4Ls back with cover for most of back straight, 4-wide into final stretch, faded out quickly.
3-back on fence when 4Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, even better placed on straightening, lacked the acceleration to capitalize.
