2-wide and 6Ls off early pace in 8th, 3Ls down in midfield on straightening, quite flat and one-paced in the finish.
Unacceptable debut, slowly away, soon in rear and detached over 800 M, to trial.
6Ls back and worse than midfield at 1000 M, looped field out 4-deep no cover from 800 M to home turn when just 1L down in 3rd, narrow lead 150 M out, all out.
3-wide no cover when 1L down in 2nd at 1200 M, got in 2-wide at 1000 M in 2nd, still thereabouts at top of home turn but weakened before final 200 M.
On fence about 5Ls back in 7th at halfway, closer in 5th turning for home, outpaced by quinella pair on the run-in but did enough to place.
Lovely run on fence 2Ls back in 3rd at 1200 M and led at top of home straight, grabbed by winner 150 M out, went down fighting.
Nice position 2Ls off pace in 4th out 2-wide at 1200 M, hard pressed to keep up at the 800 M, beaten turning for home, very poor run.
Led on fence by 1L at 1300 M, headed at top of home straight and sank through the field, eased close home.
Pushed to take a prominent spot, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace 2 to 3-wide, weakened 300 M.
Eased back, never competitive, tailed out.
Hard ridden to press forward, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace, trapped 4-wide throughout and lost too much ground, dropped off 500 M and tailed out.
Eased early but soon allowed to stride forward and led at fast early sectionals, soon out of fuel 350 M.
Eased to rear as usual, suited by the fast pace, however never accelerated, disappointing.
Just worse than midfield early, helped by the fast pace, however never progressed, tailed out.
Eased at start to cross to the rails towards the rear, more than 11Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast pace, progressed steadily 300 M and made up lots of ground lately.
Pushed to occupy a prominent spot, 3-1/2Ls off the fast pace along the fence, ran on well to the line and secured 3rd until 100 M emptied and overhauled.
Midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, made ground steadily 300 M to grab a 3rd.

Hard ridden to obtain a forward position along the fence, 1-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the fast early sectionals, led 400 M, hung on until 200 M overhauled, kept on strongly to the line and finished a solid 2nd.
Eased back along the fence, never better than midfield.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, just ran on ok in straight.
Worse than midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the leaders 3-wide, benefited by the fast pace, just ran on ok in final stages.
Awkward away, eased back and crossed to the rail just behind midfield, 7-1/2Ls off the leader, helped by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M, dominated 200 M and drifted away to win with ease.

Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to one-back position in 3rd. Shuffled back to 4th 800 M out and 5th rounding home bend. No clear run behind leaders turning in. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout. Found nothing in straight.
Slightly slow into stride. Picked up to 3rd on rails approaching home bend. Only kept on at the same pace without quickening in the straight.
Niggled along early, setting in forward of midfield. Slightly lost position coming out of back straight and 8th in midfield turning in. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began fairly, Raced 3-wide in 5th about 3Ls off the pace. Took closer order turning in. Gradually faded from 3rd into straight.
Settled at the back. Held up for a run early in straight. Ran on past beaten horses inside final 200 M.
Broke well. Settled in midfield, racing awkwardly on rails around home bend. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Raced wide in rear. Went wide entering home straight. Made no impression in the run to the line.
Broke well settling towards rear. In last few into straight. Never nearer.
Broke well and ridden for pace early, settling one out one back in 2nd. Improved to dispute lead into straight before hitting front just inside 400 M. Headed about 150 M out when no extra.
Soon took up running and led until headed early in straight.
Raced wide just worse than midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on steadily to hit front 150 M out.
Began nicely, slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot trailing speed, followed nicely on circle, 3Ls down yet travelling well on bend, cruised passed them at 250 M and went on to score a hollow victory.
Slow into stride, raced behind midfield 6Ls or so away on rails, aided by fast tempo, same margin back on bend never really likely and made limited progress in straight.
Sprung from gates, had loads of pace to set tempo 1 to 2Ls clear, kept them running in mid-section, held a 1L advantage turning, kicked hard but no match for winner late.
Amongst them on jumping, soon mustered to be up challenging for front, did work on pace to bend, 1L clear on turning, couldn't go with first two but battled on losing 3rd late.
Began well, outpaced early and unable to take favoured role in front, ended up in midfield 3-wide with cover 5Ls back, did share of work to bend, maintained same pace in run to line.
Ordinary beginning and faded to tail, raced 8 or more lengths back, never looked comfortable in run, found zero in straight.
Standard jump, took a midfield position on rails 4Ls back, tightened at 700 M, gradually improved on bend, kept progressing and managed to take 3rd late.
Fast out, unable to cross and forced to restrain, raced 3-wide without cover 4Ls back, used resources to bend, didn't quicken in stretch and run ended at 200 M.
Began in line, raced behind leader early but lost position approaching circle 4 to 5Ls down leaving bend, gradually lost touch in straight, moderate effort.
Standard jump, settled behind midfield but pushed up to be 4Ls back in 2-wide line, always chased along, had no extra in stretch just battling to line.
Taken back from a wide gate, raced 7Ls back in 2-wide line, helped by tempo, made a 3-wide run on bend, pressed a few horses making late progress down middle.
Settled one-out-one-back in 4th. Shuffled back to midfield on rails down for side. Closer up turning in and finished off race well inside final 200 M.

Broke well from wide draw, gradually crossing to lead. Gained rails run turning into far side but soon ceded lead to settle one back. Renewed effort to hit front turning for home. Hung on well under pressure.
Settled in last few. Baulked behind runners upon straightening. Made some late impression inside final 200 M.
Raced wide in midfield. Faded into straight.
Settled in rear of midfield. Tight between runners early in straight but made no show anyway.

Broke well and soon in front but only briefly before headed rounding stables bend. Never far off far side and was one back in 4th on rails turning in. Shifted out for a run 200 M out but only ran home one-paced.
Raced wide behind midfield. Made swift headway down far side to lead halfway out. Headed upon straightening but plugged on for placing.
Slightly slow into stride but soon picked up to 2-wide in 5th within 2Ls off pace. Became midfield coming out of back straight. Unable to quicken under pressure in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Wide around home bend and into straight. Ran home steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Restrained to rear at start and soon crossed to rails. Last into straight. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Similar turning in. Ran home steadily without quickening.
Prominent to straight. Gradually weakened.
Settled at tail-end. Circled field rapidly around home bend to be close up 3-wide in 3rd turning in. Unable to sustain effort and could only keep on steadily at the same pace.
Held up in midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners and lost position coming out of back straight. Made no impression in straight.

No pace and dropped to rear slowly after start, raced 5 or so lengths away, not aided when pace showed in between horses on bend, made ground before steadied at 300 M, closed hard late when balanced up again.
Showed usual speed, crossed to lead using plenty from a wide alley, dictated on circle, held a narrow advantage on bend, but soon overhauled and weakened tamely thereafter.
Ordinary beginning, regathered to race 3-wide behind midfield 6Ls away, covered ground in run but had cover, still had job to do on bend, made good progress to 200 M before run ended.
Bounced out, took up 1 out 1 back spot, ideally placed in run, helped by tempo and 2Ls down to bend, close enough on turning but lacked an extra gear and disappointing in finish.
Out with them, posted no better than 4-wide from an outside alley, did in tough without cover, tried to improve on bend but couldn't make progress, hard run took toll and only battled in straight.
Ok jump, pressed on but unable to slot in, raced 3-wide 1 to 2Ls back without cover, assisted when paced slowed, lacked a dash in straight but held ground behind first few last 200 M.
Slow into stride, raced 7Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section, kept to rails saving ground on turning, made no headway in straight. (Irregular heart beat.)
Some early speed but ended up 3 to 4Ls back on rails, enjoyed a quiet trip throughout, saved ground on fence on bend, in traffic for most of straight and was not properly tested.
Began in line, ended up 3-wide 4Ls back with cover, did share of work circle on track, kept closing on turning and looked a brief hope but only managed to hold ground last 300 M, run ended 100 M.

Fast out, only elected to trail leader, had ideal run on leaders back when pace slackened, tracked well on bend, eased into clear at 250 M, applied acid test at 200 M and went on to score comfortably.
No pace from outset, ended up 3-wide at rear, overraced and didn't help chance by hanging, some 8Ls back on bend, no real impression in straight.

Standard jump and drifted to tail, back with last few 7Ls back in 2-wide line, not helped by standard sectionals 800 M to 400 M, well back turning, made good ground down centre from impossible spot to be nearest on line.
Away nicely, pushed on to race outside leader, had fair trip with steady mid-section, applied pressure and took control at 300 M, kept on but couldn't sustain late challenge.
Standard jump, back behind midfield racing 3-wide with cover 7Ls or so away, steadied at 800 M, back between horses on bend, found little in run to line.
Settled in midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend, gaining 5th into straight. Unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M. (Lame.)
Well back to straight. Never nearer.
Jumped awkwardly and lost some ground. Remained in last few to straight. Made modest headway past beaten horses.
Gradually moved up to take up running before stables bend. Led until headed shortly after straightening. Plugged on for placing.
Settled in rear after beginning from poor draw. Commenced move rounding home bend. Fought on well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began fairly from poor draw. Gradually crossed to race in one-out-one-back position. Gave ground from 500 M out and dropped away quickly. (Heart irregularity.)
Raced wide without cover just behind midfield. Hung wider when making home bend losing considerable ground. Never recovered.
Settled in 6th on rails within 3Ls of pace. Took the gap opened up by interference on his outside and rushed up to hit front turning in but only to be overhauled 150 M out.
Not far off most of way to Rock. Struggled back in positions behind weakening FIGS from 500 M, ended up worse than midfield entering home straight. Kept on at the same pace to finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend, gaining rapidly to 3L 4th into straight. Sustained effort to hit front 150 M out. Won readily.
Broke well from inside draw but looking for cover. Settled one back on rails before making home bend. Remained in similar position in 3rd most of way to straight. Swamped when no extra passing 200 M.
Raced mainly 3-wide without cover in prominent position. Yielded ground from around home bend.
Was caught wide early without cover and went forward after the 1400 M to sit outside the leader, equally setting a brisk pace. Punctured in the straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Positioned just behind midfield on the fence. Kept to the inside in the straight and closed of fairly without threatening.
Raced 1 off in a midfield position. Fought strongly in the run to the post coming up just short.
Failed to muster any speed and raced towards the back of the field. Never a factor.
Raced on the back of the speed, 2-wide hanging throughout. Commenced to give ground near the 400 M and struggled thereafter.
Tracked the 2 leaders and looked a likely challenger before fading on its run over the latter stages.
Settled at the rear of the field, made late ground without posing a serious threat.
Settled midfield on the fence. Grand away to the line to win narrowly.
Led at a solid tempo along the rails. Did work when challenged in mid-section. Managed to kick clear turning for home however tired over the concluding stages.
Taken back early and raced 2-wide in rear section. Rallied in the straight making good progress for a minor placing.
Off slowly and settled towards the rear. Remained near the back on straightening. Closed off strongly and made up ground in the straight despite finding traffic 50 M out.
Boxed seated behind the leader. Kept on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch.
Jumped well and settled 2-wide at midfield. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. Swung out turning for home but clipped heels and dropped rider shortly after straightening.
Settled in rear section. Hampered by a fallen runner on straightening. Made up some ground thereafter.
Raced 2-wide behind the lead. Tired over the final 200 M.

Raced 2-wide and better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn and continued well after straightening. Had the lead briefly 100 M out but unable to hold off winner last few strides.
Took the lead 1400 M out. Had an easy time in front, maintained a length's advantage at 200 M but faded thereafter.
On the fence and better than midfield. 2Ls back turning for home. Kept on only fairly in the straight.
Botched the start and lost a lot of ground. Raced at the rear throughout. Lacked a response when asked and weakened in the straight. (Rider reported never travelled.)
Settled behind midfield. Switched out to make a run at 400 M and took a wide turn home. Kept on well in the straight and ran down rival to take the race final 50 M.
Had a lovely position about 2Ls back in 4th until the home bend, failed to take advantage.
Slow to muster early pace, worse than midfield about 5Ls from the lead through to final bend, kept on at the same tempo.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 900 M, sent on to race 1L down in 2nd out 2-wide from the 700 M, yielded ground from top of home straight.
Best away but opted to take up box-seat position in 3rd on fence until home turn, picked up well to lead 150 M out and did just enough for the win.
Led on fence at 800 M by 1L, led before being headed by winner 150 M and one-paced late.
4-back on fence about 5Ls from the front until home turn, ran on well but the winning line came a touch too soon.
3-back on fence about 3Ls down in 5th until home turn, held by principals thereafter.
Tended to hang out throughout in a 3-wide position with cover about 5Ls off the pace towards rear, offered little or nothing in the straight.
Switched inside from wide gate to race 5-back on fence about 6Ls behind in 11th, one-paced in the home straight.
Midfield with cover about 4Ls from the speed until final turn, ran on fairly well, never nearer.
Midfield early, trapped 3-wide no cover from the 700 M about 3Ls back in midfield, widest turning for home and dropped away.
Fractious in gates and slowest away, always last and ridden along early, never a factor.
Trapped 3-wide no cover in 3rd when 2Ls from the early speed, wide throughout, weakened from top of home straight and checked when beaten at 100 M.
3-back on fence in midfield 4Ls from the leader until the 600 M, under pressure to improve swinging for home, dashed well along the inner to lead 70 M out, kept on.
Unlucky not to finish closer, worse than midfield about 5Ls from the speed until home turn, didn't find much room in the finish, not fully tested.
Always towards rear at least 7Ls from the 1200 M.
3Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 6th until final turn, failed to quicken up.
Slow to muster early pace, 4-back on fence about 6Ls from the speed until final bend, made some decent late ground.
Had the run of the race 2Ls from the speed in 4th or so until final bend, plugged on home at the same speed.
Mostly a neck 2nd out 2-wide until the home turn, led 300 M out but no answer once grabbed inside final 100 M.
Mostly 4-wide without cover, midfield about 3Ls from the speed until home turn, dropped out sharply.
Keen early on, had the 'one-out-one-back' position until final turn, had his chance to at least place but he lacked the kick.
About a neck to the good on fence from 1100 M to final turn, again one-paced when it mattered but did enough to place.
3-wide with cover worse than midfield until home turn, no impression.

Jumped fast and went forward, but soon eased to sit just behind the pace group 2-wide, helped by the slow pace, followed the eventual winner making an early move from 800 M, got 2nd 400 M, however totally emptied 200 M.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls behind the leader along the rails, harmed by the slow pace, insufficient room to pick up in majority of straight, just ran on.
Pushed to cross in front from the wide draw and travelled just behind the leader 2-wide, suited by the slow tempo, but soon dropped off 600 M.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, moved forward 600 M around the field 3 to 4-wide, dashed strongly 300 M to finish 3rd despite being harmed by the slow pace.
Settled in midfield along the fence in early stages, made a sudden move 900 M around the field and took lead at 800 M, dictated the slow pace thereafter, drifted away 400 M and scored without threat.
Travelled nicely in midfield along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, lacked turn of foot and just held ground in straight.
Hard ridden to take the rail and led by 1L at slow early sectionals, pressured and overhauled 800 M, struggled to held ground afterwards, run ended turning for home and weakened out.
Eased to rear, 9Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, swept forward 4-wide on straightening, demonstrated strong finishing efforts 300 M to grab a remarkable 2nd.
Hard ridden to press forward, travelled just better than midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the slow pace, weakened steadily 500 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 4Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow pace, made the move 600 M and swept to 2-wide, soon out of fuel at 300 M struggled late.
Settled in prominent spot along the fence, 2-1/2Ls off the slow pace, however held up and pushed backward from 500 M, flattened when clear in straight.
Slowly away, at rear on the rails, 9-1/2Ls off the leader, harmed by the slow tempo, swept forward 3 to 4-wide at home bend to make its run, dashed well last 200 M and made up some ground.
Settled towards rear. Made significant progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away. Remained in rear to straight. Fought on steadily without quickening.
Mainly well back to straight. Kept on past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled in rear of midfield in the main group of field. Commenced move rounding home bend but could only make modest progress without threatening.
Settled in midfield of main group. Produced only modest headway on rails without threatening.
Held up in 4th of main group on rails. Moved closer turning in. Fought on steadily without quickening. (Lame next day.)
Settled towards rear. Dropped to tail-end under pressure after straightening.
Soon took up running and led in very fast pace going nearly 10Ls clear at one stage far side. Tired noticeably passing 200 M and soon overhauled.
Traveleld in 3rd and within 4Ls of main group leader. Gave ground entering straight and weakened under pressure.
Settled mainly in rear of mid-division of main group. Came Came under pressure rounding home bend. Made moderate progress down centre of straight.
Settled within 3Ls of leader of main group and in 3rd position overall. Came to challenge upon straightening and quickened under pressure to assert authority inside 100 M.
Settled in distant 2nd leading the main group by mainly 2Ls. Came under pressure after straightening passing tiring pacemaker over 150 M out but unable to match speed of winner near finish.
Restrained from outside gate, ended up 4Ls back in 2-wide line, not aided by tempo, back between horses on bend, made plenty of ground between horses without clearest running to be closest on line.
Fast away, took a shot at lead before taking hold, raced a little keenly outside leader, 1 to 2Ls back past Rock, 1L down turning, kept finding in stretch but just lacked pick up to snatch a place.

Began reasonably, slotted in but forced 3-wide without cover shortly after, pressed on doing share of work to be 2Ls back without cover, right there sharing lead turning, there to 100 M but faded late when hard run took toll.
No real pace, ended up behind midfield 4 to 5Ls back, not asked by steady sections, kept to fence but still well back on turning, made plenty of progress along rails to snatch 3rd near line.
Standard jump, drifted back to be 4Ls back on rails, improved when pace slowed, 3Ls down on circle, had something to offer turning, lacked usual finish and just closed off at same pace.
Tardy to begin, took a spot 6Ls back at tail, not helped when pace slackened, still rearward leaving bend, no impact in straight just struggling to line.
Out in line, ended up 3-wide 5Ls back, had cover and improved 4-wide on bend, 3Ls down on turning but couldn't get much closer just holding position in run to line.

Began with rest, raced 4Ls back in running line, not aided by tempo, tried to come 3-wide on bend but unable to make progress, came again in straight and was doing best work when ran into traffic late. (Not ridden out.)

First to hit ground, took a trail behind leader, had run of race on rails, right there to bend and had ideal run present on bend, had length of straight to run down winner but only got within a length late.
Moderate break, took a spot amongst last few 3-wide 6Ls back, did share of work and set a task on bend, switched widest and made fair progress in straight from a impossible spot.

Showed good dash to take up running, raced to a 1L lead after resisting early challenge, controlled race in mid-section travelling like a winner on turning, kicked hard and defied rivals in straight to score a solid win.
Showed more pace than usual, raced 1 out 1 back 2Ls back, travelled keenly in mid-section, still 2Ls down but struggling on bend, couldn't made progress in stretch porducing a one-paced finish.
No real early dash, allowed to drift back, raced 3 wide 6 to 7Ls back, not suited by tempo, tracked 4 wide on bend, made solid progress down middle to take place late. Nice debut.

Broke reasonably, pressed on to take 1 x 1 slot, always on bridle and suited by tempo, eased 3 wide to challenge leaving bend, let down nicely and hit lead at 300 M but overhauled last 100 M and no match for winner late.
Out slowly, towards rear on rails 8Ls off pace, not helped by tempo, still at rear on turning, couldn't make impact in stretch and just battled at same pace.
Began well, urged along to go forward, pressured throughout to hold spot outside leader, right there challenging turning and in mix until 200 M but workload took toll and couldn't respond late.
Standard jump, ended up worse than midfield 5Ls back on rails, had an easy time in run, steadied at 500 M, saved ground on bend, weaved between runners in straight closing nicely to make frame.
No pace early, ended up 7Ls back in running line, not helped by pace in mid-section, still well back on bend, made some headway when race was nearly over.

Standard jump, posted 4 wide without cover in middle stages, raced 4 lengths back doing work throughout, niggled along on turning, looked a threat at 300 M but couldn't sustain run, tired late after doing plenty in run.
Had early pace assumed role behind leader, enjoyed run of race to bend, travelled strongly on turning in, didn't see daylight behind slower horses most of straight and was not properly tested.
Awkwardly away, drove through to be 6Ls back in 2 wide line, not suited by tempo and raced a little awkwardly, about 3Ls on turning, there to 200 M but produced only a one paced finish.
Away fairly, ended up 3 wide in midfield 4Ls or so off pace, had a trail throughout, close enough turning, balanced up and broke free of pack to hit lead at 100 M and score nicely.
Lacked usual pace after jumping with them, ended up 3Ls back on rails, had a soft trip in mid-section, switched between horses on turning, made limited impact in straight.
Away only fairly and lost further ground when checked, detached at rear some 10Ls off lead, niggled along throughout, impossible spot bend, passed some tired horses late.
First to hit ground, led them with ease from an outside alley, challenged throughout when pace slackened, still shaded on bend, kept on to 200 M but compounded thereafter when condition gave out.
Had plenty of early pace to go with front group early, raced 3 wide outside leader, used up throughout, there under pressure on bend, compounded badly in straight.
Enjoyed a lovely run behind the leader 1 off. Found little at business end.
Raced 3-wide early but managed to get in near the 800 M, 1 off. Was held up until about the 100 M and closed of soundly once late. (Not really tested.)
Didn't match the early speed and settled 1 off midfield. Weakened out of contention inside the furlong.
Travelled on the fence, midfield. Switched out after the 350 M and found the line strongly.
Raced in last position all the way.
Settled behind midfield, 2 deep with cover. Got to the line well.
Was slow to begin then was taken back from a wide alley and settled near the rear of the field on the rails. Came wide in the run home and closed off well.
Parked behind the leader along the fence. Had every chance but condition gave out late.
Raced 2-wide early then slotted in onto the fence, midfield. Railed up in the straight and commenced to run only to encounter traffic problems over the final 100 M and wasn't fully tested late.
Raced handy to the leaders but was caught 3-wide and without cover for most of the trip. Weakened late when run took toll.
Settled near the rear, 1 off with cover. Came wide after the 400 M and ran on solidly.
Set a solid tempo out in front fading over the final stages.
Settled 2 deep around midfield with cover. Peeled out on straightening and accelerated strongly to score convincingly.
Slow to begin and ridden along to take up a midfield position along the fence. Copped a check near the 800 M and never really recovered although stayed on in the straight.
Off slowly and raced towards the rear. Last to enter home straight and finished the race off with a strong rally making plenty of ground late.
Better than midfield. Kept within 3Ls of the leader making home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight but unable to turn up a notch in the closing stages.
Boxed-seated behind the leader until home straight. Ran on well but could not find enough to remain in contention final 100 M.

Raced wide and never more than 3Ls off the pace. Steadily made up ground 4 wide at the turn and was in a disputed lead turning in. Took sole possession of the lead at 300 M but weakened inside final 200 M.
Outpaced and raced behind midfield. Crowded at 700 M and was near the back turning for home. Ran on fairly and steadily made up ground in the straight.
Led field before tiring over the final 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)

Raced within 2Ls of leader. Lost a bit of ground at the 600 M and was 3Ls down turning in. Held up in traffic after 400 M but ran on strongly thereafter. Kept strides with eventual winner final stages but came up short in a photo.
Taken back to race in rear section. Steadily made up ground in the straight but unable to find more in the closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Quickened nicely on straightening and kept on well in the closing stages to win a close one.
No better than midfield. Kept on fairly but didn't make up much ground in the straight.
Niggled along early to be among leaders. 2-wide and a length off turning for home. Maintained same pace before tiring final 200 M.
On the fence at midfield. Had trouble making the turn and lost some ground. 5Ls off the lead turning in and closed the race off with a nice rally.
Raced wide in a forward spot. 4-wide and 3Ls off the pace turning for home. Unable to quicken after straightening.
Taken back at the start and trailed field. Remained towards the rear and widest turning for home. Showed a strong rally and was closest at finish.
3Ls back in midfield when checked at 800 M, improved to be 2Ls back in 4th at final bend, dangerous 300 M out but no chance with winner late on.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls from the front until the 600 M, hard pressed to lie up turning for home, faded out.
Towards rear about 5Ls from the speed until home bend, stayed on past some beaten rivals.
Slowest away losing 3Ls on the leaders, 6Ls last until home turn when 5-wide swinging into final bend, made only a minor impact.
Prominent but wide and too keen down backstretch, over 2Ls back in 6th at final bend when under pressure, capitulated.
Close up not much more than 1L from the lead until final turn, under pressure when checked 300 M out, soon well beaten.
With cover in 9th or so about 4Ls from the speed until home turn, quickened up very well to lead 150 M out, ran on impressively.
Slowly away, 6Ls from the speed in rear early on, about 4Ls down turning for home, stayed on only fairly.
Midfield between 3Ls and 4Ls from the front until home turn, ran on well without getting to grips with leading trio.
3-wide with cover towards rear about 5Ls or 6Ls from the speed until home turn, always outpaced.
In front rank within 1L or 2Ls of the lead until home turn, gave ground final 400 M.
Trapped 5-wide no cover down backstretch, widest in midfield 3Ls from the pace turning for home, extra work took its toll.
Led on fence by 1L from 800 M to home turn, headed inside final 200 M but did well enough to place.
Slowly away, one from rear about 7Ls from the speed at 1400 M, 6Ls down making final bend, checked badly at 300 M, never dangerous.
Led by 2Ls on fence passing post for first time, box-seated from 1200 M to home turn, soon outpaced.
2Ls back in 2nd on fence passing the post the first time, 3Ls back in midfield from 800 M to home turn, always held.
Midfield with cover about 5Ls from the pace at halfway, forced wider turning for home, always held by principals.
Slowly away, caught wide without cover throughout, pressed on to lead 1200 M out but tired when headed at top of home straight.
Keen early on, worse than midfield about 6Ls from the speed until the 600 M, forced out wider turning for home, ran on well to take 2nd inside final 200 M.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 1200 M, edged closer to the speed to be over 1L down in 3rd at final bend, one-paced in the finish.
3 and 4-back on fence no better than 5Ls from the lead until final bend, came off the rail at top of homestretch and ran on well to lead about 50 M, stayed on.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1400 M, led at top of home straight and 1L clear at 200 M, one-paced and tipped out of quinella final 50 M.
2-wide and 4Ls down in mid-division at 1400 M, still thereabouts at top of final bend, one-paced.
2-wide and 4Ls back in midfield with cover at 1200 M and same turning for home, found nothing off the bridle and eased down final 200 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, settled 8Ls last at 1600 M, still well back on straightening, ran on strongly to take 4th.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 5th at 1400 M, still right there turning for home, had every chance but lacked the acceleration.

Just better than midfield, 4Ls off the leader 3-wide, suited by the fast early tempo, moved up 900 M to keep in touch with the front group, under pressure 500 M, responded well and progressed steadily to run 2nd, just beaten by a neck.
Pushed to take the rail and led by 2Ls at disadvantageous fast pace, travelled too keenly, hung on until 350 M soon weakened.
Hard ridden to take a forward spot, 2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the fast pace, dropped off quickly 400 M.
Pushed early, travelled better than midfield along the fence, 4-1/2Ls off the fast pace, held ground until 300 M flattened.
Eased back, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, made ground 300 M without threats.

Hard ridden early to keep up with the field at back, 7Ls off the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, however blocked most of straight, kept closing the race off nicely despite racing under restricted room.
Just worse than midfield, 7Ls behind the leader 4-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 500 M, just missed 3rd in last few strides.
Eased back and took rail, 8-1/2Ls behind the leader, favoured by the fast pace, made ground steadily in straight, run ended 50 M.
Eased to sit worse than midfield, 7Ls off the leader 3-wide, favoured by the fast tempo, made ground in straight, bumped 300 M but of little significance to its finish.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leader 4-wide, helped by the fast pace, dashed well 300 M but was too late to challenge the winner, only be able to grab a 3rd.
Midfield, 5Ls behind the leader 4-wide without cover, travelled nicely, helped by the fast pace, made the move early 600 M, however hung out in straight and unable to be fully tested.
Eased back, 8-1/2Ls off the leader 4-wide, benefited by the fast early sectionals, made ground 400 M, but blocked and checked 300 M, ran ok well to the line when clear.
Settled nicely in midfield, 5-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, benefited by the fast pace, finished the race off strongly 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Pushed forward as usual, took seat 2-1/2Ls behind the leader, not suited by the fast early sectionals, led briefly 400 M, emptied 250 M.
Began only fairly but quickly driven to lead. Held a length advantage most of way until tiring and overhauled inside final 200 M.
slightly slow out losing ground. Soon picked up to settle on rails just worse than midfield. Remained similar to straight but could only produce moderate effort late.
Began fairly from poor draw. Settled 3-wide in midfield. Switched out from heels of winner for a clear run upon straightening. Fought on well to just fail to draw level throughout closing stages.
Settled in forward of midfield. In 6th within 3Ls of pace on rails turning in. Kept on before fading passing 200 M.
Began well settling mainly 2-wide in midfield. No clear run in box-seat when similar turning in. Obtained split over 200 M out and fought on gamely to reach 3rd late.
Travelled well back and wide after beginning from poor draw. Remained similar turning in. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up early. Restrained to race in 5th position 2-wide within 3Ls of pace. Baulked for a run early in straight but then found nothing inside final 200 M.
Midfield early. Gradually moved up to race one back in 3rd on rails within 2Ls of pace before home bend. Chased leader into straight when not much room early. Ran home one-paced inside final 200 M.
Always well back. Found nothing in straight.
Began well. Settled 3-wide without cover mainly in 4th position about 2Ls off the lead. Similar turning in. Quickened to hold some chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield. Responded well to gain slender advantage inside 200 M. Fought on gamely to the line.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Close up in one-out-one-back position. Similar turning in. Gradually weakened from over 200 M out.

Only fair to jump, pressed on to take a position 3Ls back on fence, overraced in early and middle stages, tracked well on bend, asserted authority passing 250 M, dashed hard last furlong holding advantage to line. (Survived protest.)
Out in line however restrained to rear, raced 7Ls or so back, harmed by slow tempo, made a 3 wide run on circle, couldn't dash when they sprinted and just battled in straight.

Standard jump, 5Ls back on rails, not helped by pace in mid-section, tracked eventual winner on circle, in between horses turning and lost run at 250 M, worked home hard last 200 M when clear. Unlucky. (Protested unsuccessfully.)

Jumped well, took a spot behind leader early, popped off rails when pace slackened, raced outside leader to bend, challenged and took over turning in, couldn't dash with principals last 200 M and weakened late.
Lacked pace as usual, took expected role 7 or so lengths back on rails, disadvantaged by slow tempo, saved ground on bend, made some even progress late to make frame. Creditable run.
Began with more purpose, event on with it to take up running, overraced when attempting to slacken pace, still dictated to bend, challenged on turning, found little in run to line.
Out in line, took a midfield berth, travelled strongly despite slow tempo, came 3 wide on bend, no matter for first two but gradually made ground to be nearest on line.
Settled in rear of midfield. Went wide around home bend. Never recovered in straight.
Settled at the back to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Went wide and last into straight. Kept on well to finish.
Settled in midfield. Lost position when wide turning in. Ran on steadily to make up ground late.
Not far off on rails. Came to challenge upon straightening. Made moderate progress under pressure but not match speed of winner closing stages.
Travelled mainly 2-out-one-back to straight. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Soon took up running and led until headed under pressure passing 200 M.
Towards rear on rails. Saved ground on inside turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled in 5th within 3Ls of pace. Commenced run 300 M out and responded well to assert authority over 150 M out. Won well.
Raced wide in midfield. Similar turning in. Kept on before fading inside final 200 M. (Abnormal breathing noise.)
Began awkwardly. Travelled in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield on rails. Shifted out for a run turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced mainly 3-wide in 3rd within 2Ls of pace. Came under pressure turning in but could only keep on steadily without quickening. Tired passing 200 M.
Little pace from outset, ended up 8 more lengths away, suited by fast pace, back between horses on bend, gradually made progress through pack closing nicely late to be nearest on line.
Out well but lacked usual pace, raced 4Ls away in running line, had an even run with speed on, improved on bend, flattened out at 200 M.
Fastest out, raced to a 1L lead, set a solid tempo in mid-section, held same advantage on turning, defied them to 200 M but unable to find extra and tired late. Didn't go extra trip.

Standard jump, drifted back to be 8 or more lengths away 3 wide with a trail, suited by fast tempo, well back on bend, made many lengths down centre of course to take control at 100 M and score stylishly.
No real early pace, settle in rear division, raced 3 wide with a trail 7Ls back, suited by tempo, had job to do turning, made no headway just battling at same pace.
Moderate beginning, raced 3 wide without cover in midfield 5Ls back on a limb, made turn a little awkwardly, came with rush when balanced up but had run to its toll last 100 M.

Began nicely, pressed on to take a sit behind first two horses, carried along by solid pace 2Ls back, tracked well on turning, overhauled leaders at 200 M but couldn't withstand final charge of winner last 100 M.
Displayed some early pace, slotted into prime spot 3Ls back on fence, not asked in mid-section following a hot speed, eased wider turing but found little and faded out tamely.
No pace, raced 10Ls back in 2 wide line, helped by solid pace at top end, not used in mid-section, tracked 3-wide on circle, switched widest and made many lengths from an impossible spot.
Began with more purpose, raced outside leader 1L back in a more prominent role, did share of work with solid pace, there to 250 M but couldn't sustain effort and weakened out late.
Jumped with line, ended up 4Ls back on fence, had soft trip and used little in mid-section, saved ground turning, held up when progressing at 200 M and had little chance to improve thereafter.
Jumped reasonably, raced in midfield 4 to 5Ls back in running line, aided by tempo, same margin back turning, came with run at 300 M and looked a hope before run ended at 100 M.
Ordinary break, allowed to settle near to rear 9Ls away, further back than last start, aided by speed, still well back to bend, made good ground between horses closing off nicely.
Out with rest, raced behind midfield in running line 7Ls back, helped by tempo, switched to rails on circle, same margin back on turning, made minimal progress in stretch.
Settled in last few. One-paced in straight.
Began fairly. Made swift progress to lead passing 1000 M bend, gaining a 1L break. Soon headed after straightening but fought on gamely for close-up finish.
Broke well. Restrained to race off the pace in 3rd and was 5Ls off at one stage far side. About a length behind when 3rd turning in and fought on steadily without threatening.
Raced mainly 3-wide behind midfield. Commenced move rounding home bend. Produced moderate headway under pressure in the centre of straight.
Raced 2-wide in midfield. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening but could only run home one-paced.
Travelled just better than midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Began slowly losing ground. Quickly picked up on rails to midfield. Took closer order turning in gaining to 1L 4th. Fought on well to hit front over 100 M out.
Raced wide in midfield. Weakened into straight.
Steadied to rear at start. Hampered approaching 1000 M losing ground. Trailed the field and hampered again approaching home straight. Made no further impression.
Midfield early. Hampered dropping towards rear approaching 1000 M. One-paced in straight.

Began well. Niggled along to hold place on rails. Settled one-back on rails coming off Rock. Renewed effort turning in and hit front soon afterward, however, unable to sustain effort and headed about 150 M out.

Slow to begin and settled in 2nd last position 1 off with cover. Commenced to go forward near the 600 M in a 3 deep position. Peeled out turning for home and although inclined to shift out in the run home, ran on well.
Didn't muster a lot of early speed and raced behind midfield, 1 off with cover. Struggled at the business end.
Travelled 2 deep with cover, midfield. Didn't quicken in the final straight and stayed on dourly.
Was caught 3-wide in midfield, no cover early and pressed on to sit outside the leader near the 600 M. Raced 2 deep thereafter until straightening. Gave ground quickly inside the final furlong.
Began awkwardly and settled in 3rd position along the fence. Started to come off the fence near the 600 M and made a solid run 4-wide turning for home. Made good late ground out wide.

Went forward and led early from a wide barrier before handing up after the 1200 M. Took a trailing position on the fence and angled out to be 3 deep passing the 500 M to improve. Worked to the line soundly without threatening.
Raced 1 out 1 back, was a beaten horse approaching the 450 M. To trial.
Raced 3 back along the fence, struggled turning for home.
Box seated early, then shifted out from behind the leader near the 1300 M and took up the lead passing the 1200 M. Led from that point on, but gave in meekly from the 500 M.
Slowly away and raced midfield the fence. Kept on one paced in the straight.
Settled in last position along the fence. Remained to the inside in the straight, made some ground over the final 300 M, but was never a factor.
Settled midfield, 3-wide with cover. Shifted out and went forward to take the lead near the 600 M, opened up a large break on the field. Sustained run to the wire to win convincingly.
Soon led. Remained in the lead with 200 M to go but faded thereafter.
Taken back from widest draw. Remained towards the rear on straightening. Closed the race off nicely and made up ground in the straight.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace. Unable to quicken on straightening and weakened final 200 M.
Lacked speed and raced at the rear. Only ran past tired runners in the straight.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2Ls down on straightening and ran into a bit of traffic at 200 M. Kept on strongly and took the lead 50 M out. Caught by winner on the line.
2-wide better than midfield. Behind the leaders turning for home. Took the lead briefly 150 M out but unable to find extra to hold off top-pair.
Off slowly and raced wide and without cover behind midfield. Improved to midfield at the Rock but continued to face the breeze. Took a wide turn home and weakened in the straight.
Off slowly and raced along the rails in rear section. Gradually switched out after straightening to find clear running and stormed home over final 150 M.
Raced along the rails and no better than midfield. Made a strong rally between runners in the straight and caught rival at the line to win the race.
Hard pressed from wide draw and raced 2-wide behind the pace. Raced alongside the leader making home turn but weakened on straightening.
2-wide behind midfield. Only managed to stay on same pace in the straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on fairly in the straight without looking likely.
One from rear about 10Ls from early pace, 6Ls back in 10th off final turn, made some late ground but most did the same.
Nice ride from wide gate to be 2-wide and 6Ls back in 5th at 1000 M, driven on out wide on the circle out 4-wide swinging for home, led 250 M out, kept on.
Keen early on, handy position with cover 3Ls from the speed until home turn, no excuses, again.
Led on fence by between 1L and 2Ls until the home turn, headed soon after and sank through the field.
Close up in 3rd on fence about 2Ls or 3Ls from the pace from 1200 M to home turn, ceded ground rapidly.
3Ls from lead out 2-wide at 1000 M in 4th and same swinging for home, one-paced.
Caught 3-wide no cover throughout, always towards rear at least 6Ls from the front until home turn, no dash.
8Ls off pace out 2-wide in midfield at 1000 M, 4-wide making final turn still worse than midfield, minor late headway out wide.
8Ls back on fence in 8th at 1000 M, marginally closer on turning, not much room and checked 200 M out but chasing only. (Not tested.)
Caught 4-wide no cover 1300 M out, 2-wide and about 1L or 2Ls down in 2nd from 1000 M to home turn, soon swamped.
10Ls last at 1000 M, 7Ls back in rear turning for home, didn't find much room in the straight, might have finished closer. (Not tested.)
Messy start, 3-back on fence in 4th about 4Ls from the lead at 100 M, closer but 4-wide turning for home, always held by the winner.
Disputed early pace on fence, same until home turn, a neck clear turning for home, tipped out of the win final strides.
Slowly away and went 4-back on fence 7Ls from the front at halfway, still 5Ls back in 10th at 200 M, ran on well through beaten rivals, never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Good early pace out wide to dispute the speed out 2-wide at 600 M, a neck down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra final stages and missed the quinella.
Caught 3-wide cover throughout, towards rear about 7Ls behind at 600 M, widest out 4-deep on straightening, no threat at all.
3-back on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 700 M, niggled along turning for home, stayed on well to lead final strides.
Got back, 5Ls down in 8th with cover at halfway, still adrift in midfield at 200 M, nearest at finish.
7Ls back in 8th out 2-side at halfway, nearest at finish without troubling those ahead.
Slowest away, 2-wide and 3Ls back in 4th at halfway, had every chance but too slow.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide, box-seat position at 600 M, found very little off the bit and no excuses.
5Ls off speed in midfield at 700 M, never drew any closer.
4Ls down in 6th out 2-wide at halfway and same on straightening, never likely to improve from midfield.
On terms but very wide from widest gate down backstretch, got in on the circle but 8Ls last on straightening, no danger.
Very slow away, more than 10Ls off the leader at rear, progressed along the fence throughout, demonstrated little dash 200 M despite harmed by the very slow early sectionals.
Midfield, 5-1/2Ls off the leader, travelled well along the fence, not suited by the very slow pace, no turn of foot, flattened 200 M.
Hard ridden early, attempted to grab a midfield spot but failed to do so, then eased back, trapped wide throughout, harmed by the very slow pace, never competitive.
Eased at start to cross at rear, more than 10Ls off the leader 2-wide, harmed by the very slow tempo, blocked and checked 200 M, just ran on.

Bumped start, attempted to push forward but failed to muster speed, 8Ls off the leader 2-wide behind midfield, harmed by the very slow pace, delivered strong finishing efforts 250 M and probably was the best closer.
Settled in box seat and travelled comfortably throughout, helped by the very slow pace, dashed well and made ground steadily in straight, just missed the win by a neck.
Pressed forward, took the rail easily and led at very slow early sectionals, benefited by the racing situations, made all.
Pushed early to obtain a position just behind midfield, 8Ls off the leader, had clear running along the fence throughout, dashed well in straight despite not suited by the very slow pace.
Eased to sit about midfield, 6-1/2Ls behind the leader 3 to 2-wide, raced keenly, harmed by the very slow pace, never accelerated in straight, ran on only fairly.
Pushed early and crossed in front of the main bunch, 3-1/2Ls off the leader 2-wide, not suited by the very slow tempo, dashed strongly 300 M to grab a remarkable 3rd, improving.
Eased back, raced wide throughout, harmed by the very slow tempo, never better than midfield.
Slightly slow out and slightly hampered. Settled on rails in midfield. Switched off rails for a run 200 M out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Came under pressure to challenge turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Travelled one-back in 3rd on rails. One-paced early in straight before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
Settled in rails in forward of midfield. Fought on steadily under pressure down inside of straight but found winner too good.
Settled at the back. Ran on well past beaten horses inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced 2 or 3-wide behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Slowly away losing ground. Travelled on rails behind midfield. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Attempted to make all. Headed under pressure over 150 M out.
Raced 3-wide in prominent position. One-out-one-back in 4th turning into back straight. Quickened well inside final 200 M to take charge about 100 M out.
Raced 3-wide in rear of midfield. Made short-lived effort around home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Raced outside leader within a length. Similar turning in but gradually swamped inside final 200 M.
Always in last few and never seen with a chance.

Showed plenty of early pace to challenge for front, used plenty to continue speed battle to 800 M, eventually took over but was a spent force by this time, under siege on bend, dropped out easily last 200 M.
No pace from gates and taken back to rear, raced 2-wide 6Ls back, fast tempo played right into hands, crept closer passing Rock, ascended down middle to score a convincing victory.
Began well enough, pressed on but unable to slot in, raced 3-wide without cover 2Ls back, did plenty of work to bend, couldn't sustain effort in straight but kept on soundly all the same.

Amongst first to begin, raced in battle for lead for first half, attempted to surrender to front and used plenty in process, under pressure on bend, weakened in run home when emptied out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Moderate break, ended up 7Ls back in running line, had suitable trip with solid pace, weaved at clear turning and cut back between horses at 200 M closing of best of beaten brigade for 3rd.
Out with them yet faded back from an awkward gate, drifted back to rear 8 or more lengths back in 2-wide line, still well back turning but made solid progress late.
Bounced out, assumed spot behind early leader, trailed a fast pace, eased 3-wide at 600 M, hit front on turning in and held a margin to 150 M but couldn't sustain effort and tired late.
Restrained from a wide alley, ended up 8-10Ls back at rear, helped by fast pace but set a huge task on bend, kept to inside and progressed evenly without clear running and was not tested late.
Amongst first few leaving straight first time, raced in 1x1 slot but forced to chase hot pace, forced wide without cover at 600 M, struggling on bend didn't see out trip and dropped out last 200 M.
Began well, ended up in midfield 2-wide 4 to 5Ls back. Chances improved by tempo, niggled along on bend, found little and just struggled in run to line.
Out with rest, ended up racing 2-wide 5-6Ls away, aided by speed at top end, made a 3-wide run passing Rock yet couldn't hold eventual winners back, passed only tired horses in run to line.
Slow into stride, raced back in midfield 4Ls back on fence, had a soft trip in mid-section, offered nothing in straight and weakened to be beaten a long way. (Galloped on.)
Average break, raced 8 to 9Ls back on fence, had a ground saving trip and helped by pace, kept improving on circle, had plenty to offer when lost run at 100 M and not tested thereafter.
Even beginning, went on with it wide out early to cross to 2 wide spot, raced 4Ls back in midfield, niggled along on circle.
Bounced out, camped on back of pace 2Ls away, had ideal trip in mid-section, improved on bend stalking first two, made run at 300 M, gradually overhauled leaders and withstood late challenge.
Showed usual pace, ended up outside leader, challenged leader throughout, still there 1/2 length down on turning, maintained effort until 100 M before workload took toll.
Slow into stride, raced 3 wide with cover behind midfield 9 to 10Ls back at midpoint, helped by pace, attempted to improve 4 wide on bend but only held ground in run to line.
Restrained from a wide alley, raced 12 or more lengths back on rails, aided by pace but set an impossible task, ran past some weakening runners late.
Lacked early pace, took up expeded role at rear 12Ls off speed, helped by speed and saved ground on bend, made good progress late but set an impossible task.
Moderate jump, ended up behind midfield in running line, forced 3 wide without cover in back straight, still 6Ls down leaving circle, couldn't finish off in straight.
Standard jump, raced 6Ls back in midfield, had an easy time with pace on, progressed along rails to 200 M before running into traffic problems, closed hard when clear last 100 M to just miss.
Even beginning, positioned up in midfield 6Ls back, had a reasonable run in mid-section, made a 3 wide run on circle, took plenty of ground off leaders in straight before going down in a 3 way go.
Eased to take a midfield position, lost spot and was 12Ls back at midpoint, never seemed comfortable, made no headway in straight.
Amongst first to break, led them early, kept them running at even sections after being challenged when easing pace held a narrow advantage turning, held on to 100 M but couldn't fend rest off late.
No pace from outset, more than 12Ls back at rear, always struggling, made no impression.
Out with rest, raced 4Ls or so back on rails, was helped by pace but still a distance off leaders back, made gradual progress in straight before losing run at 100 M.
Stalked the leaders and when asked for an effort after the 400 M, responded nicely and although inclined to shift out in the run to the post, was able to land by a short margin.
Settled midfield about 4 off the outside rail, struggled over the final stages.
Slow to begin and settled in 2nd last position on the outside fence. Closed off strongly over the latter stages.

Raced along the outside fence just behind the leaders. Was disappointed for running near the 200 M and was checked when angling out for running. Was awkwardly placed thereafter and was again checked in the run to the post. (See Racing
Travelled just behind midfield, commenced to close off strongly over the final 300 M, ran into traffic problems and was checked near the 100 M.
Led along the outside rail, had every chance.
Parked on the back of the leader to its inside, raced clear passing the 150 M, only to be overhauled close to the line.
Raced towards the rear of the field, didn't make up any appreciable ground in the run to the wire.
Enjoyed a nice passage in transit, just off the speed. Was a beaten horse after the 400 M. (To trial.)
Raced in a midfield position towards the outside, ran on well although struck interference near the 100 M.
Slow to begin and raced in last position, passed some tiring runners over the concluding stages.
Raced on the back of the speed well off the outside fence, couldn't sustain effort over the concluding stages.
Raced towards the middle of the track on the back of the speed. Failed to lengthen when pressured inside the 300 M.
Raced close to the middle of the course, midfield. Weakened and gave ground passing the 300 M.
Settled behind midfield. 5Ls off the lead at the turn. Ran on well and steadily made up ground in the straight. Crowded and was checked near the line.
Settled in rear section, overraced and not suited by tempo, near last on straightening. Ran on without threatening.
Led for most of the race. Tired and dropped out final 250 M.
Settled behind midfield. Widest turning for home and rallied for a minor placing.

Raced along the rails in 4th place and was 5Ls off the lead at 800 M. Remained on the fence at the turn and closed to within 2Ls on straightening. Charged through a tight gap 300 M out and cruised home with a big lead.
Trailed field until home straight. Kept on fairly, ran past a few beaten runners before checked near the line.
Raced behind the pace. Followed leader into home straight but only remained on same pace thereafter.
Niggled along early. Raced in 3rd place and was 3 to 4Ls behind the leader at 1000 M. Closed to within 2Ls at home turn. Kept on fairly in the straight.
Settled at midfield. Ran on well in the home straight for a distant 2nd.
Raced in rear section. Ran on fairly in the straight.
In 3rd no worse than 3Ls from the front until final bend, had every chance to at least place but was too one-paced.
4-with cover in rear down the back when 6Ls from the front, stayed there.
3-back on fence about 4Ls from the front in 5th at 1000 M, could not take advantage of his nice position in the straight.
Led by 1L on fence from 1000 M to home turn, joined about 100 M out and tipped out by the winner on the line.
Slowly away, about 7Ls back in rear until home turn, never likely to make much headway.
Niggled along about 8Ls last early on, never passed a rival.
Slow to start, 4-back on fence in midfield at halfway, 4Ls back on straightening, benefited from a strong ride to get lead final strides.
Caught 4-wide no cover down the back straight when about 10th and 5Ls from the pace, never got much closer.
Caught 3-wide no cover about 4Ls from the early pace, without cover and midfield turning for home, one-paced.
Towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls from the speed early on, head up at 800 M, under pressure on straightening, made some minor late ground.
Keen at 1000 M when 3Ls back in midfield, about 4Ls back turning for home, very weak thereafter.
In 2nd on fence at 1200 M, still 1L back in 2nd making home turn, joined PERFECT ATHLETE in front at 100 M, missed quinella final strides.
2-wide in midfield about 5Ls from the speed until final turn, stayed on at the same pace.
Towards rear about 6Ls from the speed out 2-wide until final bend, posed no danger.
4-with cover in rear about 8Ls from the speed at 1000 M, still well back and under pressure turning for home, no danger.
Caught 4-wide no cover about 6Ls in midfield at the 1200 M, posed little or no danger.
Good early pace to lead on fence by 1L from 1400 M to home turn, soon head and faded out.
Slowly away, in rear about 7Ls behind leader through to final bend, passed a few beaten rivals on the run-in.
Slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls from the front until home turn, made some minor late headway for a place.
Slowly away, worse than midfield about 6Ls from the speed at 1200 M and similarly placed going for home, always in rear.
2Ls back in 2nd on fence at 1300 M, 1L down in 2nd swinging for home, kicked 2Ls clear at the 200 M, drew further clear for very easy win.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, improved position down backstretch and 4Ls back in 5th at 800 M, stayed on fairly well but no chance with winner.
10Ls last at the 1200 M, still well back turning for home, ran on past a few tired rivals late.
4Ls back out 2-wide in 5th at 1300 M and similar making final turn, very one-paced.
Lost ground at start, no better than 6Ls from the speed until home bend, plugged on at the one pace.
Tended to carry head awkwardly as usual, 3Ls back in 3rd out 2-wide at 1300 M, had his chance to place in the straight but lacked the kick.
Very keen through early stages in rear, about 7Ls down at halfway in rear, offered nothing in the straight.
3-back on fence about 4Ls off speed in 4th at the 1000 M, close enough if good enough at the final turn, dropped away.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, made 3-wide run on bend, made ground 300 M but without threat to the winner.
Prominent, eased to sit just behind the pace group along the fence, 3Ls off the good pace, held up for running 4-2, no acceleration when clear.
Eased back, 7Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout, made up some ground 250 M, lacked its outstanding finishing efforts as in previous starts.
Eased to sit about midfield, 5Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, blocked most straight, closed the race off strongly when clear last 100 M to secure 3rd.
Eased to rear and took rail, more than 10Ls off the good pace, momentarily lacked room 400 M, ran on ok in final stages.
Bumped start, pushed to hold the rail and shared the lead at good pace, out of fuel 200 M.
Eased to rear, 9-1/2Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 300 M to finish 2nd.
Eased back, 6-1/2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, travelled nicely, however only ran on fairly in final stages.
Jumped only fairly but able to cross in front of the field steadily without making much use, shared the lead 2-wide at good pace, dominated 300 M and hung on strongly to win.
Pushed forward, settled 1-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, blocked 4-2, lacked turn of foot and just held ground when clear.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls off the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, very one paced, weakened 200 M.
Eased to sit about midfield, 3Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, blocked whole straight, never had chance to have clear passage, just ran on.
Hard ridden early but failed to muster speed to take the lead, settled 1-1/2Ls off the good pace and trapped 3-wide, soon emptied 350 M.
Bumped start, worse than midfield, 6-1/2Ls behind the good pace along the fence, finished the race off strongly 200 M but lacked room 100 M.
Average beginning, settled in rearward division, raced 7 to 8Ls back, not advantaged by pace, still well off leader on bend, made a little late progress but never really likely.
Amongst first to break, raced outside leader 1L back, had an even run when speed tapered off, right there on turning for home, still green in straight and condition gave out last 100 M.
Showed pace, elected to take a trail and ended up behind the leader, raced a little keenly early, tracked well on bend, lost run at 200 M and didn't get a real crack holding ground late when clear.
Ordinary beginning, raced 3-wide at rear 8Ls back tried to improve 8Ls away by mid-point, 4-wide turning, found nothing in run to line.
Away in line, ended up 3Ls back on fence, enjoyed a quiet trip throughout, close enough on turning, in traffic at 300 M, in mix when clear shortly after but just tired last 100 M.
No pace from outset, ended up 9Ls back in last position, not suited by tempo, well back on circle, had field to beat on bend, past some tired runners late however set an impossible task.
Moderate jump, landed a midfield spot 4Ls back, had a soft trip in mid-section, angled 2-wide rounding turn, same margin down straightening, kept on progressing in straight to finish an honest 3rd.
Awkwarded into stride, ended up well back 5-6Ls away on fence, not used in mid-section, saved ground and weaved between runners in straight, picked up well over last 200 M to narrowly go down.
Devoid of early speed, raced 8-9Ls back on fence, saved ground on circle, found little when asked in straight just battling to line.
Standard jump, landed a position 7Ls away in running line, had a fair trip although not helped when pace slackened, still had a task in front on bend, made even progress without threatening.
Out well, ended up 5Ls back in midfeild, didn't settle early, travelled more kindly on bend, eased 3-wide on turning, made some headway in stretch indicating a need for more ground.
First to hit ground, led them shortly after, didn't relax when steadying tempo after early burn, 1/2L clear turning, weakened quickly when tackled at 250 M and faded out late.
Broke nicely, fortunately slotted in to 1 out 1 back spot when early pace was on, travelled well 2Ls away on circle, went to them at 250 M, kept on strongly circle urging to score.
Reasonable break, ended up 3Ls back in running line, no excuses in run, tracked eventual winner on bend, made nice ground down middle to make frame.
Had speed from gates, close enough 1 to 2Ls away towards middle, found little when niggled from 300 M, folded tamely in run to line.
Showed pace, shared lead between middle and outside, always prominent, still right there at 100 M but was just outlasted over concluding stages.
No early pace, struggled for first part 4Ls or so away towards centre, never likely but did make some late ground passing some tired horses in run to line.
Tardy to begin, raced 2Ls back behind horses on stand side, had a good trip with cover, picked up reasonably late closing well to be nearest on line.
No real pace, tucked in at rear 4Ls off lead in middle of course, made steady progress last 300 M to steal 4th place late.
Showed pace, held lead on outside rail, kept pace on and had rest chasing, still held narrow advantage at 200 M couldn't hold off late charge of winner.
Displayed usual pace, took a spot 1L off lead between middle and outside, close enough at 200 M, didn't close off like usual (unbalanced at 50 M) just holding ground in run to line.
Even jump, raced 2 to 3Ls back towards middle, had cover and travelled nicely throughout, closed off as usual to be right there finish.
Taken to inside, showed enough pace to be equal at midpoint, gradually lost ground on leaders in run to line (clearly at a disadvantage on inside).
No pace from outset, regathered to be 2 to 3Ls back in midfield, there to 250 M before folding weakly.
Had usual amount of pace to ensure prominent role, raced 1 to 2Ls back in centre of course, struggling at 200 M, weakened out noticeably thereafter. (Lame 2 days after.)
Outpaced early, ended up 3 to 4Ls back against outside rail, picked up nicely last 200 M, finished over the top of them last 100 M to score well (was advantaged by outside ground).
Had natural pace but sat 1L away near to outside, close enough passing 400 M but found little when asked and struggled last furlong.
Settled in midfield mainly 3-wide. Similar turning in. Quickened well inside final 200 M to hit front close to home.
Broke well, settling one-back in 3rd or 4th on rails. Slightly lost position turning in and in box-seat early in straight. Kept on same pace to finish.
Ran past beaten horses close to home. Raced wide in rear of midfield from poor draw. Lost position turning in. Did nothing in the run home down centre of straight.
Slow to muster under pressure early. Raced in rear of midfield rounding home bend. Kept on behind runners after straightening and did not find much room passing 200 M.
Began fairly in midfield from poor draw. Lost position and dropped to last approaching 1000 M. No clear run and shifted off rails after straightening.
Began fairly. Gradually settled in rear of field. Remained similar turning in. Ran on steadily inside final 200 M to be nearest at finish.

Began awkwardly losing ground. Quickly picked up to 5th position within 3Ls of pace. Gained 4th coming out of far side, 3rd around home bend and within 1L of speed upon straightening, however, soon weakened.
Attempted to make all and led the field until joined 400 M out. Soon headed narrowly but plugged on for a placing.
Towards rear and wide to straight. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Not far off early. Lost position coming out of back straight. Midfield turning in. Gradually weakened.

Slow out losing ground. Quickly picked up along rails to forward of midfield. Took further closer order rounding home bend gaining 2L 4th turning in. Kept on until tightened and lost position inside 200 M.
Settled in last few. Saved ground on rails turning in. No room early in straight and checked over 250 M out. Fought on steadily closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Only kept on at the same pace without quickening.
Broke well. Tracked leader to straight. Gained slender advantage shortly after straightening only to be caught close to home.
Bounced out and led them easily, get terms to suit in front, gradually increased tempo on bend, 1L clear turning, kicked hard but couldn't sustain run last 200 M. Kept on soundly to make frame.
Out in line, raced in midfield 4 to 5Ls back in running line, proved difficult to settle in mid-section, peeled out tiring for home, made good progress in straight however died on run last 100 M.
Out fairly from start and managed a midfield spot raced 3 wide 5Ls back, did share of work to bend, weakened out easily in run to line.
Moderate jump, ended up 6Ls back on fence, not used in mid-section, saved ground on circle, made no impression in run to line.
Lacked early dash, ended up 8Ls back in 2 wide line, pace against and tasked up 3 to 4 wide on circle, still well back on bend and never made progress.
No early speed and taken back from a wide alley took expected position near to rear, raced 9Ls away on fence, not asked to bend, made many lengths from impossible spot to finish en eye catching 3rd.
Moderate beginning, pushed up to take prominent role 1 out 1 back behind pace, kept on to make a 3rd move challenging past 500 M, couldn't sustain effort last 250 M and dropped out.

Showed early pace, camped on leaders back, had dream run in mid-section, suited by even sectors on circle, still in behind them turning but hit top gear last 200 M accounting for them a shade convincingly late.
Began well, assumed role outside leader, had an easy toe with lack of pace, 1L down turning, stuck to task and overhauled leader at 200 M, kept on but easily ?? in by winner last 100 M.

Dropped to rear after a slow getaway, raced 8Ls back on rails, had an easy time but pace was against, progressed 2 wide on bend, weaved between horses on straight doing best work late to be nearest on line.
Began with others, ended up 3 back on fence, suited out to 2 wide on circle, travelled well 2Ls back on bend, didn't quicken in straight and just ground away in run to line.

No early toe, back with last few soon after start raced 10 or more Ls back in running line, still well back on circle and not aided by pace, made huge amount of ground between horses in straight and not fully tested late.
No pace from outset, raced 10Ls back in 2 wide line, not helped by tempo, well back to bend, unbalanced at 400 M, made slight progress last 400 M however never really likely.
Standard break but pressed on to take close order, unable to slot in, no better than 3 wide throughout doing ??// without cover, 4 wide on circle, still in it at 300 M but run took toll thereafter.
Raced wide towards rear, dropping to last rounding home bend. Made no further impression in straight.
Settled in rear. Effort on rails rounding home bend, gaining midfield into straight. Fought on steadily without threatening.
Settled one-out-one-back within 2Ls of pace. Similar turning in. Ran on steadily to hold some chance but unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Began fairly, settling one-back on rails in 4th. Fought on under pressure to run on to be nearest at finish.
Broke well from poor draw but had to settle in rear having failed to muster early speed. Remained in rear turning in. Never nearer.
Midfield early. Steadied to rear before home bend. Steadied for a run over 200 M out. Only produced moderate impression closing stages.
Led but unable to cross to rails. Fought on under pressure to hold place after straightening but swamped inside 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Faded after straightening. (Mucus.)
Mainly in midfield. Tightened and lost position coming out of back straight. Regained to midfield on rails turning in. Ran home one-paced without quickening.
Began fairly gradually settling inside leader on rails. Fought on under pressure to hold some chance in straight but swamped for a placing close to home.
Raced very wide without cover behind midfield. Lost position rounding home bend but produced modest late impression closing stages.
Settled in around midfield. Gained 5th turning in. Fought on well to gain upper hand final strides.
Was wide early and worked hard for about a 1000 M to go forward and sit outside the leader, eventually doing so passing the 1200 M. Was a spent force near the 700 M.
Raced about a length back, to the leaders outside early before settling 1 out 1 back near the 1100 M. Was shuffled back after the 700 M and never recovered.
Raced in last position and was never in the hunt.
When the gates opened, threw its head down, causing its rider, to become unbalanced and shortly afterwards be dislodged.
Travelled midfield, the fence. Didn't find any extra when pressured in the straight.
Settled in 2nd last position working into the home straight on the first occasion, 1 off with cover. Commenced to improve its position after the 1200 M, sustained the long run until the post.
Settled behind midfield, the fence. Peeled out after the 800 M, going 3-wide to chase the leader and although it responding well, couldn't run down the winner.
Parked on the leaders back along the rail. Held up rounding the home turn but once in the clear closed of soundly.
In the early was taken back across runners settling near the rear of the field on the fence. Kept to the inside in the run home staying on one paced.
Settled 3 back 1 off early, shifting to the fence near the 1000 M. Was under heavy pressure after the 700 M to hold its position and commenced to tire near the 600 M.
Led until the 800 M, but still enjoyed a nice run after that point tracking the frontrunner. Failed to see out the journey.
2-wide and no worse than midfield. Ran on same pace in the straight.
Settled in rear section before making a move 600 M out. Reached within 3 to 4Ls of the leader but was widest at home turn. Unable to sustain run after straightening and only ran past a beaten runner.
Settled in rear section. Switched out to 3-wide to make a run 600 M out. Ran on fairly and made up a bit of ground in the straight.

Took the lead 1200 M out. Remained in the lead and held a slight advantage over the eventual winner on straightening. Dueled with eventual winner for the majority of the straight before bowing down final 50 M.
Settled in a prominent spot behind the pace. Kept on fairly but unable to turn up a notch in the straight.

Taken back on jumping and raced along the rails in a rearward spot. Remained towards the rear and was 4 to 5Ls off on straightening. Steadily made up ground in the straight despite being crowded near 200 M.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 2-wide and 4Ls off the lead turning for home. Closed the race off well despite running into traffic 200 M out.

Behind midfield and was 3-wide without cover. Took off at the Rock and improved to within a length of the pace turning for home. Kept on well in the straight and worn down early leader in the final stages to claim victory.
On the fence in a forward spot early. Eased back to midfield 1100 M out. Within 3Ls of the pace on straightening but unable to quicken and stayed on same pace to the line.
Raced 2-wide at midfield. 3-wide and 2Ls off the leader turning for home. Kept on well in the straight but unable to take significant ground off eventual winner in the closing stages.
Trailed field until straightening. One-paced in the straight and only ran past tired runners.
Caught wide into first turn. Tracked leader in a 2-wide position in back straight and home turn. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Never travelled well, 4Ls back in midfield at the 1200 M, niggled along to lie up down back straight, all out turning for home, no response.
1L back on fence in 2nd at 1300 M, enjoyed a nice trail in the box-seat from 800 M to home turn, outpaced by the winner but stayed on best of rest for 2nd.
4-back on fence 5Ls down in 6th place at 1000 M, progress on the circle to be over 2Ls down in 4th off final turn, had his chance to figure. (Lame next day.)
3-back on fence until home turn around midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls from the front, outpaced through final stages.
Not the best away, on fence but worse than midfield about 6Ls from the speed at 1200 M, never looked likely to improve much on this position.
Always in rear bunch, under pressure when 8Ls back in 11th at the 600 M, weak performance.
Went back from wide gate, 10Ls last 1200 M out, 6Ls down turning for home, making some late ground when steadied 100 M out, didn't recover.
4Ls back in 4th out 2-wide at 1000 M, pressed on out 3-wide no cover from the 600 M and 1L back in 3rd on straightening, one-paced thereafter.
Towards rear early on, 2-wide and 6Ls down in 8th at halfway, widest out 5-deep making last bend in midfield, faded.
Slowly away, in 10th place from the 1200 M to home turn between 8Ls and 6Ls from the lead, made some late ground to place.
No cover early on but got in 2-wide about 3Ls from the front at 1200 M and 1L back in 2nd at 800 M, led at top of home straight, always holding his rivals.
Led on fence by 1L at 1300 M and 2Ls clear at 1000 M, headed at top of home straight and run out of the money final 100 M.
3-wide with cover in rear about 8Ls from the early pace, never improved from this rearward position.
4-back on fence about 8Ls from the speed at 1200 M, similarly placed turning for home, ran on well late for a place.
Slowly away, on fence about 9Ls last at 1200 M, still well back taking final bend, decent late headway along the inside, never nearer.
Tended to hang in throughout, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in mid-division at halfway, further back in midfield swinging for home, not much room 200 M out but always held.
