8Ls back in 10th at 1000 M when 5-back on fence, still well behind turning for home but ran on strongly down the centre to lead on the line.
Trapped 3-wide no cover throughout, midfield about 5Ls from the speed at halfway, further back in midfield off last turn, extra work soon took its toll.
In 2nd or 3rd from 1200 M to home turn but between 2Ls and 4Ls from the leader, gave chase and briefly led about 100 M out, couldn't sustain the run and missed a place.
Handy position in 4th out 2-wide and 3Ls from the front at 1200 M, about 6Ls down in 6th off last bend, very weak in the finish, performance deemed unacceptable.
Lost ground at start, 2-wide in rear about 9Ls last at 1100 M, no better off on straightening, made some minor late ground.
3-back on fence in 5th when 4Ls down at 1200 M, 6Ls back in 4th when niggled along at 600 M, stayed on stoutly for pressure in the straight, foiled on the line.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1300 M, shot 4Ls clear from the 600 M to final bend, tired and swamped inside final 100 M.
2-wide and 1L back in 2nd at 1200 M, over 4Ls down in 3rd entering homestretch, one-paced.
Eased early to obtain the box seat, 2Ls off the good pace, had every chance in straight but never pick up and soon emptied.
Bumped shortly after start, then pushed along to go forward but was checked and lost ground, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace along the fence, ran on well to the line, checked again 200 M.
Hard ridden to share the lead at good tempo 2-wide, shifted ground in straight but ran on and secured 3rd until 100 M run ended.
Hard ridden to go forward, trapped 3-wide throughout outside the lead under good pace, used up too much petrol at bends, weakened 250 M.
Eased to rear and crossed the rails behind field, 7Ls off the good pace, travelled well throughout, however no turn of foot in final stages.
Checked severely shortly after start, dropped to rear, 7-1/2Ls behind the good pace along the fence, made ground 300 M, however blocked and checked 100 M, just ran on afterwards.
Settled 2Ls behind the good pace 2-wide, raced keenly in middle stages, ran on strongly to the line and finished 3rd without threats to the winner.
Shared the lead easily along the fence at good early sectionals, drifted away 300 M to score its first turf victory without being challenged.
Eased at start to get across the rails behind midfield, 5Ls off the good pace, travelled nicely, but only made minor ground in straight.
Eased back, 6Ls off the good pace 2 to 3-wide, progressed steadily 250 M and grab 2nd just before the line.
Bumped early, eased to sit about midfield, 3-1/2Ls off the good pace 2-wide, out of fuel 300 M.

Eased to sit just behind midfield, 4-1/2Ls behind the good pace, trapped 3-wide throughout and lost ground, took some time to be balanced and pick up after straightening, made ground lately and missed a placing.
Had usual abundance of gate speed, set a solid tempo when pressured throughout, held a narrow advantage on bend, soon under pressure and weakened last furlong.
Missed start, regathered to be 3-wide 8Ls back, 6Ls down and 2-wide on bend.
Standard jump, took a midfield spot 4Ls back in running line, switched 3-wide but didn't handle bend, struggling on turning, found little in run to line.
Fair to begin, ended up 4Ls away on fence, travelled well and saved ground on rails, in traffic at 300 M, closed race off creditably to make frame.
Fast into stride, challenged for front racing outside leader, kept speed genuine in mid-section, 1/2L off in speed battle, hit lead turning but couldn't dash again and faded last 150 M.
Dropped back soon after start, ended up 3-wide 8Ls back aided by tempo, made a searching run passing Rock, came 4-wide on turning, made many lengths to hit front only to be caught late.

Began in line, outpaced and steadied early, lost position 8Ls back in 2-wide line, niggled along at mid-point with fast pace on, switched wide on bend, closed over the top of them last 200 M to score.
Out well, dropped in nicely on leaders' back, travelled nicely trailing speed 3Ls back, cut back to inside on turning and challenged at 200 M but just couldn't go with them last bit.
Began well as usual, pushed on and raced 3-wide outside leaders, did it tough without cover, under pressure on bend, dropped right out in straight.
No early pace, assumed a rearward spot however lost further ground when severely checked at 1000 M, always struggling to keep up with pace on, rearward and simply held ground in straight.
Out with them however outpaced shortly after, raced 7Ls back on rails, saved ground and used little with pace on, came between horses and closed well to be nearest on line.
Away with them, took up a prime position on back of speed, tracked well 3Ls back, took a gap on turning, made run at 200 M, hit lead briefly at 150 M but overhauled late. Game effort.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to 10th and towards rear. Shifted back to last leaving Rock. Remained in rear of bunched field turning in. Ran on under pressure past beaten horses.
Slightly slow out, settling on rails in midfield. Saved ground on inside turning in. Improving well when tightened badly on inside closing stages.
Broke well, settling just worse than midfield. Shuffled back to worse positions coming out of back straight. Made significant progress in straight to be nearest at finish.
Wide in prominent position early. Took up running outside 2nd rounding stables bend. Led until weakened out of contention over 400 M out.
Well back. Commenced run from Rock making good but short-lived progress around field rounding home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.

Began well and amongst leaders before tightened coming out of home straight. Settled in 6th just better than midfield and similar turning in. Minor interference 300 M out before quickening to assert authority inside 200 M.
Settled one-out-one-back. Commenced run rounding home bend disputing lead into straight, however, unable to sustain effort inside final 200 M.
Began fairly settling mostly 3-wide in midfield. Switched wider for a run turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled one-back on rails in 4th. Similar turning in but soon weakened badly after straightening.
Amongst leaders. Settled on rails inside leader turning into back straight. Remained lead rounding home bend only to be headed 200 M out.
Restrained to race in rear. Remained same until effort coming out of back straight. Wide around home bend and widest turning in. Ran home steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Remained wide throughout after beginning from poor draw, improving steadily to 5th within 3Ls of pace turning into back straight. In closer order rounding home bend before carried wider turning for home. Found nothing.
Never far off. Settled in 3rd and as far as 4Ls back coming out of far side. Just 2Ls off turning in with leaders coming back to the field. Fought on dourly to gain upper hand close to home.
Soon in rear. Trailed the field from 1100 M. Saved ground on rails turning in. Ran past well beaten horses.
Slowly away. Always in last few. Made no impression in straight. (Mucus.)
Settled in midfield. Ran home at the same pace without quickening under pressure.
Raced 3 wide behind midfield. Kept on at the same pace down centre of straight in the run home.
Raced wide towards rear. Found nil early in straight.
Ridden for pace early, settling just better than midfield. Joint 4th turning in. Could only keep on at the same pace under pressure without quickening.
Settled just worse than midfield. Lost position turning in. Fought on to run past well beaten horses.
Began awkwardly and blundered losing considerable ground. Remained well back to straight. Never seen with a chance.

Began fairly from widest draw. Raced wide in prominent position before taking over and crossing to rails inside 1200 M. Led until joined into straight. Just able to hold place under pressure in the run to the line.
Settled on rails in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Broke well. Led early gradually crossing to rails. Settled one-back in 2nd coming out of far side. Improved to dispute lead turning in but unable to gain any advantage. Swamped near finish.
Began in midfield before taking slightly closer order. Joint 4th when under pressure turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Similar turning in. Gradually faded.
Kept in touch with the leaders, 2 deep with cover. Kept on satisfactorily in run home.
Made the early speed before handing up near the 700 M and taking a trailing position. Stayed on soundly.

From a wide barrier, was steadied and taken across behind runners to settle in 2nd last position on the fence. Sought runs along the inside, and although it received a check near the 300 M, ran on soundly.
Settled behind the early leader along the fence. Was 3 back after the 700 M, failed to give when asked for an effort at the business end of the race.
Travelled 3 to 4-wide for most of the trip, midfield no cover. Lost touch with the field after the 500 M.
Covered ground whilst in a midfield position, 4 deep, had cover. Struggled over the latter stages.
Worked hard from an outside gate to work forward, eventually crossing to the lead on the fence near the 700 M. Ran out of gas in the straight.
Settled in last position in the run and was brought to the extreme outside turning into the straight. After being balanced early let down nicely and hit the line well.
Settled on the back of the speed, 2-wide. Lengthened nicely in the straight to score a convincing win.
Raced in 3rd last position, 2 deep with cover, battled away over the final 300 M.
Was posted 4 to 5-wide on the circle no cover, midfield. Was off the bit turning for home.
Travelled midfield, 2 deep with cover, closed off fairly.
Raced close to midfield, 3-wide with cover. Never likely.
Settled behind midfield along the rails. Peeled out in the run home but made little impression.
Raced towards the rear and near last on straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Raced wide and without cover at midfield early stages. Made progress after 1000 M and reached within 2Ls of the leader at the turn but remained no cover. Weakened steadily after straightening.
Raced at midfield but was hard to settle. Unable to turn up a notch in the straight and ran on same pace to the line.
Ridden out of the gates and was racing better than midfield. 2-wide and 3Ls down making home turn. Kept on same pace in the straight.
Led until straightening. Unable to turn up a notch and gradually faded.
Settled in rear section. 4-wide turning for home and lacked the needed response. Only ran past a beaten runner.
Disputed lead before taking a sit behind the pace 1200 M out. Switched out and quickened after straightening. Took control 300 M out and cruised home for an easy win.
Raced along the rails at midfield. 3 back on the fence home turn and steadily made up ground in the straight for a minor placing.
Hard pressed out of the gates to race behind the pace. Slipped to midfield 1000 M out. 2 back on the fence at home turn and kept on fairly in the straight to make the frame.
3-wide at midfield. Towards the rear on straightening and never quickened. Weakened final stages.
Near midfield early stages but gradually slipped back and was in rear section at home turn. Ran on fairly and made up ground in the straight.
Taken back from wide draw and raced at the rear. Trailed field and was widest turning in. Lacked the needed rally and only ran past tired runners. (Mucus.)
Jumped awkwardly and settled towards the rear early stages. Improved to around midfield at the turn. Only maintained same pace in the straight.

Made up ground steadily and was racing 2-wide behind the pace heading into the turn. Took lead shortly after straightening but had no answer when challenged by the winner 300 M out. Kept on fairly for a distant 2nd.
Midfield about 2Ls from the pace from 1000 M to home turn, had every chance to at least place but failed to quicken.
Caught 3 and 4-wide no cover throughout, 1L back in 4th at 800 M and 2nd turning for home, quickly faded out. (Lame.)
In front rank within 2Ls of the pace until home turn in 3rd, stayed on okay for 2nd but never likely to grab the winner.
Went back to a 4-wide position but with cover at 1000 M, 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, plugged on home one-paced.
On fence about 4Ls from the speed in 8th or 9th through to home straight, one-paced.
Within 1L of the speed before hitting the front 600 M out, still 1L clear 300 M but headed 100 M out and lost 2nd soon after.
Lost ground at start and 6Ls last at 1000 M, under pressure in rear turning in, ran on past a few tired rivals, never nearer.
Slowest away, always towards rear at least 5Ls from the front until the final bend, held up from 300 M to 200 M, too late to recover. (Blood in trachea.)
Worse than midfield about 4Ls from the front until home turn, made a little ground but posed no danger.
Among the early pacesetters, became unbalanced at 600 M and 2Ls back in 5th off final bend, faded out steadily.
Trapped very wide down backstretch but got in with cover from 800 M when about 3Ls back in mid-division, 5-wide turning for home, kept on to lead 100 M, driven out.
Led by half a length out 2-wide at 900 M, sank through the field 500 M out, performance deemed unacceptable.
One from rear about 6Ls from early pace, out wide and with 5Ls to make up tuning for home, made no impact down centre of track.
No early speed, worse than midfield about 4Ls from the front until home turn, always outpaced.
2-wide and 2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M and similar turning for home, led 300 M out and went 1L clear at the 200 M, kept on only to be foiled on the line.
Had the box-seat position in 3rd or 4th between 2Ls and 3Ls from the front until home turn, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, stayed on gamely to lead on line.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide in mid-division 6Ls from the speed at halfway and not much closer making final turn, stayed on okay for a place despite hanging in.
Slowly away, got well back at least 8Ls from the lead through to home turn, never really on terms with principals.
3-back on fence about 6Ls from the speed at halfway in midfield, marginally closer turning for home, held up for a run twice inside final 200 M but never a likely player.
Went back from wide gate, 8Ls back about 11th at 800 M, not much closer on straightening when checked, ran on well despite hanging in, never nearer.
4Ls back out 2-wide in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down turning for home, had his chance to place bit lacked the dash.
4-back on fence about 7Ls from the speed at 1000 M, steadied entering straight, kept on at same pace and never likely to figure in the money.
Caught 3-wide no cover at 1000 M and trapped deep throughout, 5Ls back in midfield at home turn, always well held. (Mucus.)
Always in rear, over-raced when 3-wide with cover down the back at least 7Ls from the front, very weak in home straight.
Never on terms, at least 8Ls off pace from the 1200 M.
Disputed early pace out 2-wide at 1400 M, a neck 2nd at top of home straight but faded out quickly thereafter.
Disputed early tempo, about 1L clear from 1000 M to home turn, headed 300 M out and faded out swiftly.
Poor performance, in rear throughout at least 8Ls or 9Ls from the speed, 4-wide (widest) and well back turning for home, slipped further back.
Travelled more prominently in a midfield spot, 3Ls off the leader, trapped 3-wide throughout, not suited by the slow pace, checked 700 M, dashed well 400 M, but stayed flat 100 M and missed 3rd.
Eased back, 5-1/2Ls behind the leader 2-wide, harmed by the slow tempo, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, just held ground in straight.
Very slow away, 6Ls off the on the rails at back, harmed by the slow pace, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, just ran on afterwards.
Trapped 3-wide early, pushed to sit outside the leader, helped by the slow pace, dropped off 350 M.
Hard ridden early to occupy a prominent spot, 2Ls behind the leader 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow tempo, checked 700 M, dashed well 300 M to win by a narrow margin.
Settled in box seat throughout, clipped heels 1500 M, badly unbalanced, blundered and almost fell, rider almost dislodged.
Eased to sit just behind midfield, checked badly 1500 M, 4-1/2Ls off the leader along the fence, harmed by the slow pace, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, nothing left afterwards.
Pushed to take a midfield spot, trapped 2 to 3-wide, not suited by the slow pace, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, just held ground in straight.
Eased at start, checked 1500 M, 6Ls off the leader at back 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, tailed out afterwards. (Blood in trachea.)
Eased back, 7Ls behind the leader 2 to 3-wide, harmed by the slow pace, checked 700 M, dashed strongly 250 M to run a remarkable 3rd despite all negative racing situations.
Pushed to take the rail and led at advantageous slow early sectionals, however faded quickly 400 M.
Settled in midfield along the fence, 3Ls off the leader, not suited by the slow pace, disorganized and severely checked 700 M, never progress afterwards.
Pushed to sit prominent early, broke down 1500 M.

Settled just behind the pace group early, swept towards 3-wide and moved up 900 M to sit 1-1/2Ls off the leader, benefited by the slow tempo, led 400 M, closed off strongly but hung out 300 M, just missed win at the finish.
Soon took up running and led to straight. Faded gradually.
Settled in last few. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Rear early. Quickly picked up to rear of midfield when very wide. Similar turning in. Steadied for a run 350 M out. No further impression.
Settled one-back in 3rd on rails. Joined leaders turning in but soon weakened.
Towards rear. Made modest headway closing stages without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Ran home steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield early, dropping towards rear coming out of far side. Very wide turning in. Dropped out tamely.
Did not jump well but soon picked up to midfield on rails. Moved closer turning in. Responded well to take charge closing stages. Won going away.
Settled just worse than midfield on rails. Saved ground on rails turning in. Behind horses early in straight and had to shift out to obtain run inside 200 M. Fought on well to finish.
Sluggish early. Trailed the field to 300 M when switched out for a good late run down the centre of straight. Nearest at finish.
Travelled in midfield. Kept on well in the run home.
Broke well from wide draw. Settled outside leader. Hit front momentarily when leader weakened straightening. Soon dropped out under pressure.
Raced wide in midfield. Soon weakened after straightening.
Settled one-out-one-back in 4th within 2Ls of pace. Quickened well to hit front 300 M out but found winner too strong nearing finish.
Settled one-out-one-back in 4th after beginning from poor draw. Remained same turning in but ran home one-paced.
Began fairly, settling behind midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Settled on rails in midfield, travelling well into straight. Responded well to assert authority closing stages. Readily.
Broke well settling one-back in 3rd on rails. Failed to quicken under pressure early in straight before baulked behind runners inside final 200 M.
Began very awkwardly losing considerable ground. Trailed the field to straight and never seen with a chance.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Just kept on at the same pace without quickening.
Began fairly from widest draw. Gradually improved to settle outside leader. Came to challenge turning in drawing level momentarily 400 M out but soon found no extra.
Always well behind.
Raced wide just behind midfield. Did nothing in straight.
Slowly away but quickly picked up to race towards rear of field. Similar turning in but ran on steadily down inside of straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke well to lead, holding narrow advantage most of way until collared close to home.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on quite well closing stages.
Ridden early but failed to muster, dropping towards rear. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled in last few. Produced good late impression inside final 200 M.
Soon in rear. Widest runner turning in losing ground. Ran home well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Did not find much room early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Travelled just better than midfield on rails. Saved ground on inisde and disputed 3rd turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Raced wide in last few. Failed to make the turn straightening and lost ground. Ran home one-paced and steadied late.
Raced in forward of mifield. Obtained split over 350 M out and ran on well to just draw level in the bobbing of heads.
Very sluggish at start losing considerable ground. Recovered well back to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Broke well. Held up to race in prominent position, racing keenly outside leader. Similar turning in. Dropped out tamely inside final 200 M.
Began well from widest draw. Gradually crossed to the front. Went over 2Ls clear under pressure 200 M out, however, only to be joined on the line for a dead-heat victory.
Midfield early. Improved to just better than midfield position when wide coming out of back straight. Still wide turning in. Gradually weakened.
Mainly in midfield. Slightly worse turning in. Finished off well to grab 3rd late.
Jumped best but settled 3-wide in 3rd without cover. Similar turning for home but gradually faded.
Settled in midfield. Raced tight between runners before badly squeezed over 200 M out. Never recovered. (Soft palate.)
Raced 3-wide in rear. Effort rounding home bend and wider turning in. Quickened well inside final 300 M to take charge close to home.
Began fairly. Driven to lead 150 M after the start. Headed over 200 M out and weakened under pressure.
Well back early. Took closer order approaching home bend. Made up good ground between runners down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear. Did not find much room behind horses early in straight. Kept on well to finish.
Raced outside leader. Hit front over 200 M out. Overhauled when no extra close to home.
Settled on rails in midfield. Saved ground on rails turning in. Raced tight behind horses in straight and steadied twice inside 200 M. Fought on well to the line.
Broke well but soon taken to race in towards rear of field. Dropped out after straightening.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off in 4th. Kept on under pressure in straight before swamped inside final 200 M.
Broke well and in front briefly. Settled 3-wide in 3rd to straight. Soon weakened.
Raced wide in midfield. Lost position turning in. Fought on steadily to reach 4th late.
Settled just better than midfield. Obtained run over 350 M out. Ran on to hold good chance closing stages but pipped for 3rd.
Always well back.
Raced mainly 3-wide behind midfield. No better turning in. Ran home one-paced.
Settled towards rear of small field. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Travelled just worse than midfield. Ran home one-paced under pressure.
Began well. Soon taken back to race in rear. Trailed the field around home bend and into straight. Ran on steadily past beaten horses.
Began well. Settled in 4th within 3Ls of pace just better than midfield. Gained 3rd turning in. Ran on to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain run 100 M out.
Well there. Took up running 1200 M out. Led to 600 M. Dropped out tamely upon straightening.
In front early. Settled in 2nd on rails 1200 M out. Became 3rd rounding home bend. Lost further ground after straightening.
Held up in rear. Took closer order coming out of back straight. Sustained effort from midfield into straight to hit front over 150 M out. Hung on well to finish.
Gradually crossed from widest draw to race one-out-one-back in 3rd. Took closer order coming out of back straight hitting front making home turn, however, only to be swamped 200 M out.
Settled just behind midfield the fence. Weakened right out of over the last 300 M. (Blood in trachea.)
Positioned along the fence, handy to the leaders. Struggled in the straight.
Proved difficult to settle early and raced handy to the leaders, about 3 back, 2 deep with cover. Hung in in the early part of the straight and only battled away thereafter.
Settled midfield 3-wide with cover. Finished off dourly.
Settled back in the field, 2-3 off with cover. Came wide in the straight and worked to the line satisfactorily.
Travelled in 2nd last position along the fence. Was disappointed for running early in the straight, working home fairly in the run to the post.
Raced 3-wide, no cover close to the speed, compounded in the straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Was taken on in the lead in the middle stages and commenced to tire in side the final furlong.
Parked outside the leader and slid forward to race upsides mid-race. Cruised to the front near the 400 M to win with something in hand.
Enjoyed the run of the race on the leaders back along the fence. Closed off dourly after having every chance.
Better than midfield and no more than 3Ls off the leader. Improved to within a length at 400 M but unable to find extra to remain in contention thereafter.
Bumped at the start and became unbalanced. Raced around midfield early. Came within a length of the leader at 400 M but unable to find more and only remained at same pace.
Kept within a length of the leader. Became unbalanced when awkwardly placed 500 M out and weakened thereafter.
Raced towards the back. Rallied in the final stages for a distant 3rd.
Disputed lead until the halfway mark. Weakened and dropped out thereafter.
Raced towards the back of the field early stages. Made up ground by weaving through traffic in the final stages.
Never more than a length off the pace. Took the lead 400 M out and kept on well final stage to hold off rival.
Bumped at the start and raced among last few. Inconvenienced at 600 M and closed the race off only fairly.
Lead or disputed lead until being headed at 400 M. Weakened and dropped out thereafter. (Irregular Heart Beat)
Off slowly and raced at the rear. Spent remainder of the race trying to catch-up. Found nothing in the final stages.
No better than midfield early stages. Closed to within a length of the leader 400 M out. Unable to sustain effort and weakened thereafter.
Raced at midfield and no more than 3Ls off the pace. Made a dash at the 300 M but unable to sustain run in the closing stages.
Kept within 2Ls of the leader. Weakened final 400 M.
Midfield early stages. 2Ls off the lead at 400 M. Steadily made up ground final stages but not enough to catch eventual winner.
Got well back, at least 10Ls from the speed down backstretch, tried to launch a bid in the homestretch, nearest at finish.
8Ls behind in 8th or so at middle stages, briefly threatened a rally at top of home straight but very flat final 200 M.
Over-raced early on when 5Ls from the pace in midfield, steadily lost this position and much further back off final bend, never a factor.
In 4th or 5th place until turning for home between 4Ls and 6Ls from the lead, stayed on okay to grab 2nd final 50 M.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1600 M out, 4Ls clear and a bit keen at halfway, one-paced in the straight and petered out once headed 150 M out.
Slowly away and in rear at 1000 M about 10Ls from the front, clipped heels and almost fell 700 M out, never recovered.
In 2nd or 3rd not much worse than 3Ls or 4Ls from the front through to home straight, picked up nicely to lead 150 M out, comfortably.
Had the run of the race early on 2Ls from the speed, soon struggling to lie up and slipped 6Ls back in 6th turning for home, faded further.
One from rear about 9Ls from the speed at 1400 M and no better off on straightening, stayed there.
Raced 4 and 5-back on fence towards rear at least 6Ls or 7Ls from the pace, progress in straight and shifted out abruptly when tight for room 100 M out, just missed a place.
Never better than midfield, 8Ls back in rear bunch at halfway and marginally closer turning for home, never troubled principals.
Never landed a blow from the rear, tended to hang out, 10Ls last 1400 M out and same swinging for home, no impression.
Handily placed 3-back on fence early, about 6Ls behind in 6th from halfway to final bend, barged left by AS YOU WISH 100 M out, kept on for a place.
3-wide no cover early on, got on the fence 3Ls back in 2nd at the 1000 M, still 2nd taking final bend, one-paced and faded final 200 M.
5Ls back in 6th on fence at 1000 M and about 4Ls down turning for home in mid-division, held up from then until the 200 M, one-paced once clear.
Disputing early pace on fence at 1200 M, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, led again at top of home straight but wilted away once overhauled again about 250 M out.
2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 1000 M and a little closer on straightening, led 200 M out but overhauled by winner 100 M later, just hung onto 2nd.
3-wide with cover in rear down the back, 9Ls last at 800 M, made some fair late ground through beaten rivals in the homestretch.
Disputed early speed before striding forward to preferred position in front at 1000 M, found zero under pressure once headed off the final turn, eased close home.
In rear on the fence about 7Ls behind early tempo, about 6Ls down and hard pressed in 10th off final turn, plugged on at same speed.
Midfield on fence about 5Ls back at halfway and edged a little nearer at top of home straight but then held up from 300 M to 200 M, no headway once clear.
Slow to begin but recovered to raced 4th about 3Ls from the speed at the 1000 M, 2Ls down on straightening but found wanting when tempo quickened.
Mostly 3-wide without cover, 5Ls back in midfield at halfway, 4-wide off home bend when 4Ls back, found nothing off the bridle.
4-wide no cover down backstretch, 6Ls back around 10th at halfway, widest turning for home, never threatened to improve much.
Always in rear, about 8Ls behind at halfway and no better off turning for home, tame in the finish.
Keen through early stages when worse than midfield about 6Ls off leader, headway from top of home straight to be 2Ls down at 200 M, stayed on, just missed 2nd place.
Crowded at start and went back, still 7Ls back in 12th with 600 M to race, quickened up well in the straight to lead 100 M out, ridden clear.
Close-up throughout on debut, 1-1/2Ls back in 3rd at 1000 M with cover, hard ridden to lead briefly 250 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Eased to rear, 10Ls off the leaders 3 to 4-wide, benefited by the fast early tempo, made ground steadily 300 M.
Eased back, 8Ls behind the leaders 2 to 3-wide, favoured by the fast pace, no progress in final stages.
Pushed early to keep up in midfield, 6-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, suited by the fast pace, but blocked 400 M to 200 M, made up some ground when clear.
Steadily got across the rails, shared lead under pressure throughout, not suited by the fast early sectionals, dropped off 350 M.
Very slow away, helped by the fast pace but never competitive at rear.
Eased to sit just behind the pace group 2-wide, 2-1/2Ls off the fast early sectionals, raced keenly, drifted away 200 M to win without being fully tested.
Hard ridden to go forward, box seat, not suited by the fast early tempo, momentarily held up 400 M, nothing left when clear.
Eased back, 7-1/2Ls behind the leaders along the fence, helped by the fast pace, blocked 400 M to 200 M, never progressed when clear.
Eased to sit about midfield, 6Ls behind the leaders 3 to 4-wide, benefited by the fast pace, progressed steadily 400 M to grab 2nd just before the line.

Pushed early to occupy a more prominent spot and tracked the race's favourite throughout, 4-1/2Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, helped by the fast pace, made ground 600 M, secured 2nd from 400 M until the last few strides, flattened.
Eased to sit about midfield along the fence, 6Ls off the leaders, helped by the fast pace, made ground 600 M, momentarily held up 400 M, just ran on when clear.
Slow away, at rear, 10Ls off the leaders 2 to 3-wide, benefited by the fast tempo, made ground 300 M, flattened 100 M. (Bled.)
Pressed forward, trapped 3-wide throughout just off the leaders, harmed by the fast pace, emptied 300 M.
Shared the lead at disadvantageous fast early sectionals 2-wide, never had chance to take a breath, out of fuel 250 M.
Broke well from wide draw, settling in 4th or 3rd mostly within 2Ls of pace. Chased leader into straight but soon outpaced.
Ridden to lead early. Headed passing 1400 M settling one-back on rails. In similar position in 3rd into straight. Soon weakened.
Hard ridden to muster pace, eventually taking lead passing 1400 M. Went 1-1/2L clear under pressure 200 M out only to be denied at the finish.
Not far off far side. Raced on rails in midfield of bunched up field round the bend. Came under pressure upon straightening and weakened out of contention.
Slightly slow out. Raced wide in rear. Made steady headway down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Slightly slow out. Soon ridden to pick up pace joining rear of field. Remained in last few turning in but kept on well to the line.
Settled in midfield. Kept on behind runners early in straight before making moderate impression closing stages.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield of strung-out field. Moved closer to leaders and given reminders rounding home bend making ground. Went a bit wide turning in and soon gave ground.
Settled on rails in midfield. Shuffled back towards rear rounding home bend. Obtained split shortly after straightening and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide in midfield. Soon weakened after straightening.
Began fairly settling at the back. Waited with. Came from well back down centre of straight to snatch victory final strides.
Taken in behind to get towards outside, ended up 3Ls away amongst pack, didn't have clear running passing 400 M, made gradual progress last 300 M before run ended at 100 M.
Began well, shared early lead towards outside rails, always prominent and held a narrow advantage at 300 M, kept on soundly defying some late closers.
Well enough to begin, situated towards middle 1L off leading pair, challenged at 200 M, stayed on evenly but just outpaced last bit.
Standard jump, raced in behind lead line, 3 to 4Ls down by mid-point, ridden along at 400 M, drifted towards middle of course but only beat tired runners in run to line.
Drew inside and raced 1L off them towards centre of track, lacked usual turn of foot when sprint went on and struggled late.
Had plenty of pace to share lead early, kept tempo genuine racing against outside rail, right there to 100 M but run just ended last bit.
Jumped with them, raced closest to inside in middle of course, tried to improve at 400 M but unable to make much progress last furlong.
Raced in midfield 3Ls from lead, enjoyed a good trail between horses racing closer than usual, gained run at 200 M and made good ground late for 3rd.
Began awkwardly, ended up 4Ls away towards rear, always struggling to hold ground and lost touch in run to line jump.
Standard jump, raced at tail 5 to 6Ls back, made no headway in run to line. (Bled both nostrils.)
Slowed usual speed to race close to front towards centre, there to 400 M, found little when asked and dropped right out late.
No pace from outset, allowed to settle at rear near outside rails, ended up 5Ls off lead, gradually progressed from mid-point, charged late to go down narrowly.
Began well and raced close to lead not far from stand side, began to feel pressure passing 300 M, dropped out tamely thereafter.
Began nicely, raced 1L off lead on stand side, still right there at 400 M, raced tight when shifting at 200 M, kept closing before running out of room at 50 M mark.
Settled just better than midfield. Made no serious impression in straight but kept on well before slightly inconvenienced 200 M out.
Travelled in midfield. Baulked for a run briefly upon straightening. Soon faded.
Settled at the back. Finished off well inside final 200 M.
Soon in last few. Made no impression in straight.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Similar turning in. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Prominent. Took up running 1000 M out. Led until headed over 300 M out. Battled on dourly to hold 2nd.
Settled in 5th or 4th within 3Ls of pace. In similar position 3-wide in 4th turning in. Gradually faded inside final 300 M.

Began only fairly. Soon picked up to prominent position settling one-back in 4th on rails. Shuffled back to 2L 5th around home bend. Did not find much room early in straight. Found nil closing stages.
Travelled in last few. Fought on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Began well and led early. Ceded lead and settled one-back on rails 1000 M out. Similar turning in. Kept on same pace in straight without quickening.
Always well there. Just outside leader turning in. Gained slender advantage over 300 M out. Fought on well to finish.
Settled on rails in midfield. Ran on steadily down inner of straight to reach 3rd late.
Raced wide behind midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Settled on rails behind midfield. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
No pace as usual, raced 6Ls back on rails, suited by a quiet ride, saved ground on bend, pushed up between horses and got dream run through from 300 M to hit lead at 100 M and score a deserved win.

Standard jump and drifted back to race 6Ls back in running line, helped by even tempo, still well back to bend, lost run at 350 M and again at 150 M, charged late when clear running presented to finish an unlucky 5th.

Broke only fairly, ended up in running line racing 4Ls back in midfield, had a soft trip to bend, angled into clear at 300 M, made a strong run to hit lead passing 200 M but couldn't hold off late challenge.

Out well and pressed forward to take up a spot outside leader, didn't have an easy time with genuine pace on, pressured but outside horse on circle, couldn't sprint at business end and gradually lost touch.
Lacked early toe and shared rear 8 to 9Ls back on rails, struggling to keep up rounding bend, dropped further behind on turning and was well beaten.
Began well, showed usual pace but forced to do plenty of work to eventually take up running, kept even sections to bend, began to struggle at 200 M and weakened out late when work load took toll.
No early dash and took up expected role in rearward division, raced 3-wide with cover but suited by pace, switched widest on turning in, made solid progress down middle to make frame.
Began well, ended up in a nice position 3Ls back in running line, improved between horses on bend, didn't have clearest running in straight but kept improving before running out of room late.

Began in line, niggled along but unable to slot in, raced 3-wide 5 to 6Ls back with cover, urged along making a 4-wide run turning, made gradual progress but couldn't lift last 100 M. (Blood in trachea.)

Away with first few, raced 3-wide outside leaders, did it tough without cover with reasonable sectionals, kept challenging turning and still there at 200 M but hard run took toll and dropped off late.

Began awkwardly, regathered to race 4Ls away on rails in midfield, had a quiet trip in mid-section, trailed strongly between horses turning in, in traffic passing 200 M, closed hard when clear last furlong.

Restrained from a wide alley raced 3-wide with cover 8Ls back at rear, overraced in mid-section and failed to handle bend, ran off upon straightening and cost all chance of winning. (See Racing Incidents.)

First to hit ground, pressed to be challenge for front, ended up taking a sit behind leader, right there turning but lacked pick up to take inside run, kept on at same pace before badly crowded at 150 M.
Fast into stride, in early pace battle before taking a trail 2 to 3Ls back on fence, raced on bridle on back of pace to bend, in traffic turning and didn't get a clear crack at any stage. Not tested.
